Leo Carter, a security guard, gains godlike powers from the Ultimate Alias System and becomes the bodyguard of beautiful CEO Linda Snow. But her evil sister Ariana Moore, after framing her for murder, sends hitmen to finish the job.
When Linda's life hangs in the balance, Leo must use his hidden identity to save the woman he loves. Can he protect her from the Black Tiger Gang and its ruthless leader? The final showdown is coming!

column1: You Messed With the Tycoon's Mother!
column4: Liana visits a resort owned by her son Jacob Howell's R&J Group, accompanied by her grandson Riley. During their stay, they encounter impostors, which leads to a confrontation. Gina, Jacob's fiancée, and the resort manager arrive and mistakenly humiliate them. But when Jacob arrives, would it be too late to beg for forgiveness?

Reborn on her wedding day, Julia smiled at the plastic bouquet offered by Kathy, the nanny's daughter. In her past life, a moment of weakness cost her a priceless jade bouquet, her fiancé, her brother, and her life. Now, she clutches her grandfather's masterpiece, her eyes gleaming with ice... This time, she'll take it all back!

Reborn at her forced wedding, Shannon Young refuses her tragic end. She chooses to marry Arthur Xavier instead of Silas Shaw.
With her innate gift for healing, she cures Arthur. Together, they face schemes from Lucia Frost and her own past.
But in this new life, will her choice lead to salvation, or a different kind of ruin?

column1: (Dubbed) Too Late: His Stand-In Wife Is Gone
column4: For years, Lily loved Arthur, only to find she was merely a stand-in for his stepsister. After a brutal betrayal, she leaves and meets Theo, the powerful man who’s loved her since youth. Just as she accepts him, Arthur returns in regret. Two men. One choice. Who will win her heart?

Shane and Yvonne trade bloodshed for a quiet coastal life. Love, marriage and a baby on the way. But her former syndicate sends four killer to silence them. She fights alone to protect her husband, but he's actually the world's deadliest warrior. When Yvonne's life is on the line, will Shane unsheathe his blade? The ultimate showdown ignites!

After 20 years underground, secret billionaire Mark catches his wife Emily taking her ex Jamie to bed on Christmas Eve—and his kids even side with the new lover! Humiliated and cast out into the cold on Christmas Eve, Mark is finally done hiding. Now, the ruthless reckoning begins.

On the day he mourns his parents, Theo hears the truth for the first time. Betrayal, lust, and a fatal secret surface behind his perfect marriage. He chooses silence as a weapon, staging love, wealth, and loyalty into a deadly game. When the board meets, who will fall…and who is really pulling the strings?

column1: Too Late to Call Her Mom
column4: Rowan vanished from the throne of wealth to raise an abandoned boy in silence. Twenty five years later, on the day meant to crown him heir, strangers crash the wedding claiming blood ties and branding Rowan a thief. Betrayal cuts deeper than knives. When the tycoon returns and the past strikes back, will truth arrive before regret does…

A hotel waitress's fateful night with a CEO left her with twins who share his unique eyes. Five years later, his powerful family uses every cruel scheme, from fake DNA tests to kidnapping, to deny them. In a world built on lies, can the undeniable truth in their eyes unite a family torn apart by greed and betrayal?

column1: (Dubbed) My Ex's Uncle... Is Obsessed With Me?
column4: After seven years together, Charlotte Sanders is stunned when her fiancé trades her to his powerful CEO uncle, Sebastian Shaw, in a bid for funding. Instead of rejecting her, Sebastian marries her. What starts as an unexpected union soon turns into a love she never saw coming...

Tech CEO Saul hides his identity when he marries money-saving Rachel, who thinks he’s a “scammer.” Their hilarious contract marriage blossoms into real love, proving that the biggest happiness can be found in the smallest home.

On the wedding day, Cole is left heartbroken when his girlfriend Iris abandons him for another man. At this time, Wendy appears. She is pregnant with Cole's child. Later, Iris comes back with regret. Why did she come back? And how will Cole choose between them?

column1: Whoa! Janitor Dad Is A Big Shot!
column4: Zachary Chase, Grand Master of Titan Group, disguises himself as a cleaner. By chance, he rescues Yulia Harris, CEO of Rastar Group, from the drugging trap set by Mr. Weston. The following day, he honors his son’s request to attend a blind date, only to be subjected to unwarranted harassment. Yulia intervenes...

column1: Sister! No One Hurts You with Me Around!
column4: Clara Sinclair uncovers a devastating secret. The sister she raised for 16 years is not blood, while the true heiress, Iris Sinclair, was switched at birth and abused far from home. As Clara brings the timid Iris back and helps her rise, traps and betrayals close in. When the enemy is revealed from within the family, can Clara protect Iris before the truth destroys them all?

column1: Careful! My Fiancé Has X-Ray Eyes!
column4: Born with the power of X-Vision, Noah descends into the modern world with one goal: to find Amelia, the fiancée he never met. Only through their union can he unlock his divine power. But Amelia sees not a destined husband, only a total pervert. Provoked by her contempt, Noah decides to prove himself and win her heart… even if it brings chaos to the world.

column1: Unmask Ms. Calculated with My Alpha Daddy!
column4: Nila Tyler, Javon Lucas's fiancée, driven by her obsession with marrying into wealth, mistook Marina, her future stepdaughter, for a rival and assaulted her violently. Foiled initially, Nila escalated her madness by orchestrating Marina's abduction. How will Javon, who cherishes his daughter above all else, respond to such unforgivable acts?

column1: My Stepsisters Spoiled Me into a Legend
column4: Top scholar Cedric White's own family murdered him and gave his honor to his worthless brother. Reborn, he abandons his toxic mother and sisters, following his father into the Moore family instead. Suddenly three stunning sisters are fighting to pamper him! They call him their treasure, their pride, their everything. From death to devotion, from hatred to heaven. Will Cedric's new life be the paradise he never had, or another nightmare in disguise...?

Security guard Damien suffers two decades of humiliation until a shocking revelation changes everything. A mysterious ten million dollars and his daughter's sudden appearance unveil his true identity: heir to a vast fortune. From powerless nobody to feared tycoon, will Damien reclaim his throne and make those who wronged him pay?

column1: He Chose Her, I Chose His Throne
column4: Lance was the empire’s greatest general, betrayed and cast aside by her emperor. Scarred and stripped of power, she disappears. When invasion comes and the empire stands helpless, Phineas turns to Mr. Sleeping Dragon. Only then does he learn the woman he betrayed is the one who can save him. Will she save the empire again, or let it burn with him?

Stella Vale ditches her script as the doomed side character. To reclaim her life, she hires a sweet but tough college student, Leo Vance, as her fake boyfriend. He's the perfect partner in her revenge, until she discovers his true identity: her own mysterious, powerful fiancé. All his devotion was a trap. Now, the real game begins.

column1: Bye, Fake Family! I'm the Queen!
column4: Raised as a fake heiress for eighteen years, Yara is cast out when the real daughter returns and turns the family against her. Everyone thinks she's nothing without the Slaters. But after reuniting with her real family in the city's poorest district, Yara rises fast. Who is the real queen now?

Cecilia Xavier, a village doctor, financed her fiancé Preston Lopez's university education, only to discover he had been two-timing her all along. Determined to cut ties, she accidentally saved Miles Sullivan, a powerful figure who fell for her at first sight...

column1: The Wolf King Is My Consort
column4: In Latveria, where only a mother can rule, the throne goes to the princess who weds and bears an heir first. Warrior princess Quella grabs a stranger from the street and names him her consort. He is Adrian, Wolf King in disguise. Desire ignites, poison lurks, and bloodlines awaken. When love becomes the sharpest weapon, who will survive the crown…

Ella Miller is pushed into a pond by her greedy non-blood sons for her $5 million house payout. Rescued by a handsome stranger, Carter Group CEO Wes Carter, who fakes amnesia and goes by John. She falls for him as he helps her thrive. When Wes’ lie is exposed, heartbroken Ella leaves. Can he win her back as "John"?

column1: Oops! I Got a Billionaire Wife!
column4: At thirty, Jeremy remains a delivery man with a seemingly perfect wife. Unbeknownst to him, his three-year marriage is built on betrayal. Yet, despite his perceived worthlessness, someone else sees his value. Raina has silently given everything for him. Now, it's his turn to become her protector.

Jax Carter, the bastard son of a disgraced housekeeper and a fight gym patriarch, secretly trains under three outlaw coaches. When he's entered into The Crucible, an elite, once-in-a-generation MMA proving ground, he must carry the weight of betrayal, shame, and thousands of pounds of hidden resistance training. As rivals rise and family tries to crush him, Jax must prove once and for all: he wasn’t born to break... he was built to fight.

column1: My Fiancé Sold Me to the Mountains
column4: When Layla's fiancé drags her to a remote mountain village, she thinks it's a romantic trip, until he tries to sell her to another man!  Rescued by Calvin, a man from her past, they team up with other survivors to expose her ex's empire of lies. This time, she's about to make him pay for every lie...

Ruby helped Andrew become emperor in her past life but was betrayed and died. After being reborn, she chooses to marry Ian instead. In this second life, she uses her wisdom to overcome dangers again and again. What will happen to those who hurt her? Will the past repeat itself?

Leo Young's good deed saves CEO Evelyn Adams. Now her assistant, he unlocks a divine gift: touch reveals any object's truth. Gambling on jade? Appraising treasures? He sees billions. He declares to boss Lincoln Ford, "In Rivale, I make the rules." But can his power last forever?

Nina transmigrates into a drama and lies to the antagonist Shawn Grant about being his future wife to avoid her tragic fate. Over time, they develop real feelings. After trials and overcoming schemes by Ryan Grant and Yvette Swift, they break the plot's constraints, rewrite their destinies, and reunite in the real world for a happy ending.

Haley Evans loved Hugo Carter for a decade, only to learn she was the other woman. That ten-year "love" was just his cruel lie. To get revenge, she weaponized his son Jasper Carter, then teamed up with Hugo’s wife Nina to unleash ruthless payback. And Hugo’s nightmare is only just starting.

column1: My Cold Fake Bride is an Assassin!
column4: Raised by a shadow syndicate and forged into a living weapon, Diana returns home to marry into one of the most dangerous families in Riverton. Her mission is revenge. His world is lies. As a ruthless killer and a naïve playboy are bound by marriage, desire collides with blood secrets. Is love her weakness… or her deadliest weapon?

Julian hid his name, his power, and his fury for five years, playing the useless husband no one respected. When betrayal and a child’s lie push his marriage to the edge, he stops pretending. As the true mastermind behind a life-saving medical project returns to claim his throne, Julian’s revenge begins. Will the woman he loved recognize him before it’s too late?

column1: My Crush Married… Her Foster Father?
column4: Imprisoned at 12, Clara reunites with her first love, Joshua, 9 years later. Now, she weaves a deadly revenge, using herself as the perfect bait. Joshua sees the trap but willingly becomes both her protector and her pawn, leaving Clara torn between her mission for freedom and the love that threatens to unravel it all. Time is running out… can they get out of this alive?

column1: He Who Succeeds By Saving Lives
column4: Ethan wakes in a remote village with no past and a stranger’s kindness keeping him alive. As his hidden talent as a healer resurfaces, so do enemies who once tried to erase him. But the world he escaped is hunting him. When old power and new ties collide, who will Ethan choose to become…

A royal baby was swapped and abandoned years ago. Now grown, Luna Reed saves Prince Edward, leading to love and a promise of marriage. But at court, the scheming Sara Ford humiliates her, nearly having her killed. As Luna lies dying, a mark reveals her true identity: she is the Queen's lost daughter. Will the palace embrace or destroy its true princess?

After disappearing for years, Amos comes back as an ordinary guard hiding terrifying power. One moment of crisis shakes the entire city and wakes enemies long thought dead. Rumors spread about a fallen clan, five sisters tied to his past, and a revenge born from the night his family burned. What truth was buried the night his family burned?

column1: Hello Daddy, Your Son Is Right Here!
column4:
The Heir Trickster vs. His Clueless Daddy
A single night with a stranger leaves Zoe with a gifted child and years of misfortune. When Harley accidentally draws the attention of Amos, the Dominion’s most powerful grand seer, their lives collide in desire and suspicion. As secrets rise and families scheme, can love survive the truth waiting to strike…

column1: (Dubbed)My Wife is a Mute, I am a God
column4: Once a golden god, Lucius Reed falls from the heavens and awakes in the body of a ruined gambler, only to find himself bound to an extremely beautiful yet cruelly mistreated mute wife. He sets out on one clear mission: to help her reclaim her stolen voice. But how can a fallen god, trapped in a debtor's flesh, achieve such a miracle?

A geology prodigy, Clark, enters the Inovis mine on a secret rescue mission. Unrecognized and facing arrogance, he survives a sabotage cave-in and false accusations. Using his skill, he saves the miners, revives the mine’s vein, lifts his hometown from poverty, and secures justice as the wicked meet their fate.

After transmigrating into a scumbag dad during a famine, Charles must survive by winning over his five resentful daughters. But when their super-powerful birth mothers start showing up one by one, each more terrifying than the last, he realizes the real doom isn't the famine... it's his exes!

Sienna, born into a patriarchal suona family, secretly masters the forbidden craft and saves her clan, only to be betrayed and left deaf. Taken in by Gary Scobell, a hearing-impaired music heir, she learns to hear again and rises for her birthright as a hidden truth behind the legendary “Hundred Birds Hail the Phoenix” begins to emerge.

Overseas, Yvonne Shaw hides her true power. She is the secret master of the Obsidian Order. Called home to honor her dying grandfather's last wish, she agrees to wed the cruel Cassius Sterling. On their wedding night, he shames her. When his friends drive her guardian to his death, her mask falls. The hunt for justice begins. But will the law hold her back, or will the Order's vengeance be unleashed?

A village student awakens a mysterious healer system after betrayal and humiliation. With new vision and medical skills, he begins curing the impossible and exposing frauds, shaking the entire village. Yet as his rising power draws dangerous eyes, he must choose how far he will go to save others.

column1: The Master Chef... But He Can't Taste?
column4: Once the Master Chef, Noah is stripped of his taste and forced to live an ordinary life. But when a ruthless businessman comes to devour the restaurant and everything it shelters, he must reclaim his crown. With no palate to guide him, all he can rely on is his experience and passion. With the final days drawing in, can he protect everything he loves and become that legend again?

A wealthy couple, Shalini and Mukesh Saxena, are mistaken for con artists at a luxury resort and humiliated by a ruthless manager hungry for power. But when their true identities are revealed, the tables turn. Some lessons can’t be bought with money—and karma always collects with interest.

column1: Prisoner? No! I Want The Crown!
column4: Blair, the real princess of Daxon, switched at birth, suffered years of torment in an enemy prison. Twenty years later, she comes back, determined to take her power back from the fake princess Lily and her own family. What steps will Blair take? And what will happen to the people who hurt her?

column1: Top Scholar in a Jail Cell
column4: Julian Chase, the scholar everyone looked down on, was betrayed by his own family and thrown in jail. But they're in for the shock of their lives. At the Feast of Honors, two secrets will blow the roof off: he's the true Top Scholar, and the "peasant" by his side is actually the princess. Watch the most satisfying comeback unfold.

After discovering their spouses' betrayal, Liam and Sophia help each other through their divorces. As they rebuild their lives, an unexpected relationship grows into something deeper. But just when they thought they'd finally find happiness and move on, Liam's ex-wife showed up again with a knife...

column1: Sorry Dad, Your Money is All Mine!
column4: Olivia spent her life sacrificing for her family, only to discover it was all a lie. Refusing to be their victim any longer, she accepted a bold proposal from a billionaire, Nicholas, as a plan to take back her life and their fortune… Is their partnership just a clever act, or was the connection growing between them the real prize all along?

column1: Cheat on A Genius? You're Dead!
column4: Tech genius Claire gave up her career for her husband Marcus after marriage, only to be betrayed by his affair. Heartbroken, she files for divorce. How will she fight back? After the divorce, she meets her former rival from youth, Julian. What story will unfold between them?

After being reborn, Jessa Smith dumped that ungrateful adopted grandson Leon and took in Euan Lynn, who was labeled a “jinx”. Who’d have thought this little lucky star would bring them one stroke of good luck after another? Their family’s life flourished! Then her long-lost son Tristan Shay, now a wealthy tycoon arrived in search of his child, only to discover that...

After her dad's stroke leaves the family business in crisis, Catherine Lynn is forced into a marriage contract with Xavier Shaw to produce an heir. Navigating a hostile household and a loveless marriage, she finds unexpected support from a secret long-term admirer who helps her save the Lynn Group.

column1: EXM? My Bodyguard is a Toddler!
column4: CEO Evan Grant's life is under threat. His security has failed, and his last hope is an unusual bodyguard: six-year-old Luna Cox. She asks for hugs and ice cream, but when an assassin strikes, she actually defeats him with a lollipop! Can this little girl really keep the powerful CEO safe?

Wendy Lynn’s brother Evan dies mysteriously at Northstar Military Academy. Officials claim it was an accident, but she senses a cover up. Cutting her hair and becoming Warren Lynn, she infiltrates the Academy to hunt the truth. Everyone is a suspect, especially the cold instructor Ian Grant, Evan’s former mentor. As Wendy digs deeper, danger closes in and Ian begins to see through her disguise…

column1: You Don't Deserve to Be My Stepmother!
column4: Irene, back from overseas, met Grace at a club to size up her future stepmother. Not knowing who Irene was, Grace incessantly provoked her. Charles arrived in time to save Irene and cut ties with Grace after seeing her true colors. Through hardships, Irene gained newfound clarity. She later faced down her past tormentors with authority at a banquet, fully transformed into the formidable marshal's heiress.

Giselle is in danger because of her mom’s new tech. To protect her, her mom hires Sean as her bodyguard. But Sean isn’t just her bodyguard. He’s hiding the one truth that could destroy everything between them. And just when Giselle thinks she’s finally safe… something far worse begins to surface.

column1: What? My "Retired" Hubby is the Martial King!
column4: Ex-martial arts legend Kane Stone craves a quiet life with his wife, Jade. But when old enemies and a powerful agency target him, he's forced to fight back. He must defeat them all, even facing one who stole his power. When the battle ends, can he finally return to the peace he desires?

Six years ago, she loved him blindly; he left with a secret that broke them both. Now he’s a CEO, she’s fighting to save their daughter, and his “revenge” pulls her back into his world. But when the truth comes out… will love save them, or destroy them all over again?

Ex-astronaut Elena endures family's cruelty and Lucas's mistress Sophia's schemes. After being framed, she secretly joins Mars mission. During final days, Sophia manipulates Elena's son while Lucas makes empty promises. Elena leaves Earth heartbroken, leaving Lucas desperate to find her. Can Lucas really find Elena? And will she choose to forgive him again?

To fulfill her grandfather's last wish, Chloe decides to marry a man, only to accidentally pick the wrong one. To make things worse, he is her brother's biggest enemy, and now he won't let her go. A funny, tangled romance full of unexpected twists and sweet moments. Based on the novel "Ming Liao An Diao, Duan Ye Ta Ye Le" by Shi QiQi.

column1: Insult the General? Pay the Price!
column4: Former war legend Wayne attempts a quiet life in Sunvale, until his grandson is maimed and his granddaughter narrowly escapes assault. When he demands justice, the ruthless Wood family brutalizes him. As he lies on the edge of death, the loyal Captains who once served under him race back to Sunvale… but will they arrive before it’s too late?

In Cyralan, warrior goddess Regina is forced into a marriage of humiliation. When an imposter steals her name and life, a near-death experience awakens her past. Reborn with vengeance, she allies with Crown Prince Cassius to expose a royal conspiracy, reclaim her destiny, and fight for the throne that is rightfully theirs.

After a fatal betrayal at a palace banquet, sisters Sara and Mara are reborn. This time, Mara snatches the marriage proposal from the future regent, throwing Sara into the gilded cage of the palace to rewrite her destiny… Now, can Sara survive the nest of vipers she was never prepared for?

To survive, Adrian plays Crownspire’s Golden Rogue, hiding steel beneath swagger. When a contest for Princess Grace’s hand disgraces Auren, he finally reveals a sliver of his true skill, shaking the court and alarming the very family he intends to ruin. As power shifts and masks crack, Adrian tightens the trap he has set for years… who will be the first to step into it?

Anna falls in love with Blake, the heir of a mafia family. On the eve of their elopement, Blake falls into a coma and lose his memory. Anna is forced to leave. When they reunite at the hospital, Blake is engaged but drawn to her. Will love beat memory… and the mob?

After Leo repeatedly believes Ivy’s lies and lashes out at Rose and her daughter, Rose finally lets her years of silent love die. She chooses to marry a comatose heir, hoping to erase Leo from her life. But fate pulls them together again as buried truths stir and old wounds reopen. When Leo reaches for the truth, will Rose even look back…

Six years ago, singer Lyra Lee was left by Liam Fox after her surgery, told her baby had died. Now a star, she meets a girl, Ruby, singing her song on the street. But her rival Gavin Miles tries to stop the girl's performance. Is Ruby the daughter Lyra lost years ago?

column1: Jerk! The Billionaire Is Your Ex-Wife!
column4: Jordan leaves his girlfriend Emily and chooses Grace for her money. But everything changes when Emily's uncle, the richest man in the world, passes away and she becomes his heiress. Jordan learns the news, and he is struck by regret. But Emily's comeback is only just beginning.

column1: Bye, Mortal! This Goddess is Done!
column4: She was a goddess in disguise. And he was just a mortal man. When he chose to cheat, he made one heavenly mistake: some hearts break, but a goddess's heart brings down the thunder. Now he'll learn what happens when you break a divine heart...

column1: Crush My Jerk Bio-Dad With My Foster Dad!
column4: After rebirth, Xena Shaw makes the Shaw Clan’s “underdog”, Xavier Shaw her  foster dad. Armed with the Martial Sage’s martial arts, Xena helps him stage a comeback. They two play dumb to crush rivals at both the Martial Tournament and the Defender Convocation...

She gave him her heart to save his life, then broke it to let him live. Granted three final days, Evelyn returns from beyond, only to find the man she died for is now engaged to another. As time runs out, a devastating truth threatens to unravel, but will he discover it before she vanishes forever? A haunting story of sacrifice, secrets, and a love that defied death itself. EP 1:Evelyn reveals her sacrificial act of donating her heart to save Marcus, leading to her own demise, and is granted three final days to return, only to find Marcus engaged to another, while dealing with unresolved debts and the ticking clock of her existence.Will Marcus uncover the truth about his heart before Evelyn's time runs out?

column1: She Cheated on Me... With A Damn Bear!
column4: Winnie has always hated Teddy Bears, so hiding a forbidden secret inside one seems to be the last thing she'd do. At least, that's what her husband Eric believes. But when he senses something is off, their marriage starts to collapse, little by little. Funny how a Teddy Bear can bare everything...

"Jade God" disciple Ethan quit jade gambling after his father’s death. Heiress Chloe recruits him for his skill.
Ethan learns tycoon Harry killed his father, stakes all on a Triple Border Auction revenge. Aided by Walter, he defeats Harry.
But the mastermind hides, Chloe faces a forced marriage. Ethan heads north, his next fatal bet awaits.

column1: Too Late! My Heart Is Taken
column4: Cathy loved Lucian for years, only to find out his heart belonged to her sister, Claire. Heartbroken, she marries in Claire’s place and becomes the feared warlord Jasper’s wife. Now Lucian comes back full of regret, asking for another chance. Old love or new power… who will she choose?

column1: She Dumped Her Hell, Found Her Mr. Right
column4: Zoe walks out of a toxic marriage with her daughter, only to be pulled into Amos’s orbit on the same day. A rushed choice ties their lives together, stirring a past neither dares to name. As lies circle and desire breaks through the cracks, one question refuses to stay buried… who does Nora truly belong to?

An ancient princess wakes up in the 21st century and is forced to marry a powerful heir, Oscar. On her wedding day, he dies in a car crash. Now a “widow,” she rules the family like a queen… until the bodyguard starts staring at her with dangerous desire. Who is he? Her protector, or... EP 1:Maria, desperate to avoid a doomed marriage to Oscar, reveals a shocking past life where she was tortured to death by the Collins family after marrying him. Now reborn, she vows not to relive the nightmare, even if it means running away, while her mother tries to reason with her amidst the chaos.Will Maria escape her fate or be forced into the same tragic marriage again?

You think stealing his destiny and destroying his family is the end of his story? Vincent returns, scarred and reborn as a special master, to infiltrate the corrupt Sharpe clan. But revenge unravels a conspiracy reaching the throne itself. When the line between justice and ambition blurs, can he reshape the dynasty without becoming the monster he hunts?

Claire Lewis, the true heiress, was swapped at birth, endured a harsh childhood, and returned home only to be framed by the impostor Sarah and locked in an asylum.  There, she learns to fake madness and now she’s ready to strike back. Can she unmask the liar and reclaim her life before it's too late?

column1: Too Late: His Stand-In Wife Is Gone
column4: For years, Lily loved Arthur, only to find she was merely a stand-in for his stepsister. After a brutal betrayal, she leaves and meets Theo, the powerful man who’s loved her since youth. Just as she accepts him, Arthur returns in regret. Two men. One choice. Who will win her heart?

On the night she was born, Princess Pearl was exiled as an Omen of Jinx. 18 years later, she returned for revenge. She exposed the scheming Consort and Crown Prince, but in the end, a shocking truth was revealed: Pearl was the daughter of the murdered true heir.  After the Emperor was overthrown, she chose a peaceful life beyond the palace walls with her love.

Eighteen years ago, a wealthy heiress died at birth, and the hospital secretly replaced her with Clara Summers’s newborn daughter. By fate, Clara rescued the real heiress and raised her as her own. Now, at the Dance Academy, Sophia Shaw meets Jessica Ho, the girl who lived the life meant for her. When truth begins to surface, who will face the fallout first?

Susan returns to her hometown believing her charity has given the elderly a safe haven. Instead she finds whispers of bruises, vanished funds, terrified residents. She hides her identity, steps inside the shadows and discovers someone using her name for something far worse. If this is only the surface… what lies underneath?

column1: I Gave You 99 Chances to Hurt Me
column4: Ethan hides his status as heir to Sullivan Corp while falling for Clara, promising her 99 chances. But Clara's loyalty to Finn keeps testing him, while Luna Sorrel quietly waits in the wings. Secrets, rivalries, and misunderstandings threaten to turn love upside down... some lessons are just hard to learn.

column1: The Ex-Con Billionaire You Threw Away
column4: Ethan went to prison for his wife’s family. Three years later, she repaid him with divorce and another man claiming his legacy. But the ex-con they mocked… is actually the billionaire they should fear. Now the real game begins. Watch him rise and make every one of them pay!

column1: OMG! The "Fool" is A Real Badass!
column4:
Mocked as the “meathead” of Cloudrest, Xavier Goth was raised by Veronica Lane and blessed with a rare Yang Physique. When Veronica is threatened after Richard Goth’s death, Xavier risks his life to protect her. One forbidden training awakens a power no one expected. And when the “meathead” stops pretending, who in Azure Province can still stand in his way?
Adapted from the Fanqie Novel “Bei Shiniang Pian Qu Xiulian Hou, Shazi Wudile” by Lin Xiaoyu.

Betrayed by his beloved, Silas Gale loses his inner core and becomes a fool. Six years later, his daughter, Celeste, awakens a supreme power to save her mother, Claire, who is forced to marry the cruel Lucius. As Silas regains his martial strength to rescue his family, he faces heartbreaking sacrifices and battles against dark forces for love. Will love and power be enough to reunite this torn family?

When tech titan Derek and Evelyn finally plan their long-delayed wedding at Evelyn's daughter Ivy’s engagement, the unthinkable happens: Ivy's fiancé is Derek’s estranged brother, Hugo. An old rivalry reignites. Soon, Evelyn’s fortune crumbles, Ivy loses everything, and Derek’s invention is stolen. When the truth surfaces, will love or vengeance win…
 EP 1:At Ivy's engagement party, Derek is revealed to be the tech guru DK, and Evelyn announces their upcoming wedding. Meanwhile, Hugo's past and his connection to Derek come to light, igniting old rivalries.Will Derek and Hugo's past conflicts ruin Ivy and Hugo's engagement?

Cindy, a white snake, loved Adam, who met an untimely demise. She preserved a wisp of his soul within the Inner Pearl. Carter, however, constantly opposed her and even tried to steal the Pearl. Pushed to her limit, Cindy struck back—forcing Carter to watch everything he cherished crumble, leaving him in utter despair. She then dedicated her life to medicine, steadfastly fulfilling Adam's dream. EP 1:Cindy, a white snake, mourns the loss of Adam and preserves a wisp of his soul in the Inner Pearl. She is manipulated by Carter, who marries her for her powers and treasures, while secretly planning with Daisy to deceive Cindy and take advantage of her. Cindy's devotion to Adam's memory is overshadowed by Carter's schemes, leading to a tense and deceitful relationship.Will Cindy discover Carter's betrayal and reclaim her power?

Once a legendary martial arts master, Alistair Caldwell now lives as the most despised servant in Rivertown. To honor his late wife’s vow, he has buried his sword and faded into obscurity. But when his son is humiliated and his sect betrayed, he is forced to wield the sword once more, igniting a storm of vengeance and unveiling an 18-year-old murder mystery. EP 1:The court raises a massive bounty for Alistair Caldwell, the former Martial God of Solaria, who disappeared 18 years ago after his family was massacred. Now living in obscurity as a servant, his son is humiliated, triggering a confrontation that hints at Alistair's inevitable return to reclaim his honor and uncover the truth behind his family's tragedy.Will Alistair break his vow and draw his sword to protect his son?

column1: My Sister’s Fiancé, My Mafia Husband
column4: After her sister swaps fiancés and forces her to marry a 'bankrupt' man, Sophia accepts her fate—only to learn her new husband is heir to a powerful mafia empire. While her sister spirals in regret, Sophia finds unexpected love and loyalty in her arranged marriage. The one they cast aside becomes the one who rises. EP 1:Sophia discovers her sister Betty has manipulated their parents into switching fiancés, leaving Sophia engaged to Cedric, who is perceived as a 'broke loser', while Betty takes Sophia's original fiancé, Fread, whose father is a powerful mafia figure. The confrontation escalates into a physical altercation, revealing deep-seated family tensions and betrayals.Will Sophia uncover the true identity of Cedric and turn the tables on her sister's deceit?

Once an immortal, Zara married Jasper after he saved her from a deadly tribulation. To break his family’s curse, she sacrificed five years of her life and her power, only to find him betraying her and fathering a child with another woman. Heartbroken, she walked away with one final warning: the curse was never broken... EP 1:The Vale family pleads for help as their last descendant faces death due to the Harlow Curse, while Zara Rook, an immortal, reveals her past with Jasper Harlow and her sacrifice to keep him alive by taking on the curse herself. With only three days left until the curse ends, Jasper suddenly returns home, raising questions about his unexpected arrival.What secrets will Jasper's return unveil about the Harlow Curse and Zara's sacrifices?

For centuries, immortal Adrian has guarded the fading Life Current that sustains him. A hundred years ago, he saved Selene and vowed to marry her descendant, Clara Shaw, to renew his power. But when he returns, Clara is promised to another. To save himself, he must secure the arranged marriage, but can fate be forced? EP 1:Immortal Adrian Quinn arrives at Shaw Manor with his servant Maco, claiming to be invited by the now unconscious ancestor Selene, only to be refused entry by Clara Shaw, who is promised to another and refuses to marry a stranger.Will Adrian manage to convince Clara to fulfill the century-old vow and save himself from fading away?

column1: The Prince Loved The Wrong One!
column4: Victoria survives betrayal, cold parents, and a brutal army life. She gives her heart to Lucas… only to discover he was using her to shield her sister. She left heartbroken. Only then does Lucas finally see it. The woman he truly loves is the one he pushed away.

column1: The Child Who Held Their Fate
column4: Once a revered immortal, Wayne lends his divine fortune to the Sanders family and becomes a child for two years. But when greed breaks their pact, disaster follows. Now every clan wants the fallen immortal back, but he won’t be claimed so easily. His trials begin, and mercy isn’t one of them…

Top chef Anthony, once known as the “King of the Kitchen,” vanished at the peak of his fame. A year later, he returns as Tony, a lowly apprentice in a Michelin-star restaurant. When the restaurant faces ruin, he steps in to save it—only to reveal his true identity. Just as he regains glory, a sinister plot leaves him crippled and destitute. Now, with nothing left but the simplest of cooking skills, can he reclaim his destiny and once again conquer the world through the true essence of cuisine?

At their daughter's first birthday, Ethan shocks everyone by announcing a divorce, for his wife Luna is obsessed with a life-size teddy bear. In court, tensions rise and accusations fly. Just as the room holds its breath, the teddy bear moves on screen. What is the truth? EP 1:Ethan shocks everyone by announcing his divorce from Luna at their daughter's birthday, accusing her of cheating with a life-size teddy bear, while Luna defends herself and accuses Ethan of scheming for her family's assets.Will the court reveal the truth behind the mysterious moving teddy bear?

column1: Your Highness, This Is a Cupid Mission
column4: Selena, a clueless fairy, is flung into the crown prince's bath on a life-or-death mission: unite him and a general's daughter in 30 days, or be erased. She tries to match them, he meddles, flirtation sparks danger… and the prince ends up tying the red thread himself. But when she learns the mission target is her… can she survive? EP 1:Selena, the worst Cupid, is given a final mission to unite Crown Prince Kenan Lane and General's daughter Chloe Chee within 30 days or face erasure, leading to her desperate and comedic attempts at matchmaking.Will Selena succeed in her mission before time runs out, or will she vanish forever?

The driver's daughter, Nina, spent seven years quietly loving Jason, the heir who never saw her. One reckless night bound their fates, but secrets and betrayal tore them apart. Years later, she returns as a woman the world now admires, and the man who once broke her can only watch. Turns out, revenge isn't the sweetest payback—success is. EP 1:Nina, the driver's daughter, confronts Jason's mother after being accused of sneaking around with Jason for two years. Despite her deep love for Jason, she decides to walk away, revealing that her feelings were never reciprocated as Jason only ever saw Jenna Song.Will Nina truly be able to leave her love for Jason behind and move on with her life?

column1: Reborn as the Tycoon’s Vengeful Bride
column4: Betrayed by her cheating husband and mistress on their wedding day, Sophia is reborn to revenge! Teaming up with a cold, wealthy tycoon who secretly loves her, she takes down enemies, reclaims her fortune, and becomes the top female billionaire… but what twist lies in their revenge-driven love? EP 1:On what should be the happiest day of her life, Sophia is betrayed by her husband Marcus and his mistress Chloe, leading to the downfall of her family. Reborn before the wedding, Sophia vows to change her fate, protect her family, and exact vengeance on those who wronged her, with the help of the powerful Ethan Jones.Will Sophia succeed in her quest for revenge and protect her family this time?

column1: My Nemesis? Wait, That’s My Sister!
column4: War separates a mother, her son, two daughters, and a single locket. Years later, fate brings them together as strangers. A song, a pawned locket, a cruel mistake. When the lanterns glow again, will they finally recognize each other or be lost forever? EP 1:A mother and her three children are separated during a chaotic wartime scenario, where she fiercely protects them from being taken away amidst starvation and aerial attacks, but ultimately gets torn apart from her children during the ensuing panic.Will the mother ever reunite with her lost children?

column1: Who is the Bear in the Village?
column4: After a terrifying encounter with a human-faced bear, a family seeks help from hunter Dash Shaw. But the hunting party makes a ghastly discovery: the real Dash is already dead. As her father races back, Autumn Shaw realizes a terrifying truth: the imposter is still in their village… and she’s alone with him. EP 1:Autumn Shaw and her sibling are left alone at home when their father, an experienced hunter, doesn't return. They recall the legend of the Man-Faced Bear, a creature that mimics humans, and become terrified when they hear a knock at the door and smell something rotten—signs that the bear might be outside. They quickly block the door, fearing the worst.Will Autumn and her sibling survive the encounter with the Man-Faced Bear?

column1: Cleaning Lady? She's a Martial Queen!
column4: Once the Queen of South Fist, martial legend Ava West died saving a stranger at the height of her glory. In 2025, she wakes up in the body of an old janitor inside the fallen West Hall. Her legacy was stolen, her students betrayed her. She is back now. But is Southport ready to face the legend it forgot? EP 1:Ava West, the once-revered Queen of South Fist, mysteriously awakens in 2025 in the body of an elderly janitor at the now-fallen West Hall, discovering her legacy was stolen and her students betrayed her. As she grapples with her new reality, she witnesses the humiliation of the West family by the Hunts, descendants of a former student, igniting her fury and determination to reclaim her family's honor.Will Ava West rise again to teach the Hunts a lesson they'll never forget?

To repay a life debt, York Payne married Jacey Jones, a woman he doesn't love. After heartbreak, she left—unknowingly collapsing his empire. When he promotes his muse with stolen designs, her triumphant return is championed by his secret rival: the brother who loved her first. Now defeated and alone, can the fallen tycoon win back the woman he wronged, or is her heart forever beyond his reach?

After Demon Killer Bob missed a crucial penalty ten years ago, his team dissolved, his mentor was paralyzed, and he endured a decade of disgrace. Now, as an assistant coach for Gale Team, he is framed by the incompetent head coach and forced out. Then, Maria recruits him to lead the amateur Blue Sky Team. Under his guidance, they stages an incredible comeback, climbs to the top, and gains the national championship! EP 1:Bob Simpson, once known as the Demon Killer, faces the consequences of missing a crucial penalty kick ten years ago, leading to his team's disbandment and his disgrace. Now, as an assistant coach for Gale Team, he is framed by the incompetent head coach and forced out. However, his tactical brilliance shines through when he leads the amateur Blue Sky Team to a surprising victory, hinting at a potential comeback.Will Bob's tactical genius be enough to lead Blue Sky Team to the national championship, or will his past demons continue to haunt him?

For five years, billionaire heiress Winnie played fairy godmother to her boyfriend's startup, turning him from broke to billionaire. But when she catches him cheating with his employee, now she's revealing her true identity to destroy the empire she built and teach him the ultimate lesson: never bite the hand that funds you. EP 1:Winnie, a billionaire heiress who has secretly supported her boyfriend Jonathan's rise to billionaire status, prepares to reveal her true identity and gift him a significant portion of her company at their upcoming wedding. However, her plans are shattered when she discovers Jonathan's public affair with his VP, Stacy, just days before the wedding.Will Winnie's revenge dismantle the empire she helped build?

column1: My Ex's Uncle... Is Obsessed With Me?
column4: After seven years together, Charlotte Sanders is stunned when her fiancé trades her to his powerful CEO uncle, Sebastian Shaw, in a bid for funding. Instead of rejecting her, Sebastian marries her. What starts as an unexpected union soon turns into a love she never saw coming... EP 1:Charlotte Sanders is shocked when her fiancé Julian Stone trades her to his powerful uncle, Sebastian Shaw, for financial gain. Despite her initial resistance, Sebastian insists on keeping her and even marries her, marking the beginning of an unexpected and intense relationship. Charlotte starts to question her feelings for Julian and wonders if Sebastian might actually have genuine emotions for her.Will Charlotte embrace her new life with Sebastian, or will Julian's betrayal drive her back to him?

The world’s top chef disappears at his peak. During a local cooking contest, Skylar, a humble prep cook, unveils himself as the lost master. Betrayed and maimed, he loses his hands and becomes a beggar. Armed with just one simple dish, can Skylar overcome his enemies and reclaim his culinary throne? EP 1:Skylar Fong, the world-renowned Master Chef, achieves an unprecedented Grand Slam at the World Culinary Competition, attracting lucrative offers from top restaurants. However, amidst the celebration and greed of those claiming to be his relatives, Skylar mysteriously disappears. A year later, a humble prep cook in a small restaurant is scorned for his lowly status, unaware of the dramatic turn his life is about to take.Will the prep cook uncover his true identity as the missing Master Chef?

Serena gave up her leg to save Lucian, but what Lucian gave Serena was his scorn. Crushed, she decides to leave, when Julian comes and lights her dark world. This time, she only lives for herself! Meanwhile, Lucian finds that Serena is the one he really loves...

Once called the Devil Lawyer, Thomas used the law to protect the rich. Until the day his father was killed, and the truth shattered him. Now he fights for the weak, but the rules have changed. In a world built on power, who decides what justice really means? EP 1:Thomas Fowler, known as the 'Devil Lawyer' for his undefeated record defending wealthy criminals, faces a tragic turn when his father is killed by a murderer he had previously acquitted. Overcome with grief and guilt, Thomas's life spirals as he also learns that both he and his mother have leukemia. As he struggles with his downfall, a stranger named Leon Grain approaches him, hinting at a possible redemption or new path.Will Thomas find redemption and a new purpose in the face of his tragedies?

Evelyn Miller returns home with joy in her heart and a surprise for her daughter-in-law. But fate leads her to Luna, her son Henry’s mistress. She stays silent, watching. At dinner, Luna mistakes her for Henry’s wife and sneers. Evelyn’s response? A calm invitation to call Henry. And when he walks in... EP 1:Evelyn Miller returns home with a surprise for her daughter-in-law Amelia, but fate leads her to Luna, her son Henry's mistress. At dinner, Luna mistakes Evelyn for Henry's wife and sneers, prompting Evelyn to calmly invite her to call Henry, revealing the truth when he arrives. Meanwhile, tensions rise as Evelyn warns Henry against neglecting Amelia, and Luna plots to win Evelyn's approval to secure her future with Henry.Will Luna succeed in winning Evelyn's approval, or will her dark past come to light?

Nobody noticed Evan Chase until one dream changed everything. He wakes up able to predict the future, and every word he says turns into gold. A joke about tissues makes paper stocks soar. A random quote sends the market wild. Fame, fortune, and love come rushing in. But can luck really last forever? Let's see! 
Adapted from the Fanqie Novel “Weizhuang Gushen, Xiaohua Zhuizhe Wo Han Baba” by Yelusagouliang. EP 1:Evan Chase wakes up from a dream where he was the 'Stock Prodigy', predicting market trends perfectly. Fueled by this vision, he starts investing aggressively, only to see his bank account plummet to zero. Mocked and ridiculed, he questions his belief in the dream. However, online, he gains a following as the 'Stock Prodigy', attracting admirers like Tara Dean, a campus belle, who seeks his financial guidance. Just as Evan starts to doubt himself, his online persona gains unexpected credibility, leaving him—and the audience—wondering: was the dream just a fluke, or is there something more to his sudden 'gift'?Will Evan's online fame as the 'Stock Prodigy' reveal the truth behind his dream, or is he heading for another disastrous downfall?

A wealthy couple, Shalini and Mukesh Saxena, are mistaken for con artists at a luxury resort and humiliated by a ruthless manager hungry for power. But when their true identities are revealed, the tables turn. Some lessons can’t be bought with money—and karma always collects with interest. EP 1:Shalini and Mukesh Saxena plan a nostalgic trip to Holiday Resort for their 30th wedding anniversary, but their children worry about their safety. Meanwhile, the resort manager Parul sees this as an opportunity for promotion.Will Parul's VIP treatment reveal the Saxenas' true identities?

Selena married a mafia CEO to save her father, never expecting their business deal would turn real. But when she discovers a devastating secret: she's just a pawn in his game to protect his first love, this contract wife must outplay the king of the underworld at his own dangerous game...

When Chloe faces relentless bullying at school, her mother, Eleanor, rises up to protect her. Unmasking lies, crushing false claims, and shattering deceit, Eleanor activates Bear Mode, and justice will be served — and no one escapes the consequences. She fights. She protects. She conquers — all for her child. EP 1:Chloe is bullied at school for her mother not picking her up at the gate, leading to a confrontation where her mother's protective instincts are ignited.Will Eleanor confront the bully's mother and take a stand for Chloe?

Returning from a business trip, Tia Sherry finds her office invaded and her husband standing against her. Refusing to tolerate betrayal, she takes retaliation. When her husband sides with the wrong people and undermines her again, Tia strikes even harder...

He was a legend in disguise. They are a team of bullies. When someone tries to seize control of the mountain road in his village, this humble mechanic must get behind the wheel one last time. Can he win the race and save the road? EP 1:Hugo Harris, the unbeaten racing champion, returns home unexpectedly before the EuroSpeed Grand Prix to find Winston Chen, the former fastest driver who disappeared five years ago. Meanwhile, a team of racers plans to take over the mountain road for training, setting up a potential conflict.Will Winston Chen step back into the racing world to face Hugo Harris and protect his village's road?

Modern heir Darren and Dr. Juliette are thrown into the Great Dawn Dynasty. He is a weak emperor, and she's a disgraced physician. By using her skills, she helped him conquer this empire. But after confessing their love and come back home, they'll face the ultimate question: can a love written in the stars survive the harsh light of day? EP 1:Darren, the heir to the Regent Group, plans to confess his love to Dr. Juliette after working secretly by her side, but a sudden accident transports them both back in time to the Great Dawn Dynasty, where Darren finds himself as the Emperor and Juliette as a disgraced physician.Will Darren and Juliette's love survive the challenges of their new roles in the Great Dawn Dynasty?

Six-year-old Torrie ventures alone to find her family, only to be deceived by Nathan Shaw, drafted as a martial arts instructor to mend Marcus Shaw’s shattered meridians. Triumphing in the clan’s trials and the fierce Westlands Tournament, Torrie’s unparalleled skill silences all skeptics. And she reunites with Marcus, her long-lost father. But peace is fleeting, with hidden threats brewing… EP 1:At the Summit Peak Succession Trials, Warren, a seemingly untalented handyman, challenges Xavier, a disciple who has mastered three martial arts, under the guidance of Torrie, a mysterious and legendary figure. Against all odds, Warren wins, humiliating Skyler Young and proving Torrie's unparalleled teaching skills. Meanwhile, Torrie declares her intention to find her parents and effortlessly defeats Skyler Young before leaving Summit Peak, only to be discovered by the Shaw Family after an apparent fall from the peak.Will Torrie's incredible skills help her reunite with her parents, and what role will the Shaw Family play in her journey?

column1: (Dubbed) OMG! My Husband is OG Warder
column4: Kane thought he was done with fighting. But when the Frostpeak Sect comes for revenge and the Aegis Bureau hunts him down, He is forced to unleash the power he sealed away. He fought through assassins and agents. He defeated the vicious Ash Yates. But he soon learns they were merely pawns... So who is the true mastermind pulling the strings? EP 1:Kane's peaceful life is disrupted when members of the Frostpeak Sect, led by Luke and his mother, confront him and Jade, revealing Jade's hidden martial arts skills and her connection to the Azura Order.Will Jade's secret past put Kane and their family in even greater danger?

column1: You Hurt Our Daughter? Then Face Me!
column4: Annie Hill sacrificed her career for her family, only to discover her husband's bitter betrayal. He squandered her fortune, flaunted a mistress, and let his illegitimate son bully their autistic daughter. Now, Annie is reclaiming her empire. But as she cuts off his power and wealth, her desperate husband strikes back. How far will a cornered man go when everything is on the line? EP 1:Annie Hill, having sacrificed her career to care for her autistic daughter Flora, entrusts her company to her husband, only to discover his deceit as he prioritizes his illegitimate son Jason's education over Flora's, using company funds for personal gain.What will Annie do when she uncovers her husband's betrayal?

column1: Oops! The Worker Is the Heir!
column4: Heir to Tim Group, Wayne goes undercover at a construction arm to learn the business from the ground up. At a subsidiary, he uncovers a corrupt foreman skimming money and cutting corners. As deeper conspiracies and silent enemies close in, he fights back with strategy and nerve… but when power bites back, will he rise, or be buried? EP 1:Heir to Tim Group, Wayne, begins his undercover mission at Tim Construction to learn the business from the ground up. He quickly discovers the harsh realities faced by workers and uncovers corrupt practices by the foreman, raising questions about the company's integrity.Will Wayne expose the corruption and stand up for the workers, or will the foreman's shady dealings put him in danger?

column1: Pain Made Her. Law Freed Her
column4: Once trapped in violence and fear, Vivian fought to survive every day. Then came the moment she chose law over silence. With sharp resolve—and the help of stoic attorney Amos—she rises toward the light. But when the past returns and power tempts the heart…can she stay unbroken? EP 1:Vivian successfully argues her case in court, proving the defendant's liability, but faces a violent confrontation with her abusive ex-husband, while Amos struggles with his unresolved past involving his missing fiancée.Will Vivian finally break free from her tormentor, and what dark secret does Amos's missing pendant hold?

A young woman from a noble family is torn from her world and forced into the ruthless general’s mansion. Between power, betrayal, and forbidden emotions, she must survive a web of lies and cruelty. Yet beneath the bloodshed hides a truth far darker—and far more dangerous—than she ever imagined. EP 1:General Gabriel Hughes brutally forces Quinn Turner into a marriage proposal by threatening to kill her entire family, leading to a tragic massacre when she refuses, and ultimately confining her to the Celestial Tower.Will Quinn find a way to escape the ruthless general's grasp?

After 15 years of research, Nathan Carter retires with the Skycore Chip, a breakthrough that shakes the world. He just wants a quiet life with his family, but fame has a way of stirring up old grudges and greedy hearts. When a legend meets his family drama, things just get gloriously messy... EP 1:Nathan Carter, after 15 years of groundbreaking research, retires to seek a quiet life with his family, but his return stirs excitement and greed among powerful figures who rush to meet him, while his family faces emotional and financial struggles.Will Nathan's peaceful retirement be shattered by the chaos of fame and family drama?

Rural Sophie loved Jason, but his parents, despising their gap, made her vanish! Six years on, she's hurt at his factory. Her brother Samuel and sister-in-law Laura seize her compensation. Their 6-year-old Cecilia begs Jason for help, only to be called a fraud! As Samuel and Laura scheme against Sophie's life, Cecilia fights back, but can she win? EP 1:Cecilia, a young girl whose mother is critically ill and in need of a bone marrow transplant, is seen begging for money. Initially misunderstood as greedy when she orders excessive food, it's later revealed she needs the nourishment to recover from giving blood for her mother's treatment. The community, moved by her sacrifice, rallies to support her, offering food, money, and encouragement.Will Cecilia's mother survive the surgery, and where is her father in all this?

column1: I Was His Savior, Now His Curse
column4: Ten years ago, Evan Moore saved Winnie Hurst’s life. Ten years later, she marries him to return the favor, only to bear three serpent eggs that bind their souls. But Evan mistakes his foster sister for his true savior and forces Winnie into a cruel “egg game.” Two die… and so does her love. What happens when the last egg cracks?

column1: My Icy CEO Can't Resist Me
column4: Once a brilliant but loveless business prodigy, Claire Jennings wakes up in a new life, branded a scandalous socialite and abandoned wife. To survive, she sets one ruthless goal: win back her cold, powerful CEO husband Adrian Steele. But as desire turns real and secrets start to unravel, she discovers the truth about who really betrayed her... and who she truly loves. EP 1:Claire Jennings, once a dedicated workaholic, wakes up in a new life as a scandalous socialite and abandoned wife. As she tries to navigate her new reality, she confronts her adopted sister Isabella, who has been scheming against her. The tension escalates when Claire retaliates against Isabella's provocations, revealing her newfound strength and determination to uncover the truth behind her betrayal.Will Claire's confrontation with Isabella expose the secrets of her past life?

They called her insane and locked her away.
When Gina escapes a brutal 3-year asylum imprisonment, ready for payback, she crashes a wedding and blackmails a powerful CEO into a marriage of convenience. But when their fake relationship gets real, the line between ally and enemy blurs. One wrong move could get them both killed... EP 1:Gina is forcibly sent to a mental hospital by her father, who reveals he only married her mother for influence and now wants Gina out of his life.Will Gina survive the horrors of the asylum and return for revenge?

column1: Silent No More: I Got My Prince
column4: A car crash stole her words. His betrayal stole her trust. But as she signs the papers that end it all, a man from her past returns with a sudden proposal, and her life takes an unexpected turn... EP 1:Vivian Sutton, who has been pretending to have aphasia to stay with her husband Hugo, decides to finally let go and agrees to a sham divorce, only to be proposed to by Shawn Powell, a man from her past.Will Vivian accept Shawn's sudden proposal and start a new chapter in her life?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Rich Family Feud', 'Modern Romance']

column1: (Dubbed)The Goddess’s Revenge: So Begins His Ruin
column4: Zoey, a celestial goddess, sacrifices herself to forge a divine sword, making Shawn an emperor. But blinded by ambition, he betrays her, breaking his sacred vow. As his empire falls without her grace, the question remains: When his throne becomes a cage of regret, will Shawn’s kingdom be worth the love he destroyed? EP 1:Zoey, a celestial goddess, sacrifices her divine power to forge a sword for Shawn, turning mortal to save him despite the dire consequences. Her father warns her of the repercussions, including fading beauty and health with every danger Shawn escapes, and the possibility of her return to the Celestial Realm if Shawn betrays her. Shawn, now an emperor, vows eternal loyalty to Zoey, but as he returns victorious, signs of Zoey's deteriorating condition become apparent, raising questions about the future of their relationship.Will Shawn remain faithful to Zoey, or will his ambition lead to her downfall?

Violet, the Prime Minister’s concubine’s daughter, is caught in a scheme that leaves her alone with Regent Julian for one night that changes her life forever. He first thinks she’s part of the plot but soon learns the truth. In a world full of danger, can they find their happiness? EP 1:Violet, forced into a dangerous situation, finds herself alone with Regent Julian after being drugged. Despite initial misunderstandings, Julian realizes Violet's innocence. The encounter leads to an unexpected pregnancy, with Violet discovering she's carrying twins, a revelation that complicates her life further in a society where such a situation could be deadly.How will Violet navigate the dangers of her pregnancy in a world that may not accept her or her unborn twins?

column1: My Favorite Model Is An Undercover Billionaire
column4:
Ambitious designer Nancy Sinclair never imagined her sketches at Starluxe would lead her into the dazzling and dangerous world of high fashion. When she meets Evan James, a charming model with a secret life as Italy’s youngest billionaire, passion and ambition intertwine in ways neither can control.
As their worlds collide, old money rivalries, forbidden love, and buried scandals threaten to unravel everything they’ve built. EP 1:Nancy faces a last-minute disaster when the main design for the fashion show is damaged, forcing her to make a bold, improvisational decision to save the event.Will Nancy's daring choice save the show or lead to a major scandal?

After his girlfriend Aurora‘s brutal death, Sean, psychologically shattered, fakes recovery to orchestrate an intricate revenge. He exploits the conflicts among her murderer Vincent and Janet manipulating them into turning on each other. As the culprits fall, Sean unveils the truth... EP 1:Sean Morrow, a former brilliant doctor, is discharged after faking recovery from a mental breakdown caused by his girlfriend Aurora's brutal death. Despite being questioned about his hallucinations and Aurora's death, Sean maintains his composure, securing his release. Meanwhile, dark plans for revenge begin to form as he receives a wedding invitation, hinting at his next moves.Who will be Sean's first target in his intricate revenge plan?

Five years ago, at a rural hospital, Julian's wife Raina was dying in childbirth. He saved her with his rare blood, but only their son survived. Raina's father, Billionaire Henry Shaw, took her and the boy away, forcing Julian apart. Unknown to Raina, their daughter also lived. Julian tried to chase them but was hit by a car. Believing Julian and her daughter dead, Raina poured her love into their son. Years later, visiting the past, she unexpectedly reunited with Julian and their daughter. EP 1:During a critical childbirth, Julian must make a heart-wrenching choice to save his wife Raina or their babies, revealing his rare Rh-negative blood type to the hospital staff. After the successful transfusion, Raina's true identity as a billionaire heiress is exposed, leading to her being forcibly taken away by her family, leaving Julian devastated.Will Julian ever reunite with Raina and their surviving child?

After her wealthy husband cheats, Jane Lewis turned her divorce drama into an empire. She rebrands as a lifestyle influencer, gaining millions of followers and catching the eye of Jason Marsh, a tycoon who's ready to commit. Now her ex wants her back, but she's already leveled up! EP 1:Jane Lewis discovers her husband Mike's infidelity, shattering her perception of their decade-long marriage. Despite her devastation, she puts on a brave face for their daughter Anna, while confiding in her friend Fiona about the betrayal.Will Jane confront Mike about his infidelity and take control of her life?

column1: I Took My Daughter's Heart For Her
column4: When straight-A student Annie lies dying after a car crash, her last call to her mom is dismissed as a lie. Her mother, a surgeon, unknowingly removes Annie's organs, and transplants the heart into the scheming adopted daughter who orchestrated it all. But when the truth emerges, what could she do to make everything right? EP 1:Annie, a straight-A student, gets into a car accident and desperately calls her mom, a surgeon, for help. However, her mother dismisses her plea as a lie, leading to Annie's tragic death. In her final moments, Annie requests her organs to be donated, unknowingly setting the stage for a dark twist involving her scheming adopted sister.What will happen when the truth about Annie's death and her organ donation comes to light?

When Harrison Liam learned that Dr. Laura Ash, the leading mind behind Serica's lithography project, was returning to the country, he saw a rare chance to secure her talents. But who could have predicted Laura would encounter his own wife and son on her flight? What exactly did they do to Laura that left her gravely injured upon landing? EP 1:Dr. Laura Ash is celebrated for her groundbreaking work on the EUV lithography system, receiving the Serican Medal of Honor. Meanwhile, Harrison Liam sees an opportunity to exploit her return for business gains, while his wife and son cause a disturbance on her flight, leading to a confrontation.Will Dr. Ash's crucial research and personal safety be compromised by the Liam family's actions?

column1: Lost Beneath the Rubble? Found by Love!
column4: Twenty years ago, a quake tore Liana Shaw’s family apart—she saved her sons but lost her baby girl. That girl, now Jane Louise, unknowingly joins the Grant Group, her birth family’s empire. When a demolition project brings them face to face, will blood ties heal old scars or rip them open again? EP 1:During a family meal, a sudden earthquake hits, forcing Liana Shaw to protect her children, Xavier and Jerry, as they scramble to safety.Will the family survive the devastating earthquake?

column1: My CEO Son Kicks The Adopted Traitor
column4: Joyce Shaw has been secretly drugged for years by her adopted son Felix and his wife, set to be a “heart donor” for his mother-in-law. On the eve of surgery, she uncovers the deadly plot and flees. Billionaire Jason Shaw recognizes her birthmark and confirms she’s his lost mother. But can he save her before it’s too late...? EP 1:Joyce Shaw discovers her adopted son Felix's sinister plan to use her as a heart donor for his mother-in-law. She escapes on the eve of the surgery and encounters a kind stranger who helps her. Meanwhile, billionaire Jason Shaw, recognizing the candy Joyce offers as something his missing mother used to give him, realizes she might be his long-lost mother due to her distinctive heart-shaped birthmark. He urgently mobilizes his resources to find her before it's too late.Will Jason Shaw find his mother before Felix's deadly plan succeeds?

For five years, Kaven hid his billionaire idenity to support the woman he loved, Star. However, she cheated on him who was framed as "the other man," and was dumped at their wedding. The epic reveal of his true power left Star begging... EP 1:Kaven, who has hidden his billionaire identity for five years to support Star, is preparing for their wedding when shocking news breaks out—Star is caught cheating with an employee, tarnishing her reputation and jeopardizing their upcoming nuptials.Will Kaven confront Star about her infidelity before the wedding?

column1: My Son’s Mistress Defies Me? I’ll Ruin Her!
column4: At a luxury store, Fiona White is stunned as a bold woman Yolanda steals a necklace meant for her daughter-in-law. Claiming to be her son’s fiancée, Yolanda shatters $800K in gems with the card that Fiona gave to her son. What secret is Yolanda hiding—and will Ryan side with her…? EP 1:Fiona White orders an expensive necklace for her daughter-in-law at Harborton Jewelry, but a bold woman named Yolanda claims it for herself, revealing she is engaged to Fiona's son, Ryan, and uses the exclusive diamond black card Fiona had given to Ryan.Will Ryan stand by Yolanda's shocking claim, or will Fiona uncover the truth behind this audacious move?

Having lost her parents young, Mia received a million in insurance money. Trusting her husband's promises, she moved far away to marry into the Lynns, spending all her savings on them, only to be bullied by her husband's family. Enraged, she suffered a heart attack. But she reborns with a payback system, and now vows to reclaim everything back! EP 1:Mia, who has sacrificed everything for her ungrateful family, suffers a heart attack after being emotionally and financially drained by them. In her final moments, she overhears their cruel plans to profit from her death through an insurance policy, leading to her rebirth with a powerful payback system.What will Mia do first with her newfound power to seek revenge?

column1: Reborn to Hunt My Hubby Back
column4:
Betrayed in her past life by her own brother and best friend, Yvonne Quinn is gifted a devastating second chance. Reborn on the eve of childbirth, she now holds the ultimate leverage. Vengeance is a mother's duty. But in a world where enemies hide behind smiles, will her second chance end in victory... or deeper tragedy?
Adapted from the Fanqie Novel “Chongsheng Fenmian Ye, Liao Jing Yaozhu Laogong Bu Songkou” written by Liuliu Mitang.
 EP 1:Yvonne Quinn, betrayed in her past life, is granted a rebirth on the eve of childbirth, where she vows vengeance against those who wronged her and her child, starting with preventing the deadly blood draw meant for Xavier Quinn's treatment.Will Yvonne succeed in protecting her child and exacting her revenge in this new life?

After being murdered by his wife Canace Harris and her lover Jackson Reed, reborn Stefan Ford cut off all financial support and proposed to Diana Mills. To maintain her lifestyle, Canace took loans and fell into Stefan's business trap. When she tried to disrupt the wedding, she found the bride had been replaced. Left in debt and alone, Canace faced Stefan's powerful return with his new wife to settle past scores. EP 1:Stefan Ford, the once wealthy and generous husband, is betrayed by his wife Canace Harris and her lover Jackson Reed. After being left for dead, Stefan finds himself back at the auction where he took a massive loan for Canace, now realizing the depth of her deceit and plotting his revenge.Will Stefan's newfound knowledge from his past life give him the upper hand in his revenge against Canace and Jackson?

Master Simon Forge, the world's finest bladesmith, faked his death in a forge blast to escape royal constraints. Rescued by Ms. Frost of Bladeforging Manor, he lived as a Novice for three years where they fell in love. When Chancellor Quentin Smith threatened the manor with the Supreme Sword, Simon shattered the divine weapon using a broken blade. EP 1:Master Simon Forge, the greatest bladesmith, fakes his death to escape royal demands for the Supreme Sword, leading to a city-wide manhunt. Meanwhile, as a novice in Bladeforging Manor, he faces humiliation and the threat of expulsion, unaware that his true identity may soon be uncovered.Will Simon's hidden past be revealed as the manor rushes to fulfill an urgent order?

column1: Mr. Ex, I Won't Turn Back
column4: Esabel and Ethan were once deeply in love until his betrayal shattered everything. When fate struck her with a terminal illness, Lucas, the man who never stopped searching for her, saved her, faked her death, and gave her a new life. Now she has returned, reborn, for revenge, redemption, or love? EP 1:Esabel, suffering from terminal cancer, makes her 18th attempt to divorce Ethan Shaw, who continuously stands her up. After learning he's planning a second child with another woman, she pleads for freedom, and they agree to meet for the 19th attempt. Meanwhile, Ethan celebrates his secret son's inclusion into the family, highlighting the stark contrast between their past love and present betrayal.Will Esabel finally break free from Ethan's grasp, or will his control over her life persist even in her final days?

column1: Loved the Wrong Man? I'll Make It Right
column4: She thought his story ended in childhood. A lookalike gave her a way out, until the shadow of the real one comes back, stirring jealousies, secrets, and a choice that will burn everything down... EP 1:The episode reveals that survivors from the Lawson family have escaped, prompting a search to find them dead or alive. Meanwhile, Laura is distressed over her fiancé Payne's infidelity, which is trending online. Yuri suggests using a lookalike male model to confront Payne, hinting at deeper schemes and personal vendettas. The episode ends with a dramatic reunion as Ivan, who had previously led pursuers away to protect someone, finally finds them.What secrets will unfold as Ivan reunites with the person he protected, and how will Laura's plan with the lookalike escalate the conflict?

Clara Jones, a top crisis expert, returns home to retire and unexpectedly meets Thomas Hawk, CEO of Hawk Group, who’s secretly loved her for ten years. After a paparazzi incident, they enter a fake marriage for business, but feelings grow real. Will their love survive the consequences of a staged union? EP 1:Clara Jones, a top crisis expert, returns home to retire but gets caught in a scandal with Thomas Hawk, CEO of Hawk Group, who reveals his decade-long search for someone special. To save his company's IPO from scandal, Thomas proposes a fake marriage to Clara, who is initially shocked but considers handling the PR crisis.Will Clara accept Thomas's unexpected marriage proposal to save his company?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Sweet Romance', 'Love After Marriage']

column1: My Gigolo Is a Fake Tycoon
column4: Daphne discovers that Elliot, the impoverished boyfriend she’s been funding, has been secretly posing as a wealthy heir—while painting her as a desperate old woman obsessed with marriage. She cuts off all support, reclaiming every advantage while Elliot carries on without a clue… Be careful, you’re about to become the ultimate laughingstock! EP 1:Daphne discovers her boyfriend Elliot is being overly controlled by his possessive aunt, who constantly interrupts their time together with trivial demands. Meanwhile, Daphne's friend shares a similar frustrating experience with her own boyfriend's aunt, highlighting a pattern of older women encroaching on their relationships. The episode culminates with Elliot trying to placate Daphne by promising her a promotion at work, while his aunt's intrusive behavior continues to strain their relationship.Will Daphne finally confront Elliot about his aunt's overbearing presence in their lives?

column1: Too Late, I'm Your Rival's Hubby
column4: My CEO wife, Sophia, divorced me for her ex. I gave her exactly what she wanted and walked away. Now, I'm flaunting my new life with her worst enemy. She begs for a second chance, but this game of revenge has only just begun. Is this new romance for real, or is it the first move in my revenge? EP 1:Leo confronts his impending divorce from Sophia, who admits she only married him as a substitute for her ex, Jacob. As Leo processes his emotions, he reveals his true identity as a time-traveler and vows to make things right. Despite Sophia's insistence on finalizing the divorce to welcome Jacob back, Leo hints at a deeper game of revenge, leaving their future uncertain.Will Leo's revenge plan unravel Sophia's new life with Jacob?

I’m not an Omega but the White Wolf Queen.
Damien, Alpha of the Moonhowl Pack: Didn’t you used to love staring at my abs? Every part of me will be on display for you—free of charge.
Ronan, Alpha of the Nightfang Pack: Little wolf, give me a kiss, and my life is yours!
James, another Alpha: I’ll make sure you can’t get out of bed for ten days straight… EP 1:A young woman, unaware of her true identity as the prophesied White Wolf Queen, faces danger and ridicule until a mysterious light signals her awakening, prompting a frantic search by those who recognize her power.Will she embrace her destiny as the White Wolf Queen before her enemies find her?

Nina discovers her adoptive mother's true plan: to steal her face and her billionaire fiancé using a mystical family secret. But when she learns this mother murdered her real sister, she agrees to the dangerous swap—knowing the ancient magic will turn the wedding into a shocking public revenge... EP 1:Nina Lynn, adopted by a seemingly caring mother, discovers her mother's true intentions were never about love but about grooming her to marry into wealth. The mother's manipulative tactics, from controlling Nina's diet to pushing her towards a billionaire fiancé, culminate in a shocking demand: Nina must give up her future as Mrs. Lee to her adoptive mother.Will Nina comply with her mother's sinister demand, or will she fight back to reclaim her future?

column1: Sorry, My Nobel Is In The Trunk
column4: Laura Spencer, secret creator of the world-changing Omni-Blood, keeps a low profile. But a parking dispute with her fiancé's entitled secretary, Sarah Quinn, turns ugly. Seeing Laura’s modest car, Sarah humiliates her, thinking she's just another broke girl she can crush. Little does she know, she just picked a fight with a Nobel Prize winner who has the power to destroy her entire world with a single phone call. EP 1:Laura Spencer, a humble scientist, achieves a groundbreaking medical discovery with Omni-Blood, earning the Nobel Prize in Medicine, yet remains unassuming, driving an old car and bringing homegrown fruit to a blind date.What will happen when Laura's blind date meets the unassuming Nobel laureate?

A reclusive tycoon returns to the city for his son’s engagement, ready to pass on his empire. But a nightmare unfolds when his future daughter-in-law accuses him of assault. Deceived by her family’s lies and forged evidence, his own son takes him to court, bringing him to the brink of ruin—until the shocking truth is revealed. EP 1:A father's return for his son's engagement turns sour when the future daughter-in-law accuses him of assault, leading to a family conflict and a shocking revelation.Will the truth behind the false accusation come to light?

column1: The Emperor's Empty Granary, Your Grave!
column4:
"What if the emperor who toiled for his people was the very reason they starved?
Emperor Leon works the fields to inspire his court, receiving a golden rice stalk that promises abundance. But the blessing shatters when an assassin storms in, bearing the ashes of a million famine victims. Who stole the grain and who will pay in blood?"
