EP 1:Emperor Leon receives a golden rice stalk as a tribute, symbolizing prosperity, but the celebration is shattered when an assassin reveals a devastating famine in Fenvale, accusing the emperor of complicity in the suffering of his people.Will Emperor Leon uncover the truth behind the famine and seek justice for his starving people?

Athena sacrificed her heiress identity for love, only to be betrayed by her husband, world’s boxing champion, Henry. After 99 heartbreaks, Athena realizes the world’s richest man has been waiting for her all along… EP 1:Henry Collins, a rising boxing star, wins the championship and dedicates his victory to his wife, Athena, only for her to discover his infidelity with Kate, leading to her heartbreak and decision to divorce.Will Athena confront Henry about his betrayal and what will be the consequences of their divorce?

column1: What? My Dad is The Tech King!
column4: Once the Tech Institute Dean, Henry hides in a small repair shop to escape the power struggle. But when his son is humiliated by rivals and mocked by the public, he steps in to fight back. As his identity is exposed and enemies close in, how far will he go to protect everything he loves, and what shocking truth will this father-son story uncover? EP 1:Henry, a former Tech Institute Dean hiding in a small repair shop, faces humiliation when his skills are doubted by peers and he is forced out after fixing a computer. His true identity as the Director of Grandia Research Academy is shockingly revealed when Mark Zane publicly acknowledges him, setting the stage for a dramatic power shift.Will Henry embrace his past and reclaim his position to protect his son and restore his honor?

Catelyn wakes up as a doomed baby princess, but there’s a twist: her family can hear her every thought! With her baby brain spilling royal secrets and exposing deadly plots, she’s racing to save her father and change their fate. But when a vengeful enemy comes with a knife, can this tiny heroine save the day? EP 1:Catelyn wakes up as a baby princess in a royal family and realizes she's inside the novel she was reading. She discovers her father, Prince Aegon, is doomed to die before his twenty-second birthday, which is imminent.Can Catelyn change her father's fate before his birthday arrives?

Everyone thought Adrian Storm was just a useless son-in-law—good for chopping wood and cooking meals. Hidden by his Warlord parents, his true power was sealed away. But when thugs, rivals, and even doomsday cults cross his path, his "clumsy" moves crush masters like twigs. Will the man who only wanted a quiet life end up breaking the ceiling of the entire martial world? EP 1:Adrian Storm, the 'useless' son-in-law, is revealed to possess immense hidden power as his father finally acknowledges his true strength. Meanwhile, Adrian unwittingly catches a silk ball meant for a noblewoman's husband selection, leading to a dangerous confrontation.Will Adrian's accidental involvement in the noblewoman's husband selection lead to a deadly conflict or an unexpected romance?

ER doctor Claire Woods thinks her husband's flight was canceled—until his collapse reveals a shocking betrayal. As she uncovers the truth behind her miscarriage, Claire plots a reckoning. At a high-profile wedding, she exposes the scandal, leaving everyone stunned... EP 1:ER doctor Claire Woods discovers her husband's infidelity and a shocking betrayal when he collapses after taking an ED drug, revealing his lies about a canceled flight and his affair with another woman who is about to marry his brother.Will Claire confront her husband and the other woman at the upcoming wedding?

Cast out as the "reincarnation of Gluttony," Clare Tash has nothing left—until her extraordinary sense of smell saves tycoon Simon Lynn, earning her a place in his family. But the Tash family won't let go—they harass her, frame her, and even conspire with ruthless outsiders... Can Clare's rare gift of scent protect her new life before it's too late? EP 1:Clare Tash is accused of being the reincarnation of the ancient beast Gluttony and is blamed for the family's financial downfall. Despite her pleas and her father's intervention, she is forcibly exiled from the Tash Family, left to fend for herself in a harsh world.Will Clare's extraordinary sense of smell lead her to salvation or further danger in her new life?

column1: Bite the Heiress, Bleed as Hell
column4: Elena Carrick, a hidden heiress raised among commoners, returns from the army to confront family duty, rivals, and lies. She faces challenges with brains, blade, and bravado—but when the stakes are highest, can she manage to always stay one step ahead? EP 1:Elena returns from the army to visit her sick father, only to discover a shocking family secret—she is not their biological daughter. The revelation comes as her adoptive father passes away, leaving her to care for her brother Julian. Meanwhile, the Shaws, a powerful family, threaten Julian over his forbidden relationship with their daughter, prompting Elena to take bold action.Will Elena's daring plan to confront the Shaws end in disaster or triumph?

column1: OMG! My Husband is OG Warder?
column4: Kane thought he was done with fighting. But when the Frostpeak Sect comes for revenge and the Aegis Bureau hunts him down, He is forced to unleash the power he sealed away. He fought through assassins and agents. He defeated the vicious Ash Yates. But he soon learns they were merely pawns... So who is the true mastermind pulling the strings? EP 1:Kane's peaceful life is disrupted when the Frostpeak Sect, led by Luke and his mother, arrives seeking revenge. A confrontation escalates quickly when Luke's reckless behavior leads to a violent clash, revealing Jade's hidden martial arts skills and her connection to the Azura Order. The episode culminates in a tense standoff as the true intentions of the Frostpeak Sect come to light.Will Kane and Jade be able to fend off the Frostpeak Sect's deadly assault?

Crowned as the beauty queen of the Pierce empire, Chloe believed her fairy-tale marriage to the heir Alex was perfect… until the day she stepped into his study and found the walls covered with trophies, photos of countless women, even herself, and his newest obsession, his own sister-in-law. Was the love she trusted nothing but a beautiful lie… EP 1:Chloe, a beauty pageant winner living a dream life with her wealthy husband Alex, begins to suspect his perfection is a facade when she overhears unsettling conversations and notices odd behavior at a social event.What dark secrets is Alex hiding behind his charming exterior?

column1: Reborn at Eight: The Jade Prodigy
column4:
Once a world-class appraiser, she's reborn into the body of an 8-year-old girl, Nina, in a struggling family. With keen eyes and daring spirit, she steps into the perilous world of treasure and deceit. Each gamble could mean ruin or glory, yet she rises higher with every turn. But how long can an 8-year-old outplay the grown-up world?
 EP 1:Mina Summers, a world-class appraiser, mysteriously dies in an accident and is reborn into the body of an 8-year-old girl named Nina, setting the stage for her new life in a struggling family amidst the world of treasure and deceit.How will Nina navigate her new life with the knowledge and skills of a world-class appraiser?

column1: Thanks System! For Love and Views!
column4:
Dr. Ethan Smith wakes up in a parallel world—armed with elite surgical skills and a system full of buffs. He starts a wild medical livestream: diagnosing rare diseases with a comedic twist that hooks millions.
But his biggest case yet is a beautiful patient who steals his heart. Now, he’s curing illnesses, winning love, and dominating the charts—one viral clip at a time.
“The doctor is in… and he’s streaming live.” EP 1:Dr. Ethan Smith is unfairly fired from his medical school after catching the dean in a scandal, only to wake up in a parallel world where he gains the 'Super-Doc System'—granting him legendary medical skills and the ability to earn points by treating patients. Leveraging his past as a travel vlogger, Ethan starts a medical livestream to diagnose patients online, but faces skepticism from viewers doubting his credentials.Will Ethan's first livestream consultation prove his medical prowess and win over his skeptical audience?

Murdered by her sister and reborn, Gwen lets her steal the "better" marriage while she enters the palace, climbing from humble consort to Empress by outsmarting every trap. Now the sister who killed her once will watch her become the most powerful woman in the empire! EP 1:Gwen, murdered by her sister in her past life, is reborn and finds herself back in time before her sister's wedding. She realizes she has a chance to change her fate and outsmart those who betrayed her.Will Gwen take revenge on her sister and seize her destiny as the future Empress?

Declared cursed at birth, the Empress's daughter was cast into the Cold Palace—only for a sudden blaze to erase her fate. Five years later, a mysterious girl called Belle appears and wields her uncanny powers to turn every encounter into destiny. She saves all too many royals... but who will save them from her? EP 1:A mysterious girl named Belle, who possesses uncanny abilities, saves the Empress from a fatal heart attack after being found near the Cold Palace where the Empress's cursed daughter was once imprisoned. The Empress, believing her daughter to be dead, is deeply moved by Belle's kindness and considers her a lucky charm, unaware of Belle's true identity or the danger she might bring.Will Belle's powers bring salvation or doom to the royal family?

After her mother was framed and committed suicide, Luna became an orphan. The Prince Regent adopted her as his daughter. The emperor wished to entitle her as a princess, while the empress dowager and royal princes also doted on her immensely. Is she destined to shine? EP 1:Luna, a young girl, desperately begs her father to save her dying mother, who was framed and forced to commit suicide. Despite her pleas, her father cruelly rejects her, calling her mother shameless and refusing to help. The community watches in pity as Luna is left orphaned, her mother's death marking the beginning of her tragic journey.Will Luna find justice for her mother's death and rise above her tragic beginnings?

Liana Miller, a housewife, walks in on her husband cheating with his secretary. Determined to reclaim her life, she divorces him and focuses on building her own career. After she moves on, her husband and son, who once took her for granted, realize they can’t live without her and beg her to come back. But by then, Liana has awakened to her own worth and leaves them behind for good. EP 1:Liana unexpectedly encounters Mr. Ferns, a former colleague who reveals her past as a legendary architect, 'Legend Vin,' and pleads for her return to save Paramount Architecture from disqualification. Despite his insistence, Liana dismisses her past achievements, prioritizing her current family life with Zack.Will Liana reconsider her past glory and return to architecture, or will she remain steadfast in her new life?

column1: The Billionaire Disguises to Claim Me?
column4: On her wedding day, Sylvia is humiliated by her contract husband. In a bold revenge, she hires a gigolo to bear her child. But Chris, disguised as the same gigolo, fights for control. As secrets from the past resurface, Sylvia vows: “The love I missed… I’ll reclaim in a lifetime of reckoning…” Who will truly win her heart? EP 1:On her wedding night, Sylvia is humiliated by her contract husband, Zane, who openly disrespects her and refuses to have a child with her. Determined to secure her inheritance by having a child, Sylvia decides to take matters into her own hands by hiring a gigolo. However, she unknowingly encounters Chris, who is disguised as the gigolo, setting the stage for a complex and unexpected connection.Will Sylvia's plan to have a child with a stranger lead her to the love she's been missing?

Luna had the perfect plan: have her "father" missing and lock her sister Jenny in an asylum to steal the inheritance. "Everyone believes she's crazy, and I'm living her luxurious life!" But now Jenny's escaped, and coming back for revenge. "The game has just begun, and this time, I'll make sure she never sees daylight again..." EP 1:Tim Sinclair, the wealthy patriarch believed to be dead, returns after suffering from amnesia and discovers his daughter Jenny has been wrongly institutionalized by her sister Luna, who is scheming to inherit the family fortune. As Tim rushes to free Jenny, Luna's ruthless plan to keep her sister locked away and claim the inheritance within 24 hours is threatened.Will Tim arrive in time to save Jenny and stop Luna's sinister plan?

column1: Kiss or Kill: Emperor vs Empress
column4:
Two predators. One throne.
Victor Shaw weds Marshal’s daughter Faye Finch to seize her family’s army—then destroy them.
But Faye is a ruthless strategist who plans to dethrone him and rule alone.
Now, emperor and empress share a bed and a single goal: kill each other first.
“Marriage is war. And I never lose.” EP 1:General Faye encounters a defiant Seler man and decides to take him in, despite the potential complications with Tony Reed, showcasing her ruthless and strategic approach to expanding her influence.Will General Faye's bold move to take both men under her wing lead to a dangerous clash of loyalties?

Celia Lynn thought she had accidentally caused her father's death and had always meekly endured the constant suppression from her mother and brother. After being diagnosed with a terminal illness, she unexpectedly discovered that her father's death wasn't on her. Now, she's gonna start a rebellion in this family... EP 1:Celia Lynn is diagnosed with mid-stage stomach cancer and needs immediate surgery, but her mother demands money from her for her brother's expenses, revealing deep-seated resentment and manipulation within the family.Will Celia finally stand up against her mother's abuse and fight for her own survival?

Sixty years after her death, the founding empress’s soul awakens in the daughter of a disgraced official. In the palace, she exposes traitors, saves her dying son, and uncovers corruption. With her wits and a secret code, she wins the people’s hearts—but when a mysterious admirer follows her to the capital, will this new life lead to justice… or love? EP 1:Evelyn Lorne, the founding empress, finds herself mysteriously alive in the body of a banished servant girl with her same name and face, and immediately confronts her enemies with the same fierce determination she had in her past life.Will Evelyn's return bring the justice she seeks, or will her new life uncover deeper secrets?

After three years of marriage, Nora Lane discovers her marriage certificate is FAKE—and she’s still legally single.
Her husband Adrian Stone, the man she trusted since childhood, is actually married to someone else: Clara Hayes, a replacement he found while Nora was abroad.
Now, the real lover has become the other woman.
Betrayed and enraged, she’s ready to crash his perfect lie.
“You replaced me? Let’s see who replaces who now.”

One night with the Alpha Wolf left Eve carrying his child, but her family cast her out and she had to give the baby back. A year later, a little boy calls her Mommy and insists CEO Ethan is the Alpha Wolf from that night. She brushes it off, yet Ethan keeps staring at the mark on her neck. Is it love, or the beginning of a storm… EP 1:Eve discovers she's three months pregnant after a one-night encounter with a mysterious Alpha Wolf, who marked her as his own. The pregnancy progresses unnaturally fast, leading to a shocking and painful birth, leaving everyone questioning the nature of the child and the identity of the father.What secrets does the Alpha Wolf hold, and what will happen when he finds Eve and their child?

column1: The Alpha King's Fated Virgin Bride
column4: In 2135, Alpha King Andrew is dying, his only cure to bite the gland of a pure-blood Omega—at the price of her life. Fate brings him Lynn, the last pure-blood Omega. She is both his doom and his salvation. But instead of letting destiny take her away, Andrew swears to love, protect, and claim her… even against fate itself. EP 1:In a dystopian society divided into Alphas, Betas, and Omegas, Alpha King Andrew is dying and must find a pure-blood Omega to survive, even if it costs her life. Amidst a gathering of girls from the slums, Andrew discovers Lynn, the last pure-blood Omega, who is both his salvation and doom, defying fate to claim her.Will Andrew's defiance of fate lead to Lynn's salvation or her demise?

column1: Dump Me? Fine, Your Dad's Mine!
column4: On her wedding day, Clara Monroe's groom flees with her best friend. In a shocking twist, she turns to his stepfather, the powerful CEO Victor Yates, and becomes his wife instead. What starts as revenge soon turns into real love—while her ex and his scheming mistress spiral into disgrace... EP 1:On her wedding day, Clara Monroe is left at the altar when her groom, Daniel Yates, runs off with her best friend Lydia under the pretense of a medical emergency. In a shocking twist, Clara turns to Daniel's powerful stepfather, Victor Yates, and proposes marriage to him instead as an act of revenge.Will Victor accept Clara's bold proposal, and what revenge does she have in store for Daniel and Lydia?

Zoe wakes up in a novel as the hated mother-in-law. She knows her fate is tragic and that her daughter-in-law Luna has a hidden royal identity. Determined to change everything, she protects Luna, spoils the kids, and fights off scheming relatives. Can this so-called villain rise to the top and claim her own glory? EP 1:Zoe, now aware she's in a novel as the despised mother-in-law, uncovers Sophia's betrayal and vows to protect Luna and her grandkids, challenging her destined tragic end.Will Zoe's determination be enough to rewrite her fate and outsmart the scheming relatives?

Heiress Yvonne Anderson thought she had it all—until she caught her fiancé with her best friend. Trapped and drugged at a masquerade ball, she spent one fateful night with Alex Grant, Cloudville's richest man. Overnight, Yvonne and her family lost everything. Six years later, she returns with a child, ready for revenge. EP 1:Yvonne confronts Julian's infidelity and decides to end their relationship, marking the beginning of her transformation. After a mysterious encounter at a masquerade ball, she wakes up to a shocking realization and vows to never see him again.What will Yvonne do next to exact her revenge?

Zoe once shared a five-year promise with Sean—but fate keeps them apart. Years later, they cross paths under unexpected circumstances, each carrying secrets and unspoken feelings. As trust, intrigue, and emotions intertwine, their reunion sparks questions: what truths will finally come to light? EP 1:After 15 years, Sean returns home only to face his grandmother's ultimatum about marriage, while Zoe, the woman he once promised to, unexpectedly crashes into his life—literally—with her scooter, sparking a mysterious recognition between them.Will Sean and Zoe uncover the secrets that kept them apart for 15 years?

column1: Fox Spirit’s Revenge: Sisters at War
column4: When Clara Harper rose as the Fox Madame, her sister Kate’s envy turned venomous. Using a wealthy heir, Kate plotted her downfall—until the Fox Spirit Ian intervened. Thirty years later, Clara descends from the Celestial Realm with children, only to find Kate still sowing malice. This time, Clara decides to deliver her final judgment… Beware, this is war! EP 1:Clara Harper, the Fox Madame, faces her sister Kate's envy as their grandfather announces Clara will inherit all family assets, sparking Kate's vengeful plot involving Liam Adams to undermine Clara's position.Will Kate's scheme succeed in dethroning the Fox Madame?

Saved from a fire by her secret crush, Eva wakes up carrying the CEO’s child.
He wants marriage. His family wants her gone.
Between lies, betrayal, and a forbidden pregnancy—can love really pay the price? EP 1:Eva is saved from a fire by her long-time crush, Mr. Jones, but loses her mother's house in the process. Facing financial ruin and the threat of losing her home, she posts a room for rent online in a desperate attempt to save it.Who will answer Eva's call for a roommate and change her life forever?

When broke college grad Ethan is offered a fortune to marry a comatose woman, he takes the deal. To his shock, the dying bride, Sharon, is young, graceful, and breathtakingly beautiful. As his quiet devotion helps her recover, she secretly tests whether his feelings are real. But... will she embrace him as her husband, or expose his choice as a mistake? EP 1:Ethan, a broke college graduate, is desperate for money to help his parents. He auditions for a gig as a temporary boyfriend/husband, showcasing his charm and physical prowess. When an older woman probes him about being a 'temporary husband,' he hesitantly considers the possibility—unaware his life is about to change.Will Ethan accept the mysterious offer to become a temporary husband... and who is really behind it?

Trapped by her aunt Vivian, young Luna Shaw died—then reborn. Now, she warns CEO Ethan Scott: "Vivian lies. She killed my mom." At their engagement, chaos erupts. Vivian kidnaps Luna—Ethan rescues her.

Luna rushes to the asylum, saving her mother Snow from forced abortion. Ethan admits: "She’s mine."

Scheming Daisy attacks, kidnaps Luna, and drugs Ethan—but Luna outsmarts all. At the wedding, Luna fades. “Your turn to be strong, Mom.” EP 1:Luna accuses Vivian of killing her mother and stealing her life, leading to a dramatic confrontation where Luna is trapped and pleads for help before waking up in the past, realizing she has traveled back ten years.Will Luna be able to change the past and save her mother from Vivian's schemes?

column1: Reborn: Watch My Ex and Bestie Fall!
column4: Betrayed by her bestie and boyfriend, Sophia Lane took the blame for a theft, only to die "accidentally" in prison the day before release. When she wakes up again, it's on the very day they set their trap. This time, the prey isn't her... EP 1:Sophia Lane, who was wrongfully imprisoned and killed in her past life, finds herself back on the day she was framed. Determined to change her fate, she publicly smashes bikes in front of a police station to create an ironclad alibi and expose the truth.Will Sophia's bold plan succeed in turning the tables on her betrayers?

Office drone Zane Chow wakes up in a novel—as a rich second-gen simp—forced by a system to confess to campus belle Yvonne Lynn within seven days or die. He exposes the original male lead Tristan Stark's schemes, takes over his identity, and climbs to the top of the elite Stark family. From underdog to tycoon—turns out being a simp has its perks... EP 1:Zane Chow wakes up inside the novel 'Tristan Stark Rules the World' and is forced by a mysterious system to confess his love to campus belle Yvonne Lynn within seven days or face death, while also discovering his new identity as a rich second-generation simp.Will Zane succeed in his confession or will the black line fade out completely?

After three years of marriage, Howard betrayed Gloria with his first love, Claire. He forges medical records to force a divorce—only to discover Claire infected him with HIV! Blind trust made him miss his chance for treatment. When the truth surfaces, Howard slips into an abyss, locked in a nightmare of his own making… Beware, this is karma! EP 1:Howard betrays his wife Gloria by rekindling a relationship with his first love, Claire, and plans to fake medical records to force a divorce. However, he later discovers that Claire has infected him with HIV, leading to a shocking revelation and a downward spiral into despair.Will Howard's deceitful plans unravel, and how will Gloria react to the shocking truth about her health?

column1: My Marshal Ex Returns to Steal Me?
column4:
Amid the ruins of her family’s downfall, Mary finds unexpected love with the formidable Marshal Evan, only for him to abandon her on their engagement day and return betrothed to another.
Just as she begins to rebuild her life with his gentle nephew, Quincy, Evan storms back into her world. Why has he returned now? For revenge… or a second chance at love? EP 1:Mary is about to marry Quincy when her former fiancé, Evan, dramatically returns, accusing her of betrayal and declaring she will only be his, reigniting past conflicts and emotions.Will Mary go through with her wedding to Quincy, or will Evan's return change everything?

After a deadly crash to save her dying boyfriend, Yvonne wakes up as the adopted daughter of an ancient chancellor. What's more, she's forced to complete 100 humiliating tasks for her ruthless brother, Julian.  Trying her best, she finally goes back to her world, but the nightmare is continuing——Julian and his scheming mistress come chase her through time! EP 1:Yvonne, despite being perceived as obsessed with Julian, reveals her true motive: completing 100 humiliating tasks to save her terminally ill fiancé, Jason. After nearly dying to complete Task 98, she is closer to unlocking the Chrono Passage and returning home.Will Yvonne survive the final two tasks and save Jason, or will Julian's ruthless schemes stop her?

Anna enters a whirlwind marriage with Lucas, becoming stepmother to his two babies.  As the feelings begin to blossom, she makes a shocking discovery: the children are actually her own!  Just as the truth emerges and her identity reveals, will this new family survive the looming shadows? EP 1:Anna encounters two children who claim her as their mother, despite her belief that her own twins died at birth, leading to a shocking revelation about her past and connection to Lucas's family.Will Anna discover the truth about her children's fate and their connection to Lucas?

Years after parting ways, Ryan and Isabella reunite in a blaze of passion—only to discover they're both engaged to someone else. Torn between guilt and longing, they wrestle with right and wrong, love and duty. But just when they decide to let go, fate reveals a twist... EP 1:Isabella, preparing to marry into the Langford family for ulterior motives, unexpectedly reunites with her first love, Ryan, sparking old flames and complicating her mission.Will Isabella choose love over duty or will the Langfords' dark secrets change everything?

A young woman from a noble family is torn from her world and forced into the ruthless general’s mansion. Between power, betrayal, and forbidden emotions, she must survive a web of lies and cruelty. Yet beneath the bloodshed hides a truth far darker—and far more dangerous—than she ever imagined. EP 1:General Gabriel Hughes presents a brutal ultimatum to the Turner family—marry him or face annihilation. Despite her family's pleas and her own engagement, Quinn Turner defiantly refuses, leading to a violent massacre. Hughes, enraged by her rejection, spares Quinn but confines her to the Celestial Tower, vowing to replace her.Will Quinn find a way to escape the ruthless general's grasp?

column1: My Contract CEO Husband Desires Me?
column4: Clara Jones, a top crisis expert, returns home to retire and unexpectedly meets Thomas Hawk, CEO of Hawk Group, who’s secretly loved her for ten years. After a paparazzi incident, they enter a fake marriage for business, but feelings grow real. Will their love survive the consequences of a staged union? EP 1:Clara Jones, a renowned crisis expert, returns home for retirement but gets entangled with Thomas Hawk, CEO of Hawk Group, who reveals his decade-long search for someone special. After a paparazzi incident threatens Hawk Group's IPO, Thomas proposes a fake marriage to Clara to mitigate the scandal.Will Clara accept Thomas's unexpected marriage proposal to save his company?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Sweet Romance', 'Love After Marriage']

column4: Liz (25), a promiscuous playgirl, unexpectedly decides to care for her rival, Lucius (28), after learning of his bankruptcy. She makes him her plaything, controlling him in bed. Over time, Liz finds herself drawn to Lucius's charm, softening her wild ways. Just as she embraces their dynamic, she's told to marry the President’s son — only to discover Lucius is that very son. EP 1:Liz, known for her countless lovers, learns about her longtime rival Lucius's bankruptcy and decides to make him her plaything, exerting control over him in bed, unaware of the unexpected turn their relationship will take.Will Liz's plan to control Lucius backfire as she finds herself drawn to his charm?

column1: Expel Me? I Return With Glory!
column4:
Five years ago, Chloe Lowe was forced to abandon Ethan Locke and marry another. Now, he’s a powerful CEO—and she’s a single mom begging him to save their sick daughter.
He scorns her, until he learns the truth: she sacrificed everything for him.
When the child is kidnapped, Ethan storms in to rescue what’s truly his.
“Did you really think you could take my family from me?” EP 1:During Chloe and another man's wedding, Ethan bursts in to object, revealing their past intimate connection. Chloe coldly dismisses him, claiming she was only toying with his feelings due to his lower status, and chooses wealth over love, leading to Ethan's violent removal from the ceremony.Will Ethan ever recover from Chloe's cruel betrayal?

Zoe always thought Yvonne was the guy who protected in her childhood… until she saved Jared, the city’s richest man, and found out: he’s actually Yvonne’s uncle — and her real childhood crush! Now Jared’s chasing her hard. While her engagement with Yvonne blows up in a brutal public shame, he shows up with his crew. But is he here to save her… or stir up even more drama? EP 1:Zoe, while performing a life-saving surgery on Jared, the city's richest man, unexpectedly reunites with her childhood protector Yvonne at a family dinner, only to discover Jared is Yvonne's uncle and her real childhood crush, leading to a dramatic and confusing encounter.Will Zoe's past with Jared complicate her relationship with Yvonne?

Fated by a contract marriage, Serene Angelis must bear an heir for Charles Glenn—the cold CEO who’s cursed with infertility. As his assistant, she’s determined to fulfill her “baby-making mission”, unaware his cruelty masks a buried attraction. But when his jealousy drives her away, she leaves heartbroken—pregnant with triplets! When truth unfolds, will love bloom… before pride destroys their last chance? EP 1:Serene Angelis, struggling to support her large family, is unexpectedly offered a contract marriage by Charles Glenn's mother to bear children for the infertile CEO, despite his initial resistance.Will Serene accept the contract marriage and how will Charles react?

column1: Reborn and Teaming Up With My Nemesis!
column4:
They schemed a lifetime for the throne… only for a maid to claim the title they dreamt of.
On his coronation day, Emperor Joffery brings out a maid—claiming she’s his real mother—and orders Grace Yates and Jasmine Tann to surrender their titles. One is betrayed; the other poisoned.
Reborn before his rise, the former rivals join forces.
Change the decree. Topple the crown.
“You want the throne? Not in this lifetime.” EP 1:On the day of Prince Victor's ascension to the throne, shocking revelations unfold as Empress Jasmine and House Tann are accused of treason and sentenced to death. Meanwhile, Victor reveals that Concubine Grace is not his real mother, exposing a long-hidden secret that the child she gave birth to was a princess, swapped at birth. The episode ends with both Jasmine and Grace realizing the depth of Emperor Joffery's manipulations and vowing never to repeat their mistakes in another life.Will Grace and Jasmine find a way to unite against the true enemy in their next life?

column1: How I Avenged My First Love
column4: Sonia's world shattered when her first love, Wyatt, betrayed her. But from the ashes, she rose. With the unwavering support of Yancey, who saw her true worth, she staged a stunning comeback, ascending to VP at his corporation. But as she uncovers the full extent of the deception, one question remains: Will her triumph be complete when karma finally comes for those who wronged her? EP 1:Sonia Windsor, who has been working tirelessly not for her own promotion but for her first love Wyatt Smith, discovers his betrayal when he uses company rules as an excuse to keep their relationship a secret, only to publicly flaunt his new relationship with an intern while ignoring Sonia's medical emergency.Will Sonia confront Wyatt about his betrayal or will she take a more calculated approach to seek revenge?

He gave everything for his marriage, only to face cold betrayal from the people he trusted most. When fate shifts in an unexpected way, he seizes the chance to turn the tables. What once seemed like weakness may become his greatest weapon—and this time, the ones who fed on him will pay the price. EP 1:Eden discovers his wife Dora's high spending has left them with almost no savings, just as he learns she has cancer and needs expensive treatment.Will Eden find a way to save his wife despite their financial ruin?

column1: Pampered by Mr. Wilson: Love After Prison
column4: After a one-night stand with James Wilson, Yarrow City's richest man, Annie Sue is thrown in prison. Ten months later, she delivers a son and gives him to James. As truths about Annie's past slowly come to light, James pampers her like a treasure once she is released. Together, they confront betrayals and claim their happiness... EP 1:Annie, a young girl struggling to care for her sick sister, faces bullying while selling vegetables to earn money for her sister's treatment. When offered a chance for a better life through adoption, she refuses to leave her sister behind, choosing instead to work night shifts to afford expensive medicine. The episode ends with a hint at a potential life-changing opportunity involving James.Will Annie's dedication to her sister lead her to accept James's offer, and at what cost?

Reborn from a manipulated tragedy, Sabrina Morrison sought a second chance with her husband, Adrian Spencer. However, drowning in a sea of bitter misunderstandings where she offered love, she received only his contempt. In despair, Sabrina let the fire in her heart die to cold, gray ash… until fate forced a final, shocking reckoning. EP 1:Sabrina confronts Adrian about his betrayal and the painful realization that he has changed in this life, forcing her mother to give blood for his lover, leading her to make the difficult decision to divorce him despite their past love.Will Sabrina's decision to divorce Adrian bring her the peace she seeks, or will it lead to more unforeseen consequences?

column1: Reborn as a Princess… to Kill
column4: Serena killed for Adrian York, only to die by his betrayal. Now reborn as the frail Lady Selene of Northvale, she must disguise strength as weakness. To strike back, she traps the Regent in her web. But as sparks turn to fire, can love survive a court built on lies… EP 1:Serena, once the loyal shadowblade of Prince Adrian York, is betrayed and killed by him after helping him seize the throne. She is reborn as the frail Lady Selene of Northvale, determined to seek revenge.How will Selene navigate her new life and exact vengeance on Adrian?

column1: Falling in Love with My Stepbrother
column4: Maris and Damien were high school classmates with a secret crush—until Maris’ mom married Damien’s dad, making them step-siblings. Living under the same roof, can their forbidden love last? EP 1:Maris tries to bring her stepbrother Damien home for their father's birthday, but Damien's resentment towards his new family and his rebellious attitude create tension. Despite their past crushes, their current relationship is strained by family dynamics and unresolved emotions.Will Damien finally confront his feelings and return home with Maris?

Five years ago, Trevin Sage secretly donated his heart to save his wife, Stella Cade, and left her with a cold excuse, turning into the villain in her eyes. Now, Stella, fueled by hate, encounters a dying Trevin and demands answers. But Trevin, afraid the truth will destroy everything he sacrificed, pushes her away with cruel taunts. As his heart fails and the truth unravels, will Stella’s hatred turn to regret… or is it too late for redemption? EP 1:Trevin Sage, suffering from a failing heart, learns he has only three months left to live and must secure 2 million dollars for his mother's life-saving surgery, while also grappling with the painful decision to keep his past heart donation to Stella a secret to protect her from guilt.Will Trevin's sacrifice remain hidden as his health deteriorates, or will Stella discover the truth before it's too late?

column1: Sorry, the Script Is Mine Now
column4: After a sudden death, Selena awakens inside a novel—as the side character doomed to die. By chance, she crosses paths with Alexander, the ruthless villain who feels strangely drawn to her. To survive, Selena steals the male lead's role and clings to the villain, turning fate into her own game. EP 1:Selena, after collapsing from overwork, finds herself transported into the novel she was reading, embodying a doomed side character. She encounters Alexander Holt, the ruthless villain, and unwittingly becomes entangled in his world. Realizing her perilous situation, she must navigate the dangerous dynamics of the novel's plot to survive.Will Selena's unexpected connection with Alexander save her or seal her fate?

Lilian Sutton was drugged by her stepmother and stepsister and delivered to the bed of her suitor. She managed to escape and was rescued by Bobby Lander, only to discover she was pregnant shortly after. However, she soon learned that Bobby was responsible for her mother’s death. Six years later, she returned with her son and disguised herself as a janitor to infiltrate Bobby’s company, seeking revenge for her mother. But as she gathered evidence, she uncovered new revelations. EP 1:Lilian Sutton is drugged and taken to Ryan's bed by her stepsister Cindy for a monetary reward, but she manages to escape. Later, she discovers her stepsister's involvement in her mother's death, orchestrated by Bobby Lander, and suffers a traumatic miscarriage after being attacked by Cindy.Will Lilian find justice for her mother and her unborn child?

On her wedding day, actress Luna called out her cheating fiancé and walked off, only to marry CEO Nathan in a flash. With her ex and his mistress scheming and gossip everywhere, she fights back while he’s got her back. Can they bring the villains down? Once a scandal, will she rise again and take back her crown? EP 1:Actress Luna Sinclair exposes her cheating fiancé, Colin Cole, and his mistress, Serena Sue, at their wedding by revealing a scandalous video, leading her to call off the wedding and seek revenge.What will Luna do next to reclaim her fame and take down those who betrayed her?

column1: The Missing Heir Wants Me Badly
column4: Rachel rescues a wounded man, only to shamelessly steal touches while nursing him. But when she realizes he’s Adrian Blake—the missing heir of the Blake empire—it’s too late. He’s not grateful. He’s hunting her down, demanding every debt of desire she owes… or more? EP 1:Rachel Vaughn finds herself in an awkward blind date with a rude and entitled man who belittles her, leading her to splash water on him and storm out. Meanwhile, rumors swirl about the missing heir of the Blake Group, Adrian Blake, hinting at a dangerous power struggle within the family. Rachel's aunt pressures her about her love life, prompting Rachel to impulsively claim she has a boyfriend, leaving her scrambling to find one.Will Rachel's desperate plea for a man be answered, and how will the missing heir's story intertwine with hers?

At Eric and Heloise’s five-year anniversary, Heloise’s half-sister Vivian crashes the party, accuses her of stealing her fiancé, and pushes her—causing a miscarriage. Instead of standing by Heloise, Eric turns away and leaves with Vivian. Heartbroken, Heloise walks away… Will Eric get a second chance, or be haunted by regret forever? EP 1:At their five-year anniversary, Heloise is publicly humiliated by her half-sister Vivian, who accuses her of stealing Eric and causes a miscarriage. Eric abandons Heloise, leaving with Vivian, and Heloise vows to never bother him again.Will Heloise find the strength to move on, or will Eric realize his mistake too late?

In a world where poetry holds real power and talent defines status, young professor Jeffrey Rivera wakes up as a ridiculed eight-year-old. With verses far beyond this realm, he begins to shake the foundations of a poetic order still in its infancy. But can poetry alone rewrite his fate? EP 1:Jeffrey Rivera, a literature professor, wakes up in the body of an eight-year-old boy in a world where poetry holds real power. He learns that his new life is in jeopardy unless he can win the family's treasured Celestial Mushroom by passing the Poetry Examination. Despite the skepticism of others, Jeffrey effortlessly completes a challenge deemed impossible by the locals, showcasing his advanced literary knowledge.Will Jeffrey's extraordinary poetry skills be enough to secure the Celestial Mushroom and rewrite his fate in this new world?

column1: Sorry Dad, I’m Better than Your Son!
column4: Clara Colman grew up unseen in a son-obsessed family. After her father chose to save his mistress and bastard son over Clara’s critically injured mother, grief hardened into resentment and purpose. She emerged as the national top scorer—and at the awards banquet, she confronted him, to avenge her mother and shatter his legacy… Watch out, she’s only getting started. EP 1:Clara, the provincial top scorer, confronts her father Richard when he chooses to save his mistress and illegitimate son over Clara's critically injured mother during a car accident, revealing deep family conflicts and betrayal.Will Clara's mother survive, and how will Clara retaliate against her father's betrayal?

column1: Boss, Your Wife Is A Country Girl
column4: Chloe grew up in the countryside. To pay for her grandmother's treatment, she takes a train to Haven to ask her estranged father for money—only to run into Henry, the city's most feared mob boss. Hunted and wounded, Lucas receives Chloe's help. Back in Haven, his domineering pursuit of her stirs up the whole city. Can she resist his storm of love? EP 1:Chloe boards a train to Haven to get money from her estranged father for her grandmother's surgery, but unexpectedly encounters Henry Lucas, the feared 'Hellion of Haven,' who is injured and being pursued. Despite the danger, Chloe helps him, leading to an intense confrontation where she pretends to be his wife to scare off attackers. The episode ends with the shocking revelation that Henry is indeed the notorious mob boss.What will happen now that Chloe's lie about being Henry's wife has been exposed?

Betrayed at every turn, Cecilia has become the perpetual scapegoat of her family. Her outrageous escape plan? Marry her parents’ sworn enemy. When fate delivers, she embraces a role she never expected to love. As his wife, she finds power, passion—and the perfect chance to turn the tables. Revenge has never been so dangerously addictive.
 EP 1:Cecilia finds herself in a perilous situation when she must save Shawn Stone, her family's sworn enemy, from a life-threatening injury. Despite her fear and the potential consequences, she acts quickly to stop his bleeding, only for Shawn to wake up and threaten her life for what she's done. Meanwhile, Cecilia receives urgent news about her grandmother's trouble, forcing her to leave immediately.Will Cecilia escape Shawn's wrath in time to help her grandmother?

After an accident, Iris learns she's not the true heiress of the wealthy Murphy family. However, instead of fighting for something, she chooses to accept the truth and gets ready to be kicked out. But when the real heiress returns, her five protective brothers beg to let her stay. Will their love shield her, or will she lose everything?

Rejected for his mother’s low status, Prince Darius was forbidden from learning the legendary Overlord Blade—an art no royal has ever mastered. Yet with a single glance, he unlocked its first move. Now, a dark force comes… can Darius survive and change everything? EP 1:Prince Darius, despite his low status due to his mother being a palace maid, secretly desires to learn the legendary Overlord Blade Technique. When he approaches the Primordial Meteor Slab, forbidden to him, an unexpected aura emerges, hinting that he might be the Chosen one destined to master the technique, shocking everyone around him.Will Darius defy the odds and master the Overlord Blade, changing his fate forever?

column1: The Martial Overlord Who Never Fell
column4: Adrian Shaw seemed blind to his wife Selina’s affair with his brother Harold, even treating their son as his own. On the boy’s twentieth birthday, Adrian surrenders the Transferring Art. But whispers spread—if he truly gave up his power, why does his aura still shake the martial world…? EP 1:Adrian Shaw, the Martial Overlord, feigns ignorance of his wife Selina's affair with his brother Harold, who has been raising their son Damien as Adrian's own. On Damien's twentieth birthday, Adrian plans to pass the Transferring Art to him, a move that would supposedly strip Adrian of his power. However, whispers suggest Adrian's aura still dominates the martial world, hinting at a deeper scheme. The episode reveals Adrian's long-standing awareness of the betrayal and his silent preparation for revenge, setting the stage for a dramatic confrontation.Will Adrian's revenge plan unfold as intended, or will Harold and Selina's schemes prevail?

A mother sacrifices everything to raise her two sons. Yet love, betrayal, and fate twist her life into an unbearable paradox. Secrets buried in the past return under one roof, shattering bonds she thought unbreakable. When truth collides with blood, who truly belongs to her and who will destroy her? EP 1:A struggling widow faces the impossible choice of educating her two sons, one biological and one adopted, amidst financial hardship and societal prejudice, leading to a tragic accident that tests the bonds of her unconventional family.Will the mother's love be enough to hold her fractured family together after this devastating accident?

column1: Bye, Scum Ex! Hi, Rich Life!
column4: She wakes up as Sophia, daughter of the richest family, with gifted twins and doting brothers at her side. But her scummy ex and cunning mistress refuse to let go, stirring trouble once more. As secrets unravel and identities flip, what will she do to protect her family and take revenge?  EP 1:Sophia wakes up in a new life as a billionaire heiress with gifted twins and another child on the way, but her scummy ex threatens her and the children, forcing her to reclaim her true identity and power.Will Sophia's ex regret his cruel actions when he discovers her true status?

Fiona Warren wakes 24 hours before her daughter Sylvie is brutally murdered. Racing against time, she must outsmart Sylvie’s deceitful friend Luna and the deadly Tim Zane. Every choice could be their last. Can a mother rewrite fate and save her child… or is it already too late? EP 1:Fiona Warren confronts Luna about her daughter Sylvie's murder, demanding the truth behind the brutal death caused by Luna's ex-boyfriend Tim Zane. As tensions rise, Fiona is mysteriously transported back in time, possibly giving her a chance to save Sylvie.Will Fiona be able to change the past and prevent Sylvie's tragic fate?

Cast out by his master for failing to harness inner power, young warrior Liam Carter is sent to marry a noble's daughter with the fabled Phoenix Core. Along the way, he discovers his own terrifying strength. As martial clans clash and a false master rises, Liam must face betrayals, deadly duels, and protect his love. Can he unlock his destiny—or will darkness consume them both? EP 1:Liam, a young warrior deemed hopeless by his master, is sent to marry a noble's daughter with the Phoenix Core, only to stumble upon a life-threatening situation where he must decide whether to step up and fight against dangerous thugs to protect an innocent man.Will Liam's unexpected strength be enough to save the day and prove his worth?

column1: Ex, Cry Harder! My Baby Is Mine!
column4: Grace wakes up as a hated rich mom with her child in danger, a scummy man chasing her, and ex-husband Daniel fighting for custody. She fights back to protect her child, but each clash with Daniel stirs new feelings… When secrets surface and the cold man begs to win her back, what will she choose? EP 1:Grace, a despised rich mother, awakens to find herself not dead as she thought, but in a terrifying situation where she is abusing her children and squandering money on Victor. The children, terrified, hide from her violent outbursts, but a sudden realization of her past death in a car crash leaves her and the onlookers shocked.Will Grace change her ways now that she's been given a second chance, or will she continue down the path of destruction?

column1: Pursued by Three Bosses as a Village Girl
column4: Hana Summers, pretending to be a village girl, sabotages her arranged marriage to the Normans, landing a cleaning job at their company. After a car accident, she’s stuck in a hospital room with her grandpa. As she sheds her poor girl image, Hana becomes the object of affection for three brothers— but can she survive the drama and sabotage? EP 1:Hana Summers is pressured by her grandfather to go on a blind date with the three grandsons of the Norman family—Charles, Jacob, and Jason—each exceptional in their own right, or risk having her financial support cut off. Determined to sabotage the arrangement, Hana reluctantly agrees but secretly plans to thwart the brothers' advances.Will Hana succeed in her plan to reject the Norman brothers, or will one of them unexpectedly win her over?

Adrian, betrayed and sacrificed by his family, is forced into the mysterious Reincarnation Sanctum. Reborn as its true master, he seeks vengeance, exposing dark secrets and reclaiming what was taken. When his family faces peril, will he save them—or let vengeance prevail? EP 1:Adrian's life is sacrificed by his own family to heal Victor's injury, but when Victor's legs are mysteriously broken, Adrian is falsely accused and banished, despite his desperate pleas of innocence.Will Adrian's family ever discover the truth behind Victor's deception?

Snow falls on Serene Lake, and a fleeting encounter sparks a love too intense to ignore. But the man who captures his heart carries a secret that defies time itself. As passion collides with destiny, their bond is tested by forces beyond life and death. When time runs out, will love shatter—or rewrite eternity? EP 1:A chance meeting by the lake leads to an immediate, intense attraction between two individuals, but one carries a mysterious secret that could change everything. Their playful banter and the initial spark of connection are overshadowed by hints of a deeper, possibly tragic backstory.What is the dark secret that Greg Clark is hiding, and how will it affect their budding relationship?

column1: The Hidden Power of a Fool
column4: Adrian Locke, heir to the powerful Locke Clan, is mocked as a worthless fool. His only obsession? Being a simp! But hidden in his hands lies the Return System—every time he simps, he levels up. What they see as weakness... may crown him the strongest warrior in history. EP 1:Adrian Locke, the disgraced heir of the Locke Clan, is reborn after a tragic loss and activates the Return System, which grants him immense power every time he gifts something valuable to his former love interest, Selena Shaw. His first test of the system yields shocking results, setting the stage for his rise to power and revenge.Will Adrian's newfound power be enough to overturn his fate and seek justice for his father?

column1: Double Rebirth: Divorce The Tyrant Princess!
column4: After rebirth, Ethan's first move is to ditch the princess Lilith who killed him. He's gonna make her pay, but he never expected Lilith to be reborn too. Now she's chasing him with desperate regret, but his heart is frozen. Double rebirth, twisted love, a new woman by his side… will this end in revenge… or ruin? EP 1:Ethan Shaw, once the celebrated Gifted Scholar, reflects on his tragic past with Princess Lilith, who publicly humiliated him for a musician, leading to the downfall of his family. Now terminally ill and with only six months to live, Ethan continues to serve the empire despite his failing health, as Lilith arrives unexpectedly.Will Ethan's final months be consumed by vengeance or will Lilith's sudden appearance change his fate?

Yarrow Hawke was born with a rare force more powerful than spirit energy—an ancient strength that could shake the heavens. Yet for years, he's been mocked as weak, his gifts secretly drained to heal his wounded master. But when his clan faces ruin and hope fades, Yarrow awakens the power within. A storm is coming, and he stands at its eye. EP 1:Yarrow, despite being mocked and drained of his Primordial Qi by his master, has secretly perfected his body cultivation in just six months, making him stronger than ordinary spirit cultivators. His master hints at bestowing even greater power upon him once he recovers. Meanwhile, the presence of a hidden master with immense Primordial Qi draws the attention of powerful factions, who seek to harness this power for their own gain. Yarrow's family, unaware of his true potential, continues to see him as a disgrace.Will Yarrow's hidden strength be revealed before his enemies can exploit it?

column1: (Dubbed)To Kill the Robe, To Find My Own
column4: Hudson grew up idolizing Hunter Yates, the supposed hero who secretly murdered his father. Devoted to justice, he joined the Zenithar Order under Yates's command—never suspecting the truth. When the lies unraveled and his family was left in ruins, Hudson's world collapsed. Turns out, nothing stings like worshiping your dad's killer. Then how will Hudson choose his path? EP 1:Hudson witnesses his mother's death and is captured by the Zenithar Order, where it's revealed he possesses the rare Divine Soulbone, marking him as a prodigy. Hunter Yates, his father's killer, decides to cripple Hudson's potential by sealing his meridians, raising him as a tool for his own sinister plans.Will Hudson discover the truth about his past and break free from Yates's control?

Reborn after her family was massacred, Mira Tang vows never to be a pawn again. Armed with five years of memories and unmatched medical skill, she protects her brother, shields her grandmother, and punishes those who betrayed her. But when Adrian York, her past-life husband’s brother, reappears, can she escape fate—or will history repeat itself…? EP 1:Mira Tang discovers the horrifying truth behind her marriage and the plot against her, learning that her husband and the Imperial Consort have been manipulating her since the beginning to gain her grandfather's military power, culminating in a cruel demand for her unborn child's heart.Will Mira find a way to escape this deadly trap and seek vengeance for the ultimate betrayal?

column1: Me and OG Daughter Saved the World!
column4: What? Damian Crowe and his little girl Selina saved the whole world on day one? An ancient beast appeared, and Selina crushed it in seconds—shocking every cultivator alive. But showing off means danger, so father and daughter must hide their power. Meanwhile, Damian’s wife Liana faces her collapsing clan. Eldest daughter? Fine. She’ll fight to bring the family back! EP 1:A representative from the Skyhaven Sect and Trine Order begs Damian to fight the Abyss Toad to save the people, offering to care for his family if he doesn't return.Will Damian risk his life to confront the Abyss Toad?

Adrian, a warlord's heir, gave up everything for an orphan Lillian - until war forced her to leave. Seven years later, he's a general; she's a broken woman struggling with their children. When he saves a boy who looks just like him, shocking truths emerge. Can love conquer family feuds and betrayal? EP 1:General Holt, wounded in battle, reflects on his past love Lillian and the child they lost, while Lillian, now struggling with poverty and pregnancy, faces unwanted advances from Mr. Warren. Meanwhile, Adrian's father pressures him to marry into the Nolan family to secure supplies for the city, highlighting the tension between duty and love.Will Adrian choose duty over love, or will he find another way to save the city and reunite with Lillian?

Serena only meant to reclaim her mother's company—not accidentally sleep with the deadly Wolf King Ian Morrow and bear his heirs. Four years later, she’s back with two powerful pups! In a showdown under the blood moon, loyalty is tested, bonds are shattered, and the true meaning of pack is revealed... EP 1:Serena encounters a mysterious man who demands her full attention for the night, setting the stage for an unexpected and intense connection.What secrets will unfold between Serena and the mysterious stranger?

Separated from her family since childhood, Lena abandoned her studies to fund her fiancé’s business. At their engagement party, he betrayed her and married another woman Vivian. Later, though reunited with the Sheeran brothers, she was framed by Vivian and nearly lost her identity. After rigorous verification, Lena proved her heritage and reunited with her brothers. With their help, Lena avenged her fiancé’ and reclaimed her place as the Sheeran heiress. EP 1:Lena, who has sacrificed everything for her fiancé Michael, attends their engagement party only to witness him propose to another woman, Vivian Lane, in front of everyone, leaving her heartbroken and betrayed.Will Lena confront Michael and Vivian about their betrayal?

column1: Demon King and his Innocent Bride
column4: Damien Darkfield, heir to the Demonworld throne, saves Evelyn Sutherland from a deadly curse. After returning to claim his title, he misses ten years. In his absence, Evelyn is imprisoned by her sister Sylvia, who seeks Mia’s blood. Damien uncovers dark secrets, punishing the corrupt—yet the looming threat remains... EP 1:Damien is tasked with finding his fated bride in the mortal world to break his shackles before ascending as the Demon King, while Evelyn, labeled a lunatic and outcast by her family, faces a humiliating marriage selection orchestrated by her sister Sylvia.Will Damien find Evelyn in time to save her from her cruel fate?

After three years of marriage, Evelyn discovers her marriage was a lie. Replaced by her sister and betrayed by her husband and family, she loses everything—including her unborn child. But she rises stronger, returning to the corporate world to crush her cheating husband, expose her family’s lies, and fight for the happiness she truly deserves. EP 1:Evelyn discovers that her three-year marriage to Edward is a lie when she finds out he is legally married to her sister, Serena, and that she has been living with them under false pretenses.Will Evelyn confront Edward and Serena about their betrayal, or will she plot her revenge silently?

column1: From Forsaken Daughter to Fortune Maker
column4: Once a bright little genius, Riley lived in the shadow of a cruel father and a scorned, “ugly” mother. Tragedy struck—death came too soon. Yet fate rewound the clock. Back in the 90s, Riley wakes to find her mother still alive. This time, secrets unfold, faces are healed, betrayal is shattered—and a once-forgotten woman is destined to rise as the nation’s first female tycoon. EP 1:Riley and her blind mother struggle with poverty, surviving on moldy bread traded for her mother's embroidery, while her father, now a commander, has abandoned them, taking only his aunt and Mia with him.Will Riley and her mother finally find the father who abandoned them, and will it lead to the better life they hope for?

Eight years ago, Wendy and Yale were torn apart by family pressure. He rose from a fighter to the mafia king, while she raised their daughter and became a surgeon. Reunited at last, Yale is determined to win her back, but with Ryan at her side and lies between them, love and deception collide. Who will she choose in the end…? EP 1:Yale Grant, now a mafia king, is tempted by a high-stakes fight against the undefeated Iron Fist to win money for Wendy's ring, despite his promise to leave the underworld and live a simple life with her.Will Yale keep his promise to Wendy or risk it all for the fight?

After his treacherous fiancée Sylvia murders him, billionaire Derek Carvel rewinds time. He rejects his gold-digging ex and shocks society by wedding Laura Wilton, Vamin's mysterious "Lotus Heiress." But their new alliance unearths a forgotten childhood bond. Now, Derek must outmaneuver enemies and secrets to claim his revenge and true destiny. EP 1:Derek Carvel, a billionaire, is betrayed and murdered by his fiancée Sylvia during their engagement party, only to find himself reborn back to the moment of choosing a marriage partner, vowing to change his fate.Will Derek be able to avoid his tragic fate and uncover Sylvia's true intentions this time?

A young emperor, once lost among commoners, falls for a village girl whose secret could change the fate of the realm. Years later, a desperate daughter’s encounter ignites misunderstandings, conspiracies, and long-hidden truths. Love, identity, and power collide in a race against time—will they survive the shadows of the past? EP 1:The Emperor mourns his late wife Elena, revealing deep guilt over her death and their unborn child, while facing pressure from his mother to abandon his love and secure his throne.Will the Emperor choose love over his throne, or will his mother's threats force him to abandon Elena?

Once Liam Yale, the Six-Star General, he fought in his brother’s place and won glory yet was betrayed by his family. His father sought to kill him so his brother could take his name. Crippled but alive, he returns as the Pride of the Military to expose their hypocrisy. Will this counterattack make his ruthless family pay the ultimate price? EP 1:Liam Yale returns home after three years of heroic service under his brother's name, only to be asked by his parents to surrender all his battle merits to his brother for personal gain.Will Liam comply with his parents' shocking demand or will he stand up for himself?

After the death of her mother, Evelyn, branded a disaster bringer, is cast out of her village. With nothing but a token, she travels far to seek out Governor Payne Trapp. Mastering mysticism and blessed with a lucky koi's fortune, Evelyn repeatedly saves the Trapp family from ruin, earning their deep affection. But the dark forces lurking in her past—will they remain hidden, or is it only a matter of time before they destroy everything she’s gained? EP 1:After being cast out of her village and labeled a curse, young Evelyn buries her mother alone and embarks on a long journey to find her father, Governor Payne Trapp. Upon arriving, she discovers the Governor is under pressure to produce an heir, and their reunion hints at a deeper connection amidst societal tensions.Will Evelyn's arrival bring the luck the Trapp family desperately needs, or will her past as the 'cursed child' unravel their lives?

After three years of marriage, heiress Willa discovers her husband’s affair with a scheming impostor who stole her true identity. Cast out and humiliated, she divorces him. But when the powerful Willa rises in revenge, the family that betrayed her soon learns she’s not so easily broken. EP 1:Vivian, the hidden heiress of the Grant family, decides to reveal her true identity to her husband Eric on their third wedding anniversary, while her brother Charles offers a billion-yuan order as a gift, hinting at the family's immense wealth.Will Eric accept Vivian's true identity and the sudden revelation of her billionaire background?

She looks sweet, but hides a burning rage. A girl shaped by revenge meets a cold, dangerous man. She plans to use him—but he has his own game. Their love is fire and ice: passion, fights, and pain. When she walks away, he breaks. Now, he’ll do anything to get her back, even destroy everything in his way. EP 1:During White Group's 10th-anniversary celebration, Debby White shocks everyone by playing a haunting funeral dirge instead of the expected celebratory piece, hinting at a deep-seated grudge and setting the stage for a dramatic confrontation.What dark secret from the past is Debby trying to expose with her unsettling performance?

column1: (Dubbed)Dumped Me Pregnant? Pay Up, Mr. Crazy!
column4: Adrian Yates loved Serena Winters for a decade, after rescuing her from a life on the streets. But his obsession turned destructive—he cheated on and dumped Serena when she lost their child. Heartbroken, Serena left with her sick brother. Now Adrian wants her back... but has he already lost her forever? EP 1:Serena Winters reflects on her decade-long relationship with Adrian Yates, from her humble beginnings as a beggar girl to their fairytale romance filled with love, sacrifices, and grand gestures. However, their happiness is shattered six months ago when another woman enters the picture, threatening everything they built together.Who is the mysterious woman that destroyed Serena and Adrian's perfect love story?

Matthew conspires with his lover Fiona to push his pregnant wife Grace off a cliff to seize her assets. Alice, Grace's twin sister who has been separated for twenty years, returns to take Grace's place and seek revenge. Just as Alice is about to succeed, Grace returns with a new face and lost memory, leading to continuous misunderstandings with Alice. The complex web of emotions and interests slowly unfolds… EP 1:Grace's birthday takes a dark turn when her husband Matthew, in cahoots with his lover Fiona, reveals his six-year deception and pushes Grace off a cliff to claim her father's company, unaware that her twin sister Alice is waiting in the wings for revenge.Will Alice uncover the truth behind Grace's 'accident' and exact her revenge on Matthew and Fiona?

Adrian Foster, CEO of Foster Group, showers poor student Miranda Lewis with endless love—only because her smile with the dimple mirrors his lost beloved. But he never knows that Miranda only desires for his wealth until Miranda destroys her very dimple for revenge... EP 1:Adrian Foster, still mourning the loss of his true love Lillian, marries Miranda solely for her resemblance to her. He spoils her, even allowing her to have a child with her childhood crush, Ethan, until she ruins her dimple through plastic surgery, the very feature that reminded Adrian of Lillian. Miranda reveals her true intentions, confessing she only married Adrian because his eyes resembled Ethan's, and now wants to have Ethan's baby as he battles cancer.Will Adrian's love for Miranda turn to rage when he discovers her ultimate betrayal?

In a twist of fate, Belle, struggling to make ends meet, has a one-night stand with William, a celibate CEO with fertility issues, and ends up pregnant with twins. From thereon, she finds herself lavishly pampered by the CEO's family. EP 1:Belle faces harsh judgment from her family upon revealing her pregnancy, but her life takes a dramatic turn when she encounters Mr. Norman, who steps in to protect her from an aggressor, hinting at a significant connection between them.What will be the consequences of Belle's unexpected encounter with Mr. Norman?

column1: I Was Auctioned to The Marshal
column4: Stella Sue was auctioned off by her family, only for ruthless Marshal Gabriel Ferns to own her. Yet she fled, straight into her family’s captivity and years of torment... When their secret child brought truth to light, Gabriel rained a bloodbath to those who hurt her. This time, he must earn her heart—not with gold, but with endless care and love. EP 1:Stella Sue is betrayed by her adoptive family as they auction off her virginity to save her sister, revealing her as a 'super fertile' woman, leading to a high-stakes bidding war that ends with the mysterious Young Marshal stepping in.What will the Young Marshal do with Stella Sue now that he has won the bid?

column1: Loved the Voice, Not the Face
column4: To solidify her status, the Commander's cruel wife, Rachelle, hires a mute girl named Lily to be her surrogate. Little does she know, Lily is actually Sakura—the woman whose identity Rachelle stole after murdering her family. With a new face and a vow of silence, Sakura is back for one thing: revenge. But a problem arises: the Commander, who only ever loved Sakura's voice, finds himself falling for the silent Lily… EP 1:Rachelle, the Commander's wife, hires a mute girl named Lily to be her surrogate, unaware that Lily is actually Sakura—the woman whose identity Rachelle stole after murdering her family. Sakura, now with a new face and a vow of silence, is back for revenge. The Commander, who only ever loved Sakura's voice, finds himself inexplicably drawn to the silent Lily, complicating Sakura's plans. Meanwhile, Rachelle pressures the Commander to remarry for an heir, setting the stage for a tense confrontation.Will Sakura's true identity be revealed before she can exact her revenge?

After her daughter is framed for killing her rapist, Madeline gets herself arrested to break her baby girl out. Now, with 7 days until execution, they must outsmart the guards, violent inmates, and a warden who wants them dead. This is a mother-daughter prison break. And with the death clock ticking, one wrong move means ruining everything... EP 1:Stella Johnson is wrongfully convicted of attempted homicide and sentenced to death, despite her claims of self-defense. Her mother, Madeline, desperately presents evidence to prove Stella's innocence, only to face the corrupt power of the Thompson family who control the justice system. Determined to save her daughter, Madeline vows to break Stella out of Blackmire Prison.Will Madeline succeed in her daring plan to rescue Stella from execution?

Three years ago, Vivian Yates was framed by her father Victor James and his scheming wife, Lillian, thrown into prison, and cursed with a deadly Love Hex. Left to die, she survived. Now free, she crashes Victor’s lavish birthday party, declaring war. But when the curse strikes, she grabs the nearest stranger—Adrian Kerr—only to realize he’s her childhood friend. And he’s ready to fight by her side.
 EP 1:Vivian Yates, recently released from prison after being framed by her father Victor James and stepmother Lillian, crashes Victor's 50th birthday gala to declare her revenge. She interrupts the celebration with a grand entrance, sending a mysterious gift that hints at her intentions to reclaim what's rightfully hers from her deceitful family.What shocking revelation will Vivian's gift unveil at the gala?

James Miller, a top cyber-security officer, gets betrayed, framed, and finally cast out in disgrace. He's doubted even by Charlotte Lawson, the CEO of Starlane Corporation. But when hackers strike, James unveils his trump card, turning the tables. As corporate giants clash, can he reclaim his honor and protect the woman who unknowingly holds his heart? EP 1:James Miller, a disgraced cyber-security officer, finds himself in an unexpected situation when he meets Charlotte Lawson, the CEO of Starlane Corporation, after a night of partying. Just as Charlotte faces a massive hacker breach, James offers his expertise to help, revealing his true skills despite his tarnished reputation. The episode sets the stage for James to prove his worth and possibly reclaim his honor.Will James be able to stop the hackers and regain Charlotte's trust?

When Nina steps in for her runaway sister to marry into a prestigious clan, she welcomes a marriage of convenience. The workaholic groom James’ immediate trip suits her—until he breaches their distance one night. Beneath this strategic union lies a mystery: does the Warner empire’s icy facade hide a reluctant passion, or will this transactional bond unravel into something far more dangerous...? EP 1:Nina steps in for her runaway sister Lydia to marry James Warner, the CEO of Bosson Group, in an arranged marriage. The ceremony is rushed due to James' busy schedule, and Nina finds herself in a marriage of convenience with a man she barely knows. As rumors swirl about her new status, Nina tries to maintain the facade, but James' unexpected return and plans to visit her parents add complications to their already strained relationship.Will Nina and James' marriage of convenience withstand the pressures of his sudden return and the secrets they're both hiding?

Selene Wren, once the most talented martial artist in her family, becomes an outcast after accidentally absorbing her master’s power—turning her into a fat girl. Shamed by her family and abandoned by her fiancé, only her mother and sister stand by her. Selene vows to reclaim their honor by winning the martial arts tournament, encountering the man she once shared a passionate night with. In a blaze of energy, she fights, rises… and she’s unstoppable, ready to burn the world down. EP 1:Selene struggles with the uncontrolled inner power passed down by her master, which has caused her physical transformation. Meanwhile, she is haunted by a mysterious encounter where a man from the Skyblade Sect threatens revenge after noticing a red mark on her neck. Her master hints at her potential to achieve great power if she overcomes her inner stagnation.Will Selene unlock her true potential and confront the man from the Skyblade Sect?

Five years after her twin sons vanished, Lisa Harper takes a nanny job in billionaire Vincent Morgan’s home—only to find his adopted boy Andy is her missing son. Worse, he’s been used as a living “blood bank.” Now Lisa must play the perfect servant while plotting the ultimate escape… and the fall of the family who stole her children. EP 1:Lisa Harper, after five years of searching for her missing twin sons, takes a job as a nanny in billionaire Vincent Morgan's home. Suspecting that his adopted son Andy is her missing child, she must navigate the dangerous household while keeping her true identity hidden.Will Lisa be able to uncover the truth about Andy and reunite with her missing son?

Carol Jones rescues injured billionaire Robert Wilson, and they fall in love. After she gets pregnant, Robert has to leave due to a family crisis, promising to return. However, Carol's father forces her to marry Daniel Brown, a violent jeweler. Years pass, but their reunion remains distant.

When the business tycoon Emily Summers died unexpectedly, she never imagined she'd wake up as Olivia Bennett—an 8-year-old girl with a forgotten past and a dangerous future. EP 1:The episode begins with a flashback of Emily Summers' rise to fame as the 'Queen of Business,' highlighting her unparalleled success and the loneliness of her personal life. After her unexpected death, she mysteriously wakes up as 8-year-old Olivia Bennett, facing a hostile family environment where her stepmother gives her father an ultimatum to choose between them.Will Olivia be able to navigate her new life and uncover the secrets of her past?

After five years of humble devotion to Liam Frost, Serena Reed’s heart shatters when she sees him kiss another woman. Wiping away the past, she returns as the powerful Reed heiress with Ethan Woods by her side. As Liam’s world collapses, regret strikes too late—her heart is no longer his to win. EP 1:Serena Reed undergoes memory-erasure surgery to forget her painful five-year relationship with Liam Frost, only to discover she selectively forgot him, sparking curiosity about their past and her decision to burn the last memento of their time together.Will Serena's new beginning truly erase the shadow of Liam, or will the past resurface in unexpected ways?

Once a beloved heiress, Shirley Shaw fell for Ray Perry, the chauffeur's son. She spoiled him—letting him ride in luxury, spend her money, and even handed him her company. But while Ray basked in her devotion, he secretly pursued others. Betrayal and humiliation pushed Shirley to the brink. Just as her life seemed to slip away, a hidden truth about someone she had overlooked began to surface. With a second chance, Shirley is ready to rewrite her fate... EP 1:Shirley Shaw confronts Ray Perry, the man she once loved and trusted, only to discover his cruel betrayal—he infected her with AIDS using contaminated needles to steal her family's wealth. As she faces her darkest moment, Terrence, someone she overlooked, risks everything to save her. In her dying breath, Shirley wishes for another chance, only to wake up realizing she might have been reborn.Will Shirley's second chance reveal the truth and let her reclaim her stolen life?

Amnesiac prince. Two sisters. One lie that changed history. But when the Emperor discovers the deception on his wedding day, a brutal game of palace politics begins. Now, Flora must survive poisoned teacups, rigged "divine omens," and the vicious jealousy to claim her rightful place beside the man whose heart she never stopped loving... EP 1:The newly ascended Emperor announces his decision to marry the daughter of Mayor Evans, whom he believes saved him during his exile, unaware that a case of mistaken identity is at play, setting the stage for future conflicts.Will the Emperor discover the truth about who really saved him before it's too late?

Reborn after being left to die by husband Nate Webster, Laila plots revenge. She'll protect her child, ruin Webster Group, and ignite a war. But when Aidan Nixon becomes her unlikely ally, Nate's arrogance crumbles. Will Laila choose vengeance or a second chance at love? A ruthless tale of betrayal and empowerment. EP 1:Laila is left to die in a fire by her husband Nate, who prioritizes saving their child Carrie over her, leading to a miscarriage and her eventual rebirth one month prior to the incident.Will Laila use her second chance to seek revenge or forge a new path?

When the business tycoon Emily Summers died unexpectedly, she never imagined she'd wake up as Olivia Bennett—an 8-year-old girl with a forgotten past and a dangerous future. EP 1:Emily Summers, a successful business tycoon, unexpectedly dies and wakes up as an 8-year-old girl named Olivia Bennett, facing a forgotten past and a dangerous future. She finds herself in a hostile household where she must navigate complex family dynamics and survival.Will Olivia uncover the truth about her past and survive in her new, dangerous environment?

At her boyfriend's great uncle's party, Serena never expected the host to be her ex, Hayden. Two years after their breakup, Hayden is still obsessed, and now, under the same roof, he's not afraid to push boundaries. As Serena uncovers her boyfriend's betrayal, the truth behind their split resurfaces, changing everything... EP 1:At her boyfriend's great uncle's party, Serena is shocked to discover the host is her ex, Hayden, who is still obsessed with her. As tensions rise and secrets begin to unfold under the same roof, Serena's relationship with her boyfriend is put to the test.Will Serena uncover the truth about her past with Hayden before it's too late?
