column1: His Chance is Past Tense, Love is Expired
column4: Stella, while working as a doctor in war zones, sacrificed her life to save a child. As her soul is trapped near Lucas, her husband, she witnessed him being deceived by Celia's lies. When Lucas learns the truth, he desperately seeks redemption. As Stella is reborn as Sara, she teams up with Adrian who has loved her his entire life, to change her fate. Who will she choose? EP 1:Lucas, as the president of Johnson Group, heads to a war zone to aid evacuation, revealing his betrayal to Stella by introducing his girlfriend Celia, despite being engaged to Stella. Stella, who had sacrificed her life to save a child, finds her soul trapped near Lucas, witnessing his deceit and his harsh words about her. After the evacuation, Stella's soul questions her presence at Lucas's place despite her death.Will Stella uncover the truth behind Lucas's betrayal and her mysterious reappearance?

column1: My Warlord Fiancé & His Mission to Save Me
column4:
My Warlord Fiancé & His Mission to Save Me
Julian Garner, an experienced veteran, finds himself bound by duty and desire as he shields Stella Lynn, COO of Serenity Group, from assassins and corporate coups. Faced with multiple threats, Stella finds the real enemy shares her lipstick… When a veteran is bound by a dangerous love pact, will he be the savior to all — or the destroyer? EP 1:Stella Lynn, the newly appointed COO of Serenity Group, arrives amidst much anticipation and is greeted with a surprising romantic advance, hinting at the complexities of her arranged marriage and the underlying tensions in her life.Will Stella's unexpected romantic moment with her mysterious suitor complicate her already dangerous situation?

Following her recognition, Wendy Chambray was ostracized and falsely accused, leading to her death. Reborn into a new life, she embarked on a fresh journey. The Chambray brothers, too, had gone through a profound transformation — from their once cruel and indifferent selves to those burdened by guilt and regret, reflecting the intricate and ever-changing nature of humanity. EP 1:Wendy confronts her adoptive parents about her thesis being published under her sister Kacia's name, revealing the favoritism and injustice within the family.Will Wendy continue to endure the unfair treatment or will she finally stand up for herself?

Patrick thought his wife Vivian was just a compliant housewife, until she disappeared, leaving only a note... When the legal world explodes with news of Vivian's comeback, he is shocked that his honey is a legendary attorney! Now, with pride, love, and justice on the line, who will win the final court case? EP 1:Vivian dramatically reveals her true identity as a legendary attorney, 'The Invincible Vivian', to her shocked husband Patrick, declaring her intention to divorce him and return to her legal career, setting the stage for a fierce courtroom battle between the former couple.Will Patrick be able to handle facing his ex-wife in court now that she's revealed her true power?

Marius, a vocational grad in sow postpartum care, returns home to cultivate. After 2.5 years stuck at the Qi Initiate, he faces a broken engagement and angers the mighty Godslayer. Forced to flee, his only hope lies in an arranged marriage to Yelena, the legendary Solara’s Valkyrie. Can this unlikely groom save his family from impending doom? EP 1:Marius, stuck at Qi Initiate level, faces a broken engagement and a dangerous encounter where he must prove his worth by healing an injured opponent, revealing his unexpected skills and knowledge in pressure points.Will Marius's unorthodox healing methods win him an ally or deepen his troubles with the Godslayer?

In Serica, where women are banned from martial arts, the unparalleled fighter Mist Lark disguises herself as a man to hide her abilities and works as a janitor in a martial arts school. When the ban is lifted, the princess is kidnapped, Mist must rescue the princess and face new challenges, will they break boundaries for women's place in it? EP 1:In Serica, the Warrior Championship concludes with a surprising new champion, but the real shock comes when a mysterious fighter humiliates the Hun invaders and rejects the title, leading to an unexpected betrothal to Princess Gratia. Mist Lark, the disguised female warrior, faces a dilemma when she realizes her victory means she must marry the princess, putting her secret at risk.Will Mist Lark's secret be exposed when she's forced to marry the princess?

column1: The CEO’s Rebirth: Protecting His True Heir
column4: Charles Rivers died betrayed by his adopted daughter he spoiled—Vivian. In his final moments, he vowed to make things right if there's another chance. Reborn years earlier, he names Cecilia, his biological daughter, as Shaw Group's sole heiress and exposes Vivian's dark deeds. But when Vivian's secret is revealed, how will Charles' family take the hit? EP 1:Charles Rivers, betrayed by his adopted daughter Vivian, is left to die after she reveals her dark secrets and manipulations. In his final moments, he regrets mistreating his biological daughter Cecilia and wishes for a second chance. Miraculously, he wakes up three years in the past, determined to set things right.Will Charles be able to change the past and protect Cecilia from Vivian's schemes?

The fire that consumed Maria's decade-long marriage also exposed the ugly truth—her husband's infidelity and gold-digging schemes. In the ashes, she rose again as her twin sister, weaving a perfect revenge: every betrayal repaid in full, every dollar reclaimed. EP 1:Maria Alanis, the former wife of Nickel Jewelry's CEO Tim Nickel, reveals the dark truth behind her seemingly perfect marriage and family. After enduring a controlling and abusive relationship, Maria declares her plan to make Tim watch as everything he owns turns to ashes, seeking revenge for the pain he caused her.Will Maria succeed in her revenge, or will Tim's power prove too strong to overcome?

10 years ago, combat queen Jenny vanished after exposing fight circuit secrets. Living as housewife 'Jenny', her son was kidnapped by rival Lloyd. Forced out of retirement, she lost but husband Robert revealed pro skills to save them. Lloyd rallied underground forces to hunt them. Near defeat, Robert annihilated the Smith faction, leading to a final reckoning. EP 1:Former combat queen Jenny Streep exposes fight circuit corruption, leading to her disappearance and a quiet life as a housewife. However, when her son is kidnapped by her rival Lloyd, she is forced out of retirement, revealing her husband Robert's hidden fighting skills. As Lloyd's forces hunt them down, the stage is set for a final showdown.Will Jenny and Robert survive Lloyd's relentless pursuit?

Once a basketball god, now a fallen legend. Patrick Chase’s arrogance cost his team the championship and his mentor’s life. Exiled for a decade, he returns as an assistant coach... only to be humiliated. But when a washed-up team takes a chance on him, he leads them on an unstoppable comeback! Redemption? Revenge? This is his LAST SHOT at glory.

Having been humiliated and disfigured by Snow Clair, Pearl Henny returned for revenge with new appearance and reached to Pealr's father and boyfriend. However, she herself was deeply entangled in it. EP 1:Pearl Henny confronts Snow Clair at her workplace, revealing her true identity and intentions for revenge, leading to a tense and aggressive encounter where Snow Clair forces Pearl to drink alcohol despite her allergy.Will Pearl's plan for revenge take a dark turn after this confrontation?

column1: A Fiery Night With Mr. Ice
column4: After a passionate night with the famously “cold” Adrian Shaw, Diana Sue discovers she’s pregnant three months later. To raise her baby, she becomes a caregiver to Mr. Shaw—only to meet hospital director Adrian again. As feelings grow, he struggles with loving a “pregnant woman.” When he finally confesses, the truth about her pregnancy emerges, bringing them together. EP 1:Diana Sue learns she is three months pregnant after her mother's sudden death, but financial struggles and emotional stress threaten her ability to keep the baby.Will Diana find a way to overcome her financial struggles and keep her baby?

column1: Bullied Me? My Dead CEO Ex Is Back!
column4: After her husband Ian passed away, Ann tried to mend her broken heart by marrying Hugh, a man who looked just like him. But when the mistress moved in and trust collapsed, the brutal truth behind this grief-born marriage surfaced. And worse than a stand-in... was the message from her "late" husband. EP 1:Ann, still grieving the loss of her husband Ian, finds solace in Hugh, a man who resembles Ian. Despite spoiling him and ignoring his infidelities, her world shatters when Hugh brings home his mistress, Serena Finn, who is pregnant with his child, revealing the brutal truth of their grief-born marriage.How will Ann react to Hugh's shocking betrayal and the presence of his pregnant mistress in her home?

column1: Serve the Dad and Kill the Daughter
column4: After her daughter Edith dies at the hands of a rich heiress, Yvonne Wong vows revenge. She can’t destroy the powerful Ford family alone—until she learns the heiress has a single father, Simon Ford. The girl took her child. Now Yvonne will take her father… and everything she loves. EP 1:Yvonne Wong, working undercover as a maid for Sylvia Ford, reveals her true intentions to ruin Sylvia, the heiress responsible for her daughter Edith's death, recalling the tragic events that led to her seeking vengeance.Will Yvonne succeed in her plan to destroy Sylvia and the Ford family?

A former mahjong queen. A son drowning in debt. A return to a ruthless casino world. Prunella Crawford steps back into the game to save her son, defeating cheats and clearing dues. But old wounds reopen when her former mentor challenges her in a high-stakes final duel. As cards fall and truths unravel, will she win more than just the game? EP 1:Prunella Crawford, a former mahjong queen, is forced back into the dangerous world of high-stakes gambling to save her son Hugh, who has been kidnapped and held for ransom at Ohtori Sky-Peak Palace. Confronting her past and her former mentor, she must navigate deceit, danger, and her own traumatic memories to win the ultimate game.Will Prunella's return to gambling cost her more than just the game?

Betrayed by her brother and husband, Zoe Swann gave up her empire—only to be killed by the woman she trusted most, Jade Sterling, her sister-in-law-to-be. Reborn, she crashes her engagement party, dumps her cheating fiancé, and exposes his affair with Jade. This time, Zoe’s not playing nice. She’s taking back everything—starting with revenge. EP 1:Zoe Swann, betrayed by her husband Zane and brother Ethan, confronts Jade Sterling, who reveals the ultimate betrayal—the baby she cared for is actually Jade and Zane's child, leading to Zoe's tragic demise and her vow for revenge if given another chance.Will Zoe get her revenge in her second life?

Seven years of love, zero gifts. An engagement ring returned; a marriage license rejected over $1.4 fees... only for her to immediately wed her childhood sweetheart in a lavish ceremony. When his sister's life is hanging by a thread, Ethan Johnson kneels, begging for his surrendered savings back as medical funds. Her reply? 'I'm not a charity.' Now, broken and penniless—how far will a betrayed man go? EP 1:Ethan desperately tries to save his sister Anna with the money he gave to Claire, only to be rejected and humiliated at her engagement banquet. Despite his pleas, Claire refuses to help, leading to Anna's tragic death.Will Ethan seek revenge against Claire for his sister's death?

Workaholic Summer Lane reunites with her ex Ethan Stone at a parent-teacher meeting—only to discover he’s their son’s new teacher. Seven years ago, his mother forced their breakup by threatening her grandmother’s medical care. Now, as Ethan relentlessly pursues the truth, Summer protects their child with lies, fake engagements, and a high-stakes battle against his powerful family. But when the truth surfaces, can broken trust bloom again? A fierce second chance at love. EP 1:Summer Lane, a workaholic mother, reunites with her ex-boyfriend Ethan Stone at a parent-teacher meeting, only to discover he is their son's new teacher. The meeting turns awkward when Ethan questions Ben's absent father, revealing Summer's secret.Will Ethan uncover the truth about his son in the next episode?

Sophie Shane saved Joel Lynn from inferno flames — only to have her sacrifice stolen by lies! Amnesia turned him into a monster: he caged her in a forced marriage, spewing cruelty like fire... But when truth ignites, is it too late to say sorry, or will her shattered heart let love breathe again? EP 1:Sophie reveals her pregnancy to Joel, sparking a heated argument where Joel accuses her of being a gold-digger and refuses to accept the child. Feeling rejected and heartbroken, Sophie decides to leave their marriage, while a mysterious call from Brian hints at undisclosed medical results that could change everything.What shocking truth will Brian's rechecked results reveal about Sophie?

Christian Shaw hates Shirley Storm for "betrayal"... but loves the fake heart donor who "saved" him. Years of torment later... Twist! Shirley actually gave him her heart! Six years pass, she returns with his secret heir... while he remains clueless about both truths. When he finally learns she's his true savior—will she even care? EP 1:Christian Shaw, now a wealthy philanthropist, publicly confronts Shirley Storm about her past 'betrayal', unaware she secretly gave him her heart to save his life. Meanwhile, Shirley faces threats due to her father's debts, and a friend vows to reveal the truth to Christian.Will Christian finally learn the truth about Shirley's sacrifice?

Orphan Chloe West suffers cruelty in her uncle's doghouse—until teacher Frank Lewis, heartbroken by her plight, drains his savings to rescue her. Then fortune smiles: Frank's rehired, his son’s leg mends miraculously, his daughter-in-law conceives. But when word spreads Chloe's dad died saving a tycoon, leaving a fortune Frank oversees, her once-spiteful kin descend, clawing for "custody." Chaos ignites. EP 1:Chloe, a young orphan suffering under her abusive aunt's care, is discovered by her former teacher, Mr. Lewis, who is shocked by her living conditions. Despite being dismissed from his job and facing hostility from Chloe's relatives, Mr. Lewis decides to take her in, offering her a chance at a better life. Meanwhile, the wealthy tycoon saved by Chloe's father decides to adopt her, setting the stage for a custody battle.Will Mr. Lewis be able to protect Chloe from her greedy relatives and the tycoon's sudden interest in her?

Eva Travis marries the “blind” Julian Payne in place of her sister. When she finds herself falling for him, her sister Lena suddenly returns and tries to reclaim her position as Mrs. Payne. Julian then confesses that his blindness was a ruse... EP 1:Eva Travis finds herself in a shocking situation when she realizes she has married the wrong man—Julian Payne, the feared underworld king, instead of her beloved Lucas Reed. Her sister Lena and Lucas have eloped, leaving Eva to face Julian's wrath if he discovers the truth. As Eva struggles to maintain the charade of being Lena, she must navigate the dangerous waters of Julian's unpredictable nature.Will Eva be able to keep up the deception, or will Julian uncover the truth about his 'bride'?

Once a noble daughter from ancient times, Julia Griffin is now a disgraced heiress cast abroad by her scheming stepmother. Two years later, she returns—no longer a pawn, but a world-renowned embroidery master in disguise. Bound by an arranged marriage, she reenters the Griffin family with a hidden agenda. But as her plan unfolds, something—or someone—begins to change her path. What will she choose in the end? EP 1:Rachel Griffin, once a disgraced heiress cast abroad, returns as a renowned embroidery master under the guise of fulfilling her father's summons, but her homecoming is fraught with hidden agendas and potential schemes.What dark plans does the Griffin family have for Rachel's sudden return?

Wendy never expected her one-night stand with Simon, her bestie's brother, to end in marriage. But when the cold CEO suddenly becomes obsessed with her, she realizes: this was no accident. He's loved her for years! Now what's she gonna do about this? Just fall right back into his arms? EP 1:Wendy discovers that her one-night stand with Simon, her best friend's brother, was no accident as he confesses his decade-long secret love for her, leading to a tense confrontation.Will Wendy confront her feelings for Simon after his shocking confession?

column1: Oops! I Accidentally Married the CEO
column4: Monica found out that her fiancé cheated on her with her best friend, on impulse, she proposed Cullen, a strange waiter. After the marriage that Monica gradually realized that her husband's identity seemed suspicious ...... What exactly is Cullen's hidden identity? How will their relationship really work out? EP 1:Monica discovers her fiancé Andrew's affair with her best friend Bella, leading to a heated confrontation where she impulsively proposes to Cullen, a waiter who is actually the new boss undercover.Will Cullen accept Monica's impulsive marriage proposal and what secrets does he hide?

Poor but fierce Harper Shaw carried rich heir Joseph White's twins... until his family tore them apart. After Joseph's accident, her jealous best friend stole their daughter to win his love! Now, years later, Harper is gravely ill, and her son has just found his powerful father. Will the truth explode before it’s too late? EP 1:Harper Shaw is diagnosed with a serious brain tumor requiring an expensive surgery, while her son Finn discovers the truth and desperately seeks help from his powerful father, Joseph White, who is unaware of Finn's existence.Will Joseph recognize Finn and save Harper before it's too late?

After sacrificing himself to save his aloof high school crush in a car crash, Liam Mitchell wakes up—18 again. But when the icy beauty recognizes him too, she shocks everyone by clinging to him in tears. Now, she’s determined to rewrite their fate, chasing the boy she once ignored. As past secrets unravel, Liam realizes: This rebirth isn’t just his. EP 1:After sacrificing himself to save his high school crush, Sophie Collins, in a car crash, Liam Mitchell wakes up 18 again, only to find that the once aloof 'Ice Queen' recognizes him and clings to him in tears, shocking everyone and hinting at a shared rebirth.Will Sophie's sudden change of heart reveal deeper secrets from their past lives?

Tech genius Liam Ford gave up everything for family loyalty—only to watch his wife pick her rich ex and his daughter mocking him. Now, he walks away—straight to a top-secret chip lab! Betrayed? Broken? No. Now, he’s building an empire... and they’ll beg for his return. EP 1:Liam Ford, a tech genius, faces betrayal as his wife brings her rich ex into their home, even suggesting they share a room, while their daughter sides against him. Heartbroken and disillusioned, Liam makes the decisive choice to leave his family behind and join a top-secret chip development program, marking the end of his marriage and the beginning of a new, isolated chapter in his life.Will Liam's departure lead to the creation of something revolutionary, or will his family realize their mistake too late?

In a world where poetry holds real power and talent defines status, young professor Jeffrey Rivera wakes up as a ridiculed eight-year-old. With verses far beyond this realm, he begins to shake the foundations of a poetic order still in its infancy. But can poetry alone rewrite his fate? EP 1:Jeffrey Rivera, a literature professor, wakes up in a fantastical dynasty where poetry holds real power, reborn as a ridiculed eight-year-old boy. Struggling with his new identity and ailing health, he learns that the family's treasured Celestial Mushroom can cure him, but only if he passes the impossible Poetry Examination. With his vast knowledge of literature from another realm, Jeffrey astounds everyone by effortlessly solving a challenge deemed solvable only by a Poetry Sage.Will Jeffrey's incredible poetic talent secure him the Celestial Mushroom and rewrite his fate in this new world?

Vivienne Norton, once the cherished daughter of the Nolan family, is enslaved by her adoptive family. After a fateful night with Adrian Leighton, she finds herself entangled in a deadly web of betrayal. With Adrian's help, she fights to expose her family's secrets. But can she trust him, or is she just another pawn in a game of power? EP 1:Vivienne finds herself in a perilous situation with Adrian Leighton after being affected by love incense, but she quickly turns the tables by manipulating the situation to her advantage.Will Vivienne's risky gamble with Adrian lead to her salvation or deeper danger?

Princess Isabella Wilson, the Emperor’s missing daughter, was forced to ghostwrite for Edward Shelton, the ruthless son of the Imperial Chancellor. When her exam poems reached the Emperor, he recognized verses identical to those his daughter had composed as a child. Racing to the exam hall, can the emperor find the truth—and his long-lost daughter? EP 1:Princess Isabella, the Emperor's missing daughter, is forced to ghostwrite for Edward Shelton, the ruthless son of the Imperial Chancellor. After her exam poems reach the Emperor, he recognizes verses identical to those his daughter composed as a child, leading him to race to the exam hall in search of the truth—and his long-lost daughter.Will the Emperor uncover the truth and reunite with his daughter before it's too late?

When a ruthless tycoon is thrown back to 1980, he faces a brutal past, a stolen future, and a wife in danger. With only fragments of memory and a will to rewrite fate, he crosses paths with a mysterious CEO and a cunning rival. In a world of debt, desire, and power, who will claim the last word? EP 1:Zavier Metzger confronts his dark past, realizing the day he sold his daughter Stella and the subsequent suicide of his wife Camellia, leading to his desperate wish to turn back time and be a better husband and father.Will Zavier succeed in changing his fate and saving his family in this second chance?

Five years ago, Sylvia Becker was drugged at her own engagement party and spent the night with a stranger. Now, on the day of her divorce, she crosses paths with a bold little girl livestreaming a blind date for her dad. One unexpected meeting leads to another, and fate begins to twist in ways no one saw coming. Could this little girl be the key to rewriting Sylvia's story? EP 1:On the day of her divorce, Sylvia Becker encounters a bold little girl named Lola Meyer who is livestreaming to find a wife for her father, Liam Meyer, CEO of Meyer Group. The encounter sparks an unexpected connection, especially when Sylvia's ex-husband, Sean, accuses her of having a child with someone else. The situation escalates as Sylvia defends Lola, who calls her 'Mommy,' leading to a confrontation that hints at deeper unresolved issues from Sylvia's past.Will Sylvia and Liam's paths cross again, and could Lola be the key to uncovering Sylvia's hidden past?

Prince Chase was executed in his past life—framed by his own brother. Reborn with memories, he dismantles their schemes: exposing poison plots, crushing rebellions, and winning people's support. But when his brother allies with foreign invaders, he knows that someone in this very room is still playing the game... EP 1:Prince Chase is falsely accused of poisoning his father, the King, by his own brother Jason. Despite his desperate pleas of innocence, the King, influenced by Jason's manipulations, orders Chase to be beaten to death. In a tragic turn, Chase's mother sacrifices herself to prove his innocence, leaving Chase devastated and setting the stage for his eventual rebirth and revenge.Will Chase's memories of betrayal fuel his quest for vengeance in his new life?

Poisoned basketball king, Henry Carter, wakes after 15 years—trapped in a child’s body! He finds his daughter, now grown, is guarding his ruined court, mocked and bullied by rival players. Rage burns in his young eyes as he witnesses his daughter’s humiliation. Now, this kid with the mind of a legend just grabs the ball... EP 1:Henry Carter, the poisoned basketball king, wakes up after 15 years in a child's body and reunites with his now-grown daughter Monica, who is guarding his ruined court. As he witnesses her being bullied by rival players, he decides to step in and protect his legacy while keeping his true identity hidden.Will Henry be able to reclaim his court and reveal his true identity to Monica?

Mysterious physician Hayden Yates arrives at the Burnett estate with half of a jade pendant. Using extraordinary medical skills, he saves the critically ill matriarch, Eleanor Burnett. As hidden tensions and old secrets simmer beneath the surface, Hayden's presence begins to unsettle the powerful family. But who is he—and why did he really come? EP 1:A mysterious physician named Hayden Yates arrives at the Burnett estate with half of a jade pendant matching Eleanor Burnett's, claiming he can treat her despite his vague medical knowledge, stirring curiosity and tension among the family members.Will Hayden's unconventional methods actually save Eleanor, or does his arrival hint at deeper secrets tied to the jade pendant?

Irene Webb, exiled Hill heiress, crushed on Jason Marsh for years before an unexpected pregnancy bound them together. Despite harassment from Grace Hill and Mrs. Marsh, Jason stood by her. The Hill family reclaimed Irene after necklace-proof of heritage, culminating in her dazzling fashion debut. When Grace's kidnapping plot failed, justice prevailed, leaving Irene and Jason to claim their fairy-tale ending. EP 1:Irene Webb, who has harbored feelings for Jason Marsh for five years, unexpectedly encounters him during a chaotic warehouse inspection. A twist of fate reveals she might be pregnant with his child, stemming from a mysterious night linked to a warehouse explosion. Meanwhile, Irene faces financial troubles, risking her late mother's house, while still dreaming of a future with Jason.Will Irene tell Jason about the pregnancy and will he believe her?

After getting married with the one she loved, she voluntarily quit her job and became a full-time house-wife. However, Burd couldn't get over with the woman, Vince, who is his first love. Ever since Vince got back in Burd's life, Burd's been hurting Light's heart. After Light left Burd, a man came into his life. Will the one be her Mr. Right? EP 1:Burd achieves his dream of becoming a boxing champion, dedicating his victory to his first love Vince, which devastates his wife Light, leading her to finally confront the truth about their marriage and decide to file for divorce.Will Light find the courage to start anew after the divorce?

Yarrow Hawke was born with a rare force more powerful than spirit energy—an ancient strength that could shake the heavens. Yet for years, he's been mocked as weak, his gifts secretly drained to heal his wounded master. But when his clan faces ruin and hope fades, Yarrow awakens the power within. A storm is coming, and he stands at its eye. EP 1:Yarrow's master reveals the truth about Yarrow's drained Primordial Qi, meant to heal his master's injuries, pushing Yarrow to excel in body cultivation. Meanwhile, the Celestium Order senses the powerful Primordial Qi vibrations, sparking a search for the hidden master behind this energy, unaware it's Yarrow. The episode ends with Yarrow's grandfather confronting him about his choice to become a Body Cultivator, labeling him a disgrace.Will Yarrow's mastery of Primordial Qi remain a secret, or will the Celestium Order uncover his true potential?

After her divorce, Katelyn Smith raises her daughter alone and opens a diner in her hometown, using hard-earned savings to renovate her family home. Despite her strength, she battles insecurity over her rural background and failed marriage. Jack Todd and his family try to force her into marriage, while Thomas Wilson—a once-disgraced heir she helped—develops deep feelings for her. He confesses repeatedly and stays by her side through challenges. EP 1:Katelyn Smith, a divorced woman running a diner, faces pressure from Jack Todd's family to marry him for her property, while Thomas Wilson confesses his long-standing feelings for her with intentions of marriage.Will Katelyn succumb to the pressures of an arranged marriage or follow her heart with Thomas?

Three years ago, Anna's husband supposedly died of a heart attack — but left behind a mountain of debt in her name. Desperate and hounded by loan sharks, she was forced to sell flowers on the streets to survive.
One day, Anna accidentally runs into her “dead” husband, only to discover the shocking truth: he had faked his death, cheated on her with Becca, and left her to shoulder all the debt and consequences alone.
Devastated, Anna is then killed in a car accident — by none other than Harry hims EP 1:Anna, who has been struggling to survive after her husband Harry's supposed death, accidentally encounters him alive and well, only to discover he faked his death to escape debt and left her to suffer the consequences.Will Anna be able to expose Harry's deceit and make him pay for the pain he caused?

When screenwriter Sue Lockwood delivers a haunting new script to agent River Kingsley, it sets in motion a secretive production led by actress Blanche Whitmore. But as cameras begin to roll inside a sealed-off set, fiction begins to echo reality in unsettling ways. Behind every line lies intention. Behind every scene, a hidden agenda. Blanche thinks she's acting. Sue knows she's confessing. EP 1:The protagonist reveals their traumatic childhood where their mother committed suicide after discovering their father's infidelity with actress Blanche Whitmore, who then used the father to advance her career. Now grown up, the protagonist seeks revenge by infiltrating Blanche's life through her son under the alias 'Judge Pen', aiming to make Blanche suffer for her past crimes.Will the protagonist's revenge plan succeed, or will Blanche uncover the truth before it's too late?

Ten years ago, young Misaki vanished during a festival. Switched with another girl by a scheming woman, Misaki was dragged into a life of poverty and abuse, while her replacement lived in luxury as the heiress. A decade later, Misaki reappears—stronger, determined, unknowingly standing right before the family that has searched for her all along. EP 1:During a festival, young Misaki is separated from her brother and taken by a scheming woman, while another girl is switched in her place. Years later, a reunion occurs where the family realizes the girl they thought was Misaki is an imposter, leading to a desperate search for the real Misaki.Will the family ever find the real Misaki and uncover the truth behind the switch?

column1: Don't Mess With the Boss Lady
column4: At the Greenlake Properties charity auction, CEO Luna Lee is suddenly attacked—by villagers who once helped fund her education. Shocked, Luna goes undercover to uncover the truth. But in Jonshire, she's beaten and locked away by a local branch leader. When her true identity is revealed, even those in power fall to their knees... What secret ties them all together? EP 1:At a charity gala, CEO Luna Lee is confronted by villagers from her hometown, Jonshire, who accuse her of abandoning them and allowing her company to exploit and harm them, leading to a dramatic and emotional standoff.What dark secrets will Luna uncover when she returns to Jonshire?

Married off to a fool, Joanna Miller thought her life was over, until miracles struck! The Woodson family’s luck skyrocketed: treasures appeared, disasters vanished… and her “useless” husband? Not only woke up a genius—he aced the imperial exams and seized power! But now, does the empire’s hottest rising star still need his “lucky charm” wife? EP 1:Joanna Miller is reluctantly married off to Floyd Woodson, a man perceived as a fool, in exchange for financial stability for her family, only to discover her new husband's childlike demeanor.Will Joanna's fate change now that she's bound to Floyd, the so-called fool?

After a night with Jerome, Odelia grapples with guilt—until discovering her boyfriend’s affair with her best friend. In a whirlwind of revenge, she marries Jerome. But as their vows settle, a chilling question emerges: Who exactly is this man she’s bound to? EP 1:Odelia wakes up with guilt after betraying her boyfriend Calum by sleeping with another man, Jerome. At a business meeting, she is drugged and harassed by Mr. Lee, only to be unexpectedly rescued by Calum, who seems unaware of her infidelity. Meanwhile, Calum's true identity as the Rosenthal heir is revealed, adding another layer of complexity to their relationship.Will Calum discover Odelia's betrayal and how will their relationship survive the growing web of lies?

Heiress Ann was betrayed by her husband and foster sister, sent to a cruel Virtue Center, and left maimed. When she returns, the lies only deepen—her child is taken, her trust shattered. She fakes a marriage to a feared man to strike back. They buried her once. Now she's digging graves... EP 1:Ann, betrayed by her husband and foster sister Lina, is sent to the cruel Virtue Center where she endures torture for three years. Upon her return, she is met with further betrayal and hostility from her family, leading her to declare her intention to leave them for good.Will Ann succeed in breaking free from her tormentors and seek revenge?

He left as a hero. He returns to a nightmare. Hank Shaw, once Dracania’s fiercest warrior, finds his wife unfaithful, his best friend a traitor, and his mother “dead.” But when the fire begins to burn... the truth claws its way out. Can the past stay buried? EP 1:Hank Shaw, returning as a celebrated hero, discovers his wife's infidelity with his best friend Zack and the tragic fate of his mother, leading to a shocking confrontation.Will Hank's quest for vengeance uncover even darker secrets?

After Caroline is murdered by a hit man hired by Claire, her unfulfilled longing gives her a second chance: she is reborn for just five days. If she can have her husband Matthew tell her, “I love you,” she will live again. Yet Matthew, misled by a past misunderstanding, has only hatred for her. Will the two clear away the misunderstandings and reconcile, or will they part forever? EP 1:Caroline is mysteriously resurrected for five days with a mission to make her husband Matthew say 'I love you' to regain her life, amidst unresolved hatred and a shocking revelation about Claire's involvement in her murder.Can Caroline overcome Matthew's hatred and make him confess his love before time runs out?

Once a basketball god, now a fallen legend. Patrick Chase’s arrogance cost his team the championship and his mentor’s life. Exiled for a decade, he returns as an assistant coach... only to be humiliated. But when a washed-up team takes a chance on him, he leads them on an unstoppable comeback! Redemption? Revenge? This is his LAST SHOT at glory. EP 1:Patrick Chase, once a basketball prodigy, faces the consequences of his arrogance as he is demoted to an errand boy after his past mistakes resurface, including the death of his mentor and losing a crucial game due to his selfish play. Despite his efforts to redeem himself by leading the team to victories, he is undermined and humiliated by the head coach, Mr. Walters, who plans to replace him. Patrick is given an ultimatum: accept the demeaning role or leave, but he vows to lead the team to the national championship before quitting.Will Patrick Chase take the errand job or walk away, and can he really lead the team to the national championship as he claims?

Ian was the perfect heir, until someone faked a DNA test, schemed an accident, and framed him for the crime. His family disowned him, his lover betrayed him. After five years in prison, he emerges to find his life in ruins… Now, when the final reckoning comes, who will truly pay the price? EP 1:Ian is released from prison after five years, having been framed by Howard who faked a DNA test to steal his inheritance and place in the Jones family. His own parents disowned him, believing Howard's lies, and even his fiancée Wendy may have turned against him. Now free, Ian seeks to uncover the truth and reclaim his life.Will Ian be able to prove his innocence and win back his family's trust?

Leona Jones, heiress of Jones Group, secretly helped her husband Hugh Clark build his empire while hiding her true identity. On their 7th anniversary, Hugh humiliates her by celebrating with another woman. But Leona strikes back—exposing Clark Group’s defective products and filing for divorce. But is revenge her only motive? Who will have the last laugh? EP 1:Leona Jones, heiress of Jones Group, receives news that her grandfather is ready to accept her husband Ethan and pass on the Quinn Group early. Overjoyed, she plans to reveal her true identity to Ethan, only to discover him sharing a romantic moment with his secretary, Wendy, shattering her trust and revealing his betrayal.Will Leona confront Ethan about his infidelity or use this betrayal to fuel her revenge?

In her previous life, Susan Don won the lottery of one million, but then was killed by her stepsister Belle Don for this fortune. Having died in deep resentment, Susan was luckily given a second chance of life and woke up on the day she won the lottery. This time, the prize was ten billion! To avoid the tragedy in her last life, Susan kept it a secret. Coincidentally, she married the CEO of Haw's Enterprises, who also concealed his identity from her. This marked the beginning of her revenge... EP 1:Susan Don, who was murdered by her stepsister Bella Tang in her previous life after winning a million-dollar lottery, is reborn on the day she wins the lottery again—this time a staggering 10 billion yuan. Determined to avoid her past fate, Susan keeps her winnings a secret and begins her revenge against Bella, who unknowingly won 500,000 yuan instead of the original 50 yuan.Will Susan's secret fortune and revenge plan succeed against Bella's unexpected windfall?

She gave up fame and the world for him. He gave her betrayal in return. Chloe Moore, once a star designer, stayed for love—only to be broken by a fake divorce, another woman’s child, and the ultimate loss. This time, she walks away. For good. EP 1:Chloe Moore returns after five years only to discover her husband Andrew Davis is divorcing her because he impregnated another woman, claiming it's just for an heir due to Chloe's infertility, shattering their love and promises.Will Chloe truly walk away and start anew, or will Andrew's manipulations pull her back in?

Prodigy Eleanor's life shatters. Saved by the Empress, she becomes the feared Merchant General. Years later, when she returns to her grandfather's teahouse, Prosperus Emporium, rivals attack. She is mocked as “useless”, but when she unleashes her forbidden techniques, all discover she's the nation's legendary “God of Wealth”... EP 1:In the bustling commerce of Azureus, counterfeit coins pose a significant threat, and authentication techniques like Silver Identification by Sound are highly valued. Lady Mia demonstrates her skill but is overshadowed by the legendary prowess of the missing Lady Eleanor, whose unparalleled abilities could have saved Prosperus Emporium from its current struggles. As the Emporium faces a forced succession by the main family, the absence of Eleanor, once the nation's prodigy, is deeply felt, leaving her grandfather to wonder about her fate.Will Eleanor return in time to reclaim her legacy and save Prosperus Emporium from the clutches of the main family?

Linda Carter was everything they needed and nothing they truly saw, graceful in silence, steady in sacrifice, invisible by design. Her husband craved power, her child adored appearances, and somewhere in between, she vanished into the margins of her own life. But the thing about erasing a woman like her is simple: she learns how to rewrite. And when she does, no one is safe. EP 1:Linda's father reveals she is the true heir to NovaRise Group, uncovering a 30-year-old secret of her being swapped at birth. Meanwhile, Yvonne, the impostor, manipulates Linda's family, creating tension and conflict.Will Linda reclaim her rightful place, or will Yvonne's schemes tear her family apart?

Yara Wilson was separated from her brother, Chester Sheeran, with only a jade pendant as a token of recognition. Years later, Chester found Yara while pursuing his career and entered into a contract marriage with her. However, Yara's adopted sister, Hailey Wilson, assumed Yara's identity and tried to drive them apart. Jane Sheeran, an adopted daughter, revealed Hailey's true identity. Jane then discovered they were not biological siblings and began plotting to separate them...
In order to seize Julia's parents' property, the relatives married Julia to the demon in the lake according to an ancient legend. From then on, Julia became the bride of the demon.

column1: My Ex Is Now My Brother?
column4: Nancy’s always felt like an outsider—until she meets Michael, whose warmth lights up her world. They fall hard, but when Nancy learns her family plans to use their relationship to blackmail Michael, she breaks up with him to protect him. Three years later, after her mother remarries, Nancy moves in with her mom and discovers Michael is her stepbrother. Old sparks clash with forbidden ties. Can they rewrite their fate? Don’t miss the twist… EP 1:Nancy moves in with her mother after her remarriage and is shocked to discover that her ex-boyfriend, Michael, is now her stepbrother, leading to a tense and awkward reunion.How will Nancy and Michael navigate their new family dynamic and unresolved feelings?

Once betrayed by the very blood she bled for, Celeste Whitmore awakens in the year before everything fell apart. This time, she turns her back on those who chose another and steps into a world that never sought her, only to be cherished beyond measure. But as the ones who cast her aside watch her rise in someone else's name, one question remains: will she ever let them matter again? EP 1:Celeste confronts her family about their unfair treatment, revealing how her sacrifices built their success, only for them to erase her contributions and favor her sister Joanna, pushing her to the brink of despair.Will Celeste's newfound resolve change her fate in the afterlife?

Yannick Young thought he was just another weak disciple. But when he aces a deadly sect trial, the truth hits—he’s anything but ordinary. Jealous rivals, secret mentors, and ancient enemies stand in his way. Is he ready to claim the power he never knew he had? EP 1:Yannick, once considered weak, demonstrates unexpected strength by easily defeating a formidable opponent, catching the attention of major sects who vie for his allegiance. Encouraged by his mentors, he sets off to join the prestigious Celestial Academy, armed with a mysterious token of immense value.Will Yannick's hidden potential unlock the doors of Celestial Academy, or will the sects' desperate pursuit lead to unforeseen dangers?

Ugly mom Grace Reed raised two sons with great difficulty. The youngest son Lorenzo Slater accidentally fell into the water. However, the older son Xavier Slater refused to recognize his mother in order to marry into a wealthy family. Fortunately, Lorenzo did not drown and became the CEO. He reunites with his mother, and made all those who bullied his mother pay the price. Grace also relied on her kindness to successfully gain the love and respect of everyone. EP 1:Grace Reed, a mother with a birthmark, faces humiliation in public while trying to sell maltose, but her son Lorenzo stands up for her. Meanwhile, her other son Jackie steals money, leading to a confrontation with Lorenzo that results in Lorenzo falling into the water, leaving Grace in despair as she calls for help.Will Lorenzo survive the accident and reunite with his mother?
Once mocked as a “poor girlfriend,” she stuns everyone at the party—revealed as both a lost heiress and the boss of a deadly syndicate.

As her revenge plot unfolded perfectly, she never expected that the 'mistress' she'd been targeting was actually her future mother-in-law! The war of misunderstandings escalated wildly... until one fateful moment, when the shocking truth hit her: the trap she'd set was now her own undoing. EP 1:Sophie Shirai, Ryan's fiancée, is introduced to his mother, unaware that she is actually the woman she has been targeting in her revenge plot. As preparations for their wedding proceed, a sudden and shocking revelation turns Sophie's world upside down when she realizes the 'mistress' she has been after is none other than her future mother-in-law.Will Sophie's revenge plot unravel now that she knows the truth?

After being cheated on by her ex, Wendy has a one-night stand with his younger uncle—Ryan, the cold CEO of her company. He falls for her instantly, but she thinks he’s just using her for revenge. When he asks her to be his "fake" girlfriend, she’s torn. But Ryan’s actions soon prove his feelings are real… and so is their love. EP 1:Wendy arrives late to her boyfriend's birthday, causing tension, but the situation shifts when Ryan, the CEO, has an allergic reaction. Wendy steps in to help, surprising Ryan with her care.Will Ryan's gratitude towards Wendy spark a deeper connection between them?

What defines a hero? Vastland's Royal Warrior, Miranda, believes only those who rise to the rank of Imperial General deserve the title. Her fiancé, Killian, an Imperial General himself, insists that anyone who defends their homeland is a hero. As their engagement falls apart, an invasion forces them into an epic odyssey. Together, they must face an enemy threatening their land—but will they survive, and will Miranda's beliefs about heroism ever change?

Audrey, heiress to a business empire, must find a husband—or lose everything. A wild beach escape entangles her with the irresistible Vanderbilt brothers: charming Caspian and dark, magnetic Killian. But when she ends up pregnant—and doesn’t know which brother is the father—the real game begins. Welcome to the Devil’s Triangle. EP 1:Audrey's father pressures her to attend a party where meticulously chosen suitors await, threatening her inheritance if she doesn't comply, while her current relationship with Ashton is dismissed as insignificant.Will Audrey defy her father's wishes or succumb to the pressure to secure her future?

column1: My Ex-Wife Is a Royal VIP
column4: Stella Alexander, once the Chief Astronomer in imperial court, sacrifices everything for Dylan Murphy—her career, her health, even her fertility—only to be betrayed when he takes a second wife. As the world expects her to crumble, Stella plots her quiet revenge. With a royal decree in hand, she holds the power to strip Dylan of every privilege she once secured for him. But will she destroy the man who broke her? EP 1:Stella Alexander, once the Chief Astronomer, decides to divorce Dylan Murphy after he betrays her by taking a second wife, Cecilia, who is pregnant with his child. Despite her sacrifices for Dylan, including losing her fertility to save him, Stella chooses a peaceful separation. The Empress offers Stella the chance to reclaim everything Dylan gained through her, and she is also invited to return to her former prestigious role as Chief Astronomer.Will Stella reclaim her power and seek revenge against Dylan, or will she walk away for good?

Molded for perfection. Scarred by betrayal. Yuna Reed wears her legacy like a crown and a curse. But when revenge unravels, will love rewrite the ending? EP 1:Yuna Reed faces betrayal from her fiancé, who got her sister pregnant, leading to a dramatic confrontation with her family and a shocking revelation about her mother's death. Meanwhile, the influential Leo Grant arrives, hinting at a new chapter in Yuna's life.Will Yuna find justice for her mother and redemption in the arrival of Leo Grant?

After enduring relentless abuse from her three brothers, the younger sister volunteered for a human cryopreservation experiment—sleeping for three decades, three brothers regret. EP 1:Selene, abused by her adopted brothers and real sister, volunteers for a 30-year cryopreservation experiment to escape her torment, leaving behind a life where she was never truly accepted.Will Selene's brothers ever discover her fate or feel remorse for their actions?

A humble salesman unexpectedly meets a wealthy heiress who’s resisting an arranged marriage. They pretend to be a couple, but when she discovers a hidden treasure in his family, everything changes… EP 1:Leo, a humble salesman, gets entangled with wealthy heiress Evelyn Jones who is resisting an arranged marriage with Ethan Clark. After a heated confrontation, Evelyn declares Leo as her boyfriend, leading them to his seemingly modest home, unaware that his family is hiding immense wealth.Will Evelyn discover Leo's family secret and how will it change their relationship?

Rising star model Nancy Thompson faces an industry ban, but her devoted boyfriend stays by her side. To repay his support, she helps him rise to success—only to catch him cheating with her best friend right before their wedding. Heartbroken but determined, she turns around and marries entertainment mogul Thomas Manson, ready to take back what’s hers.

On his way to treat a patient, Dr. Lewis had a minor collision with a speeding luxury car. Its owner, Eric Phillips, forced Dr. Lewis to apologize and pay for damages. To save the patient, Dr. Lewis endured the humiliation and signed an exorbitant IOU. Later, Eric found out the doctor he'd harassed was saving his son. Full of regret, he wished he'd behaved differently.

Zenara Church, a retired War Lady, honors her father's dying wish to abandon battle. She weds Lucian Logan as her family's son-in-law, fostering him to become Martial Laureate—only to face betrayal when he takes a rival wife. After they scheme to seize her legacy and life, she re-dons her silver armor to reclaim her honor and defend the realm. Who says a true warrior ever truly retires? EP 1:Zenara Church, a retired War Lady, steps forward to defend her kingdom after a series of devastating losses, but faces betrayal when her husband Lucian Logan, whom she groomed to become Martial Laureate, brings another woman into their home under the guise of care.Will Zenara reclaim her honor and defend her kingdom after this shocking betrayal?

column1: She Slept, They Waited a Lifetime
column4: The beloved youngest daughter is framed by a wicked actress and loses her identity as the real heiress. Shunned and mistreated, she quietly protects her family. She joins her brother’s sleep project and enters a capsule. Only after she sleeps do they realize the truth. Regretful, her brothers wait 30 years—until their hair turns gray—to see her again. EP 1:Haerin, the adopted daughter of the Choi family, faces mistreatment and false accusations from the real heiress, Yoo-jin, leading her to volunteer for the high-risk Haerin Eternal Project—a 30-year sleep experiment—to escape her pain and repay her family's kindness, despite the dangers and the fact that her brother, President Choi, is unaware of her participation.Will Haerin's brothers discover her sacrifice before it's too late?

Eight years ago, Emerson Barnett signed a contract to repay Leonard Henderson’s mother’s kindness, supporting him through his heartbreak after his first love, Megan Henderson, left. She devoted herself completely, but Leonard only offered indifference and a half-hearted “attempt to love.” When a message from Megan undermines everything, Emerson ends the contract, leaves divorce papers, and walks away—realizing a cold heart isn’t worth warming.

At their fifth wedding anniversary, Isabella Anderson’s half-sister, Sophia, crashes the celebration, claiming Isabella stole her fiancé. In the chaos, Sophia deliberately pushes Isabella, causing her to lose her child. As Isabella suffers, Xavier Bond chooses to hold Sophia instead, shattering Isabella’s last hope. In that moment, she finally sees the truth—their love was an illusion. Heartbroken, she decides to walk away...

Clara, a disguised princess, escapes a marriage built on lies—only to be trapped in a deadly alliance with Prince Julian Ashford. As empires crumble, their forbidden love becomes the spark that could burn kingdoms, or redeem them... EP 1:Clara discovers the shocking truth that her husband, the General, orchestrated her humiliation and arranged for bandits to assault her so he could marry her and enable his beloved Eleanor to wed his brother, leading to Clara's deep resentment and suffering.Will Clara seek revenge against the General for his cruel deception, and how will her newfound pregnancy affect her plans?

column1: Born of Her, Broken by Her
column4: On her wedding day, Sharon Lane faces her mother-in-law lowering the bride price due to her premarital pregnancy. Her mama's boy fiancé joins in, shaming Sharon and her adoptive father. She cancels the wedding. When the mother-in-law incites guests to bully Sharon, she shockingly finds Sharon is her long-lost daughter... EP 1:Sharon's wedding day turns sour as her in-laws humiliate her by withholding the bride price due to her premarital pregnancy, revealing deep-seated disrespect and familial tension.Will Sharon stand up for herself against her in-laws' shocking demands?

Nathan Carter is forced into a hidden seven-year marriage with Elara Quinn, a powerful CEO who believes he once violated her. While raising their daughter under her cold disdain, Nathan endures silence, distance, and blame. But when someone from her past resurfaces, buried emotions ignite and the truth begins to shift. What if the man she hated was never the one who hurt her? EP 1:Callie Carter, the daughter of Nathan and Elara, struggles with her mother's coldness and rejection, as Elara forbids her from calling her 'Mommy,' while showing affection to Riley, the son of her first love, highlighting the deep-seated resentment and emotional conflict within the family.Will Callie ever find the love and acceptance she craves from her mother, or will Elara's unresolved past continue to tear their family apart?

Elite assassin Chloe Gibson—known as “Scarlet” on the Iron Web—takes on one final mission to disappear forever. But her target, “Drayke,” hides a devastating secret: he’s her husband, Ethan Gavin. A botched hit, a staged divorce, betrayal, torture, and a deadly pregnancy twist follow... But who’s really pulling the strings? EP 1:Elite assassin Chloe Gibson, aka 'Scarlet', is called back for one last mission targeting 'Drayke', unaware that he is actually her husband Ethan Gavin, who is secretly the ruler of Jonshire's underworld.Will Chloe discover Ethan's true identity before it's too late?

A sudden earthquake traps Grace’s two daughters under the same slab. She saves the older one, while the younger is taken by Linda, a grieving mother who just lost her own child.
Years later, pressured by her father’s last wish and work troubles, Grace hires a young woman named Emily to pretend to be her daughter—only to realize Emily is her long-lost child. EP 1:A devastating 6.7-magnitude earthquake strikes Velmont, trapping Grace's daughters under rubble amidst the chaos, leading to a heart-wrenching rescue attempt.Will Grace be able to save both of her daughters before it's too late?

Lucan, the Crimson Shade Sect‘s top assassin, was raised by his master and has lived for revenge. Just as he’s about to set his plan in motion, he finds out Lilia, the girl he’s loved in secret, is getting married. Lilia asks him to leave with her, and Lucan starts to waver./ However, this is just a trap his master set./ Now, a secret buried for eighteen years is about to come to light… EP 1:Lucan Thorne's true identity is revealed as Selene's child, while Master's betrayal and Marcus Draven's vengeance come to light, leading to a tragic confrontation.Will Lucan uncover the full extent of his master's treachery and find justice for his family?

Xander rose to glory defeating the Devil Clan and became leader of the Celestial Accord. But years later, he finds his wife and sworn brother betrayed him—the daughter he raised isn't his, and they plan to take everything. So he smiles, bides his time… and digs their graves with grace. EP 1:Xander discovers his wife and sworn brother's betrayal, learning the daughter he raised isn't his, and they plan to usurp his legacy and sect.How will Xander exact his revenge while maintaining his composed facade?

Maria, a hardworking waitress, saves mafia boss Robert, who later discovers she stole from him. They meet again at an orphanage under threat, where Robert saves her. Intrigued by her theft skills, he tries to recruit her, but Maria refuses. As Robert learns of her struggles, sympathy turns to deep attraction. EP 1:Robert arrives late to a meeting with impatient individuals, showcasing his unpredictable nature, while Maria discreetly collects money, hinting at her dual life as a waitress and thief.Will Robert's unpredictable behavior lead to dangerous consequences, and how will Maria's secret life intertwine with his?

Framed by Sophia and cast out of the Ford family, Evelyn seduces her adoptive brother Lucian to uncover the truth behind her parents' imprisonment. She spends months gathering evidence to take him down. When she finally succeeds in sending Lucian to prison, Evelyn discovers a hidden letter from her father… Lucian was the man her father entrusted to protect her! The truth begins to surface…

After years of slumber, Shannon suddenly awakens. She learns that the four sons she once adopted have become powerful leaders. But her eldest son has died. As she returns, hidden tensions rise beneath the calm. Can those closest to her still be trusted? A decades-old web of secrets and vengeance is about to unfold. EP 1:Shannon suddenly awakens after years of slumber and encounters Larry Lane, who tries to rob her grave but flees in terror when they realize she's alive. She then meets Chance Young's granddaughter, revealing her connection to the Young family and hinting at deeper secrets.Will Shannon's return unravel the hidden tensions within the Young family?

Christopher Lowell rises from humble beginnings to imperial prestige, returning home in honor, driven by gratitude. But glory is met with silence, and the warmth of family replaced by a chilling absence. As doubt creeps in and shadows deepen, he begins to suspect that the truth he was promised is not the one that awaits him... EP 1:Christopher Lowell, once a humble scholar, returns home as the newly appointed High Chancellor, only to discover his wife Lillian has been unfaithful and his mother has suffered greatly in his absence, culminating in a shocking confrontation.Will Christopher uncover the full extent of betrayal and seek justice for his mother?

College bartender Vivian Yeates' night spiraled out of control when a drugged CEO, Andrew Lewis, stumbled into her life—leading to a one-night stand he assumed was paid service! Five years later, their accidental love child plays Cupid to reunite the clueless ex-lovers. Will their explosive chemistry rewrite fate… or crash harder than last time? EP 1:Vivian struggles with financial difficulties and a past debt, while Andrew discovers he has a son with her, leading to a tense confrontation and unresolved questions about their shared history.Will Andrew step up to help Vivian and Jamie, or will their past mistakes keep them apart?

To secure Professor Selena Meyer’s patented research, Anna Blair, president of Blair Corporation, sends her daughter Ellie to pick Selena up from the rescue center. But on the way, Ellie crashes—right into Selena. Blaming her for the ruined gift, Ellie lashes out and even suspects Selena is a fraud. The truth, however, is far more complicated.

To take back her late mother's company, Eleanor Sterling hatches a secret plan: have a child through a one-time arrangement. She picks a stranger, Jace. But fate has other plans—he's actually Vincent Blackwell, a man with no memory and a hidden history. As their lives intertwine, something long-buried begins to surface. But what will happen when the truth does too? EP 1:Eleanor Sterling visits a club to find the perfect candidate for her one-time baby arrangement, settling on the strikingly attractive Jace, who turns out to be the missing billionaire Vincent Blackwell with no memory of his identity.Will Eleanor discover Jace's true identity before it's too late?

column1: Said Yes… to the Wrong Guy!
column4: Olivia follows her mother's wishes and marries the mama’s boy, Marcus. On the same day, Linley family’s young master Ethan is also forced into a wedding. An unexpected mix-up causes the two couples to marry the wrong partners, yet neither of them realizes it. As this absurd mistake sets their fates on a new course, what will happen next? EP 1:Olivia is pressured by her manipulative mother into marrying Marcus, a man she barely knows, under the threat of her mother's suicide. Meanwhile, Marcus, influenced by his friends and mother, sees the marriage as a transaction, boasting about his control over Olivia due to the bride price. Both are trapped in a web of familial expectations and societal pressures, unaware of the impending mix-up in their wedding arrangements.What chaos will unfold when Olivia and Marcus unknowingly marry the wrong partners?

When billiards legend Aiden Shaw wins a championship, he's rewarded with the governor's 300-pound daughter and bolts. Fleeing to Riverstate under his grandmother's orders, he hides as a low-key coach at a fading billiards club. Branded a fraud, he's challenged to prove himself. Training a total rookie into a pro in three days, Aiden silences doubters. But as rivals rise and romance knocks, he must choose between ambition, loyalty and love. EP 1:Billiards legend Aiden Shaw wins a championship and is rewarded with the governor's daughter, but he flees to Riverstate under his grandmother's orders, hiding as a coach at a struggling billiards club.Will Aiden be able to save the Riverstate Billiards Club and keep his identity a secret?

Disaster hits Nanshire. The emperor goes undercover to uncover the truth. Relief funds vanish, corruption spreads, and no one knows who to trust. A bowl of rotten porridge and an imperial robe expose a brutal power struggle. Who’s playing a role, and who’s ready to strike? The court and the underworld are heading for a deadly clash. EP 1:The emperor discovers his birth mother is in Nanshire and sets off to find her, only to uncover the dire famine and corruption plaguing the region, leading him to go incognito to investigate the truth.Will the emperor uncover the truth behind Nanshire's suffering and reunite with his mother?

Secluded for three centuries, Lord Aether reincarnates as dying child Luna Lane in Aurora City. From her tiny form, she unleashes arcane power to defend the Reed family. But when failure claims Grace and Leo, she's left shattered. What was the point of an eternity spent chasing immortality if it couldn't even save the innocent? EP 1:Lord Aether reincarnates into Luna Lane, a dying child with smallpox, and uses her newfound arcane powers to defend the Reed family from attackers seeking their ancestral residence.Will Lord Aether's powers be enough to protect the Reed family and find Luna's missing parents?
Lucy left her family to marry Daniel, but Daniel refused to treat her when he mistakenly thought Lucy had leukemia and took away her life-saving money...Lucy decides to strike back.

column1: Break Me, Love Me, Beg Me
column4: For seven years, Sharon Schiller was the quiet constant in Hans Hart's storm. He gave his tenderness to another, his control to her. Even on the night meant for them, he walked away. He mistook her silence for surrender. But not all hearts break aloud. Some simply disappear. And when he looks back, she may already be lost. EP 1:During their engagement party, Sharon Schiller confronts Hans Hart about his continuous neglect and emotional detachment, especially when he chooses to leave the party to attend to his first love's call. After years of unconditional love and sacrifices, Sharon reaches her breaking point and publicly declares her decision to end their relationship, vowing never to marry Hans.Will Hans realize the depth of his mistakes before it's too late to win Sharon back?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Karma Payback', 'Love After Divorce']

column4: Victor Foster, a rich heir to Foster Group, loses his memory and ends up living on the streets. By chance, he rescues Lillian Grant, the young heiress of the Grant family. As Victor protects her from greedy, calculating relatives, his memories gradually return. But can he reclaim his legacy while safeguarding Lillian's future? EP 1:Victor Foster, the missing heir to the Foster Group, rescues Lillian Grant, a young heiress on the run from her own dangerous family. As they form an unlikely bond, dark forces plot against Lillian, threatening her life and inheritance.Will Victor be able to protect Lillian from the sinister plot against her?

For years, noodle shop owner Sable Green and his wife, Sylvia Lynn, played weak...until thugs hurt his family. Now his kill mode is off! The noodle chef reveals he’s the deadliest Lord, and his wife? Oh, she’s the saint. Watch the 'useless husband' shake the martial world! Bloody revenge? That's just the appetizer. EP 1:The noodle shop faces unexpected danger as mysterious figures target someone referred to as the 'Elemental Vessel', revealing the couple's peaceful life is about to be disrupted by forces from their past.Will Sable and Sylvia's hidden identities be exposed as they confront these new threats?

As a child, Emily Warren endures a painful separation from her father, and she suffers neglect and cruelty under her uncle’s roof, bearing it all in silence. Twelve years later, her father becomes a successful man eager to see his lost daughter again. They almost find each other, but some people won't let it happen... EP 1:Emily's father, David, is terminally ill and refuses to abandon her despite his mother's ultimatum. On his birthday, Emily prepares Tangyuan, symbolizing family unity, but secretly decides to leave to ensure her father gets medical treatment, leaving behind a heartfelt letter.Will David ever find Emily again, or will their separation become permanent?

Seven years ago, Victor Sullivan took the fall for his brother’s fatal car accident, framed by his fiancée, mother, and father. Betrayed and jailed, he spent his time developing nuclear fusion tech and was later recruited by a national research institute. Freed at last, he sees his family’s love was a lie—and chooses to walk away for good. EP 1:Victor Sullivan, framed by his own family and fiancée for his brother Ethan's fatal car accident, serves seven years in prison where he develops nuclear fusion technology. Upon his release, he discovers the depth of their betrayal and decides to walk away from his family and the wedding, realizing their love was a lie.Will Victor's departure from his family lead him to uncover more dark secrets about their betrayal?

The end of the world is approaching and human civilization is on the brink of collapse. The last survivors of the future launch the "Guardian Program" and select the kind-hearted and resilient Daniel Mills as the key figure. The ancestral ring in his hand contains infinite space and becomes humanity's last hope. Under the remote guidance of the commander Nora, Daniel unravels the deception, guards the ring, and, with wisdom and courage, collects supplies to ignite the hope to the survivors. EP 1:As global disasters threaten humanity's survival, Daniel Mills is identified as the key figure to save the world due to his family heirloom ring with infinite storage space. Meanwhile, his personal life crumbles as his girlfriend Mia leaves him, and he nearly gives away the ring—humanity's last hope—in a moment of despair.Will Daniel realize the importance of the ring before it's too late?

Seren Jones works tirelessly to care for her ailing mother-in-law, only to discover that her husband, Leonard Lee, has proposed to his first love, Anna. Determined to break free, she divorces him and joins Marcus Carter’s company. But just as she starts anew, Leonard and Anna conspire against her, pulling her into a storm of betrayal and revenge. Can she take control of her own destiny?

Betrayed by his family, Issac died cultivating the Affectio. Reborn, he embraces the Apathia, gaining power by severing familial ties. Surrendering his Five-element Spiritual Roots and Celestial Bloodline to his siblings, he awakens greater abilities. Exiled by his parents, he ascends as the Primordial Divine Sovereign. When his family begs for forgiveness, Issac vows to make them suffer as he did. Will his heartlessness bring ultimate power or consume him?

Reclaimed from the orphanage by her wealthy biological parents, Charlene envisioned embracing a blessed life, only to discover a more adored adopted daughter Elin. Just out of the orphanage, her family committed perjury to seal her in jail. Yet when she turned to leave... the architects of her ruin began clutching at her shadow.

Serena Scott’s life went sideways when a tragic fall left her mom in a coma and stole her voice. Now 18, a secret ledger exposes her pop’s shady deals. Teaming up with the gutsy Martin Hale, she dives into a maze of stolen tech and boardroom backstabbing. With every twist deeper than the last, can Serena flip the script and unmask the real culprit? EP 1:Serena is manipulated by Luna and Ms. Reed under the pretense of reuniting with her mother, only to face a terrifying encounter with a predator. Meanwhile, Mr. Hale is in a critical condition due to Yang poison, and the search for a pure Yin body woman becomes urgent as the Seven Stars align.Will Serena escape the predator's clutches in time, and can Mr. Hale find the pure Yin body woman before it's too late?

Betrayed in her past life, Emma Shawn chooses to be a widow rather than a bride, defying her ruthless family and burning her own wedding gown. But when the whip falls, the ‘dead’ General Oliver Sterling returns with a royal decree. Who is this woman truly mourning? And why does the Emperor himself watch their every move?

Baseborn kids in the Cooper family weren’t allowed to practice martial arts. But Eva learned it and even mastered the long-lost Skills. Not wanting to let fate decide her life, she changed the unfair rules.
When her family faced an invasion and the Smiths tried to disrupt the martial arts world, Eva stepped up and led everyone against the enemies. EP 1:Eva, a baseborn child in the Cooper family who is forbidden from practicing martial arts, secretly masters the long-lost Dragon Chant Spear technique under her master's guidance. Despite strict family rules, she demonstrates extraordinary skill, piercing through four Dark Iron Stones effortlessly, revealing her incredible potential and defiance of the family's unjust rules.Will Eva's hidden martial arts skills be discovered by the Cooper family, and what consequences will she face?

Eirene Brown never meant to cross paths with Bryce Hunter, the CEO of Hunter Group. But one night changed everything. After her mother's sudden death, she left their newborn daughter at Bryce's estate. Later, she worked in his company, not realizing Bryce was searching for his child's mother. When they reunite in the workplace, will passion ignite or explosive fury erupt? Their story is just beginning...

Nora, the orphan heir of the Dragon Clan, has no father or mother and has lived a hard life with her uncle and aunt since childhood. Relying on her own abilities, Nora earns a living by fortune-telling on the streets and begins her journey to find her parents. Fortunately, Nora's maternal grandfather's family locates her, and they are reunited. But will the Dragon Clan truly accept Nora? Who are her birth parents, and are they still alive? Will the family be able to reunite?

The first princess of Danria was abducted at a young age, but was saved by a mysterious man. 15 years later, she became the leader of the Mystery Pavilion. She hid her identity and lived in Quario with her husband. When the emperor paid a anonymous visit, he saw the kindness in her and appointed her husband to be the top scholar. What the first princess didn’t expect was that her husband would betray her and plan on marrying another woman. What would the first princess do?

column1: A God in a Fool’s Flesh
column4: The soul of Titan Gustin, the legendary Martial God, awakens within the body of Aaron Stone, a lazy, weak and ridiculed noble. Aaron then begins to tap into godly power as he dominates the Martial Alliance trials. But when another "Martial God" emerges, threatening his destiny, Aaron must uncover the truth and reclaim what is rightfully his—or he will remain trampled on as a "spoiled heir". EP 1:The legendary Martial God, Titan Gustin, awakens inside the body of the weak and ridiculed noble Aaron Stone after being ambushed by his Inner Demon. Aaron, initially trying to prove himself after a rejection, now finds himself with godly powers, setting the stage for his rise in the Martial Alliance trials.Will Aaron be able to harness his newfound powers and dominate the Martial Alliance trials?

column1: (Dubbed)Tearing Down the Toxic Family with My Mother-in-Law
column4: Xia Zhiwei, an elite bodyguard protecting domestic abuse victims, has a flash marriage with lawyer Shen Mo while hiding her identity. Suffering abuse in the Shen family, she fights for her daughter's custody, exposes Shen Mo's crimes, and causes his law license to be revoked. When Shen Mo threatens their daughter, Xia chooses not to divorce and confronts him. After Shen Mo discovers her true identity and faints, Lin Cuihua cuts ties with him. Xia, Lin Cuihua, and her daughter begin a new life.

Selene Wren, once the most talented martial artist in her family, becomes an outcast after accidentally absorbing her master’s power—turning her into a fat girl. Shamed by her family and abandoned by her fiancé, only her mother and sister stand by her. Selene vows to reclaim their honor by winning the martial arts tournament, encountering the man she once shared a passionate night with. In a blaze of energy, she fights, rises… and she’s unstoppable, ready to burn the world down. EP 1:Selene struggles with the uncontrollable inner power passed down by her master, which has caused her weight gain and physical discomfort. Meanwhile, she is haunted by a mysterious encounter with a man from the Skyblade Sect, marked by a red neck scar, promising future conflict. Despite her current struggles, her master hints at her potential to achieve greatness if she can overcome her inner power's stagnation.Will Selene unlock the secrets of her inner power and confront the man from the Skyblade Sect?

May Stone has been raising her disabled daughter, Jane Lopez, on her own for years, making a living with a delivery job. Just before Jane turns 18, May is diagnosed with late-stage liver cancer and given only a few months to live. With time running out, May faces a heartbreaking decision. How can she ensure Jane’s future when she’s no longer there to protect her? EP 1:May Stone is diagnosed with late-stage liver cancer and given only three months to live. Faced with the impending reality of her death, she struggles with the heartbreaking decision of how to ensure the future of her disabled daughter, Jane Lopez, who relies entirely on her care.Will May be able to find a safe and loving future for Jane before her time runs out?

column1: (Dubbed)30 Days to Divorce: A Second Chance at Life
column4: On her deathbed in her past life, Melanie Griffin realized that her husband, Arthur Diaz, and Nathaniel Diaz never truly loved her. With this awakening, she is reborn seven years into her marriage with Arthur. This time, Melanie decides to let Arthur be with his true love, Brianna Hayes, while reclaiming the career she gave up in her previous life.

column1: Back to 3025: The Young Fist Beats All
column4: Reborn in 3025 as his 8-year-old self, Daniel Tann enters the virtual MMA world as "Nameless." He shocks everyone by defeating the strongest AI fighter, and his secret unravels as he faces rising stars. Can he take down former champion Oliver White at the MMA Federation's biggest event? And how will he make the impossible choice when his father is abducted? EP 1:Daniel Tann, reborn in 3025 as his 8-year-old self, witnesses the King of MMA tournament where his father was killed 20 years ago, vowing to change history. Amidst threats to their gym from the Lewis family, Daniel prepares for a match and encounters the legendary AI fighter Zetron, setting the stage for an unprecedented challenge.Will Daniel's encounter with Zetron reveal the key to saving his father and their gym?

Amidst imperial treachery, General Matilda Jones emerges as a steadfast beacon. When a chequered past and a wobbly future converge, the heroine battles both ruthless northern foes and the haunting weight of personal loss. Can she conquer her inner phantom to restore her nation's honor and spark hope in a time of despair? EP 1:General Matilda Jones, after securing victory against Desert's Edge and bringing peace to Dahsia, is treacherously betrayed by the Emperor who fears her growing popularity and influence. Despite her lifelong loyalty and sacrifices, the Emperor orders her execution, forcing Matilda to flee and protect her child while vowing to fight against his unjust rule.Will Matilda survive the Emperor's betrayal and rise against his tyranny?

column1: God in Baby: Tears First, Blood Later
column4: Sent to the mortal world for a divine trial, the Martial Gold God awakens in Barry Sullivan—a boy whose family was torn apart by betrayal. As he fights to reclaim the Sullivan family's martial arts school and protect his sister, a far darker threat emerges: the Sorcerer Tribe is preparing to resurrect the Demon Lord. Should Barry fall, the world will be consumed by hellfire... EP 1:The Martial Gold God is banished to the mortal world after recklessly granting wishes for gold, awakening in the body of Barry Sullivan—a boy whose family was destroyed by betrayal and debt. Now, he must navigate human suffering and settle the boy's unresolved grudges.Will the Martial Gold God succeed in repaying Barry's karmic debt and uncover the truth behind his family's downfall?

A thousand years ago, Beast King Adrian was hunted by the Twelve Gods, and Goddess Selene sacrificed herself to save him. Their spirits were sealed. In her new life as the illegitimate daughter of the Beastmaster Sect, Selene faces cruel persecution. As fate unravels, her path leads her back to a powerful legacy—one that could change everything. EP 1:A thousand years ago, Beast King Adrian Vale was sealed within the Beast Valley after committing atrocities, with Goddess Selene sacrificing herself to save him.
