In the present, Selene, now the illegitimate daughter of the Beastmaster Sect, faces persecution as the Beastmastery Contest begins, and her mother is seized as a tribute for the Beasts.Will Selene uncover her divine legacy and free Adrian from his ancient prison?

Hildegard was a legendary physician. However, he transmigrates into young Will Lewis by accident. With Hildegard's skills, Will makes a great save, ultimately clearing the names of his 28 family members. Carrying the mission to revive the Lewis Clinic, he embarks on a new journey... EP 1:Hildegard, the legendary physician, mysteriously transmigrates into young Will Lewis after his death. Will, now possessing Hildegard's skills, wakes up to find his family framed and nearly wiped out. Determined to clear their names and revive the Lewis Clinic, Will and the sole surviving family member seek justice through the Great Medical Competition, a rare opportunity for commoners to become imperial physicians.Will Will succeed in the competition and uncover the truth behind his family's downfall?

The Emperor raises a prince who isn't his own blood, yet crowns him heir without question. Whispers of betrayal swirl, but His Majesty smiles. A consort's secret. A brother’s ambition. A crown at stake. Ministers take sides. Loyalties blur. When the truth erupts at the abdication ceremony, the real game finally begins. EP 1:The Emperor's consort gives birth to a prince, but it is revealed that the child is not the Emperor's, but the result of an affair with his brother, who plans to usurp the throne.Will the Emperor's hidden plan outmaneuver the conspirators and secure his reign?

She's a broke college girl, while he's the untouchable heir they call "Master J". Their worlds couldn't be more different, until a twist of fate ties them together. As nosy relatives cling to her sudden rise and a jealous childhood sweetheart tries to tear them apart, their bond is pushed to the edge. But through every storm, love seems to be stronger than doubt. Will they overcome it all, or just let it go? EP 1:Kira Shea, a 19-year-old college dropout working part-time, discovers she is pregnant with twins while dealing with financial demands from her uncle and threats from her peers.Will Kira manage to navigate her unexpected pregnancy and mounting pressures without losing herself?

Tim Quinn, a successful businessman, returns to his village to open a charity kitchen out of gratitude. But falsely accused of embezzlement, angry villagers stormed his home. He leaves in disappointment. Only after he’s gone do the villagers realize he was their long-time secret benefactor. Can they ever make things right? EP 1:Tim Quinn is praised by the villagers for his charity work, but behind the scenes, his assistant Sanford questions his motives. Meanwhile, a villager discovers a large sum transferred to the charity account, leading to suspicions of embezzlement.Will the villagers' trust in Tim be shattered by the accusation?

Darcy Allen worked for her ex Deek as a nanny just to be around her three daughters. Deek’s new wife Karen was secretly stealing from the family. Darcy found this but then was run over by Karen. Miraculously, Darcy time-travelled to years ago. This time, Darcy chose to leave, started her own business and make a great difference. Her ex and daughters gradually knew Karen’s true color after bankruptcy. They realized they were wrong and then went to Darcy for help...

It should've been joyful that Vivian found her real parents. But instead, she's working herself sick just to support them, who are actually the top rich in disguise. They call it a test, but deep down, their adopted daughter, Mia, is their answer. Both girls are loved—but not by their own parents. They say, blood is thicker than water... or is it? EP 1:Vivian, struggling with stomach cancer, continues to support her supposedly impoverished parents, unaware that they are actually wealthy and testing her loyalty, while they prioritize their adopted daughter Mia's birthday over Vivian's dire situation.Will Vivian discover her parents' deceit before it's too late?

Country girl Sophie Stewart is about to marry her beloved Jason Chase—until her greedy brother and parents demand a shocking last-minute dowry increase, turning her wedding into a cruel transaction. But they soon learn Jason is a billionaire in disguise. Their selfish schemes backfire. As love triumphs over greed, will Sophie and Jason embrace their happy future after this twist-filled drama... EP 1:Sophie's wedding day turns into a nightmare when her family demands an increased dowry from Jason, revealing their greedy intentions and shifting focus to her brother's engagement instead.Will Jason agree to the outrageous dowry demand and save Sophie's wedding?

Julian Mercer got the Fruit of Reverie to save his wife Claire Hathaway. Its effect relied on his love. After rejuvenating, Claire cheated with a modeling agency boss for her model dream. At the signing, Julian saw her profess love and questioned her in heartbreak. Instead, he was smeared and nearly killed. Once his love faded, the fruit failed and Claire aged fast. But could she save herself and make things right? EP 1:Julian Mercer discovers the Fruit of Reverie, a magical fruit that can rejuvenate his dying wife Claire, but its power depends on his unwavering love for her. Despite warnings of unpredictable consequences and the steep price of defying fate, Julian vows to save Claire at any cost.Will Julian's love remain strong enough to keep Claire young, or will unforeseen challenges test the limits of his devotion?

At her boyfriend's great uncle's party, Serena never expected the host to be her ex, Hayden. Two years after their breakup, Hayden is still obsessed, and now, under the same roof, he's not afraid to push boundaries. As Serena uncovers her boyfriend's betrayal, the truth behind their split resurfaces, changing everything... EP 1:At her boyfriend's great uncle's party, Serena is shocked to discover the host is her ex, Hayden, who is still obsessed with her. As tensions rise and boundaries are pushed, Serena uncovers her boyfriend's betrayal, and the truth behind their past breakup resurfaces, setting the stage for a dramatic confrontation.Will Serena confront Hayden about his obsession and her boyfriend's betrayal?

Reborn to the moment of her death framed by husband Logan Zeal, friend Nancy Ross and pregnant Lydia Lark, Mary Zeal vows to rewrite fate. Last life, she was wrongly accused of "killing two" for refusing a ride and murdered. This time, she still gets ensnared in plots even after swapping cars with mysterious Judith Lane. What will happen next? Will she be able to uncover the truth and break free from the endless cycle of conspiracy? EP 1:Mary Zeal, reborn to the moment before her death, is once again accused of causing the death of a pregnant woman by refusing her a ride. Her husband and best friend stand by as bystanders, fueling the accusations. Mary realizes she is reliving her past life's tragedy and suspects the pregnant woman's request might be part of a setup.Will Mary uncover the truth behind the pregnant woman's request before history repeats itself?

Eirene Brown never meant to cross paths with Bryce Hunter, the CEO of Hunter Group. But one night changed everything. After her mother's sudden death, she left their newborn daughter at Bryce's estate. Later, she worked in his company, not realizing Bryce was searching for his child's mother. When they reunite in the workplace, will passion ignite or explosive fury erupt? Their story is just beginning... EP 1:Eirene Brown goes into labor and rushes to the hospital, but her mother collapses upon hearing the shocking news. Meanwhile, Bryce Hunter is pressured by his grandfather to continue the family line, only to find a baby at his doorstep.Who left the baby at Bryce's doorstep, and how will this unexpected arrival change their lives?

column1: Fool Me Once, Love Me Twice
column4: It's been five years since Quentin Hayes went all in for Serena Montgomery. But all he gets in return is just the stupid nickname "simp". When he decides to give it all up, Quentin Hayes bumps into Scarlet Winslow, a lady with a secret identity. Is it just an accident, or is it fate? What sparks are gonna fly between them? EP 1:Quentin Hayes finally decides to give up on his unrequited love for Serena Montgomery after years of being labeled a 'simp', marking a turning point in his emotional journey as he cuts ties with the past.Will Quentin truly move on, or will fate have other plans for his heart?

Beth has always wanted to marry into a wealthy family, but the day before her long-awaited wedding, she catches a "mistress" .Deciding to remove all obstacles, she doesn't know that she's about to make the biggest mistake of her life. EP 1:Beth, who is preparing for her wedding to the wealthy Edward, discovers him embracing another woman, shattering her perfect image of their relationship.Will Beth confront Edward about the mysterious woman?

Dr. Miracle, Logan White, left his family to treat the monarch. Returning home, he found his wife had passed away and his daughter, Robin, resented him. Meanwhile, John Rand, Mercy Hospital’s director, eyed Watsin Hospital and set a trap with a head transplantation surgery. His tricks endangered the patient and put the hospital at risk of being taken. Can Logan turn the tide and mend the rift with his daughter? EP 1:Dr. Logan White returns home after years of service to the monarch, seeking to reconcile with his estranged daughter Robin, now a director at Watsin Hospital. Upon arrival, he witnesses a critical emergency where two patients are impaled by a steel bar. Despite the seemingly impossible situation, a mysterious doctor—likely Dr. Miracle—performs a miraculous surgery, saving both lives and sparking intrigue about his identity and whereabouts.Will Logan finally reunite with Robin, and who is the enigmatic Dr. Miracle lurking in the shadows?

Kimberly Martinez died by Paul Garcia's betrayal. Reborn, she sought revenge via superior bloodline. Kenneth Clark, sealed Dragon King, waited for her. Paul, black dragon in golden disguise, plotted transformation. Donna Robinson targeted Kimberly after marrying Paul. Her father Joshua and stepmother were cruel. During lightning trial, Paul attacked but was cursed to dissolve. Reborn to bride selection when Paul chose Donna, Kimberly vowed change.

Hotel chef Grace Lane marries a tycoon, enduring two decades as his unloved surrogate. After his mistress’s betrayal, she accepts a fake marriage to billionaire Ryan Brooks, unaware of his wealth. When she discovers the truth at his hotel, will the scarred chef trust love… or flee? EP 1:Grace Lane's 20th wedding anniversary turns into a nightmare when her husband, Mark Scott, publicly humiliates her by revealing his long-term affair with Mira Reed and declares Grace as merely a replacement. Devastated, Grace decides to divorce Mark, only to be mocked about her future prospects, leading to an unexpected marriage proposal from an unknown suitor.Who steps forward to marry Grace after her public humiliation and what are their true intentions?

Seth Quain, a foreign trade expert fluent in 16 languages, gave up his career for family—only to be scorned by his wife and daughter. When betrayal pushes him to the edge, he walks away and rises to new heights with the formidable business mogul Hope Stephens. But as he returns in triumph, old ties, new enemies, and dangerous rumors threaten to pull him back. Will he reclaim his life, or lose it all? EP 1:Seth returns home on his birthday, only to find his wife Maia and daughter Chloe celebrating their family friend Shawn's birthday instead, while completely forgetting Seth's own birthday. The situation escalates when Maia insists Shawn stay in their home, even giving him the master bedroom while relegating Seth to the living room. Seth confronts them about their blatant disregard and betrayal, realizing his sacrifices for the family have been in vain.Will Seth finally break free from the toxic family dynamics that have pushed him to his limits?

Lily Saunders finds herself pregnant, but before she gets the chance to share the news with her husband, Ethan Harlow, their marriage breaks down because of someone’s meddling. Six years later, fate has a funny way of bringing them back together and slowly, the misunderstandings that once did them apart are dissolving. EP 1:Lily discovers she is pregnant and attempts to share the joyous news with Ethan, but their conversation is abruptly interrupted when Lily is called away to attend to an emergency patient, delaying their important moment.Will Ethan ever learn about Lily's pregnancy before fate pulls them apart?

In the 1970s, Wendy Clark raises a boy Ryan Powell not her own with quiet devotion. Years later, as Ryan comes of age, buried secrets and long-lost ties resurface, threatening to unravel everything she’s built. EP 1:Wendy Clark faces criticism from her community for prioritizing her adopted son Ryan over her biological daughter, sparking rumors about Ryan's true parentage and revealing Wendy's past decision to raise him as her own, despite the circumstances of his discovery.Will the truth about Ryan's origins finally come to light?

Winna Yates, born into a martial arts family that favors sons over daughters, is gifted but overlooked by her father. He places all his hopes on her brother, expecting him to take over the clan and willing to sacrifice his daughters. Unwilling to submit, Winna is unexpectedly taken as a disciple by a grandmaster. Meanwhile, her mother suffers for helping her escape. After mastering extraordinary martial arts, Winna sets out to save her mother and bring justice to her enemies.

Betrayed in her past life, Emma Shawn chooses to be a widow rather than a bride, defying her ruthless family and burning her own wedding gown. But when the whip falls, the ‘dead’ General Oliver Sterling returns with a royal decree. Who is this woman truly mourning? And why does the Emperor himself watch their every move? EP 1:Emma Shawn, betrayed and humiliated in her past life, awakens to find herself reborn right before her wedding, vowing vengeance against those who wronged her.Will Emma's newfound chance at life lead to her long-awaited revenge or uncover deeper secrets?

wo sisters. Two deadly betrayals. One deadly game of rebirth. After Juliette Monsoon is murdered by her jealous sister, Juniper Monson, both of them wake up on the eve of their doomed weddings—only this time, Juniper conspires to steal Juliet's noble fiancé and force her into the arms of a poor stranger who is despised by everyone. When fate gives them a second chance to start over, how will their endings be different? EP 1:Juniper, consumed by envy and regret, confronts Juliette about stealing her destiny—marrying Lord Shaw and living a life of luxury. Juliette reveals the emptiness of her marriage, longing for genuine love. In a shocking turn, Juniper seizes the opportunity to claim Lord Shaw for herself, suggesting Lysander for Juliette, hinting at her possible knowledge of their past lives.Will Juniper's manipulation unravel as both sisters navigate their twisted fates?

column1: From Secret Lover to Iron-fisted CEO
column4: Amara Vaughn, a pin crown of the Adler Group. A secret lover of the  CEO Grayson Adler. All she want is to be happy with Grayson, but all Grayson sees is Laney Bennett, the Regina George in sheep's clothing. Laney manages to skim Amara's entertainment expenses and tries to steal Amara's clients. No money? No clients?How will she become the CEO? EP 1:Amara confronts Laney about a suspicious reimbursement discrepancy after a business dinner, revealing Laney's underhanded tactics to undermine her and control company finances.Will Amara's call to Grayson expose Laney's schemes or backfire?

In my past life, I was a loser emperor, tricked into surrendering land and forced to sacrifice my empress for peace, only to watch her choose death over betrayal. Her suicide became my greatest regret, and I ended up killed by our daughter. But fate has given me a second chance. This time, I will protect my family at all costs... EP 1:The Emperor faces betrayal and loss as his decisions lead to the death of his Empress, only to be given a mysterious second chance through the awakening of the Drakensword.What will the Emperor do with his newfound chance to change his fate?

The cleaning lady Jaenerys Tang meets Harlan Collins, rich and yet terminally ill. The only one who can save him is the legendary healer, "Mother Loong". And Jaenerys is her! After curing Harlan, she returns home, only to face a humiliating broken engagement. But at her ruined wedding, Harlan arrives with a lavish betrothal gift, proposing… EP 1:Jaenerys Tang, a street cleaner, encounters Harlan Collins, the terminally ill heir of the Collins family. Despite her humble appearance, she reveals her true identity as the legendary healer 'Mother Loong' and offers to cure Harlan, much to the disbelief of those around them.Will Jaenerys be able to save Harlan and prove her extraordinary abilities to the skeptical onlookers?

Famous singer Vincent Garrick reunites with his college love, Whitney Jones, a talented jewelry designer with hearing loss. But their path is filled with obstacles—jealous socialite Sherry Jasper schemes against her and forces her into marriage
Can Whitney and Vincent overcome the odds? Will Sherry’s lies be exposed? As betrayal and ambition collide, Whitney must fight for love and her future. EP 1:Vincent Garrick prepares to launch his new song at a debut concert, dedicating it to a special girl from his past, sparking curiosity and excitement among fans and media.Who is the special girl Vincent is singing for, and will she hear his message?

Tsukishima Sakurako is a hardworking university student in Kyoto, determined to shape her own future. But when fate strips her of everything, she's thrust into a world of power, tradition, and an unexpected bond with Fujiwara Shuuichi, the disciplined heir of an ancient family and a revered temple master. Two lives, two destinies, forever entwined. But in a world ruled by duty and desire, where will fate take them next? EP 1:Sakurako faces humiliation and a shocking financial betrayal as her bank account is mysteriously emptied, while Elliot deals with familial pressures regarding his romantic life and shrine responsibilities.Who is behind the sudden disappearance of Sakurako's savings and how will this affect her already tumultuous life?

Young Wade Clark witnessed his family's massacre. His dying father gave him the Darksteel Token and a vow of vengeance.
Fleeing, he fell off a cliff, lost his memory, and was saved by the Lopez Martial Hall master. For fifteen years, he toiled in silence, scorned by fellow disciples after his betrothal.
How will he rise from the shadows and defy fate? Can he avenge his family and face the bloodstorm ahead? EP 1:Young Wade Clark witnesses the brutal massacre of his family by traitors seeking the Darksteel Token and the 13 Techniques of Tai Chi, his father dying in his arms after entrusting him with the clan's legacy and a vow of vengeance.Will Wade survive the pursuit and fulfill his father's last wish?

To save his girlfriend, Cal Yates donated his eyes, only to discover she was with Bush White. After Bush pushed him downstairs, Cal inherited the Kirin Eyes, a powerful legacy. As he unlocked its full potential, he became the Kirin Emperor, defeating the Evil Sect and avenging his loved ones. But a new, even greater threat looms... EP 1:Cal Yates returns home blind, only to find his girlfriend Cindy with Bush White, who mocks him for his disability and reveals their upcoming marriage. Cindy cruelly admits she only used Cal and that his mother has also gone blind, pushing Cal to a breaking point.Will Cal unleash the power of the Kirin Eyes to seek revenge against Cindy and Bush?

Joy Ann wakes up in the body of a palace maid in a tyrant's court, where danger lurks around every corner. After witnessing brutal murders and poisonings, she vows to stay alive by avoiding the Emperor's wrath. But when she starts hearing his thoughts, she discovers his darkest secrets. Now, with the Emperor's mind echoing in her head, survival becomes a deadly game of wits... EP 1:Joy Ann, who has time-traveled into the body of a palace maid, witnesses the brutal and unpredictable nature of the tyrant Emperor, who kills or drives his servants mad. As she navigates the deadly environment, she learns that being favored by the Emperor might be the only way to survive, but the idea seems impossible and terrifying.Will Joy Ann find a way to survive the Emperor's deadly court, or will she become his next victim?

Denied her birthright as the Tai Chi Sect’s heir, Chase Carter defies tradition, stealing a secret manual to prove herself. But on her wedding day, her father is murdered by Jefferson Zane. Swearing revenge, she forsakes her past and trains relentlessly. Years later, she returns, uncovering a deadly conspiracy. She shatters her enemies, claiming her place as the first female sect leader. But can she truly defy fate? EP 1:Chase Carter, denied her birthright as the Tai Chi Sect’s heir, steals the sacred manual to prove herself as the Master, defying her father's traditional views and canceling her wedding to pursue her ambition.Will Chase succeed in becoming the first female Master of the Tai Chi Sect despite the odds?

Rosalie Garrett, tasked with averting a deadly curse, descends to find James Franklin, who is in danger of bloodshed. Their fierce clash soon transforms into an unexpected bond. Yet betrayal and sacrifice tear them apart, and fate’s grip tightens. In a world where life and death interlace, will destiny be defied? EP 1:Rosalie Garrett discovers she is cursed to die before turning twenty unless she finds James Franklin, a man whose fate is intertwined with hers, and fulfills a series of intimate and procreative conditions within strict deadlines set by her master.Will Rosalie succeed in convincing James to help her break the curse before time runs out?

After fleeing an abusive marriage, Sandy Jones saves tycoon Jason Smith's grandson, sparking his suspicion. Jason poses as a chauffeur to test her sincerity, igniting forbidden love. When Howard, her son, ties to a criminal past emerge, Jason's identity exposed coincides with a bombshell about Howard—threatening their future. EP 1:Jason Smith's mischievous grandson Jamie skips school to play matchmaker, pushing his grandfather into dating. During his antics, Jamie is nearly kidnapped but is saved by Sandy Jones, who unknowingly steps into their lives, leading Jamie to impulsively propose her as his new grandmother.Will Sandy accept Jamie's unexpected proposal and how will Jason react to this sudden turn of events?

Lumia Jade, the Ninety-Ninth Grandmaster of the Everfrost Sect, is revered across the Fourteen States of Eastward. She never expected Noxen Moon to stir emotions within her—but trust comes at a cost. Betrayed and cast into the abyss, she survives by awakening the Everfrost Sword. Lost and unaware of her past, she must reclaim her identity and power as fate closes in. EP 1:Lumia Jade, the Ninety-Ninth Grandmaster of the Everfrost Sect, is betrayed by Noxen Moon during their matrimonial vows, as he reveals his true intentions to steal her Supreme Golden Pill and the Everfrost Sword to ascend to divinity, leaving her to swear vengeance.Will Lumia Jade reclaim her power and seek revenge against Noxen Moon?

Small-town girl Dacia Morris harbors deep resentment after her college crush, Liam Scott, marries wealthy Laura White. Both women give birth on the same day in the same hospital, but driven by bitter revenge, Dacia switches their babies. As the two girls grow up with swapped lives, will their true identities ever be revealed, and what will become of their intertwined destinies? EP 1:Dacia Morris, driven by resentment after her college crush Liam Scott marries wealthy Laura White, switches their babies at birth. Years later, Jania Scott grows up as the privileged daughter of Laura and Liam, while Yasmine Morris struggles under Dacia's vengeful care, setting the stage for a dramatic clash of identities and fates.Will Jania and Yasmine discover the truth about their switched lives?

Rachel is framed by her half-sister Anya, losing her inheritance and ending up in Flarin. Disguising her identity, she marries Jack and becomes a Stay-at-Home Wife for three years. But Jack abandons her for his career without hesitation. Heartbroken, Rachel divorces him and begins searching for evidence to reclaim her family fortune. Will she succeed in taking back what's rightfully hers?
 EP 1:Rachel, once a queen in the business world of Aestrella, is now living a humble life as a housewife in Flarin. Her past catches up with her as Chris Lewis, president of Lewis Commerce, urges her to return to her rightful place. Meanwhile, the Foley family, led by Jack's mother, forces Rachel into a divorce, revealing their disdain for her and Jack's betrayal as he abandons her for his career.Will Rachel reclaim her former glory and take revenge on those who wronged her?

Oliver, a once impoverished young man who has now achieved success, neglects his respected father, Charles, back in their village. He hires their neighbor, Diana, to care for him. Diana, seemingly kind and caring, is actually greedy and malicious. She abuses Charles, leechs off his money, and accuses him of sexual harassment. Charles’s reputation is shattered, and Oliver's trust in his father erodes. Can Charles reclaim his honor, and will Oliver rediscover his faith in him?
 EP 1:Oliver Young, once the poorest in the village, returns as a successful businessman, firing those who bullied him and rewarding good employees. Meanwhile, Diana, who was hired to care for Oliver's father, Charles, shows her true greedy nature by demanding more money and threatening to sell Charles's cherished trophies.Will Oliver discover Diana's mistreatment of his father before it's too late?

Calum Spencer and his son, James Spencer, were both involved in a car accident. Their conditions were critical. Calum’s daughter, Nina Spencer, was left to decide their fate. However, she hated Calum for forcing her to break up with her rich boyfriend 10 years ago. Therefore, she decided to not save them. When Calum had lost hope, he and Nina were reborn and they realized that they had gone back 10 years. Both of them realized this was a second chance. How will the story unfold this time? EP 1:Nina Spencer is faced with a life-or-death decision as her father, Calum, and brother, James, lie critically injured after a car accident. Fueled by resentment for her father forcing her to break up with a wealthy boyfriend 10 years ago, Nina refuses to save Calum, only agreeing to save her brother. As Calum loses hope, both he and Nina are mysteriously reborn 10 years in the past, realizing they have a second chance to change their fates.How will Nina and Calum use their second chance to alter the course of their lives?

In Serica, where women are banned from martial arts, the unparalleled fighter Mist Lark disguises herself as a man to hide her abilities and works as a janitor in a martial arts school. When the ban is lifted, the princess is kidnapped, Mist must rescue the princess and face new challenges, will they break boundaries for women's place in it? EP 1:In Serica, where women are forbidden from martial arts, Mist Lark, disguised as a man, humiliates the newly crowned Warrior Champion and unwittingly earns the title herself. The Lord Warden declares the Champion must marry Princess Gratia, forcing Mist to confront her dual identity and the consequences of her actions.Will Mist Lark's secret be exposed when she is forced to marry the princess?

Bruce Lester, a corrupt chancellor, assaulted James Evans ' wife, causing her suicide. James trained his children, Sally and Eric for vengeance, while Matthew, with a damaged elixir field, was confined to Evans Cottage. Mentored by reclusive Sword God, Matthew got Dawnbreaker and became the new Sword God. Then he left Evans Cottage, rescued Sally from Bruce's son, Jerry, and earned his father's recognition. The family then together set out to avenge their beloved wife and mother... EP 1:After witnessing his mother Isabella's tragic death at the hands of Chancellor Bruce Lester, young Felix Evans is deemed useless by his father James due to his damaged dantian. Despite being confined to the study, Felix vows to prove his worth and avenge his mother. His determination catches the attention of a reclusive Sword God, who offers to teach him swordsmanship, challenging the belief that a damaged dantian prevents martial arts practice.Will Felix's training under the Sword God turn the tide in the Evans family's quest for vengeance?

Mighty Champion of the Nine Lands, Jason Lee, gave up his power and hid his identity for 18 years to bring his son, Finn, back from death, only to find out that Finn’s biological father was someone else. With his family breaking, borders being invaded, and enemies countless tricks to take him down, will Jason reclaim his name, guard the peace of his family, and of the whole world?
 EP 1:As the Sacred Land is under attack by the Sakura Land, Jason Lee, the Mighty Champion of the Nine Lands, returns to defend his homeland, missing the birth of his son. Despite his heroic efforts, the child's survival is in jeopardy, and family tensions rise as his absence is criticized.Will Jason Lee be able to save his son and reconcile with his family amidst the chaos of war?

After years of dedication to family, Isabella Larson discovers her husband, Charlie Lewis, plans to live with actress Rachel Sherman. Heartbroken, she crosses paths with Ian Stark and his nephew Simon, whom she saves as a doctor. Can Bella start a completely new life and find her path to happiness? EP 1:Bella discovers her husband Charlie's plans to live with actress Rachel Sherman, leading to a heartbreaking confrontation where their son Jimmy expresses a desire for Rachel to be his mother instead. Bella, hurt and determined, decides to leave Charlie and start a new life.Will Bella truly be able to leave her past behind and find happiness on her own?

In a high - stakes world of secrets, agent Sophia Song mistakes Chester Payne for her mission contact. Meanwhile, Chester mistakes Sophia for his fiancée, and they hastily get married.
As they live together, a special connection grows. But just as their relationship strengthens, Chester's ex - girlfriend, Yara Zell, suddenly returns. This unexpected arrival throws their lives into chaos, creating a web of love, secrets, and jealousy.
What will happen next? Dive into this gripping short drama to  EP 1:Agent Sophia Song, undercover for a mission, mistakes Chester Payne for her contact and hastily marries him, while Chester believes she is his arranged fiancée, leading to a whirlwind of confusion and unexpected romance.Will Sophia and Chester uncover each other's true identities before their fake marriage turns into real feelings?

Westville has recently been plagued by criminals with women reported missing. Tragically, things take a heartbreaking turn when the lovely Emily Turner disappears too. While everyone's panicking, Lucas Chu, who's been training in martial arts since childhood, decided to go find her by himself. What challenges will come to him? Would he bring Emily back safe? Stick around and find out! EP 1:Lucas Chu, trained in martial arts since childhood, sets out on a desperate journey to find Emily Turner after she is suspected to have been taken by human traffickers in Westville, armed with money and a mysterious package from his master.Will Lucas find Emily before it's too late?

Cecilia Clarke, the daughter of a billionaire, hides her identity for love, marrying Jack Zane. After being humiliated by him and their son, Arthur, she divorces and seeks revenge, ensuring the father and son face the consequences of their actions. With Andy Harrison, she rises to the top—will their past be erased? EP 1:Cecilia Clarke, a former Harvard PhD and billionaire heiress, hides her identity to marry Jack Zane and live a normal life. Despite her sacrifices, her son Arthur publicly credits his success to his father and mentor, humiliating her at his graduation banquet by dismissing her as a 'jobless housewife'.Will Cecilia finally reveal her true identity and reclaim her dignity?

Abandoned by her mother after her parents' divorce, Selene Moore grew up with her grandmother. While her mother doted on her half-sister, she ignored Selene Moore for years. One day, Selene Moore was kidnapped and tragically killed, only to wake up in the body of Caroline Lewis, the heiress of the Lewis Group. Yet, her mother remains oblivious to her daughter's death. EP 1:Selene Moore reflects on her tragic death just before her 20th birthday, revealing the painful rejection and neglect from her mother, who showers affection on her half-sister Gia while dismissing Selene's plea for help with a life-threatening condition.Will Selene find justice or closure in her new life as Caroline Lewis?

At their fifth wedding anniversary, Isabella Anderson’s half-sister, Sophia, crashes the celebration, claiming Isabella stole her fiancé. In the chaos, Sophia deliberately pushes Isabella, causing her to lose her child. As Isabella suffers, Xavier Bond chooses to hold Sophia instead, shattering Isabella’s last hope. In that moment, she finally sees the truth—their love was an illusion. Heartbroken, she decides to walk away... EP 1:At their fifth wedding anniversary, Isabella confronts Xavier about their failed marriage, revealing her deep hurt and decision to leave. Meanwhile, Sophia crashes the celebration, accusing Isabella of stealing her fiancé and demanding Xavier back.Will Isabella truly walk away, or will Xavier finally choose between the two women?

column1: Cry Now, Know Who I Am
column4: Angela Sterling, the chairman of the Sterling Group, has stayed out of the public eye. When meeting her husband, William Steven, she’s mistaken for a mistress by his secretary, Bella Freya. Bella gathers employees to bully and insult Angela, leading to her miscarriage. How will Angela get revenge on the secretary who tormented her? EP 1:Angela Sterling, the chairman of Sterling Group, is mistaken for a mistress by her husband's secretary, Bella Freya, who openly flirts with William Steven. Amidst the workplace tension, Angela reveals her pregnancy to William, sparking joy but also unknowingly fueling Bella's jealousy and determination to sabotage their relationship.Will Bella's jealousy lead her to dangerous actions against Angela's pregnancy?

The eldest daughter of the Smiths was framed and falsely locked away by those cunning concubines of her father. Three years later, she emerges unscathed, reborn and ready to start her revenge. This time, the true Matriarch of the Smith family will reclaim her glory.  EP 1:Lady Vivian and her daughter Serena are forced to flee after being targeted by Zoe and Susan, who have malicious intentions. Cornered and threatened, Vivian is coerced into signing a false confession of adultery to save Serena, revealing a cruel betrayal orchestrated by Zoe to usurp Vivian's position as the true Lady Smith.Will Vivian's sacrifice truly save Serena, or is there more treachery awaiting them?

Sweet bakery girl Amy sacrifices her freedom to save her reckless brother and becomes the "property" of dangerously attractive mafia boss Simon. Simon's venomous fiancée Mia can't stand their growing bond. Bound by a crucial mafia engagement, Mia schemes to ruin Amy. As Amy faces a world of secrets and danger, Simon's cold heart softens. When Amy sacrifices herself to protect Simon, chaos ensues, and love turns into a perilous game. EP 1:Amy's reckless brother Samuel steals a million dollars from the mafia to gamble, putting their family bakery at risk. When the mafia comes to collect, Amy makes a heart-wrenching decision to offer herself as payment to save her brother and their bakery, unknowingly stepping into a dangerous world.Will Amy's sacrifice truly save her brother and the bakery, or will it plunge her into an even darker fate?

In this world of magic, muggles were like slaves and not allowed to bear babies. Agatha Matilda, as a muggle, was drugged by her parents cuz they wanted to sell her to a rich guy. She ran away, accidentally slept with Donovan, Master of the Thunderson family, and actually got pregnant. In order to save Agatha, Donovan stole the Celestial Snow Lotus, which could forcibly change Agatha’s muggle fate. However, what Agatha and Donovan had done enraged the authority, the Muggle Affairs Division... EP 1:Agatha, a muggle, is forced to marry an elderly man by her parents, who drug her with the Ancient Love Potion. She escapes and stumbles into the forbidden Celestial Thunder Mountain, where she encounters Donovan Thunderson during his breakthrough, leading to a fateful and dangerous meeting.Will Donovan discover the truth about Agatha's condition and the consequences of their encounter?

Evelyn Hawthorne, the commander of Azuria, returns to her hometown, Greenridge, to investigate a fraud case. What starts as a routine mission turns personal when she learns her family is entangled. Her mother's tragic death and her sister's arrest leave Evelyn with only one option: find the truth! The deeper she digs, the more complex the conspiracy becomes. Can she unravel it before it destroys everything she holds dear? EP 1:Evelyn Hawthorne, newly appointed Chief Commander of Azuria, returns to her hometown Greenridge to investigate a scam operation targeting its residents. While she hopes to reconnect with her family, she discovers that her mother and sister are caught up in the fraud, setting the stage for a personal and professional crisis.Will Evelyn uncover the truth behind the scams before her family is further endangered?

column1: Oops! Turns Out My Husband Is a Billionaire
column4: Nora Brown unexpectedly enters a flash marriage with Bryan Holt, the wealthiest man in Holme. However, Bryan appears unaware of his new wife’s identity. Amid misunderstandings and near encounters, their journey unfolds with secrets yet to be revealed, leaving one to wonder—what lies ahead for this unconventional couple? EP 1:Nora Brown is pressured by her adoptive mother into a sham marriage with a hired stranger to distance herself from Zane Holt, her sister's fiancé. Later, she discovers she is already married to Bryan Holt, the wealthiest man in Holme, unbeknownst to both of them.Will Nora uncover the truth about her unexpected marriage to Bryan Holt?

Lily Millers, a journalist, has a flash marriage with Oscar Stewart, a top actor. When Oscar announces his marriage, the entertainment world is shocked, speculating who Mrs. Stewart is. Meanwhile, Lily’s half-sister, Beatrice Millers, falsely claims to be Oscar’s wife while belittling Lily. Lily, hiding the marriage, faces challenges from Beatrice and learns of Oscar’s supposed first love, unaware she is the one he’s secretly loved all along. EP 1:Oscar Stewart shocks the entertainment world by publicly announcing his marriage, contradicting his secret marriage agreement with Lily Millers. Meanwhile, Lily's half-sister Beatrice falsely claims to be Oscar's wife, belittling Lily, who remains silent about her true marital status. The tension escalates when Beatrice discovers Lily's marriage certificate and mocks her husband's status compared to Oscar's.Will Lily finally reveal the truth about her marriage to Oscar, or will Beatrice's lies continue to overshadow her?

column1: Just Divorce, We'd Love to Marry You
column4: Andrew Thomas, a poor, homeless boy, was often helped by Mr. Miller before the adoption. Years later, his stepsisters succeeded in different areas while Andrew became the new Master of Dragon Sect. To requite Mr. Miller, Andrew married his granddaughter, Sophia. He worked as a taxi driver and secretly helped Sophia with her career. But Sophia despised him after becoming a president. Finally, they divorced. Everyone insulted him. But he managed to fight back together with his stepsisters. EP 1:A seemingly ordinary man eating noodles reveals himself as the legendary Master of Dragon Sect, shocking those who doubted him and proving his identity with his actions.What challenges will the Master of Dragon Sect face now that his identity is no longer a secret?

Boxing King William Brown was attacked overseas and saved by a woman. Reduced to a handyman, he was humiliated and dumped until Mindy Jones’ assistant rescued him. Posing as a champion, William faced endless provocation at an award dinner, defeating Gold Moore. Fueled by vengeance for his mother, he enters the World Tournament, but can he beat Owen? EP 1:A man, resembling the Boxing King, offers himself as a human punching bag for money. Young Master Evans takes the opportunity to humiliate him, boasting about his strength and mocking the fake Boxing King. Despite the abuse, the man endures it for financial needs, highlighting his desperate situation.Will the real Boxing King step in to defend his honor?

column1: After Divorce I Can Predict the Future
column4: Jayden Wood, a failed businessman who abandoned his wife and daughter, squandered everything on high-interest loans. When his creditors humiliated his family, he was jolted awake. Gaining the power to foresee the future, he rose through the underworld, amassing wealth and shorting Wall Street. Yet, his ultimate wish, to reunite with his family, was part of a far greater scheme against him.  EP 1:A desperate mother is confronted by ruthless creditors demanding repayment of a loan her ex-husband, Jayden, took, threatening harm to her daughter if she doesn't reveal his whereabouts.Will the mother be forced to betray Jayden to save her daughter?

In a world where internal energy reigns supreme, Ethan Shaw finds himself unable to cultivate Soulcraft due to his lack of a Soulwell. He can only serve as a combat partner for the sect's disciples, enduring all forms of bullying. However, he possesses a legendary physique. When the Blazewood Academy selection begins, Ethan surprises everyone by passing the tests with his exceptional physical abilities, shocking those who deemed him worthless. EP 1:Ethan Shaw, born without a Soulwell and unable to cultivate Soulcraft, defies expectations by deciding to join the Blazewood Academy's selection despite his limitations. Meanwhile, the Elderwind Sect faces a sudden attack from Darkspire, leading to chaos and the mysterious intervention of a powerful guardian, hinting at Ethan's hidden potential.Will Ethan's extraordinary strength be enough to protect the Elderwind Sect from Darkspire's takeover?

Ten years ago, billionaire Jason Adams was jailed for killing his ex - wife and her lover after they murdered his eldest daughter. After release, he looks for his youngest, Emily, who wrongly blames him for her mother's death. Jason finds she's mistreated. Emily, influenced by her husband, seeks revenge. The truth is revealed, and Emily, regretful, reconsiders. What will she choose? EP 1:Jason Adams, the former president of the Ascendant Order, is offered large sums of money by his former associates as a token of gratitude, but he refuses, wanting to leave his past behind. Meanwhile, his daughter Emily is mistreated by her husband in public, leading to a confrontation with Jason.Will Jason intervene to protect Emily from her abusive husband?

Avon Lewis, a top agent, struggles to reconnect with his wife, Emma, and daughter after years of being away on missions. Determined to make amends, he retires to focus on family. On New Year’s Eve, his plans for a reunion are shattered when he learns his daughter has been kidnapped while traveling. Armed with decades of expertise, Avon embarks on a dangerous mission to rescue her, but what awaits him at the end of the journey remains unknown. EP 1:Avon Lewis, a retired top agent, plans a New Year's Eve dinner to reconnect with his estranged wife and daughter, Emma. However, his hopes are shattered when Emma, traveling abroad, is suddenly kidnapped during their phone call, leaving Avon desperate and ready to use his expertise to rescue her.Will Avon be able to save his daughter from her kidnappers in time?

Victor Lin, a courier, discovers his girlfriend cheating with wealthy heir, William Stone and faces public humiliation when he tries to expose them. Soon, he inherits the Eye of Insight Sect’s legacy, gaining the power to see true value. With this gift, Victor rises from ruin, meets Julia Xavier, his true love, and overcomes countless challenges to build a life of success and happiness.  EP 1:Victor Lin, a courier, discovers his girlfriend Emily cheating with William Stone, VP of Xavier Group, and is humiliated when he confronts them. After being beaten and mocked, Victor reaches his breaking point, only to be chosen by the Eye of Insight Sect, gaining extraordinary powers.With his newfound abilities, how will Victor seek revenge against those who wronged him?

Bella White, the illegitimate daughter of the White family, once saved a mysterious young man with an eye injury, leaving him a jade pendant as a token. Unbeknownst to her, he was the crown prince, who later summoned Bella to the palace. But her scheming cousin, driven by greed, stole the pendant, burned Bella’s home, and took her place as the prince’s consort. When the truth surfaces, will Bella reclaim her stolen fate? EP 1:Consort Ella attempts to win the Emperor's favor by singing in the Royal Garden, but her efforts backfire when Consort Nina, jealous and power-hungry, orders her to be punished by being placed in a wine vat. Meanwhile, Nina's sinister plans to eliminate her rivals, including her own sister, reveal her ruthless ambition to dominate the palace.Will Consort Nina succeed in her deadly scheme against her sister?

Felix Jinks, a former Army God, returns to the city with his brothers, only to cross paths with Rachel Walke, a past fling. After helping her with a forced marriage issue, he provokes his old enemy, the Ouroboros, whose leader schemes against him. As Felix's bond with Rachel deepens, he's torn between love and the call of heroism... EP 1:Felix Jinks, now working as a security guard, unexpectedly encounters Rachel Walker during her forced blind date. Their past connection resurfaces as Rachel confronts Felix about his deception regarding his military mission. Tensions escalate when Felix is provoked by a stranger making advances toward Rachel, leading to a physical altercation.Will Felix's bold defense of Rachel reignite their old flame or draw the attention of his enemies?

Former Football King Hector lost his beloved wife in an act of revenge by enemies. To honor his promise to her, he endured silently, even blocking his son Nolan from pursuing a professional football career. However, this led to the team's humiliation and attacks. Facing the powerful opponents, will Hector make a comeback to silence the critics, restore his nation's pride, and mend his broken relationship with his son, passing on his legacy?
 EP 1:Hector leads Team Storm to a crushing victory in the Shorna Cup, showcasing his unmatched skills and arrogance. However, tragedy strikes when his wife Josie is mortally wounded in an apparent act of revenge, forcing Hector to promise her he will abandon football and protect their son from following in his footsteps.Will Hector keep his promise to Josie and stay away from football, or will the call of the game and the need for revenge pull him back in?

Gloria Taylor, the wife of the Taylor Group's president and a once-renowned international dancer, returns to lead the Twilight Classical Dance Company in a time of need. However, Karen Miller steals her identity and leads others to bully Gloria. As tensions rise, in the final showdown, will Gloria expose the villains and reclaim her rightful place?
 EP 1:Gloria Taylor, once an internationally renowned dancer, steps in to lead the Twilight Classical Dance Company after the sudden departure of their lead dancer, despite initial reluctance and the condition of anonymity regarding her marital status. However, her return is met with unexpected hostility and deception, as Karen Miller, an old acquaintance, is seen misusing Gloria's car and belittling her in front of the dance company members.Will Gloria be able to overcome the challenges and prove her worth to the dance company, or will Karen's deceitful actions undermine her efforts?

Craig Rhys was born into a martial arts family, but due to his health issues, his father forbade him from training. Undeterred, Craig secretly honed his skills and became the top of Heaven Ranking. However, with each battle, a deadly toxin spreads within him. As he competes in a crucial tournament, he faces the threat of his family's annihilation. Will Craig be able to save his family's honor and achieve redemption, or will his hidden struggles consume him? 
 EP 1:Craig Rhys, despite being considered a disgrace by his family and peers, proves his unmatched martial arts skills by defeating multiple challengers with just one move, asserting his dominance at the Heaven Ranking tournament. Meanwhile, his father's hidden concern about Craig's health condition and the lethal toxin within him adds a layer of urgency to his victories.Will Craig's father succeed in obtaining the Drager Pill to save his son, or will Craig's hidden struggles finally catch up to him?

House Summer, a prestigious family under the Nightmount Sect, is led by Gavin Summer, who is dedicated to the family's rise to prominence. However, Cayden Soren, the family's son-in-law, is seen as weak and looked down upon. Gavin once urged his daughter, Serena Summer, to divorce him, but she refused. During a grand tournament held by the Nightmount Sect, House Summer faces a major crisis when Damon and Darren, Gavin's sons, are easily defeated and humiliated. Yet, Cayden unexpectedly reveals  EP 1:During a chaotic altercation in the market, Cayden Soren, the underestimated househusband of House Summer, steps in to protect an old man from Gareth Larkin, the Grand Elder of the Nightmount Sect. Despite being mocked for his perceived weakness, Cayden's actions hint at hidden potential, especially when the old man mentions a 'fish with golden scales' transforming into a loong, suggesting Cayden's true strength might soon be revealed.Will Cayden's hidden abilities finally come to light in the next episode?

Ten years ago, Summer risked her life to save her three young fiancés during a deadly pursuit, only to be sold to the cruel Chan family. Exploited for their success, she was abandoned when burdened with debts for her brother. Now, her fiancés, each powerful in their fields, hear of her survival and make a high-profile appearance at a banquet — only to face doubt when confronted with an impostor and the real Summer...
 EP 1:Three powerful men, once saved by Summer during a deadly pursuit, receive news of her survival and rush to reunite with her, recalling their shared past and the promise made with the Phoenix jade pendants.Will the three men be able to recognize the real Summer among the impostors?

Once Peter Yeats forged the legendary Loongstrike, Sam Todd came to steal it. To protect the blade from falling into the wrong hands, Peter sacrificed himself and let his son Ted Yeats take the Loongstrike away. Twenty years later, Ted Yeats returned with the Loongstrike to find his family, only to find that Blade Hills was being attacked by the Todds who wanted to seize its forging resources. At the critical moment, Ted defeated them with the Loongstrike but more enemies were on their way...
 EP 1:Peter Yeats successfully forges the legendary Loongstrike, but Sam Todd immediately tries to steal it. To protect the sword, Peter sacrifices himself, letting his son Ted escape with Loongstrike. Years later, Ted returns to Blade Hills, only to find it under attack by the Todds, who seek its forging resources. Ted defeats the attackers with Loongstrike, but more enemies are coming.Will Ted be able to protect Blade Hills and uncover the truth about his family's fate?

column1: My Hired Boyfriend Is A Secret CEO
column4:
Yasmine Jones, to escape from an arranged marriage, runs away from home under the alias Yara Shields and starts working as a low-level employee at a company. To avoid workplace harassment, she fabricates a lie, claiming her boyfriend is the company's CEO. To keep up the charade, she hires an actor to pose as her powerful boyfriend, but in a twist of fate, she accidentally hires the real CEO... 
 EP 1:Yara Shields, an intern at Haysen Group, lies about dating the CEO, Chris Gray, to avoid being laid off. When her coworkers challenge her claim, she doubles down, leading to a request for her to bring the elusive CEO to the company's annual award ceremony.Will Yara manage to produce the real CEO at the ceremony, or will her lie unravel?

Mackie Chan, Young Lord of Vastland, is ambushed during a breakthrough in the wilderness. Believing death is certain, he encounters Clara Hart, a brave woman drugged and left for dead. Clara uses Mackie as an antidote and takes him back to heal him. For five years, Mackie's cultivation stalls. With doubts growing and enemies looming, can they restore their honor, defend their land, and protect their love? EP 1:Mackie Chan, the Young Lord of Vastland, is ambushed by the Assassins Five during his critical breakthrough moment. Left vulnerable and near death, he is discovered by Clara Hart, who is fleeing from her own attackers. Clara makes a desperate choice to use Mackie as an antidote and protect him in his weakened state, setting the stage for their intertwined fates.Will Mackie survive the assassination attempt and Clara's unexpected decision?

Chance Morphy has been cultivating immortality for years and still stays in the lowest Level -- the Foundation Phase. Yet he's a rare talent who can define Divine Blood and be the greatest of all. In front of Heretics' invasion, he is Skyward Sect's only chance to live: to abandon his Divine Blood and die, or to save his family and beloved woman, what will the Great Chance do with the demons' offer? EP 1:In this episode, Maldelenfer, the Subprior of Heretics, brazenly invades the Skyward Sect, challenging Patriarch Skyward. Despite the Patriarch's efforts, he is unable to defeat Maldelenfer and calls for Chance Morphy's help. Meanwhile, Chance, often mocked for his low cultivation level, is unexpectedly chosen to duel a seemingly high-ranking Heretics member, revealing a shocking truth about his hidden potential.Will Chance Morphy uncover the true extent of his powers in the face of the Heretics' threat?

Mia Harper and Charles Winters had been childhood sweethearts, with a promise to be together for life. However, Charles' entire household was massacred. Mia saved his life but was gravely injured and went missing. As Charles grew older, he sought revenge by becoming the adopted son of his enemy, Richard Harker, and took the name Ethan Harker. One day, Ethan helped Lila Lewis, who was begging on the streets. What he didn’t know was that Lila Lewis was his savior, Mia Harper... EP 1:The episode reveals the tragic massacre of the Winters family by Richard Harker, with only Charles Winters escaping. Mia Harper, Charles' childhood sweetheart, saves him but is severely injured and left for dead. Years later, Charles, now known as Ethan Harker, seeks revenge by infiltrating the Harker family, unaware that the beggar he helps, Lila Lewis, is actually Mia.Will Ethan discover Lila's true identity before it's too late?

Once a beloved heiress, Shirley Shaw fell for Ray Perry, the chauffeur's son. She spoiled him—letting him ride in luxury, spend her money, and even handed him her company. But while Ray basked in her devotion, he secretly pursued others. Betrayal and humiliation pushed Shirley to the brink. Just as her life seemed to slip away, a hidden truth about someone she had overlooked began to surface. With a second chance, Shirley is ready to rewrite her fate... EP 1:Shirley Shaw confronts Ray Perry about his betrayal, revealing his cruel schemes including giving her AIDS-contaminated needles and causing her father's death, only to seemingly be reborn for a second chance at life.Will Shirley use her second chance to take revenge and uncover the full extent of Ray's deceit?

David Miller, the Temple Master, defended his nation, but his wife and son were targeted in retaliation by an enemy country. Before her death, his wife asked him to find their son. David eventually found Daniel Miller and, hiding his true identity, secretly supported him as he grew up. However, at Daniel's wedding, David was devastated when Daniel chose to sever ties with him for the sake of power. In his grief, David uncovered the long-hidden truth: Daniel was not his real son...
 EP 1:A minor traffic dispute escalates when a driver refuses to admit fault, leading to a violent confrontation and the revelation of the driver's powerful connections, setting the stage for a clash between ordinary citizens and the wealthy elite.Will the protagonist stand a chance against the might of William Scott, or will power and privilege prevail in this unequal battle?

An ordinary Annie meets werewolf leader Leon. Prophecy of the Moon Goddess brings them together. Leon's father hypnotizes people, making him mistake Annie's sister for Luna. Memory lost, they become boss and subordinate, fall in love. True love overcomes obstacles, memories return, misunderstandings cleared. With the Moon Goddess' blessing, Annie gets the prophecy - foretold ability, integrates into the werewolf tribe and finds lasting happiness. EP 1:Annie, struggling to pay rent, receives a mysterious candy from a kind stranger that promises to guide her future. Meanwhile, Leon is told by a mysterious figure that Annie is his destined Luna, setting the stage for their fated meeting.Will Leon follow the mysterious advice and approach Annie, and how will the blessed candy influence her future?

column1: Tearing Down the Toxic Family with My Mother-in-Law
column4: Xia Zhiwei, an elite bodyguard protecting domestic abuse victims, has a flash marriage with lawyer Shen Mo while hiding her identity. Suffering abuse in the Shen family, she fights for her daughter's custody, exposes Shen Mo's crimes, and causes his law license to be revoked. When Shen Mo threatens their daughter, Xia chooses not to divorce and confronts him. After Shen Mo discovers her true identity and faints, Lin Cuihua cuts ties with him. Xia, Lin Cuihua, and her daughter begin a new life. EP 1:Xia Zhiwei, a bodyguard for domestic violence victims, confronts Li Ming, the abusive president of Shanhe Group, while hiding her true identity. After a violent encounter, she successfully protects her client and receives the final payment, maintaining her secret.Will Xia Zhiwei's hidden identity be exposed as she continues to take on dangerous missions?

World-renowned chef Everly Green, dissatisfied with Patrick Adams manipulating culinary competitions, exposed his corruption before retreating into anonymity as a dishwasher at the century-old Juxian Restaurant in Zhongzhou. When Dahan's culinary world faced a threat from top chefs in Donghan, Everly stepped out of hiding, defeating Donghan's elite and reclaiming honor for Dahan's chefs. 
 EP 1:Everly Green, a renowned chef, exposes the corruption of Patrick Adams during the World Culinary Competition, leading to her disappearance and a three-year hunt by Adams, while she hides as a dishwasher at Juxian Restaurant.Will Everly Green ever reclaim her rightful place in the culinary world?

Silas Han, Commandant of the Tiger Guards, escapes death after his brother Marcus refuses to open the city gates, leaving him for dead. Marcus brands Silas a traitor, steals his honor, and marries his wife. On Marcus' wedding day, Silas returns – now a war hero and the Great General appointed by the Emperor. This time, he's not asking to enter... EP 1:Silas Han, once married to Gloria Meng, returns as a war hero to avenge his brother's betrayal, who left him for dead, stole his honor, and married his wife. As Silas prepares for battle against the Barblians, Marcus refuses to open the city gates, branding Silas a traitor and sealing his fate.Will Silas overcome Marcus' betrayal and lead his men to victory against the Barblians?

After a painful breakup with Aslan, her billionaire contracted lover, Jade swears never to see him again. But when his identical twin, Lucas, offers the love she’s been seeking, she’s drawn back in. As Jade moves in with Lucas, she uncovers a dark family secret that traps her in a dangerous, luxurious world. To break free, she must face the truth about the man she now calls her lover. EP 1:Jade learns she has end-stage leukemia and only two months to live, leading to a tense confrontation with Aslan where she breaks their contract's rules by kissing him, resulting in Aslan terminating their agreement.Will Jade's terminal diagnosis bring her closer to Lucas, or push him away as she uncovers more about the family's dark secrets?

column1: The Heiress’s Revenge: From Princess to Avenger
column4: Melanie Griffin devoted herself to helping Crown Prince Oscar Hayes ascend the throne, only to be betrayed as he plotted her death. Gravely injured, she saw Albert Hayes, the Fourth Prince, who had always silently protected her. Waking up in the past, before Oscar's rise, she vowed to stop his schemes. Discovering poison in the emperor’s medicine, she used her mother’s antidote to save him. With Albert, she exposed Oscar's plan to seize the throne and reclaimed justice. EP 1:Melanie Griffin is falsely accused of poisoning the late Emperor by her own sister Charlie, who reveals a shocking truth about Nate's true parentage, unraveling years of deceit and betrayal.Will Melanie uncover the full extent of Charlie and Oscar's conspiracy against her?

Luna Young has a fake heiress best friend, Victoria Walker. In her past life, Victoria cheated, stole Luna’s project plan, transferred a million dollars, and embezzled company funds with her lover. Framing Luna for it, she incited her husband, Benjamin King, to hunt Luna down. Betrayed and killed by Victoria and her lover, Luna is reborn on the day of Victoria’s affair. This time, Luna sets a trap, ensuring Victoria pays for her sins.
 EP 1:Luna Young, a former top executive at King Group, is betrayed by her best friend Victoria who frames her for embezzlement and other crimes. Luna is beaten and left permanently disabled by Victoria's husband, Benjamin King. In a shocking twist, Luna is reborn on the day of Victoria's affair, vowing revenge.Will Luna succeed in her revenge against Victoria in her new life?

After breaking the debauchery of her ex-boyfriend, Eve grabs a "call-boy" into a flash marriage directly on that spot . But actually, this man is Eve's FIANCE！ EP 1:Eve confronts her past when her family's emissary reveals her secret fiancé, leading to a chaotic encounter where she discovers her current boyfriend, Richard, proposing to another woman, shattering her trust.Will Eve's confrontation with Richard reveal more shocking secrets about their relationship?

Small-time assistant Mia has a one-night stand with a billionaire heir and her life unfolds when she goes to work for him. Her new boss needs a wife in order to secure his inheritance and he winds up in an arranged marriage with Mia’s greedy sister. Mia navigates her relationships while falling in love. EP 1:Mia wakes up horrified to realize she had a one-night stand with her boss after a night of heavy drinking orchestrated by her friends, who were trying to set her up with someone else.Will Mia be able to face her boss after their unexpected night together?

Tessa Hughes, a rural cleaner, unexpectedly wins a 10-billion-dollar lottery. Excited, she heads to the city to give the money to her son, James Hughes. However, she is humiliated by her daughter-in-law and her son's mother-in-law, and her son also rejects her, severing their mother-son relationship. But when they later learn that Tessa Hughes has won the 10-billion-dollar jackpot, her son and daughter-in-law deeply regret their actions.
 EP 1:Tessa Hughes, a rural cleaner, unexpectedly wins a billion-dollar lottery and rushes to the city to share the fortune with her son, James. However, she is met with humiliation and rejection by her daughter-in-law and son, who sever their relationship with her, unaware of her newfound wealth.Will James and his wife regret their actions when they discover Tessa's billion-dollar secret?

Cameron Bell, the god of billiards, died in a car accident. When he opened his eyes, he was reborn in the body of a child on the verge of death, named Sadie Morris. In this lifetime, let's see how he manages to become the god of billiards again... EP 1:Cameron Bell, the legendary Pool God, dies in a car accident and is reborn in the body of Sadie Morris, a young boy from the prestigious but struggling Morris family. As Sadie, he discovers his new family's history in pool and stumbles upon an unsolved ancestral pool game, hinting at his potential to revive the family's glory.Will Sadie solve the ancestral pool game and reveal his true identity as the Pool God?

In her previous life, orphan Leah Stein, framed by Lerry, was expelled from the Sect and met a tragic end. Reborn, Leah devotes herself to cultivating Apathia. And she refuses to forgive those who hurt her before. Caught in this situation of past grudges and new-found resolve, how will Leah rewrite her destiny? EP 1:Leah is falsely accused by Lerry of stealing the Sect's sacred Scroll of Celestial Mastery, leading to her expulsion and the severing of ties with her Master and Seniors.Will Leah find a way to clear her name and reclaim her place in the Sect?

Kobe, the ruler of the Hall of Fighters of Kivaberg, returned to a normal life after his people died in a fight. Unexpectedly, he fell in love with Kenna. He helped her, and found some secrets of the past. George, who once worked for him, took him as an enemy. George announced Kobe’s death, and became the ruler. He even had Kobe’s friend killed. Kobe was enraged and decided to take revenge. However, there was still something unknown.
 EP 1:Kobe attends a blind date set up by his family, only to discover it's a setup by someone from his past who drugged him. He confronts the woman, realizing she lied about her identity and intentions, leading to a tense and explosive encounter.Will Kobe uncover the truth behind this dangerous deception?

column1: The Little Master Chef: A Taste of Destiny
column4: Stella McAllister, the Little Master Chef from the mountains, is forced to marry Victor Stone—a businessman hoping to save his company by winning a cooking contest and investment. During her stay in the city, she clashes with Anna, who secretly admires Victor for years. Now, the contest begins… EP 1:Stella, the talented little chef from Veloria, is sent away by her master to get married and bring back a child, while in the city, Victor Stone is being forced into a marriage to save his failing restaurant business by securing a crucial investment from a picky investor who only appreciates the legendary Little Chef Master.Will Stella and Victor's forced marriage lead to a successful partnership or a disastrous clash of destinies?

Once a legendary business mogul, Leo Stone vanishes from the spotlight, secretly working as a janitor to test and guide his son, Rob Stone. But when a single slip at the company gala exposes cracks in his disguise, it ignites fierce rivalries, shocking betrayals, and a high-stakes battle for power. As hidden enemies resurface and deadly secrets unfold, Leo Stone must outplay them all—to protect his son, reclaim his legacy, and even embrace an unexpected new love. EP 1:A janitor is falsely accused of harassment by the Sales General Manager, only for it to be revealed that he is actually the Chairman of Nova Group. Meanwhile, Ms. Green, who has been pursuing the Chairman, proposes marriage, complicating personal and professional dynamics.Will the Chairman accept Ms. Green's marriage proposal, and how will Rob react to being cheated on?

Sue Bynn, the Sacred Maiden of Miao, eloped for love but faced opposition for being childless. Evan Zach had an affair and conspired with Shirley Scott to fake a pregnancy. Sue left but was forced to perform a gu ritual, which turned her hair white overnight. The high priest sacrificed himself to save her. Evan sought forgiveness, while Sue led the Miao village out of poverty. EP 1:Sue Bynn, the Sacred Maiden of Miao, decides to forsake her sacred duties and elope with Evan Zach, despite warnings of their ill-fated love. Evan swears loyalty to Sue under the Sacred Tree, but later betrays her, leading Sue to donate all the jewelry he gave her to charity. The episode culminates with Evan suddenly collapsing, leaving viewers questioning the future of their relationship.Will Evan's sudden collapse reveal the consequences of his betrayal, or is there another twist awaiting Sue and Evan?

column1: Evil Bride vs. The CEO's Secret Mom
column4: Beth, a top streamer who is about to join the wealthiest family, mistakes her mother-in-law for a MISTRESS on the eve of her wedding! She immediately retaliates, not realizing what kind of mishap this crazy revenge will bring her! EP 1:Edward introduces his fiancée Beth to his mother, Mrs. Brown, who is impressed by Beth's character and supportive nature. Mrs. Brown expresses her hopes that Beth will help Edward move on from the guilt of his sister's death and welcomes her into the family by offering shares in the Brown Group. Despite her busy schedule, Mrs. Brown ensures the wedding preparations are in place.Will Beth's introduction to the family go smoothly, or will unexpected tensions arise before the wedding?

Betrayed by his family, Issac died cultivating the Affectio. Reborn, he embraces the Apathia, gaining power by severing familial ties. Surrendering his Five-element Spiritual Roots and Celestial Bloodline to his siblings, he awakens greater abilities. Exiled by his parents, he ascends as the Primordial Divine Sovereign. When his family begs for forgiveness, Issac vows to make them suffer as he did. Will his heartlessness bring ultimate power or consume him? EP 1:Issac, betrayed by his siblings, willingly surrenders his Five-Element Spiritual Roots to them under the guise of Affectio, only to realize too late that their greed has left him powerless and discarded.What will Issac do now that he has lost everything to his siblings' betrayal?

ALEX，a kid even never touched a billiard cue before. One day, he suddenly showed off his excellent billiards skills in the face of successive crises.  The amazing change in Alex was actually because of... EP 1:Paul Stryker, the renowned billiards champion, dies in a car accident, while Alex miraculously survives but finds himself transmigrated into a young boy's body. Thrust into the Carey family, known for their billiards legacy but rife with internal strife, Alex must navigate a hostile environment during his grandfather's birthday party, where family tensions and hidden talents come to light.Will Alex uncover the truth behind his transmigration and the Carey family's dark secrets?

column1: You Are My One And Only
column4: Married for two years, yet Marianne has never seen her mysterious husband, Sebastian Walker. After one passionate night with a stranger, she accidentally leaves her roommate's work ID behind. Little does she know that the man from that unforgettable night is her never-met husband—who has just served her with divorce papers. Even worse, Marianne, using the alias Marry Ann, finds herself falling for Sebat Walker, her company's VIP who happens to be married to someone... EP 1:Marianne reluctantly enters an arranged marriage with the mysterious Sebastian Walker to fulfill her mother's dying wish, only to later discover she drunkenly cheated on her unseen husband, grappling with guilt and the complexities of their unconventional relationship.Will Marianne's accidental infidelity unravel her already strained marriage to Sebastian?

Joey and Helen, childhood sweethearts, lost touch for eight years due to Joey’s mission. Helen, injured and pregnant, had to marry a rich man when their child fell ill. Joey returned on her wedding day. EP 1:Joey and Helen are preparing for Joey's university tuition when their money is stolen by an outlaw, leading to a desperate chase where Helen risks her life to recover the funds.Will Joey be able to pursue his education after this harrowing ordeal?

Nicolas Lodge needed a kidney transplant. His girlfriend, Diana Wood, was willing to donate but was locked up by her parents. She escaped to the hospital, but her mother died in pursuit. Diana left Nicolas, allowing her stepsister Jessica to claim she donated a kidney. Will Nicolas discover the truth? EP 1:Rachel is determined to donate her kidney to her fiancé Jason, despite her parents' objections. In her desperate attempt to reach the hospital, her mother tragically dies in a car accident, leaving Rachel devastated and blamed for her mother's death.Will Rachel be able to cope with the guilt of her mother's death while Jason recovers from the surgery?

Audrey White, a world martial arts champion, exposed a scandal involving officials from the Martial Arts Federation. To protect her daughter, Audrey decided to negotiate alone. When the negotiation failed, Audrey's sister, Claire White, came to her rescue. In the end, the two sisters discovered that their master was the mastermind behind the scandal and brought him to justice. EP 1:After years of unfair treatment and corruption in the Martial Arts Association, Phoenix, a former champion, is called upon by the public to make a comeback as foreign players dominate the National Martial Arts Competition. Meanwhile, her daughter's school trip to a martial arts training facility might inadvertently expose Phoenix's identity, raising tensions among those who still hold grudges against her.Will Phoenix's past actions put her and her daughter in danger as her identity risks being revealed?

Tyler Trump’s perfect image of a dutiful son shatters after a car accident. When his rural parents, Victor and Evelyn, visit the city for the New Year, tragedy strikes. Tyler chooses to save his father-in-law over his own father, leading to Victor’s death. As Evelyn remains unaware, Tyler's indifference to his parents’ emotional needs causes irreparable damage to their bond. Can Tyler understand the true meaning of family before it’s too late?  EP 1:Tyler faces an impossible decision during a tragic car accident, choosing to save his father-in-law over his own father, leading to Victor's death and leaving Evelyn devastated.How will Tyler live with the consequences of his decision, and can he ever mend the broken bond with his mother?

Julia Garcia, a rural woman, has a daughter named Sara Jones. When village leaders Mr. & Mrs. Smith die saving Sara from an accident, Julia adopts their son, Paul Jones. During an earthquake, Julia chooses to save Paul, losing Sara in the process. As she embarks on a quest to find her daughter, will she succeed? If she does, how will she balance the conflicting demands of duty and love between her biological daughter and adopted son? EP 1:Julia Garcia prepares her children, Sara and Paul, for an impending earthquake by giving them personalized talismans, symbolizing their bond as a family. As the earthquake strikes, Julia must quickly make decisions to protect both children, leading to a dramatic escape attempt.Will Julia be able to save both Sara and Paul from the earthquake's devastation?

After a one-night stand, Xandy Chow had septuplets with extraordinary abilities. Despite their unique gifts, Xandy and Brian Smith remain apart, and Brian meets his kids for the first time seven years later. Their estrangement stems from unresolved misunderstandings and miscommunication about their past and responsibilities. EP 1:The septuplets plan to reunite their parents by auctioning their mother's jade pendant online, leading to a bidding war that reveals Brian Smith's identity as their father.Will the septuplets successfully reunite their parents after the auction?

After Edward LeBlanc died in a sinister car accident, his soul woke up in Luna Sully's vessel, the mistress of his brother-in-law, Evans Shawn. Trapped in Luna's body, Edward planned to rescue his sister, Stella, and take revenge on Evans with the help of his best friend, Ethan Jackman. But as they were preparing to expose Evans' crime, a darker conspiracy began to surface. Meanwhile, Edward's unfamiliarity of his new female form leads to humorous mishaps—and unexpected feelings for Ethan. EP 1:Edward LeBlanc discovers Evans Shawn's sinister plan to ruin his sister Stella and take control of the LeBlanc family, but before he can warn her, he meets with a fatal accident—only to wake up in the body of Evans' lover, Luna Sully.How will Edward navigate his new life in Luna's body to protect his sister?

Once a world billiards champion, Daniel was betrayed by his brother and rival, left for dead. Rescued by Baker, he found refuge in a pool hall, where his lost talent resurfaced. As he dominated tournaments and built unbreakable bonds, his past caught up—his brother’s revenge plot set the stage for a final showdown. With everything at stake, can Daniel sink the winning shot and reclaim his title?  EP 1:Daniel, once the world billiards champion, is found alive after being betrayed and left for dead. Rescued by Charles, he begins to recover in a pool hall. Meanwhile, a rival is wreaking havoc in the hall, defeating their best players, including Diana, prompting Charles and his allies to confront the threat. The episode ends with a news alert about Daniel's mysterious disappearance, hinting at unresolved dangers and his brother's possible involvement.Will Daniel rise to face the challenge and reclaim his title?

Twenty-five years ago, Mindy Shawn bravely left to fight for the country. Twenty-five years later, she returned as a war god, but found that she had protected everyone but lost her family. Her son was bullied and suppressed by various powerful people at home, and even with life in danger... EP 1:Mindy Shawn, the Phoenix Goddess of War, returns home to find her parents have sacrificed themselves in battle, leaving her newborn son and the responsibility of protecting Arcadia in her hands.Will Mindy be able to protect her son and uphold her family's legacy in Arcadia?

Zan Shen rescued the Master Avery of the Loo family being chased. However, the pursuers mistook her husband, Michael Loo, for the Master Avery and hit him deliberately. Michael Loo begged passers-by to save the pregnant Zan Shen, but he was seriously injured. After that, he created the illusion of death. Five years later, Avery Loo confesses to Zan Shen, but she has known that Avery Loo and her husband are brothers. What wolud Avery Loo and Zan Shen do next... EP 1:Zan Shen and Avery Loo are caught in a dangerous chase as pursuers mistake Michael Loo for Avery, leading to a deliberate attack. Amidst the chaos, Zan Shen tries to protect her unborn child while Michael is severely injured, creating a false illusion of his death.
