Meanwhile, a conspiracy is brewing to overthrow the Emperor, and the Martial God Temple prepares for the return of their gravely injured leader, who once single-handedly turned back a million troops.Will Emperor Victor Magnus succeed in finding his son before the conspirators make their move?

Billionaire Barron Ford returns to his hometown with his wife, Liz Lane, for the Lunar New Year, hoping to mend family ties. However, his past poverty sparks disdain from his father-in-law, Gavin Lane, and relatives. Gifts like Nectar are misunderstood, his wealth doubted, and a resort project causes tension. Using wit and resilience, Barron resolves conflicts, earns respect, and brings his family closer together. EP 1:Barron Ford, the world's richest man, returns to his hometown for the Lunar New Year with extravagant gifts, including the legendary Nectar and generous red envelopes, aiming to mend family ties despite past tensions.Will Barron's lavish gifts be enough to win over his skeptical in-laws and heal the family rift?

In a heartless world, he was falsely accused of rape, imprisoned, and humiliated. But the truth runs deeper than anyone knows, he hides an identity that could shake the world. Now, returning as a powerful force, he seeks revenge. Those who wronged him will face inevitable retribution. When the truth is revealed, who will emerge victorious? EP 1:Butcher, falsely accused and humiliated, faces violent confrontation, only for Warrior Val to reveal his true identity as the Imperial Preceptor, begging him to come out of seclusion.What vengeance will the Imperial Preceptor unleash upon those who wronged him?

A thousand years ago, Lucas Ben, the Dragon Emperor, wed Jasmine, the Master of the Sect of Immortality. Their happiness ended when Astra, Jasmine's brother, sought immortality. In the battle, Jasmine sacrificed herself to save Lucas and the empire. Now, a millennium later, Jasmine is reincarnated, but Lucas, amnesiac and lost, must uncover his past. Can he protect his eternal love?  EP 1:The episode reveals the tragic past where Jasmine, the Master of the Sect of Immortality, sacrifices herself to protect Lucas and the empire from her power-hungry brother Astra, who seeks the Immortality Sutra for eternal life.Will Lucas ever remember Jasmine and their eternal love?

column1: Turning The Tables with My Baby
column4: Sylvie Hayes, daughter of the minister, disguises herself as a maid to seek justice after General Eric Reid falsely accuses her father of embezzlement, leading to his death sentence. She hopes to plead with Emperor Thaddeus Hawthorne, but he has avoided the harem for a decade. By chance, they meet, sparking an affair. Misunderstood, Sylvie nearly faces execution. Six months later, she makes a shocking discovery—one that places her in grave danger… EP 1:Sylvie Hayes, disguised as a maid and carrying the Emperor's child, faces execution under false accusations. Meanwhile, her father, Minister Gideon Hayes, is sentenced to death for embezzlement, which Sylvie claims is a setup. Her mother urges her to seek the Emperor's help to clear her father's name, leading to a tense confrontation with the Emperor himself.Will Sylvie be able to convince the Emperor of her father's innocence before it's too late?

Henry Jones, once the heir to Anderson Group, was lost as a child and raised by foster parents. Driven by gratitude, he builds the company from the ground up, even passing the chairman position to his foster father, William Jones. But when his biological family finds him, they abandon him for their true son, Oscar Jones. As betrayal tears through the family, Henry's loyalty is tested—will revenge become his only path? EP 1:Henry Jones braves freezing waters to save crucial documents while pleading for an investment to save his company, only to face harsh rejection from his adoptive family who prioritizes their biological son Oscar over him, revealing deep-seated familial tensions.Will Henry's sacrifices for the company be in vain as his family continues to shun him?

column1: Winter Romance at the Grand Hotel
column4: On the eve of her engagement, Vicky Harris escapes from her cheating ex-fiancé and a family that seeks to trade her for personal gain. Unexpectedly, she becomes pregnant with the child of Grayson Ford, the heir to a powerful Shanghai family. Grayson acquires the hotel where Vicky works, and while she strives to build her career, she finds herself drawn deeper into his world. Will Vicky manage to carve out her own path, or will she be swept away by the powerful forces around her? EP 1:Vicky discovers she is pregnant with twins, not from her cheating ex-fiancé Zane, leading her to break off their engagement and confront her unsupportive family who sees her only as a means for financial gain.Who is the father of Vicky's twins, and how will this revelation change her life?

This emperor, of humble origins, was determined to improve the lives of his people but an assassination attempt revealed the fact that his subjects were actually suffering. Filled with anger, he decided to investigate in secret. The emperor traveled to Southville, where officials were embezzling wealth and indulging in pleasures. After being humiliated and even tortured, he was saved and finally brought justice to people there. However, what he found was just the tip of the corruption iceberg... EP 1:After surviving an assassination attempt, the Emperor learns from his attackers that his people in Southville are suffering, contrary to the reports of prosperity and happiness. Despite his advisors' reassurances, the Emperor is shaken by the rebels' claims and the evidence of their dire conditions, leading him to decide to investigate Southville himself.Will the Emperor's journey to Southville reveal the true extent of his kingdom's corruption?

Six years ago, Cecilia Bell had a fleeting encounter with the powerful Dawson Perez. Fearing he’d see her as a gold digger, she left—only to later discover she was pregnant. Now, pressured into marriage, Cecilia has no choice but to let her daughter, Julie Perez, seek Dawson’s help. As Dawson reenters her life, buried emotions resurface. With secrets, misunderstandings, and the Perez family in the mix, can love stand the test of time?  EP 1:Julie, Cecilia and Dawson's daughter, embarks on a daring journey to the capital to find her father, Dawson Perez, after her mother is pressured into marriage. Despite facing rejection and disbelief, Julie's determination leads her to a dramatic encounter with Dawson, who is shocked by her resemblance to him.Will Dawson believe Julie is his daughter and what will this revelation mean for Cecilia?

A tragic accident leaves Daniel Reed, a hardworking migrant worker, in need of urgent surgery. But just as he grapples with his own crisis, his son Ryan delivers unexpected news—he’s marrying a wealthy heiress, and her family has one condition: he must buy a home in the city. With his savings barely covering his medical bills, Daniel faces an impossible choice. Should he fight for his own future, or sacrifice everything for his son’s happiness? EP 1:A tragic accident leaves Daniel Reed, a hardworking migrant worker, in need of urgent surgery. As his coworkers rush to help and inform his blind wife, Daniel insists they not tell his son Ryan. Meanwhile, Ryan calls to announce his upcoming marriage to a wealthy heiress, adding a new layer of complexity to Daniel's already dire situation.Will Daniel prioritize his own survival or sacrifice everything for his son's future?

Ten years ago, the Divine Sect was massacred, leaving Richard Reed as the only survivor. Before his master died, Richard promised to marry his daughter Celeste. Now the youngest celestial master, Richard goes to Kaedon County to fulfill the vow. But he finds death similar to the massacre. When he reunites with Celeste and brings up the marriage pact, she dismisses him. However, the truth behind the massacre is starting to resurface. EP 1:Richard Reed, the youngest celestial master and sole survivor of the Divine Sect massacre, heads to Kaedon County to fulfill his promise to marry Celeste Stone, his master's daughter. Along the way, he discovers a talisman identical to the one found during the massacre, hinting at the resurfacing of the past tragedy.Will Richard uncover the truth behind the Divine Sect massacre before it's too late?

Isabella Kensington, the eldest daughter of the Kensington family, is caught in a plot. After a misunderstanding with a stranger, her engagement is broken, but fate brings unexpected twins into her life. Five years later, when her son falls ill, Isabella returns to face the family and untangle the web of lies. What will she uncover? EP 1:Isabella Kensington is betrayed by her sister Evelyn, who drugged her and orchestrated a scandal to ruin her engagement. In a desperate struggle, Evelyn tries to take Isabella's child, revealing her plan to marry into the Sinclair family by using the child as leverage.Will Isabella be able to save her child and uncover Evelyn's sinister plot?

Innkeeper Moon Nye saves two generals from an ambush, only to face heartbreak when Victor Creed, the man she loves, tries to sell her into a brothel. But just as all seems lost, Yasmin Moore appears... EP 1:Generals Yasmin Moore and Cole Hill arrive in Terra County on a personal mission, keeping their visit discreet. Meanwhile, Innkeeper Moon Nye faces a crisis when customers accuse her of serving contaminated wine and demand an exorbitant payment, escalating the tension at her struggling inn.Will Moon Nye manage to resolve the conflict at her inn, and what secrets are Yasmin Moore and Cole Hill hiding in Terra County?

The general Lucia Bennett returns victorious, only to face betrayal—her savior, Leo Harrington, breaks their engagement and conspires to have her executed. At the brink of death, Ethan Gale sacrifices himself to save her, revealing he was her true savior all along. Devastatingly, Lucia gives her heart to Ethan. A thousand years later, Ethan is reborn as Ryan Drake, while Lucia has forgotten everything. When fate brings them together once more, will they recognize each other?
 EP 1:Lucia Bennett, the legendary warrior, returns victorious from battle only to learn that the Crown Prince, whom she loves and has waited five years to marry, has been betrothed to someone else, prompting her to rush back to the capital in distress.Will Lucia confront the Crown Prince and uncover the truth behind his sudden betrothal?

column1: My Tempting Yet Aloof Mr. Right
column4: Innocent college student Norah Spencer accidentally spends a night with the aloof, domineering CEO Ashton Dixson—who’s allergic to women—and ends up pregnant. A month later, fate brings them together again at a campus job fair. Ashton mistakenly assumes Norah is a gold-digger, while Norah is pressured by her mother and brother to have an abortion and marry a much older man... EP 1:Norah Spencer discovers she is pregnant after an accidental night with a mysterious man. At a campus job fair, she realizes the man is Ashton Dixson, the wealthy and aloof CEO of Dixson Group, who is allergic to women and now assumes she is a gold-digger.Will Ashton discover the truth about Norah's pregnancy and their shared night?

Luke Foster, a legendary Ace Pilot, takes in Susan and Joyce, daughters of 370 Air Crash victims, dreaming of a perfect future. Yet, their selfishness and Leo Williams's schemes shatter his life. Sacrificing his honor, Luke ventures into space. Three years later, he marries Sophia Lewis, finding hope again. As Leo’s sinister deeds surface, will Susan and Joyce face the weight of their past choices? EP 1:Luke Foster discovers his fiancées, Susan and Joyce, have cheated on him with his mentee, Leo Williams, leading to a dramatic confrontation. Despite the betrayal, Luke sacrifices his prestigious Hero Badge to save Leo from punishment, revealing his deep sense of honor. The episode culminates in Luke deciding to leave Earth and work in space for ten years, freeing Susan and Joyce from their engagement promises.Will Luke's departure bring closure or reignite old conflicts among Susan, Joyce, and Leo?

Female boxing champ Blair Carter wakes up as Amy Carter, a bullied rural wife in 1984. Refusing to be defeated, Amy fights back—punishing her abusive husband and his mistress. Newly divorced, she meets a wealthy man, turning him into her farmhand. Her bold actions inspire a revolution, empowering women and reshaping traditions. EP 1:Blair Carter, a female boxing champion, mysteriously wakes up as Amy Carter, a bullied rural wife in 1984, and discovers she has time-traveled, setting the stage for her to fight back against her abusive husband and the mistress.Will Amy use her boxing skills to turn the tables on her oppressors and start a revolution in 1984?

Can love bridge the gap between two completely different worlds?  Jocelyn Nash, 29, a top-tier lawyer with no time for anything but work. Shawn Windsor, 19, the privileged heir of GrandWin Group, living in a world of luxury. Their encounter is electric—sparks fly, passion ignites—but stepping beyond their own realities proves far more difficult than falling in love. Will they surrender to the lives they've always known, or risk everything to break free and fight for love?  EP 1:Jocelyn Nash, a successful 29-year-old lawyer, receives a devastating medical diagnosis of premature menopause, shaking her otherwise perfect life. Despite her professional triumphs, she grapples with the news and seeks solace in alcohol, while contemplating her lack of personal intimacy and the societal pressures around her.Will Jocelyn's life take an unexpected turn after this life-altering revelation?

After her son's marriage, Sanugi Howard is forced out of her savings - bought house. She saves amnesiac William Turner, and they bond over five years. When William regains memory and proposes, Sanugi's greedy son and daughter - in - law disrupt her life. With danger, will their love survive? EP 1:Sanugi Howard is mistreated by her son Wade and daughter-in-law Shirley, who prioritize their dog Bruno over her well-being. After being forced out of her own house, Sanugi encounters an injured man hit by a car, setting the stage for a new chapter in her life.Who is the injured man, and how will his arrival change Sanugi's life?

As a kid, Robin Stark was kidnapped and parted from her family. Rescued by Gary Stark, she traveled the martial world with him and entered Genolia's top martial arts school, Chinwoo. There, she was bullied by her brother Larry and mother Janet. Learning her identity, she refused their reconciliation. Once they knew Robin was their long - lost Betty, Janet and Larry felt regretful. Finally, the family reunited after a redemption process. EP 1:Robin Stark, who was kidnapped as a child and later rescued by Gary Stark, faces bullying at Chinwoo martial arts school from her brother Larry and mother Janet. After discovering her true identity as their long-lost daughter Betty, Robin refuses their attempts at reconciliation, leaving Janet and Larry regretful. Meanwhile, Gary works hard to secure Robin's future at Chinwoo, hoping she can escape their difficult life.Will Robin ever forgive her family and accept her true identity?

Suffering from domestic violence, Wanda Lane chose to escape from her sick husband Ethan Grant. With the help of Ethan's arch nemesis Percy Grant, she did a plastic surgery and started a new life as Yvonne Walker, Percy's fiancée. Just as she begins to settle into her new life, the shadows of her past refuse to fade. And her daughter Margaret's birthday is coming soon. What is she gonna do? Will she find out that Percy is taking advantage of her?  EP 1:Wanda Lane, suffering from domestic abuse, is confronted by her husband Ethan Grant, who refuses to let her leave. Meanwhile, Percy Smith, Ethan's rival, is making moves against Ethan's business, as Wanda's daughter Margaret tries to comfort her mother despite the dire situation.Will Wanda find a way to escape Ethan's control and protect her daughter?

Just before the new school year, Linda Sherman’s daughter loses her school spot—because her in-laws secretly stole it for their own son.  With her domineering mother-in-law backing them up, her brother-in-law’s family refuses to return it, mocking and retaliating against her instead.  Pushed to the edge, Linda takes legal action.  But will justice prevail, or will family ties keep the truth buried? EP 1:Linda Sherman discovers that her daughter's school spot has been secretly taken by her brother-in-law's family, who added their son to her household registration to claim the spot, leaving her daughter without a school to attend.Will Linda be able to reclaim her daughter's rightful school spot from her manipulative in-laws?

Shelly Quinn, born with good luck, brings fortune to those who treat her well, and misfortune to those who wrong her. Both her husband and brother die due to an accident, leading people and her son to believe she's a "bad omen". She is desperate while she unexpectedly meets president, Tracy Zayas. From that moment on, Tracy’s luck skyrockets. EP 1:Shelly's husband, Mason, is presumed dead after an avalanche, and her brother Asher forces her to give up her children and marry Hudson against her will, revealing the cruelty she faces as a widow.Will Shelly find a way to protect her children and defy the odds stacked against her?

On New Year's Eve in 2007, three siblings eagerly await their parents' return, only to be struck with the devastating news of their parents' death. Soon after, debt collectors arrive, threatening to seize their home. In a desperate attempt to protect his sister, the youngest brother gets injured and breaks his foot. Faced with mounting medical bills, Peace Chance decides to... EP 1:On New Year's Eve in 2007, three siblings eagerly await their parents' return, only to be struck with the devastating news that their parents were hit and killed by a car on their way home, leaving the children orphaned and in shock.How will the siblings cope with the loss of their parents and the challenges that lie ahead?

A devoted son, a loving home—shattered overnight. Cyprian Brook, once his parents’ pride, suddenly turned on them, casting them out with shocking cruelty. Betrayal, abandonment, and a bitter courtroom battle. What dark secret could justify such an unforgivable act? When the truth finally comes to light, all that remains is a haunting silence… EP 1:Cyprian Brook, once a devoted son, shocks everyone with his cruel indifference when his mother is injured, prioritizing his dog over her well-being, revealing a drastic and unsettling change in his character.What could have caused Cyprian to transform from a caring son into such a heartless figure?

column1: Divine Swap: My Journey to Immortality
column4: When delivery guy Harrison Yale accidentally joins a mystical WeChat group, he gains access to treasures from the immortal world. With mere earthly items, he trades for divine pills, endless gold, and martial arts secrets. As Harrison ascends to the status of a powerful, wealthy god, he quickly becomes a medical genius and martial arts master, all while crushing his rivals and winning the heart of a CEO. His rise from humble delivery boy to legendary hero is just beginning! EP 1:Harrison Yale, a humble delivery guy, discovers his girlfriend Lillian has betrayed him for the wealthy Mr. Renn, leading to a heated confrontation and physical altercation that escalates quickly.Will Harrison seek revenge after this humiliating betrayal?

After losing her parents and fortune, Teresa Mung is adopted by her cruel aunt, Faye Sung, and lives as a servant. As an adult, Teresa's cousin, Camila Leung, is betrothed to the notorious Bruce Hon for a business alliance. Faye devises a scheme to have Teresa marry Bruce instead. As Teresa enters the high society, she faces a life of luxury mingled with secrets. Will she uncover the truth behind her parents' deaths and navigate her new life?
 EP 1:Teresa is blackmailed by her cruel aunt Faye into marrying the notorious Bruce Hon to save her brother Beau's life, entering a high society filled with secrets and old connections.Will Teresa discover Bruce Hon's past connection to her and how will it affect their arranged marriage?

To obtain the Ethereal Bead, Norman Allen led Demon Cult to attack Etherealism clan. To protect his senior sisters, Peter Evans led Norman away. The three girls each took one bead, went their separate ways and all became big shots years later. They didn’t know Peter was saved, became the Lord of Heaven Temple and lost his memory in a battle. Later Peter became a stall owner and then was humiliated publicly by his girlfriend at a signing ceremony in front of his three sisters... EP 1:In the 720th year of the FH Calendar, Tommy Shelby, head of the Demon Sect, massacred 361 members of the Carefree Clan to seize their treasure, the four Divine Beads. The remaining disciples, including Peter and his three martial sisters, are forced to flee. Peter makes a heroic sacrifice to distract the pursuers, allowing his sisters to escape with the beads, while he faces imminent danger.Will Peter survive the encounter with the Demon Sect, and can his sisters safely protect the Divine Beads?

Emma, the heiress of James Real Estate, marries Henry Evans, who manipulates her with drugs, causing her to gain weight and face public ridicule. When her daughter tragically dies and her husband seizes the family business, Emma uncovers a shocking truth. On the brink of despair, she vows to reclaim her life and embarks on a fierce path of revenge. Will she rise from the ashes, or will her quest consume her?
 EP 1:Emma, devastated by the death of her daughter Alice, faces brutal accusations and insults from her husband Henry and mother-in-law Chloe. In a shocking twist, Henry reveals his true motives—he married Emma solely to gain control of James Real Estate. As tensions escalate, Henry attempts to kill Emma, leaving her fighting for her life.Will Emma survive Henry's murderous betrayal and seek vengeance for her daughter's death?

Zoey Green, a girl from a poor family, met Andrew Thomas, a CEO from an affluent family, in a karaoke. The two of them gradually developed feelings for each other, but what they didn’t know was that they were actually brother and sister. However, things became complicated when Zoey’s foster sister, Isabella Green, and Andrew’s foster sister, Ezra Thomas got involved in their relationship. How will the story unfold between Zoey and Andrew? EP 1:Zoey is blackmailed by an unknown person with compromising photos, threatening to expose her unless she takes care of a guest for them, leveraging her mother's medical condition.Will Zoey succumb to the blackmail or find a way out of this dangerous situation?

Lina Cooper was sold to traffickers by her biological father. Fifteen years later, her mother Melissa became a CEO, and her daughter, Sophie Smith (Lina Cooper), worked hard to earn money for her adoptive mother. However, the life-saving funds were squandered by Lina's adoptive brother, David Smith. When Sophie discovered the truth, David turned the situation against her. When she was at her wit's end, her mother arrived in time to save the day… EP 1:Lina Cooper is forcibly taken away from her mother, Melissa, by her father who sells her to traffickers to settle his debts, leaving Melissa devastated and vowing to find her daughter no matter what.Will Melissa be able to reunite with her daughter after this tragic separation?

Eric Stark was abandoned by his grandfather because of his snake-shaped birthmark. Luckily, Eric was saved and became the lord of Pantheon, married into the Parker family due to an agreement. However, the Parkers had been giving him a hard time. At an aristocratic banquet, Eric finally met his father Reed, who came to Mount City to look for him. At this banquet, nobody knew Eric was the lord of Pantheon and started humiliating him...
 EP 1:Reed Stark, the richest man in Mount City, is on his deathbed, lamenting his failure to find his abandoned son, Eric. His family comforts him, but reveals Eric is now with the Parker family, a second-rate family dependent on the Starks. Reed learns of Eric's snake-shaped birthmark, which led to his abandonment, and vows to make amends. The episode culminates with the revelation of an engagement between Eric and Mia, setting the stage for a dramatic reunion.Will Eric accept his family's sudden reappearance and the arranged marriage to Mia?

After Janine Cheung gave birth to a child, she found that her husband Keen Lame showed signs of something strange. A series of recent events hinted to her that he seemed to have betrayed her. Janine gave up everything and married thousands of miles away, decided to seek help from her good friend Mandy Chow in order to dig out the truth behind the matter. After the two of them investigated, the truth that surfaced shocked Janine...
 EP 1:Janine has a terrifying dream about her husband Keen not being there for her during a critical moment, which turns out to be just a nightmare. However, reality isn't much better as she discovers Keen forgot to bring milk powder for their baby. Meanwhile, neighbors gossip about a man cheating on his wife right after she gave birth, hinting at potential parallels to Janine's own suspicions about Keen.Will Janine uncover the truth about Keen's possible infidelity?

Shawn Chan, a world-famous businessman, lost both his parents when he was young. He was raised by his sister, Hanna Chan, but unfortunately they sepparated. After 30 years of searching, he finally found his sister. When he returned home with honor, he found that she was suffering in the brick factory under his company...
 EP 1:Shawn Chan finally reunites with his long-lost sister Hanna after 30 years of separation, discovering she works in a brick factory under his own company, but chooses not to reveal his true identity immediately.Will Hanna discover Shawn's true identity and how will she react to the shocking revelation?

Lillian Mont, CEO of the Mont Corporation, caught her fiancé cheating and, in a moment of anger, claimed a passing waiter, Alexander Reed, as her new boyfriend. What seemed like a random encounter took a strange turn when Alexander began appearing in her life. As her company faced a crisis and her vengeful ex-fiancé caused trouble, Alexander helped her navigate the dangers. Lillian soon began to suspect that Alexander’s identity wasn’t as simple as it seemed... EP 1:Lillian Mont, after discovering her fiancé Miles Shaw's affair with Veronica Chase, orchestrates a public confrontation with reporters to expose them, leading to Miles' dismissal from the company.Will Miles Shaw retaliate against Lillian for his public humiliation and dismissal?

House Willow has a tradition of passing down martial arts only to men, but Colleen Willow, passionate about martial arts, secretly learned the Iron Fist technique. For years, she hid her skills, seen by her family as a useless woman. When a formidable enemy defeated the Willow masters and the family faced ruin, Colleen could no longer stay silent. She revealed her strength, shocking everyone as the most talented fighter and the sole heir to the family's secret techniques. EP 1:Colleen Willow, a martial arts prodigy forbidden from learning her family's techniques due to her gender, receives a secret token symbolizing warrior spirit from her supportive Aunt. Meanwhile, Mia, another female family member, is captured and faces brutal punishment for secretly learning martial arts, igniting tensions within the Willow family and challenging their archaic rules.Will Colleen risk revealing her Iron Fist skills to save Mia from her cruel fate?

Hattie Julian lost her first husband early, leaving her to raise three kids alone. Victor Miller appears as a ray of hope. However, soon after their wedding, her three kids mysteriously drown, leaving Hattie overwhelmed by grief.
Years later, the sudden reappearance of Hattie's son brings a shocking truth: her kids are alive, and Victor is behind it all. Betrayed and outraged, Hattie fights to reunite her family and expose Victor's treachery... EP 1:Victor, despite being married to Hattie, secretly flirts with Tracy, promising her eternal love and even asking for a child. Meanwhile, Hattie's children innocently admire Victor, unaware of his deceit. The children's discovery of Victor's suspicious behavior with Tracy hints at the unraveling of his true intentions.Will the children expose Victor's betrayal to Hattie?

Nora, the orphan heir of the Dragon Clan, has no father or mother and has lived a hard life with her uncle and aunt since childhood. Relying on her own abilities, Nora earns a living by fortune-telling on the streets and begins her journey to find her parents. Fortunately, Nora's maternal grandfather's family locates her, and they are reunited. But will the Dragon Clan truly accept Nora? Who are her birth parents, and are they still alive? Will the family be able to reunite? EP 1:Nora, living a tough life with her aunt and uncle, struggles to earn her keep by fortune-telling on the streets. Her kind interaction with Grandpa Leonard, who offers her food without expecting payment, reveals her compassionate nature. When she learns about Grandma Grant's critical condition, Nora vows to help her wake up, hinting at her unique abilities and mysterious lineage. The mention of Carrie and a child who supposedly died adds suspense, suggesting there's more to Nora's past than meets the eye.Will Nora's mysterious abilities be enough to wake Grandma Grant, and what secrets does her lineage hold?

In middle age, Louis Kean suddenly experiences an epiphany and decides to pursue cultivation. Everyone thinks he's lost his mind. Yet he achieves mastery and ascends to immortality. During the Grand Ascension Ceremony, he receives a call from his son and senses something is wrong. Then he realizes a dire omen: the end of his bloodline. Therefore, He decides to intervene in the mortal world to have a good look. EP 1:Louis Kean is on the verge of achieving ascension to immortality when he receives a distressing call from his son, revealing serious family troubles, leading him to postpone his ascension to address the crisis.Will Louis be able to save his family and still achieve his dream of immortality?

Yolanda Wood, once the Duchess of the North, reunites with her daughter, Stella Xander. Struggling to control her sudden outbursts, Yolanda tries to protect her daughter from harassment by a security guard and bad guys. Embarking on desperate missions to rescue Stella, she faces unforeseen obstacles and life-threatening dangers. Will she manage to save her loved one, or will she fall into an even darker trap? EP 1:Yolanda Wood, the former Duchess of the North, reunites with her daughter Stella after twelve years apart. Amid the emotional reunion, Yolanda's PTSD triggers when a security guard harasses Stella, revealing her dangerous condition and her past as a respected military commander. Violet Blaze, Yolanda's disciple, warns Stella about her mother's fragile state and the risks of triggering her episodes.Will Yolanda's PTSD put Stella in even greater danger?

Quinn Carter is falsely accused of theft and humiliated by his wife Sophie Lynn's family. After a painful divorce, he's cast out with nothing. But Quinn's true identity as a wealthy heir is soon revealed, leading him to a new life and unexpected love. EP 1:Quinn Carter is falsely accused of stealing Simon's expensive jade pendant by his wife Sophie Lynn and her family, leading to a humiliating confrontation and his decision to file for divorce after revealing the pendant is actually his family heirloom.Will Quinn's true identity as a wealthy heir be revealed after the divorce?

Lily Parker, a determined young woman, moves to the city to make a living. After years of hard work, she rises to become a successful and admired businesswoman. However, when she returns to her village to help her fellow villagers, she gets trapped by her cousin, Clara Langley, in a scandal. After being subjected to harsh humiliation, she decides to stand up and fight for her dignity. EP 1:Lily Parker, a successful businesswoman, returns to her village only to be falsely accused by her cousin Clara of being a mistress who seduced Clara's husband. The scandal spreads quickly, tarnishing Lily's reputation and forcing her to pay a large sum of money to Clara to keep the situation under control.Will Lily be able to clear her name and expose Clara's deceitful schemes?

Sophie Sutton just returned when her father, Philip, schemed against her—getting her drunk and sending her to Henry Morton’s bed. Once best friends, now enemies, they were bound by the scars of a past fire. Forced into marriage, they fought openly but loved in all the wrong ways. Will they uncover the truth and reunite, or remain trapped in hatred? EP 1:Sophie Sutton returns to the country to find her brother, only to be entangled in a web of betrayal with her enemy, Henry Morton. Their past is marred by death and hatred, leading to a forced and contentious relationship. Sophie is blackmailed by Henry, who threatens her to keep their past affair a secret, while she is determined to seek revenge for her mother's death and find her missing brother. The episode ends with Sophie realizing she has been betrayed by someone she trusted.Will Sophie uncover the truth behind her brother's disappearance and her mother's death, or will Henry's threats silence her forever?

column1: Grace's Return: The Reversal of Fate
column4: In her past life, Grace Adler mistakenly identified her savior and was framed by the Sixth Prince, Xavier Windsor, and his concubine, Lillian Bennett, leading to her family's tragic demise. This time, with the memories of her past, Grace outsmarts Lillian, distances herself from Xavier, and helps the deposed Crown Prince, Roderick Windsor, reclaim his throne—only to discover that he is her true savior... EP 1:Grace Adler, having lived through the betrayal and demise of her family at the hands of Xavier Windsor and Lillian Bennett, finds herself mysteriously transported back in time three years. Armed with the knowledge of her tragic past, she vows to exact revenge on those who wronged her, starting with avoiding the mistakes that led to her family's downfall.Will Grace's foreknowledge be enough to alter her fate and bring justice to her enemies?

Reborn into a world of betrayal, Evelyn Snow refuses to repeat her past mistakes. Once, she was bound to the wrong spirit god and died at her sister Vanessa Snow's hands. But this time, Vanessa grabs Lucian Drake first—only to realize he's a heartless fraud. Evelyn chooses Rowan Ashford, the spirit who never awakened… until now. With rival scheming and power shifting, vengeance and love collide. When the grand battle arrives, who will claim their fate? EP 1:Evelyn Snow, reborn after her death at her sister Vanessa's hands, gets a second chance at the Snow Clan's Blood Pact Ritual, where she avoids her past mistake of binding to the deceitful Lucian Drake and instead chooses Rowan Ashford, a spirit who never awakened until now, setting the stage for a dramatic power shift and revenge.Will Evelyn's new choice lead to her vengeance or unforeseen consequences?

On the day of her difficult childbirth, Malanea Stewart was betrayed by both her sister and fiancé. To protect herself, she fled abroad with her only surviving son. Five years later, Malanea made a grand return with her son, seeking revenge on those who betrayed her, while secretly searching for her mother. Along the way, she discovers that her other son is still alive and that her first love is actually... EP 1:During a difficult childbirth, Malanea Stewart is betrayed by her fiancé Ryan and her sister Sophia, who conspire to let her die, revealing their affair and plans to take over the Stewart Group. Malanea vows revenge if she survives, while an unknown benefactor arrives too late to save her but rescues one of her children, sparking a desperate search for Malanea.Will Malanea survive to enact her revenge, and who is the mysterious figure searching for her?

To guard the Dragon Vein, Master of Warrior Gavin Neeson married  Hailey Bates and supported her career sneakily. But Hailey despised him and divorced him after winning a big deal. Gavin no longer hid his status because the easterners coveted the Dragon Vein and created super warriors by the nuclear sewage. To expel the easterners  Gavin started to collect tools...
 EP 1:Gavin Neeson, the Master of Warrior, is unexpectedly approached by socialites from top consortia who propose to him, revealing his hidden status and the high stakes surrounding the Dragon Vein.Will Gavin accept any of these proposals, and how will this affect his mission to protect the Dragon Vein?

Chloe and her brother Ryan set up a humble roadside stall during an unexpected snowstorm on Alden Expressway, offering hot noodles at a minimal price to stranded drivers. Their goodwill, however, stirs envy in Leah, who spreads rumors and incites trouble. As tensions rise and the storm worsens, unexpected challenges force everyone to confront the consequences of their actions. EP 1:During a severe snowstorm that traps travelers on Alden Expressway, Chloe and her brother Ryan set up a roadside stall selling affordable hot noodles to help the stranded. Despite Chloe's injury and their minimal profit, they prioritize helping others over making money, sparking both gratitude and envy among the stranded drivers.Will Chloe and Ryan's act of kindness continue to unite the stranded travelers, or will envy and desperation lead to conflict?

Betrayed and killed by her family, Yani Stark is reborn on the morning of her ill-fated one-night stand. She escapes, fleeing overseas to protect her unborn child from family conspiracies. Years later, she returns with medical expertise and evidence of her stepmother's crimes. As she takes down her enemies, she rekindles romance with the child's father.  Along the way, she also finds her true love.
 EP 1:Yani Stark confronts her sister about the kidnapping of her child, only to discover the horrifying truth that her family considers her child a disgrace and has disposed of them. She realizes her family's betrayal goes deeper as she recalls being poisoned, and vows to find her child and seek justice.Will Yani be able to rescue her child and uncover the full extent of her family's treachery?

After being abused by my parents and sister, I finally get lucky and meet the most handsome and powerful man of the city! Little do I know, his nephew was my highschool sweetheart! What is going to happen in this love-triangle?  EP 1:Penny, recently out of prison, unexpectedly meets her former rival Karen at Mr. Eric's matchmaking event. Karen, now a candidate to marry Mr. Eric, taunts Penny about her criminal past and lowly job, while Penny vows to clear her name. Meanwhile, Mr. Eric is pressured to choose a bride to continue the Stinson family legacy.Will Penny succeed in clearing her name and will Mr. Eric choose Karen as his bride?

Due to a birth mix - up, Lucas King was raised by the Wells. When the truth emerged 20 years later, he chose luxury over his real parents. But the Wells betrayed him, leading to his death at 40. On his deathbed, Lucas King was reborn 20 years ago. This time, as he sets out to change fate, what unexpected obstacles await him on his journey to repay his biological parents? EP 1:Lucas King, betrayed and abandoned by the Wells family who raised him, dies in despair only to be reborn 20 years earlier, realizing the true love of his biological parents and vowing to change his fate.Will Lucas succeed in repaying his parents and avoiding the mistakes of his past life?

Seventeen years ago, a mysterious portal brought Aaron Clark to the modern world, where he was saved by Nadia Lowe. But fate didn't grant this kind girl a happy life. Betrayed and killed by her beloved Aaron and her own son, Nadia is reborn ten years before. This time, she's determined to rewrite her destiny… EP 1:Nadia Lowe, once betrayed and executed by her beloved Aaron and their son Edison, is reborn with a chance to rewrite her fate, opting to close the portal between past and present for a life focused on herself, including agreeing to the demolition of her supermarket for a fresh start.Will Nadia's decision to close the portal truly grant her the new life she seeks, or will the past find a way to catch up with her?

Just before her wedding, Sue Scott is diagnosed with terminal stomach cancer. To spare her fiance, Johnny Parker, from the pain of losing her, she carefully stages a scandalous affair to end their relationship. In her final days, she decides to make five farewell videos—her last messages to the world—hoping that Johnny can move on without guilt... EP 1:Sue Scott, diagnosed with terminal stomach cancer, stages a scandalous affair with her agent to push her fiancé Johnny away, sparing him the pain of her impending death. She reveals her plan to create five farewell videos as her last messages to the world.Will Johnny ever discover the truth behind Sue's heartbreaking deception?

Seraphina Renwick, once Darythia's revered guardian, returns victorious to find her daughter, Celeste, gravely harmed by invaders. In a desperate rescue, she unknowingly saves Lilith, an imposter who took Celeste's place. Believing Lilith to be her own daughter, Seraphina abandons her past to raise Lilith, only to suffer relentless betrayal. Meanwhile, Celeste, now Halynd's wealthiest woman, searches for her lost mother, setting the stage for a shocking revelation. EP 1:Seraphina Renwick, the revered War Goddess of Phoenix Hall, returns victorious after a decade-long battle against Azuma, eager to reunite with her daughter Celeste. However, upon arriving at Bluehaven Primary School, she witnesses a fire where Celeste is trapped. In a desperate rescue, Seraphina saves a girl she believes to be her daughter, unaware it's actually Lilith, an imposter who had tormented Celeste. The episode sets the stage for a tragic misunderstanding and future betrayals.Will Seraphina discover the truth about Lilith before it's too late?

As cousins who grew up together, they went on blind dates and married at the same time. However, Mary Kane's husband was successful, while Karen Jones became a young widow and led a miserable life. Driven by jealousy, Karen dragged Mary to their deaths at the housewarming banquet. But they were both reborn twenty years ago. Looking at the familiar yet strange blind date partners, they made choices completely different from their previous lives and thus embarked on new life trajectories. EP 1:At a housewarming feast, Karen, consumed by jealousy, murders Mary before committing suicide, only for both women to be reborn twenty years earlier at their initial blind date. Karen, now aware of the future, aggressively pursues Mary's original partner, Nick Lester, determined to claim the prosperous life she believes should have been hers.Will Karen succeed in altering their destinies, or will Mary find a way to reclaim her future?

Laura Davis was reborn after being ruined by Olivia White with scratch-off tickets in her past life. On James Carter's proposal day, she tries to change fate, yet James still has an accident.
She uncovers Olivia's plots to control her family. After a fight, Olivia's power fades. In the hospital, as James proposes, a scratched ticket shows up and he smiles oddly. What's the next twist? EP 1:Laura Davis relives her tragic 25th birthday when Olivia White's scratch-off tickets led to the deaths of her fiancé, brother, and parents, culminating in her own demise. Now reborn, Laura faces Olivia once more, determined to change her fate and uncover the truth behind Olivia's sinister plans.Will Laura succeed in altering her destiny and stopping Olivia this time?

In a remote mountain, herbalist Amelia Frost unexpectedly rescues the disguised, injured Emperor Edmund Hawke. A month in a hidden cave kindles forbidden love. Later, forced into a dangerous marriage, Amelia hides her secret child whose extraordinary art sparks the Emperor’s quest. Will fate finally reunite this fractured family? EP 1:Emperor Edmund Hawke's secret past with herbalist Amelia Frost is uncovered when a lead reveals she may be carrying his child, prompting a nationwide celebration and a desperate search, while Amelia faces a horrifying fate at the hands of the Williams family who seek to exploit her unborn child for their own gain.Will Edmund reach Amelia in time to save their child from the Williams family's sinister plot?

A CEO and a barista’s flash marriage spirals into chaos as hidden agendas, a jealous ex, and a shocking family secret unravel. Will their hearts survive the lies—or crash harder than their hasty "I do’s"? Drama, heat, and humor guaranteed. EP 1:A dating app meet-up turns disastrous when Emily discovers her match, James, is not who he claimed to be, leading to a public confrontation after he attempts to take inappropriate pictures.Will Emily's quick thinking and the stranger's intervention expose James' true intentions or escalate the situation further?

Seren Jones works tirelessly to care for her ailing mother-in-law, only to discover that her husband, Leonard Lee, has proposed to his first love, Anna. Determined to break free, she divorces him and joins Marcus Carter’s company. But just as she starts anew, Leonard and Anna conspire against her, pulling her into a storm of betrayal and revenge. Can she take control of her own destiny? EP 1:Seren Jones, who has been sacrificing her own health to care for her mother-in-law and support her husband, Leonard Lee, discovers a shocking betrayal when she sees him proposing to his first love, Anna, with an expensive necklace while she is working hard as a delivery girl.Will Seren confront Leonard about his betrayal and choose to reclaim her life?

Mute girl Sherry Jones was separated from her mother, Marilyn Quincy, in an accident as a child. While Marilyn became a billionaire CEO, Sherry lived in poverty, controlled by a scumbag. After he betrayed her for a rich woman and framed her for infidelity, Marilyn and her adopted son, Zach, stepped in. Noticing Sherry’s resemblance to her lost daughter, Marilyn followed her and discovered the shocking truth... EP 1:A mother's desperate attempt to save her mute daughter from being sold by her own father leads to a tense standoff, showcasing the depths of parental love and betrayal.Will the mother succeed in rescuing her daughter from this harrowing fate?

At 18, Hannah Caldwell is adopted by the Caldwell family, only to be betrayed by her sister Juliet and imprisoned for ten years. After her release, she flees to Paris, leaving behind a life of pain. Five years later, she returns as Vivian Warren—stronger, fiercer, and ready for justice. But can she truly reclaim her life, or will the past haunt her forever? EP 1:Hannah Caldwell returns from the orphanage to her adoptive family, only to be betrayed by her sister Juliet, who frames her for starting a fire and stealing her life. Despite Hannah's pleas of innocence, the family sides with Juliet, leading to Hannah's wrongful imprisonment and the loss of everything she held dear.Will Hannah ever find justice for the wrongs committed against her?

In the year 129 of Zephoria, General Ethan Vale of the Skywing Legion led his troops to victory against Estren invaders. However, betrayed by traitors, he was stripped of his title and lost his family—except for his young daughter, Annie. Years later, as she stirs trouble with her righteous spirit, Ethan, disguised, decides to train and educate her. Let's see how he will help her before she regains her sight. EP 1:In the 129th year of Zephoria, General Ethan Vale leads the Skywing Legion to a desperate battle against Estren invaders, facing betrayal and overwhelming odds, yet managing to hold the Zephoria military flag high, symbolizing their unbroken spirit.Will General Ethan Vale survive the betrayal and make it back to Zephoria?

Reborn with a mission, Olivia Summers is determined to change her father’s fate, shaped by repeated betrayal for his kindness. She exposes Joanna’s scheme, clearing his name. But Joanna fights back with new lies. With intelligence and evidence, can Summers uncover the truth? Will her father realize that kindness must have limits? Will the wicked finally face justice? EP 1:Olivia confronts Joanna at her father's funeral, accusing her of driving him to death with false allegations of harassment. Joanna brazenly admits to framing him for personal gain, leading to a violent confrontation where Olivia is threatened. The episode ends with a shocking twist as Olivia's supposedly deceased father appears to wish her a happy birthday.Will Olivia's father reveal the truth behind his apparent death and help bring Joanna to justice?

Born gifted but despised for her lowly origins, Isabella Carter was framed for her mother's death by jealous relatives. Honoring her mother's final wish, Isabella hid her talents, enduring scorn and accusations. Only during the final imperial exam did she discover the shocking truth—and at that instant, her true brilliance emerged, unstoppable and dazzling. EP 1:Isabella's exceptional talents are recognized by her father and others, sparking jealousy and conflict within the family. Her mother warns her to stay humble due to their lowly status, but Isabella refuses to accept a life of submission. The tension escalates when Isabella's stepmother, Margaret, is forced to choose between her own life or Isabella's.Will Isabella's defiance lead to her downfall, or will her brilliance shine despite the threats against her?

Abandoned by her lover during pregnancy, Fiona Quinn is left with a daughter plagued by a fatal heart condition. Driven by envy, she swaps her baby with a Wealthy person’s healthy girl, granting her daughter an opulent life. But as secrets unravel, a shocking truth looms—will maternal bonds survive deception? EP 1:Fiona Quinn, abandoned by her lover George after revealing her pregnancy, faces the devastating news that her daughter has a congenital heart disease requiring an expensive heart transplant. In a desperate act driven by love and despair, Fiona swaps her sick child with the healthy daughter of the wealthy Scott family, ensuring her own child a life of luxury while she takes on the role of nanny to care for the Scott's daughter, who also suffers from a heart condition.Will Fiona's deception be discovered, and at what cost to both families?

Christine Lewis faces divorce as she struggles with her husband. Meanwhile, Michael Lewis and his family search for long-lost sister. Secrets are revealed and loyalties are tested as Christine develops complex relationships with influential figures such as Michael. In a world where even the most precious bonds can be shattered by a single misstep, can they finally achieve their goals? EP 1:A mother is in critical condition during childbirth due to severe hemorrhaging, but her husband prioritizes an auspicious birth time over her life-threatening situation, leading to tragic consequences and revealing a cold family dynamic focused on lineage and fortune over maternal health.What shocking news does Mr. Michael receive about Chrissy, and how will it unravel the family's carefully maintained facade?

Tricked by her stepmother, Grace Williams is forced to marry the disabled Victor Harrison. In the Harrison family, she faces endless challenges, using her wit to turn the tide. As she and Victor fight back against hidden schemes, their fates become irreversibly intertwined. EP 1:Grace and her mother are betrayed and forced out of their home by Grace's stepmother and her accomplices. Grace's mother is sent to a mental hospital while Grace is coerced into marrying into the powerful Harrison family as part of a sinister plot. Grace vows to save her mother and seek revenge against those who wronged them.Will Grace succeed in her quest for revenge and rescue her mother from captivity?

Seraphina Vale's mother, Eulalie Finch, runs the renowned Immortals Bistro, famous for its secret Red-Braised Pork. Despite Seraphina's endless pleas, her mother refuses to reveal the dish's secret. But when classmates begin vanishing mysteriously, Seraphina uncovers a hidden truth—one that has been locked behind that mysterious door for years… EP 1:Seraphina's mother's diner transforms into the famous Immortals Bistro after the introduction of the mysterious Red-Braised Pork, which attracts countless customers but is served to only one person a day. Seraphina becomes suspicious when a regular customer hints that the dish might be made of human meat, prompting her to investigate the truth behind her mother's secret recipe.What dark secret is hidden in the Red-Braised Pork that Seraphina is determined to uncover?

When Nancy Simpson accidentally claims ruthless tycoon Jasper Lawrence as her boyfriend to escape humiliation, he retaliates with a ruthless proposal: "be my wife, heal my grandmother, then vanish.” But their icy deal melts fast as forbidden sparks ignite—until Jasper uncovers Nancy's explosive secret: she's the missing piece to a puzzle he'd kill to solve. Can a contract built on lies survive truths dangerous... or addictive? EP 1:Nancy Simpson witnesses a miracle cure by Dr. Mid-Nite, who is in hiding, and then gets invited to an elite Friends Party in Landon where the wealthy and powerful Jasper Lawrence might attend.Will Nancy's encounter with Jasper Lawrence at the Friends Party lead to unexpected sparks or dangerous revelations?

The world’s top chef disappears at his peak. During a local cooking contest, Skylar, a humble prep cook, unveils himself as the lost master. Betrayed and maimed, he loses his hands and becomes a beggar. Armed with just one simple dish, can Skylar overcome his enemies and reclaim his culinary throne? EP 1:Skylar Fong, the world-renowned Master Chef, achieves unprecedented success by winning the World Culinary Championship for the third time, earning the title of Grand Slam in Aetheria. However, amidst the celebrations and lucrative offers from top restaurants, Skylar mysteriously vanishes without a trace, leaving the culinary world in shock and speculation about his fate.Will Skylar Fong ever return to reclaim his title as the Master Chef?

Zanisha Russell, a humble vegetable vendor in the capital, accidentally saves Prince Isaac Russell from an assassination attempt. After that, they become each other’s only source of support. Meanwhile, Zanisha’s son, Mateo Perry, marries into the powerful James family, subjecting her to relentless humiliation and life-threatening danger. When Isaac returns to the palace, Zanisha is crowned Empress Dowager. But the ambitious Princess Jane, hungry for power, begins to weave a deadly conspiracy... EP 1:Zanisha, a humble vegetable vendor, risks her life and her son's safety to protect a young prince from assassins, leading to a confrontation with bandits and her own family's betrayal.Will Zanisha's bravery cost her everything, or will she find an unexpected ally in the prince she saved?

In an age of tyranny, scholars faced brutal persecution. Once a revered sage, Felix Cooper helped the Emperor of Chana reshape history before seeking a quiet life with Prince Hecto as a humble teacher. Yet, local elites, corrupt officials, and martial clans refuse to let him be. As pressure mounts and even great scholars turn against him, Felix stands firm. But if reason fails—then strength shall prevail! EP 1:Felix Cooper, once a revered sage, faces the Sage of War in a deadly confrontation, where his transcendence beyond the limits of a sage is revealed, shocking his enemy and setting the stage for a deeper conflict.What power does Felix truly possess, and how will it reshape the fate of the empire?
column5: ['Return of the King', 'Good vs. Evil', 'Karma Payback']

column4: Once a top model, betrayed and left for dead—now she returns, stunning and unstoppable, ready for the ultimate revenge. EP 1:Ava, a former top model, confronts her husband Damien and best friend Isabella for their betrayal, which led to her presumed death and the loss of her baby. She vows revenge, while flashbacks reveal the cruel and calculating nature of their affair.Will Ava succeed in making Damien and Isabella pay for their treachery?

Six years ago, Robin Carter and Barney Rand shared an intimate night. Upon waking, Robin erased Barney’s memory of that night and retreated to the secluded Azure Mount, where she gave birth to their daughter, Peggy Carter. Six years later, Peggy encountered Barney. Barney felt an overwhelming sense of familiarity... EP 1:Peggy, the six-year-old daughter of Robin and Barney, decides to venture down the mountain to find a handsome and rich husband for her mother, leading her to an unexpected encounter with Barney Rand, the 'Tyrant of Rivercity', whom she boldly claims as her new daddy.Will Barney recognize Peggy as his daughter and how will Robin react to this unexpected reunion?

Beneath autumn's crimson canopy, childhood lovers Forrest Simons and Jade Sanders were violently severed—all because of the Mad Emperor's falling blade, and a throne harboring dark secrets.
    Seven winters passed. Forrest rebels grasped by misguided hatred. He hunts the throne unaware—like Philomela, Jade's spirit bears silent witness. Will the nightingale’s requiem be sung before vengeance devours what love once built? EP 1:Forrest Simons, exiled after his family's execution by the Emperor, returns after seven years seeking vengeance, unaware of the truth behind Jade Sanders' rise to consort and her suffering.Will Forrest discover the truth about Jade's sacrifices before his vengeance consumes them both?

Lillian Caldwell, born into a medical family, lost her mother young. Her father soon brought home a mistress and her daughter. Drugged and framed during a royal medical selection, Lillian was cast out in disgrace and nearly died. Six years later, now a Sage Doctor's disciple raising a son alone, she's summoned to treat the Empress Dowager — only to face a shocking truth about her child's father. Can she survive the storm that follows? EP 1:Lillian is falsely accused of disgracing her family by being pregnant with a palace guard's child during the female doctors' selection, despite being drugged by her deceitful stepsister. Her father disowns her, and she pleads for mercy for her unborn child, only to discover her real mother is dead and her stepmother's cruelty knows no bounds.Will Lillian survive the brutal beating and uncover the full extent of her stepsister's treachery?

Ten years ago, billionaire Ian was jailed for killing his ex-wife and her adulterer after they caused his elder daughter's death. Now free, he finds his younger daughter, Evelyn, who believes he's utterly guilty. He keeps the truth to himself, but when he learns she's been abused, he shows up and reveals his strength. Misled by her husband, Evelyn wants to get back at him. Just when will she realize that she's wrong? EP 1:After years of separation, Ian reunites with his daughter Evelyn, who still believes he is guilty of murder, while he silently protects her from her abusive husband.Will Evelyn ever discover the truth about her father's past and her husband's deceit?

Six years ago, Lena Hartley, a college student, fell in love with Ethan Vale, but they were forced to separate due to the interference of Lena's father. Heartbroken, Ethan lied and claimed he had fallen for someone else, leaving Lena devastated. Six years later, they reunited. Can the two who once deeply loved each other rekindle their romance? EP 1:Lena and Ethan's love is tested when Lena's father confronts Ethan, revealing that his relationship with Lena is ruining her dreams of becoming a doctor. Ethan, realizing his presence is harming Lena's future, makes the heartbreaking decision to break up with her on her birthday, shattering their love with a cruel lie.Will Lena ever discover the truth behind Ethan's painful decision?

Zak said it's customary in his family that couples don't get wedding licenses. So Eva only held a strange ceremony with him. The day after that, Zak joined the army. Seven years hadn't they met. When their son Ian cries for Dad, Eva decides to find Zak. However, another wife appears from nowhere, bullying Ian. What will Eva do when Ian's at risk? EP 1:Eva, who has been waiting for her husband Zak for seven years after a traditional masked wedding ceremony, decides to visit him in the army camp with their son Ian, only to discover that Zak has another family there.Will Eva confront Zak about his secret family?

column1: My Elegant Wife, My Unrivaled Man
column4:
Eighteen years ago, the Warlord learned that the Lambert family's four children possessed the Dragon-Phoenix Pendants and ordered their extermination. As assassins closed in, the boy Jonathan Lambert sacrificed himself to divert them, vowing to reunite with his sisters through their jade pendants if he survived.
Time shifts like the tide—when they meet again, what trials and revelations await them on their path forward? EP 1:Elena Yates is determined to meet the revenue target of Illumina Corp, but the meeting is abruptly interrupted when news about her fiancé Jonathan surfaces. Felix Thompson, once the Warlord's lapdog, is confronted by the sisters, revealing he knows Jonathan's whereabouts.Will Felix lead the sisters to Jonathan, and what dangers await them?

Imperial Heir Mason Shaw is betrayed by his fiancée Ivy Young. Surviving as a beggar, he meets Zoe Stone, a courtesan with a mysterious past. As they grow closer, Mason uncovers a conspiracy involving his brother Miles Shaw and foreign allies. With Zoe's help, Mason fights to reclaim his throne and clear her father's name. But as secrets unravel, their love and loyalty are tested. Will they triumph over betrayal and deceit to find a future together? EP 1:Imperial Heir Mason Shaw is betrayed by his fiancée Ivy Young and his brother Miles Shaw, who reveals Ivy is carrying his child. Left for dead, Mason survives but loses his voice to poison. He is found by Zoe Stone, a courtesan, who offers him shelter at the Chamber of Elegance. Despite his fall from grace, Mason vows revenge against Miles and Ivy.Will Mason Shaw reclaim his throne and take revenge on those who betrayed him?

Chloe Sinclair accidentally saves Gavin Thornton from an ambush. That fateful night sets destiny in motion. She becomes his assistant, and their feelings grow. But when Chloe gets pregnant, danger forces her to flee with their child. Gavin searches tirelessly, but failes. Years later, they reunite, and Gavin wanna bring them home. But his family stands in their way. Can they overcome the odds and find happiness? EP 1:Chloe Sinclair accidentally saves Gavin Thornton from an ambush at a hotel, leading to an unexpected financial reward and a mysterious connection between them.What secrets will unfold as Chloe and Gavin's paths continue to intertwine?

Jordan Lee, the visionary founder of Future Group, hides his true identity and disguises himself as a beggar to test people's kindness. One day, Bella Tanner stops and gives him some money, unaware of who he really is. Amused by her generosity, Jordan agrees to her unusual request—to pose as her boyfriend for a family gathering. As the two embark on this unexpected arrangement, secrets, surprises, and sparks begin to unfold… EP 1:Jordan Lee, the richest man in Daxia, disguises himself as a beggar to test people's kindness. Bella Tanner, unaware of his true identity, shows him generosity, leading to an unexpected encounter with her ex, Gavin Shaw, who mocks Jordan's current state.Will Bella discover Jordan's true identity, and how will Gavin react when he finds out the beggar is actually the powerful Jordan Lee?

column1: Wait, I'm Actually A Golden Heiress!
column4: Winnie Morgan is cast out of the Morgan family after they find their biological daughter. With nowhere to go, Winnie is taken in by Marcus York's grandmother, who arranges for her to work at his company. As they spend more time together, their feelings for each other grow, while Winnie's true identity slowly begins to unfold... EP 1:Winnie is heartlessly cast out by the Morgan family upon discovering she is not their biological daughter and is left homeless, only to be kindly taken in by Nana York, who offers her shelter and comfort.Will Winnie find stability and acceptance within the York family?

In her past life,Cordelia endured hardships to become an immortal and married a celestial official,living merrily —yet her best friend , Seraphina consumed by jealousy, murdered her. They were both reborn by divine mercy.This time, Cordelia choseto marry the humble gate keeper Alexander with a mysterious background and Seraphina became a vengeful wife. With the divine heritage awakening, their fate was changed again... EP 1:Cordelia, now the Empress of the Celestial Realm, is confronted by her jealous childhood friend Seraphina, who reveals her resentment and attempts to kill Cordelia, blaming her for her own misfortunes. Cordelia reflects on her past life's choices, wishing for a simpler life with a kind husband, only to find herself back at the moment of her arranged marriage, hinting at a potential time loop or rebirth.Will Cordelia's wish for a peaceful life come true, or will Seraphina's vengeance alter their fates once more?

There's a saying that the country Zaryndor is about to launch a quantum computer designed by the Unrivaled National Hero. However, as for Daniel Prescott, all he wants is to end his job and go back home to get more time with his wife Sophie. But women know ambition and betrayal. What will Daniel get when he chooses family but not career?
 EP 1:Daniel Prescott, the national hero of Zaryndor, has completed his groundbreaking quantum computer project and is set to receive a noble title. However, he prioritizes reuniting with his fiancée, Sophie Quinn, over the ceremony, revealing his deep commitment to family. Meanwhile, preparations for a strategic partnership between Titan Holdings and The Quinn Group hint at underlying tensions and surprises yet to unfold.Will Daniel's return bring the reunion he desires, or will hidden agendas disrupt his plans?

Joann Frank fought for the country and then retired to live a common life with her daughter Ruby. Ruby was bullied by Xaver Charles and other hooligans. Randolf Charles asked a spy organization called Manton to kidnap Ruby. In order to save her daughter, Joann helped her student Nelly Larry to wipe out the organization. But the brothers joined the foreign force to kidnap Ruby again. This time, can Joann save her daughter and break the conspiracy of the foreign force? EP 1:Joann Frank, a retired soldier living a peaceful life with her daughter Ruby, is visited by General Nelly Larry who seeks her help for an undisclosed trouble, but Joann refuses, wanting only to protect her daughter's safety.Will Joann's refusal to help General Larry lead to unforeseen dangers for her and Ruby?

Nate lost his memory and is set to marry someone else. Alex fights to bring him back. When love shot backward — will it heal, or break them forever? EP 1:Miss Brown pressures the authorities to find her missing son, Nate, while a mysterious woman reflects on Nate's lost memory and a bullet that seems to have a divine message. Meanwhile, Alex receives an unexpected call from Carl, hinting at a shocking turn of events.Will Alex uncover the truth behind Nate's disappearance and the bullet's secret before it's too late?

Nancy Dean, the undefeated eight-time world table tennis champion perishes in a shopping mall fire. By a twist of fate, her soul transmigrates into the body of 10-year-old Sasha Holmes. Armed with a champion's prowess, Sasha shocks everyone who challenge her. When foreign rivals insult the nation, can Sasha crush the opposition? EP 1:Nancy Dean, the world table tennis champion, dies in a mall fire but her soul transmigrates into 10-year-old Sasha Holmes. At her grandfather's birthday banquet, Sasha shocks everyone by returning an infamous unbeatable serve, revealing her extraordinary skills.Can Sasha continue to surprise everyone and uphold the Holmes family legacy in table tennis?

In a time of ambition and sacrifice, Catherine Reed stood by Malick Stone through poverty and struggle, only to be repaid with lies, betrayal, and ruin. Framed and abandoned, she chooses to walk away from the past and into a future rebuilt by her own hands. But some betrayals don't stay buried for long... EP 1:Catherine Reed, after five years of unwavering support and sacrifice for Malick Stone, finds herself betrayed when his old flame, Anne Shaw, re-enters his life. A workplace accident, blamed on Catherine, becomes the final straw as Malick dismisses her injury and prioritizes Anne. Realizing that their love was never enough to eclipse his past, Catherine decides to leave, signing her own medical forms and sending a farewell letter, marking the end of their relationship.Will Catherine's departure awaken Malick to the depth of his betrayal, or is this the beginning of her rise from the ashes?

Leo Clark was once a prodigy in the bathhouse industry, but his cousin Julian Young betrayed him and stole his place. Fortunately, Leo was saved by Wendy Shah of the Bathing Temple. The Shanko Institute arrived, seeking to acquire it with AI-powered bath technology. Who is the mastermind? Can Leo defend the traditions of the bathhouse world? EP 1:Leo Clark, once celebrated as the God of Bathing, mysteriously disappears during an award ceremony, only to be replaced by the self-proclaimed King of Bathing. Meanwhile, Leo, now a cripple, struggles to regain his former glory under the care of Wendy Shah, but faces skepticism and hostility from those around him.Will Leo uncover the truth behind his downfall and reclaim his title as the God of Bathing?

Iris Brown and Asher Hunter fall in love through a chance encounter. On the day Asher plans to propose, a car accident erases a year of memories. Manipulated by his mother and fiancée Chloe Wilson, Asher turns against Iris. Facing betrayal and heartbreak, Iris fights to restore his lost memories—unaware that a shocking truth awaits... EP 1:Iris is ambushed by debt collectors who threaten her physically, but a mysterious stranger intervenes to save her, leading to a violent confrontation.Who is the mysterious stranger, and why did he risk his life to save Iris?

Kung Fu Queen Leslie Lewis' soul transmigrates into Lindsey Yeats, her late disciple's daughter. Facing clan strife and Landon Henry's dojo raid for the Stormlash, can she crush all challengers? EP 1:Leslie Lewis, the renowned Kungfu Queen, tragically dies in a venue collapse, only for her soul to transmigrate into the body of her late disciple's daughter, Lindsey Yeats, who is considered hopeless in martial arts. The episode reveals Lindsey's family facing pressure to hand over their kwoon, setting the stage for a new chapter in the Kungfu Queen's legacy.Will Leslie, now in Lindsey's body, rise to reclaim her title and protect her disciple's legacy?

In her past life, Anna Stacy was wrongfully blamed for her sister Karen's miscarriage and murdered by Karen's husband, Brian Wood. Reborn on the day of the tragedy, Anna's determined to change her fate and outsmart those who betrayed her. Will she survive this second chance? EP 1:Anna Stacy relives the tragic day of her sister Karen's miscarriage and her own murder, realizing the conspiracy behind the seat arrangement for the play, orchestrated by Scott to frame her.Will Anna be able to alter the course of events and save herself this time?

column1: A Nobody? No, I'm Rich Baby!
column4: Rowan has been in love with Clara for five years, and they are finally getting married. At the ceremony, Clara's greed is raised. She asks for money and money, despising Rowan for never providing what she deserves. While she thinks Rowan is nobody, a CEO fiancee awaits him back in the clan he renounced... EP 1:Rowan is finally marrying Clara after five years of love, but at the wedding, Clara's true greedy nature is revealed as she publicly humiliates Rowan for his lack of wealth. Meanwhile, Chloe, the CEO fiancée Rowan left behind, arrives to try and bring him back to his wealthy family, revealing Rowan's hidden high-status background.Will Rowan choose love with the ungrateful Clara or return to his wealthy roots with Chloe?

Reclaimed from the orphanage by her wealthy biological parents, Charlene envisioned embracing a blessed life, only to discover a more adored adopted daughter Elin. Just out of the orphanage, her family committed perjury to seal her in jail. Yet when she turned to leave... the architects of her ruin began clutching at her shadow. EP 1:Charlene Leen, released from prison after five years, returns to her wealthy family only to face continued rejection and accusations of harming Elin Bennett, revealing deep-seated family conflicts and her unresolved past.Will Charlene uncover the truth about Elin's accident and clear her name?

Years ago, three powerful sects launched a brutal assault against the Immortal Cult to seize a forbidden spell. Lucas Lennox, the cult leader’s son, was thrown into a ravine—but survived. Raised in exile, trained in secret, Lucas returns to revive his fallen sect. But the martial world has changed… and old enemies are watching. EP 1:Zayden Lennox is forced to choose between his two sons, Fredo and Lucas, when the enemy Chael Penn demands the incomplete Soul-Binding Spell scripture. He chooses Fredo, believing in his martial arts future, leaving Lucas to be thrown into the abyss, while Fredo betrays his family by siding with Penn.Will Lucas survive the abyss and return for revenge?

Years after a one-night stand, she returns with a child—love reignites, and secrets unfold...... EP 1:A woman reveals her pregnancy to her professor, deciding to take a gap year to have the baby despite the challenges of being a single mom. Meanwhile, she faces financial struggles when her son Theo's medical treatment costs $50,000, and her insurance doesn't cover it. In another scene, a father pressures his son to produce an heir, highlighting family legacy concerns.Will she manage to cover Theo's medical bills, and how will the father-son dynamic evolve under the pressure of legacy?

Ryan Lyn, the former MMA champion, retired due to his anger issues. On the way home, he and his pregnant wife got abused by other passengers at the train station. What would he do? Would he unleash his inner beast? EP 1:Ryan Lyn, a former MMA champion with bipolar disorder, struggles to control his anger for the sake of his pregnant wife Maya and their unborn child, but when a violent altercation at the train station pushes him to his limit, he faces the ultimate test of restraint.Will Ryan succumb to his rage and unleash his inner beast to protect his family?

A childhood sweetheart returning after years apart, or a longtime lover who suddenly walks away – which one will win a man's heart?  After three years with her boyfriend, Quiana faces the return of his first love, Nora. Using subtle manipulation, Nora gradually causes Quiana to feel neglected and overlooked by her boyfriend. Now, Quiana decides to break up with him on their third anniversary, exactly 30 days away...

Seven years ago, Shane Jones saved Zoe Perry from heartbreak, leading to an unexpected connection. Despite a secret marriage and a child, Zoe harbors resentment, believing Shane took advantage of her. When her past love, Jack, returns, Shane withdraws, but hidden truths threaten to unravel everything... EP 1:Shane Jones decides to leave Zoe Perry after seven years of a secret marriage, prompted by the return of her past love. Their child, Noa, requests three more chances for Zoe to accept them before they leave.Will Zoe take the chance to reconcile with Shane and Noa before it's too late?

In a past life, Luke was dragged down by Leonard to perish together with him, out of jealousy. Now reborn, Leonard races Luke to choose the master who seems to account for everything Luke attained. But is that really the case? Is the other master simply ordinary? Is this new master of Leonard truly good? The story is filled with love, hate, and vengeance. Listen closely, and here it unfolds... EP 1:Leonard, jealous of Luke's success in their past life, gets reborn and races to choose Luke's former master, Kyle Chase, to alter his fate. Luke, also reborn, finds himself in a disadvantaged position but remains determined to prove his worth without a master. The conflict escalates as Leonard gloats over his perceived victory, while Luke's resilience hints at an unexpected twist when a mysterious figure steps in to accept him as a disciple.Who is the mysterious figure that accepts Luke as a disciple, and how will this change the power dynamics between him and Leonard?

Bryan Allen, leader of the Nightshade Sect, survives a poisoning attempt by his brother Kevin, who seeks his throne. Accidentally, he's hit by Archer Freeman's car and taken to her family's martial arts club, which holds the antidote to his poison. When the Ironfist Gang (allied with Kevin) arrives to collect protection money, Bryan defends villagers, but his true identity is about to be exposed... EP 1:Bryan Allen, leader of the Nightshade Sect, is betrayed by his brother Kevin, who poisons him in a bid for power. After being accidentally hit by Archer Freeman's car, Bryan is taken to her family's martial arts club, where the antidote to his poison might be found. Meanwhile, Kevin's forces are hunting for Bryan to ensure his demise.Will Bryan survive the poisoning and uncover his brother's treachery in time?

Claire would've never thought her marriage scheme to save Granny would target the man who silently loved her all along.  With no money for glasses, she fails to recognize Ethan Lancaster — her secret guardian from college days.  Now he holds both her hope and her future in his hands.  How far can love rewrite them a perfect plan? EP 1:A desperate plea for help turns into a shocking revelation when Ethan Lancaster's mother offers five million dollars to keep someone away from her son, hinting at a deeper conflict and a mysterious plan to go public with Ethan.What is Claire's plan to go public with Ethan Lancaster, and how will it affect their hidden past?

Baseborn kids in the Cooper family weren’t allowed to practice martial arts. But Eva learned it and even mastered the long-lost Skills. Not wanting to let fate decide her life, she changed the unfair rules.
When her family faced an invasion and the Smiths tried to disrupt the martial arts world, Eva stepped up and led everyone against the enemies. EP 1:Eva, a baseborn child of the Cooper family, defies the strict family rule by secretly mastering martial arts and the legendary Dragon Chant Spear. Her skills impress her master, but she must keep her abilities hidden to avoid severe punishment.Will Eva's extraordinary talents remain a secret, or will her defiance lead to a confrontation with the Cooper family?

column1: Oops! The CEO’s My Baby's Daddy
column4: Five years ago, Claire Sullivan was accidentally became pregnant with Anthony Holmes' child. Now, their son Bobby has been diagnosed with leukemia.
