Claire plans to sell the heirloom jade pendant Anthony left her, while the Holmes family is searching for their missing heir. Will love heal this family? And what fate awaits Bobby? EP 1:Claire Sullivan reveals her unexpected pregnancy to Mr. Lester after completing a restoration job, and despite being unmarried, she decides to keep the baby, marking a turning point in her life.Will Claire's decision to keep the baby lead her to cross paths with the baby's father again?

Reborn into a weak outcast’s body, the legendary Sword Saint begins his journey again—to rise, protect his mother, and reclaim his place at the top of the martial world. EP 1:The legendary Sword Saint reincarnates into the body of a weak child named Adam. His mother, a concubine, vows to risk her life in a sect trial to obtain the holy medicine needed to cure him, facing off against the formidable Mrs. Howard.Will Adam's mother survive the trial and secure the Nine-Leaf-Orchid for her son?

After rebirth, Marcy Green swaps weddings to marry Helix Scott, the officer who caused her cousin's death in the past life. And she vows to dismantle his scheming childhood sweetheart, Nancia. On a remote island base, she outsmarts the traps, turning each ploy into self-sabotage. But as love blooms with Helix, a looming secret threatens everything: he doesn't know she will change their fates... EP 1:After being reborn, Marcy Green decides to swap weddings with her sister Emma to marry Helix Scott, the officer who caused her cousin's death in her past life, in order to confront his scheming childhood sweetheart and settle old grudges.Will Marcy's plan to outsmart Helix's sweetheart succeed, or will her past secrets unravel everything?

Former boxing champ Lillian Grant, sidelined by mental health issues, finds herself interning at her father's company for a fresh start. But her comeback is challenged by a tyrannical boss who thrives on bullying newcomers. As the harassment escalates, Lillian's resolve hardens. Will her fighter's spirit lead to a knockout in the corporate ring? Watch her next move.  EP 1:Former boxing champ Lillian Grant, attempting a fresh start at her father's company with her emotional support cat Mimi, faces immediate hostility from her new colleagues and a tyrannical boss who enforces arbitrary rules. When Lillian defiantly rips up an anti-pet policy (contradicting the company’s new pet-friendly stance), the stage is set for a clash between her unbroken spirit and workplace bullies.Will Lillian’s defiance trigger her past demons—or unleash the fighter ready to take down corporate tyranny?

column1: Picking Up the Cue: The Prodigy Returns
column4: Once hailed as a pool prodigy, Ian lost everything in a car crash—his parents, his health, and his love for the game. His ailing grandmother pushes him to return, hoping he can build a future with his talent. But to Ian, her tough love feels like exploitation—until a heartbreaking truth forces him to face his fears, his past, and the table once more... EP 1:Ian, once a celebrated pool prodigy, suffers a devastating car crash that leaves him with severe nerve damage in his hands. His grandmother, desperate for him to continue his career, struggles to accept his condition. Meanwhile, Ian recalls his past victories and the high expectations placed upon him, setting the stage for his emotional and physical comeback.Will Ian overcome his physical limitations and reclaim his place at the pool table?

Falsely accused and exiled after her family is executed, Zoe Wood, once the emperor's favored consort, feigns madness to survive. In secret, she masters the art of seduction and rises again, gaining the emperor's favor, reclaiming her power, and quietly plotting justice. From fallen consort to empress dowager, her revenge's only just beginning... EP 1:Zoe Wood, falsely accused and exiled after her family's execution, feigns madness to survive and secretly seeks to learn the art of seduction from a mysterious figure in the Discipline Hall, plotting her revenge and justice for her family.Will Zoe Wood succeed in mastering the art of seduction and reclaim her power to avenge her family?

Childhood friends Edward and Amelia are forced into a marriage amidst a family inheritance feud. Secrets, schemes, and past promises intertwine as they unite against foes to uncover the truth. EP 1:Ryan Carter discovers his true identity as Edward Harrington, while Mia faces a life-threatening liver failure. To save her, Ryan is forced into a marriage with Edward as part of a financial deal.Will Ryan go through with the marriage to save Mia, and what secrets will Edward Harrington reveal?

I'm the Mother of Maraland, having a heart of love. When I met Nathan Zane, who was terminally ill, I decided to share my life with him to prolong his life. Just like the clichéd story of a princess and a prince, we gradually fell in love. I am a Mother, but also an ignorant girl. On the way from a girl to a Mother, I made many mistakes... EP 1:Wendy, the Mother of Maraland, has sacrificed her life force to save Nathan Zane by sharing the Life-Bound Venom with him, a bond nurtured with her heart's blood daily. Despite her devotion, Nathan returns home with Selina, who is pregnant, revealing a betrayal that shatters Wendy's trust and love.Will Wendy seek vengeance for Nathan's betrayal, or will her love for him prevail despite the pain?

Firefighter Chloe Yates is in a tight spot—comatose after a heroic rescue, with her ex Dr. June Gabriel busting his chops to work an inadequate miracle. Down in the underworld, the Grim Reaper cuts her a wild deal: seven lives as critters to win back her own. But there's a plot twist in every tragicomedy. Is this a second chance or a cosmic screwjob? Buckle up—this one’s a tearjerker with a twist! EP 1:Chloe, a retired firefighter, dies in a heroic rescue but is given a chance to live again by transforming into seven animals, starting with a cockroach, and having her mother recognize her. Amidst this, a building fire erupts, and despite her recent retirement, Chloe rushes to help, facing ungrateful and selfish demands from residents, including her own aunt, who prioritizes her savings over Chloe's safety.Will Chloe successfully navigate her first transformation and survive the dangerous fire to return to her mother?

Emily, in desperate need of money, responds to a surrogacy ad and meets wealthy surgeon Thomas, who mistakes her for a gold-digger. After a passionate night, Thomas becomes infatuated, and she becomes his kept woman. Despite developing feelings, Emily knows their relationship is transactional and decides to walk away. However, their shared experiences linger in her heart. With Chris's help, Emily and Thomas eventually find their way back to each other. EP 1:Emily, in dire need of money, responds to a surrogacy ad and gets in touch with a wealthy surgeon, Thomas, who initially doubts her intentions but agrees to meet after she assures him she is 'clean'.Will Emily's meeting with Thomas lead to more than just a financial transaction?

Stripped of her title and sold to a brothel, Cecilia Vane risked everything to save her father. But fate dealt her a darker hand—an heir to the throne, a web of enemies, and a crown she never sought. Just as peace seems near, betrayal rises from within the family she fought to protect…  EP 1:Cecilia Vane sacrifices her dignity by working in a brothel to gather funds to free her falsely accused father, while the Emperor secretly investigates the case and seeks to protect her.Will Cecilia succeed in freeing her father before the Emperor finds her?

In a world ruled by power and bloodlines, those born without abilities—Muggles—are deemed worthless, destined for execution or cruel experiments. Frost, eldest daughter of the prestigious White family, hides a dangerous secret: she has no powers. Once cherished, her mother's death left her to endure a life of scorn and suffering. When fate binds her to Flame, a feared yet enigmatic man, she sets forth on a path of vengeance, where love and betrayal intertwine beneath the veil of destiny... EP 1:Frost, the powerless daughter of the White family, endures scorn and abuse while hiding her Muggle status. When her father insists her sister Lingus marry the feared Flame Grook, a cruel and violent noble, a shocking suggestion is made—why not have Frost marry him instead? This twist could either save Lingus or doom Frost to a dangerous fate.Will Frost be forced into a deadly marriage with Flame Grook, or will her secret be exposed?

Charlotte hires a fake boyfriend to keep her job—unaware he’s actually Colton，the real billionaire investor she’s been lying about. EP 1:Charlotte is fired unjustly by her jealous coworker and in desperation claims to be dating billionaire investor Colton Williams to save her job. She hires a fake boyfriend online, unaware that the real Colton has already taken an interest in her and is on his way to meet her.Will Charlotte's deception be exposed when the real Colton Williams shows up?

A love test in the name of illness: Selena Hazel, who dropped out of school to work for saving Sebastian Cross, her boyfriend, was pierced by a dirty needle at a blood-selling station. A medical record led to one truth after another, and the truth exploded in blood! A dying person with a terminal illness? A rich heir? A betrayer of feelings? Can those injuries in the name of love be reborn on the road of roses and thorns? EP 1:Selena Hazel, pregnant and determined to save her ailing boyfriend Sebastian Cross, decides to drop out of school to earn money for his life-saving surgery, despite her professor's offer for a life-changing opportunity abroad. As Sebastian's condition worsens, a mysterious message hints at a hidden test or deception surrounding his illness.What is the true nature of Sebastian's illness and who is behind the cryptic congratulations message?

Betrayed. Broken. But not defeated. Ethan Chan holds on to the only thing that never left him—his kind heart. With Luke Lynn and the Lynn Group behind him, he's ready to fight back. But in a world ruled by greed, is goodness enough to win? EP 1:Ethan Chan helps a young boy, Luke Lynn, by investing in his phone repair business, setting up a partnership with the condition of repayment within two days, showcasing Ethan's kindness and Luke's ambition.Will Luke Lynn be able to repay Ethan Chan and prove his honesty, or will this deal reveal deeper truths about trust and integrity?

During a bridal ball toss, two sisters cast their destinies into the air.
The elder’s ball lands with a nobleman; the younger’s, in the hands of a beggar.
One rises to glory. The other dies in regret—until time turns back.
Given a second chance, the younger sister rewrites the moment.
But what if the beggar holds a secret, and fate has its own design? EP 1:During the bridal ball toss, Lady Josephine and her sister compete to alter their fates, with Josephine determined to marry Adrian Montague and rewrite her tragic past, unaware of the dark secrets within the Montague family.Will Josephine's choice lead her to glory or into the clutches of the Montague family's hidden dangers?
Seeking vengeance for her slain parents, Grand Master Elsa returns to her homeland to face the Shadow Clan in a climactic reckoning...

Emily Cross, a humble tea shop owner, struggles to raise her son alone—until he abandons her to marry into a powerful family. When the cruel in-laws torment her, a chance encounter with the disguised Crown Prince unravels a shocking truth: a long-lost love with the Emperor, hidden behind a simple peach crisp, uncovering the forbidden love affair... EP 1:Emily Cross visits her son Nathan and his pregnant wife Silas, bringing homemade walnut and jujube cake for the baby, only to be insulted and rejected by Silas and her mother. Meanwhile, the disguised Crown Prince witnesses the scene and later offers kindness to Emily, hinting at a deeper connection.What hidden past connects Emily and the Crown Prince?

When Nancy Simpson accidentally claims ruthless tycoon Jasper Lawrence as her boyfriend to escape humiliation, he retaliates with a ruthless proposal: "be my wife, heal my grandmother, then vanish.” But their icy deal melts fast as forbidden sparks ignite—until Jasper uncovers Nancy's explosive secret: she's the missing piece to a puzzle he'd kill to solve. Can a contract built on lies survive truths dangerous... or addictive?

column1: When the Rose Brushes Against the Gun
column4: Gentle heiress Willow Joyce never expected to cross paths with ruthless warlord Caleb Hall - until one fateful encounter binds them forever. When she discovers she's carrying his child, her quiet life shatters. Meanwhile, her dark family secrets emerge. Enemies circle. And Caleb, the cold-hearted general becomes her most relentless protector. But in this dangerous game of power and passion, the truth may destroy them both... EP 1:Willow Joyce, the beloved heiress of the Joyce Tailoring Shop, is discovered to be pregnant out of wedlock, shocking the community. Meanwhile, the feared General Hall returns to Cloudville, rejecting a blind date set up by his mother. Their paths cross unexpectedly when Willow boldly borrows his gun, sparking an intriguing interaction between the gentle heiress and the ruthless warlord.Will General Hall uncover the truth about Willow's pregnancy and its connection to him?

Tough Go puzzle? Easy for Hannah Green. To save her father, she solves it effortlessly. From scorn to legend, she defeats prodigies and blindsides masters. But as the stakes rise, her final challenge awaits: the undefeated Go Legend, Drake Falcon. With her father's soul on the line, destiny's last move is coming. Is she ready? EP 1:Hannah Green, despite being ridiculed for her father's reputation, effortlessly solves the infamous Tiger Phoenix Puzzle that has stumped even the Go Saints for a century, proving her exceptional skill and earning a reward to help her father.Will Hannah's victory in solving the puzzle be enough to change her and her father's fate?

Elena Wilson, an art graduate pushed into her family's business, grows up alongside Xavier Carter, who loves her. However, her adopted sister, Rainie Wilson, who killed her own parents, murders Elena to steal her life. Reborn, Elena uncovers Rainie’s crimes, breaks free from her toxic family, and finds true love with Nigel Crawford, while Rainie meets her end. EP 1:On Elena's 22nd birthday, Xavier promises to propose if she gifts her prized painting 'Starry Dreams' to her adopted sister Rainie. However, Rainie sabotages the proposal by feigning her dog's illness, manipulating Xavier into spending time with her instead. Heartbroken and betrayed, Elena expresses her regret for sacrificing so much for Xavier and her toxic family, only to seemingly experience a rebirth, hinting at a second chance to change her fate.Will Elena use her rebirth to uncover Rainie's schemes and reclaim her life?

Seventeen years ago, a mysterious portal brought Aaron Clark to the modern world, where he was saved by Nadia Lowe. But fate didn't grant this kind girl a happy life. Betrayed and killed by her beloved Aaron and her own son, Nadia is reborn ten years before. This time, she's determined to rewrite her destiny… EP 1:Nadia Lowe, betrayed and executed by her beloved Aaron and her own son Edison, is reborn with a chance to rewrite her destiny. She decides to close the mysterious portal that brought Aaron into her life and accepts the demolition of her supermarket, symbolizing her break from the past.Will Nadia's decision to close the portal truly free her from her tragic fate?

Bound by a love curse, Muriel Jones was trapped by her wicked husband, Zoey Shaw, who drained her family's wealth and treated her as a pawn. Zoey had an affair with Muriel's best friend, Yvonne Fraser, and together they schemed to steal the Jones family fortune. With the help of Barry Simpson, mysteriously reborn with past memories, Muriel breaks free. Will karma finally catch up with them? EP 1:Muriel's torment under her wicked ex-husband Zoey and his lover Yvonne continues as they belittle her, but Barry, mysteriously reborn with past memories, vows to stand with Muriel and make them pay for their sins. The presence of a love curse complicates their plans, requiring drastic measures to break free.Will Barry and Muriel succeed in breaking the love curse and exacting their revenge?

Sharon Cooper marries her "jinx," Xavier Wilson, hoping her long-time crush will come true, only to discover he still loves his first love. She hides her feelings and uses their marriage to pay off her parents' debts. When his first love returns, Sharon Cooper decides to divorce. Xavier Wilson, determined to keep her, starts pursuing her and demanding recognition of their marriage. Eventually, his true love clears up the misunderstandings. EP 1:Sharon Cooper agrees to marry Xavier Wilson for a hefty monthly payment to pay off her parents' debts, only to discover that Xavier is believed to be cursed and still loves his first love, Miranda. The tension escalates as Sharon confronts the family's superstitions and Xavier's past, leading to a heated moment when Xavier challenges Sharon's claim about his impotence.Will Sharon's marriage survive the curse and Xavier's unresolved feelings for Miranda?

Once a champion, now a forgotten man. Betrayed by his master and stripped of his past, Felix Lawrence lived in the shadows until a single match shattered the silence. He rises once more, defeating challengers, reclaiming his legacy, and earning the Sovereign's favor. But beneath the arena's glory, Aravian forces are quietly gathering. And the true game hasn't even begun... EP 1:Felix Lawrence, the reigning Masked Billiards God, faces a new challenge when a mysterious woman on the run seeks his help, leading to a dangerous encounter.Why is the mysterious woman being chased, and how will Felix's involvement change the game?

On her wedding day, Donna Blake expects love and happiness. Instead, her in-laws delay the dowry, lock her out, and push her to sign a cruel prenup. Hurt but not broken, she walks away, pregnant and alone. When a hidden identity resurfaces, everything changes. But can she truly escape the past? EP 1:Donna Blake's wedding day turns into a nightmare when her in-laws demand unexpected payments and disrespect her, leading to a confrontation that reveals deeper family tensions and unresolved issues.Will Donna stand up to her in-laws or will she be forced to compromise on her special day?

Raised as a prodigy assassin within the Burning Blade, Chinwe knew nothing but death. Her blade never missed—until one fateful night. Wounded, she finds sanctuary with Shane, who shows her life beyond shadows and steel. For the first time, she questions everything. But leaving the Burning Blade means death. Now, she faces her deadliest mission—escaping the organization that created her. In a world where mercy equals weakness, can she survive choosing life over death?  EP 1:Chinwe, the prodigy assassin of the Burning Blade, confronts her master when she is given an ultimatum: kill Shane and remain the chief assassin or face death for wanting to leave the organization. She reveals her desire to live an ordinary life, free from killing, but her master insists she is and always will be a cold-blooded killer, bound to the Burning Blade.Will Chinwe defy her master and escape the Burning Blade, or will she succumb to the life of an assassin she was raised to be?

At 18, Hannah Caldwell is adopted by the Caldwell family, only to be betrayed by her sister Juliet and imprisoned for ten years. After her release, she flees to Paris, leaving behind a life of pain. Five years later, she returns as Vivian Warren—stronger, fiercer, and ready for justice. But can she truly reclaim her life, or will the past haunt her forever?

One moment, Ethan Carter is a security guard living an ordinary life. The next, he wakes up in a martial world full of swords, sects, and secrets. Before he even figures out where he is, rumors start spreading—about a mysterious master whose aura terrifies even the strongest warriors. Master? It's him. And he has no idea why. Can this unlikely hero bring peace to the land? EP 1:Ethan Carter, a simple security guard, inexplicably wakes up in a martial world where he is mistaken for a powerful master and named the Divine Heir of the Destiny Sect, inheriting unparalleled skills and a mysterious manual.Will Ethan Carter survive in this dangerous martial world with his newfound status and powers?

In order to find out the truth about why her parents were framed and imprisoned, Stella Lowry gets close to Myles Foster. However, unknowingly, she is drawn into the web of love by him. She makes careful plans step by step, while he sets up defenses step by step. When love clashes with the truth, what exactly does Stella want: revenge or love? EP 1:Stella, the foster daughter, reveals her true intentions to avenge her parents by framing the Fosters, leading to a tense confrontation with Myles after she drugs him. Their relationship takes a dark turn as Myles accuses her of manipulation, while Stella desperately tries to regain his trust by proposing marriage, only to be rejected harshly.Will Stella succeed in making Myles beg for her return, or will her revenge plan crumble?

In a time of ambition and sacrifice, Catherine Reed stood by Malick Stone through poverty and struggle, only to be repaid with lies, betrayal, and ruin. Framed and abandoned, she chooses to walk away from the past and into a future rebuilt by her own hands. But some betrayals don't stay buried for long... EP 1:Catherine Reed, who sacrificed her own education and youth for Malick Stone, is betrayed when his old flame Anne Shaw reappears, leading to a workplace accident that reveals Malick's true loyalties and Catherine's shattered dreams.Will Catherine's decision to leave Malick and the past behind lead to her reclaiming her life, or will the wounds of betrayal prove too deep?

On the eve of her wedding, Wendy is devastated to discover Michael still longs for his first love, Xena. Heartbroken, she leaves home and wanders the streets. In despair, she encounters Steven, a long-lost friend who becomes her pillar of support. Witnessing Michael rekindle his old flame with Xena, Wendy impulsively marries Steven. What lies ahead in this impromptu marriage? Will it lead to misery or a journey toward healing? EP 1:On the eve of her wedding, Wendy overhears Michael confessing his enduring love for his first love, Xena, revealing that his upcoming marriage to her is merely a family arrangement without genuine affection.Will Wendy confront Michael about his betrayal or will she make a life-altering decision that changes everything?

In her previous life, orphan Leah Stein, framed by Lerry, was expelled from the Sect and met a tragic end. Reborn, Leah devotes herself to cultivating Apathia. And she refuses to forgive those who hurt her before. Caught in this situation of past grudges and new-found resolve, how will Leah rewrite her destiny?

Mary Lester's son Deek and daughter-in-law Karen sold her to a man to earn the huge bride price. This man, Jason Stark, was known to be in a vegetative state due to a car accident. After Mary reluctantly agreed, she went to the Stark family and started taking good care of the veggie. On the next day, Mary found there was nothing for them to eat, so she went out to look for a job. Right after she left, the veggie Jason woke up and dialed a number...

Kiara is Immortal Master Jace's twisted obsession. When she refuses him, he slaughters her entire clan, forcing her into a gilded cage as his unwilling bride. While Jace is away, his disciples—blind to her true identity—brutally torment her to death. Is his love gone forever? And how far must he go to bring her life back? Most importantly, will she love him back? EP 1:Kiara, now the unwilling Madam of Dreamveil Sect, pleads with Master Jace to spare her clan after he slaughters an entire sect in search of her. Jace announces their wedding in six months and confines Kiara to the Pavilion of Peace. Meanwhile, the sect prepares for a mysterious wedding, and Eve, a new disciple resembling Kiara, is asked to try on wedding gowns, sparking confusion and jealousy among the servants.Will Eve become the new bride, or is Master Jace's obsession with Kiara far from over?

Divorced single mother Adeline accidentally becomes pregnant with the child of Eric, New York’s reclusive billionaire known for avoiding women. Under Eric’s protection, she escapes the entanglement of her ex-husband and successfully rises in status. Ultimately, she overcomes the interference of a third party, Anna, who is obsessed with Eric, and goes on to live a happy life with him. EP 1:Adeline, a 48-year-old divorced single mother struggling financially, discovers she is pregnant after a surprising encounter with Eric, a reclusive billionaire who avoids women. As she faces eviction and her ex-husband's debts, her life takes an unexpected turn when she meets Eric, who is under pressure from his family to produce an heir. Their accidental night together sets the stage for a dramatic and life-changing connection.Will Eric accept the shocking news of Adeline's pregnancy, and how will this unexpected twist alter their lives?

Zora Hartley attends the birthday party of her fiancé’s uncle, never expecting the uncle to be her ex-boyfriend, Aaron Huntington. Though they’ve been broken up for two years, Aaron still has feelings for her and relentlessly pursues her. Even under the same roof, he boldly flirts with her. Zora tries to resist falling back. However, she unexpectedly discovers her fiancé is cheating on her. And the truth about her breakup with Aaron…

Eight years ago, Annie married Yann Shaw—and disappeared with a secret. Now fate, and a little girl, pull them back together. Can a runaway bride and a stubborn CEO rewrite their love story? EP 1:Annie, forced into a sham marriage with Yann Shaw, reveals she is pregnant with a child from an unknown man. Her mother demands she get an abortion, but Annie stands her ground, vowing to protect her child. Meanwhile, Annie calls Yann to demand a divorce, and though he agrees, he remains unaware that she is the woman who disappeared after their one night together.Will Yann discover Annie's true identity and the secret she's carrying?

column1: My Daughter Called Me a Liar!
column4: For 20 years, Thomas searched for his missing daughter Sherry, only to find her as Ms. Lily Lewis, the woman ordering the demolition of their family home. Now, with wrecking crews closing in, will she finally see the truth? Or will Thomas' last hope be buried under the rubble? EP 1:Thomas, who has been searching for his missing daughter Sherry for 20 years, refuses to move from their family home despite pressure from his nephew David and the threat of demolition by Ms. Lily Lewis, the CEO of Jaseen Group, who is revealed to be Sherry herself. The emotional conflict escalates as Thomas vows to find his daughter no matter what.Will Thomas discover the shocking truth about Ms. Lewis before it's too late?

Bernard Ford left home for fifteen years to master martial arts, leaving his daughter, Valerie, behind. Upon returning, his master warns him not to misuse his skills. At Skyward Sect, Bernard finds chaos: Valerie is under siege and no longer recognizes him. With the Sect crumbling, will Bernard break his oath to save his daughter and restore the Sect? EP 1:Bernard Ford completes his training by mastering all 72 ultimate techniques, earning his master's approval to leave the mountain. Meanwhile, his daughter Valerie is under attack by her uncle's henchmen, revealing a plot to take over the Skyward Sect. Bernard's joyous anticipation of reuniting with Valerie clashes with the immediate danger she faces, setting the stage for a dramatic confrontation.Will Bernard arrive in time to save Valerie from the Four Symbols Formation?

When hotel receptionist Yuna Gomez wakes up reliving her worst night shift, she sees a chance to rewrite history. The guest in Room 312, Luicy Smith, didn’t just disappear. Her music notes were wrong. As Yuna digs deeper, she uncovers a coded secret linking a wealthy heiress, her best friend and her husband. With surveillance footage altered and time slipping away, Yuna must expose the truth before history repeats itself... EP 1:Yuna Gomez relives a tragic night shift where a guest's wrongful room assignment leads to a horrific crime, and she vows to change the outcome this time.Will Yuna succeed in altering the course of events and saving the victim?

Daily poisoned and tormented for a decade, Eleanor had long lost hope for survival. Until one fateful marriage by proxy, she unexpectedly became the only cure for General Holloway. From hell to salvation, from a poisoned pawn to the Holloway's hostess, can her life truly turn around at last? EP 1:General Holloway's life is at stake due to poisoning, and the only cure is a maiden infused with all poisons. His mother, Madam Holloway, arranges a proxy marriage to the Winthrop family's eldest daughter, who vehemently refuses to marry the 'lunatic' General, seeing it as a death sentence.Will the Winthrop family's refusal seal General Holloway's fate, or will another solution emerge to save him?

Three years ago, Victor Grant, head of the Grant Family, was drugged and spent a night with hotel intern Ava Summers. Now, at his birthday party, he finally reunites with her—only to find she’s engaged to his grandnephew, Daniel Grant. As old feelings resurface and loyalties are tested, Ava’s world begins to unravel once more… EP 1:At Victor Grant's birthday party, he is stunned to discover that his grandnephew Daniel's fiancée, Ava Summers, is the same woman he spent a night with three years ago after being drugged, reigniting old feelings and complicating family dynamics.Will Victor confront Ava about their past, or will Daniel uncover the truth first?

column1: Fake It Till You Love Me
column4: Orphans Sylvia and Evelyn pose as "First Love" substitutes to infiltrate the Mitchell family. Sylvia, delicate but fierce, marries Jasper Mitchell, the heir to Mitchell Group. Their fake marriage turns into a clash of secrets and chemistry. When the real "First Love" returns, lies unravel. Sylvia discovers Jasper was her high school crush—and he’s fallen for her too. Amid danger and betrayal, a sham relationship becomes true love. EP 1:Sylvia and Evelyn, posing as stand-ins for the Mitchell brothers' first loves, struggle to maintain their fabricated personas amidst the family's scrutiny. As tensions rise, the women hurriedly prepare for an unexpected early return of Jasper and Aiden, risking exposure of their true selves.Will Sylvia and Evelyn's carefully constructed facades crumble under the Mitchell family's watchful eyes?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Enemies to Lovers', 'Karma Payback']

column4: In her past life, Eva died after donating bone marrow to save her father, Wyatt, only for him to think it was Eva's stepsister, Raina, who made the sacrifice. Raina had it all as the golden child star, adored by Wyatt and overshadowing Eva with her mother's secret past. Now reborn, Eva vows to break free and claim the life she deserves!

Betrayed by Elise Rowan, Nathan Chandler dies saving his daughter, Lila. Back in the '90s with a second shot, he cuts ties with Elise, builds his fortune, and heads for Southmere. But the past isn't done with him—and this time, he's ready! EP 1:Nathan frantically tries to save his daughter Lila and Elise from a gas leak, only to discover Elise prioritized saving Lucas's son over their own daughter, leading to a desperate plea for medical help as Lila's condition worsens.Will Nathan be able to save Lila in time, and what will this betrayal mean for his relationship with Elise?

Sue Bynn, the Sacred Maiden of Miao, eloped for love but faced opposition for being childless. Evan Zach had an affair and conspired with Shirley Scott to fake a pregnancy. Sue left but was forced to perform a gu ritual, which turned her hair white overnight. The high priest sacrificed himself to save her. Evan sought forgiveness, while Sue led the Miao village out of poverty.

Comic artist Lucien Von wakes up as his own character! With a magical pen that brings drawings to life, he survives assassination, and even rewrites the Empress's fate. But after conquering the kingdom and marrying her, he awakens in a mental hospital, where his doctor looks exactly like his dead fiancée! Was any of it real? Or was that pen never magic at all? EP 1:Lucien Von wakes up to find himself in his own comic world as the Northern Margrave of Valtheria, realizing he possesses a magical drawing pen that can alter reality, while also uncovering political conspiracies and impending war.Will Lucien's newfound power be enough to save Valtheria from destruction?

column1: Loving the Tyrant I Swore to Kill
column4: After touching the tyrant's skull, Wenona Zanetti finds herself in the Novarion dynasty, where she's forced to kill the tyrant to become empress. She pretends to love him to survive, but secretly plans his death. The twist? The tyrant can read her mind. What will happen between them? EP 1:Wenona Zanetti, stripped of her title and sentenced to execution, mysteriously time travels to the Novarion dynasty, becoming the tragic Empress Wenona. She realizes she has 1300 years of knowledge and meets the tyrant Noctis Fitzgerald, who can hear her thoughts about his future demise.Will Wenona's knowledge of the future change her fate and that of the tyrant?

At ten, Annie Shaw learns her brain cancer has returned. With just seven days left, all she wants is time with her father, Lucas. But he's too caught up in another family to see her fading light. As love is misplaced and silence grows, will anyone notice the little girl who's quietly slipping away?

She waited. She forgave. She hoped. But after three chances and one heartbreaking loss, Sophie Wells is done playing the good wife. Now, as she walks away to reclaim her life, her husband wants her back. In her journey of self-seeking, can she really free herself from the shackles of love in the end?

The naughty alien boy Atlas was exiled by his mother to Earth with a burned photo in search of his never-met father. He accidentally woke up the comatose CEO Gavin Gandy and used his superpowers to help Gavin resolve the business crisis. but was hunted down by Dylan Chips. When Atlas's life was in danger, Gavin found out that he was his own son! It turned out that Gavin was an amnesiac alien prince, and Atlas's mother was not dead. After a tough journey, the three of them reunited in the galaxy. EP 1:Atlas, a mischievous alien boy, is sent to Earth by his mother to begin his training and find his father, embarking on an unexpected journey of discovery and adventure.Will Atlas succeed in finding his father on Earth amidst the chaos?

Seven years ago, Shane Jones saved Zoe Perry from heartbreak, leading to an unexpected connection. Despite a secret marriage and a child, Zoe harbors resentment, believing Shane took advantage of her. When her past love, Jack, returns, Shane withdraws, but hidden truths threaten to unravel everything...

Ex-national table tennis player Ethan Walker hides his talent as a cleaner. When his skills are accidentally revealed, he flees to the failing Cloud Paddle Club. Despite doubts, he takes on an underdog player. Through thrilling competitions, he overcomes rivals, leads the team to a championship win, and refuses top offers, disappearing after his triumph. EP 1:During a high-stakes betting scene, the underdog Matthew, trained by a mysterious janitor, unexpectedly defeats the three-time world champion Mason, revealing the janitor's true identity as a legendary table tennis master and forcing him to flee to avoid exposure.Where will the mysterious janitor go next, and who will uncover his true past?

Vincent Grayson, a hidden CEO, secretly supports his wife, Stella Whitmore, as she pursues her dream of becoming a business mogul. But when he senses her growing obsession with her charming male best friend, suspicion turns to fury. At a company party, their playful 'kissing game' goes too far—and Vincent snaps. Now, he's ready to strike back. But how far will he go? EP 1:Vincent Grayson, a hidden CEO, secretly supports his wife Stella's business ambitions, but when she prioritizes a company party over his birthday and engages in a questionable 'kissing game' with her male best friend, his suspicions turn to fury, setting the stage for his retaliation.Will Vincent's retaliation expose his true power and unravel Stella's world?

Once betrothed to the Celestial Emperor Marcus Jefferson, dragon princess Kate Austin was cast aside after a deadly betrayal tore their worlds apart. A thousand years later, in a desperate bid to save her imprisoned father, she returns in disguise—only to spend a fateful night with Marcus under the spell of a love curse. When a divine child is conceived and dark forces close in, secrets ignite, loyalties shatter, and a power long dormant begins to stir… EP 1:Kate Austin, the dragon princess, returns to clear her clan's name after being falsely accused of murdering the Celestial Emperor's mother. She encounters Marcus, now the Emperor, under a love curse and must navigate palace politics to save her people while dark forces close in.Will Kate succeed in convincing Marcus to help her, or will their past hatred lead to further conflict?

When top female racer Quinn dies in a tragic crash, her soul finds a new home in Chloe, a disowned heiress. To save her family’s struggling driving school, Chloe enters a dangerous racing event with a training car, shocking the crowd with her skill. But betrayal strikes—when her brother’s life hangs in the balance, she risks it all with a legendary drift. As enemies close in, her next move could rewrite her legacy… or bury the truth forever. EP 1:After the tragic death of racing legend Quinn Lynn, her soul mysteriously inhabits Chloe, a disowned heiress struggling to save her family's driving school. Faced with the threat of losing the school to her scheming relatives, Chloe, now with Quinn's racing instincts, decides to enter the deadly Grand Racing Championship to prove her worth and keep the family legacy alive.Will Chloe, with Quinn's soul, be able to survive the world's deadliest race and save the driving school?

column1: After Divorce, She Became the Richest
column4: Married for three years, Anya Raine had always been a dutiful wife, only to find husband's betrayal. What they didn’t know was that Anya was actually the daughter of the prestigious Raine family, one of the top families in Galaxy. After the divorce, Anya decides to stop hiding and uncover the truth about her past, vowing to fight for her future. Will Anya be able to achieve her revenge and take control of her destiny once again? EP 1:After years of being a dutiful wife, Anya Raine is confronted with her husband's betrayal and forced divorce by her mother-in-law, only for her true identity as the heiress of the prestigious Raine family to be revealed by Lucas Bennett, hinting at her past power and status.Will Anya reclaim her rightful place and seek revenge against those who wronged her?

Cassie Yates thought a road trip to a forest villa would be the perfect escape from hectic city life—until she dreamed of a monstrous python lurking nearby. She woke with a start, relieved it was just a nightmare. But soon, the giant snake appeared for real, and every horrifying detail of her dream began creeping into reality... EP 1:Cassie's terrifying dream about a monstrous python in the forest starts to become reality when the car breaks down and the bridge is damaged, trapping her and her friends in the forest where she discovers the python's skin, confirming her nightmare is real.Will Cassie and her friends survive the python's deadly hunt in the isolated forest?

Seven years ago, Bianca met a man，under the influence of a drug she had six children with him. Over the past seven years, she has never been able to forget him. Now, at a banquet she was coerced into attending, they cross paths again. Could this be their chance to rekindle their romance?

On the day Cassie Yate of the Cloud Sect was to wed Jacob Lambert, he collapsed on the brink of death. Cassie entered the forbidden zone to retrieve the Heart Lotus, unaware it was a trap set by her sister and Jacob. In seizing the Lotus, she awakened Leo, the Demon Lord, and formed a Life-and-Death Bond. Back at the sect, she faced the tribunal—and Jacob’s betrayal. Then Leo appeared… EP 1:On her wedding day, Cassie's happiness turns to despair when Jacob collapses, revealing a congenital heart condition. Desperate to save him, she decides to retrieve the forbidden Heart Lotus, unaware that Jacob and her sister have conspired against her, setting a trap to eliminate her for their own gain.Will Cassie survive the trap set by her own sister and the man she loves?

column1: My Mom Is An ACE Agent
column4: Laura, the former legend agent, is seeking revenge when her daughter is kidnapped and seriously injured .....

Once a guardian of peace, demon slayer Nathaniel Reid falls victim to betrayal and dark sorcery. Rising from near death, he uncovers a hidden war between humans and spirits. With a half-demon by his side, he must reclaim his destiny and sever the threads of chaos. As blood and truth collide, can he restore balance and forge peace between two worlds EP 1:Nathaniel Reid, once a revered demon slayer, returns to his village only to be accused of spreading a deadly plague by poisoning the well. The villagers, including his own wife Eliza, turn against him, blaming him for the deaths caused by the plague. Dr. Hugo is credited with saving the village, but Nathaniel demands clarity on who accused him, revealing tensions and possible betrayal.Who is truly behind the plague, and will Nathaniel uncover the real villain?
Adriana was Nathan ’s secret lover for 3 years.Now she’s marrying someone else—and he goes insane.

Years after parting ways, Ryan and Isabella reunite in a blaze of passion—only to discover they're both engaged to someone else. Torn between guilt and longing, they wrestle with right and wrong, love and duty. But just when they decide to let go, fate reveals a twist... EP 1:Years apart, Ryan and Isabella unexpectedly reunite just as she is about to marry into the powerful Langford family, reigniting old flames amidst a dangerous plot to ruin her future.Will Isabella choose her past love or her future duty?

Adopted by the wealthy Liews, orphaned Selene lives a dream—until the real daughter returns, turning love into neglect. Desperate, she joins the mysterious Sleep Project to escape for 30 years. When she wakes up, what awaits her in this new world?

column1: Ignition: Return of the Drift King
column4: Former racing legend Chase Walker has lived under the radar as a humble mechanic in countryside for five years. However, the Raptor Riders shows up, challenging the locals to a high-stakes race. With the town’s future at stake, Chase must decide: stay hidden or dust off his skills for one last ride. Can the washed-up champion outdrive his past—and save their home? EP 1:Hugo Huang, the undefeated racing legend, returns home unexpectedly before the EuroSpeed Grand Prix, seeking to challenge Winston Chen, the vanished former champion, to prove his worth. Meanwhile, tensions rise as rival teams eye the same training ground, setting the stage for a high-speed showdown.Will Hugo succeed in drawing Winston out of retirement for the ultimate race?

column1: Before the Fall of a Realm
column4: On a diplomatic mission, Crown Prince Hector Hill saves a village girl, Ruby Linton, who becomes convinced she is fated to be his princess. Her delusion spirals into dangerous ambition, disrupting the royal court and placing the entire realm at risk. As alliances fracture and war looms, can the prince undo the damage before it’s too late... or has fate already taken its course? EP 1:Crown Prince Hector Hill intervenes to save Ruby Linton from being sold into servitude, giving her his personal jade pendant for protection. Ruby misinterprets his kindness as romantic interest, beginning her dangerous delusion of becoming the future Crown Princess.What will Ruby do next with her newfound belief in her royal destiny?

In his past life, Ethan Blake married Lena Brooks, only to realize she still clung to her first love. When she learned of his death, she tried to end her life, and Ethan died trying to save her. Reborn, their paths diverged. Lena chose her first love, and Ethan became a billionaire. What will happen when their paths cross again? EP 1:Ethan Blake and Lena Brooks, once married but estranged, find themselves reborn six years into the past after a tragic rooftop incident. Lena, who despised Ethan in their previous life, is determined to relive her life with her unattainable first love, Julian West, while Ethan becomes a billionaire. Their paths cross again, setting the stage for a dramatic confrontation of past regrets and new choices.Will Lena's pursuit of Julian lead to the happiness she envisions, or will fate have other plans for her and Ethan?

Billionaire Daniel Lewis loses his memory after discovering his lover's betrayal. Now trapped in her deadly scheme, he must reclaim his identity before she takes everything—including his life. But with his own sister barred from helping, can he expose the truth before it's too late? EP 1:Daniel Lewis prepares to surprise his fiancée Linda with the news that his wealthy family has approved their marriage, only to discover her betrayal with another man. During a violent confrontation, Daniel is severely injured and loses his memory, leaving Linda and her accomplice in a precarious situation as their kidney theft plot is jeopardized.Will Daniel regain his memory and uncover the sinister plot against him before it's too late?

Wendy Freeman, a single mother, sacrificed her left kidney to save her son Jason Calloway, leaving her weak and poor. However, Jason grew up despising his mom. Fifteen years later, their paths cross again—Jason, now a wealthy CEO, and Wendy, dying and alone. As buried truths surface, Jason faces a haunting question: Is it too late to make amends? EP 1:Wendy Freeman, a devoted single mother, faces terminal kidney cancer while struggling with her son Jason's disdain for her past actions. Flashbacks reveal her ultimate sacrifice—giving her kidney to save Jason's life, a secret she keeps to protect him. Now, as she nears death, she desperately seeks reconciliation with her estranged son.Will Jason discover the truth about his mother's sacrifice before it's too late?

Crowned young, the emperor still hunts the mother who vanished saving him from assassins. She's now an amnesiac palace maid, gripping a wood carving of their bond. One bamboo‑etched window starts to expose the truth, hurling mother and son into flogging, fire, and a showdown with a lethal consort. Blood versus intrigue—redemption or regret? EP 1:The young emperor, Adrian, recalls a traumatic childhood memory where assassins attacked him and his mother, the Empress Dowager, who vanished while saving him. Now ruling, he searches tirelessly for her, unaware that she is a mute palace maid with amnesia, clutching a wooden carving of their bond. Meanwhile, the maid begins to regain her memory, realizing her true identity.Will the emperor recognize his mother before it's too late?

Yoselin's mother Christina, a master embroiderer, was framed to death by favored Countess Lily 20 years ago. Orphaned at 8, Yoselin later invents colorful silk threads, earning royal favor. After achieving fame, a palace lantern accident hurls her back to age 8—moments before her mother’s murder. Now, with past-life memories as her only weapon, the young girl must outsmart Lily to save her mother… but how? EP 1:Yoselin, now regressed to her 8-year-old self, confronts the traumatic moment of her mother Christina's unjust execution orchestrated by Countess Lily. Armed with memories of her past life, she vows to prevent her mother's death and outmaneuver Lily's schemes.Can Yoselin alter fate and save her mother before it's too late?

column1: I Married Up, Ex Lost It
column4: On their 8th anniversary, Ethan humiliates Eve by kissing his new lover, which makes her marry another billionaire out of spite. But when Ethan discovers she once donated a kidney to save his life, his regret turns into obsession. Now, as Eve enjoys her lavish new life, her ex is crawling back, begging for forgiveness... Will she take him back? Or let him rot in guilt? EP 1:On their 8th anniversary, Ethan publicly humiliates Eve by summoning her to a bar game with friends, revealing his true feelings for another woman, Sasha. Devastated, Eve decides to marry billionaire Zack Shaw out of spite, choosing the same date she was supposed to engage with Ethan.Will Eve's revenge marriage bring her happiness, or will Ethan's cruel actions come back to haunt him?

Reborn into a weak outcast’s body, the legendary Sword Saint begins his journey again—to rise, protect his mother, and reclaim his place at the top of the martial world. EP 1:The legendary Sword Saint reincarnates into the weak body of a boy named Adam, while his determined mother vows to risk everything to obtain the rare medicine needed to cure him by taking on an impossible trial in the Howard Sword Sect.Will Adam's mother survive the deadly trial and secure the medicine to save her son?

Born with extraordinary talent, her powers were sealed because the soul of the Beast King lay within her. The Spiritseal Pin suppressed the demon force and bound her fate. When her clan was in danger, she removed it to protect them, unaware this would awaken an even more terrifying power. Can she defy destiny and reclaim her path? EP 1:In a desperate battle against the Crimson Dragon, Kael Vire, the Spiritbinders Clan faces annihilation as the Draconic Wraith threatens to destroy everything. Lyria, the daughter of Ysara, becomes the vessel to seal the monstrous power, but the Shadowborn Clan seeks the Dragonheart Core’s power for themselves, leading to a tragic sacrifice and a hidden secret that must never be revealed.What will happen when Lyria discovers the truth about the Spiritseal Pin and the Draconic Wraith within her?

Carol Jones rescues injured billionaire Robert Wilson, and they fall in love. After she gets pregnant, Robert has to leave due to a family crisis, promising to return. However, Carol's father forces her to marry Daniel Brown, a violent jeweler. Years pass, but their reunion remains distant. EP 1:Robert Wilson, a young billionaire, expresses his desire to marry Carol Jones, whom he rescued after being injured. Despite their deep love and Carol's pregnancy, Robert is forced to leave due to a family crisis. Meanwhile, Carol is manipulated into marrying Daniel Brown, who treats her harshly, revealing a web of lies and betrayal.Will Robert ever reunite with Carol and their unborn child?

Six years ago, Nora Summers was mistaken for a gold digger after a fateful night with William Campbell. She left without a word, unaware she was carrying his child. Now in crisis, Nora turns to her daughter Hope, who seeks out the man who once pushed her away. When William returns, the truth threatens to rewrite everything—but is it already too late? EP 1:Hope, a young girl, embarks on a desperate journey to Riveria to find her father, William Campbell, claiming he is the richest man in town. Despite initial disbelief and rejection, her persistence leads to a dramatic encounter when William's parents notice her resemblance to their son and stop their car to investigate.Will William recognize his daughter and reunite with Nora to save her from the crisis?

After a fatal crash with her son, Evelyn Rowe wakes up 70 years later—her child now an old man, surrounded by troublesome great-grandkids. Before she can adjust, the fifth grandson corners her: "Heard you’re into me?" Only to be slapped away by the patriarch: "Scoundrel! Kneel—this is your great-grandma!" EP 1:After a fatal car crash, Evelyn Rowe wakes up in the year 2025, discovering that her son Vince has become the patriarch of the Grant Group, now an elderly man, while she remains young, leading to a shocking family revelation and an unexpected encounter with a man who resembles her late husband.Will Evelyn uncover the truth about her husband's look-alike and how will her sudden appearance affect the Grant family dynamics?

When Nora Lane becomes entangled in a scandal born of betrayal and spiraling into something far more perilous, her quiet life collides with the powerful world of the Grant family. Behind Northbridge's glittering façades lie secrets, ambition, and a dangerous kind of affection—one that cuts as deeply as it consumes. What begins in thorns may yet bloom redder than anyone dares to imagine. EP 1:Nora Lane finds herself drugged by her fiancé's associate, hinting at betrayal, while Mr. Grant struggles with a savage curse that threatens his life and legacy, seeking a fated partner to lift it. The episode reveals deep-seated conflicts, manipulation, and the desperate search for salvation amidst pain and power.Will Nora escape her captor, and who is the fated partner that can save Mr. Grant from his curse?

For 20 years, billionaire queen Sarah Miller played the "perfect wife" – sacrificing her dreams, her fortune, even her fertility – to build her loser husband’s career. But on their anniversary, she walks in on him playing happy family with his mistress…and their secret love child! Game over. Now, the real CEO is back. She’s coming for his empire, his reputation, and every damn penny he owes her. EP 1:Sarah Miller, who sacrificed her dreams and fertility for her husband's career, discovers his betrayal on their silver wedding anniversary when she finds him with his mistress and their secret love child.Will Sarah take revenge on her husband and reclaim what's rightfully hers?

Mia Wilson, rightful heiress to the Bennett family, was abandoned as a child and raised by her abusive uncle. Ten months ago, she encountered Jonathan Harrison, and after a passionate night, she vanished. Now, as she gives birth to their child, Jonathan finally tracks her down, unaware that this baby will rewrite their destinies forever.
 EP 1:Mia, the rightful heiress to the Bennett family, is forced by her abusive uncle to marry into the Jones family or lose her unborn baby. As she gives birth in distress, her baby is granted the power to awaken spiritually ahead of time, revealing the ability to communicate with Mia from birth.What will happen when Mia discovers her baby's extraordinary spiritual powers?

Seraphina Weatherly got rich marrying a "poor", while her sister chose "perfection"—and lost everything. The jealous, broke sister killed her successful big sis. Now both are back. One steals the other’s man... but guess what? Seraphina saved the hot officer who should’ve died. Now, he’s alive, loyal, and loaded. What about her sister? Fate flips the script. EP 1:Seraphina Weatherly and her sister Serene Weatherly's lives take a dramatic turn when both families, the Langleys and the Quinns, come to propose marriage. Seraphina, knowing the future, insists on marrying Victor Quinn, who is destined to become wealthy, while her sister is left with Edward Langley, who is fated to die young. The tension escalates as it becomes apparent that Serene might also be reborn, hinting at a deeper conflict.Will Seraphina's knowledge of the future secure her happiness, or will her sister's possible rebirth turn the tables against her?

She fought her way to the top of the underworld and is the lost daughter of a billionaire. For love, she gave up everything, hid her identity, and built his success. But when she gave her heart, she got betrayal and disgrace. Now that her true self returns, will she forgive or make them pay? EP 1:Maya Thompson, the real master of the Starshade Guild, is revealed to be an extraordinarily powerful figure who has been living a hidden life for love. She plans to reveal her true identity to Leo, her savior, at the Henshire Group's celebration, unaware of the brewing storm her past and powerful connections could bring.Will Leo accept Maya's true identity, or will the revelation of her power and past create an irreparable rift between them?

Aurora Savoy grew up as a nobody... until BAM! Secret princess reveal! Instead of flexing her crown, all she wanted? A quiet country life with her man. But then... her trash husband chose the fake one! Betrayed and demoted to concubine, she’s done playing nice. Time to drop the Crown, expose the frauds, and make that snake ex regret everything. Revenge? Oh, it’s royal. EP 1:Aurora Savoy discovers her true identity as Princess Eirene and reunites with her father, the King. Despite her royal status, she wishes to continue her simple life with her husband, Cyrus. However, her world is shattered when Cyrus betrays her, declaring his love for the imposter princess and demoting Aurora to a concubine.Will Aurora seek revenge against Cyrus and reclaim her rightful place as the true princess?

To save her family, a badass girl, Vianna Shea, goes full Mulan—disguises as a man, becomes a war hero... only to return and find her brother stole her glory and framed her! Now the once-revered General kneels in imperial chains, her loyal troops whispering of rebellion... Yet she refuses to reveal her secret, for family honor, she swallows the truth. Will her father's heart break before the gilded proof of his daughter's sacrifice? EP 1:Vianna Shea disguises herself as a man to take her brother Bevin's place in the army, becoming the revered General Sirius, only to return home and find her brother claiming her glory and her father unaware of her sacrifice.Will Vianna reveal her true identity to her father, or will she continue to suffer in silence to protect her family's honor?

To pay her mother's medical bills, illegitimate daughter Daisy is forced to marry notorious playboy Logan in place of her sister. Their marriage is a battlefield—cold, resentful, competitive. But when Logan discovers his long-lost savior is the wife he once hated, it's too late. Betrayal has driven her away… and now he’ll do anything to win her back. EP 1:Daisy, the runaway bride, challenges Logan to a high-stakes race at the track, betting her freedom against his pride, revealing her desperation and determination to escape the forced marriage.Will Daisy's gamble on the race track win her freedom, or will Logan's unbeaten record prove too formidable to overcome?

She was once the one they held dearest, yet they were the ones who pushed her into the zombie horde. After being reborn, she gave everything to save humanity, while they kept wounding her with coldness for someone else. Only when she left in silence, never looking back, did regret finally come. But is it already too late? EP 1:Raina Jensen, who once saved her husband Caleb with her Super Serum, is now betrayed by him and her daughter Cynthia during a zombie attack, as they choose to save another woman, Wendy, instead of her. Heartbroken and infected with the zombie virus, Raina is given a chance to redeem herself by injecting the Zombie King Virus and dedicating herself to science in the Test Zone, with the potential to become the savior of the apocalypse. However, she must avoid any harm to her body for five days to survive the transformation.Will Raina survive the next five days and become humanity's savior, or will her family's betrayal lead to her downfall?

Peony Jones is forced to serve drinks at the Palace of Joy. One night, she stumbles into General Chan's private quarters and spends a wild night with him. The warlord takes her for a spy, but he falls desperately in love. Now the girl sold for cheap wine holds a warlord's beating heart in her hands. EP 1:Peony Jones is forced into servitude at the Palace of Joy to save her father's life, encountering dangerous figures like Hound Shaw and Tiger Davis, while General Chan's strict no-women policy is challenged by those around him.Will Peony survive the night at the Palace of Joy, and what will happen when General Chan discovers her presence?

Rachel's biggest regret is having a one-night affair with Hunter she's loved for eight years and making him pay for it. From then on, Hunter becomes obsessed with her at night, but a stranger by day. When he decides to marry someone else, she thinks they'll part ways, but he takes her home instead. Is she a toy he can discard at will, or an apple he can't resist taking a bite of?

column1: Mic in Hand, Ex on Knees
column4: She was once a queen of music, but gave it all up for love, hiding her name for twenty years to support a man she believed in. Repeated betrayal turned her devotion into a joke and sparked her fury. Now she’s back, unmasked and unstoppable. This time, those who hurt her will pay the price. EP 1:A once-renowned music queen, who gave up her career for love and secretly supported her partner's rise to fame, discovers his infidelity after twenty years of devotion, leading to a dramatic confrontation.Will the betrayed diva reclaim her identity and seek revenge against those who wronged her?

Ben Ye was once ranked No. 1 on the Sky Level Rankings and known as the Martial Grandmaster. When his wife was killed, he decided to seal off all his abilities and just wanted to be an ordinary person. 20 years later, when the Sky Level Rankings competition began again, his daughter, Laura Ye, wanted to be someone like the Grandmaster and make Clarian martial arts famous again. When Laura was in danger, Ben broke the seal and become the Martial Grandmaster again. How would the story unfold?
 EP 1:Roy Todd confidently challenges the martial arts elite with his family's unique technique, Eight Infinity, and defeats all opponents to claim the top spot on the Heavenly List. However, his ruthless victory leaves a trail of enemies, including one who vows revenge by targeting Roy's family.Will Roy Todd's family survive the vengeful wrath of his defeated foes?

Zora Grant fell for their servant Robin Thompson, but faced fierce parental opposition. Forced to elope, her father died halting them. Pressured by her mother, Zora ended the relationship. Five years later, billionaire Robin returned to A City, reigniting their entangled lives.

Genius scientist Kevin marries Hazel out of gratitude. However, a misunderstanding drives them apart. Hazel's desperate letters are stolen, and she’s forced out of his life. Years later, she returns as a successful tech CEO with a new love. Kevin gets three chances to win her back, but his pride keeps getting in the way. When their son makes a heartbreaking choice, Kevin realizes too late what he’s lost. Will the truth finally bring them together—or is it too late? EP 1:Hazel reveals her pregnancy to Kevin, leading to a devastating misunderstanding as he accuses her of infidelity and leaves. Seven years later, Hazel tries to reunite their family with proof of Kevin's paternity, but tensions rise as Kevin returns home.Will Kevin finally accept the truth and reunite with his family, or will his pride keep them apart forever?

Lynette Cavendish, a princess in disguise, secretly loved General Leon Arnold. She concealed her status and waited faithfully, elevating him to a high position with royal favor. Yet at his triumphant banquet, Leon announced another bride. Betrayed and humiliated, Lynette’s heartbreak fuels a fierce determination. What will she do next? EP 1:Princess Lynette, disguised as a commoner, sneaks out to celebrate Leon's martial arts championship by preparing special dishes at Cloudcrest Tavern, only to discover Leon is dining there with another woman, Sophie, and his family.Will Lynette's true identity be revealed when she is called to serve Leon and his family at the tavern?

column1: To Kill the Robe, To Find My Own
column4: Hudson grew up idolizing Hunter Yates, the supposed hero who secretly murdered his father. Devoted to justice, he joined the Zenithar Order under Yates's command—never suspecting the truth. When the lies unraveled and his family was left in ruins, Hudson's world collapsed. Turns out, nothing stings like worshiping your dad's killer. Then how will Hudson choose his path? EP 1:Hudson's family is attacked by Hunter Yates' men for the Hans' manual, leading to a tragic confrontation where Hudson is discovered to possess the Divine Soulbone, marking him as a prodigy. Yates, seeing Hudson as a future threat, decides to cripple him and sends him to the Zenithar Order, all while keeping his true potential sealed.Will Hudson ever uncover the truth about his past and break free from Yates' control?

Caleb Murphy, a legal prodigy, gives up a prestigious international firm to join Elena Fisher’s struggling practice, helping her rise to the top. On their wedding day, she gifts him a box of “Spoil-Me Candy” — each piece a promise of unconditional forgiveness. But as old ties resurface and lines begin to blur, how many times can love be tested before it breaks? EP 1:Caleb donates a kidney to Elena's mother out of love, but Elena prioritizes picking up her ex, Riley, over Caleb's recovery, using the Spoil-Me Candy to justify her actions, leaving only three candies left and Caleb's patience running thin.Will Caleb reach his breaking point when the last Spoil-Me Candy is gone?

Raymond and Starling, once a happy couple from different worlds, were torn apart by a tragic accident. To save Raymond, Starling made a painful choice, leaving Raymond to believe she abandoned him. Five years later, Starling has moved on, raising their twins and focusing on her career—until fate brings them back together. Can they heal their past, or is it too late? EP 1:Starling discovers she is pregnant with Raymond's twins, but their joy is short-lived as Raymond is critically injured in an accident. Faced with an impossible choice, Starling promises Raymond's mother to never see him again in exchange for paying his medical bills, leaving him to believe she abandoned him.Will Raymond ever discover the truth behind Starling's disappearance and the existence of their twins?

Growing up in hardship, Claire never expected kindness from fate. Then Sebastian stepped into her life. He became the light in her darkness, while she quietly became his obsession. As love takes root in the shadows, can it break the chains of destiny? EP 1:Claire, a mute and pregnant girl, faces cruel treatment from her peers and school authorities who prioritize the school's reputation over her well-being. As she is locked away during a visit from a high-profile guest, she experiences severe pain and bleeding, desperately pleading for someone to save her baby. The episode highlights the harsh realities of Claire's life and the indifference of those around her.Will Claire's desperate cry for help reach anyone, or will she remain trapped in her silent suffering?

Once betrayed by the very blood she bled for, Celeste Whitmore awakens in the year before everything fell apart. This time, she turns her back on those who chose another and steps into a world that never sought her, only to be cherished beyond measure. But as the ones who cast her aside watch her rise in someone else's name, one question remains: will she ever let them matter again? EP 1:Celeste Whitmore confronts her family about their unfair treatment, revealing how her sacrifices for their success were erased and all benefits given to her sister Lavinia, culminating in a chilling vow for revenge in another life.Will Celeste's next life bring the vengeance she swears to seek?

Tessa Hughes, a rural cleaner, unexpectedly wins a 10-billion-dollar lottery. Excited, she heads to the city to give the money to her son, James Hughes. However, she is humiliated by her daughter-in-law and her son's mother-in-law, and her son also rejects her, severing their mother-son relationship. But when they later learn that Tessa Hughes has won the 10-billion-dollar jackpot, her son and daughter-in-law deeply regret their actions.

Winter Lynn, born into a patriarchal martial arts family, was treated as a servant girl but refused to accept that men were inherently superior to women. By chance, she became a disciple of the Spear God and mastered exceptional skills after years of hard training. Breaking free from her family’s constraints, she boldly competed in the Order of Martial Zenith’s selection, defeating countless men with unstoppable prowess and shattering the chains placed on women, proving their equal strength!

column1: In Love with the Helplessly Romantic CEO
column4: Seven years ago, Hazel had a one night stand with the powerful CEO Hugo. When Hazel returns to the hotel where everything began, her son’s illness forces her to confront the past—and Hugo who unknowingly holds the key. But when their paths collide again, secrets and old trauma between them threaten to tear them apart... can love heal all? EP 1:Hazel, on what was supposed to be her wedding day with Jonas, finds herself trapped with a drugged man, desperately seeking birth control pills and pleading for escape, hinting at a deeper connection with Hugo.What dark secret from Hazel's past will unravel as she seeks Hugo with the ring?

In the Eldoria Kingdom, Alden Sterling endures constant humiliation from Lilith Sterling, who uses her mother's power at Serenfall Palace to oppress her. When Lilith targets Alden's true love, Alden decides enough is enough. In a world ruled by strength, Alden sets out to reclaim her destiny by triumphing at the Dominion Bow Tournament. Can she change her fate?

Aria Quinn, once a master of engineered destruction, wakes in a world of silk and bloodlines, where silence is law and women are currency. Cast as a delicate daughter, a pawn in a marriage of power, she plays the part with quiet precision. But behind every smile lies calculation, and beneath silk, the instinct to detonate. What begins as survival soon threatens to ignite the game itself. EP 1:Aria Quinn cunningly uses Duke Ethan's visit to the Scarlet Court to escape her impending wedding, leaving the Duke intrigued and determined to uncover her identity.Will Duke Ethan succeed in tracking down the mysterious woman who outsmarted him?

Shawn Chan, a world-famous businessman, lost both his parents when he was young. He was raised by his sister, Hanna Chan, but unfortunately they sepparated. After 30 years of searching, he finally found his sister. When he returned home with honor, he found that she was suffering in the brick factory under his company...

Claire and her friends head to a remote forest villa for a vacation, but on the first day, she dreams of a giant python attack. As the dream starts to come true, her warnings are dismissed as a joke. The group stumbles into the python’s lair, and even the rescue team underestimates the threat. As chaos unfolds, they finally realize—Claire’s dream was not just a nightmare, but a deadly prophecy.

Chloe was an ordinary girl until she saved Xander, an alien ruler, and got pregnant with his son, Lucas. After defeating his enemies, Xander returned to Earth but found only Lucas, so he took him home. Seven years later, Chloe is trapped by a cruel stepmother and forced to marry a cruel heir. Just when hope fades, Lucas returns with superpowers, defeats the villains, helps Chloe break free, and reunites them with Xander to start fresh. EP 1:Lucas learns about his mother, Chloe, from his father Xander, who reveals how Chloe saved him and their brief time together before they were separated. Determined to find his mother, Lucas takes his mom's family heirloom and heads to Earth, only to witness Chloe being forced into a marriage against her will.Will Lucas be able to save Chloe from her forced marriage in time?

column1: (Dubbed)Through the Odds, I'm the Last One Standing
column4: Foria Shawn, a promising young doctor, has her life derailed by jealousy and betrayal. Wrongly accused of a grave error, she endures heartbreak and loss. Just when all seems hopeless, she wakes up ten years in the past. Given a second chance, she's set on self - protection and uncovering the truth. But with enemies near and high stakes, will she rewrite her fate or be doomed to repeat history?

column1: (Dubbed) Too Late to Want Me Back
column4: After five years building a company with his childhood friends, Caleb Shaw is betrayed when they fall for a manipulative newcomer. Heartbroken and disillusioned, he sells his shares and agrees to an arranged marriage. Will his "loyal" partners realize their mistake before his wedding day?

The heir to a wealthy family was saved from a kidnapping by a young girl with extraordinary medical skills. He promised to marry her, but she disappeared the next day. 15 years later, under pressure, he enters a contract marriage, unaware that his new bride is the very girl who saved him. However, her identity has been stolen by another, leading him to believe his true love is still out there. As misunderstandings grow, she must fight to reclaim both her identity and his heart...

Ex-national table tennis player Ethan Walker hides his talent as a cleaner. When his skills are accidentally revealed, he flees to the failing Cloud Paddle Club. Despite doubts, he takes on an underdog player. Through thrilling competitions, he overcomes rivals, leads the team to a championship win, and refuses top offers, disappearing after his triumph.

A genius algorithm expert becomes a delivery rider and just begins to feel some warmth from everyday life when he's caught in corporate scheming. The higher-ups turn hostile fast: fists fly, contracts are faked, riders suffer, and lives are at risk. But no one expected this losing battle to hide a shocking twist. EP 1:A world-class algorithm expert, working as a delivery rider, is discovered by a rival company who offers him a lucrative deal to switch sides, but he remains loyal to his current employer, HungryGo, despite the temptations and the high stakes involved in the company's impending IPO.Will Mr. Dalton's loyalty to HungryGo withstand the mounting pressures and offers from rival companies?

Bound by blood and betrayed by fate, Vivienne Hart surrenders her identity to a sister who shares her face but not her heart. Trapped in a stolen marriage and silenced by secrets, she walks the line between duty and desire, deception and truth. But some truths refuse to stay hidden. And some lives will not remain stolen. EP 1:Vivienne Hart, living under her twin sister's identity, faces the consequences of her deception when Commander Ethan Bellamy arrives at the Hart estate seeking his life savior—unaware that Vivienne is the one he truly loves. As tensions rise and her sister's threats loom, Vivienne must navigate the dangerous line between her stolen life and the truth that could free her.Will Vivienne reveal her true identity to Ethan, or will her sister's manipulation keep them apart forever?

column1: You Chose Your First Love, I Chose Goodbye
column4: Anna, neglected by her family after her cancer diagnosis, undergoes a cryogenic experiment and emerges cured. Reborn as Lisa, she reclaims her status as a liver cancer experts and returns powerfully with her new husband and adopted son. EP 1:Anna, suffering from terminal liver cancer, decides to undergo cryogenic preservation after feeling abandoned by her husband and son, who have seemingly moved on with Becca. Despite her husband's attempts to justify his actions, Anna remains resolute in her decision to disappear from their lives.Will Anna's cryogenic procedure truly erase her past, or will she find a way back to confront her family's betrayal?

Saori fakes her way into a rich heir’s heart, only to spiral when she mistakes his mother for a rival. Her revenge turns violent—live-streamed, chaotic, and criminal. But the truth cuts deeper than madness. As the dust settles, one question remains: can even the dead be forgiven? EP 1:Ray announces his sudden marriage to Saori Shirai, a woman with a flawless reputation, hoping she can help him overcome his guilt from Hina's death. Despite his mother's initial reluctance, she agrees to support the wedding, but a mysterious girl's appearance at Hina's memorial raises questions.Who is the mysterious girl that appears at Hina's memorial?

The beloved youngest daughter is framed by a wicked actress and loses her identity as the real heiress. Shunned and mistreated, she quietly protects her family. She joins her brother’s sleep project and enters a capsule. Only after she sleeps do they realize the truth. Regretful, her brothers wait 30 years—until their hair turns gray—to see her again. EP 1:Haerin, the adopted daughter who lost her family's love after being framed by the biological daughter Eugene, decides to join her brother Yawn's cryosleep project as a way to disappear and repay her perceived debt to the family, signing up for a 30-year sleep without revealing her true identity.Will Yawn discover Haerin's true identity before she enters the cryosleep, or will he spend the next 30 years in regret?

Leo was adopted by an old monk since he was young and acquired Peerless martial arts skills there. However, he will die if he could not find his biological mother and a solution. In order to save Leo’s life, the old monk asks Leo to find his mother. Leo not only found his mother quickly, but also made a lot of funny anecdotes after that. But he is so happy that he forgets about his illness. Let's see how the story develops. EP 1:Leo, having mastered seventy-two ultimate martial arts skills, is sent by his master to find his biological mother with a jade pendant as the only clue. Meanwhile, Mrs. Tang is in danger as she refuses to marry her daughter to the young master Thomas Chow, leading to a confrontation where Leo intervenes.Will Leo successfully find his mother and save Mrs. Tang from her predicament?

column1: She Swore by Sword and Time
column4: After refusing the role of Grand General, legendary martial master Sylvia Ashford is thrust into another world, helping a rising martial artist—only to be betrayed. Disguised, she reclaims her honor in a brutal tournament. But vengeance runs deep… When past and present collide, will justice or revenge prevail? EP 1:Sylvia Ashford resigns as the Grand Guardian of Aurelia and mysteriously time-travels hundreds of years into the future, where she finds herself entangled in a martial arts tournament and a budding romance with Saxon. However, she is unaware that Saxon plans to betray her, using her skills to win the tournament and then discard her.Will Sylvia discover Saxon's betrayal before it's too late?

column1: My Daughter Found Her Billionaire Dad
column4: A cold-faced cab driver hides a deadly secret—until a one-night stand with a powerful CEO brings a daughter to his doorstep years later. Just as he warms to his new role as a father, danger strikes. From asthma attacks to corporate betrayal, he’ll fight for love, truth... and the little girl who calls him Daddy. EP 1:The cab driver, who is actually the legendary Master of Celestium, confronts his past and investigates his mother's mysterious death linked to the Haemoticon, while also encountering a high-speed chase and a suspicious woman in his cab.What secrets will the Haemoticon reveal about his mother's death?
