Chloe, CEO of California’s top hotel chain, sponsors poor student Elias and later marries him. On their 10th anniversary, she plans to hand him the company—but a mistress’s video exposes his long-time affair. Chloe confronts him at a hotel branch, only to face humiliation. As Elias arrives, the truth is about to explode.

On her anniversary, Tessa finds her boyfriend cheating with her cousin. Then comes a leukemia diagnosis. Quitting her job and dumping the cheater, she starts living out her bucket list. When she meets CEO Cassian Vaughn, he makes her an offer: he'll fund her dreams—if she agrees to pose as his fiancée.
 EP 1:A woman presents herself as the perfect gift to James, manipulating him by questioning his preference between her and her cousin, revealing a dark and controlling side as she traps him.Will James escape her clutches or succumb to her twisted game?

Six years ago, a cruel scheme tore Elena and Ryan apart. Now, fate drags them back together—but secrets won’t stay buried. With Elena’s child’s life at stake and old enemies closing in, Ryan must decide: protect the woman he once loved… or let vengeance consume him? EP 1:Elena reveals her pregnancy to Ryan, who initially seems supportive but then receives a shocking blackmail text accusing him of rape, leading to a dramatic confrontation and Ryan's abrupt departure, leaving Elena heartbroken and confused about his true intentions.Will Ryan return to face the accusations and support Elena, or will he let his past demons drive him away forever?

For years, noodle shop owner Sable Green and his wife, Sylvia Lynn, played weak...until thugs hurt his family. Now his kill mode is off! The noodle chef reveals he’s the deadliest Lord, and his wife? Oh, she’s the saint. Watch the 'useless husband' shake the martial world! Bloody revenge? That's just the appetizer. EP 1:Sable Green and his wife Sylvia Lynn, who have been pretending to be weak noodle shop owners, face trouble when thugs target them. The thugs are after the 'Elemental Vessel,' hinting at Sylvia's hidden identity as the saint. Sable calmly handles the situation, revealing glimpses of their true, formidable nature.Will Sable and Sylvia's hidden identities be fully exposed in the next episode?

When General Hayden Young fakes his death to escape war, he leaves his wife, Ella Summers, widowed and vulnerable. Enter Zane Shaw, the ruthless regent who’s loved her for years. He offers her a deal: marriage for protection. But when Hayden returns, alive and vengeful, their fragile love faces a storm of lies, power, and passion, turning their romance into a battlefield. EP 1:Hayden Young, who faked his death seven years ago, crashes the Princess Regent's Blossom Banquet, only to discover his wife Ella has remarried and become the Princess Regent. The King, furious over Hayden's treachery that cost 3,000 cavalry, orders the execution of the entire Young family. Ella pleads for mercy for her in-laws, but they die, cursing Hayden. Zane Shaw, the Regent Prince, offers Ella a deal to cover up Hayden's treason in exchange for becoming his Princess Regent, leading to a heated confrontation between Hayden and Ella.Will Ella accept Zane's offer to become the Princess Regent, or will Hayden's return ignite a war of passions and power?

In the gilded halls of a kingdom built on legacy and lies, Jason Shane enters as no more than a pawn, nameless, titleless, and marked by fate. But in a court where bloodlines rule and masks conceal every truth, even a bastard can shake the throne. Behind every whispered secret and silken robe, a reckoning stirs. Because sometimes, the bastard isn't the curse... but the heir fate never dared to crown. EP 1:The kingdom is in turmoil as the king's infertility sparks a heated debate about securing the throne with an heir, while secret revelations about a missing prince and a young boy's desperate escape from becoming a eunuch unfold.Will Jason uncover the truth about his father and his rightful place in the kingdom?

column1: I Don't Want to Stay in the Psychiatric Hospital
column4:
A decade ago, Rachel sacrificed herself to save Adonis from traffickers. Years later,  he finally tracked her to a psychiatric hospital, only to learn her brother had taken her away. In her new but actually old family, Rachel had endured years of abuse by her adopted sister till Adonis rescued her. Together, they're trying to heal over hatred and embrace a new beginning...
 EP 1:Adonis discovers Rachel has been locked in Frostveil Asylum after years of searching for her and immediately sets out to rescue her, uncovering the abuse she endured from her adopted sister and family.Will Adonis be able to save Rachel from her tormentors and bring her to safety?

Eddie and Jenny grew up together in an orphanage. Years later, fate brought them back as Edison, a wealthy CEO, and Sydney, his wife from a powerful adoptive family. Neither recognized the other. When housekeeper Bella discovers Sydney's true identity as Jenny, she claims to be the real Jenny herself. Will Edison and Sydney uncover the truth and rediscover their childhood love? EP 1:Two orphans, Cal and Annie, attempt a daring escape from their captors, recalling a promise of freedom and a white dress, amidst a perilous chase.Will Cal and Annie manage to evade their pursuers and fulfill their childhood promise?

After a cosmic glitch, the supreme Martial God wakes up trapped in the body of Mira Quinn—a mocked, overweight nobody! But beneath that 'fat loser' shell lies unstoppable power. With secret backup from her ride-or-die dad, watch Mira flex on every hater, smash the competition, and rise from trash to throne as the baddest battlefield queen! EP 1:After being rejected and humiliated, Mira Quinn, now inhabited by the spirit of the Martial Saint, decides to join the dangerous Martial Trials despite her father's concerns, setting the stage for a dramatic transformation and showdown.Will Mira's newfound power be enough to overcome the trials and her adversaries?

After her migrant - worker father is severely injured by a dishonest employer, Emma Miller goes to the city to claim compensation. She has a passionate night with the reserved heir Jacob Smith and is misunderstood. Emma finds she's pregnant, but can't pay her father's medical bills and is kicked out of the hospital. With no place to stay, she and her father live on the streets. Just as they face a life - threatening situation, Jacob shows up, clears the misunderstanding and saves them.

For years, Mira endured the suffocating grip of her family’s emotional torment. Desperate to escape, she saw Samuel Dalton as nothing more than a tool for her freedom. But fate had other plans. What started as a fleeting moment of passion turned into a deep connection, where love, healing, and redemption intertwined. Together, they must face their pasts and fight for a future they never expected.
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Rich Family Feud', 'Karma Payback']

column4: Raised in a rain-drenched town and locked away by greedy relatives, she faked madness to survive the rot. Inheriting everything they coveted, she bided her time—until the day she escaped that cursed house. For revenge, she sets her sights on the powerful heir of Jinzhou, laying a trap step by step... only to find herself dangerously indulged. EP 1:A rival's daughter is forced to serve Mr. Burnett, adding insult to injury, while someone returns from a funeral only to realize they've been set up in a game of revenge.Will the one who was set up uncover the truth behind the trap?

Pregnant Victoria is betrayed and abandoned by the man she once trusted. But he has no idea — she’s a billionaire heiress with five uncles who will stop at nothing to protect her. Fate leads her to a love no one can steal, and now, it’s time for the evil couple to pay the price! EP 1:Victoria's five uncles try to convince her to reclaim her billion-dollar inheritance, but she insists on attending Robert's signing ceremony, determined to reveal her true identity to him now that his career is flourishing.Will Robert accept Victoria's true identity when she finally reveals it?

Once the Martial Lord, now a mere errand boy. When his sister is bullied in the ring, he steps in but is humiliated. In a moment of crisis, he breaks his seal and shocks the crowd. Yet the true enemy hides in the shadows of the Luminary Society. The truth is about to surface, and the fight has begun! EP 1:The once unbeatable Martial Lord disappears after his mother is attacked, leading him to seal his cultivation and promise to hide his identity, while his sister faces danger in the present day.Will the Martial Lord break his vow of secrecy to protect his sister?

column1: I Made Him, I’ll Break Him
column4: Leona Jones, heiress of Jones Group, secretly helped her husband Hugh Clark build his empire while hiding her true identity. On their 7th anniversary, Hugh humiliates her by celebrating with another woman. But Leona strikes back—exposing Clark Group’s defective products and filing for divorce. But is revenge her only motive? Who will have the last laugh? EP 1:Leona Jones receives news that her grandfather finally accepts her husband Hugh, allowing her to reveal her true identity as the heiress of Jones Group. However, her excitement is shattered when she discovers Hugh is celebrating with his secretary instead of being with her.Will Leona confront Hugh about his betrayal or will she use this opportunity to execute her revenge?

Born in the countryside, Nora Fields was discovered by retired ping-pong legend Ethan Leigh and trained under his wing. As she rises in the ranks, city players mock her humble roots—saying farm girls don't belong on the court. Pressured to quit, Nora picks up her paddle instead, determined to fight her way to the top, one match at a time. EP 1:Nora struggles with a heavy paddle training set by her master, Ethan Leigh, who also arranges for her to join the Riverport Table Tennis Union and secures a job for her mom. Meanwhile, Nora's determination is tested when she faces the daunting Dragon Spin Serve and a sudden confrontation with her mom.Will Nora overcome the challenges of the heavy paddle and the Dragon Spin Serve to prove her worth in the Union?

Back from abroad, heiress Glenna Bennett slips into the country’s top design academy under borrowed silence, determined to make her mark on her own terms. But when a stranger claims her name and her past at the opening gala, quiet ambition ignites into a battle for truth, identity, and power. Because some names carry more than legacy. They carry a price. EP 1:Glenna Bennett, an heiress returning from abroad, secures admission into the prestigious Faedon Academy under a veil of secrecy, aiming to carve her own path. However, her parents' extravagant gestures, including a massive investment in the academy, threaten to blow her cover as whispers about the 'billionaire's daughter' begin to circulate among students and faculty.Will Glenna's true identity be revealed to everyone at Faedon Academy?

Three years ago, General Wade dies protecting the crown. His widow, Yasmin, returns home with daughter Julia and the family’s honor plaque. Eighteen years later, Sierra burns their shrine and frames Julia in a deadly scheme. Sierra poses as princess and claws for power while Julia scrambles to expose the truth. As the scaffold looms, a hidden betrayal waits to be revealed… EP 1:The emperor announces a southern tour to Greystone city to select the prince's bride, with Julia, the daughter of the late General Wade, as the chosen candidate. Meanwhile, Sierra, the daughter of the House of Quinn, schemes to claim the title of princess for herself.Will Sierra succeed in her deadly scheme to become the princess, or will Julia uncover the truth in time?

In a world where internal energy reigns supreme, Ethan Shaw finds himself unable to cultivate Soulcraft due to his lack of a Soulwell. He can only serve as a combat partner for the sect's disciples, enduring all forms of bullying. However, he possesses a legendary physique. When the Blazewood Academy selection begins, Ethan surprises everyone by passing the tests with his exceptional physical abilities, shocking those who deemed him worthless. EP 1:Ethan Shaw, despite lacking an Inner Elixir Field and being unable to practice Inner Energy Arts, defies expectations by deciding to join Flamepeak Monastery's trials using only his brute strength. Meanwhile, the Mystic Heaven Sect faces a takeover by the Demon Sect, but a mysterious and powerful martial sage intervenes, sparking a search for this enigmatic savior.Will Ethan's sheer strength be enough to overcome the trials, and who is the mysterious sage that saved Mystic Heaven Sect?

Helen Scott lived to please and died forgotten, cast aside by those she loved most. Reborn colder and sharper, she devotes herself to the only bond that still matters. But when the past resurfaces and a fire she never meant to spark begins to burn, her second chance may cost her more than she ever dared to risk. EP 1:Lily confronts her mother Helen about her past neglect and betrayal, revealing the deep emotional scars left by Helen's abandonment and mistreatment, ultimately deciding to sever their relationship for good.Will Helen truly get a second chance to make things right?

Merchant heir Samuel Hayes lies dying. For the auspicious sign, his grandma arranges a wedding with debt-ridden Charlotte Reed.
Awakening to find a "lucky bride," Samuel rages—he seeks only the childhood savior he gave his pendant to. Unknown to him, mute Charlotte is that girl, having lost her voice saving him.
Bound by misunderstanding - what fate has in store for their marriage? EP 1:Charlotte Reed, burdened by her father's debts, agrees to marry the ailing Samuel Hayes in a desperate bid to bring him luck, unaware that she is the childhood girl he has been searching for all along.Will Samuel discover that his new mute wife is the girl who saved him years ago?

Sylvie Hayes, daughter of the minister, disguises herself as a maid to seek justice after General Eric Reid falsely accuses her father of embezzlement, leading to his death sentence. She hopes to plead with Emperor Thaddeus Hawthorne, but he has avoided the harem for a decade. By chance, they meet, sparking an affair. Misunderstood, Sylvie nearly faces execution. Six months later, she makes a shocking discovery—one that places her in grave danger…

When Wendy Yate witnessed her parents' brutal deaths as a child, she swore vengeance. Fifteen years later, a victorious General of Heavenly Might, Wendy returns home to uncover the truth. But fate has other plans when she finds her grandfather and his family humiliated. The truth behind her parents’ deaths is more twisted than she thought. From General to Empress, Wendy Yate is determined to right the wrongs—no matter the cost. EP 1:Wendy Yate's childhood is shattered as she witnesses the brutal murder of her parents, setting her on a path of vengeance. Years later, as a victorious general, she returns to uncover the truth behind their deaths, only to find her remaining family humiliated and the truth more twisted than she imagined.Will Wendy uncover the full truth behind her parents' deaths and exact her revenge?

After seven years of harsh widowhood, gentle but resilient Amelia Davis is rescued during a graveyard ambush—by none other than the emperor in disguise. When she's found pregnant, scandal erupts. Her father dies shielding her, but as the truth comes to light, the empress dowager repents, and Amelia rises—crowned as empress, mother to the future heir. EP 1:Amelia Davis, a widow enduring seven years of harsh mourning, is ambushed in a graveyard and rescued by the emperor in disguise, leading to a dramatic turn in her fate.Will Amelia's unexpected encounter with the emperor change her destiny forever?

column1: (Dubbed) My Bestie Watches as My Prince Spoils Me
column4: Lisa White and Margaret Harris have been best friends for years. Lisa marries a billionaire chairman, while Margaret’s husband dies, leaving her broke. Out of jealousy, Margaret kills Lisa at her wedding and takes her own life. Both wake up years earlier. Margaret seduces Lisa’s fiancé, aiming for wealth, leaving Lisa with a “poor” man. Lisa accepts, unaware he’s Mark Thompson, a billionaire heir in disguise. Margaret schemes, but Lisa becomes the true chairman’s wife, and Margaret faces her dow EP 1:Margaret Harris, consumed by jealousy, murders her best friend Lisa White at Lisa's wedding to the chairman of Vastascend Group and then takes her own life. Both women wake up years earlier, with Margaret now determined to seduce Lisa's fiancé to secure wealth for herself, leaving Lisa with a seemingly poor man. Unbeknownst to Margaret, Lisa's new partner is actually Mark Thompson, a billionaire heir in disguise. The episode ends with Lisa accepting her fate, while Margaret's schemes begin to unfold.Will Margaret's plans succeed, or will Lisa uncover the truth about Mark's identity?

She looks sweet, but hides a burning rage. A girl shaped by revenge meets a cold, dangerous man. She plans to use him—but he has his own game. Their love is fire and ice: passion, fights, and pain. When she walks away, he breaks. Now, he’ll do anything to get her back, even destroy everything in his way. EP 1:At the White Group's 10th anniversary celebration, Debby White shocks everyone by playing a haunting funeral dirge on the piano, hinting at a deep-seated grudge and setting the stage for a dramatic confrontation.What dark secret does Debby hold against the White Group?

At her ex-fiancé's wedding, Gwendolyn Courville drops a bombshell: her true identity. No longer the "poor girl" who had been betrayed by her ex-fiancé, but the woman he had foolishly lost. As the stunned whispers of the guests gradually subsided, a mysterious man appeared, shocking everyone. EP 1:At Scenture Global, Mr. Haleshroud asserts his authority by firing employees for unauthorized absence, while Gwendolyn, the heiress, confronts her grandmother about being forced into a match with Mandy Moore. Tensions escalate when Gwendolyn reveals her true status and a mysterious man disrupts the office, leading to a dramatic confrontation.Will Gwendolyn's defiance change her grandmother's plans, and who is the mysterious man causing chaos at Scenture Global?

Former racing legend Chase Walker has lived under the radar as a humble mechanic in countryside for five years. However, the Raptor Riders shows up, challenging the locals to a high-stakes race. With the town’s future at stake, Chase must decide: stay hidden or dust off his skills for one last ride. Can the washed-up champion outdrive his past—and save their home?

She warned him and saved a powerful man, only to be blamed when another woman died in childbirth. Betrayed and punished for her loyalty, she dies full of regret. But fate gives her a second chance—reborn on the very day everything began. This time, she trusts no one. She’ll rewrite her fate, save the right life, and make them all pay. EP 1:The protagonist risks her life to save the Commander, only to be betrayed by her husband, Lieutenant Johnson Calvin, who prioritizes his mistress Talia over his duty. In a twist of fate, she recalls her past life where Calvin blamed her for Talia's death, and now seeks vengeance by denying him the merit of saving the Commander.Will the protagonist succeed in her revenge and rewrite her fate this time?

After witnessing his father’s affair, Nathan Carter is left with deep psychological scars and a sexual dysfunction. In an attempt to secure his inheritance, he begins an unusual approach. But to his surprise, he finds himself attracted to Emily Smith, a nurse. What follows is a comedic chase—can he confront his past, or will love complicate things even more? EP 1:Nathan Carter, the CEO of Carter Healthcare, struggles with his psychological trauma and sexual dysfunction due to witnessing his father's affair. Despite his reluctance, he is advised to try stimulation therapy. Meanwhile, his friend pushes him to attend a party where he unexpectedly feels attracted to Emily, the nurse delivering wine, sparking a surprising turn of events.Will Nathan finally confront his past and embrace this unexpected attraction, or will his trauma keep him from pursuing Emily?

She returns to her wealthy birth family pretending to be fragile—unaware she’s actually a trained assassin raised by a deadly syndicate. As relatives plot to expose her and rival gangs seek revenge, she forms unlikely alliances, reunites with a past flame, and rises from pawn to power in both the family and the underworld. EP 1:Alina, the deadly assassin and leader of the syndicate, decides to visit her long-lost wealthy family under a fabricated identity of a fragile, gentle woman. Meanwhile, her past catches up as an old enemy resurfaces, threatening to expose her true identity and endanger her family.Will Alina's carefully crafted persona hold up when her past comes knocking at her family's door?

For 20 years, Lena Quinn raised Ethan Grant's three children, built his business, and held the family together. When his selfish ex-wife Monica returns, the entire family betrays Lena, casting her aside like an outsider. But when their world starts falling apart without her, they scramble to win her back. But this time, Lena's done. EP 1:Lena Quinn, who has sacrificed 20 years of her life to raise Ethan Grant's children and build his business, faces betrayal when his ex-wife Monica returns just as Ethan is about to achieve great success. Monica tries to reclaim her place in the family, leading to a heated confrontation with Lena, who refuses to be pushed aside.Will Lena stand her ground against Monica's sudden return?

column1: In Her Name: An Imposter's Revenge
column4: Branded a traitor, Grand Marshal Keene falls—his family wiped out. His daughter, Winona, escapes death… only to assume the identity of a dying noble girl. Hiding in exile for ten years, she prepares to expose a deadly conspiracy. But can one girl rewrite a kingdom’s fate? EP 1:Winona Keene, the sole survivor of the slaughtered Keene family, assumes the identity of Yvette Su, a noble girl who died in exile. Living under the cruel treatment of Yvette's supposed family, Winona bides her time, planning to avenge her fallen kin and clear her father's name while navigating the treacherous waters of the Su household.Will Winona's true identity be uncovered before she can exact her revenge?

Bruce Lester, a corrupt chancellor, assaulted James Evans ' wife, causing her suicide. James trained his children, Sally and Eric for vengeance, while Matthew, with a damaged elixir field, was confined to Evans Cottage. Mentored by reclusive Sword God, Matthew got Dawnbreaker and became the new Sword God. Then he left Evans Cottage, rescued Sally from Bruce's son, Jerry, and earned his father's recognition. The family then together set out to avenge their beloved wife and mother... EP 1:After witnessing the tragic death of his mother Isabella at the hands of Prime Minister Edward Sterling, Felix Bennett is determined to avenge her despite his damaged dantian. His father, Sebastian, and sister, Aurora, plan to seek revenge, but Felix is deemed useless and confined. However, a hidden Sword Master sees potential in Felix and offers to teach him swordsmanship, setting him on a path to prove his worth and fulfill his vow of vengeance.Will Felix's training with the Sword Master give him the power he needs to avenge his mother's death?

After losing her family and her sight, General's daughter Eleanor Shea is forced into marriage by scheming relatives. Just when all hope seems lost, she meets the ruthless yet broken Prince Percival Whitmore. With nothing left to lose, she takes a gamble—marry the devil and see if there is still love. EP 1:Eleanor Shea, pretending to be blind, discovers a plot against her when her drink is switched with Deer Blood Wine, leading to a tense encounter with the ruthless Prince Percival Whitmore.Will Eleanor's deception hold as Percival closes in on her?

column1: (Dubbed)Campus Queen Falls for Me After My First Love Betrayed Me
column4: In high school, Colin devoted three years to Yolanda, giving up his esports talent, trusting her promise to be with him after her 20th birthday. But she arrived with Eric. Heartbroken, he revived his esports dream. He met Janet, a gamer and a campus belle he once helped, and love blossomed. Yolanda, losing him, panicked and tried to get him back... EP 1:Raymond Cole, who devoted three years of his life to Luna Carter based on her promise to be with him after her 20th birthday, is heartbroken when she shows up with another man, Eric, publicly humiliating him. Raymond reflects on the sacrifices he made, including giving up a promising esports career, only to realize the promise was never serious to Luna.Will Raymond's shattered dreams lead him back to esports, or will he find a new path to redemption?

column1: Her Ex Is a Tech Tycoon
column4: Chad Kelly sacrificed everything for his family, working tirelessly until diagnosed with terminal lung cancer. Betrayed by his wife and wealthy brother, he dies brokenhearted — only to awaken ten years in the past. He chooses his own path and pursues his dream of revolutionary tech. But can he rise from tragedy and reclaim his life? EP 1:Chad Kelly, diagnosed with terminal lung cancer due to hazardous work conditions, reflects on his sacrifices for his family while confronting his wife's infidelity and dissatisfaction with their life. Meanwhile, Trista Miller's tech breakthrough highlights the success Chad could have had if he hadn't abandoned his career for his family.Will Chad's heartbreaking realization of betrayal lead him to seek redemption in his remaining days?

Luke Foster, a legendary Ace Pilot, takes in Susan and Joyce, daughters of 370 Air Crash victims, dreaming of a perfect future. Yet, their selfishness and Leo Williams's schemes shatter his life. Sacrificing his honor, Luke ventures into space. Three years later, he marries Sophia Lewis, finding hope again. As Leo’s sinister deeds surface, will Susan and Joyce face the weight of their past choices? EP 1:Nolan, a heroic pilot, faces betrayal when his fiancées, Joy and Sylvia, cheat with his apprentice Wayne just days before their decennial marriage pact. Despite the scandal, Nolan sacrifices his Medal of Valor to save Wayne's job, only to decide to leave for the Space Administration, abandoning his tumultuous relationships.Will Nolan's departure to the Space Administration bring him the peace he seeks, or will the past continue to haunt him?

column1: The Many Faces of Mrs. Whitmore
column4:
After years in the dark, Vivian Colman returns to the world that betrayed her—smarter, stronger, and no longer the woman they remember.
Tangled in secrets, power, and hidden identities, she enters a dangerous game where trust is rare… and revenge runs deep. EP 1:After five years in prison for a crime she swears she didn't commit, Vivian Colman is released and returns to her family, only to face betrayal and a cold reception, hinting at deep-seated conflicts and her determination to uncover the truth.Will Vivian uncover the truth behind her wrongful conviction and take revenge on those who betrayed her?

Against the backdrop ofraging wildfires in Los Angeles, thecontractual marriage between firefghter Liam and novelist Natalieis thrown into crisis due to misunderstandings, betrayal, and life-and-death trials. As the wildfres spread, Liam gradually realizeshis true feelings for Natalie, while she reexamines their relationship through the pain. The two grow closer amid disaster andconspiracy, ultimately rekindling their love from the ashes. EP 1:Against the backdrop of wildfires in Los Angeles, firefighter Liam and novelist Natalie's contractual marriage faces tension as Liam's colleague Chloe stirs conflict by claiming Liam's affection, leading to a heated confrontation between the women. Meanwhile, the spreading wildfire adds urgency to their personal drama.Will Liam choose Natalie or Chloe as the flames draw closer?

Office drone Zane Chow wakes up in a novel—as a rich second-gen simp—forced by a system to confess to campus belle Yvonne Lynn within seven days or die. He exposes the original male lead Tristan Stark's schemes, takes over his identity, and climbs to the top of the elite Stark family. From underdog to tycoon—turns out being a simp has its perks... EP 1:Zane Chow, an office drone, wakes up inside a novel as a rich second-generation simp, forced by a mysterious system to confess his love to campus belle Yvonne Lynn within seven days or face death. Despite his extravagant offers and desperate pleas, Yvonne rejects him harshly. The situation takes a surreal turn when Zane realizes he's trapped in the novel 'Tristan Stark Rules the World' and must navigate this new reality to survive.Will Zane find a way to win Yvonne's heart before his time runs out, or is his fate already sealed?

Reginald, a secret emperor, gave up the throne to live a normal life with his wife, Rosalind, but she grew cold and cheated. Even their kids turned on him, pushing for divorce. Reginald reclaimed his crown, exposed the truth, and cut them off. Rosalind, misled, accused him of being a fake. When he proved who he was and exposed real corruption, she begged for forgiveness—but he’d already moved on with Princess Isolde. EP 1:Reginald, the secret emperor, hurries home to his wife Rosalind with a gift, but is interrupted by his brother who urges him to return to the palace. Reginald refuses, prioritizing Rosalind's safety and happiness over palace politics, while hinting at a possible romantic surprise from her.Will Rosalind's surprise rekindle their love or reveal deeper secrets?

Bankrupt and starving, Nando Harper received help from Hamlet Noodle Shop owner Maddie Lee. A decade later, the now-successful tycoon returned to find her shop being crushed by a food conglomerate's dirty tactics. Nando helped Maddie expose the corruption, transforming "Hamlet Noodle Shop" into a social enterprise that help lots of people - proving one good deed can ripple through generations. EP 1:A bankrupt and starving Nando Harper receives a helping hand from Maddie Lee, the owner of Hamlet Noodle Shop, who encourages him to never give up. Ten years later, a successful Nando returns to repay her kindness, only to find her shop under threat from a food conglomerate's dirty tactics.Will Nando be able to save Maddie's noodle shop from the conglomerate's schemes?

On the fifth anniversary of her marriage to Benson Snyder, Tina Swann was brutally murdered by her husband and his mistress, Eleanor Lee. She discovered the shocking truth: Benson was not infertile, and the adopted child she had painstakingly raised was actually Benson and Eleanor's. Her five years of marriage had been a stepping stone for Benson's success. As she died in despair, she suddenly found herself reborn three months earlier. In this life, can she change her fate and exact her revenge? EP 1:Tina Swann is brutally murdered by her husband Benson Snyder and his mistress Eleanor Lee on their fifth wedding anniversary, only to discover the shocking truth about her marriage and adopted son. As she dies in despair, she is reborn three months earlier, determined to change her fate and exact revenge.Will Tina succeed in her quest for revenge in her second chance at life?

Lily Millers, a journalist, has a flash marriage with Oscar Stewart, a top actor. When Oscar announces his marriage, the entertainment world is shocked, speculating who Mrs. Stewart is. Meanwhile, Lily’s half-sister, Beatrice Millers, falsely claims to be Oscar’s wife while belittling Lily. Lily, hiding the marriage, faces challenges from Beatrice and learns of Oscar’s supposed first love, unaware she is the one he’s secretly loved all along. EP 1:On what should have been her death anniversary, a woman confronts her husband, Nathan, who reveals shocking truths about their marriage—his affair with Melissa and their biological child, Miles, whom she unknowingly raised. As Nathan coldly plans her demise, she vows revenge from the afterlife, only to seemingly be reborn for retribution.Will she succeed in her quest for vengeance against those who betrayed her?

Once hailed as the top businesswoman in Mariton, Luna Lynn gave up her career for family—only to discover her husband's long-term betrayal and a devastating secret: her beloved adopted son is the child of her best friend and her husband. As her world crumbles, an old act of kindness sparks an unexpected redemption that may just save her life—and her legacy. EP 1:Luna Lynn, a successful businesswoman, shows kindness to a struggling single mother and her daughter by helping them start a food cart business, while also preparing to adopt a son with her husband, unaware of the betrayal lurking in her personal life.Will Luna's act of kindness come back to help her when her world starts to fall apart?

column1: A Throne Built With Her Life
column4: Princess Edith and Prince Lionel shared an unbreakable bond. However, when Edith helped Lionel take the throne from their tyrant father, their victory attracted more schemes. Manipulated by his jealous consorts, Lionel strikes down a supposed traitor, only to discover too late that the dying victim is his devoted sister... EP 1:Princess Edith recounts the harrowing childhood she and her brother Lionel endured under their tyrannical father, including a brutal punishment scene that highlights the king's madness and cruelty.Will Edith and Lionel find a way to escape their father's tyranny?

Kiki joins her best friend Yara on a trip, but a tragic night changes everything. After refusing to switch beds, Kiki watches Yara fall from the upper berth, causing a miscarriage. Everyone blames Kiki, and Yara's abusive husband kills Kiki in cold blood. Now reborn, Kiki realizes betrayal runs deep. Her friend isn't who she thought, and her boyfriend hides dangerous secrets. Can she uncover the truth and rewrite her fate before it's too late? EP 1:Kiki is blamed for her best friend Yara's miscarriage after refusing to swap bunks on a train trip, leading to Yara's fall and the loss of her baby. Kiki discovers that her boyfriend Nate orchestrated the situation, and she is ultimately killed by Yara's abusive husband Zack. Reborn back to the moment they boarded the train, Kiki now has a chance to uncover the truth and change her fate.Will Kiki be able to expose the betrayal and save herself this time?

Long ago, the last Sage of Great Sharn fell, his ascension shattered by betrayal. Now, within the fading halls of Umbra Resurgens, a ten-year-old heir named Yack Namgung emerges, veiled in innocence yet marked by something far older. As rival sects gather and ancient rites awaken, the martial world begins to tremble. For in this quiet boy, a power long buried begins to stir, and what returns through him may not be mortal. EP 1:After being ambushed during his ascension, the Kunlun Sage's soul fuses with young Yack Namgung, just as Umbra Ferox launches an attack on Umbra Resurgens, revealing a deeper conflict over the reunification of the factions and the Codex Umbra.Will the Kunlun Sage's presence within Yack turn the tide against Umbra Ferox's aggression?

After a tragic betrayal, Sophia Su and her envious sister Sylvia fall from a cliff—only to wake up 10 years earlier at a factory gala! Sylvia schemes to steal Sophia’s wealthy fiancé, forcing her into a humiliating marriage with "temp worker" Andrew Lee. But as Sophia endures workplace abuse and vicious rivals, dark secrets unfold… Who is Andrew really? And when Sylvia’s lies spiral, whose side will fate choose? EP 1:Sophia Su and her envious sister Sylvia fall from a cliff and wake up 10 years earlier at a factory gala. Sylvia schemes to steal Sophia’s wealthy fiancé, Greg Tanner, by giving him her flower basket first, forcing Sophia into a humiliating position. As Sophia realizes Sylvia has also been reborn, dark secrets begin to unfold.Will Sophia be able to outmaneuver Sylvia and reclaim her destiny?

column1: I Chose the Devil Over the Prince
column4: At the university welcome party, Roslyn meets Quentin—but after her rebirth, betrayal strikes when her sister Loretta sets her up. Seeing Quentin for who he truly is, Roslyn turns to Brett, the troublemaker no one expects. What she doesn't know? Brett is the governor’s son and the leader of an Underworld gang... EP 1:Roslyn Wright, now married to the wealthy Quentin Murphy, is confronted by her sister Loretta at a university event, leading to a violent outburst. As Roslyn reflects on her past choices, she finds herself inexplicably sent back in time four years to the night she first met Quentin. Realizing Loretta is also aware of the future, Roslyn decides to alter her destiny, avoiding the path that led to her misery while Loretta schemes to take her place.Will Roslyn succeed in changing her fate, or will Loretta's plans come to fruition?

Elena Whitmore is stunned to learn that Sebastian Hunt has been searching for her mother. Believing he wants to pursue her mom, Elena prepares for the worst—until her stepsister, Brittany Sloan, suddenly claims to be the woman he's looking for. As the truth unravels and tension builds, can Elena expose the lies and win back her identity? EP 1:Elena Whitmore and her friends discuss the mysterious and wealthy Sebastian Hunt's rumored preference for older women, leading to a humorous yet awkward encounter when they realize he might have overheard their candid remarks. The scene sets up intrigue around Sebastian's true intentions and Elena's bold personality.Will Elena's blunt comments about Sebastian Hunt come back to haunt her?

In the 1990s, factory director Troy Chase hides his early-onset Alzheimer's from his family, determined to complete one final mission: restructuring Daphon Factory to save his workers and secure his family's future. Misled by rumors, his wife and workers turn on him, believing he's a traitor. By the time they learn the truth, Troy's already gone—or so they think. What they never knew: Troy chose to start over, leaving them to face a lifetime of regret. EP 1:During a critical machine malfunction at Daphon Factory, worker reluctance to risk their lives puts the factory's future in jeopardy until Troy Chase steps in to manually shut the valve, saving the factory but revealing troubling personal sentiments about his wife Jade.Will Troy's cryptic words about Jade and his risky actions at the factory lead to a deeper family conflict?

She died betrayed—only to wake up the night before her "perfect" sister’s wedding. Last life, she was tricked into taking the cursed marriage, then framed as a husband-stealer when the groom miraculously recovered. This time? No more pawn. No more mercy. She exposes the fraud, burns the "happy ending" to the ground, and carves her vengeance into history. The rules are simple now: if they stand with the fake saint, they die with her. EP 1:The protagonist reflects on her tragic marriage to Marcus Ashford, who died in battle, revealing his true love for her sister Helena, now the queen. Despite her suffering, including a lost child and the usurpation of the Ashford title, she is protected by Helena's status. The scene culminates with a shocking decree for her to join Marcus in death, hinting at deeper betrayals and setting the stage for her revenge.Will she submit to the decree or unveil the truth behind her suffering?

Martha Collins leaves the military to serve her husband's company diligently, only to hear, "You're just a useless secretary, while Jessica is a strong, independent captain." Her husband's stupid friends mock her, but they never know she was once a fierce soldier, fighter pilot, polyglot, top scholar, and elite hacker... EP 1:Martha's emotional outburst over a seemingly trivial necklace reveals its deep significance as her late mother's last memento, sparking a heated confrontation with her husband Matthew who had already gifted it to Jessica, his co-pilot, leading to public humiliation and questions about their marriage.Will Martha reclaim her mother's necklace and reveal her true formidable past to those who underestimate her?

Sue built an empire and gave her heart to the daughter she believed was hers. But when betrayal comes from within, she dies heartbroken, only to wake up years before, with the truth burning in her mind. This time, she won't be fooled. The "real" daughter? Cast out. The adopted one? Her new queen. Let the real game begin. EP 1:Sue Quinn, once a powerful and loving mother, is now destitute and begging for water from her adopted daughter Vivian, who reveals the cruel truth about her origins and the betrayal by Caleb Lee, the butler turned vice president, who swapped Sue's real daughter with his own to secure his position. The revelation leaves Sue heartbroken and dead, with Vivian claiming the Quinn fortune for herself.Will Sue's real daughter ever be found, or is the Quinn legacy truly lost to Vivian's deceit?

Gavin Johnson spent his life raising three adopted daughters, only to be betrayed and cast aside through someone else's scheme. Heartbroken, he chooses to enter cryo-sleep, offering his life to support the daughters' "Life Extension Project." But fate isn't without mercy—Gavin is finally reunited with his real daughter, Anya Anderson. And as for the three sisters... their choices lead to a chilling end. EP 1:Gavin Johnson, heartbroken by the betrayal of his three adopted daughters, decides to enter cryo-sleep for the Life Extension Project they initiated—originally meant to spend more time with him. However, the project's true nature is revealed when David Young, the biological father, claims the sisters and their possessions. A violent confrontation ensues, leading to Gavin's realization that his family is lost forever.Will Gavin ever reunite with his daughters, or is his cryo-sleep his final goodbye?

Beneath her gentle noble lady guise as Lord Logan’s niece, Eleanor hides a fearsome secret—raised by a hermit master, she’s the crimson-gowned vigilante who defends wronged women. Hunting for her missing friend Grace, she stumbles on tortured Luna’s group. Clues point to Damien… Could he be behind Grace’s disappearance? Her blade’s about to uncover the truth.

Elise Monroe, the heiress of Monroe Corporation, harbors a secret love for her father’s best friend, Sebastian Cole. As she matures, her feelings grow stronger, but Sebastian hides his love out of loyalty to her father. When dark forces close in, Sebastian steps in to protect her. But as shocking secrets unravel, will their love survive the ultimate betrayal and the consequences of crossing forbidden lines? EP 1:Elise Monroe is attacked by unknown assailants but is rescued by Sebastian Cole, her father's best friend, who steps in to protect her as dark forces close in.Who is behind the attack on Elise and what secrets will be uncovered next?

column1: (Dubbed)Loving the Tyrant I Swore to Kill
column4: After touching the tyrant's skull, Wenona Zanetti finds herself in the Novarion dynasty, where she's forced to kill the tyrant to become empress. She pretends to love him to survive, but secretly plans his death. The twist? The tyrant can read her mind. What will happen between them? EP 1:Wenona Zanetti is suddenly transported back 1300 years to the Novarion dynasty after touching the tyrant's skull, where she finds herself as the Empress, only to be stripped of her title and sentenced to execution along with her family. She discovers the tyrant, Noctis Fitzgerald, can hear her thoughts, revealing her knowledge of his grim future.Will Wenona's knowledge of the future change the tyrant's fate or her own?

Lira Crowell, a sacred dancer of the Crowell clan, can summon the gods three times in her life—at a deadly cost. Twice, she danced for Hadrian Vale, helping him rise as the North Lord of Summerdyn, secretly enduring blindness and poison. Betrayed by her sister Yvaine and misunderstood by Hadrian, Lira agrees to her last dance. But the price isn't death... As old secrets unravel, love, power, and fate collide in a final, irreversible choice. EP 1:Lira Crowell, a sacred dancer who has already sacrificed her sight and health for Hadrian Vale, is pressured into performing her final Summoning Dance to save Hadrian's dying wife, despite knowing it could cost her life and unleash unforeseen consequences.Will Lira survive the deadly consequences of her third and final dance, and what dark fate awaits Hadrian for his selfish demands?

Iris Shea, betrayed and killed by her husband and housekeeper in her past life, is reborn to seek revenge. With the help of Josef Harris, the Regent's son, she exposes dark secrets. She discovers the Princess is her child, then rescues her child, and kills her enemies. But is her past truly over? EP 1:Iris Shea witnesses the brutal betrayal and murder of her family by her husband Edmund and the housekeeper Eleanor, only to be reborn with a burning desire for vengeance against those who wronged her.Will Iris succeed in her quest for revenge against Edmund and Eleanor?

Kidnapped at six and raised under a new name, Irene Allen has no idea she's the real heiress of the Brown family—or that she was once promised to Evan Wilson, now her cold, brilliant classmate. As sparks fly, a jealous adopted daughter fights to keep Irene's identity buried. But the truth leaves scars… and someone won't survive it. EP 1:Irene Allen discovers a shocking connection to Evan Wilson through a betrothal and a peach birthmark, while a jealous adopted daughter causes trouble at school, revealing deep-seated conflicts and hidden identities.Will Irene uncover the full truth about her past and the sinister forces trying to keep it buried?

column1: Fist of Fury:Father and Son Legacy
column4: Years after boxing champ Yakob was forced into hiding by a dirty setup, his son Zack gets trapped in the world of underground fights. To save him, Yakob returns to the ring. Father and son fight side by side, blazing through the King of the Ring tournament—because in this family, fists do the talking. EP 1:Dragon becomes the undefeated boxing champion, but his refusal to throw a fight leads to a deadly confrontation with a powerful boss, endangering his family and setting the stage for a tragic revenge story.Will Yakob avenge his wife's death and protect his son from the same ruthless world?

Five years ago, Clara Grant became empress to save Ethan Quinn. Now rebels rise, and he rushes to her side. Love and hate pull them close, push them apart—unaware they're caught in the emperor's game. In this game, love isn't the prize—it's the bait... EP 1:Ethan Quinn, accused of treason by the Emperor, faces execution but is unexpectedly spared by Clara Grant, who reveals she is to become Empress. Heartbroken and enraged by her apparent betrayal, Ethan confronts Clara, only to be dismissed and humiliated, as she declares her allegiance to power over their past love.Will Ethan seek revenge or uncover the truth behind Clara's sudden rise to power?

Ryan, a lowly brothel slave, vowed to escape with his childhood love Lillian—until the madam and city lord left him for dead. Rescued by a warlord, he claws his way to power. Years later, he storms the city not for conquest, but for her. Yet saving her means destroying the corrupt lord who once broke them, and facing the dark that swallows her... EP 1:Ryan, a brothel slave, attempts to escape with his childhood love Lillian, but they are caught by the madam and city lord. Ryan is left for dead after a brutal confrontation, but is miraculously rescued by a warlord. Years later, Ryan, now powerful, returns to the city not for conquest but for Lillian, setting the stage for a dramatic confrontation with the corrupt lord who once tore them apart.Will Ryan's quest for vengeance reunite him with Lillian, or will the dark forces that swallowed her consume them both?

Emma Rivers, raised by guardian James Todd, loves him but is rejected. She marries Liam, only to be betrayed. After escaping an asylum and hearing of James' "death," she seeks revenge—until he returns. As he secretly protects her, she fights back fiercely. Near death, he confesses his love. Together, they fell in love and defy all odds. EP 1:Emma, confined in an asylum, clings to her love for James, believing he will rescue her. However, she is confronted with the shocking news of James's death, allegedly caused by her love, leading to her emotional breakdown and a vow of revenge.Will Emma uncover the truth behind James's supposed death and seek vengeance?

Once stripped of power and name, Ethan Holt disappeared from the world that betrayed him. Love was the only reason he stayed. But like medicine, love has side effects. Behind white coats and polished titles, ambition festers, and not every promise heals. Years later, when the truth surfaces, he reclaims everything they took, and this time, he’s not here to forgive. What follows isn’t a cure. It's consequences. EP 1:Ethan Holt, the disgraced heir, confronts Venessa about stealing his West District project, revealing a tense power struggle within the Holt Group. Meanwhile, a poisoned wound hints at deeper dangers, and Ethan's secretive relationship with Ava, a merchant's daughter, adds personal stakes to his quest for revenge and redemption.Will Ethan survive the poison and outmaneuver his uncle's schemes to reclaim his birthright?

Tia Lawson lost her parents and was trapped by her cousin, forced into a marriage she didn’t want. She had no choice but to run away. On the way, she met the love of her life, Ryan Blake. After 29 years of silence, Ryan’s heart suddenly awakened. He carefully won Tia back, took charge of her life, and vowed to cherish her forever. Gentle and caring, Ryan saved Tia from danger time and again, proving his unwavering devotion. EP 1:Tia is forced into an unwanted marriage by her cousin and locked up as punishment for skipping a blind date. She manages to escape and meets Ryan Blake, who helps her evade her pursuers. Meanwhile, Ryan's grandmother criticizes his appearance and questions his future love life, unaware that he has already encountered Tia, who might be the 'angel' he mentioned.Will Ryan be able to protect Tia from the dangers chasing her?

The mighty Shaw family is disgraced when their proud heirs are crushed in the Nightmount Clan tournament—cowards who kneel and beg. But no one expected their most humiliated outcast, the "worthless" son-in-law Jasper Swayne, to step forward… and unleash terrifying power! Who is he really? The Shaw family’s survival now rests in the hands of the man they despised most! EP 1:Jasper Swayne, the Shaw family's disgraced son-in-law, steps in to protect an old man from a violent confrontation, revealing unexpected strength and composure. Despite being mocked as a 'loser,' Jasper's actions hint at a deeper, hidden power. The episode ends with the mysterious appearance of Master Onyx, suggesting a significant connection to Jasper's past or abilities.What secrets does Master Onyx hold about Jasper's true identity and power?

Elliot Rivers learns his fiancée, Clara Blake, is pregnant with Colin Baxter’s child. Misled by Colin’s family, Clara believes they saved her, causing her mother’s tragic death. In a cruel twist, Colin schedules their wedding on the same day as her mother’s funeral—but Elliot places her mother's coffin before her. Can Clara face the truth? EP 1:Elliot Rivers is devastated as his wife, Clara Blake, remarries on the day of her mother's funeral and is pregnant with another man's child. Clara is tormented by guilt, believing her incompatible heart led to her mother's suffering, while Elliot vows to make her pay respects at her mother's grave. Meanwhile, Colin's mother is dying, and Clara's pregnancy revelation adds another layer of betrayal and sorrow.Will Clara ever discover the truth behind her mother's death and Elliot's silent sacrifices?

Once a quiet doctor entangled in a secret affair with business titan Ethan Quinn, Chloe Wynn vanished without a trace. Now she returns, not the woman they betrayed, but the formidable Ms. Lowe, commanding the Lowe Group with poise and mystery. Her reappearance rattles Porton's elite. Beneath the elegance, a reckoning brews. She's not here for closure. She's here to take control. EP 1:Chloe Wynn discovers she's pregnant with Ethan Quinn's child, while he coldly dismisses her as just a fling and announces his engagement to Isla Smith, setting the stage for Chloe's dramatic transformation and return.Will Chloe's pregnancy change the power dynamics when she returns as the formidable Ms. Lowe?

Mina, a poor student, loses her tuition to her gambler brother. Drugged after a bar rescue by CEO Lucian, she's mistaken for demanding $10M. Pregnant with twins, she's rejected until Lucian learns the truth. Bullied at school and betrayed by her "mother," Mina rises with Lucian's help, surviving kidnappings by rivals before their epic wedding. EP 1:Mina discovers she's pregnant, likely from her encounter with CEO Lucian, and faces financial ruin as her tuition money is stolen by her gambling-addicted brother, with her mother callously dismissing her education and future.Will Mina be able to reclaim her stolen tuition and secure her future despite her family's betrayal?

Zanna Woods, the powerful leader of the Woods Group, was betrayed by her own sister and fiancé and was almost killed—she lose her memories and regress to the mental age of a five-year-old. She was "found" by Upton Ford and impulsively married to him. When the two gradually developed feelings for each other, another accident triggered the unexpected return of her memories... EP 1:Oswin Chandler and Yvette conspire to murder Zanna Woods to cover up their embezzlement and seize control of the Woods Group, while Upton Ford is forced into an unwanted engagement.Will Zanna's 'accidental death' go as planned, or will the truth come to light?

In her previous life, Sydney was framed by her family and died a tragic death on the streets. Now, in this new life, she vows revenge. When her family kneel and beg for forgiveness, she coldly tears up the family portrait and sneers: ‘The pain you inflicted on me—I will return it a hundredfold!’ This is a battle of talent, betrayal, and ruthless comeback. EP 1:Sydney Scott, recently released from prison after taking the fall for her sister Fiona, discovers that her family has not only abandoned her but also stolen her creative works—music compositions, business proposals, and novel outlines—to build their own fame and fortune. As Sydney confronts them, she is met with denial and hostility, revealing a deep-seated betrayal by those she once trusted the most.Will Sydney be able to reclaim what was stolen from her, or will her family's power prove too strong to overcome?

To claim his father's fortune left to a stranger, Denise, Caelan meticulously charms his way into her life. Denise knows his love is a lie, yet can't resist falling deeper. But when the truth shatters her heart, she walks away—only for him to realize he's really in love with her. Now, he must fight for a love he never meant to feel... EP 1:Caelan Theron is shocked to discover that half of his father's fortune is left to a complete stranger, Denise Winslow, leading him to devise a plan to marry her to claim the inheritance, despite his mother's warnings about the Theron family.Will Caelan's plan to win Denise's heart for the inheritance backfire when real feelings emerge?

When Lily, a gifted cellist, catches her husband, Marcus Howard, kissing another woman in public, she walks out done with their one-sided marriage. 
He thinks she’ll come crawling back… until she starts thriving and dating his powerful best friend, Ethan Norman. Marcus loses his mind and decides to win her back, no matter what it takes. 
But is it already too late? Or does he still stand a chance... EP 1:Lily, a devoted cellist and wife, witnesses her husband Marcus publicly kissing another woman, Sophia, a Juilliard cellist, at a social gathering. This act marks the hundredth betrayal, prompting Lily to recall her mother's advice and her own promise to leave Marcus if he betrayed her for the hundredth time. The scene sets the stage for Lily's decision to walk away from their one-sided marriage.Will Lily finally leave Marcus for good after this ultimate betrayal?

After an unexpected encounter, Eliza Foster becomes pregnant and gives birth alone. Once oppressed by her adoptive parents, she fights to transform her life for her child. When she reunites with the child's father—a powerful man who becomes her unwavering support—she takes revenge on those who wronged her... EP 1:Eliza faces discrimination and hardship as a pregnant unmarried woman, from being dismissed by her school to struggling to find employment, all while standing firm against her adoptive parents' pressure to marry against her will.Will Eliza find the strength to overcome societal judgment and her adoptive parents' control to secure a future for herself and her child?

column1: Oops, My Toyboy Is A Heir
column4: Top PR specialist Vivian Naylor is diagnosed with a fertility crisis. Under the influence of alcohol, she turns to Ryan Foster — a man seven years her junior — as her “hormonal solution.” After wrapping up a PR campaign, Vivian discovers that Ryan is, in fact, the secret illegitimate son of the Black Group’s CEO. EP 1:Vivian Naylor, a top PR specialist, faces a fertility crisis and is advised to find a man to balance her hormones. In a moment of vulnerability, she turns to Ryan Foster, a younger man, unaware of his true identity as the secret heir to the Black Group's CEO.Will Vivian discover Ryan's true identity before their relationship deepens?

After her mom's death, Layla is adopted by the city's richest family. Poor orphan? Nope! Now she lives in luxury—with a secret: she talks to plants! Life's perfect… until her deadbeat dad shows up. 'My daughter now,' growls her billionaire daddy. 'Try taking her. I dare you.' EP 1:After her mother's death, Layla tries to contact her father and uncle, only to be rejected by both, leaving her with no choice but to face the possibility of going to an orphanage.Will Layla find a new family or be left alone in the orphanage?

Emperor Shawn Wright has never recovered from the loss of his beloved Eleanor Reed. However, on her death anniversary, he saw her struggling to survive the streets – now blind and with two children. As the truth finally unravels, can Shawn protect his love, and keep the court safe? EP 1:Emperor Shawn Wright, still mourning the loss of his beloved Eleanor Reed, is haunted by the past when he sees a blind woman with two children struggling on the streets—someone who looks eerily like Eleanor. As the truth about her survival and the fate of their child begins to unravel, Shawn must grapple with his emotions and the political implications of her return while trying to protect her from the dangers of the court.Will Shawn be able to reconcile with Eleanor and uncover the mysteries surrounding her disappearance and the fate of their child?

In her past life, Mia married into the wealthy Lyons, only to be poisoned by her own sister. This time, she intentionally picks the 'penniless' Sean over the 'perfect' Lyon heir. But when her sister's schemes escalate, he must drop the act of poor trash! Now, with bullets and revenge, he'll make sure she plays by his rules this time. Now game on. EP 1:Mia relives the pivotal moment five years ago when she and her sister Chloe drew lots to decide their marriages, realizing she has been reborn with a chance to change her tragic fate.Will Mia use her second chance to escape her sister's deadly schemes and rewrite her destiny?

After dying to save Donna Jones, Brian Turner's soul lingers, unable to reincarnate. The only way out? Watch her fall for another and die for love. For 5 years, Donna plays the fool—pretending not to see his ghost while chasing wealthy heir Brandon Fisher. When she finally takes a blade for Brandon, Brian's spirit vanishes... only for his comatose body to awaken. EP 1:Donna, haunted by Brian's lingering spirit, pretends to be in love with Brandon to free Brian's soul, enduring humiliation and heartbreak to ensure his peace.Will Donna's sacrifice finally set Brian's spirit free, or will her love for him be her undoing?

column1: Deceit in the Name of Love
column4: Yana White tumbled headlong into love with Jason Keller, their union sealed swiftly after his ardent courtship. She strived to be an ideal wife, oblivious that their "bliss" was a ruse. When truth struck, she sought divorce—yet Jason, the deceiver, was hopelessly caught in the love he’d feigned. EP 1:Yana White, an ordinary nurse, finds herself marrying Jason Keller, the wealthy CEO of a Fortune 500 company. Amidst the celebrations, Yana's friends put Jason through a series of playful but challenging wedding traditions to test his love and commitment, creating a lighthearted yet tense atmosphere.Will Jason's patience and love for Yana withstand the playful yet demanding tests of their wedding day?

Chase Lewis was born the rightful heir to the prestigious Lewis family, but after vanishing in childhood and surviving two decades in exile, he returns to a home that no longer remembers him. In his place stands a stranger with a smile and a secret, and behind the warmth of reunion lies betrayal. As blood proves thinner than loyalty, Chase learns that some destinies aren't given. They're taken back. EP 1:Chase, the rightful heir of the Lewis family, is framed by his adopted brother Theo for stealing the clan's Martial Arts Secrets. Despite Chase's protests of innocence, his family turns against him, leading to his brutal punishment and exile. The episode reveals deep-seated betrayal as Theo manipulates the situation to secure his position as the future clan leader, while Chase's fiancée and family abandon him in his darkest hour.Will Chase find a way to reclaim his rightful place and expose Theo's treachery?

Sophia Lane was once a rising star in Centralia’s billiards scene, but she was forced to disappear from the spotlight. Now living under a false identity, she hides in a humble pool hall with her daughter, Daisy, who shows extraordinary talent in billiards. But when she reveals her skills in an attempt to save the struggling hall, she catches the eye of the underground black market—and is kidnapped... EP 1:Gavin Cooper, the two-time billiards champion, unexpectedly returns to Centralia, seeking Sophia Lane, the mysterious former star who vanished after her victory. He challenges the local pool hall to crack a difficult shot, revealing his true intentions.Will Sophia's hidden past be uncovered by Gavin's persistence?

Serena Morrison, once the beloved daughter of the Morrison family, agrees to marry in her sister's place. But what follows is betrayal, isolation, and a love that turns cold. Just when her story seems to end, she returns—granted three months back among the living. Why has she come back? And what truth is she hiding? EP 1:Serena receives a desperate call from Noah claiming to be kidnapped, but her family dismisses it as another attention-seeking act. As the situation escalates, it's revealed that Sara might be behind the kidnapping, and Serena is granted a brief return to life to uncover the truth.Will Serena uncover Sara's sinister plot before her time runs out?

Yannick Young thought he was just another weak disciple. But when he aces a deadly sect trial, the truth hits—he’s anything but ordinary. Jealous rivals, secret mentors, and ancient enemies stand in his way. Is he ready to claim the power he never knew he had? EP 1:Yannick's humble training with his masters takes a surprising turn when they casually dismiss the powerful Demon Lord as weak, revealing their true strength. As word spreads, major sects scramble to recruit this mysterious master, while Yannick prepares to leave for the Celestial Academy trials with a precious token from his masters.What powers does the mysterious jade token hold, and how will it change Yannick's destiny?

Adapted from the Fanqie Novel 'Po Chan Hou, Bei Gege Reng Dao Ta Si Dui Tou Jia Li' by Jin Yuzi.
After her parents' death and bankruptcy, Tessa is dumped to their business rival--cold CEO Ethan. To survive, she plays poor, pitiful, and delicate… until he sees right through her act. Now, the 'helpless lamb' is trapped in his gilded cage. 'Brother,' she whimpers, 'when will you save me?' But Ethan just smirks: 'Who said I'm letting you go?' EP 1:After her family's bankruptcy, Tessa is sent to live with her brother's rival, Ethan Shaw. She pretends to be poor, pitiful, and fragile to win his sympathy, but Ethan sees through her act and refuses to let her go.Will Tessa's acting be enough to survive in Ethan's gilded cage?

When Luna discovers her husband’s plot to use their unborn child’s cord blood to save his mistress’s son, she plays along—until delivery day. Now, trapped in a web of genetic tests and fake affection, Luna must escape before delivery. But with her husband’s family watching closely, will she break free? EP 1:Luna, pregnant and seemingly surrounded by love from her husband, mother-in-law, and best friend, is actually trapped in a horrifying plot where her unborn child's cord blood is intended to save her husband's illegitimate son. As she gets closer to her due date, the facade of care begins to crack, revealing the sinister motives behind the affection.Will Luna manage to escape before the delivery day arrives?

A memory lost, a love betrayed. After a tragic crash, Daniel Grayson loses all memory of Kathy Stark—and is drawn into another woman's lies. As Kathy endures cruelty and sacrifice, Daniel, once his memories return, risks everything to save her. His final gift: his eyes, her light. At his grave, she finally says yes... EP 1:Kathy Stark wins the campus dance championship and secures a study-abroad spot, only to be proposed to by Daniel Grayson in a romantic moment. However, their happiness is short-lived as a tragic car crash occurs, leaving their fate uncertain.Will Daniel and Kathy survive the crash, and what will happen to their love story?

When Chloe faces relentless bullying at school, her mother, Eleanor, rises up to protect her. Unmasking lies, crushing false claims, and shattering deceit, Eleanor activates Bear Mode, and justice will be served — and no one escapes the consequences. She fights. She protects. She conquers — all for her child. EP 1:Chloe faces relentless bullying from her classmates who mock her for not being picked up by her mother at the school gate, leading to a confrontation where Chloe defends her mother's honor.Will Eleanor step in to protect Chloe from the bullies and their judgmental parents?

While signing a divorce agreement with her contract husband Kenneth Walker, Shirley Green accidentally gets to know that she's actually a vicious supporting character in a scripted world. According to the original plot, she ends up killing Kenneth and dies a miserable death herself. What's worse, Kenneth had secretly loved her for ten years... EP 1:Shirley Green is confronted by her contract husband Kenneth Walker with divorce papers immediately after an intimate moment, highlighting the strained and transactional nature of their relationship.Will Shirley sign the divorce agreement or discover the truth about their fictional world first?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Sweet Romance', 'Love After Marriage']

column4: Idell Green, who has chronic insomnia enters a contract marriage with poor Irene, only to discover he can miraculously sleep beside her. As he protects her from life's cruelties, their bond deepens—until an evil scheme tears them apart. Can love uncover the truth, or will deception win? EP 1:Irene is violently pursued by a man claiming her uncle sold her, leading to a dramatic rescue by Idell Green, whose severe insomnia threatens his life unless he finds a solution within three months.Will Idell's unexpected intervention in Irene's life lead to the cure for his insomnia?

Daisy is caged and auctioned off for her first night. In her darkest moment, mafia King Arthur buys her for a billion dollars. He frees her and protects her whenever she’s in danger. Daisy falls for him, only to discover she might be a substitute for another girl who loves daises...

Eric, a top gamer, is forced into a deadly survival game orchestrated by ZD Group. Using his wit and skills, he fights to survive—only to uncover a conspiracy that could shake the entire world… EP 1:Eric, a former esports champion and tech pioneer, confronts the chief advisor of ZD Games in Ironreach Block, refusing to hand over the game code despite severe physical consequences. The advisor hints at a mysterious plan involving games as a potential salvation.What is the advisor's true plan for Eric and how will games play a role in his survival?

The ruthless leader of the Swan Syndicate wakes up as Ella Harrison—a peasant girl whose legendary appetite ate her family into poverty. Mocked by her sister-in-law and exploited by freeloaders, she slams her butcher knife on the table: "Who's first?" The village roars with laughter. One year later, the Harrison family's crumbling hut has become a manor. Their granaries overflow. Even the watchdog has tripled in size. EP 1:Ella Harrison, once a peasant girl, has now taken control of the Swan Syndicate by eliminating the previous boss and asserting her dominance with a ruthless declaration of her new leadership.Will Ella's reign as the new boss of the Swan Syndicate be as brutal as her rise to power?

Mason, a devoted but obsessed researcher, reunites with his estranged wife at a lakeside retreat. However, he foresees the coming danger: a deadly lake monster. Armed with the scientific knowledge and survival skills he acquired in his past life, Mason fights to protect his daughter. EP 1:Mason, his estranged wife Jennifer, and their daughter Chloe face a deadly lake monster at Breeze Lake. Mason, armed with past knowledge, tries to protect his family amidst chaos and disbelief from others.Will Mason be able to convince the others about the monster before it's too late?

Raised in poverty, he studied hard, passed the imperial exam, and rose through the ranks, determined to fight corruption and serve the people. But the higher he climbed, the more he sensed that his fate had been scripted all along. Behind it all lies a truth he never saw coming... EP 1:Rylan, despite his hard work and dedication at the academy, faces challenges at home where his parents seem indifferent to his efforts, especially when it comes to his cooking skills.Will Rylan ever gain the recognition he deserves from his parents?

On their 18th birthday, the chosen receive one of 52 magical playing cards—each unlocking a unique superpower. A beauty conjures weapons with the Queen of Spades. A rich kid prints cash with the Jack of Diamonds. But then... he shows up. One card. Every power... "Wait, what card are you holding?" EP 1:A street magician performs an astonishing trick, turning a phone into a playing card and back again, captivating an audience. However, his act attracts the attention of the Arcane Bureau of Loongland, who suspect him of using real magical powers in public. Despite his protests of innocence, they attempt to take him into custody, setting the stage for a mysterious confrontation.Will the magician escape the Arcane Bureau's grasp, or does he truly possess one of the legendary cards?

After saving Tristan Vaughn, CEO of Vaughn Group, Vivian Shaw is left with a broken leg and an unexpected pregnancy. Eight months later, she delivers a premature baby, drowning in medical debt. As Vivian works desperately to survive, Tristan scours the city to find her—ready to atone. But when their paths finally cross, will she let him into their lives, or is the past too painful to forgive? EP 1:Vivian faces severe backlash from her family after revealing her unexpected pregnancy, leading to her being cast out to live in her grandmother's old cowshed. Amidst the chaos, she suddenly goes into labor, prompting a desperate call for help.Will Vivian and her premature baby survive the ordeal?

“Lucas, want a wife? Just say the word, and I’ll bring her to you.”
A modern engineer Lucas wakes up in a war-torn world and crosses paths with a noblewoman fleeing for her life.Armed with blade and bow, Lucas will stop at nothing to protect his family and survive the chaos. EP 1:Lucas, a modern engineer, wakes up in a war-torn world in the body of a lowly thug named Lucas, only to discover he now has a wife and a reputation to uphold. As he navigates this brutal new reality, he decides to redefine what it means to be a thug, vowing to protect his family and survive the chaos.Will Lucas be able to change his fate and protect his newfound family in this ruthless world?

When Luna discovers her husband’s plot to use their unborn child’s cord blood to save his mistress’s son, she plays along—until delivery day. Now, trapped in a web of genetic tests and fake affection, Luna must escape before delivery. But with her husband’s family watching closely, will she break free? EP 1:Luna Reed, a 35-year-old woman, is in critical condition as she is about to give birth. She reveals a shocking truth: her husband impregnated her solely to use their baby's cord blood to save his son with his mistress. Meanwhile, Luna's seemingly perfect life—loving husband, caring mother-in-law, and devoted best friend—hides a darker reality as she struggles with the physical toll of her high-risk pregnancy.Will Luna's husband succeed in his sinister plan, or will she uncover the truth in time?

Celine ran from Justin on their wedding day, thinking she had escaped a monster. It took five years for her to marry her so-called savior—only to find betrayal again. As she discovered the truth hidden in the past, the man she feared the most, might be her hero all along. EP 1:Celine is haunted by nightmares of her abusive ex, Justin, as she prepares to marry Ian, believing she has finally escaped her past, only to be unsettled by an unexpected visitor.Who is at the door, and will Celine's past resurface to disrupt her new life?

column1: Reborn and Become a Billionaire's Wife
column4: Natalie Scott’s marriage is totally a lie. Her husband, the campus heartthrob who’s loving another woman, marries her just for revenge! Reborn, she decides to leave and go back to her rich family. On her wedding night with the man who loves her most, Natalie’s ex breaks in: “You’ll always be mine!” EP 1:Natalie Scott discovers her husband Blake's infidelity with Emily Lynn, realizing her seven-year marriage was a sham. As her health deteriorates, she faces the painful truth of being abandoned and forgotten, culminating in a heartbreaking public display of Blake's affection for Emily.Will Natalie confront Blake and Emily about their betrayal, or will she silently suffer until the end?

Orphaned Luna rescued by Scarlett, a fierce outcast widow. Miraculously, Scarlett’s luck changes. Money flows, treasures appear, and opportunities arise. Why? Luna has a Midas touch! But envious relatives and greedy foes will stop at nothing to tear them apart. A dazzling tale of magic, betrayal, and unstoppable fortune, where the unluckiest duo becomes the wealthiest and happiest pair in town. EP 1:In the midst of a devastating drought, young Luna is forced to fetch water alone by her cruel aunt, who withholds food from her. The villagers observe her plight, highlighting her tragic backstory of losing her parents and enduring hardship under her aunt's care.Will Luna's fortunes change as she braves the harsh conditions alone?

After a fatal accident, Clara awakens as an ancient merchant’s daughter. Before she understands what happened, she is forced into a royal marriage, only to learn her groom, Prince Edward, died in battle. Sentenced to burial, she fakes pregnancy to escape. Then she flees to the borderlands where she encounters her "dead" husband... EP 1:Clara awakens in an ancient wedding chamber, realizing she has time-traveled into the body of a merchant's daughter forced into a royal marriage with Prince Edward. Her joy is short-lived as news arrives of the Prince's death in battle, turning her into a widowed Princess Consort. However, the Empress decrees that Clara must be buried alive with the Prince, forcing her to quickly devise an escape plan.Will Clara manage to escape her grim fate and uncover the truth about Prince Edward's death?

Claire Harlow, the reckless daughter of an infamous gangster, never expected her escape plan would involve a contract marriage with Eric Carter, a genius researcher who views emotions as illogical variables. But when their worlds collide, chemistry sparkles start to fly—and not just in the lab. EP 1:Claire Harlow, the reckless daughter of a gangster, is forced into a date by her family's orders, leading to a chaotic escape attempt. Meanwhile, Eric Carter, a focused researcher, is pressured by his father to marry by year's end or lose funding. Their paths collide when Eric intervenes in Claire's confrontation with her family's enforcers, culminating in Claire's sudden and impulsive marriage proposal to Eric.Will Eric accept Claire's unexpected marriage proposal, and how will their vastly different worlds collide?

To get back at her cheating fiancé, Celine Pierce sets her sight on Damien Hawthorne, head of the Hawthorne Corp. Damien helps her replace Nathan Hawthorne, saves her from a kidnapping, and stands by her side when her true identity is exposed. But when “King,” his possessive alter ego, takes control, Celine is trapped between two men in one body—until they unite to be her guardian and walk her down the aisle. EP 1:Celine boldly confronts Damien, revealing her plan to get back at her cheating fiancé by seducing his uncle, leading to a dangerous and flirtatious confrontation.Will Damien succumb to Celine's revenge plot or turn the tables on her?

Zanna Woods, the powerful leader of the Woods Group, was betrayed by her own sister and fiancé and was almost killed—she lose her memories and regress to the mental age of a five-year-old. She was "found" by Upton Ford and impulsively married to him. When the two gradually developed feelings for each other, another accident triggered the unexpected return of her memories... EP 1:Zanna Woods, the CEO of Woods Group, is betrayed by her sister Yvette and fiancé Oswin Chandler, who plan to kill her to cover up their embezzlement. Meanwhile, Upton Ford receives an unexpected engagement gift, hinting at a forced marriage arranged by his family.Will Zanna survive the assassination attempt and regain her memories?

After eight years away on a classified mission, Jasper Parker is finally reuniting with his beloved wife, Molly Fisher - until an ambush erases his memory. Waking with no past, he is tricked into marrying Chloe Rivera, while Molly is being forced to marry a retarded man… Can he wake up in the nick of time and reunite with his love in the end? EP 1:After successfully deploying the 'Draconic Gaze' surveillance-strike system, Jasper Parker is finally set to reunite with his wife, Molly, after eight years apart. However, an ambush erases his memory, jeopardizing their long-awaited reunion and leaving Molly in distress.Will Jasper regain his memory in time to save his marriage and reunite with Molly?
