column1: (Dubbed) Reborn and Become a Billionaire's Wife
column4: Natalie Scott’s marriage is totally a lie. Her husband, the campus heartthrob who’s loving another woman, marries her just for revenge! Reborn, she decides to leave and go back to her rich family. On her wedding night with the man who loves her most, Natalie’s ex breaks in: “You’ll always be mine!” EP 1:Natalie Scott discovers her husband Blake's infidelity with Emily Lynn, realizing her marriage was a sham and her love unreciprocated, while also facing a dire health diagnosis.Will Natalie confront Blake and Emily before it's too late?

Raised in a rain-drenched town and locked away by greedy relatives, she faked madness to survive the rot. Inheriting everything they coveted, she bided her time—until the day she escaped that cursed house. For revenge, she sets her sights on the powerful heir of Jinzhou, laying a trap step by step... only to find herself dangerously indulged. EP 1:The protagonist is forced to serve Mr. Burnett, revealing a deeper scheme of humiliation and revenge as she reflects on being played during a funeral in Portsburgh.Will she turn the tables on Mr. Burnett, or is this just the beginning of his cruel game?

Wendy never expected her one-night stand with Simon, her bestie's brother, to end in marriage. But when the cold CEO suddenly becomes obsessed with her, she realizes: this was no accident. He's loved her for years! Now what's she gonna do about this? Just fall right back into his arms? EP 1:Wendy discovers that her one-night stand with Simon was no accident—he has loved her for ten years, leading to a tense and emotional confrontation.Will Wendy confront her feelings for Simon or continue to push him away?

To save her daughter Jenny, Chloe Sue agrees to defend Mr. Yosh—the son of Datuaria’s richest man—who's accused of assault. But when Jenny is humiliated by Yosh’s gang, Chloe storms in, reveals her identity as “Iron Rose,” and cuts ties with the Lynn Group. As media sides with power, Mr. Yosh struts into court—but Chloe returns, this time as the plaintiff’s lawyer. EP 1:Chloe Sue, known as 'Iron Rose', successfully submits new key evidence in court, leading to the defendant being found guilty, showcasing her unwavering commitment to justice despite powerful opposition. Later, Derek Lynn, desperate to clear his son's name, offers her a life-saving medication for her daughter in exchange for her legal services, revealing the moral dilemma she faces.Will Chloe Sue accept Derek Lynn's offer to save her daughter, or will she stand by her principles?

column1: Mr. CEO, Choose: Her or Me?
column4: When Tina had nothing, it was Evan who gave her warmth. But everything shattered the moment his so-called first love returned. She walked away with grace, and only then did he realise what he had lost. Can true feelings still be salvaged after a cruel mistake? This emotional tug-of-war is just getting started… EP 1:Evan returns home late to find Tina waiting for him with a prepared feast, but tension arises as he questions her about her late whereabouts.Will Tina's heartfelt gesture be enough to bridge the growing distance between her and Evan?

Framed for stealing the sacred Octō Fist Manual, Evan Lawson, once the proud disciple of the Martial Saint, is cast out, his meridians cut off. Rebuilding his strength through the Drunken Fist, Evan rescues the beautiful Gloria Clark, only to have his heroism stolen. Winning her heart in a martial contest, tragedy strikes when her father dies under mysterious circumstances. Can Evan clear his name, reclaim his honor, and protect the woman he loves—armed only with his mastery of the Drunken Fist? EP 1:Evan Lawson, once a proud disciple of the Martial Saint, is falsely accused and framed for stealing the sacred Octō Fist Manual, leading to his downfall and the severing of his meridians. Despite his efforts to rebuild his strength through the Drunken Fist, he faces betrayal and public humiliation when his own family turns against him.Will Evan be able to prove his innocence and reclaim his honor against the odds?

Once Portwell’s golden girl, Sylvia Holmes returns from abroad to find her family ruined, her father dead, and her brother ready to sell her to pay off gambling debts. Rescued by the cold and powerful Lance Lewis, she marries him, only for him to vanish. Two years later, she’s dying… and he returns? EP 1:Sylvia Holmes returns home after five years abroad to find her family ruined, her father dead, and her brother Henry attempting to sell her to pay off his gambling debts. As she is being captured, a mysterious figure intervenes, possibly her guardian angel.Who is this mysterious guardian angel, and what role will he play in Sylvia's life?

Genius teen Thomas Shaw hides his identity and works at a factory with his kind girlfriend, Serena Laws—only to be bullied by coworkers and framed by his manager. His mother, Shayla Shaw, reveals the truth and exposes the villains. Together, they reclaim the family empire. Backed by MIT degrees, Thomas crushes power-hungry relatives and builds his own tech legend—protecting love, family, and justice. EP 1:Thomas Shaw, a genius teen in hiding, is forced to flee when his mother, Shayla, is injured during a confrontation with pursuers. In a heart-wrenching moment, Shayla urges Thomas to escape with a crucial item, sacrificing herself for his survival. Thomas, unwilling to leave her, is compelled to jump to safety, leaving his mother behind as the enemies close in.Will Thomas be able to reunite with his mother and uncover the truth behind their separation?

column1: My Twin Husband is sleeping wih my Sister-in-Law
column4: After her death, Rachel Sophia discovers her dead husband, Roy John, is still alive. He had been impersonating his twin brother, Kris John, and living as his sister-in-law’s husband! Reborn for a second chance, Rachel vows to take revenge and make them pay for the betrayal... Will she succeed or fall into their trap? EP 1:The episode reveals the struggles of Rachel and her son Percy as they face starvation due to a drought. Rachel trades their sewing machine for food, highlighting their desperation. The plot thickens when Percy sees a man who looks like his deceased father, leading to the shocking revelation that Roy John might still be alive, but his twin brother Kris claims Roy is dead. The emotional turmoil escalates as Rachel grapples with the possibility of betrayal and the implications for her family's survival.Will Rachel uncover the truth about her husband's death and the identity of the man claiming to be Kris?

As a child, Julia Whitmore's life was shattered—her mother framed and killed, her identity stolen, and her face altered to become her sister's double. Imprisoned in silence, she serves the family that destroyed her. But Julia is no pawn. Behind her quiet eyes burns a plan for revenge—one that will shake the court, expose hidden enemies, and reclaim the name they erased. EP 1:Emily Myers confronts Julia about her betrayal, revealing their twisted past where Julia was taken in as a sister only to be betrayed and set up. In a shocking turn, Julia witnesses her mother's murder, vowing to become 'a snake with venom in her fangs' for revenge.What deadly plans will Julia enact to avenge her mother's death?

By chance, Irene Webb married Jackey Reed, the sole heir to the Reed Group. Hiding his true identity, Jackey tested Irene's motives—especially after learning she was a journalist, which heightened his caution. As a reporter, Irene faced envy and danger, but Jackey repeatedly rescued her at critical moments. Despite initial distrust, they grew to cherish each other, overcoming obstacles to build a loving future together. EP 1:Irene struggles with her new life married to a stranger, Jackey, while dealing with financial demands from her family. Meanwhile, Jackey secretly arranges a house purchase, hinting at his hidden wealth and true identity.Will Irene discover Jackey's true identity and how will it change their relationship?

column1: Betrayed vs. Mad: Reborn for Karma
column4: Betrayed by her family, Victoria married broke coder Adrian, yet helped him become a billionaire, while her stepsister Camilla, the supposed bride, fell into madness after her husband went bankrupt. At a banquet, they killed each other… and were both reborn. Sabotage, revenge, and karma? Delicious. EP 1:Victoria, once betrayed by her family and forced into a marriage with the down-and-out Adrian Harlan, witnesses her stepsister Camilla's descent into madness after her wealthy family's downfall. However, Adrian's surprising rise to billionaire status turns the tables. At a banquet, the sisters' rivalry culminates in a deadly confrontation, leading to their rebirth back to the day the fateful marriage was chosen.Will Victoria change her fate this time, or will history repeat itself?

Victoria Hartman, neglected by her father and overshadowed by her half-sister Isabelle, was sent to the battlefield to survive. There she met Lucas Ashford, whose quiet strength won her heart—until she learned his kindness was for Isabelle. Heartbroken, Victoria agreed to a political marriage. Only then did Lucas realize his true love had always been her. EP 1:Victoria, overshadowed by her half-sister Isabelle, agrees to a political marriage with the ruthless King of Northreach to save Isabelle from the dangerous alliance. In exchange, she demands a staggering sum of five hundred thousand taels of gold from her father, revealing her deep resentment and the family's fractured dynamics. Additionally, she shockingly decides to leave her trusted guard, Lucas, with Isabelle, hinting at unrequited love and betrayal.Will Victoria's sacrifice truly protect Isabelle, or will it lead to unforeseen consequences?

Patrick thought his wife Vivian was just a compliant housewife, until she disappeared, leaving only a note... When the legal world explodes with news of Vivian's comeback, he is shocked that his honey is a legendary attorney! Now, with pride, love, and justice on the line, who will win the final court case? EP 1:Vivian reveals her true identity as a legendary attorney to her husband Patrick, announcing her decision to divorce him and return to the courtroom, leaving him shocked and confused.Will Patrick be able to handle the truth about Vivian's past and their impending courtroom battle?

Saintess Frigga fell for mortal Harrison Lucas. To protect their daughter Yara, she took her to the heavenly realm. Seven years later, Yara returned, saved a woman, and was adopted as Harrison's daughter. Together, they fought villains like Ryan Blinken and Xander Lucas, reclaimed the Lucas Group, and reunited with Frigga for a happy ending. Discover their epic journey! EP 1:Madam Lilian, known for her kindness in providing breakfasts annually, is suddenly in danger, prompting an urgent rescue.Will Madam Lilian be saved in time?

Five years ago, Yasmin Chester was framed by her stepmother, resulting in a one-night stand with Samuel Lester that produced a son before her sudden disappearance. Now returning with the child Shawn Chester, she unwittingly becomes Samuel 's maid. Through their daily interactions, Samuel gradually falls for Yasmin, ultimately uncovering her true identity as the mother of his child. EP 1:Yasmin Chester, who was framed by her stepmother five years ago, returns to Halcyon with her four-year-old son Shawn. Samuel Lester, unaware of Yasmin's true identity and their shared past, is determined to find her at all costs, while also resisting his mother's attempts to arrange a business marriage.Will Samuel uncover the truth about Yasmin and their son before it's too late?

Ten years ago, Eliot Howard, the Howard family’s eldest son, rescued a gifted orphan, Jacob, only to invite ruin into his life. Jacob stole his family’s love, cut off his arm, and framed him for murder, leaving him caged for a decade. Betrayed even by his fiancée, Eliot turned to the Solar Sect. Three years later, he returns as its new leader… just as the Howard family teeters on the edge of destruction. EP 1:Eliot Howard reveals his painful past where Jacob, the orphan he once rescued, betrayed him by stealing his family's love, chopping off his arm, and framing him for theft and violence, leading to Eliot's decade-long imprisonment.Will Eliot get his revenge on Jacob and reclaim his family's honor?

When star journalist Yana divorced tycoon Laken, she thought it was over—until their toxic chemistry ignited a war hotter than their failed marriage. As she digs into her shocking adoption truth and he uncovers her family’s crimes, their collision course sparks corporate sabotage, a rival’s deadly jealousy, and a knife attack that forces one ultimate choice: Will they destroy each other, or destroy the lies keeping them apart? EP 1:Yana abruptly demands a divorce from Laken, revealing her lawyer has already prepared the papers, sparking a heated exchange about their past passion and future intentions.Will Laken retaliate after Yana's cold rejection?

Ryan returns in glory, only to find his fiancée dump him for "a real man." But when invaders attack, he unleashes his wrath, revealing that he's the empire's most feared general! Now, a darker truth erupts: soldiers' widows starve while corrupt nobles steal their gold! So the general faces his ultimate battle: expose the traitors, even if it means defying the empire's highest ranks... EP 1:General Ryan Sean is celebrated for his victorious campaign and appointed as Commander of the Northern Frontier, but as he prepares to return home, questions about his long absence and personal sacrifices arise.Will Ryan's return home reunite him with his loved ones, or will the shadows of his past duties create new challenges?

Rosie and Zander were both reborn—she escaped a cheating fiancé and cruel father, collapsing before Zander's car on a stormy night. The man once feared as a madman is now gentle and caring, nursing her back. Now stuck together again, Zander is determined to win her heart—whether Rosie's ready to bloom or not. EP 1:Zander desperately pleads for Rosie's love, revealing his deep feelings for her despite her past relationship with Skyler. Rosie, still traumatized by Zander's previous actions of locking her up, firmly rejects him, showing her unresolved anger and pain.Will Rosie ever be able to forgive Zander and open her heart to him?

When Claire Hart visits her son Charles and daughter-in-law Wendy's home, she's unexpectedly humiliated by Vivian, the arrogant mistress, who mistakes her for Wendy and demands her to end the marriage. Masking her anger, Claire uncovers Charles's betrayal and financial support for Vivian. Furious, she sends Wendy away and vows to take down them both. Will her plan save the family—or tear it apart? EP 1:Claire Hart, visiting her son Charles and daughter-in-law Wendy, is mistaken for Wendy by Vivian, Charles's mistress, who arrogantly offers her money to leave Charles. Claire discovers Charles's betrayal and financial support for Vivian, leading her to vow revenge.Will Claire's plan to take down Charles and Vivian tear the family apart?

Six years ago, Lena Hartley, a college student, fell in love with Ethan Vale, but they were forced to separate due to the interference of Lena's father. Heartbroken, Ethan lied and claimed he had fallen for someone else, leaving Lena devastated. Six years later, they reunited. Can the two who once deeply loved each other rekindle their romance? EP 1:Lena Hartley, a top student at Seaborne University, is deeply in love with Ethan Vale, despite his reputation as a street thug. On her 21st birthday, Ethan gifts her a couple's ring, fulfilling her wish. However, Lena's father confronts Ethan, revealing that Lena's dream of becoming a doctor is being jeopardized by their relationship. Heartbroken but selfless, Ethan decides to break up with Lena by lying that he fell for someone else, leaving her devastated.Will Lena ever discover the truth behind Ethan's cruel lie?

column1: Old Man, This's My New Dad
column4: On her coming-of-age day, Celeste Rivers—princess of the  Phoenix Empire—wakes up in the body of an eight-year-old girl in modern times. The real heiress, she’d been swapped at birth, scorned by her family, and left to starve while the fake heiress took everything. Furious, Celeste ditches her uncaring father for a “useless” one everyone mocks—because training a spoiled scoundrel? Child’s play for a princess. EP 1:Celeste Rivers, the true heiress of the Rivers family, wakes up in the body of an eight-year-old girl after her soul enters it during her coming-of-age ceremony in the Phoenix Empire. Despite being the rightful heir, she is scorned by her family, who favor the imposter heiress. After being falsely accused and locked in a storage room without food or water by her cruel parents, Celeste resolves to find a new path, realizing her current family is unworthy of her.Will Celeste find the strength to escape her toxic family and reclaim her rightful place?

Switched at birth, Nemo was sold at two to the Sterling family to marry their comatose young master. One bite from her, and he woke up! Since then, the Sterlings have seen miracle after miracle, from paralysis cured to sudden pregnancies. Even Mr. Sterling sleeps like a baby. Is she a curse or a blessing? EP 1:A baby girl, switched at birth and now resembling Mrs. Green, is sold to the Sterling family as a child bride for their comatose young master Xavier, in a desperate attempt to counter her supposed cursed fate with his own misfortunes.Will Xavier survive the curse or will the girl's presence bring unforeseen consequences?

Amnesiac prince. Two sisters. One lie that changed history. But when the Emperor discovers the deception on his wedding day, a brutal game of palace politics begins. Now, Flora must survive poisoned teacups, rigged "divine omens," and the vicious jealousy to claim her rightful place beside the man whose heart she never stopped loving... EP 1:The newly ascended Emperor announces his intention to marry Mayor Evans' daughter, who he believes saved him during his exile, unaware of the deception and the brewing conflict over the rightful Empress.Will the Emperor discover the truth about who truly saved him before the wedding?

column1: Hot Mommy Assassin vs Ice Daddy CEO
column4: Top assassin Silverfox is reborn as Siren. Her first shock comes when her own mother delivers her to billionaire Vincent's bed. Five years later, she returns with a secret son, only for Vincent to take the boy. Now disguised as his male bodyguard, Siren plays a dangerous game where the CEO's icy gaze burns hotter with each passing day... EP 1:Top assassin Silverfox is reborn as Siren and shockingly discovers her own mother has sold her to billionaire Vincent Hale for three million. Drugged and powerless, Siren manages to escape after their encounter, leaving behind a fiery message for Vincent by blowing up his villa and calling him an idiot. Determined to find her, Vincent orders his men to bring her back at any cost.Will Vincent succeed in capturing the elusive Siren, or will she outmaneuver him once again?

When Claire Hart visits her son Charles and daughter-in-law Wendy's home, she's unexpectedly humiliated by Vivian, the arrogant mistress, who mistakes her for Wendy and demands her to end the marriage. Masking her anger, Claire uncovers Charles's betrayal and financial support for Vivian. Furious, she sends Wendy away and vows to take down them both. Will her plan save the family—or tear it apart? EP 1:Claire Hart visits her son Charles and daughter-in-law Wendy's home, only to be mistaken for Wendy by Vivian, Charles's mistress, who arrogantly demands she leave Charles and offers her money. Claire discovers Charles's betrayal and financial support for Vivian, leading to a furious confrontation where Claire vows revenge.Will Claire's plan to take down Charles and Vivian tear the family apart or save it?

Crystal Lowe, the billionaire heiress of Riverdale was framed for theft by her roommate Kelly, then pushed down the stairs by her own father, Martin Lorne. Reborn on the first day of university, Crystal uncovers lies and schemes of her gold-digging father. This time, baby girl fights back—with surveillance footage, auction records, and the full might of the Lowe family empire. As she proves blood dosn't make family. Loyalty does. EP 1:Crystal Lowe is falsely accused of stealing a valuable necklace by her wealthy roommate Kelly, who claims it's impossible for Crystal's family to afford such an item. Despite Crystal's insistence that the necklace was a gift from her mother, she is humiliated and physically restrained. The situation escalates when even her own father sides with Kelly, denying Crystal and reinforcing the false accusation. The episode ends with Crystal vowing revenge, hinting at her rebirth and determination to uncover the truth and make those who wronged her regret their actions.What secrets will Crystal uncover about her father and Kelly's family in her quest for justice?

column1: Assistant by Day, Obsession by Night
column4: Betrayed by her husband and sold as a pawn, Rachel Stuart becomes CEO Jamie Bush’s most coveted possession. In a gilded cage of power and twisted desire, she dances on the edge of ruin. But when the passion cracks, Rachel turns her surrender into a weapon, and her escape into a reckoning. No longer someone’s pet—but a storm no one can contain. EP 1:Rachel is betrayed by her husband Tim, who offers her to CEO Jamie Bush in exchange for undisclosed benefits. Initially resistant, Rachel reluctantly submits to Bush's demands, only to discover she's been assigned as his assistant—a role she never agreed to. Confronting Tim, she realizes he's complicit in the arrangement, leaving her trapped in a web of deceit and power plays.Will Rachel find a way to escape Bush's control, or will she embrace her new role for revenge?

Shaw Taylor, an ordinary cab driver in Coralbay, makes a fateful choice when he kills the heir of the notorious Stuart crime family to protect his daughter. On the run from ruthless enemies and the law, he discovers a world darker and more dangerous than he ever imagined. As the shadows close in, will he hold onto his humanity—or be swallowed by the darkness? EP 1:Shaw Taylor, a cab driver, confesses to killing the heir of the Stuart crime family to protect his daughter Nina. As he grapples with guilt and fear, he vows to protect Nina from the Stuarts' retribution, while struggling with his worsening personality disorder that threatens to unleash a darker side of him.Will Shaw's deteriorating mental state lead him deeper into the darkness he's trying to escape?

column1: Defying Fate in a Novel World
column4: Marla Lynn wakes up 11 years after her death, only to discover her world is a novel. Her three younger brothers are the villainous counterparts of the main couple, doomed to tragic fates. Unable to accept their roles in the romance, she cuts the ties to change their destinies. But when her former rival returns, his gaze filled with obsession, will she be able to control the future, or will she become the one trapped by fate? EP 1:Marla Lynn wakes up 11 years after her death to discover she's living in a romance novel where her three brothers are destined to be tragic villains. Determined to change their fates, she confronts her brother Ethan, who is currently playing the role of a brainlessly extra CEO, clearing a mall for the female lead Vanessa Lee.Will Marla be able to convince Ethan of their doomed fate and change the course of the story?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Taming the Playboy', 'Sweet Romance']

column4: Secluded for three centuries, Lord Aether reincarnates as dying child Luna Lane in Aurora City. From her tiny form, she unleashes arcane power to defend the Reed family. But when failure claims Grace and Leo, she's left shattered. What was the point of an eternity spent chasing immortality if it couldn't even save the innocent? EP 1:Lord Aether, reincarnated as a dying child named Luna Lane, awakens to find herself in a dire situation with smallpox and a kidnapped past. Determined to survive and find her family, she encounters the Reed Family's ancestral residence under attack by a collateral branch seeking power. Using her long-lost Mystic Arcane Arts, Luna, as Lord Aether, defends the innocent and asserts her dominance against the attackers.Will Luna's newfound powers be enough to protect the Reed Family and uncover the truth about her past?

Forced into a dying emperor's harem, Fiona makes a deadly gamble—seducing the forbidden monk at the funeral! But when their red-hot night spares her from execution, she discovers a shocking truth: he's the new emperor! Now, between a murderous stepmother, a jealous consort, and her own traitor sister, Fiona must outsmarts every trap, until the emperor burns those enemies to the ground and crowns her empress. EP 1:Fiona, a virgin imperial consort, is ordered to be buried alive with the late Emperor, but she seduces a forbidden monk at the funeral, leading to the abolition of the live burial decree and her life being spared.Will Fiona's bold gamble bring her more danger or salvation in the palace?

William, heir to the Southern Region's richest man, cut ties with his dad after his mom's death. While testing his delivery app, he was mistaken for a poor courier, only for his girlfriend's family to mock him as poor and push them apart. She promised to marry him after studying overseas, but came back pregnant with another man's child. At her banquet, his dad revealed the truth—making their insults age like warm milk... EP 1:William, the heir to the Johnson Group, disguises himself as a delivery courier to test his app, but his cover is blown when his girlfriend Ava introduces him to her family, leading to tension and revelations about his true identity.Will Ava's family accept William now that they know his true identity?

Andrew Nelson was the golden heir—until he was accused of pushing James Mitchell off a balcony. Wrongfully imprisoned for seven years, he was beaten, tortured, and even lost a kidney. Now free, he returns to a Nelson family with unloving parents, a biased sister, and Chris, the adoptive brother that continue sabotaging him. Worst of all, they plan to sell him off like a livestock. How will Andrew twist his fate and reclaim what's rightfully his? EP 1:Andrew Nelson, after serving four years in prison for a crime he claims he didn't commit, is picked up by his family who still treat him with disdain and suspicion, especially his sister Kayla and adoptive brother Chris, making it clear he is not truly welcomed back into the Nelson family.Will Andrew find a way to prove his innocence and reclaim his place in the Nelson family?

Born in the countryside, Nora Fields was discovered by retired ping-pong legend Ethan Leigh and trained under his wing. As she rises in the ranks, city players mock her humble roots—saying farm girls don't belong on the court. Pressured to quit, Nora picks up her paddle instead, determined to fight her way to the top, one match at a time. EP 1:Nora struggles with the heavy paddle given by her master, Ethan Leigh, who insists it's necessary for her training. Meanwhile, she receives news about joining the Riverport Table Tennis Union and her mother getting a cleaning job there, bringing joy and gratitude. However, the scene takes a turn when Nora's mother confronts her angrily about an unknown trouble, demanding an apology.What trouble has Nora caused that requires her to kneel and apologize?

column1: Trash Man Stolen? Secret CEO Mine!
column4: Besties for years, Caroline and Lucy were inseparable—until envy turned deadly. A twist of fate rewinds their story to the very first blind date. Now Lucy thinks she holds the script, and Caroline seems to yield… but the tables are set, and dinner's about to get spicy... EP 1:Lucy's envy and hatred towards Caroline culminate in a shocking outburst at Caroline's wedding, revealing her deep-seated resentment. However, in a twist of fate, Caroline finds herself reborn back to the time of her first blind date with Lucy's desired husband, Jack Ferns, and decides to take control of the situation by immediately proposing marriage.Will Caroline's bold move change her fate and outmaneuver Lucy's schemes?

column1: The Mafia Queen vs. The Evil Neighbors
column4: Once the most feared mafia boss, Kayla walked away from it all for peace. But after her husband's death, violent hallucinations haunt her— only her loyal dog Milo can bring her back. Trying to live quietly, she's tormented by a gangster family next door. When they hurt Milo, the storm she's been holding back finally breaks... EP 1:Kayla experiences a violent outburst after her dog Milo is accidentally hurt by the neighbor's gangster family. Her loyal associates rush to bring Milo back to calm her down, revealing that Milo is the only one who can soothe her violent hallucinations stemming from her husband's death. Kayla decides to step down from leading the Silver Blades, trusting Wilton to take over, but tensions rise as the neighbors seem poised to provoke her further.Will the neighbor's reckless actions push Kayla over the edge and unleash her buried mafia instincts?

The mighty Shaw family is disgraced when their proud heirs are crushed in the Nightmount Clan tournament—cowards who kneel and beg. But no one expected their most humiliated outcast, the "worthless" son-in-law Jasper Swayne, to step forward… and unleash terrifying power! Who is he really? The Shaw family’s survival now rests in the hands of the man they despised most! EP 1:Jasper Swayne, the Shaw family's disgraced son-in-law, steps up to protect an old man from a violent confrontation, revealing a glimpse of his hidden strength. Meanwhile, the mysterious return of Grandmaster Onyx hints at deeper conflicts to come.Will Jasper's true power finally be unleashed in the face of Grandmaster Onyx's return?

Rebellious heiress Randy meets genius tutor Pitt, whose strange powers can keep her in check. From family betrayal to deadly schemes, their bond only grows stronger. Fate throws its worst at them—but trouble may regret choosing the wrong couple. EP 1:8-year-old genius Pitt John, who has won numerous championships to pay for his grandfather's medical bills, is considered as a potential tutor for the unruly heiress Randy. After witnessing Pitt's mysterious ability to immobilize people with a snap of his fingers, Randy's father believes he might be the key to controlling her wild behavior. Meanwhile, Pitt's grandfather warns him against using his powers lightly, hinting at potential dangers.Will Pitt's extraordinary abilities be enough to tame the rebellious Randy, or will his powers bring unforeseen consequences?

Emily, a bar worker saving for college, is assaulted but saved by Luke, sparking a connection. Pregnant, she plans to raise the child alone until Luke returns, offering love. Their bond is tested when Luke’s ex-fiancée Clara resurfaces, revealing Emily’s true identity as the Cassano heiress, switched at birth. Clara’s schemes fail, justice is served, and Emily reclaims her family. She and Luke marry, their love triumphing over adversity.

Forced into marriage by her adoptive parents, Haoyu takes a job as live-in maid for the arrogant and self-absorbed Li Wenfeng to earn tuition and escape her fate. Mistaking her for having a crush on him, Wenfeng constantly throws flirtatious looks, leading to hilarious yet sweet misunderstandings. But as they spend more time together, real feelings begin to grow. EP 1:Haoyu is forced into an arranged marriage by her adoptive parents for a dowry, but she resists and flees, seeking independence by applying for a job as a live-in maid to avoid her fate.Will Haoyu succeed in securing the maid position and escaping her forced marriage?

As a child, Serena Vale witnessed her parents’ murder. Fifteen years later, she returns home as a victorious general to seek the truth—only to find her grandfather’s family humiliated. The past proves darker than she imagined. This time, she won’t allow any evils escape! EP 1:Young Serena Vale witnesses the brutal murder of her parents, fleeing into the night as the perpetrators vow to hunt her down, while her grandfather desperately searches for her.Will Serena survive the night and uncover the truth behind her parents' murder?

Two best friends, one poor, the other fallen-rich, set out to outsmart the city's richest and a vicious stepmom. Bella uses every trick in the book, sparking a daring game of wit and risk. As the stakes rise and hearts entangle, will her brilliance be enough to win—and survive—the ultimate power play? EP 1:Bella, under the guise of borrowing books, is secretly working to prevent Tina's stepmom from marrying Tina's uncle. She reassures Tina of her safety and commitment to their plan, but a sudden accident with a glass hints at underlying tension or danger.Will Bella's plan to stop the marriage succeed, or will her risky moves lead to unexpected consequences?

He was a farm boy hidden in the mountains by his father, yet also a blade sharp enough to shake the empire. One duel stuns the world, one past romance stirs the storm. As long-buried secrets rise to the surface, the clash of steel ignites a journey where blood, fate, and vengeance collide. EP 1:William, the son of the legendary Blademaster, is sent down the mountain by his father to find the woman he once knew. Unaware of his true heritage and skills, William is warned to hide his abilities to avoid danger. Meanwhile, a young girl hosts a match to find a worthy husband for her mother, leading to an unexpected encounter with William.Will William's true identity be revealed in the upcoming duel?

column1: Fool! You Pissed Off the Master!
column4: The mighty master Ethan Shaw hides his identity in Riverport, yearning for peace. But a debt from the Lane family forces him to act! When their young master bullies Ethan’s kin, his fury erupts, burning his spirit, and he fights back, only to expose his secret! Betrayal and deadly traps close in… Protect or punish? The storm is about to begin! EP 1:Richard Lane, the richest man in Riverport, swallows his pride to beg Master Shaw to lift the deadly curse on his son. In exchange for his sincerity and past kindness, Master Shaw agrees to help, revealing the solution involves the Godbane Coffin and a three-day ritual. Meanwhile, Ethan prepares for the ritual, leaving his pregnant sister Sophia under his father's care, but an uneasy feeling lingers.Will Ethan's ritual be successful, or will his uneasy feeling foreshadow a hidden danger?

On her 26th birthday, Ella left boyfriend Felix for Jason, her decade-long admirer. This followed Felix prioritizing his ex's allergic daughter over Ella's dying father during a heart attack. Blaming Ella's "jealous lies," Felix only realized his mistake at her and Jason’s wedding, where his disruption failed. Though he persistently begged for reconciliation, Ella stayed committed. Ultimately, she and Jason found happiness together. EP 1:On her 26th birthday, Ella makes the painful decision to leave her long-term boyfriend Felix after he prioritizes his ex's daughter over her dying father during a critical moment. Devastated by Felix's betrayal and her father's death, Ella turns to Jason, her childhood friend who has loved her for ten years, and agrees to marry him in seven days.Will Ella and Jason's rushed wedding bring her the happiness she deserves, or will Felix's interference stir up more chaos?

Serena gave up her leg to save Lucian, but what Lucian gave Serena was his scorn. Crushed, she decides to leave, when Julian comes and lights her dark world. This time, she only lives for herself! Meanwhile, Lucian finds that Serena is the one he really loves...

column1: My Husband Is A Big Shot
column4:
On her wedding day, Selena Lane is betrayed by her fiancé and her half-sister. In a desperate bid
to escape her family, Selena impulsively marries a passing driver named Robert. However, Robert
is not who he seems; he is actually the CEO of Accord Group. He tries to keep his identity a
secret, yet his brother eventually find out where he is… EP 1:On her wedding day, Selena is devastated to discover her fiancé Ben is marrying her half-sister Emily instead. Humiliated and heartbroken, she impulsively proposes to a passing stranger, Robert, who is actually a CEO in disguise.Will Selena's impulsive marriage to Robert bring her the escape and happiness she desperately seeks?

Chad Kelly sacrificed everything for his family, working tirelessly until diagnosed with terminal lung cancer. Betrayed by his wife and wealthy brother, he dies brokenhearted — only to awaken ten years in the past. He chooses his own path and pursues his dream of revolutionary tech. But can he rise from tragedy and reclaim his life? EP 1:Chad Kelly, suffering from terminal lung cancer due to his hazardous job, learns of his wife's infidelity and demand for divorce on his son's birthday, while his ex-partner Trista Miller achieves a groundbreaking tech success that could have been his.Will Chad's tragic end lead to a second chance at life and revenge?

What? No girl is allowed to be single after her 18th birthday. To avoid marrying someone she doesn’t know, 12-year-old Selina is engaged with 17-year-old Eric. With the help of Selina’s family, Eric gets his success, but what Selina didn’t expect is that Eric wants a divorce. “Divorce? No problem.Pay back my money first!” EP 1:Selina, a chubby but confident girl, faces public humiliation when her fiancé Eric, now a successful scholar, unexpectedly arrives to break off their engagement, despite her family's long-standing support for his education.Will Selina let Eric walk away without consequences?

column1: Gosh, I Married an Heir in Coma!
column4: Mia believed Caden was her true love, but she didn't know that Caden only took her as tool to flirt with Yuri, the fake heiress. Defeated and heartbroken, Mia walked away and wed Ian, the comatose heir of a noble house. But is this surrender... or the start of her greatest gamble? EP 1:Mia agrees to marry the comatose heir of the Hawthorne family in place of her adopted sister Yuri, but only after negotiating a hefty dowry of two valuable courtyard houses from her parents, revealing deep family tensions and past betrayals.Will Mia's gamble lead to her ultimate revenge or an unexpected love story with the comatose heir?

column1: Ashes of Love, Flames of Power
column4: Betrayed and broken, she vanished from their world. Four years later, she returns—not as the woman they knew, but as a force to be reckoned with. In a game of love, lies, and power, who will come out on top? EP 1:Selina reveals her true colors as she coldly taunts her sister about their mother's death and her plans to take over the Johnson family fortune, leaving her sister devastated and questioning their bond.Will Selina's ruthless ambition lead to her downfall, or will she succeed in her sinister plans?

column1: Housewife No More, I'm the CEO
column4: Summer Jiang gave up her career to marry into the Zhang family, only to face her mother-in-law’s cruelty and her husband’s indifference. After a tragic fall that nearly cost her and her baby’s lives, Summer awakens to the truth—and vows to break free from her cage. EP 1:Summer is mistreated by her mother-in-law, who accuses her of pushing her after a heated argument over breakfast. The situation escalates when Summer's husband arrives, and a shocking revelation at the hospital leaves everyone stunned—the mother-in-law is two months pregnant.How will this unexpected pregnancy affect the already tense family dynamics?

Betrayed at her wedding by her fiancé and teased by her family, Vivian immediately marries a security guard to revenge, without knowing that this guard is a billionaire who’s hiding his real identity. When Vivian is humiliated by her fiancé’s mistress, her sister, the guard throws out zillions of dollars, leaving others taking their breath away... EP 1:Vivian's wedding day turns into a nightmare when her sister Chloe reveals she's pregnant with Vivian's fiancé Kevin's child. In a shocking twist, Chloe takes Vivian's place at the altar, leading Vivian to impulsively marry a security guard to spite her family, unaware he's actually a billionaire in disguise.Will Vivian's impulsive marriage to the mysterious security guard lead to unexpected consequences?

column1: The Betrayed Mother is the Divine Heiress
column4: Abandoned by her lover and betrayed by family, Emily raises her child alone—until fate unveils her true identity as the long-lost heiress of a powerful dynasty. Now, the woman once scorned returns with strength and vengeance, ready to reclaim all that was stolen from her.

After being drugged and encountering with the tycoon Xavier Anderson, Liana Scott awakens to a cruel twist of fate: pregnant with twins, exiled by her family, and robbed of her newborn son, Jeremy Anderson. Five years later, destiny forces them together when Liana finally tracks down Jeremy, now a cunning little matchmaker determined to reunite his estranged parents. Thrown into a reluctant cohabitation with Xavier, buried secrets and unresolved sparks ignite. EP 1:Liana Scott faces a horrifying ultimatum when her adoptive father, influenced by a fortune teller, demands the sacrifice of her twins to 'save' the Scott family's legacy. Amidst the chaos, Liana fiercely protects her children, vowing to repay her family's debts and sever ties forever.Will Liana succeed in escaping her family's cruel demands with her twins?

column1: Fall in Love with my Unknown Wife
column4: Breaking news! Billionaire Noah is allergic to woman! Living with no woman by his side for years, one day he surprisingly marries someone under the influence of alcohol. The next day, Noah leaves this city to escape such a ridiculous marriage. A year later,when he comes back, he falls in love with a cleaner. What he can’t expect is that this cleaner is hiding her real identity, and also, she is his wife who he wants to divorce. EP 1:Jules discovers her boyfriend cheating on her and dumps him in a dramatic scene. Meanwhile, under the influence of alcohol, a wealthy man offers a large sum of money to any woman willing to marry him on the spot, leading to an impulsive and unexpected marriage proposal to Jules.Will Jules regret her impulsive decision to marry a stranger when she sobers up?

Mocked for her looks and weight, Penha, a model agency's makeup artist, gets plastic surgery after a twist of fate. She becomes a modeling sensation, exacting revenge and finding love and success—only to discover it was all an intricate trap set by the man she trusted. EP 1:Laila Wills, a young woman, goes missing, and her last known sighting is reported. Meanwhile, Penha faces cruel mockery and physical abuse due to her appearance, highlighting the stark contrast between societal beauty standards and personal suffering.Will Penha's transformation lead her to uncover the truth behind Laila's disappearance?

In despair, Rachel Harris sells her virginity to Jasper Langford, the heir of the Langford family, to save her brother. When she became the Langford family’s servant, Jasper’s brother fell for her at the same time. Caught between two brothers and a family feud, Rachel finds herself at the center of a storm where love and duty collide, and her choice could change everything… EP 1:The episode centers around Jasper Langford's return and the lavish welcome he receives, including a controversial gift of a virgin woman meant to please him. However, Jasper shows no interest in the woman, leading to a tense moment where another man claims her, resulting in a struggle that hints at deeper conflicts and Jasper's moral stance.What will Jasper do next when faced with such blatant disregard for the woman's consent?

As the unloved daughter of the king, Talia is forced to marry a prince from a savage land, leaving the man she truly loves to be with her sister, her father's mistress's child. On the day of her unblessed wedding, the man she loves is making her sister happy... EP 1:Talia, the unloved daughter of the king, agrees to a Peacebond marriage to Varin to stop the war, but sets two conditions for her father: a massive dowry and transferring her beloved bodyguard Adrian to her sister Liora, revealing deeper family conflicts and unrequited love.Will Talia's sacrifice truly bring peace, or will hidden emotions spark a new conflict?

A struggling university student, Bella, unexpectedly has a one-night stand with Ian, a cold and restrained CEO with fertility issues, and ends up pregnant with triplets. From then on, she is showered with endless love and care from Ian's family. EP 1:Bella's step-sister Selina discovers Bella's pregnancy and cruelly insults her, revealing deep-seated resentment. Meanwhile, Selina steals Bella's hard-earned savings, leaving her desperate and without tuition or living expenses. The scene shifts to Ian, who is pressured by his mother to find a wife and produce an heir, hinting at his reluctance and possible future connection with Bella.Will Bella confront Selina and get her money back, and how will Ian's search for a wife intertwine with Bella's desperate situation?

Bernard Ford left home for fifteen years to master martial arts, leaving his daughter, Valerie, behind. Upon returning, his master warns him not to misuse his skills. At Skyward Sect, Bernard finds chaos: Valerie is under siege and no longer recognizes him. With the Sect crumbling, will Bernard break his oath to save his daughter and restore the Sect? EP 1:Bernard Ford masters the 72 ultimate techniques and prepares to leave the mountain, eager to reunite with his daughter Valerie. Meanwhile, Valerie is under attack by her uncle's henchmen, revealing a power struggle within the Skyward Sect.Will Bernard arrive in time to save Valerie and confront her uncle's forces?

Actress Denise Russell must marry cold CEO Aaron Wayne after their secret son surfaces. But when real feelings spark, his explosive jealousy turns their fake marriage into chaos, with a meddling kid, scheming rivals, and a love he can't control. EP 1:Max, Denise's secret son, searches for a new dad in public, causing a scene and eventually approaching Aaron Wayne, the CEO who is unaware of his connection to the boy. Despite Aaron's usual avoidance of women, Max is determined to set him up with Denise, handing him a card with her photo before being whisked away.Will Aaron recognize Denise from the photo and discover the shocking truth about Max?

At a university dance, Evelyn Rose had a fleeting night with Damien Cole, leaving behind their son, Leo. A decade later, fate reunites them as Damien unknowingly falls for his new secretary. Love, betrayal, and a shocking family secret collide when Evelyn is revealed as the long-lost Hart daughter. EP 1:Evelyn faces humiliation when her friends discover she's a virgin, while later, a serious accident leaves her son Leo with a potentially life-altering injury that requires expensive treatment. Meanwhile, Damien is pressured by his father to continue the family bloodline, adding to the tension between personal desires and family expectations.Will Evelyn find a way to pay for Leo's treatment, and how will Damien respond to his father's demands?

Zanisha Russell, a humble vegetable vendor in the capital, accidentally saves Prince Isaac Russell from an assassination attempt. After that, they become each other’s only source of support. Meanwhile, Zanisha’s son, Mateo Perry, marries into the powerful James family, subjecting her to relentless humiliation and life-threatening danger. When Isaac returns to the palace, Zanisha is crowned Empress Dowager. But the ambitious Princess Jane, hungry for power, begins to weave a deadly conspiracy... EP 1:Zanisha, a humble vegetable vendor, risks her life and her son's safety to protect Prince Isaac from assassins, showcasing her bravery and selflessness amidst danger and family conflict.Will Zanisha's heroic act lead to unforeseen consequences for her and her son?

Betrayed and abandoned, Susan Bennett’s life seemed hopeless—until a chance encounter with a powerful CEO reveals a shocking truth: the jade pendant she’s carried since childhood proves she’s the rightful heiress.
Now back and empowered, Susan confronts the impostor who stole her life. Her greedy ex-husband and ruthless mother-in-law soon learn she is no longer the girl they controlled—bold, fearless, and ready for revenge. Will they survive Susan’s reckoning? EP 1:Susan, pregnant and mistreated by her mother-in-law, clings to her jade pendant—her only link to her parents. After a brutal expulsion from her home, the pendant is spotted in Riftwood, leading a powerful figure to seek her out, hinting at her true heritage.Will Susan's newfound connection to wealth change her fate and bring her the revenge she seeks?

Caleb Murphy, a legal prodigy, gives up a prestigious international firm to join Elena Fisher’s struggling practice, helping her rise to the top. On their wedding day, she gifts him a box of “Spoil-Me Candy” — each piece a promise of unconditional forgiveness. But as old ties resurface and lines begin to blur, how many times can love be tested before it breaks? EP 1:Caleb donates a kidney to Elena's mother, but Elena prioritizes picking up her ex, Riley, over caring for Caleb during his recovery, testing the limits of their love and the promises symbolized by the Spoil-Me Candy.Will Caleb reach his breaking point when the last Spoil-Me Candy is gone?

One moment, Ethan Carter is a security guard living an ordinary life. The next, he wakes up in a martial world full of swords, sects, and secrets. Before he even figures out where he is, rumors start spreading—about a mysterious master whose aura terrifies even the strongest warriors. Master? It's him. And he has no idea why. Can this unlikely hero bring peace to the land? EP 1:Ethan Carter, a simple security guard, inexplicably wakes up in a martial world where he is mistaken for a powerful master. Amidst chaos and a deadly confrontation, he is bestowed the Destiny Manual and named the Divine Heir of the Destiny Sect, despite his complete lack of martial arts skills.Will Ethan survive his newfound role as the Divine Heir in a world where strength is everything?

column1: Gambling King: No Way to Return
column4: Ethan Gowdy becomes a professional gambler and anti-gambling expert after his family was ruined by his father’s huge gambling debts. However, he’s killed by some criminal group. Reborn, he defeats the criminals unstoppably and saves his family. But this is only the beginning of his journey of revenge... EP 1:Ethan Gowdy, a professional gambler and anti-gambling expert, recounts his tragic past where his family was destroyed by his father's gambling debts, leading to his sister's disappearance. Trained by the Master of Cheating, Quentin Hill, Ethan becomes unstoppable in exposing gambling frauds. However, after helping the police dismantle numerous crime syndicates, he is killed, only to mysteriously find himself reborn, ready to continue his fight against gambling and seek revenge.What will Ethan do now that he's been given a second chance at life and revenge?

column1: How I Ruined My Cheater Husband
column4: Wedding night? No groom. Instead, a stranger barges in and ruins everything. Her mother-in-law humiliates her, her husband turns cold, and the mistress laughs in her face—until she’s kicked out with nothing. But guess what? She’s actually a top lawyer. After divorce, she shines in court, business, and love… and for her second marriage? She casually takes the nation’s richest man. It's time to pay back now! EP 1:On what was supposed to be the happiest night of her life, the bride is drugged and humiliated by a stranger, leading to accusations of infidelity by her mother-in-law and the beginning of a dramatic downfall.Will the bride uncover the truth behind the betrayal and reclaim her dignity?

In her ruthless quest to avenge her family’s ruin, Jane Lewis slips between the sheets—and the secrets—of Benjamin Pike, the most powerful heir in the city. But as lies tangle with lust and revenge turns into unstoppable obsession, she must choose whether to complete her mission…or surrender to the man she was supposed to destroy. Let’s wait and see. EP 1:At a high-stakes gathering where the city's most influential figures converge, warnings are issued about the ruthless Benjamin Pike, whose dark past and unyielding power make him a feared figure. Jane Lewis makes a calculated entrance, setting the stage for a dangerous game of seduction and revenge.Will Jane's bold move against Benjamin Pike lead to her downfall or his?

column1: My Husband‘s Mistress is His Mom？
column4: Beth, a top streamer who is about to join the wealthiest family, mistakes her mother-in-law for a MISTRESS on the eve of her wedding! She immediately retaliates, not realizing what kind of mishap this crazy revenge will bring her! EP 1:Edward proposes to Beth, expressing his deep love for her and their plans to marry in a week. Beth is excited to meet Edward's mother, Mrs. Brown, who has been supportive of their relationship from afar. However, Mrs. Brown's absence before the wedding raises questions.Will Mrs. Brown's delayed meeting with Beth lead to unforeseen complications before the wedding?

column1: Being sacrificed, I become the master
column4: The Zane family's discarded eldest daughter is sacrificed to the Celestial Emperor, only to discover she is his long-lost master reincarnated. Trapped in a deadly scheme with her stepsister’s face replacing hers, she awakens her past power and seeks brutal revenge. But at what cost... can love and vengeance coexist? EP 1:Jessica Zane, the discarded eldest daughter of the Zane Family, is betrayed by her stepsister and fiancé Felix, who forces her to become his concubine. When the Celestial Emperor's wife lottery selects her, she defiantly chooses to face certain death in the Celestial Palace over humiliation.Will Jessica survive the brutal Celestial Emperor, or will her missing soul fragment seal her fate?

Orphan Taoist nun Mira lives simply in her mountain temple—until she's hired to discipline a spoiled 9-year-old billionaire heir. Through countless lessons and battles, these sworn enemies form an unbreakable bond. But when the time comes to return to their separate worlds, will their friendship survive the distance? EP 1:Mira Lynn, heir of The Tao Order, intervenes when a group of people dine and dash, leading to a chaotic brawl that showcases her strong morals and fighting skills, ultimately catching the attention of someone looking to discipline a troublesome young heir.Will Mira be able to handle the unruly young master Harry, who has already driven away eight tutors?

Marla Lynn wakes up 11 years after her death, only to discover her world is a novel. Her three younger brothers are the villainous counterparts of the main couple, doomed to tragic fates. Unable to accept their roles in the romance, she cuts the ties to change their destinies. But when her former rival returns, his gaze filled with obsession, will she be able to control the future, or will she become the one trapped by fate? EP 1:Marla Lynn wakes up 11 years after her death to discover she's living in a romance novel where her three brothers are destined to be villains with tragic fates. Determined to change their destinies, she confronts her brother Ethan, who is blindly catering to the female lead Vanessa Lee, setting the stage for her mission to defy fate.Will Marla succeed in changing her brothers' doomed futures or will fate prove too strong to overcome?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Taming the Playboy', 'Sweet Romance']

column4: Betrayed by her cousin and abandoned in a ruined temple, Empress Elena falls into a fateful entanglement with Regent Adrian. For years she believed the emperor was the one who had saved her before, only to uncover his ruthless lies and her real savior, Regent Adrian. Guided by Adrian, she must reclaim her strength and healing gift, rising from a caged pawn to the empire’s most powerful queen and physician. EP 1:Empress Elena is betrayed by her cousin and left to suffer in a ruined temple, only to be saved by Regent Adrian, the true hero of her past, revealing the Emperor's deceit and setting her on a path to reclaim her power and healing gift.Will Elena embrace her true destiny with Regent Adrian by her side?

The world’s top chef disappears at his peak. During a local cooking contest, Skylar, a humble prep cook, unveils himself as the lost master. Betrayed and maimed, he loses his hands and becomes a beggar. Armed with just one simple dish, can Skylar overcome his enemies and reclaim his culinary throne? EP 1:Skylar Fong wins the World Culinary Competition for the third time, becoming the first Grand Slam in Aetheria, attracting lucrative offers from top restaurants and associations eager to collaborate with him.Will Skylar Fong accept any of the staggering offers or pursue a different culinary path?

Five years ago, Summer Roy used her pregnancy to marry into the Ford family for money. Liam Ford never loved her—until a tragic accident left him paralyzed and bankrupt. He was certain she would leave. But she stayed, caring for him day and night. Just as he began to believe she truly loved him… he uncovered her hidden motive. Betrayed yet burning with resolve, Liam is determined to regain his fortune and make Summer stay—forever. Will he succeed? Or will she walk away when he needs her most? EP 1:Summer Roy, who married into the wealthy Ford family for money, learns that her husband Liam Ford has been involved in a serious car accident. Despite her indifferent attitude towards his infidelity, she rushes to the hospital where she discovers the accident was caused by Liam's emotional turmoil over his first love, Jade Young. Summer's true feelings and motives begin to surface as she contemplates her future and the potential inheritance.Will Summer's hidden motives be revealed, or will she finally show genuine care for Liam in his time of need?

Sophia Lane was once a rising star in Centralia’s billiards scene, but she was forced to disappear from the spotlight. Now living under a false identity, she hides in a humble pool hall with her daughter, Daisy, who shows extraordinary talent in billiards. But when she reveals her skills in an attempt to save the struggling hall, she catches the eye of the underground black market—and is kidnapped... EP 1:Gavin Cooper, the two-time billiards champion, unexpectedly returns to Centralia, seeking Sophia Lane, the mysterious former star who vanished after her victory. His arrival stirs excitement and challenges at the local pool hall, where Sophia now lives in hiding.Will Sophia's past catch up with her as Gavin's search intensifies?

column1: The Counterattack of the Vulgar Queen
column4: She was promised the throne by the man she loved, only to lose her memory and be tricked into ruin. Seven years later, Selena returns with her son, ready to reclaim her pendant, her dignity, and her rightful place beside the emperor. But false queens, ruthless rivals, and deadly schemes stand in her way—until destiny gives her one last chance to rise as empress... EP 1:The Emperor has been tirelessly searching for the lost Empress Selena Shay for ten years, haunted by the guilt of leaving her without a word. Meanwhile, Selena, suffering from memory loss, is unaware of her true identity and the love that awaits her. The Emperor's decision to betroth Princess Ada to the newly crowned laureate sets the stage for political intrigue, while a mysterious woman's presence threatens to disrupt the fragile peace.Will Selena regain her memory and reclaim her rightful place as Empress?

Besties for years, Caroline and Lucy were inseparable—until envy turned deadly. A twist of fate rewinds their story to the very first blind date. Now Lucy thinks she holds the script, and Caroline seems to yield… but the tables are set, and dinner's about to get spicy... EP 1:Lucy's jealousy and hatred towards Caroline culminates in a shocking outburst at Caroline's wedding, revealing her deep-seated resentment over Caroline marrying the chairman of Voltron Group. A twist of fate sends Caroline back in time to the blind date that started it all, where she now has the chance to change her future.Will Caroline's knowledge of the future alter her choices and prevent the tragic events that unfolded?

column1: Your Majesty… I’m Just a Courtesan!
column4: After spending a night with Emperor, Ryan Coleman, Jessica Jane thought she’d left her courtesan life behind—until her fiancé left her sentenced to death. Saved by the Emperor himself, Jessica navigated a court full of enemies: from jealous princesses to manipulative nobles. Will she join hands with the Emperor and fight her way out, or will this journey end with tragedy? EP 1:Jessica Jane, a former courtesan, leaves the brothel after buying her freedom, unaware that Emperor Ryan Coleman is searching for her after their fateful encounter where she unknowingly drugged him. The Emperor orders his men to find her at any cost.Will Jessica escape the Emperor's wrath, or will she be caught in his relentless pursuit?

Once an heiress, Vivian is forced into a secret contract with cold CEO Adrian to save her dying grandfather. Branded a gold-digger, she hides her pregnancy and runs. But Adrian will stop at nothing to hunt her down… what happens when obsession collides with love?
 EP 1:Vivian, once a proud heiress, is now in a dire situation as her grandfather's life hangs in the balance due to unpaid medical bills. In her desperation, she encounters Adrian, a cold CEO who offers her money in exchange for her compliance, leading to a tense and dangerous encounter where Vivian's pride and safety are at stake.Will Vivian succumb to Adrian's demands to save her grandfather, or will she find another way out of her dire circumstances?

Framed by his own family, Jason serves ten years in prison for his adopted brother. Behind bars, he learns deadly gambling tricks from Tiger. Freed at last, he returns for revenge—toppling hypocrites, saving friends, and facing the ruthless Gambling King… but who will win? EP 1:Jason Gowdy is framed by his own family for his adopted brother Ethan's illegal casino operations, forced to take the blame and sentenced to ten years in prison. Despite his protests and the injustice, his family manipulates him into signing a confession, prioritizing their reputation over his freedom. In prison, however, Jason meets Tiger, a man who sees potential in him and begins to mentor him in the art of deadly gambling, setting the stage for his eventual revenge.Will Jason's newfound skills be enough to topple those who betrayed him?

Being betrayed and fed to a mega-shark by her cheating boyfriend and best friend, Nina wakes up reliving the same deadly vacation. Using her deadly knowledge of the future, she's saving a billionaire and a special forces soldier. And when the mega-shark returns, she smiles: "You should've believed me..." EP 1:Nina is betrayed by her boyfriend Mike and best friend Cindy, who sacrifice her as bait to a mega-shark. After her death, she mysteriously wakes up reliving the same deadly vacation, realizing she has a chance to change her fate.Will Nina be able to outsmart her betrayers and survive the shark's attack this time?

During a bridal ball toss, two sisters cast their destinies into the air.
The elder’s ball lands with a nobleman; the younger’s, in the hands of a beggar.
One rises to glory. The other dies in regret—until time turns back.
Given a second chance, the younger sister rewrites the moment.
But what if the beggar holds a secret, and fate has its own design? EP 1:Lady Evelyn Sterling is bestowed the title of First-Rank Lady of Honour, but her moment of glory is shattered when her sister accuses her of betrayal and murder, revealing deep-seated envy and regret over their past choices.What dark secret does the sister's accusation hide, and how will Evelyn's honours crumble under the weight of their shared past?

After years away, Cece and Will return rich and proud, only to block Julie Brown, who is racing a bleeding child to the ER. They mock her, stall her, even spill the girl's medicine. But at the hospital, horror strikes: the dying child is their own daughter, Belle. Will Belle survive, or pay the price for her parents' cruelty? EP 1:Cece and Will, after five years away, are finally returning to their daughter Belle, promising her a life of luxury and love, unaware of the tragic irony that awaits them as their past actions are about to catch up with them.Will Cece and Will's reunion with Belle be the happy moment they promised, or will their past cruelties come back to haunt them?

Ten years ago, Eliot Howard, the Howard family’s eldest son, rescued a gifted orphan, Jacob, only to invite ruin into his life. Jacob stole his family’s love, cut off his arm, and framed him for murder, leaving him caged for a decade. Betrayed even by his fiancée, Eliot turned to the Solar Sect. Three years later, he returns as its new leader… just as the Howard family teeters on the edge of destruction. EP 1:Eliot Howard recounts his tragic past where Jacob, the orphan he saved, betrayed him by stealing his family's love, cutting off his arm, and framing him for theft and violence, leading to his decade-long imprisonment.Will Eliot finally expose Jacob's lies and reclaim his rightful place in the Howard family?

column1: Oops, I Got a Caged Prince
column4: When feisty farm girl Cecilia Turner spends a few coins to buy a caged man, she drags him home to... start a family! Little does she know—he is Prince Adrian, the Emperor's wrongfully accused brother. From sham marriage to fiery love, they battle scheming exes and palace rivals. Now that his name is cleared, can a village bride survive court intrigues—and tame her icy prince? EP 1:Cecilia, a spirited farm girl, buys a caged man named Adrian, unaware he is the wrongfully accused Prince. After securing his freedom, she boldly introduces him as her husband, shocking her mother.Will Cecilia's audacious claim hold up when the truth about Adrian's identity comes to light?

column1: The Girl Who Plays Heaven's Move
column4: Down on his luck, Hermit Azure sent his apprentice, Candice, a Go prodigy, to the Checkered Go Hall under Master Ryan Swift. There, she solved the "Dragon Puzzle" and defeated the "Go King" Night Owl. Together, Candice and Ryan set off on a legendary journey to the Celestial Go Tournament to uncover secrets of the past. EP 1:Candice, a Go prodigy, defeats her master in a game and is sent down the mountain to find Ryan Swift at the Checkered Go Hall, where she unexpectedly cracks the legendary 'Dragon Puzzle' and earns a massive bounty.What secrets will Candice uncover now that she's solved the Dragon Puzzle and entered the world of competitive Go?

column1: Falling in Love by A Mistaken Vow
column4: Luca is allergic to women—until a drunken night ties him to Isla in a marriage neither remembers. He flees abroad, she struggles for her mother's medical bills. A year later, he finds Isla is the only woman he's not allergic to—and makes her his contract girlfriend. Sparks fly… until the twist: the "spouse" they tried to escape is each other! EP 1:Luca, who is allergic to women, wakes up to find he's married to a stranger after a drunken night, and both are desperate to undo the mistake they don't even remember making.Will Luca and Isla manage to find each other and get the divorce they so desperately want?

column1: My Farmer Dad is a CEO?
column4: At thirty, Arthur Vance had become Greenvine City’s business titan. Sick of boardroom games, he stepped down, adopted six-year-old Leo, and vanished to a quiet farm. Twenty years on, Arthur is fifty-plus, Leo is ready to marry, and the empire Arthur built now dominates the city. A late-stage diagnosis pushes Arthur to put his house in order and make one last gift. He arrives at the wedding with the papers in hand—when a different contract lands on the table. EP 1:Arthur, a former business titan living quietly on a farm, discovers that his son Leo is getting married today without informing him. Despite Leo's reluctance, Arthur decides to attend the wedding, revealing a strained father-son relationship and setting the stage for a dramatic reunion.What will happen when Arthur crashes the wedding?

Chase Lewis was born the rightful heir to the prestigious Lewis family, but after vanishing in childhood and surviving two decades in exile, he returns to a home that no longer remembers him. In his place stands a stranger with a smile and a secret, and behind the warmth of reunion lies betrayal. As blood proves thinner than loyalty, Chase learns that some destinies aren't given. They're taken back. EP 1:Chase Lewis, the rightful heir to the Lewis family, returns home after 20 years in exile only to find his place taken by Theo, the adopted son. Theo frames Chase for stealing the clan's Martial Arts Secrets, leading to Chase's brutal punishment and exile. The family, including Chase's parents and fiancée, sides with Theo, leaving Chase betrayed and broken.Will Chase find a way to reclaim his rightful place and expose Theo's treachery?

column1: For My Son: The Final Break
column4: Terminally ill billiards legend York Zane storms back into the game after a gambling syndicate maims his son. He enters the Billiard God Championship with one goal: CRUSH THE CRIMINALS, BREAK HIS SON FREE. But the match is rigged, rivals are vicious. Can he outplay his rivals, rescue his son, and reclaim his throne—or is this his final shot? EP 1:Terminally ill billiards legend York Zane discovers his son Cole has been lured into a rigged gambling match by Hyde Warren, losing $300,000 meant for York's cancer treatment. After learning of his son's desperate attempt to save him and the brutal consequences—losing a leg—York vows to confront the criminals and reclaim what was stolen.Will York Zane's return to the billiards table be enough to outplay the syndicate and save his son?

Blind and disguised, Narsus, once the greatest warrior, wanders as an outcast. When he rescues lone heiress Aruna, he helps her reclaim her clan and expose her uncle’s treachery. As his legendary archery awakens, so does his past—hunting the murderer of his wife and child. Who is the hunter… and who is the prey? EP 1:Narsus, a once-great warrior now living as a blind outcast, rescues Aruna, the heiress of the Ulan Clan, from attackers seeking the Golden Seal. As he protects her, his legendary skills resurface, hinting at his tragic past and the vengeance he seeks for his family's murder.Will Narsus embrace his past and help Aruna reclaim her clan, or will his quest for revenge lead them into greater danger?

Flora Reed was separated from her twin sister Irene Reed at a young age. Upon returning to her home country, she was met with the news of her sister's death, and that Irene's husband, Jason Marsh, was entitled to a huge compensation as a result. Sensing something suspicious about her sister's death, Flora disguised herself as a blind person and assumed her sister's identity to return to Jason's side, ultimately avenging her sister's death. EP 1:On their third wedding anniversary, Jason Marsh appears to be the perfect husband to his wife, Irene, but soon after, she mysteriously dies, leaving Jason entitled to a massive $80 million insurance payout. Flora, Irene's twin sister, returns and witnesses the suspicious circumstances surrounding her sister's death, hinting at a deeper conspiracy.Will Flora uncover the truth behind her sister's death and Jason's dark secrets?

In Smithsville, daughters are powerless, sons rule—and the Summers sisters know humiliation well. Yvonne Summers, their hope, wins a place at Arcasia University, but her parents are swindled from their ancestral home by corrupt chief Chander. Ten years later, Yvonne returns from Wallace Capital Group—powerful, unstoppable, and ready to reclaim everything stolen from her family. EP 1:David Summers faces humiliation and resistance when he tries to claim compensation money for his daughter Yvonne's college tuition, highlighting the deep-seated gender bias in Smithsville. Despite the community's disdain, Yvonne's acceptance into a prestigious overseas university becomes a beacon of hope for the Summers family.Will Yvonne's return to Smithsville change the fate of the Summers family?

After a tragic car crash killed her parents, Nancy spent a decade loving the man she thought saved her—only to discover her marriage was a lie orchestrated by his greedy family. But when the true hero, billionaire Christian, returns from abroad, he's not there to console her: he's there to seduce, sabotage, and steal her from that husband... EP 1:Nancy finds herself in a perilous situation with Mr. Luk, the Jacksons' biggest rival, who seems to know her and teases her with a mix of danger and seduction. The tension escalates as he challenges her fear, hinting at a deeper game at play.Will Nancy fall into Mr. Luk's trap, or does she have a plan of her own?

Being betrayed and fed to a mega-shark by her cheating boyfriend and best friend, Nina wakes up reliving the same deadly vacation. Using her deadly knowledge of the future, she's saving a billionaire and a special forces soldier. And when the mega-shark returns, she smiles: "You should've believed me..." EP 1:Nina is betrayed by her boyfriend Mike and best friend Cindy, who sacrifice her to a mega-shark to save themselves. As she faces her death, Nina suddenly wakes up reliving the same deadly vacation, realizing she has a chance to change her fate.Will Nina use her knowledge of the future to turn the tables on her betrayers?

Five years ago, I ghosted the literal King of the Underworld by taking his power core. Now he's my arranged marriage husband, hunting for his lost soul, while I'm just trying to get my kidnapped kid back. This is not how I pictured my hot-girl-era... EP 1:Willow pressures the protagonist into an arranged marriage meeting with a seemingly perfect man, while the protagonist is haunted by recurring nightmares and reluctant to comply. Meanwhile, the King of the Underworld, Hades, returns to seek the woman who stole his power core five years ago, and their paths are about to cross.Will the protagonist recognize Hades when they meet, and what will happen when he realizes she's the one who stole his core?

column1: He Fights Fire, But Burns Me

column4: Four years ago, Elena Aldridge fled her wedding, convinced she was unworthy of her fiancé. Now, carrying secrets and a child, she returns to confront the man she once ran from. Old betrayals, new desires, and an unexpected reunion — in a city that never forgets, can love survive the past, or will it finally tear them apart? EP 1:Elena Aldridge returns to the city she fled four years ago, carrying a child and secrets, determined to confront Darmian, the man she left at the altar. As she arrives with her son Lucas, the past and present collide, raising questions about forgiveness, love, and the truth behind her sudden departure.Will Darmian forgive Elena for leaving him at the altar, or will the secrets she carries tear them apart for good?

To save her sister, Raina Winters became a surrogate for a wealthy man, only to be separated from her child and sent abroad. Five years later, now a celebrated violinist, she performs at Young Master Ferns’ birthday. The boy is instantly captivated, sneaking out to see her—sparking chaos and drawing Raina closer to his father, Julian... EP 1:Raina Winters gives birth to a baby boy, only to have him taken away immediately in a deal for ten million dollars. Five years later, as a celebrated violinist, she is still searching for her lost child while performing at Young Master Ferns’ birthday, where she unknowingly encounters her past.Will Raina discover that Young Master Ferns is her long-lost son?

column1: Fake Death? I’ll make it real!
column4:
Betrayed and left for dead by the family she sacrificed everything for, Sophia Lee uncovers the ultimate lie: her "late" parents Richard and Margaret are alive and thriving—with a new daughter, Olivia.
Reborn with rage, she starts her revenge where it all began—by digging up their empty graves.
This time, the real heiress isn’t begging. She’s burning it all down.
“You fake your death? I’ll make it real.” EP 1:Sophia Lee, betrayed by her family and left for dead, discovers her parents faked their deaths and are living a luxurious life with a new daughter, Olivia. After years of suffering and raising her brother, she is shockingly discarded by her family at her brother's celebration. Realizing the truth about her identity and the life stolen from her, Sophia vows revenge, determined to make her parents' fake deaths a reality.Will Sophia succeed in her quest for revenge against those who betrayed her?

column1: My Missing Son Becomes a Billionaire?!
column4: When his four-year-old son vanished, factory worker Edward Carter spent 20 years searching, never knowing the truth was hidden in his own home. Just as betrayal closes in, the son he thought lost—now a powerful heir—returns. Father and son reunite, and together they face the enemy who once tore them apart... EP 1:During a family meal, tensions rise due to financial struggles, but the mood shifts when young Alex is tragically swept away by a flood, leaving his family in despair.Will Alex's family ever discover the truth behind his disappearance?

Five years ago, Ethan Perlman was framed and imprisoned. Behind bars, he mastered deadly martial arts and miraculous healing. Now released, he faces a world that underestimates him. In a battle of power, skill, and hidden secrets, will he take revenge—or discover a path beyond vengeance? EP 1:Ethan Perlman, after five years of rigorous training in prison, is deemed ready by his mentors to leave and exact revenge on those who wronged him. Armed with powerful artifacts that grant him command over the Healer's Temple and the Wolfguard's army, he sets out to settle the score with the Grant family.Will Ethan's newfound power and alliances be enough to take down the Grant family, or will he uncover deeper secrets that change his path of vengeance?

column1: Cold Marriage? I Bore Your Brother’s Baby
column4: Lucy Carter’s marriage to Adrian Smith was nothing but cold silence, until he’s diagnosed with a fatal illness. His mistress storms in with his only child, ready to take everything. But Lucy isn’t so easily broken. After one reckless night with Adrian's brother, Julian Smith, Lucy bears a Smith heir. Just when victory seems hers… Julian steps through her door… EP 1:Lucy Carter learns that her husband Adrian has only ten months left to live, and her stepsister Yara is ready to take over the Smith family with her illegitimate son. Unfazed, Lucy declares she will have a Smith heir herself. Meanwhile, Lucy engages in a high-stakes game with Adrian, where she bets her own body against Adrian's tongue, revealing her bold and strategic nature.Will Lucy's daring gamble secure her position in the Smith family, or will it backfire spectacularly?

column1: Hired a Billionaire as Baby’s Dad
column4: On her wedding day, Summer is dumped by her fiancé for an old flame. Determined to protect her mother’s legacy, she hires a man to father her child.
