But the “perfect candidate” turns out to be Alex—the world’s richest man…and her ex’s uncle. Now, revenge turns dangerously sweet. EP 1:On her wedding day, Summer is dumped by her fiancé Ethan for his ex, Zoey, leading her to impulsively hire a stranger to father her child, only to later discover he's the world's richest man—and Ethan's uncle.Will Summer's plan for revenge take an unexpected turn when she realizes who the father of her child really is?

“Lucas, want a wife? Just say the word, and I’ll bring her to you.”
A modern engineer Lucas wakes up in a war-torn world and crosses paths with a noblewoman fleeing for her life.Armed with blade and bow, Lucas will stop at nothing to protect his family and survive the chaos. EP 1:Lucas, a modern engineer, wakes up in a war-torn world inside the body of a lowlife thug named Lucas. He quickly learns about his new reality, including a wife he didn't know he had, and decides to redefine his identity, vowing to no longer be a thug but a leader.Will Lucas be able to change his fate and protect his newfound family in this brutal world?

After being betrayed by his own daughter and son-in-law and forced into a nursing home from hell, David dies full of regret—only to wake up years earlier, with a chance to rewrite his fate.  This time, he'll use his knowledge of the future to expose their greed, protect his wealth, and turn their schemes against them. But how far is he willing to go for revenge? EP 1:David Zane, a betrayed and impoverished elderly man, faces cruel treatment and neglect in a nursing home, struggling to survive without money or support from his family.Will David find a way to escape this nightmare or succumb to his dire circumstances?

He was once a reckless boy with no future, while she was the girl who lit up his world. Years later, he becomes a man who conquered empires. And she’s no longer just the girl from his past—she’s a force of her own, dazzling in every role she takes on. When two worlds collide again, will it spark a fairy tale…or rewrite the rules of power and love? EP 1:Silas Mercer, the rebellious young master, chooses to pick trash over studying, shocking his parents. His defiance takes a turn when a brave girl stands up against a thief, impressing everyone and potentially becoming the key to Silas's redemption.Will the brave girl be the one to finally change Silas's rebellious ways?

He was once a reckless boy with no future, while she was the girl who lit up his world. Years later, he becomes a man who conquered empires. And she’s no longer just the girl from his past—she’s a force of her own, dazzling in every role she takes on. When two worlds collide again, will it spark a fairy tale…or rewrite the rules of power and love? EP 1:Silas Mercer, the rebellious young master, refuses to study despite his parents' efforts, choosing to pick up trash instead. His determination is tested when he encounters a brave girl who stands up to a thief, sparking hope in his parents that she might be the one to guide him towards a better path.Will the brave girl's influence be enough to change Silas's stubborn ways?

column1: Heiress Returns to Claim the Empire
column4: A daughter thought lost returns to a home of betrayal and ambition. As schemes collide and rivalries ignite, she must navigate a web of deceit. In this game of power, every secret could change everything. One wrong move could tip the scales—will she survive the fight for justice? Can she restore order before the shadows of her family’s past consume her? EP 1:Leader Scarlet is begged by Victor Holt to save his son from the Blood Wolf Clan, who have kidnapped him for ransom. Despite the risks, Scarlet agrees to help, showcasing her formidable skills when she confronts and defeats the kidnappers, only to face a final threat that could jeopardize the mission.Will Scarlet's legendary reputation be tarnished by the Blood Wolf Clan's last desperate act?

Zoe always thought Yvonne was the guy who protected in her childhood… until she saved Jared, the city’s richest man, and found out: he’s actually Yvonne’s uncle — and her real childhood crush! Now Jared’s chasing her hard. While her engagement with Yvonne blows up in a brutal public shame, he shows up with his crew. But is he here to save her… or stir up even more drama? EP 1:Zoe Lewis, a surgeon, saves Jared Chase, the richest man in Aura City, from a gunshot wound, only to discover he is the uncle of her fiancé, Yvonne Chase. The encounter at a family dinner unveils hidden connections and sparks curiosity about Jared's sudden appearance and intentions.Will Jared's unexpected presence at the family dinner unravel more secrets about Zoe's past with the Chase family?

Ethan Stone, a hardworking tech employee making half million a year, quietly buys a cheap game to relive his youth. When his daughter finds out, she launches a brutal online attack that leads to his heart attack. Now, with a shocking new power to multiply his spending, Ethan plans to take back what’s rightfully his. But will his family regret pushing him too far?

column1: My Prince Charming is a Billionaire!
column4: Nicole Butler, a college senior from a troubled background, refuses to be sold into a marriage for a dowry that would fund her brother’s wedding. In a twist of fate, she impulsively marries Justine Lalloz—who, hiding his immense wealth out of her despite for the wealthy, secretly uses his fortune to smooth her path, turning her life into an unspoken fairy tale. EP 1:Nicole Butler is forcibly taken by a man who claims her mother has sold her into marriage to pay her brother's dowry. She resists and is saved by Justine Lalloz, who intervenes and pretends to be her husband to help her avoid the forced marriage and sign for her emergency surgery.Will Justine's secret wealth and his growing feelings for Nicole complicate their fake marriage?

To honor her grandpa’s promise, wealthy heiress Victoria is forced to marry a country boy, Gabriel. She expects a poor bumpkin… but when she follows him to the countryside, she discovers a life of staggering wealth, priceless treasures, unimaginable luxury... Who is he really? EP 1:Gabriel, a seemingly poor country boy, is pressured by his family to honor his grandfather's arranged marriage with Victoria from the wealthy Hughes family. Despite his doubts about their acceptance, he sets off to propose, unaware of his parents' hidden prestigious identities as top agricultural scientists. Meanwhile, Victoria's father scoffs at the idea of his daughter marrying a 'country bumpkin,' setting the stage for a clash of perceptions and hidden truths.Will Gabriel's true family background be revealed before Victoria's father ruins their chance at love?

Ten years ago, Stella Shaw watched her mother, Samantha, die at the hands of Olivia Lane. After Olivia ascends as Empress, Stella is thrown to wolves, only to be saved by a mysterious figure. Trained in the art of seduction, Stella enters the palace to seek revenge. Can she expose Olivia’s lies and reclaim her mother’s honor? EP 1:Stella Shaw witnesses her mother, Samantha, being brutally murdered by Olivia Lane, who then frames Samantha for adultery to protect her own reputation for the Imperial Court Selection. After being saved from death by a mysterious figure, Stella vows revenge and is offered training to become a consort, setting the stage for her future confrontation with Olivia.Will Stella succeed in her quest for revenge against the newly crowned Empress Olivia?

Abandoned at birth by a scheming maid, Stella Wilson was "found" years later—only to face betrayal. Her parents favored the impostor, her fiancé cheated. But when she walked away, they discovered the shocking truth: she's the lost sister of a powerful tycoon! Now, as they beg for forgiveness, she turns to the one who always loved her—her brother. Revenge has never been sweeter. EP 1:Stella Wilson discovers her fiancé Ian and the impostor Eileen have a baby together before their engagement party, leading her to publicly call off the engagement and vow to expose their deceit.Will Stella's bold move to expose Ian and Eileen backfire or finally bring her the justice she deserves?

After a time-travel escape from a murderous emperor, socialite Yvette returns to modern life—only to find her inheritance stolen and the tyrant himself chasing her to here! Now she must outrun an ancient ruler armed with gold ingots and outrage while reclaiming her fortune from her backstabbing family. EP 1:Yvette, a modern socialite trapped in the past as a concubine of the tyrant Hank Shaw, seizes her chance to return to her own time during the Celestial Concord, but not before confronting the tyrant and revealing her true identity.Will the tyrant Hank Shaw find a way to follow Yvette into the modern world?

Once a mighty empress, Isabella wakes up as an illegitimate daughter treated like trash. Sneering in-laws, a playboy husband? Please. She ruled the harem with an iron fist; this pathetic Perry family doesn't stand a chance. But just she thinks she’s on top, she finds out her so-called playboy husband hides a shocking secret… EP 1:Isabella, once a mighty empress, is transported a thousand years into the future as an illegitimate daughter of the Lawson House. Bound by a mysterious system, she is forced to marry Adrian Perry to restore her family's fortune, but questions arise about why this opportunity wasn't given to her sister.Will Isabella uncover the true motives behind her arranged marriage to Adrian?

column1: The Forbidden Love With The Young CEO
column4: Renée gets accidentally impregnated byZack, her best friend's drugged son, after a one-night stand. Faced with Zack's straightforward affection, Renée is panicked, thinking Zack merely saw her as a toy. However, Zack's tenderness and reliability gradually soften Renée's hardened heart, and she begins to try to accept this relationship... EP 1:Renée finds herself in a compromising situation with Zack, her best friend's son, after a one-night stand. Despite her initial resistance and guilt over their inappropriate relationship, Zack's persistence and declarations of love challenge her resolve, leaving her torn between morality and her growing feelings.Will Renée give in to her feelings for Zack, or will she choose to walk away from this forbidden love?

column1: The Lady General Who Left It All
column4: After five years at war, Lady General Selene Shaw returns in triumph, only to find betrayal at every turn. Heartbroken, she breaks her engagement and severs ties with her family and kingdom. When northern raiders strike, Selene takes up her blade once more. With the lies exposed, she no longer looks back and forges her own path... EP 1:Lady General Selene Shaw returns home victorious after five years at war, only to find her family celebrating her stepsister Clara's birthday and seemingly forgetting her return. The Crown Prince, who once promised to propose to Selene, is now focused on Clara, revealing a deep betrayal.Will Selene confront her family and the Crown Prince about their betrayal?

To repay a life debt, York Payne married Jacey Jones, a woman he doesn't love. After heartbreak, she left—unknowingly collapsing his empire. When he promotes his muse with stolen designs, her triumphant return is championed by his secret rival: the brother who loved her first. Now defeated and alone, can the fallen tycoon win back the woman he wronged, or is her heart forever beyond his reach? EP 1:Jacey confronts York about his lack of love and effort in their marriage, especially after seeing the outdated designs he promotes. She questions his commitment when he prioritizes Wendy over her, even after learning she's pregnant. The breaking point comes when York dismisses Jacey's feelings and demands, leading her to finally ask for a divorce.Will Jacey go through with the divorce, or is there still a chance for York to redeem himself?

They call her the side chick's kid, an outcast in the Zeller. Little do they know, Lauren Scott's body is now a vessel for their OG founder—her great-grandma. She woke up from a century-long nap to find her family a mess and her life's work stolen by her own kin. First on the agenda: wake up her son and expose the snakes. But as she reclaims her power, a darker secret begins to surface... EP 1:Lauren Zeller, the outcast side chick's kid, discovers her great-grandmother's consciousness within her, revealing a dark family secret and a mission to wake her comatose son Samuel, while evading threats from the South Seas.Will Lauren succeed in waking Samuel and reclaiming her family's stolen legacy?

Mia, 40, betrayed by her husband Paul and his mistress Fiona—losing her home, company, and even her corneas to Fiona through her son’s betrayal—dies in despair, only to discover her adoptive brother’s secret love. Reborn 10 years earlier as the richest man’s daughter, she vows revenge and to claim true love. EP 1:Mia, betrayed by her husband Paul and his mistress Fiona, is left with nothing—her home, company, and even her corneas are taken. In a moment of ultimate humiliation and despair, she realizes the depth of their cruelty as her own son sides with them, offering her corneas as a gift to Fiona.Will Mia find the strength to seek revenge and reclaim her life?

Kathy, who devotes herself entirely to her family, has won a ten-billion-dollar lottery prize. She decides to share it with her family and uses the money from selling blood to prepare gifts for them. Upon returning home, Kathy overhears her husband, Daniel, flattering a wealthy mistress, Cersei, insulting her as an unwanted, plain-faced woman, and even her child, Linda, mocking her for being useless... Kathy's heart is torn apart. She decides to embark on a new chapter in her life. EP 1:Kathy wins a staggering 10 billion dollar lottery and plans to share her joy and wealth with her family, only to overhear her husband Daniel insulting her and plotting to divorce her once she returns home.Will Kathy confront Daniel about his betrayal or will she keep her lottery win a secret?

Buried in the silence of an ancient tomb, a python with blood-red eyes awakens. A leader torn between memory and betrayal fights to be heard, but disbelief drives the team toward doom. When the seal breaks, terror floods into the living world—leaving one chance to face the python, or be consumed forever. EP 1:Lennon mysteriously returns to the tomb entrance after seemingly dying, only to find his wife Flora and her team ready to explore. He warns them of the dangers inside, including the toxic miasma and a giant python, but they dismiss his warnings, driven by greed and Flora's desire for a divorce. Lennon's desperate attempts to stop them reveal a tragic past and a deadly future they're heading into.Will Lennon's warnings be enough to save them from the python's wrath?

Once the beloved daughter and fiancée, Rachel’s world shatters when her adopted sister frames her and her family casts her into prison. Scarred but unbroken, she seizes a chance at the Royal Academy of Design in France. As her past hunts her down, will regret be enough to heal what they destroyed? EP 1:Rachel, once the beloved daughter, is framed by her adopted sister Emily for a car accident she didn't commit. Her family and fiancé believe Emily over her, sending Rachel to prison. Upon her release, she's met with more betrayal as her fiancé sides with Emily, revealing the depth of their manipulation. However, a glimmer of hope appears when Rachel receives an acceptance call from the Royal Academy of Design, offering her a chance to escape her toxic past.Will Rachel's acceptance into the Royal Academy of Design be her path to revenge and redemption?

column1: (Dubbed)God in Baby: Tears First, Blood Later
column4: Sent to the mortal world for a divine trial, the Martial Gold God awakens in Barry Sullivan—a boy whose family was torn apart by betrayal. As he fights to reclaim the Sullivan family's martial arts school and protect his sister, a far darker threat emerges: the Sorcerer Tribe is preparing to resurrect the Demon Lord. Should Barry fall, the world will be consumed by hellfire... EP 1:The Martial Gold God is banished to the mortal world after irresponsibly granting wishes for gold, awakening in the body of Barry Sullivan, a boy whose family was destroyed by betrayal, and vows to settle the boy's karmic debts.Will the Martial Gold God succeed in repaying Barry's karmic debt and protecting his sister from the looming threat of the Sorcerer Tribe?

column1: Shut up! Don’t Piss the King off!
column4: Phil wakes from a nightmare to a living one. The Serpent King comes as swarms invade the site, the old crone’s warning comes true. His greedy boss covets Phil’s wife and dares to provoke the Serpent King. Pushed toward doom, Phil finds human hearts more venomous than serpents. Will disaster strike? Who will survive… EP 1:Phil wakes from a nightmare only to find the old crone's warnings coming true—his wife is pregnant with his boss's child, his mother has a tumor with the cure under his bed, and a worker breaks his leg just as predicted. The site is swarmed with snakes, confirming the crone's dire prophecy, and Phil must decide whether to halt the blast or face doom.Will Phil heed the crone's warning and stop the blast before it's too late?

column1: She's a 10 But the Baby Isn't Mine
column4: On his wedding day, Liam Davis finds out his bride, Lily Lane, is pregnant by someone else, and chaos hits the aisle. That night, Lily is found dead in the bridal suite and cops pull a hidden cam. The receipts point to Liam. Then time glitches back to “I do.” With one shot to rewrite the night, he hunts the baby’s father, the secret watcher, and the real killer—before the footage drops again. EP 1:On his wedding day, Liam discovers his bride Lily is pregnant with someone else's baby, leading to chaos. Later, Lily is found dead in the bridal suite, and hidden camera footage implicates Liam, who must prove his innocence while uncovering the real killer.Who really killed Lily on her wedding day?

A little girl with a magical gift can understand animals. When a brooding, mysterious man crosses paths with her, their lives change forever. She rescues him—and many others—through courage, wit, and a heart full of love. EP 1:Emmie is falsely accused of stealing a ring by her aunt, who threatens to sell her away if she doesn't find it. Meanwhile, Emmie's unique ability to communicate with animals reveals a dark secret about someone planning to jump into the lake.Will Emmie be able to prove her innocence and stop the tragic event foretold by the animals?

Bound by the Immortality System, Myrna Pearson dies again and again shielding the man she loves. But his heart turns cold and indifferent to her endless sacrifices—until she gives her final life for the woman he truly cares about. When her life signal fades for good, he’s left to face a devastating truth: some mistakes can never be undone. EP 1:Myrna Pearson is ordered by her husband Rowan to take the place of Yolanda, the woman he truly loves, in facing a brutal serial killer. Despite Myrna's immortal ability to revive, she is devastated by Rowan's indifference to her suffering and his manipulation using her mother's memento as leverage. Realizing her love will never be reciprocated, Myrna makes the heart-wrenching decision to deactivate her immortality permanently, accepting her final death to free herself from the endless cycle of pain and unrequited love.Will Rowan realize the depth of his mistake before it's too late?

Rosie and Zander were both reborn—she escaped a cheating fiancé and cruel father, collapsing before Zander's car on a stormy night. The man once feared as a madman is now gentle and caring, nursing her back. Now stuck together again, Zander is determined to win her heart—whether Rosie's ready to bloom or not. EP 1:Zander, once feared as a madman, pleads for Rosie's love, but she rejects him, still haunted by the past where he locked her up, despite her ex-fiancé Skyler's betrayal and marriage to Celia.Will Rosie ever be able to see past Zander's dark history and give love a chance?

She gave everything for love—patience, devotion, and endless forgiveness—only to be abandoned time and again. But when the final betrayal shatters her hope, she walks away with dignity. What she doesn’t expect is that ending one love could open the door to another… and this time, the game of hearts has just begun. EP 1:Yuri's engagement to Ray is shattered when he abandons her once again to tend to Vicky, forcing Yuri to finally walk away with dignity after years of heartbreak.Will Yuri find the strength to move on and open her heart to someone new?

Celeste grew up under Uncle Zane's gentle care, thinking he was forever out of reach. Then a letter from her faraway aunt arrived, breaking an engagement and throwing both families into turmoil. The misty Riversouth rain echoed with her flushed heart. Was it late-blooming love… or fate holding her hand all along? EP 1:Celeste returns home amidst family concerns about her whereabouts and relationships, only to drop a bombshell by confessing her love for her aunt's fiancé, Uncle Zane, creating a tense and complicated family dynamic.How will the family react to Celeste's shocking confession about loving Uncle Zane?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Fake Siblings', 'Love at First Sight']

column4: Long ago, the last Sage of Great Sharn fell, his ascension shattered by betrayal. Now, within the fading halls of Umbra Resurgens, a ten-year-old heir named Yack Namgung emerges, veiled in innocence yet marked by something far older. As rival sects gather and ancient rites awaken, the martial world begins to tremble. For in this quiet boy, a power long buried begins to stir, and what returns through him may not be mortal. EP 1:After being attacked by Umbra Ferox, young Yack Namgung awakens with the soul of the ancient Kunlun Sage fused within him. As Umbra Ferox violently asserts dominance over Umbra Resurgens, Yack, now inhabited by the Sage, steps up to confront them, hinting at his hidden power and the legacy of Lord Umbra.Will Yack's newfound power be enough to turn the tide against Umbra Ferox's aggression?

After ten years in prison, Richard comes back with one skill no one can match, outsmarting every cheat at the table. But when his son is trapped in a ruthless gambling scheme, the stakes spiral out of control. Each game drags him deeper into betrayal, danger, and a past that refuses to stay buried. This time, every hand could cost him his family. EP 1:After ten years in prison, Richard returns home, only to find his son Jay trapped in a gambling scheme orchestrated by a woman. Despite Richard's warnings and pleas, Jay continues to gamble, even stealing his mother's savings. Determined to save his son from following his destructive path, Richard vows to either talk Jay out of gambling or win him back through his own skills.Will Richard be able to save Jay from the dangerous gambling scheme before it's too late?

To cling to the wealthy Parker family, Dr. Lewis lets his injured daughter Anna die to save his lover, Lauren Parker… When he discovers Lauren’s child isn’t his and he can no longer have children, it’s too late—Anna will never come back… EP 1:Dr. Lewis chooses to save his lover, Lauren, and their unborn child over his injured daughter Anna, leading to her tragic death, while his wife Maya is left in the dark about his infidelity and the impending divorce.Will Dr. Lewis ever face the consequences of his choices?

Three years ago, Victor Grant, head of the Grant Family, was drugged and spent a night with hotel intern Ava Summers. Now, at his birthday party, he finally reunites with her—only to find she’s engaged to his grandnephew, Daniel Grant. As old feelings resurface and loyalties are tested, Ava’s world begins to unravel once more… EP 1:At Victor Grant's birthday party, he reunites with Ava Summers, the woman he spent a night with three years ago, only to discover she is now engaged to his grandnephew, Daniel Grant, sparking old feelings and new tensions.Will Victor reveal his past with Ava to Daniel, or will he keep it a secret?

column1: (Dubbed)Sorry Dad, I’m Better than Your Son!
column4: Clara Colman grew up unseen in a son-obsessed family. After her father chose to save his mistress and bastard son over Clara’s critically injured mother, grief hardened into resentment and purpose. She emerged as the national top scorer—and at the awards banquet, she confronted him, to avenge her mother and shatter his legacy… Watch out, she’s only getting started. EP 1:Clara Colman, the provincial top scorer, confronts her father Richard at the awards banquet, revealing the deep-seated resentment stemming from his choice to save his mistress and illegitimate son over Clara's critically injured mother.Will Clara's public confrontation shatter her father's legacy and bring justice for her mother?

column1: My One-Night Stand is My CEO Husband
column4: After a one-night stand saves Mr. CEO's life, Nina is left pregnant and expelled from school.  Forced into a marriage of convenience with the cold CEO who doesn't recognize her. But when he goes searching for the woman who saved him, he doesn't realize she's already his wife... EP 1:Nina recalls the night she saved the CEO, leading to her pregnancy and loss of scholarship, while in the present, the CEO continues his search for the woman who saved him, unaware it's his wife Nina.Will the CEO finally recognize Nina as the woman he's been searching for?

Victoria Hartman, neglected by her father and overshadowed by her half-sister Isabelle, was sent to the battlefield to survive. There she met Lucas Ashford, whose quiet strength won her heart—until she learned his kindness was for Isabelle. Heartbroken, Victoria agreed to a political marriage. Only then did Lucas realize his true love had always been her.

Mina, a poor student, loses her tuition to her gambler brother. Drugged after a bar rescue by CEO Lucian, she's mistaken for demanding $10M. Pregnant with twins, she's rejected until Lucian learns the truth. Bullied at school and betrayed by her "mother," Mina rises with Lucian's help, surviving kidnappings by rivals before their epic wedding. EP 1:Mina discovers she's pregnant after a fateful night, only to face further distress when her tuition money is stolen by her mother for her gambler brother, leaving her future in jeopardy.Will Mina find a way to secure her education and future despite her family's betrayal?

To claim his father's fortune left to a stranger, Denise, Caelan meticulously charms his way into her life. Denise knows his love is a lie, yet can't resist falling deeper. But when the truth shatters her heart, she walks away—only for him to realize he's really in love with her. Now, he must fight for a love he never meant to feel... EP 1:The reading of Mr. Edward Theron's will reveals a shocking twist—half of his fortune is left to a complete stranger, Denise Winslow, sparking outrage and a cunning plan from his son, Caelan, to marry her and claim the inheritance.Will Caelan's deceptive plan succeed, or will Denise see through his lies?

Mara was betrayed by her ex Julian, and just when she thought it was over, his twin brother Silas showed up pretending to be him. She played along while plotting revenge. But as she tried to leave, she found herself trapped like a caged bird. The man behind it all had fallen for her. In this game of stand-ins, who will be the final winner…? EP 1:The Lane family's heir, Silas, returns from abroad and is asked by his twin brother Julian to impersonate him around Mara, Julian's ex, as Julian wants to spend time with her sister. Silas, the mysterious and powerful heir, agrees to the deception, setting the stage for a complex game of identity and revenge.Will Mara discover the twin switch and how will she react when she realizes who Silas really is?
Just Love Me！

After a one-night stand, Xandy Chow had septuplets with extraordinary abilities. Despite their unique gifts, Xandy and Brian Smith remain apart, and Brian meets his kids for the first time seven years later. Their estrangement stems from unresolved misunderstandings and miscommunication about their past and responsibilities. EP 1:The septuplets devise a plan to find their father by auctioning their mother's jade pendant online, leading to a bidding war with a mysterious CEO who turns out to be their long-lost dad.Will the septuplets successfully reunite with their father now that they've identified him?

Terminally ill, Melody vanishes to spare Oliver the pain, leaving with his upcoming child. Years later, she’s scraping a living from the streets when she gets hit by Oliver’s car, yet he saw only a scammer and left. As hope flickers, her family heirloom reveals a shocking truth… Oliver must reach them before it’s too late—or lose his family forever! EP 1:Melody, suffering from a terminal illness, decides to leave Oliver to spare him the pain, taking their unborn child with her. Years later, she is struggling to survive on the streets when she is hit by Oliver's car, who mistakes her for a scammer and leaves. Meanwhile, Oliver, who had once given up everything to save her, is devastated by her disappearance and vows to find her.Will Oliver find Melody before it's too late?

Adrian Quinn, a chief designer in Astoria, returns in disguise only to face humiliation by his fiancée and her powerful allies. Betrayed, beaten, and forced to sign away their engagement, Adrian's true identity remains hidden. But when the day of reckoning comes, who will rise—and who will fall? EP 1:Adrian Quinn returns to Riverton under secrecy as the Chief Designer of Astoria, planning to spend time with his father and hold an engagement ceremony with his fiancée Vivian Lucas. However, his father falls critically ill and is rushed to the hospital, where Vivian and her family cruelly evict him from the VIP suite to make room for the 'real guest'—revealing their true colors and Vivian's intention to break off her engagement with Adrian.What will Adrian do when he discovers the betrayal and humiliation inflicted upon his father?

When billiards legend Aiden Shaw wins a championship, he's rewarded with the governor's 300-pound daughter and bolts. Fleeing to Riverstate under his grandmother's orders, he hides as a low-key coach at a fading billiards club. Branded a fraud, he's challenged to prove himself. Training a total rookie into a pro in three days, Aiden silences doubters. But as rivals rise and romance knocks, he must choose between ambition, loyalty and love. EP 1:Billiards legend Aiden Shaw, known as the King of Billiards for his unbeatable skills, wins another championship but flees when offered the governor's daughter as a reward. Under his grandmother's orders, he hides at the struggling Riverstate Billiards Club as a low-key coach, where he faces skepticism and must prove his worth.Will Aiden be able to revive the Riverstate Billiards Club and keep his identity a secret?

Rose, after losing her triplets, adopted three boys and raised them for 20 years. On her 50th birthday, her biological mother, Rowena, sowed discord, leading to Rose's cold treatment and the death of her pet. Rose then chose cryogenic sleep. Thirty years later, the sons learned they were actually her biological children, and Rose awoke with memory loss, estranged from them.

Idell Green, who has chronic insomnia enters a contract marriage with poor Irene, only to discover he can miraculously sleep beside her. As he protects her from life's cruelties, their bond deepens—until an evil scheme tears them apart. Can love uncover the truth, or will deception win? EP 1:Idell Green, suffering from severe insomnia, encounters Irene being assaulted by a man who claims her uncle took his bride price. Despite his critical health condition, Idell intervenes to save her, leading to a violent confrontation. Irene, in desperation, offers to repay Idell in any way possible, setting the stage for their unexpected connection.Will Idell's act of heroism lead to the cure for his insomnia and a deeper bond with Irene?

Evelyn witnessed her mother killed and was sent away for a decade… Back home, she seduces General Lucian as her pawn to strike at her father. But revenge is messy, hearts get tangled… Will she succeed—or lose everything she holds dear? EP 1:Evelyn Moore performs a controversial dance at the Concession, drawing mixed reactions from the crowd, while a violent altercation and a chase unfold, hinting at deeper conflicts and secrets.Will Evelyn's risky performance and the unfolding chaos bring her closer to her revenge or expose her true intentions?

Fallen from the heavens, amnesiac immortal Yulia becomes nanny to lonely Luna and her enigmatic CEO father, Xavier. As dark forces—including her vengeful sister Cynthia and his treacherous uncle Leo—close in, Yulia must reclaim her power and uncover her mysterious connection to the hidden Koi Raja legacy. But when her past resurfaces, will the truth protect them or shatter the world they’re fighting to save? EP 1:Luna, the young daughter of CEO Xavier, goes missing and is found by Yulia, an amnesiac immortal who has just escaped an assassination attempt by her sister Cynthia. Luna, eager to find a mother figure, convinces Yulia to return home with her, unaware of the dark forces at play.Will Yulia's presence in Luna's life bring protection or unforeseen danger?

column1: My Grandma Came Back as a Kid!
column4: Selene Whitmore, once a virtuous healer, ascended after death and spent fifty years in cultivation. On the brink of becoming an immortal healer, her final tribulation went awry—casting her soul into the body of a seven-year-old girl bearing her name. There, she finds her son in a coffin and the Granton family facing ruin… EP 1:After failing her final lightning tribulation, Immortal Selene's soul is cast into the body of a seven-year-old girl named Selene Whitmore, where she discovers her son's untimely death and the Granton family's decline, immediately facing hostility and danger from her new 'family'.Will Selene uncover the truth behind her son's death and save the Granton family from ruin?

As a child, Eleanor Shaw was left to die after giving up her kidney for her twin brother. Rescued and raised under a new name, she returns years later, only to face relentless cruelty from her mother and brother—still unaware of her true identity. But a scar and a mysterious pendant threaten to reveal a shocking truth: the girl they mocked may be the sister they lost. EP 1:Eleanor selflessly donates her kidney to save her twin brother Alex, only to be callously abandoned by her mother, who sees her as nothing more than a means to an end for Alex's survival.Will Eleanor ever uncover the chilling truth behind her mother's betrayal?

column1: (Dubbed)Fall in Love with my Unknown Wife
column4: Breaking news! Billionaire Noah is allergic to woman! Living with no woman by his side for years, one day he surprisingly marries someone under the influence of alcohol. The next day, Noah leaves this city to escape such a ridiculous marriage. A year later,when he comes back, he falls in love with a cleaner. What he can’t expect is that this cleaner is hiding her real identity, and also, she is his wife who he wants to divorce. EP 1:Under the influence of alcohol, billionaire Noah impulsively proposes marriage to a stranger, Jules, in a public and chaotic scene, leading to an unexpected union that sets the stage for future complications.Will Noah regret his drunken decision when he sobers up?

Abandoned by her lover to kidnappers, Elena loses her baby and her reputation. Now she is back as CEO of Swift Group. She shatters Dylan's pride, bringing Perry Group down. The truth drives Dylan to obsessive revenge, even kidnapping her to atone. But Nathan now stands by her. His love came too late. Will she choose hate? Or a new beginning? EP 1:Dylan is forced to make a heart-wrenching decision between his fiancée Elena and his school crush Lola, revealing deep-seated conflicts and betrayals that test his loyalties and emotions.Will Elena ever forgive Dylan for choosing Lola over her?

column1: (Dubbed) A God in a Fool’s Flesh
column4: The soul of Titan Gustin, the legendary Martial God, awakens within the body of Aaron Stone, a lazy, weak and ridiculed noble. Aaron then begins to tap into godly power as he dominates the Martial Alliance trials. But when another "Martial God" emerges, threatening his destiny, Aaron must uncover the truth and reclaim what is rightfully his—or he will remain trampled on as a "spoiled heir". EP 1:The soul of Titan Gustin, the legendary Martial God, awakens inside Aaron Stone, a ridiculed noble, after being ambushed by his Inner Demon. As Aaron begins to tap into his newfound godly powers, his father prepares to support him in the upcoming family tournament, despite the skepticism of others.Will Aaron be able to harness his godly powers and prove himself in the family tournament?

column1: A Fat Girl... No, The Swordmaster!
column4: Selena Cross was once her family's brightest star—until fate forced the Ancient Divine Sword into her hands. Overnight, fifty million years of power bloated her into a 200-pound outcast. Mocked, abandoned by her fiancé, and shamed by her clan, Selena swore to flip destiny. At the Celestial Sword Sect trials, will she reclaim honor—and make the first move to end her cursed engagement? EP 1:Selena Cross unexpectedly becomes the master of the Ancient Divine Sword, absorbing fifty years of power that causes her body to bloat. Recognized for her legendary Sacred Sword Physique, she is taken as a disciple, marking the beginning of her journey to lead the Celestial Sword Sect.Will Selena overcome the challenges of her new role and the physical changes to reclaim her honor?

column1: I'm the Real One, Get Out!
column4: Tim's heart belongs only to Wynn. But when he helps a graduate named Wayne—whose name eerily echoes his beloved’s—she mistakes his charity for desire. As Wayne’s obsession twists into cruelty, Wynn sees their proximity and doubts his love. A brutal public attack erupts, leaving Wynn trapped by a name not her own. Can Tim save her before it’s too late? EP 1:Tim's overprotective nature towards Wynn escalates when he brutally punishes a servant for a minor mistake, showcasing his extreme possessiveness. Meanwhile, Wayne, the graduate Tim once sponsored, reappears, and Tim decides to hire her as an assistant at Jones Group, much to Wynn's discomfort. As Tim prepares for a business trip, he insists Wynn stays home, but she desires independence, leading to tension between them.Will Wayne's presence at Jones Group ignite a dangerous obsession?

column1: How to Tame a Tiny Tycoon
column4: When a rebellious billionaire heir meets his match in a mystical Taoist nun hired to "tame" him, their explosive rivalry leads to a dangerous kidnapping that forces them to unite—trading pranks for protection and discovering that against all odds, they're each other's greatest salvation... EP 1:A desperate mother seeks a sweet, caring daughter to balance her rebellious son, and finds the perfect candidate in Vanna Smith, a spirited Taoist nun who defies her master's rules to enjoy a forbidden chicken leg.Will Vanna agree to be adopted into this chaotic family?

Abandoned after sacrificing his legs for Melody, Adrian was healed by Celeste for 7 years. Yet once he regained power, he chose to humiliate her—wearing fake dresses, pushed into pools, even watching him rehearse a wedding with another woman.
On his wedding day, Celeste leaves and marries another.
Too late, Adrian chases after her—but she’s already gone.
“You lost me the moment you chose her.” EP 1:Adrian, in his desperate attempt to save Melody, decides to take Celeste's blood despite her severe illness, showing no regard for her well-being. Celeste discovers Adrian's betrayal when she realizes he drugged her with shrimp porridge, knowing her allergy, just to incapacitate her for the blood extraction. Heartbroken, she ends their engagement and agrees to an arranged marriage with Bruce, vowing never to return.Will Adrian realize the gravity of his actions before Celeste leaves forever?

column1: Dumped for Being Fat? I Married the Emperor!
column4:
Plump Jasmine Green saves the Emperor—and he marries her!
Her cousin Melanie stole her fiancé and dowry, mocking her weight.
But at the palace banquet, they look up—shocked.
There sits Jasmine, the new Noble Consort, adored by the Emperor.
“You stole my past… I own your future.” EP 1:Jasmine faces public humiliation when her fiancé Victor breaks off their engagement, cruelly mocking her weight and revealing his preference for her cousin Melanie, who has secretly manipulated Jasmine's life to sabotage her.Will Jasmine find the strength to rise above the betrayal and reclaim her dignity?

They laughed. They mocked. They never believed. He had nothing but stubborn faith. Time passed, fortunes shifted, and whispers grew louder. Soon, everyone will face a reality they never saw coming. EP 1:At an appreciation banquet celebrating the class's exam results, it's revealed that Greg Campbell is the only student who failed, breaking Mr. Lee's perfect record of getting all his students into college for twelve years. The tension escalates when Greg unexpectedly shows up, leading to Mr. Lee disowning him in front of everyone.What will Greg do next after being publicly humiliated by his teacher?

For ten years, Ethan Reed, heir to a vast fortune, hid his identity to repay a life debt, turning the Carters’ modest workshop into a thriving enterprise. But swayed by Ryan Wright, Sophia Carter spurns his vision and severs their bond. When her world collapses and his true identity is revealed, regret comes too late. At a glittering banquet, she fights to win him back—but some wounds never heal. EP 1:Ethan Reed, the hidden billionaire, has been helping the Carter family's machinery factory thrive out of gratitude for saving his life. Despite his efforts, Chairman Joshua Carter's reckless decisions lead the factory to the brink of bankruptcy. After Joshua's death, Ethan continues to support the factory, and Sophia promises him a grand wedding upon his return from an overseas trip. However, upon his return, Sophia publicly humiliates Ethan, accusing him of a grave mistake.Will Ethan reveal his true identity and seek revenge, or will he walk away from the Carters forever?

Trained as the supreme fighter, now a mere guard, Liam is tasked to protect a billionaire heiress, Jolin. Hunted by her schemes and rival heirs, his secrets teeter on the edge — he unearths the secret massacre of his family, and the truth of his real bloodline. Invincible at last, will vengeance consume him… or set him free? EP 1:At the Sue Group's press conference, Jolin Sue unveils a revolutionary drug named Celestine, claimed to eliminate all cancer cells. Meanwhile, Liam receives his final mission from his master—to protect Jolin Sue for the next three months, as she is the creator of Celestine. The mission holds the key to unlocking Liam's mysterious past and origins.Will Liam uncover the truth about his past while protecting Jolin Sue?

Sofia Perlman and Liam Scott’s arranged marriage turns into love, but their peaceful life is shattered by Lea Brooks, a woman who looks eerily like Liam’s first love. As Liam repeatedly crosses Sofia’s boundaries to protect Lea, Sofia reaches her breaking point. She chooses to raise a child alone and divorces him. Now, regretful, Liam tries to win her back—but has he lost her forever? EP 1:Sofia Perlman's peaceful marriage with Liam Scott is disrupted when his new secretary, Lea Brooks, who resembles his deceased first love, Emma, takes her usual seat next to him. Sofia's trust in Liam is shaken as Lea's presence brings back painful memories and challenges the boundaries of their relationship.Will Sofia's marriage survive the ghost of Liam's past?

One twist of fate pulls Luna into the orbit of the powerful Sterling heir. Bound by a marriage of convenience, they each hide truths that could shatter their bond. But as Luna climbs higher on her own, her true aim burns clear: to expose her adopted sister's lies and reclaim everything stolen from her. In a world of power and betrayal, who will be left standing when the masks fall? EP 1:Luna discovers the shocking truth about her adopted sister Jade Cruz's death and the cruel indifference of her sister Stella, who refuses to cover the remaining hospital bills and cruelly taunts Luna over their mother's urn, leaving Luna devastated and alone in the rain.Will Luna find the strength to seek justice for her mother's memory and confront Stella's heartless betrayal?

column1: Who's Afraid of My Dead Husband?
column4: After her husband faked his death to be with his mistress, Stella decides to give him exactly what he wants: a funeral, a death certificate, and a remarriage to his powerful boss! But when her "dead" husband shows up at her wedding, ready to expose his own deception to reclaim her, he learns the hard way that some women don't wait—they upgrade. EP 1:Stella is devastated when her husband Harry goes missing after a climbing accident, refusing to believe he's dead. However, when a man identical to Harry appears claiming to be his twin brother Hugh, Stella's world is turned upside down as she begins to suspect the truth—Harry faked his death to be with his mistress, and is now pretending to be his own brother to reclaim Stella.Will Stella expose Harry's deception, or will she play along with his twisted game?

If you could relive your life,  would you choose differently?   Dumped by her husband and lost in a midlife crisis, 45-year-old housewife Meredith Blair wakes up in her 20-year-old body after a mysterious encounter. Now living undercover as her daughter’s new roommate “Red” ,  she reigniting her long abandoned music dream and unexpectedly falling for Harry, a charming young musician who just might change everything. But how long can she keep her secret… and what happens when the truth comes out? EP 1:Meredith, a 45-year-old housewife dumped by her husband for a younger woman, mysteriously wakes up in her 20-year-old body and begins living undercover as her daughter's roommate 'Red', reigniting her abandoned music dreams and falling for a young musician, Harry, while struggling to keep her true identity a secret.What will happen when Harry discovers the truth about 'Red'?

Who knew saving three children would grant her a second life?! Yulia awakens 15 years later, reborn in her 20-year-old body, only to discover her world is a novel and her children are destined for ruin! Will she stand by and let the vicious starlet Yasmine destroy them? Never! But as she fiercely protects her family, a powerful, man emerges—obsessed and burning with a passion she never knew existed! Is this the blazing love fate always owed her?! EP 1:Yulia awakens 15 years after her death, reborn in her 20-year-old body, only to discover her world is a novel where her children are destined for ruin at the hands of the vicious starlet Yasmine White. Determined to protect them, she confronts Yasmine and reveals her true identity as their mother to Hudson Hawk.Will Yulia's revelation change Hudson's fate and stop Yasmine's destructive plans?

column1: Betrayed by Family, Saved by Mr. CEO
column4: Clara Shaw, betrayed by her father and tormented by her stepmother and half-sister Hanna, is cast out after an accidental night with Ethan Foster, resulting in pregnancy. Six years later, Clara returns to Sanford to seek treatment for her daughter, only for Lily to vanish during a deadly banquet. Where is she? EP 1:Clara Shaw is cruelly cast out by her half-sister Hanna for getting pregnant, but she vows to protect her unborn child. Six years later, Clara returns to Sanford to seek life-saving treatment for her daughter Lily's heart condition, which is only available through Foster Group. Desperate, Clara prepares for a job interview at Foster Group, the only way to afford Lily's treatment, while Ethan Foster, still haunted by the mysterious woman who left him six years ago, resists his grandmother's pressure to remarry.Will Clara secure the job at Foster Group to save Lily, and will Ethan finally discover the truth about Clara's identity?

Liz Powell, a naive Flower Fairy, trades her fate for a chance at love. But the man she clings to isn’t the gentle husband she believes—he is the feared Demon Lord, torn between desire and destruction. Every heartbeat draws them closer, yet every glance hides a deadly secret. When love and death collide, who will survive? EP 1:Liz Powell, a naive Flower Fairy, purchases a Love Trial Voucher to experience romance as depicted in her storybooks. Ignoring warnings about demons, she ventures into the mortal world to find a husband, unaware that her Heart of Purity makes her a target for the Demon Lord. Her journey takes an unexpected turn when she encounters a disciple from the Skycloud Sect and boldly proposes marriage, while the Demon Lord's forces sense her presence.Will Liz's innocent quest for love lead her into the clutches of the Demon Lord?

column1: The Male Secretary I Fell For… Is a She!
column4: Five years ago, Lori Evans had a one-night encounter and a child—never knowing the man was Ethan Shaw, heir to a powerful empire. Now, disguised as a male secretary to save her sick son, she becomes his closest aide. Fake kisses, hidden photos, and a shocking truth threaten to unravel her disguise. When rivals target her child, Ethan steps in—only to uncover her biggest secret. EP 1:Lori Evans, desperate to save her sick son, disguises herself as a man to secure a high-paying secretary job at Shaw Group, only to discover her boss, Ethan Shaw, is the father of her child. As Ethan's mother pressures him to marry to secure his inheritance, Lori's secret and their past connection threaten to unravel.Will Ethan recognize Lori behind her disguise and uncover the truth about their son?

column1: Trauma Bonding With My Hot Psycho Ex
column4:
Stella West never forgot Ethan Yule, the patient she ruthlessly abandoned. On her wedding day, he returned—kidnapping her new husband Chris.
Forced to divorce and obey, Stella dreamed only of escape. But just as freedom neared… she found herself craving his dangerous obsession.
“You left me once. You won’t ever again.” EP 1:Stella attempts to escape from Ethan by drugging him, but he retaliates by forcing her to stay. Meanwhile, at her wedding rehearsal, Ethan unexpectedly reappears, shocking everyone as he declares his intent to reclaim Stella.Will Stella manage to escape Ethan's grasp, or will his obsession trap her once again?

Buried alive in her first life, Selina was betrayed by her husband, his mistress, and the children she raised as her own. Reborn with memories intact, she’s done playing the gentle wife. This time, Selina vows to strike back, reclaim her power, and expose every lie. EP 1:Selina, after being betrayed and buried alive in her past life by her husband, his mistress, and the children she raised, is reborn with memories intact. In this life, she confronts the cruel truth that Henry and Clara are not her biological children but the offspring of her husband and his mistress. As they reveal their hatred and her impending doom, Selina vows bloody retribution in her next life.Will Selina's reborn vengeance turn the tables on her betrayers?

Ten years ago, my quiet dad ran a tiny pool hall. Before that, he was Southvale’s legend—the Cue King. He hung up the cue to protect what mattered. Now slick relatives bait his kid into a rigged hustle, debts stack, and impossible racks keep showing up. Dad plays dumb until the last second—then the break hits different. Lines get crossed, secrets slip, and the table stops breathing. Who really set the trap? EP 1:Kevin loses a staggering 300 grand in a rigged pool game, leading to a moment of despair where he contemplates suicide. His father, Brandon, steps in to console him, but the revelation that Kevin was gambling leads to a heated confrontation with the slick relatives who lured him into the game. Determined to reclaim the lost money, Brandon decides to return to the pool hall for a high-stakes rematch, setting the stage for a dramatic showdown.Will Brandon be able to win back the 300 grand and uncover the truth behind the rigged game?

Framed by his lover and closest friend, he lost everything to the chains of injustice. But within the darkness of prison, he uncovered a legacy of unimaginable power. Now reborn with the spirit of the dragon, he rises to shatter betrayal, defend the innocent, and carve a new destiny where justice will never be silenced. EP 1:Ethan discovers his fiancée Sophia is engaged to Victor Cross, leading to a heated confrontation filled with betrayal and threats.Will Ethan seek revenge or will Sophia's explanation change everything?

column1: My Wife, But A Master Chef?
column4: Master Chef Annie switched identities with Sophia to raise money for her mother's treatment, becoming the wife of the richest man.  Yet she finds that Sophia had not only embezzled all Jason's assets, abused the kids, but also kept a secret lover.   Now, armed with her extraordinary culinary skills, she must protect everything she's come to love... EP 1:Annie, a talented chef working in a small diner, is discovered by Mr. Shaw after serving a remarkable dish that impresses him despite his initial skepticism. This encounter could change her life, especially with the upcoming culinary competition offering a prize that could fund her mother's treatment.Will Annie's culinary skills be enough to win the competition and save her mother?

Sean, now a billionaire, returns to the city haunted by his lost love, Vane. He finds her years later, comatose, cared for by their unknown daughter, Nina, who plays violin on the streets to survive. Their painful reunion unearths the devastating secret behind her betrayal. Can the truth heal them, or will it destroy their second chance? EP 1:Nina, a street violinist, is desperately trying to raise money for her comatose mother when a car accident leads to the destruction of her precious violin. The violin turns out to be the rare Lunarstring Violin, which billionaire Sean Holt has been searching for, hinting at a deeper connection between Nina and Sean.Will Sean finally discover the truth about Nina and her comatose mother?

column1: Mr. Lawyer, Your Obsession is Out of Prison!
column4: Haunted by a brutal past that sent her to prison, Stella Cole rebuilds her life as a lawyer, only to come face-to-face with the man she once loved—Adrian Carter. Now a cold and powerful attorney, he claims not to know her, shattering her hopes. But when Stella tries to leave for good, Adrian's fury erupts, revealing a possessive obsession he can no longer control. He's not about to let her disappear from his life again. EP 1:Stella Cole, recently released from prison, shocks Adrian Carter by abruptly breaking up with him, revealing her past motives were merely to spite someone else. Adrian, devastated and angry, is left grappling with the truth as Stella walks away, while others around them mock and question their relationship. The episode ends with Adrian declaring his patience is over, hinting at a darker turn in his feelings towards Stella.Will Adrian's obsession with Stella turn dangerous now that she's walked away from him?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Rich Family Feud', 'Childhood Sweethearts']

column1: Gambling God: Back in the Game
column4: Damian Raynor, former underground gambling king, served two years behind bars to protect the woman he loved. Secretly released for a covert mission, he discovers his ex-wife Sophia Warren's tea house caught in the crossfire. Now, he must risk everything to expose the mastermind and keep her safe... EP 1:Damian Raynor, the legendary Gambling God, is pulled back into the world of high-stakes gambling when his ex-wife Sophia Warren becomes a target in the upcoming Gambling Clash. Tasked with uncovering the mastermind behind the threats, Damian must use his unparalleled skills to protect Sophia and navigate the dangerous underworld of gambling.Will Damian be able to outmaneuver Mantris and Illusor to keep Sophia safe?

As the unloved daughter of the king, Talia is forced to marry a prince from a savage land, leaving the man she truly loves to be with her sister, her father's mistress's child. On the day of her unblessed wedding, the man she loves is making her sister happy...

To save her father, Laura Jane becomes the mafia kingpin, Jasper Ross's pawn in a deadly bargain. Their world of forced affection and misunderstanding ignites a dangerous passion. But with the end in sight, a pregnancy, schemes and betrayals force a final, redemptive choice between ruin and love… can they tear down their lies and make it out alive? EP 1:Laura Jane, a talented jewelry designer, desperately seeks Jasper Ross's help to save her father by offering herself as his lover, despite knowing his notorious reputation.Will Jasper Ross accept Laura's shocking proposal and what will be the consequences of their dangerous agreement?

column1: The Long-Lost Heiress in the House
column4: At five, tycoon’s daughter Jenny Sinclair and slum girl Margaret Green swapped lives in a riot. Raised as “Margaret,” Jenny endured abuse while the real Margaret lived as Anna Sinclair. Years later, a DNA test exposes the lie, destroying Anna’s schemes. Reunited on Thanksgiving, Jenny reclaims her family and a new beginning. EP 1:The Sinclair family enjoys a heartwarming Thanksgiving celebration, but their joy is shattered when a sudden terrorist attack occurs, leading to a dramatic confrontation and the shocking revelation that Jenny is not their real daughter.Will Jenny uncover the truth about her real identity?

column1: The Goddess’s Revenge: So Begins His Ruin
column4: Zoey, a celestial goddess, sacrifices herself to forge a divine sword, making Shawn an emperor. But blinded by ambition, he betrays her, breaking his sacred vow. As his empire falls without her grace, the question remains: When his throne becomes a cage of regret, will Shawn’s kingdom be worth the love he destroyed? EP 1:Zoey, a celestial goddess, sacrifices her divine power to forge a sword for Shawn, a mortal, to save him from danger, despite warnings of the dire consequences she will face. With the sword's power, Shawn rises from a refugee leader to emperor, promising Zoey she will be his only empress. However, as Zoey's health begins to fade, signs of potential betrayal emerge as Shawn returns from war with another woman by his side.Will Shawn honor his vow to Zoey, or will his ambition lead to her ultimate downfall?

column1: My BFF Is Having My Father-in-Law's Baby
column4: Her husband didn't believe her. Her mother-in-law called her a liar. And her best friend killed her for uncovering the affair with her father-in-law. Given a second chance at life, Emily is back to expose the truth and make every one of them pay. EP 1:Emily discovers her father-in-law and her best friend Chloe having an affair during her baby's first birthday party. Despite her accusations, no one believes her, leading to a confrontation where Chloe reveals she's pregnant with William's child. The situation escalates, and Emily is left feeling betrayed and isolated. However, she is given a second chance at life, vowing to expose the truth and make them pay.Will Emily succeed in exposing Chloe and William's affair in her second life?

column1: Widow or Winner? She Wins Big
column4: Jenny wakes up in a twisted story: a husband who can’t move, reckless siblings at her side, and greedy relatives circling for the family fortune. Everyone expects her to collapse—but what if she seizes beauty, wealth, and power instead? Just as she claims her fate, the man she thought gone… opens his eyes. EP 1:Jenny Sanders wakes up in a twisted reality where her husband Derek is in a vegetative state, and greedy relatives are circling for the family fortune. Amidst betrayal and deception, Jenny decides to seize control of her fate, only to face unexpected challenges when Derek shows signs of waking up.Will Jenny's plans crumble now that Derek is waking up?

column1: Revenge Wears My Queen Sister's Face
column4: She stole her sister's face, her crown, and her wedding night for revenge. But when the Emperor she's supposed to kill turns out to be the love she's always dreamed of, this vengeful impostor must choose between the deadly eunuch who owns her past and the ruler who could be her future... EP 1:A vengeful woman undergoes a magical transformation to steal her sister Celia's identity and position as Empress, vowing to avenge their mother's murder, but her deception is challenged when the real Celia accuses her of being an impostor in front of the Emperor.Will the Emperor believe the vengeful impostor or the real Celia?

column1: That Damn Maid Is My Daughter?
column4: Abandoned by her wealthy family, Mira Shaw pleads with her biological mother to save her father. Her grandfather rejects her. Her own mother despises her. His death fuels her revenge. Now, she enters their world as a stranger… but in this tale of vengeance, what will be the final, cruel twist? EP 1:On the Mid-Autumn Festival, Wendy Carter gives birth to a daughter with a crescent-shaped birthmark, but the baby is born sick and requires a centennial ginseng to survive. Meanwhile, Wendy suffers from severe bleeding, leading to a desperate plea for help. Dylan Shaw, the father, is rejected by Wendy's father, Mr. Carter, who blames Dylan for Wendy's condition and forbids him from seeing her or their child again.Will Dylan Shaw ever reunite with his daughter, or will Mr. Carter's hatred keep them apart forever?

column1: Cooking My Way Back to Love
column4: The fallen legendary cook Leon Kennedy, now homeless and haunted by the loss of his wife, is offered a lifeline at a struggling restaurant. When a vicious businessman threatens the restaurant, he is forced to reclaim his crown, but only to see his beloved dog being killed. Pushed past his limit, he sharpens his knife… no longer for meals, but for revenge! EP 1:Leon, a fallen legendary cook, excitedly shares his achievement of mastering the Chrysanthemum Tofu Flower technique with his wife Sarah, expressing his dreams of winning the World Culinary Championship and traveling the world. However, Sarah hesitates to share her pregnancy news, worried about his focus on cooking and their future family life.Will Leon's culinary ambitions leave room for his growing family?

Daisy, heiress of the Carters, was replaced by her adopted sister Jennifer. After saving her three brothers from a fire set by Jennifer, at the cost of a kidney and an arm, she was framed as the arsonist and cast out by her family. Three years after prison, Daisy returns, vowing to rise alone, while her brothers regret their blindness—too late. EP 1:Daisy is released from prison on her birthday, the same day her family wrongfully imprisoned her three years ago. Flashbacks reveal how Jennifer framed Daisy for setting a fire that nearly killed their brothers, leading to Daisy's imprisonment despite her saving them.Will Daisy's brothers ever discover Jennifer's deceit?

column1: I Play the Maid, I Rule in Blood
column4: Once an assassin, Joanna Wells lost her husband to Nathan Chase's cruelty. She returns as a maid, patient and quiet, until Nathan trusts her enough to love her. Step by step she erases his first love, claiming his home, his heart, his soul. And on the day he gives her his vow, the blade of truth finally falls... EP 1:Joey is released from a dark past by someone who promises to be their boyfriend, recalling a life of hardship until finding happiness with William and their unborn child. However, a tragic turn leaves Joanna mourning the loss of William, hinting at unresolved dangers from her past.What dangerous secrets from Joanna's past will resurface to threaten her newfound peace?

Bound by a contract marriage, Zoe remains indifferent to her husband's love for her sister—for her freedom is near. But when a formidable rich heir from her wild past returns, his scandalous pursuit puts everything in danger. In the end, will she flee to the freedom she planned for, or the passion that promises a very different kind of captivity? EP 1:Zoe Heller encounters her past lover, Hector Garner, who disrupts her current engagement with his scandalous advances, leading to a heated confrontation where he threatens her fiancé's life.Will Zoe's engagement survive Hector's dangerous obsession?

When Vivian awakens as her 6-year-old self in 1990, she is gifted a second chance and a mysterious Reward System. Now, armed with the memories of the past, she is determined to rewrite her fate, preventing the tragedy that doomed her family and securing a brighter future for her parents… This time, she will not go down without a fight. EP 1:Vivian awakens as her 6-year-old self in 1990, realizing she has been given a second chance to rewrite her family's tragic fate. Overjoyed to see her mother alive again, she embraces the opportunity to change their future. A mysterious 'Quest Reward System' activates, offering her the tools to alter destiny. Meanwhile, tensions rise as financial struggles and family pressures hint at the impending crisis that once doomed them.What will Vivian's first task be, and how will it change her family's future?

Three years ago, Stephen nearly lost his life to heart disease, but a transplant from Chris Moore, the late fiancé of Ava Brooks, gave him a second chance. Ava first draws close to Stephen in order to safeguard Chris's heart, yet as time goes on, she finds it's fate to bring them together... EP 1:Ava relives the traumatic moment of Chris's death, where he proposed to her just before the fatal accident, and she vows to protect his heart, which now beats in Stephen's chest.Will Ava's vow to protect Chris's heart bring her closer to Stephen or drive them apart?

Orphan Charles Gill, raised to hate gambling, becomes its greatest enemy. After a mission leaves him mentally broken, he’s married off to kind Yvonne Smith.
When her brother Jerry loses everything to a gambling scam, debt collectors attack—shocking Charles back to his genius self. But he stays in disguise, playing the fool to destroy gambling from within.
“You thought I was weak? I was just waiting to clear the board.” EP 1:Charles, now known as Mirage, reunites with his master who reveals the truth behind the jade pendant and sends him on a mission to end gambling for good. As Charles descends the mountain, he reflects on his past and the significance of the pendant, only to encounter a sudden danger that hints at the challenges ahead.What secrets does the Dragon Jade Pendant hold, and how will it shape Charles' journey to eradicate gambling?

For five years, Leo sacrificed his career to be a perfect househusband for his wealthy wife, Wendy. He endured the ridicule, believing his marriage was perfect. But when Wendy abandons their fifth anniversary to tend to another man, Leo's illusion shatters. Pushed to his limit, he finally reaches out to the mother he turned his back on for Wendy, ready to end the marriage and reclaim his life. EP 1:Leo's fifth wedding anniversary turns into a nightmare when Wendy stands him up to care for her male secretary Chris, revealing the cracks in their marriage and forcing Leo to confront the sacrifices he's made.Will Leo finally walk away from his one-sided marriage?

column1: This Time, I'll Kill the Game
column4: In his youth, Hans rose to prominence due to his prodigious talent for gambling, only to witness his best brother die a tragic death. He forswore gambling forever and adopted his brother's son, Matt. In Matt's previous life, he used his mind-reading ability to trap Hans in a rigged game, leading to Hans' total loss and his pregnant wife's suicide. After Hans' reincarnation...... EP 1:Hans, a former Gambling Master, breaks his vow to save his brother Matt, only to fall into a deadly trap set by Matt, who reveals his mind-reading ability. After losing everything, including his wife and unborn child, Hans dies but finds himself reincarnated, vowing to change his fate.Will Hans succeed in altering his destiny and taking revenge on Matt in his new life?

Years of misunderstandings couldn’t erase what their hearts have always known. When fate reunites them, old feelings ignite, testing if love can finally conquer hesitation, secrets, and the world around them. Can love survive fame, secrets, and past misunderstandings? EP 1:Rebecca Yates is forced into a fake marriage with Jarek, who pretends to be his comatose brother Julian to stabilize the company's stocks. Amidst the deception, old feelings resurface, and a drunken encounter blurs the lines between pretense and reality.Will Rebecca and Jarek's fake marriage turn into something real, or will Julian's awakening tear them apart?

column1: (Dubbed) Old Man, This's My New Dad
column4: On her coming-of-age day, Celeste Rivers—princess of the  Phoenix Empire—wakes up in the body of an eight-year-old girl in modern times. The real heiress, she’d been swapped at birth, scorned by her family, and left to starve while the fake heiress took everything. Furious, Celeste ditches her uncaring father for a “useless” one everyone mocks—because training a spoiled scoundrel? Child’s play for a princess. EP 1:Celeste Rivers, the true heiress of the Rivers family, faces scorn and abuse from her adoptive family, who favor the impostor heiress. After being locked in a storage room without food or water, Celeste decides she's had enough and begins to assert her true identity.Will Celeste's newfound defiance lead her to reclaim her rightful place, or will her family's cruelty push her to the brink?

column1: One Night with My Husband's Enemy
column4: When Jason's secretary announces she's pregnant, Selena's perfect life shatters—until one reckless night with his young rival turns into an obsession. Now he's determined to protect her, and prove his love was never an accident. But when she discovers their meeting wasn't by chance, she must decide: is he her salvation... or her next downfall? EP 1:Selena's world crumbles when she discovers her husband Jason's secretary is pregnant with his child, revealing a four-year affair. Confronted with the harsh reality of her marriage and threats to her father's medical care, Selena decides to take control of her life by initiating a divorce. In a moment of defiance, she encounters Julian Chandler, Jason's young rival, sparking a dangerous new connection.Will Selena's reckless night with Julian lead to salvation or her ultimate downfall?

Once betrayed and buried alive, Julia awakens to a second chance, with fire in her veins. In a court ruled by deceit and folly, she weaves her own game of power, love, and revenge. Her resolve just cuts sharper than any blade. In a storm of vengeance and power, will she rewrite her fate—or be consumed by it? EP 1:Julia is falsely accused of poisoning the Emperor by Yara and Marcus, leading to her being buried alive as punishment. Before her death, she learns the shocking truth about her son's murder and vows revenge. Miraculously, she awakens to find herself reborn, with a second chance to exact her vengeance.Will Julia's second life bring the justice she seeks, or will her enemies once again outmaneuver her?

column1: Dumped When Fat, Chased When Hot!
column4: To repay a life debt, billionaire Martin Boyle married the impoverished Gloria Lynn. Yet, poisoned by rumours, he scorned her for her weight. After his betrayal, a radiant and ruthless Gloria returns, now slim, successful, and hungry for revenge. Can he ever repay his deepest debt, the heart he once broke? EP 1:Gloria Lynn is about to marry billionaire Martin Boyle, who is only marrying her to repay a life debt to her late father. As the wedding begins, rumors and skepticism about Gloria's beauty circulate among the guests, setting the stage for future conflicts.Will Gloria's true appearance shock everyone and change Martin's feelings for her?

After being abandoned and robbed during childbirth, Chloe secretly becomes the nanny to the baby she gave up—born from a fateful night with CEO Ryan. As he protects her from cruel kin and grows drawn to her, she struggles to hide that she’s the child’s true mother. EP 1:Chloe reveals her pregnancy to her fiancé, leading to a violent outburst. The story then flashes back to nine months prior when Chloe was drugged and had a fateful encounter with Ryan Astor, the heir to a powerful family. After being abandoned by her family and left with no means to support her child, Chloe goes into labor in a hospital hallway. Meanwhile, Ryan's grandfather pressures him to produce an heir to continue the family line, culminating in the shocking discovery of a baby at Ryan's doorstep.Will Ryan recognize the baby as his own, and how will Chloe react when she discovers her child is now in his care?

column1: BOSS, Your Replaced Fiancée Is Back!
column4: Clara was forced into another marriage, while her fiancé Julian was fooled by an imposter wearing her face. Now she's back as the designer Lark, burning with revenge. Though he saves her time and again from danger, her heart remains frozen. Now that all secrets are exposed... Can their broken love be rebuilt, or is this where their story ends? EP 1:Clara is locked up and forced into a marriage against her will, while Julian discovers she was pregnant and rushes to find her.Will Julian find Clara in time to save her and their unborn child?

column1: Seduce His Uncle, Ruin My Family
column4:
Trapped and betrayed, Ivy Green seduces powerful Leon Hunt for revenge. But when their night together ignites a scandal, a dangerous game begins. Can two players of deception trust each other with their hearts? The ultimate revenge is coming.
 EP 1:Ivy Green successfully seduces Leon Hunt for revenge, igniting a scandal. Meanwhile, Leon deals with family betrayal and a nephew's scandal, while Ivy faces threats from her own family regarding her inheritance.Will Ivy's revenge plan succeed as the Hunt and Wright families collide?

Two sisters, once destroyed by betrayal and fire, awaken to a second chance. This time, Summer and Marina watch out for each other and turn the tables on those who set them up. It's navigation through love, loyalty, and vengeance. Will they manage to seize control of their destiny, rather than repeat history once more? EP 1:Summer and Marina, the Johnson heiresses, confront each other in a tense basement showdown, where accusations of betrayal, poisoning, and past wrongs surface, revealing deep-seated resentment and a possible third party manipulating their fates.Who is truly pulling the strings behind the sisters' suffering?

column1: Dumped? My Career is My Soulmate
column4: Her perfect life collapsed when her husband chose his mistress in a crash. A year later, she returned with a world-changing breakthrough. Now, as shocking truths emerge and he begs for forgiveness, she holds all the power. Will she crush him, or rise above the man who tried to destroy her? EP 1:Annie Hill files for a forced divorce after her husband Marron Cox chooses to save his mistress Lisa Jones instead of her in a life-threatening accident, revealing the depth of betrayal and her resolve to reclaim what's owed to her.What deal will Annie propose to Lisa, and how will it change the power dynamics between them?

column1: Love or Money? My Hubby Gives Me Both!
column4: Tracy Young, a poor but money-loving girl, reincarnated into a destitute heiress. She entered a one-year contract marriage with the enigmatic Ewan Lew for 10 million RMB. She soon discovers her "cold" husband is the secret richest man, who's not just generous but now wants to give her half his fortune... Was this contract just a disguise for true love? EP 1:Tracy Young, a money-loving girl, reincarnates into a destitute heiress and enters a one-year contract marriage with the enigmatic Ewan Lew for 10 million RMB, only to discover her 'cold' husband is actually the secret richest man, who's not just generous but now wants to give her half his fortune.Will Tracy uncover the true intentions behind Ewan's lavish generosity?

A single night bound Nancy and Xavier in ways neither expected. Years later, she's raising her son alone, struggling to make ends meet. A sudden hospital meeting pulls Xavier back into her world, stirring old secrets, fresh rivalries, and battles that test loyalty, love, and truth. Because some bonds, once forged, never miss a shot... EP 1:Nancy confronts Xavier about their past and reveals he is the father of her son, Mike, sparking a heated argument. Meanwhile, Mike's health crisis forces Nancy to seek expensive treatment, leading to a chance encounter between Xavier and Mike, who is his spitting image.Will Xavier step up to help Nancy and Mike, or will he deny his newfound fatherhood?

She looks soft, but hits hard. He rules the board, but kneels for her.
After a chase brings them together, Celia Stone and Adrian Hanley become each other’s sanctuary.
He’s cold to all but her; she’s sweet to all but deadly for him.
But when a new threat emerges from his past, will their love become his weakness… or her weapon? EP 1:At the Stone Group launch party, Celia's fiancé Sean is seen getting close to her sister Vanessa, sparking rumors. Despite Warren's observation, Celia defends their actions, citing her guilt over her sister's disability. Meanwhile, Adrian hints at his growing influence over Celia, challenging her loyalty to Sean.Will Celia continue to play the obedient puppet, or will Adrian's presence ignite a rebellion in her heart?

column1: Deaf Trash? I'm the Music God!
column4: Genius composer Leon lost his hearing saving his girlfriend Yuna but kept writing songs in secret to help her rise to fame. When he heard her mocking his disability, he left in silence. Now he returns as the Music God, shocking the crowd. And she tries to get close, unaware the man she once despised is right before her… EP 1:Leon, the Music God, hides his true identity while secretly composing songs to elevate Ynna's career, believing in her promise to marry him once she becomes the Music Queen. However, tensions rise as he prioritizes Ynna over other industry demands, revealing his deep personal sacrifices and the fragile foundation of their relationship.Will Ynna discover Leon's true identity and the sacrifices he's made for her?

Leo Storm, a disowned noble, suffers for a decade as a graveyard keeper. His mentor awakens his hidden power—the Dragon Spine. After a stunning victory leads to betrayal, her true power is revealed, forcing the sect to crown him as their new master. But the Demon Clan arrives, challenging him to conquer the Dragon Ascension Stairs and face their sovereign, igniting a war that will shake the three realms. EP 1:Leo Storm, the disgraced noble turned graveyard keeper, faces humiliation from his peers but remains diligent in his duties. His hidden power, the Dragon Spine, is on the verge of awakening, as foretold by his mentor. The Demon Clan's attack on the sect forces a desperate plea for help, leading to a shocking proposal that could change Leo's fate and the sect's future.Will Leo's awakening be enough to save the sect from the Demon Clan's onslaught?
