For a decade, Sandy Lynn was Derek Shaw's caged songbird, chafing under his control and her own suppressed feelings. When she vanished, his world didn't just break—it shattered. Six years later, a child who looks exactly like Derek stands before him. The woman who never bowed to him had a son... but who is the father? EP 1:Sandy Lynn confronts the rumors and Derek Shaw's controlling behavior, asserting her independence in a tense exchange that reveals the strained nature of their relationship.Will Sandy finally break free from Derek's control, or will he tighten his grip?

Killed by the Blood Fiend, seventy years later, Kirsh was reborn in a eight-year-old junior, Vivian. Her grandfather had been poisoned by his adopted son. To save her father at the Sect Trial, Vivian used "Phoenix Kill". As chaos ensued, the resurrected Blood Fiend appeared in the Valkyrie Trial... EP 1:Kirsh Jane, once a powerful Valkyrie, is reborn as an 8-year-old girl named Vivian after being killed by the Blood Fiend. She discovers her grandfather has been poisoned by his adopted son, Ian Zack, who is now threatening her uncle, Ford Lang, for the Family Token. Vivian, with her past life memories, steps in to confront Ian, setting the stage for a dramatic family conflict and her quest for justice.Will Vivian be able to reclaim her family's honor and defeat Ian Zack with her newfound identity?

She is the empress, once honored above all, now mourning in silence. Just days before her retreat ends, she is accused, humiliated, and nearly branded as low-born by a ruthless woman desperate to be crown princess. Stripped of dignity, can she endure until the truth is revealed? EP 1:The Crown Prince reveals his plans to marry Mandy Shaw, a merchant's daughter, in Valoria County, keeping his mother's presence and the memory of his late sister Quinn a secret. Meanwhile, a rival woman discovers the Prince's relationship and plots to sabotage Mandy's rise to power.Will Mandy's dream of becoming Crown Princess be destroyed by her jealous rival?

After a fatal betrayal at a palace banquet, sisters Sara and Mara are reborn. This time, Mara snatches the marriage proposal from the future regent, throwing Sara into the gilded cage of the palace to rewrite her destiny… Now, can Sara survive the nest of vipers she was never prepared for? EP 1:Sara, reborn after betrayal, confronts her past as she manipulates the Emperor's favor to humble her sister Mara, who is now suffering in the Forgotten Palace, while her own rise as the Chancellor's wife fuels Mara's bitter resentment.Will Sara's revenge bring her peace, or will Mara's wrath ignite a new cycle of betrayal?

Once torn apart by lies, Dr. Tiffany Turner and tech founder Ashley are now caught in a web of lies by vicious rivals. Tiffany is silenced and held captive, while Ashley is forced into dangerous compromises. Defying all odds, Ashley races to expose the conspiracy and rescue Tiffany. With justice served and health restored, they overcome their struggles for a future together. EP 1:Ashley's family tricks him into visiting the andrology department under the guise of a prenatal checkup for his sister, revealing their concerns about his prolonged single status and potential health issues. The situation escalates when Ashley unexpectedly encounters his ex, Tiffany, at the hospital, uncovering unresolved feelings and sacrifices she made for their relationship.Will Ashley confront Tiffany about her sacrificed future and rekindle their love?

Elegant but secretly mischievous, Lydia only wants to stay close to her bestie Sophie. To do that, she sets her eyes on Sophie's aloof brother-in-law, Dr. Adrian. He keeps his distance, yet quietly shields her. Just as Lydia breaks through his frozen heart, his first love returns. Will Lydia walk away, or will Adrian finally fight for her? EP 1:At Sophie's wedding, Lydia unexpectedly crashes the ceremony not for the groom but for the bride, revealing her deep bond with Sophie. To stay close to her best friend, Lydia announces her bold plan to pursue Sophie's aloof brother-in-law, Adrian, setting the stage for a dramatic romantic pursuit.Will Lydia's audacious plan to win over Adrian succeed, or will his first love complicate everything?

Chef King Jason Webb, an ancestor of the Webb family, finds his spirit transported into his young descendant, Mike Webb. Appalled by the decline in his family's culinary skills, he sets out to restore their legacy. Though his childlike appearance draws skepticism, his masterful knife skills and impeccable culinary skills soon win over the doubters. Through his efforts, he not only reclaims his family's honor but also brings to justice those with ulterior motives. EP 1:Chef King Jason Webb's spirit reincarnates into his young descendant, Mike Webb, shocking everyone. Determined to restore his family's culinary legacy, Jason demonstrates his masterful skills, leaving the family in awe and questioning if Mike is the hidden talent they've been overlooking.Will Jason's presence uncover the true potential of the Webb family's culinary legacy?

column1: The General’s Daughters Revenge in Blood
column4:
They were once silenced and shamed. But when men fled and the empire burned, the daughters rose—from silk and tears to steel and fire. Now the men return, proud and unbowed, only to face the truth they never imagined: the battlefield no longer belongs to them.
 EP 1:The Shaw women face brutal retaliation from Grandia's army as their men flee, leaving them to endure humiliation and violence, while the daughters vow revenge and resistance.Will the Shaw women survive the night and turn the tide against their oppressors?

column1: Reborn: The Kid Chef Is Killing it!
column4: Sara Nolan, Grandoria's master chef, dies in a kitchen blast and wakes up in the body of a little girl named Chloe Sanders. Her father is a ruined chef, her mother ran off with a rival tavern owner, and their last refuge, a failing tavern, faces ruin. To survive, Sara must unleash her past-life mastery to turn the tables... EP 1:Master Chef Sara Nolan dies in a gas explosion and mysteriously wakes up in the body of a young girl named Chloe Sanders. Struggling with her new identity and a dysfunctional family—her father, a ruined chef, and a mother who abandoned them—Chloe discovers their last refuge, a failing tavern, is on the brink of collapse. Determined to survive, Sara's past-life culinary expertise emerges as she vows to save the tavern and turn their fortunes around.How will Sara's culinary genius transform the failing tavern and mend her fractured new family?

column1: My Country Wife, The Mafia Boss!
column4: At a lavish banquet, Ethan Ford calls his wife gentle and naive. But whispers spread that Molly is the Shadow Syndicate’s feared leader. As tycoons beg for her genius, their contract marriage turns real, until she learns Ethan’s daughter is her own. Love or deception, who’s playing who? EP 1:Anna is kidnapped, and a mysterious woman rescues a child from human traffickers, revealing her formidable skills and declaring herself a champion of justice.Who is this mysterious woman, and how will her actions impact the unfolding drama?

column1: Cheat On Me, I Date Your Enemy
column4: The fallen archery legend, Liam, hid his identity after bestowing his secret techniques upon his lover, Helena only to be cruelly betrayed. When he meets Kathy, a discarded athlete, he becomes her coach. As Kathy masters his legendary skills, defeats Helena, their bond deepens into love… But can they survive before it consumes them? EP 1:Helena wins the city archery championship using Liam's secret technique, the Starseeker Volley, but publicly humiliates and denies him, revealing her true colors and betrayal. Meanwhile, the mysterious disappearance of the legendary archer Wayfarer is hinted at, adding intrigue to the story.Will Liam seek revenge or find a new purpose with Kathy?

column1: Stole My CEO? You'll Pay, Cousin!
column4: What? A village girl saved the heir of the richest family? Celine nursed the poisoned, amnesiac Adrian back to health, and they fell in love. But when he left to find his past, he never came back—leaving her pregnant and ashamed. A year later, she enters his mansion as a nutritionist… and his “fiancée” is actually her lying cousin! “Steal my man? Fine—let’s see if you can keep him.” EP 1:Celine, a village girl, is punished for her premarital pregnancy by the village elders, who attempt to burn her. She is saved by Adrian, the heir to a wealthy family whom she had nursed back to health after he was poisoned. They fall in love, and Adrian gives her one of a pair of pendants, promising to return after finding his family. However, he doesn't come back, leaving Celine pregnant and desperate. A year later, she seeks help from her cousin Nina, who refuses to assist her, leading to a dramatic childbirth scene. Meanwhile, Adrian's family offers a massive reward to find the girl with the matching pendant.Will Celine survive childbirth and reunite with Adrian, or will her cousin Nina's betrayal have dire consequences?

Bound by a Fake Marriage Agreement, Ethan Lewis and Anya Stone planned to part ways after two years. But fate had other plans. Between workplace clashes and hidden tenderness, their hearts began to blur the line between contract and love. Yet when the truth explodes, will love survive, or shatter everything they built… EP 1:Ethan Lewis, bound by a fake marriage agreement, finds himself in a chaotic situation when Anya Stone arrives in a white dress amidst threats and debts, blurring the lines between their contract and unexpected emotions.Will Ethan and Anya's fake marriage turn into a real connection, or will the debts and threats tear them apart?

After their son's tragic death, Grace and husband Nate face her avaricious family, who see their grief as a financial opportunity. Realizing their true motives, Grace makes a defiant choice: she will donate their entire estate to charity rather than surrender one penny to these emotional vampires. But can this radical act of severing family ties truly bring them peace, or will it unleash a new wave of consequences? EP 1:Grace and Nate receive a posthumous award for their late son Troy's bravery, but their mourning is interrupted by the sudden arrival of opportunistic family members, hinting at ulterior motives.Will Grace and Nate see through their family's true intentions before it's too late?

column1: The Baby Emperor From the Mirror
column4: The baby emperor, Ray Shaw, uses a magical mirror to protect his mother and find his father in the modern world. But when a villain steals the mirror and kidnaps Ray, his parents must race through time to save him. They shattered one conspiracy, only to discover the mirror's true power is now awakening... and it cannot be controlled! EP 1:Ray Shaw, the baby emperor, is distressed over the disappearance of his parents and lashes out in frustration. Meanwhile, Lancy faces mistreatment from her family despite being the real daughter, and tensions rise between her and adopted sister Kiki Sue. The royal court is in chaos as they search for the missing emperor and empress, with Ray blaming his subordinates for their incompetence.Will Ray ever reunite with his parents, and what secrets lie behind Lancy's past?

column1: The Marriage Exchange: Now I Marry for the Crown
column4: Two sisters, reborn. A destiny swapped. When her sister schemes to steal her humble scholar, Vivian Shaw embraces the poisoned chalice of the Prince's manor. There, she outmaneuvers a hostile heir and his scheming lover, not for love, but for power. She will become the Lady of the house—but can she secure her throne when a repentant prince now begs for her heart? EP 1:Vivian Shaw, after being poisoned by her sister Cecilia in a fit of jealousy, finds herself reborn back to the time before her marriage, giving her a second chance to alter her destiny.What will Vivian do differently now that she has a second chance at life?

Rosie believed that Evan was dying, until she discovered his "heart disease" was a lie to manipulate her. Blinded by guilt, she nearly sacrificed her husband, Harry, for a surgery that was never needed. But when he resurfaces, alive yet changed, can those near-death experiences earn forgiveness… or is revenge the only language this family speaks? EP 1:Rosie's manipulation by Evan reaches a horrifying climax when she demands Harry sacrifice his heart for Evan, revealing the depth of her betrayal and the twisted dynamics of their relationships.Will Harry survive Rosie's shocking demand, or is this the end of their tragic love story?

column1: My Mission: Get Back My CEO Daddy!
column4: Five-year-old Stella Scott discovers she’s trapped in a trashy romance novel and her family’s falling apart. With her mom broke and dad missing, this tiny heroine sets out to reunite them. But can they uncover the dark truth and turn their doomed story into a happily ever after? EP 1:Grace Scott refuses to marry for money to save her family from bankruptcy, despite her father's insistence. Meanwhile, five-year-old Stella reveals the tragic backstory of her parents—how her father lost his memory and became homeless after being targeted by enemies, and how her mother gave birth to her alone. Stella discovers they are living in a romance novel where her father's fate is doomed, but she spots a glimmer of hope when she realizes her father is actually rich and plans to reunite her parents.Can Stella successfully reunite her parents and change their tragic fate?

She did 6 years for her husband's crime, only to find him married to her best friend and running her company! Now, with a powerful new ally by her side, this ex-con is out for blood. And she's taking back everything they stole, one ruthless move at a time... EP 1:After serving six years in prison for her husband Zack's crime, Gina discovers that Zack has married her best friend and is running her company into the ground. Confronting Zack, she realizes the depth of his betrayal as he coldly dismisses her and reveals his new life with her former friend. The episode highlights Gina's shock and the beginning of her quest for justice.Will Gina be able to reclaim her life and seek vengeance against those who betrayed her?

She was once Stella, the kidnapped heiress—now Rosa, the queen of shadows. Years later, she returns home and crosses paths with Ian, the man she once saved, only to be caught in a web of lies, danger, and secrets. Guess some hearts really are bulletproof... EP 1:Rosa, once known as Stella, returns to her past life and gets entangled in a dangerous situation where she must confront an old enemy, Nox, to save a wealthy man. Meanwhile, she is set up for a family reunion, but suspicion arises as she is kidnapped shortly after her return.Will Rosa uncover the truth behind her kidnapping and the motives of those around her?

The new intern, Isla, never imagined that the cold and demanding CEO Christian — who shoved her relentlessly on the tennis court during the day — was the same person who broadened her view to unknown territories at night in an exclusive BDSM club. But when the mask comes off and secretive identities assimilate into reality, is this a game she can stay afloat… or submerge deep within the shadows of desire seeking unexpected redemption? EP 1:Isla ends her toxic relationship with Eric just as she faces the pressure of the new CEO Christian's arrival, hinting at a deeper connection between Christian and the exclusive BDSM club.What secrets will Christian's arrival uncover about the Graves Club and his connection to Isla?

column1: He Hates Me with My Heart
column4: Seven years ago, Ivy Hughes gave Aaron Grant her own heart to save him—then vanished, leaving only rumors and pain behind. When fate reunites them, Ivy lashes out to push him away, hiding a devastating secret. But Aaron’s love turns to obsession… will the truth come too late… EP 1:Ivy Hughes coldly breaks up with Aaron Grant, revealing her true feelings as a gold-digger, only for the audience to later discover her heartbreaking secret—she is donating her own heart to save his life, signing away her future in secrecy.Will Aaron ever uncover the truth behind Ivy's cruel facade and her ultimate sacrifice?

column1: Mr. King, Your Crush Is Single Agian
column4: In the 1930s, medical student Marianne Clark saves wounded gang boss Damian Foster and falls deeply in love. Once his adored wife, she's later betrayed and killed for another woman. Reborn from death, Marianne vows never to love him again. This time, she wields her medical skills not to heal one man, but to save a city on the brink of collapse... EP 1:Marianne Clark, a medical student, saves and falls in love with gang boss Damian Foster, becoming his adored wife and sharpest blade. However, after ten years, his love turns cold, and upon discovering she's pregnant, Marianne faces a shocking betrayal when another woman enters their lives.Will Marianne's love and sacrifice be enough to save her marriage, or is this the beginning of her downfall?

Yuna is reborn. And this time, she's determined to "fix" everything her husband ever wanted: mending his family, saving his career, and even sending his beloved girl right to his arms. And when she finally discovers the man who's been watching her all along, she learns that true love doesn't need a second chance, just a first glance. EP 1:Yuna, realizing her mistakes in her past life, uses magical beads to turn back time to her wedding day with Sean, determined to change their fate within 36 hours.Will Yuna succeed in altering her destiny and saving Sean, or is history doomed to repeat itself?

column1: Sorry, I Don't Do Kept Man
column4: Thirteen years ago, Liam Morgan lived off scraps with his grandfather. When the old man died, Liam was taken by a reclusive immortal to train in the mountains. Now, he returns as a powerful cultivator. The first thing he does? Tear up his old marriage contract. He won't be a kept son-in-law. If there's a legacy to build, it'll bear his name. EP 1:Liam Morgan, now a powerful cultivator on the verge of immortality, is forced by his master to leave Thornveil Mountain to confront his past, including his grandfather's death and an arranged marriage.Will Liam uncover the truth about his grandfather's death and what will he do about his arranged marriage?

After quitting his job to develop an engine, River Steelarm's relentless research pushes his wife to leave him. Evicted and struggling, he finds refuge in his repair shop with help from a loyal friend. Just then, experts confirm his breakthrough and rush to recruit him. When a risky repair job for a local gang leader backfires, an unlikely alliance of officials and global executives steps in. Choosing to build a homegrown brand, River transforms a derelict factory into the foundation of a dream. EP 1:River Steelarm, a self-taught mechanic, sends his groundbreaking engine research to Beijing, catching the attention of Professor Gearhart who sees potential in solving a long-standing tech problem. Meanwhile, River faces ridicule from his peers and a devastating personal blow when his wife, influenced by her aunt, asks for a divorce.Will River's revolutionary engine design finally get the recognition it deserves, or will personal turmoil derail his dreams?

column1: Mr. Gold, Ruin That Jerk for Me!
column4: A year ago, Fiona found out that her boyfriend had already been engaged. His fiancée, Clara, destroyed Fiona’s family and future. So Fiona decides to seduce Liam, North City’s most powerful heir, to crush the Shaw family. But revenge ignites desire, and lies blur into love. Will she finish her revenge, or fall for the man she meant to ruin? EP 1:Fiona, seeking revenge against Clara and the Shaw family for destroying her life, meets Liam Reed, the only man in Norvale capable of bringing them down. In a bold move, she challenges Liam to a bet, offering herself as the stake, setting the stage for a high-stakes game of revenge and desire.Will Fiona's gamble with Liam Reed lead to her revenge or an unexpected romance?

Vivian, a socialite from a century ago, awakens as her nine-year-old great-great-granddaughter. Furious with her incompetent kin, this former matriarch uses her vast network from her past life to restore her family's legacy. Watch as this little girl with the mind of a powerhouse takes the business world by storm. Who can stand in her way? EP 1:Vivian Lorne, the former matriarch of the Lorne Family, awakens in the body of her nine-year-old great-great-granddaughter in the year 2025. Confused but determined, she confronts the current family members, slapping one for disrespect and demanding to see her granddaughter Iris. She quickly asserts her authority, shocking everyone with her familiar demeanor and knowledge of the family.How will the Lorne Family react when they realize the little girl is their formidable ancestor reborn?

Abandoned by her lover to kidnappers, Elena loses her baby and her reputation. Now she is back as CEO of Swift Group. She shatters Dylan's pride, bringing Perry Group down. The truth drives Dylan to obsessive revenge, even kidnapping her to atone. But Nathan now stands by her. His love came too late. Will she choose hate? Or a new beginning?

Once a top commander, now a “helpless” heiress named Ann Yates, who laughs at the empire’s whispers. She crushes rivals, shocks elites, and leaves her enemies bleeding… They think they can break her? Let them try… EP 1:Ann Yates, the once top commander now known as a 'helpless' heiress, faces betrayal from her trusted comrade Lina, who has been promised her position as Eastern Global Commander in exchange for her death. A specially developed bullet is used in an attempt to kill Ann, but she refuses to go down without a fight, declaring her willingness to drag Lina to hell with her, tired of living in the apocalypse.Will Ann survive the betrayal and the lethal bullet meant for her?

Once the strongest martial master, Aria Vale hides her power after her husband’s death, raising her daughter in silence. But when the Ford Sect faces ruin, the child smiles, “This is nothing compared to Mom’s training.” What happens when a mother the world forgot decides to fight again? Let's see! EP 1:Aria and her daughter Luna enjoy a secret shopping trip, oblivious to the chaos around them until a madman attacks the crowd. Aria effortlessly stops him with a single slap, revealing her hidden strength to the shocked onlookers.What will happen when Aria's true identity is exposed to the world?

In her past life, Aria gave her heart and soul to her sect, only to be executed by her own master who turned a blind eye to the truth. In her final moments, she learned she would always play second fiddle to her junior, Luna. Reborn at age six, Aria knew enough was enough. This time, she turned her back on them for good... EP 1:Aria, who has dedicated her life to the Skysonic sect, is falsely accused of making a secret deal with the Demons by her junior, Luna. Despite her past sacrifices, including pulling out her own spirit root and risking her life to gather resources for the sect, she is condemned and executed by her master and peers. In her final moments, she vows never to be loyal to them again if given another chance. Miraculously, she is reborn at age six, on the very day Luna framed her.Will Aria use her second chance to take revenge on those who betrayed her?

column1: Anniversary from Hell: Wife vs. Mistress!
column4: For their third wedding anniversary, Helen Hart changes the celebration spot to the villa where her husband William Chase once proposed. What she doesn't know is that someone else is gonna throw a birthday party there too. One night, two women, and a truth no one's ready for... EP 1:Helen Hart meticulously plans a romantic third-anniversary celebration at the villa where William Chase once proposed, unaware that William has forgotten the date and is preoccupied with another woman, Faye. Tensions rise when Helen calls William, who lies about remembering their anniversary and hastily promises a surprise. The situation escalates when Helen unexpectedly encounters William in a compromising situation, hinting at deeper secrets and betrayals.Will Helen confront William about his infidelity, or will more shocking truths come to light?

column1: Hurt My Son? I’ll Burn the World!
column4:
They broke his son. Now he’ll burn the world to the ground.
Once betrayed by those he trusted, a dying father, Warner Cooper, rises again—fueled not by greed or glory, but by vengeance. This time, he’s not fighting for power… he’s fighting for his son’s pride! EP 1:Warner Cooper, a dying father who has been betrayed and is seeking vengeance for his son, finally locates his long-lost son, Charles Larson, after fifteen years. Charles, now working at a mine owned by Warner's group, is unaware of his true identity. Warner, overwhelmed with emotion, reveals himself as Charles's father, setting the stage for a dramatic reunion and potential conflict over Charles's inheritance and future.Will Charles accept Warner as his father and what challenges will they face together?

column1: Goodbye Mr. Wrong, I Found My Real Savior!
column4: A mistaken debt of gratitude ties her to the wrong man. Cold affection turns to chaos as hidden loyalties and forbidden feelings surface. When truth breaks through the lies, only one question remains—who does her heart truly belong to? EP 1:Erin Powell ends her three-year engagement with Amos Hayes after discovering his affair with his adopted sister, Laura Zane, and realizing she was merely a cover for their relationship.What will Amos do now that Erin has called off their engagement?

column1: Don't Mess with Mr. Iron Judge!
column4: Justice Zain Blake, famed for his iron judgment, is sent to Geeland with the Imperial Sword to bring justice. When his mother and pregnant wife are brutally attacked by the very man he once swore to defend, his world collapses. Torn between duty and revenge, will he uphold justice or lose himself forever? EP 1:Justice Zain Blake, known for his iron judgment, sentences Jerry Pell, the Prime Minister's son, to execution for his crimes, showcasing his unwavering commitment to justice despite threats. Later, he is appointed as an Imperial Envoy to inspect Geeland, setting the stage for new challenges.What will happen when Zain Blake arrives in Geeland to face the mysterious Craig Lee?

When Selene Onassis's cryo-pod fails, Dr. Charlotte Reed must deliver the only serum in 3 hours. Sabotaged by Isabella—a woman claiming to be engaged to Selene's brother—Charlotte faces mid-air attacks and a ground ambush in a desperate race against time to save Selene's life. EP 1:Selene Onassis, a crucial member of the Onassis family, is dying as her cryo-chamber malfunctions. Dr. Reed is urgently dispatched with a special serum to save her, while the family scrambles to keep the crisis a secret and ensure her survival.Will Dr. Reed make it in time to save Selene before the serum expires?

Three years in a coma, Ethan Lynn wakes to find his world stolen. His wife and her lover took his company and even replaced his son with their own. Now he sees his real son, bruised and afraid. A fire ignites in him. He will get revenge and reclaim it all. This time, he's taking everything back! EP 1:Ethan Lynn wakes from a three-year coma to discover his wife Delia and her lover have taken over his company and replaced his son Justin with their own child, Henry, celebrating his birthday as the new heir. Determined to uncover the truth and reclaim his life, Ethan demands access to the home security footage from the past years.What shocking truths will Ethan uncover in the home security footage?

Adrian once swore he'd love Nina forever. They shared dreams, built a future, and believed nothing could break them. But time and betrayal tore it all apart. Now, when love turns to pain, only one will walk away unbroken... EP 1:Adrian and Lydia are involved in a car crash, triggering a flood of memories for Adrian about his past relationships with Evelyn and Lydia, revealing the painful transformation of his love over the years.Will Adrian finally confront the truth about his changing heart and the promises he broke?

Broke model Jenna faked affection to seduce Vincent, the Blair heir, all for a fortune in breakup money to fund her dream abroad. But just as she thought her plan had succeeded, he saw through all her lies. To her shock, he refuses to let her go. She runs, he chases. But when love turns into a trap, who’ll be the first to surrender? EP 1:Jenna Quinn, a broke model who seduced Vincent Blair for financial gain, overhears rumors of his impending marriage, believing her plan for breakup compensation is finally coming to fruition after three years of waiting.Will Jenna's long-awaited plan succeed, or will Vincent uncover her true intentions before she can escape with the money?

Murdered by her dad and brother, Celeste wakes up before her parents’ divorce. This time, she chooses her mother and a powerful new family, gets spoiled by her stepbrothers, living in luxury. While her reborn sister Selene is stuck with their father, falling into an abyss where only misery awaits. Be careful… karma will get you! EP 1:Celeste confronts her father and brothers about their betrayal, revealing how they've manipulated her life and stolen her future to benefit her sister Selene. In a shocking turn of events, Celeste is reborn, given a second chance to change her fate.Will Celeste seize this second chance to rewrite her destiny and seek justice against those who betrayed her?

column1: I Survived, I Married, and I Conquered!
column4: Betrayed in her past life by her own brother and best friend, Yvonne Quinn is gifted a devastating second chance. Reborn on the eve of childbirth, she now holds the ultimate leverage. Vengeance is a mother's duty. But in a world where enemies hide behind smiles, will her second chance end in victory... or deeper tragedy? EP 1:Victor Stone, a former history PhD who died in an accident and was reborn into a new world, is given an opportunity to change his fate when a village elder offers him a chance to join the army, receive money, rations, and even a wife. Despite his initial reluctance, Victor sees this as his only shot at a better life and decides to take the offer, meeting at General Quinn’s place at dawn. The recruitment drive, led by Lord Charles, promises not only immediate rewards but also a chance to make a name for himself in the rebellion against a corrupt court.Will Victor's decision to join the army lead him to the glory he seeks, or will it plunge him into deeper danger?

Ryan was once the pride of the Sword Sect, until the power meant to make him great nearly destroyed him. Mocked and forgotten, he learns to rise again, turning ridicule into strength. When fate gives him one last chance, his sword will cut through the sky… but will it be enough to change his destiny? EP 1:Ryan, once the top swordsman who defeated all eighteen sects of Eastvale, now struggles with his blocked meridians and lost power, mocked as a failure, but his master reveals his true potential lies dormant.Will Ryan unblock his meridians and reclaim his former glory?

column1: Too Young to Fight? Watch Me!
column4: Once a feared master of the martial world, she awakens as a child no one wants. But power never dies—it only waits. Beneath her small frame lies a force sharp enough to cut through fate. When the family that scorned her tries to use her again, she’ll remind them why legends never stay buried. EP 1:Sandra Lynn, the legendary Sword Sovereign from two centuries ago, awakens in the body of Vivian, a six-year-old girl scorned by her family. Upon her return to House Lynn, she is immediately subjected to demeaning rituals, but her ancient spirit refuses to bow to such indignities. With her Frostveil Sword Art and unyielding resolve, Sandra prepares to reclaim Vivian's birthright and teach House Lynn a lesson they won't forget.Will Sandra's presence in Vivian's body shake the foundations of House Lynn and the Azure Blade Sect?

Cynthia marries Ethan under a 'Bond of Grace' to repay his family's kindness. For three years, she's treated like a maid, not a wife. When betrayal finally shatters her faith, she walks away and rises on her own terms—because sometimes, payback doesn't need fire. It just needs success... EP 1:Cynthia decides to end her marriage with Ethan after years of unreciprocated efforts, realizing he never valued her. She prepares his favorite meal and runs his bath one last time, only for him to dismiss her efforts and reveal his infidelity with Chloe. The final straw comes when Cynthia recalls Ethan's accident, where he injured his leg rushing to see Chloe, and spent nights calling her name instead of acknowledging Cynthia's care. Cynthia declares their marriage over, ready to move on.Will Cynthia truly find happiness after leaving Ethan behind?

column1: Kicked Me Out? Alpha Vet Takes It All!
column4: Veterinarian Nina Summers gave everything to the Summers family, until the real daughter returned and kicked her out. Burning with fever, Nina wakes up with a strange gift: she can hear animals talk. Now the family who cast her out faces downfall, and everyone suddenly wants Nina’s help. But will she forgive… or strike back? EP 1:Nina is exposed as an imposter and kicked out of the Summers family, losing everything. However, she discovers she can now understand animals, including her hamster Jamie. With no resources left, she decides to sell her expensive shoes to survive. Meanwhile, stray animals she once helped sense danger and plan to protect her from a mysterious stalker.Will Nina's newfound ability to communicate with animals help her uncover the truth about who's stalking her?

column1: Contract Wife Runs: The CEO's Regret
column4: Sold by her parents to the Nash family, Yana was raised as a pawn for marriage. She'd loved Liam for years and finally became his wife. But their marriage had no love, only sex. Misunderstandings broke them apart. After the divorce, Liam realized that she was the one he'd never stopped loving. Will love return, or stay gone for good? EP 1:Yana decides to end her loveless marriage with Liam by serving him divorce papers, revealing her long-standing dissatisfaction with their purely physical relationship and her desire for emotional fulfillment.Will Liam finally realize his true feelings for Yana now that she's walking away?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Powerful Family', 'Love After Divorce']

column4: After her career collapses in Northvale, lawyer Sophie Wynn retreats to Harbor Isle and unexpectedly falls for inn owner Leo Chow. They promise a three-month fling, yet their hearts betray the deal. When Sophie returns home early, Leo follows, facing distance and family pressure. Can love survive the storm ahead? EP 1:Sophie Wynn, after a failed relationship, engages in a flirtatious encounter with Leo Chow, the inn owner, hinting at a potential short-term romance with deeper feelings involved.Will Sophie and Leo's three-month fling turn into something more meaningful?

In the glittering coastal city of Seaview, the adopted daughter of a powerful family, Serena Roland, was once promised to her foster brother Leon Masters, until fate brought her back to Ethan Geralds, the Masters family’s hidden son. Bound by a love they were never meant to have, Serena and Ethan are drawn together amid lies, rival empires, and a decades-old feud that began with a deadly car crash. EP 1:Serena is haunted by recurring dreams of Ethan, only to receive a shocking call about his serious car accident, leading to a tense and emotional hospital reunion that reignites their forbidden connection.Will Serena's visit to Ethan in the hospital unravel more secrets from their past?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Rich Family Feud', 'Modern Romance']

column1: Cheat with My Husband’s Dark Side
column4: To save her mother, Ella marries the renowned billionaire, Charlie. Yet her new life is a gilded trap, shrouded in his dual personalities and a vicious family feud. As she uncovers the hidden truth, Ella must fight Charlie's uncle and his own inner demons. Will her love finally mend a fractured soul, or will the darkness consume them both? EP 1:Ella is coerced into marrying Charlie, the billionaire with a dark reputation, to save her mother. Her family's greed and manipulation push her into a dangerous arrangement, but Charlie's unexpected behavior on their wedding night raises unsettling questions.What secrets lie behind Charlie's cold exterior and sudden affectionate gesture?

She loved the wrong man for ten years—until the truth hit like a blade. The one who claimed to save her was a liar. The real savior? A man feared by everyone, buried in blood and fog. Now, she’s marrying the devil she once prayed against. EP 1:A daughter prays to Buddha for guidance to choose a husband to ease her critically ill father's worries, revealing a decade-long secret love with her father's trusted aide, Sean Moss.Will her father approve of their love, or will their secret relationship face unexpected challenges?

She ran from a forced marriage—and fate led her into his car. One night changed everything. Six years later, her daughter’s search for Daddy brings him back into their world. This time, he won’t let anyone hurt them again. EP 1:A woman escapes a forced marriage and finds herself in the car of a mysterious man who just took out a nightclub boss, leading to a dangerous chase.Will they escape their pursuers and what secrets does the mysterious man hold?

Heartbroken by her ex Julian, Luna left. She never expected to crash into the world of his brother, Jasper. He seems carefree, but has secretly loved her for years. Now, Julian wants her back, while Jasper's feelings surge like a tidal wave... who will truly win her heart in the end? EP 1:Luna wakes up in shock after spending the night with Jasper, her ex's brother, and is overwhelmed with regret and confusion about her actions.Will Luna's impulsive decision to sleep with Jasper ruin her chances of a peaceful life, or will it lead to unexpected consequences?

column1: From His Shadow to Her Throne
column4: She built her husband’s fortune with her own hands—only to find herself trapped in a web of deceit, forbidden love, and bloodstained secrets. When the lies finally unravel, she must choose between mercy and vengeance before it’s too late. EP 1:Lady Lynn, on the verge of giving birth, reveals a shocking truth—her husband has been poisoning her for years to prevent conception, only to stop the poison to use her unborn child as a remedy for his illegitimate son with his sister-in-law. Meanwhile, Duke arrives in search of his long-lost daughter, suspecting a connection to a woman with a butterfly birthmark.Will Duke find his missing daughter, and can Lady Lynn escape her husband's deadly scheme in time?

The Human and Demon Races have battled for centuries. Twenty years ago, Sun God Alex Cook and Snow God Fiona Shaw sealed the Demon King—but Alex perished, and both were branded traitors. Now, as the Demon King rises again, Fiona unleashes her true power and faces the truth behind Alex’s death. EP 1:Fiona Shaw, pregnant and determined, joins forces with Alex Cook to face the Demon King, despite the risks to their unborn child. Alex sacrifices himself by using his blood and body to create the Foundation of Demon Seal, sealing the Demon King's magic power for twenty years and enabling Fiona to become a Sage. Twenty years later, as the Demon King's seal weakens, Fiona prepares to avenge Alex, while their son Dexter faces discrimination from the Shaw family.Will Fiona succeed in avenging Alex and protecting their son as the Demon King's return looms?

For seven years, a powerful general has mourned his lost family in church, while outside, just steps away, that child polishing shoes is his own daughter! When a stolen watch brings them face to face, he must confront the truth: the family he thought was gone has been surviving without him all along... EP 1:Yvette gives up her study abroad opportunity to care for Tim, who wakes up from a coma, only to face opposition from his powerful father, Commander Shane, who threatens to cut off Tim's treatment unless he ends his relationship with Yvette.Will Tim choose love or his family's demands?

When loyalty crumbles and families fall, a determined daughter rises. Allies rally, enemies loom, and a mysterious masked figure walks beside her. Trust is fragile, revenge is tempting, and the kingdom holds its breath. EP 1:The Sanders family, once celebrated for their loyalty and military victories, faces a shocking betrayal when the Emperor decrees their execution and exile under false accusations of treason, with even the newborn Andy not spared.Will Ruby seek justice for her family's unjust downfall?

Alex and Ryan wake up inside a novel—one’s a jealous villain, the other a fragile sunshine boy. Instead of chasing love, they chase money. But when the hero returns, they fake their deaths—only to find the heroines have followed them back to the real world with a system in hand. EP 1:Alex and Ryan, who have been living in the novel world for three years, discover that the male lead, Ethan Ward, has returned. This threatens their plans as Ryan faces death and Alex risks losing his legs. Meanwhile, tensions rise with the Wards, and Alex considers leaving the company.Will Alex and Ryan manage to escape their fates as the male lead takes center stage?

column1: Steal My Son's Wife? No Way!
column4:
Grace Shaw, a financial titan, returns home from a national duty to a nightmare: her son is comatose, and her daughter-in-law is being forced into a marriage. When the groom publicly shames her family, Grace steps in. How far will she go to extract an unimaginable price?
 EP 1:Grace Shaw, a financial titan, steps into a high-stakes gamble where the economic lifeline of Veridia is at stake, wagering everything from oil rights to the nation's entire financial sector to protect her country's future.Will Grace Shaw's bold gamble secure Veridia's future or lead to its downfall?

After three years of marriage, Evelyn discovers her marriage was a lie. Replaced by her sister and betrayed by her husband and family, she loses everything—including her unborn child. But she rises stronger, returning to the corporate world to crush her cheating husband, expose her family’s lies, and fight for the happiness she truly deserves.

Ryan Lynn, once a lost rich heir, became the Master of Dragonfall Peak.  Attending his sister Yvonne's wedding, he discovered her fiancé's family looked down on her for being "poor."  So he stormed the fiancé's new engagement.  And unexpectedly, he reunited with his billionaire birth father.  Now he can humiliate the rivals and reclaiming Yvonne's husband! EP 1:Ryan Lynn, the newly appointed Master of Dragonfall Peak, leaves his mountain sanctuary to attend his sister Yvonne's engagement, only to discover her fiancé's wealthy family looks down on her for being 'poor.' Armed with the power of the Sacred Flame Token and an unlimited Centurion Card, Ryan vows to protect Yvonne from humiliation and ensure her happiness, setting the stage for a dramatic confrontation.Will Ryan's intervention be enough to save Yvonne's engagement and dignity?

Killed by a disciple, Grandmaster Arthur's soul possessed an abandoned disciple. Disguised as a prodigal, he trained his sister to expose conspiracies in the sect trial. After avenging the original host's murder, he rebuilt his immortal body... EP 1:Grandmaster Arthur's soul possesses Jasper White's body after his original form is destroyed. He returns to the Iron Fist Sect, which is on the verge of collapse due to poor performance in the Verdant Trial. Despite being deemed useless by the Sect members, Arthur stands up for Jasper's honor and shocks everyone by revealing his true identity.Will the Iron Fist Sect believe Arthur's true identity and accept his help to survive the Verdant Trial?

column1: The Mafia Boss Reborn as Trash?
column4: Stained by a lifetime of sin, Jasper gets hurled through time and trapped in the body of a nobody who sold his family’s food for wine. Magically, he can see glimpses of threats, hidden fortunes, and souls who will alter his path. This time, he must forge a new life for redemption… but can a man who once ruled with violence learn to protect with love? EP 1:Jasper, a former mafia boss seeking liberation from his sinful past, finds himself reborn in the body of a nobody who traded his family's food for wine. As he awakens in a new world, he discovers the love and struggles of a family he never had, setting the stage for his journey of redemption.Will Jasper embrace his newfound family and change his violent ways for love?

​Michelin chef Hugh is thrown into Republican-era China as a gambler named Leo "The Hound." To protect Iris from loan shark Tyr "The Tiger", he must use his culinary skills to clear a double debt in three days. But his success pulls him into a conspiracy far deeper than he imagined, making him question if he can truly escape the web of fate.​ EP 1:Michelin chef Hugh finds himself unexpectedly transported to Republican-era China, awakening in a stranger's home where he is mistaken for a gambler named Leo 'The Hound'. Confronted with a desperate plea from a woman who fears being sold to pay off debts, Hugh realizes he must navigate this unfamiliar world and use his culinary skills to survive and protect those around him.How will Hugh use his culinary expertise to change the fate of those he's just met?

After dying as the Dragon Corp’s ruthless CEO, Marcus wakes up in the body of a bullied teen, Ethan. Framed by his fake brother and scolded by his family, he vows to start over. When old subordinates find him and classmates test him, his hidden power shakes the whole school, but that’s just the beginning… EP 1:After dying as the ruthless CEO of Dragon Corp, Marcus wakes up in the body of Ethan, a bullied teen framed by his fake brother Tyler. As Marcus adjusts to his new life, he uncovers the dark truth about his 'family' and vows to turn the tables, starting with exposing Tyler's betrayal.Will Marcus succeed in exposing Tyler and reclaiming his life, or will the family's lies consume him first?

Across eighteen bitter lifetimes, Amelia has haunted by one memory: being abandoned at the altar by Simon. When an amnesiac Simon appears in her modern life, she seizes the chance for revenge. But her plan crumbles. Now she must choose:  finally claim her vengeance, or save the man who can't even remember his sin. EP 1:Amelia confronts Simon, the man who left her at the altar 800 years ago, only to find he has no memory of their past. Fueled by centuries of pain, she vows revenge by making him fall in love with her just to abandon him as he once did.Will Amelia's plan for revenge succeed, or will Simon's forgotten past resurface to change everything?

Clara hid her status as an heiress for love, but her boyfriend and bestie betrayed her, plotting to take everything. But they never saw one thing coming: her father. The real boss is back, and their game is over. This is his game now. Let the reckoning begin! EP 1:Clara's father, Mr. Lawson, returns and expresses doubts about Ethan, Clara's boyfriend. Despite Clara's defense of Ethan's character and achievements, Mr. Lawson decides to test Ethan himself. Meanwhile, Ethan and Joyce's secret affair is nearly exposed when someone almost discovers them in a compromising situation.Will Ethan pass Mr. Lawson's test, or will his betrayal with Joyce be revealed?

When a girl struggling to save her sick mother crosses paths with a powerful man, a chain of misunderstandings tears their worlds apart. She’s called a liar, a thief, even a con artist—but the truth behind their bond is far deeper than anyone dares to imagine. Until one secret shatters everything. EP 1:A young girl begs for money to save her comatose mother, facing accusations of being a liar until a kind stranger believes her story and offers help, while she clings to a jade amulet that holds the key to finding her father.Will the jade amulet lead her to her father and the salvation her mother desperately needs?

Poisoned into silence by her own mother, Clara has lived a life of fear and control. Every attempt to break free seems hopeless—until mysterious man enters her world. Can he help her escape, or will the shadows of her past hold her forever? EP 1:Clara, who has been poisoned into silence by her mother, faces a moment of confrontation when a mysterious man challenges her to break free, leading to a tense encounter with her mother and a doctor.Will Clara finally find the courage to defy her mother and escape her silent prison?

In a kingdom where women are forbidden to study, a daring young woman disguises herself as a man and sneaks into the empire’s top academy.
There, she meets a mysterious classmate — a prince in hiding — and the two become inseparable.
But when her secret identity and an unwanted engagement threaten to destroy everything, love turns into rebellion.
In a world ruled by power and prejudice, one hidden heart could change the fate of an empire. EP 1:Evelyn defies the kingdom's law by studying and writing, leading to a violent confrontation with her father, who insists she marry the disreputable Victor Ashbourne. Meanwhile, a disguised prince arrives at Greenmount Academy, setting the stage for an unexpected encounter with Evelyn.Will Evelyn successfully escape her father's control and reach Greenmount Academy?

column1: Once His Pawn, Now Their Queen
column4: For over a decade, Keira had lived a life of duty, her every breath and action in the royal court a testament to service for others. But when betrayal left her shattered and her world in ruins, a devastating truth surfaces. Granted a second life, she decides to live for herself… but what consequences await? Only time will tell. EP 1:Keira, once a loyal servant to the Emperor, faces a brutal betrayal by Chancellor Clarke and her own sister, Mason, leading to her execution. However, she is miraculously reborn as the Chancellor herself, vowing revenge and a second chance at life.Will Keira's newfound power and knowledge be enough to exact her revenge and change her fate?

After enduring relentless abuse from her three brothers, the younger sister volunteered for a human cryopreservation experiment—sleeping for three decades, three brothers regret. EP 1:Selene, after enduring abuse from her adoptive family, especially her three brothers, decides to volunteer for a 30-year cryopreservation experiment to escape her painful reality, leaving behind her past life and the people who once promised to protect her.What will happen when Selene wakes up after 30 years, and will her brothers regret their actions?

column1: (Dubbed)No More Hiding: I'm The Drift King!
column4: Former racing legend Chase Walker has lived under the radar as a humble mechanic in countryside for five years. However, the Raptor Riders shows up, challenging the locals to a high-stakes race. With the town’s future at stake, Chase must decide: stay hidden or dust off his skills for one last ride. Can the washed-up champion outdrive his past—and save their home? EP 1:Hugo Huang, an undefeated racing champion, returns home unexpectedly before the EuroSpeed Grand Prix, seeking to challenge the missing legend Winston Chen, who disappeared five years ago. Meanwhile, tensions rise as a rival team plans to take over a local road for training, setting the stage for a high-stakes confrontation.Will Winston Chen come out of hiding to face Hugo Huang's challenge and protect his hometown?

column1: (Dubbed)Afraid of Me? I’m Just a Rookie!
column4: Yannick Young thought he was just another weak disciple. But when he aces a deadly sect trial, the truth hits—he’s anything but ordinary. Jealous rivals, secret mentors, and ancient enemies stand in his way. Is he ready to claim the power he never knew he had? EP 1:Yannick's true strength is revealed when he effortlessly defeats a supposedly invincible opponent, shocking onlookers and attracting the attention of powerful sects. As he prepares to leave his mentors and join the Celestial Academy's Disciple Trials, they gift him a mysterious and powerful jade token, hinting at greater adventures and dangers ahead.What secrets does the jade token hold, and how will it shape Yannick's journey in the Celestial Academy?

column1: Mess with Cinderella? Her Queen Mom Is Here!
column4: 20 years ago, Alice Curry was taken from her mom by her grandpa and endured a difficult life. Decades later, her mother, Viola Bates, CEO of Bates Group, found and reunited with her—initially without revealing her identity. During this time, Alice faced mistreatment from her boyfriend Alston Welch and his family. At a banquet, Viola publicly revealed her identity, leading to consequences for the Welch family. Viola also reformed the corporate culture within her group. EP 1:Viola Bates, the powerful CEO of Bates Group, secretly reunites with her long-lost daughter Alice after 20 years of separation, initially without revealing her true identity, setting the stage for a dramatic confrontation with the Welch family who mistreated Alice.How will Viola's public revelation of her identity impact Alice's relationship with the Welch family?

column1: He Loves My Sis? I Swap My Groom.
column4: Vivian Sullivan’s perfect wedding turns into a nightmare when she learns her fiancé, Damian Ford, loves her half-sister, Ivy. Used as a shield, she walks away and marries the blind Cooper heir. But when the truth resurfaces and old flames ignite... will love or revenge win this time? EP 1:Vivian's wedding plans are shattered when she discovers her fiancé Damian loves her half-sister Ivy, leading to a dramatic confrontation where Ivy demands to switch places, marrying the blind Cooper heir while Vivian takes her spot as the billionaire's wife, revealing dark family secrets and past betrayals.Will Vivian's decision to marry a blind stranger lead to revenge or unexpected love?

column1: Oops! My Boss Has A Crush on Me!
column4: CEO Ethan Hamilton had secretly loved his employee Chloe for ten years. After knowing that she's single again, he immediately proposed. Chloe thought it was a marriage of convenience, but... EP 1:Chloe arrives late to a gathering where it's revealed that Sean had only pursued her as part of a cruel bet, leading to their breakup and leaving Chloe humiliated. Meanwhile, CEO Ethan Hamilton, who has secretly loved Chloe for ten years, is informed of the breakup and decides to take action.Will Ethan step in to comfort Chloe and reveal his true feelings?

column1: Flood or Fraud: The Emperor’s Awakening
column4: Hidden away for eighteen years, Crown Prince Samuel Young is sent to the frontlines as a humble river inspector. When he exposes Governor Ryan Anderson’s corruption, a deadly hunt begins. But as the Emperor himself heads to Southville, one question remains—who’s really pulling the strings behind the crown? EP 1:Crown Prince Samuel Young confronts his father, Emperor Jeffrey Young, in a dream, accusing him of corruption that led to the deadly flood due to the poorly constructed Blackriver Dam. Meanwhile, the Emperor, unaware of the dam's actual condition, plans to visit Southville to reunite with his son. As Samuel attempts to expose Governor Ryan Anderson's corruption, he faces a deadly threat, with the Emperor's arrival adding to the tension.Will the Emperor discover the truth about the dam and his son's fate before it's too late?

column1: Your Luck’s Run Out. Shoo, Scumbag!
column4: She traded her future for his dream, betting everything on forever. But forever has its price, and when she stopped paying, everything crashed. Now he must face the truth: some debts love can’t forgive. EP 1:Rose Sanders, a rising star at Aurelia Group, resigns to support her benefactor, Amos Lane, during his startup's toughest times. She helps him build Lane Group into one of Valemont's top companies and secures its success in foreign markets. However, upon her return, she faces Amos's unexpected hostility, hinting at a deep betrayal.What caused Amos to turn against Rose after all they've been through together?

column1: (Dubbed)Wait, My Beggar Husband Is the Emperor?
column4:
During a bridal ball toss, two sisters cast their destinies into the air.
The elder’s ball lands with a nobleman; the younger’s, in the hands of a beggar.
One rises to glory. The other dies in regret—until time turns back.
Given a second chance, the younger sister rewrites the moment.
But what if the beggar holds a secret, and fate has its own design? EP 1:Lady Evelyn Sterling and her sister Josephine are given a second chance to alter their destinies during a bridal ball toss. Evelyn, who previously married a beggar and died in regret, now aims to secure a nobleman, while Josephine, who was reborn as well, schemes to marry Adrian Montague, unaware of the dangerous future that awaits her.Will Josephine's ambition lead her to a fate worse than death, or will Evelyn's caution save them both?

column1: My 8-Year-Old Self Is A Top Gun
column4: Tim is a legendary ace pilot, but fate sent him back. He is now an eight-year-old boy on the doomed flight. At 30,000 feet, Everyone is minutes from death. Armed with a man’s mind in a child’s body, he must do the impossible,The controls are out of reach, time is running out, and this time, if he fails, his father dies again. EP 1:Tim, a legendary ace pilot, finds himself mysteriously transported back to his eight-year-old self on the doomed flight where his father died. Armed with the knowledge of the impending crash and his adult mind, he desperately tries to warn his father and the passengers, but faces skepticism and ridicule. As strange events unfold in the cockpit, time is running out to prevent the tragedy.Can Tim convince his father and the crew in time to avert the disaster?

Lisa, the true daughter, returns to a family that never wanted her and dies for it. Yet death isn't the end. Shadows rise, truths twist, and vengeance whispers through the halls of the Wallace manor. When justice fails the living… will the dead take it into their own hands? EP 1:Lisa confronts her father with her impending death, revealing the deep-seated rejection and betrayal she's faced from her family, including being framed and expelled, which led to her tragic end. However, death isn't the end for Lisa as she vows revenge, starting with a grand celebration for Molly, the favored daughter, hinting at the dark turn her vengeance will take.Will Lisa's family regret their cruelty when her revenge begins?

Sophie Buist and Andre Cedeno, York's most infamous couple. After five volatile years of love and loathing, Sophie's life ends tragically. Granted five final days to return, she must hear Andre confess his love to resurrect. But Andre, deceived by his first love Betty, coldly rejects her pleas. As time expires, Sophie vanishes into eternity—the moment Andre uncovers Betty's lies. He has lost his true love, and her five-day return begins his lifelong torment. EP 1:Sophie Buist recounts the tumultuous five years of her marriage with Andre Cedeno, marked by betrayal, revenge, and mutual curses. From public humiliations to life-threatening pranks, their love-hate relationship reaches a climax when Sophie, on the verge of death, calls Andre for reconciliation, only to be ignored as he prioritizes his first love, Betty. In her final moments, Sophie reminds Andre of his cruel wish for her demise, vanishing as he realizes the depth of his loss.Will Andre uncover the truth about Betty before it's too late to save Sophie?

column1: My Ex, My Patient, My Child’s Father
column4: At 19, Emily thought her love with bad boy Victor was strong enough to overcome any obstacle. Then he shattered her heart with a cruel lie. Now, five years later, she returns as a top surgeon, with a child he knows nothing about. When fate lands him as her patient, will their old wounds heal or be torn wide open? EP 1:Emily confronts Victor about his cruel breakup and learns the devastating truth behind his betrayal. Years later, as a successful surgeon, she faces Victor again when he becomes her patient, reopening old wounds while she strives to protect her secret son.Will Emily's secret be revealed when Victor wakes up?

Mary joins a tour with her memory-impaired husband to relive their past, but a mistaken identity leads to humiliation by the guide. When the truth comes out, the guide falls into regret and ruin—while Mary and her husband rediscover their long-lost sweetness. EP 1:Mary takes her memory-impaired husband on a nostalgic trip to Ivan Island to relive their past, but the tour guide mistakenly humiliates them, unaware they are the CEO's parents. Meanwhile, the CEO arranges for special care for his parents, setting the stage for a dramatic revelation.Will the guide realize her mistake before it's too late?

Born a commoner, Emperor Leon Hart disguises himself to uncover corruption spreading across his empire. From local greed to high-court betrayal, every truth leads closer to home—forcing him to choose between justice, family, and the soul of the Luminas Empire.
 EP 1:Emperor Leon Hart discovers the whereabouts of his long-lost sister, Princess Lara, who was taken by the fallen dynasty years ago. Determined to bring her home with honor, he decides to travel in disguise to Cloudvale to reunite with her, despite concerns from his advisors about her current character and the stability of the newly founded Luminas Empire.Will Princess Lara live up to Emperor Leon's expectations, or will her past reveal unexpected dangers?

column1: Reborn as the Rich Family's Darling
column4: Reborn, Chloe has one goal: to destroy the Watsons. Her weapon is the power of the rival Taylors. Her move is to win the hearts of Hugo and Noah. But when revenge turns into desire, love becomes her greatest trap. How far will she go before it consumes her? EP 1:Chloe, reborn into the Watson family, is betrayed by her father and brothers who force her into a marriage with an older CEO for their family's benefit. Refusing to comply, she chooses death over submission, setting the stage for her revenge.Will Chloe's death lead to her ultimate revenge against the Watsons?

Rita Alley, the Holy Maiden of Hmong, descends to lift Liam Garner's curse but faces his arrogance and betrayal. Despite repeated vengeful attacks from both Liam Garner and her senior fellow apprentice Hank Wade, justice is served, allowing Rita to return safely to her mountain. EP 1:Rita Alley, the Holy Maiden of Hmong, is sought out by Manuel Garner, the richest person in Kyohea, to save his son Liam from a deadly sorcery poison. Despite her concerns about leaving Verdant Mountain and weakening her powers, she agrees to help under the promise of protection symbolized by a powerful token.Will Rita's journey to Kyohea lead to unforeseen dangers as she risks her safety to save Liam?

Ella's a starving orphan abused by her adoptive family, until Mr. CEO, George Lynn, comes searching for a Companion for his little girl. Unexpectedly, he feels a strong connection to this ragged girl... And to save the dying man who helped her, Ella decides to go with George, who's actually her real father... EP 1:Ella, a starving orphan, endures abuse from her adoptive family while George Lynn, a CEO, searches for a companion for his daughter Zara, who is struggling with emotional issues. The episode sets the stage for Ella's potential new life and the challenges she might face with Zara.Will Ella be able to survive in her new environment and form a bond with Zara?

column1: The Sold Bride Returns for Revenge
column4: Kidnapped and nearly forced into marriage in a remote village, Lydia Lane risks her life to escape back to the city. But waiting for her are the father who sold her and the girl who took her place. Cunning yet fearless, Lydia vows to take back everything she lost. But when revenge meets redemption, what will she choose? EP 1:Lydia, kidnapped and nearly forced into marriage, makes a desperate escape attempt through the river but is tragically recaptured by the villagers, highlighting her relentless fight for freedom against seemingly insurmountable odds.Will Lydia find another way to escape her grim fate or will she be forced into marriage?

As the wealthiest man in Silverbrook, John Grant hid his identity for years to care for his wife, Monica Lane. When he planned to promote her as the next factory director, he discovered she had been cheating for years. Their children also rejected him as their father. On New Year's Eve, Monica and her lover kicked him out. Heartbroken, John decided to reclaim his fortune and take back everything he gave them. EP 1:John Grant, the wealthiest man in Silverbrook who has been hiding his identity to care for his family, discovers his wife Monica's infidelity through a love bite and lingerie meant for another man, Benjamin Wood, leading to a confrontation about her secret life.Will John's discovery of Monica's affair lead him to reveal his true identity and reclaim his life?

In high school, Mia Smith fell victim to bullying by Madeline Trott and her clique, ultimately coerced into dropping out. Years later, she gained admission to university with outstanding academic performance, harboring a resolve for revenge. Targeting Madeline’s romance with Shawn Shane, Mia wove her schemes incrementally. Will Madeline and Shawn’s conspiracies ever be uncovered? EP 1:Mia confronts her painful past where she was bullied and betrayed by Madeline and even her own mother, leading to her disappearance at nineteen. Now, she reveals her true intentions to Reyn, who she accuses of being worse than her tormentors, marking the beginning of her calculated revenge.Will Mia's revenge bring her the justice she seeks, or will it consume her completely?

After six years of marriage, Sophie learns her husband's darkest secret. Heartbroken, she walks away, only to rise again as a brilliant scientist. But just as she's ready to start anew, her regretful ex comes begging for another chance... what will she choose? EP 1:Sophie's daughter, Ivy, falls critically ill with multiple viral infections requiring urgent medical attention. Despite her desperate calls, Gavin, Sophie's ex-husband, is preoccupied celebrating his lover's dog's birthday, showing complete disregard for his sick child. Meanwhile, Sophie is confronted with her past as a brilliant medical prodigy, as a colleague urges her to return to her scientific career, highlighting the sacrifices she made for her family. The episode culminates in Ivy rejecting Sophie's comfort, asking for Gavin's lover instead, deepening Sophie's heartbreak and resolve.Will Sophie reclaim her identity as a scientist and leave her painful past behind, or will she give Gavin another chance to mend their broken family?

column1: My Beggar Groom Is A Billionaire
column4: When Mr. CEO Charles disguised as a beggar finds true love, his ex exposes his "poverty" to the bride's family. Now his wedding procession is blocked by an angry mob while his bride is being told he abandoned her and forced to marry another! Can he reveal his true identity before she says "I do" to the wrong man? EP 1:Charles York, disguised as a beggar, encounters his old classmates, including his first love Jean, who is shocked by his current state. Little do they know, Charles is actually a billionaire testing people's kindness, and he plans to reward those who helped him with life-changing funds.Will Charles reveal his true identity to Jean before she finds out the shocking truth?

column1: Once His Bride, Now His Lesson
column4: Betrayed by the man she loved, Princess Serena watched her kingdom fall and her true protector, Derek, die in her arms. Reborn before it all began, she swears to guard him this time—even if it means defying fate itself. But when Liam’s desire turns deadly again… who will she save, and who will she lose? EP 1:Princess Serena experiences a traumatic betrayal by Liam, leading to the fall of her kingdom and the death of her true protector, Derek. In a shocking twist, she awakens to find herself reborn in the past, on the day of her coming-of-age ceremony, with a chance to change her fate.Will Serena be able to alter the course of events and protect Derek this time, or is history doomed to repeat itself?

Though grounded in the Cold Palace, Elizabeth is actually blessed with luck. So when she's back to court, she becomes a "baby-blessing star," ending the curse of high infant mortality. With incredible wisdom, she revolutionizes the empire with glass-making skills, the skill of abacus, and agricultural techniques... EP 1:Elizabeth Smith, a former lab worker, wakes up in the Great Cansite after making a wish to escape her routine. She discovers she has a seemingly useless special power, 'Little jinx,' and deals with sibling rivalry and dramatic confrontations.Will Elizabeth's 'Little jinx' power turn out to be more significant than she thinks?

column1: In Love with My Husband’s Uncle
column4: Forced into a loveless marriage, Freya finds herself in a forbidden love with her husband's powerful uncle. In a treacherous game of passion and power, she dances with the devil, risking everything for a chance at love and vengeance… But when the hidden passion ignites, can she secure her future without shattering both their worlds? EP 1:Freya is pressured to conceive a child to secure her position in the family, while Wilson deals with a mole in his organization, leading to a dramatic confrontation and a dangerous setup that ends with Wilson drugged and in a compromising situation with Freya.What will happen when Wilson realizes the truth about the night he spent with Freya?

Mona, the last survivor of her family, infiltrates the gang that killed them. Her target is its ruthless leader, Chase. But when she finds her parents' photo in his room and he risks his life to save her, hate slowly turns into something else. Could the man she swore to kill be her enemy... or her only ally? EP 1:Mona, celebrating her acceptance to the police academy with her proud parents, witnesses their brutal murder by Chase Lynch, a ruthless gang leader, forcing her to abandon her dreams and seek vengeance.Will Mona survive the gang's pursuit and uncover the truth behind her parents' murder?

column1: My Wife is a Mute, I am a God
column4: Once a golden god, Lucius Reed falls from the heavens and awakes in the body of a ruined gambler, only to find himself bound to an extremely beautiful yet cruelly mistreated mute wife. He sets out on one clear mission: to help her reclaim her stolen voice. But how can a fallen god, trapped in a debtor's flesh, achieve such a miracle? EP 1:Lucius Reed, a former golden god, gambles his divine status for a chance to become a True God, but fails and is forced into a massive debt, leading him to rebirth as a human to escape his fate.What will Lucius do now that he's trapped in a human body with a mute wife?

Billionaire James, dying and filled with regret, returns home to rebuild his broken family. His brilliant grandson Ethan joins him not for wealth, but for truth. Together, they face ruthless rivals and uncover who killed Phil. Justice, power, redemption… but when the last secret surfaces, will their family truly heal or break again… EP 1:Billionaire James Sanders, diagnosed with only three months to live, returns home after twenty years to reconnect with his family, including his grandson Ethan, and begins to address his past regrets while preparing to take control of Goldspire Group once more.What long-buried family secrets will James uncover upon his return?

column1: The Empire’s Mother: Reborn to Save All
column4: 60 years after her death, the founding empress Evelyn Lorne awakens in the body of a traitor’s daughter. To save her ailing son, now the emperor, she must expose corruption, outsmart scheming princes, and confront a disciple who once loved her. Will history repeat itself or be rewritten? EP 1:Evelyn Lorne, the founding empress, awakens 60 years after her death in the body of a traitor's daughter. Confused and desperate, she learns her son Edward is now the ailing emperor. Determined to save him, she confronts a prince who disrespects her, revealing her true identity and demanding to see Edward.Will Evelyn's sudden return shock the empire and change its fate?

column1: I Bullied Him, Now He’s My Husband
column4: Modern girl Shaw Lynn wakes up as Moon Chase, the villainess fated for a brutal death. To survive, she tricks the cold prince Lance Sullivan into marriage. Using her modern smarts, she wins his heart and changes fate. But when power and love collide, will she survive the ending? EP 1:Moon Chase, previously a cruel tormentor to Prince Lance Sullivan, finds herself in a dire situation as her family is wiped out and she faces execution. However, in a twist of fate, she suddenly awakens in what seems like a dream, encountering a familiar yet mysterious man.Will Moon Chase be able to alter her fate and survive the prince's wrath?

From a humble childhood, Rohan has dreamed of becoming a master chef. When a chance at the prestigious Royal Hotel arises, he faces the legendary chef Anirudh. Will he earn the chance to prove his talent, or will the kitchen crush his dreams? Who will rise… and who will burn out? EP 1:The Mysterious Master Chef RR wins the national competition for the third time, solidifying his legendary status, while unseen enemies plot his downfall during his celebratory appearance.Will RR escape the trap set by his adversaries, or will this be the end of his culinary reign?

column1: The Goddess He Wrongly Cast Away
column4: Once a goddess, Sera Vale saves General Damian Ashford with a forbidden Serpent Rite. He vows to marry her, but years later returns with Saintess Selene, who claims his victory was her doing. Branded a liar and cast aside, Sera’s divinity awakens. When the truth surfaces… who will burn? EP 1:During a severe drought, Sera Vale, once a goddess, saves General Damian Ashford's life using the forbidden Serpent Rite, transferring her divine power to him through intercourse. Years later, Damian returns with gifts for Sera, but tensions arise as his true intentions and loyalty are questioned by those around them.Will Damian's return bring peace or further conflict to Duskland?

She was born with heaven’s luck—until a reborn thief stole her charm and her life. Luckily, fate returns what’s hers: fortune, family, and truth. But luck cuts both ways… Who rises, who falls, and who pays destiny’s price? EP 1:Cathy discovers her silver locket has been stolen by Susan, a fellow orphan who resents Cathy's supposed luck and takes her place in being adopted by the wealthy Kim family, leaving Cathy abandoned and desperate.Will Cathy ever reclaim her stolen fortune and find her true family?

Master Morn braved celestial tribulation for love, tampered with the Book of Life and Death in defiance of destiny, and descended the mountain with the Past-Life Covenant, in pursuit of his reincarnated beloved. Yet the bliss of reunion was not to be his. Wynsen Yune, her heart clouded by the lingering anguish of being a "substitute," spurned their karmic bond. Did their fates irreparably severed? EP 1:Master Morn and Wynmar arrive at the Yune Clan to find their reincarnated beloveds, only to discover that Wynsen Yune, now a granddaughter, is already engaged. The situation escalates when Master Morn presents the past-life covenant, revealing his claim over her, despite her current engagement.Will Wynsen Yune honor the past-life covenant or proceed with her current engagement to the Zenn Clan?

James Morrison, Dahea’s first international bartender champ, returns home to honor a dying friend by helping Emily Clark run her bar. But when Kevin Phillips doubts his championship, a high-stakes showdown begins. Will James defend his hard-won fame… or lose it all? EP 1:James Morrison, the newly crowned 'God of Wine', is absent from his award ceremony due to an urgent call about Mr. Clark's deteriorating health, leaving the crowd and the Overseas Bartenders Association of Dahea in suspense.Will James make it back in time to receive his prestigious award, or will his sudden departure cost him his hard-earned recognition?

She worked as his ordinary assistant, hiding her true identity. Always silent, always unseen. Just when they seemed close… a power-marriage announcement shattered it all. She walked away. He thought she was just a secretary. But the woman no one suspected… holds all the cards. Who’s really in control… EP 1:Carol, Mr. Grant's executive assistant and secret lover, navigates their clandestine relationship while managing his demanding schedule, only for their dynamic to be interrupted by a sudden corporate crisis when the company's system is hacked.Will Carol and Mr. Grant's secret relationship survive the looming corporate crisis?

column1: (Dubbed)Drift King: Rise of the Phantom Racer
column4: On the remote mountain roads, a young mechanic hides a secret talent. Thrown into a world where raw speed clashes with ruthless ambition, his ordinary life collides with pride, betrayal, and buried legacies. Is he ready to claim the destiny waiting at full throttle? EP 1:Racers from everywhere flock to Ori Peak for a chance to earn a spot in the MY Racing League qualifiers by beating the 20-minute mark, with Shawn achieving an impressive time of 19 minutes and 53 seconds, just a second behind Vanguard's captain. Meanwhile, rumors of the legendary Phantom Racer's existence and unmatched skills spark intrigue and debate among the racers.Will the Phantom Racer make an appearance in the qualifiers and prove the rumors true?

Hugo falls for a girl he shouldn't and ends up expelled, broke, and barely getting by. Just when all seems lost, Ariel, his legendary ancestor who built three great houses into local powers, returns to set things right. Turns out, greatness and karma run in the family... EP 1:Hugo's life takes a bizarre turn when an archaeological team uncovers an unidentified tomb, leading to the unexpected appearance of an old woman claiming to be his long-lost great-grandmother, Ariel Blackwell, who supposedly left sixty years ago to seek ascendance.Will Hugo uncover the truth behind Ariel's mysterious return and her connection to his family's past?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Rich Family Feud', 'Sweet Romance']

column4: Sister-murdered after becoming the richest man’s wife, Luna Hart is reborn, trapped in a forced marriage to a playboy and framed by her runaway sister. Done with their cruelty, she marries "security guard" Elias Knight to escape. But will this wild bet save her… or land her in deadlier trouble? Who is Elias, really? EP 1:Luna Hart, reborn after being murdered by her sister Chloe, finds herself trapped in a forced marriage arranged by her father. As memories of her past life flood back, she vows to change her fate, but her defiance leads to a dramatic confrontation at her wedding.Will Luna's bold defiance at her forced wedding lead her to freedom or deeper into her family's cruel schemes?

Luke, a medical prodigy, was framed and killed by his brother Xander. Reborn with knowledge of the future, Luke meticulously uncovers his conspiracy, exposes Xander's deceit, and claims his rightful place as a genius doctor.
