To break his family’s curse, she sacrificed five years of her life and her power, only to find him betraying her and fathering a child with another woman. Heartbroken, she walked away with one final warning: the curse was never broken...

column1: Lies in Love, Truths in Hatred
column4: On her wedding day, Lila Jones hits rock bottom: best friend Sue kills her mother in a crash, and her fiancé betrays her. Childhood sweetheart Hugo proposes to save her, but it’s a trap to protect Sue. Now Lila’s out for truth and revenge… and every secret she uncovers only twists the web tighter.

column1: (Dubbed) I Gave You 99 Chances to Hurt Me
column4: Ethan hides his status as heir to Sullivan Corp while falling for Clara, promising her 99 chances. But Clara's loyalty to Finn keeps testing him, while Luna Sorrel quietly waits in the wings. Secrets, rivalries, and misunderstandings threaten to turn love upside down... some lessons are just hard to learn.

Nearly frozen to death as a child, Clara survives and trains overseas to grow strong enough to protect her family. Years later, her father’s death pulls her back into a ruthless power war. A rigged boardroom, a murder frame-up, and enemies hiding behind blood ties. To save her family, how far is she willing to go…

column1: Reborn As Grandma, I Rewrite Mom's Fate
column4: Agricultural scientist Grace Archer wins a major research award but returns home to horror: her abusive father stole everything and beat her mother before fleeing. Chasing him, Grace dies in a car crash and wakes up in 1970 inside her dying grandmother's body. Now she has one chance to save her young mother from a lifetime of suffering...

column1: Reborn, Crowned, and Far Above My Ex
column4: Once stripped of her title and reduced to a concubine, Diana returns with a stolen birthright and a razor-sharp mind. A healer cloaked in schemes, she shreds old vows, unmasks deadly lies, and forges a dangerous alliance with a feared justice lord cursed by poison. Revenge is only the first step. When blood, love, and fate collide, who will be left standing…

In 1945, genius scientist Eleanor Grace Whitmore dies at an awards gala—only to awaken eighty years later as 18-year-old Eleanor Hawthorne. With her sharp mind intact, she mends a fractured dynasty, outsmarts skeptics, reclaims lost research vital to aerospace and energy, and restores her family’s power and pride.

column1: Huh? That Loser's A Top-Tier Master!
column4: Silas Zeller transmigrated to the Cultivation World, posing as a loser to hide his true identity as the ruthless Yama. His father-in-law Yves Lewis, greedy to curry favor with the Ward Family, forced him to divorce Lila Lewis, with the condition that he could keep the marriage if he won first place in the Recruitment Tournament. Silas deliberately concealed his strength...

To flee a forced marriage with Jake, Layla weds Ethan, a handsome slum-bred mechanic. Embracing his humble life, she is stunned as Ethan effortlessly crushes Jake’s provocations with elite skill. As secrets unravel, Layla discovers her "poor" husband is a hidden billionaire heir. Their accidental romance hides a billion-dollar secret.

column1: Kidding? That Washer Guy's a Racing PRO!
column4: Jack Lynn, the Racing Master, lives a low-key life as a car washer. In his prime, He dominated the tracks with top-tier driving skills, until a scheme orchestrated by the Axis men claimed his wife's life. Shattered by the loss, he retired from the world of racing. However, his son Ryan Lynn fell into a trap set by the same Axis men in an illegal street race. To save his son, Jack...

column1: What? My Lover is an Undercover Cop!
column4: Police cadet Ethan Cole infiltrates Chinatown's most powerful crime syndicate, rising to gain the trust of its leader, Marcus Fox, and the heart of his daughter, Iris. As he closes in on the truth, his own identity becomes the greatest threat. Can he bring down the empire without destroying the woman he loves?

column1: Stolen Cash, Broken Card, Bloody Payback
column4: After a faulty ATM stole Yuna's card and money, the bank refused to help. Then, it spit out cash. But when that card became vital to saving her mother's life, the bank blocked her completely.   Forced into a corner, she gave them a taste of their own medicine and they were left to choke on it.

column1: Oh no! Four man all love me
column4: If you could change the past, which moment would you choose? Oh no! Four Men All Love Me tells the story of Sofia, 25, who, at her lowest point, receives four mysterious cards, each leading her to a romantic encounter with a different ideal man. From a top lawyer to a violinist, a domineering CEO to a pop idol, she seeks true love and her own path forward.

To survive, Adrian plays Crownspire’s Golden Rogue, hiding steel beneath swagger. When a contest for Princess Grace’s hand disgraces Auren, he finally reveals a sliver of his true skill, shaking the court and alarming the very family he intends to ruin. As power shifts and masks crack, Adrian tightens the trap he has set for years… who will be the first to step into it?

Legendary gambler Henry Smith is framed by his rival Lip Orville and forced into hiding after Lip kills his brother. He is rescued by Sophia and becomes "Carl," a janitor at a Chicago speakeasy. When Lip returns with mafia boss Don Bazzini, Carl is pulled back into gambling and begins plotting his revenge.

column1: My Assistant Is My Lost Love?
column4: 5 years ago, the tycoon John was blinded in an accident and saved by a girl. He promised her a bright future, but she vanished the day he recovered. Now in control of his empire, he's determined to find her. All clues point to assistant Wendy, who denies any connection and keeps avoiding him. John resolves to unravel the truth and prove his love.

Ethan Fox ruins Lina Lee’s family for revenge, only to discover that the Cox Family framed both sides. After Lina’s suicide attempt and terminal illness, Ethan saves her, but can he fix the damage he’s done?

column1: My Doomed Stand-in Bride, True Love!
column4: Zane promises to marry Fiona to repay a kindness. But a fortune teller says he is fated to lose one wife and one child. So, Zane finds Willa to take this unlucky role, but slowly, he falls in love with her. Now, Willa is in difficult childbirth. What will Zane do? And he learns a deeper secret…

Betrayed by his families on Christmas Eve, Richard Manson, the former Chairman of the Board, decides to make his family pay for their shallowness. With Lydia's help, he punishes those who wronged him and finally finds true love.

A princess sent north to seal an alliance is summoned back to the capital for her mother’s funeral, only to step into a court ruled by cruelty. Taken for a servant, she is humiliated and broken by a new consort hungry for favor. A shattered jade, a stolen life, and a secret buried in blood. When the Emperor appears, will justice rise… or will the palace burn?

Karina Chole, a college student with a lifelong dream to be a reporter, fell for gang wanderer Richard Yates. Pressed by Karina’s mother, Richard feigned betrayal to protect her future, sending her off to Bryten for studies. Five years later, Karina went undercover for gang fights in Rivenhold, only to find with...

column1: My Sis Kills My Bad Romance
column4: After their parents' passing, Mary supported Allen through his education and career until he became wealthy. However, his girlfriend Amy aimed to drain his fortune. Mary exposed her hypocrisy at a family banquet. Faced with undeniable evidence, Amy denied everything but was still held legally accountable. By ending this toxic relationship, Mary enabled Allen to rediscover himself.

Joseph, once the legendary Sword King, chose to vanish—living in a remote village as a seemingly ordinary man. He sought only peace, but when the mighty Celestial Armory threatened to seize the village’s mine, peace was no longer an option. With everything at stake, the dormant king awakened… and reclaimed his legend with hammer and flame.

column1: My Wife Cheated, So I Became a God
column4: After his wife dumps him for a rich playboy, security guard Liam Carter awakens a mysterious power. Sworn to protect two women caught in dangerous lies, he's pulled into a web of buried secrets and urban conspiracies. This time, he won't stay weak or walk away...

column1: Hidden Immortal: I Became Her Bodyguard
column4: Ethan, a cultivator sent to the mortal world seeking a breakthrough, accidentally becomes the bodyguard of Yasmine, a billionaire heiress. Surrounded by greedy relatives and deadly assassins, they clash, survive, and grow closer, while racing to uncover the secret of the Spirit Stone...

column1: No Way! My Foster Dad Is a Warlock
column4: The overlord of Downriver, Leonard Collins, raised his adopted son Bowen in anonymity to be a decent man. Years later, Bowen rejected his birth father, Warren Chase. Yet, when Bowen came back from abroad, he was corrupted by money and power, and humiliated Leonard with Warren. When Bowen's about to turn against Leonard, the Collins arrived....

column1: I'll Make You Mine Again... and Again
column4: Ten years ago, Nina Swift's secret love for Ethan Payne ended in his cruel laughter. Now he’s back, and their reunion is no accident. The marriage was his design, but her divorce papers are her revenge. Will she ever say yes again to the man who once shattered her heart?

column1: OMG! The "Pervert" Is A National Hero!
column4: Aerospace legend Ethan Yates, returning home to teach, is falsely accused on a train by an influencer, Violet Chase. At his new university, she fabricates evidence and turns students against him. Ethan has had enough. He's about to teach her a lesson that will end her career. Who will be left standing when the truth takes flight?

Raised as a general's daughter, Aurelia Vale discovers she is the last imperial bloodline of Grandis. Betrayed by the man she once helped ascend the throne, she uncovers a relic tied to the crown itself. As court intrigue and invasion collide, what will she choose: love or the throne?

Charles Lucas developed severe mania after witnessing his mother's death. It improved when he learned his wife was pregnant. However, on their way home, they were confronted by his father's girlfriend, Serena Smith, who deliberately drove the wrong way to provoke them, causing Charles's mania to relapse.

At the Golden Feather Academy, after being rejected, Queen Celine offers her playboy stepbrother Leo a night with her if he can seduce and destroy the boy who refused her—the president's son, Logic. But when Leo's fake pursuit turns real, Celine loses control of Leo forever...

column1: The Flirt Genius Went On Strike!
column4: To fund his sister's cancer treatment, Ryan worked for Catherine's family. He also cared for insomniac CEO Raina, whose sleep depended on him. After Ryan brought hit-and-run driver David to justice, David kidnapped Catherine and Raina. They were rescued, but Ryan collapsed and died. Catherine vowed to study medicine, and Raina departed too.

For five years, billionaire heiress Winnie played fairy godmother to her boyfriend's startup, turning him from broke to billionaire. But when she catches him cheating with his employee, now she's revealing her true identity to destroy the empire she built and teach him the ultimate lesson: never bite the hand that funds you.

column1: Return of the Hades: Crush Enemies with 7 Sisters
column4: Liam “Hades” Wray, former warden of the Godforge, returns home seeking vengeance for his family's murder. Reunited with his seven extraordinary sisters, each a powerhouse in her own right, he must tear through the city's deadly underworld to protect them. But as old enemies surface, Liam discovers his family's tragedy is just the beginning of a far deeper conspiracy. Based on Fanqie Novel Zhan Shen Hui Gui, Bei Jue Se Shi Jie Pian Qu Tong Ju, by Qi Yu De Duo Jiao.

column1: OMG!  “Trash” Me Is A Secret Master!
column4: Evan Shaw's words bend reality itself. Sent into the world, he uses his hidden power to help his father, Marcus, rise. But their success awakens a hidden foe—the ancient ancestor Adam. When tragedy strikes, Evan's true power erupts. Now, he must learn to command the heavens. Will he become its master, or its destroyer?

After a freak elevator accident, John and Angela wake up in each other’s bodies. Forced to live the life they once judged, irritation turns into understanding. As secrets surface and feelings shift, they begin to rediscover themselves in the most unexpected way. But if switching lives changes their hearts, will they ever dare to switch back?

column1: OMG! My Fake Date Is The Billionaire!
column4: Betrayed by her boyfriend and cousin, Sera decides to hire a fake date to pose as the city's elite heir at their wedding. Little does she know, her ex has already set a trap to humiliate her. But the plan backfires when the man she rented turns out to be the real billionaire heir himself. Now the game has changed. How will things develop?

column1: Ex Chose First Love, but I Chose Medicine
column4: Vivian Sullivan devoted six years to her marriage, only to discover Adrian still loves his first love Vanessa. Even their daughter prefers Vanessa. Heartbroken, she files for divorce and returns to medicine, shocking the world as genius "Su". Adrian finally sees Vanessa's true nature and realizes he loves Vivian... but is it too late?

column1: His Part Time Wife Became Real Love
column4: Notorious young master Hector Sterling shocks everyone by marrying nobody Lillian. Truth is, she works five jobs and being Mrs. Sterling is just her best paying gig. She plays perfect wife for this moody billionaire who keeps adding contract demands. But what started as business becomes something more... Can their fake marriage turn real?

Can a Playboy suddenly become a hero overnight? Will Voss, a total prodigal playboy who squandered all his family’s money to chase the village beauty. Finally, his wife can’t stand this anymore and pushed him off the cliff. However, he magically awakens with a superpower system at his funeral. What will he do with the new ability?

After being murdered by his wife Vivian and her friend Stefan, Blake, CEO of Lynn Group, was reborn as a fish. Awakening the "Shock Evolution System," he now gains power by shocking others. As Vivian and Stefan plot to seize his inheritance, they are stalled by Blake's parents—prompting a dangerous plot against them. Learning of the threat, Blake must evolve to survive and protect his family.

Forbidden love, a deadly childbirth, an impossible choice.
Heiress Sophia Grant cuts off her family for love, only to face death in labor. With no money to save her, the man she loves is forced to walk away. She wakes up to loss, betrayal, and his death… Years later, a familiar melody brings the past crashing back. Could he still be alive?!

column1: My 3 Wives Make Me a GOD
column4: After getting killed by his own disciple, Sonny wakes up with a cheat code: a harem system that makes him stronger every time he 'cultivates' with his wives. Too bad the only wives he can get are three supposedly useless women nobody else wanted. Or so he thought, until assassins start showing up trying to steal them.

column1: I Became My Sister to Avenge Her
column4:
Cursed twins, a hidden sister, a brutal death.
In a kingdom where twins are feared, Elena Starling is locked away as a monster, protected only by her sister. When that sister dies on her wedding night, Elena takes her place and enters the prince's estate for revenge. But the truth inside is far deadlier than she imagined…

column1: Bye, Family! I’m Done Being Your Spare!
column4: Once betrayed and burned to death after returning to his birth family, the real heir Heath Slater gets a second life. This time, he cuts all ties, walks away and vows to make everyone who hurt him regret it. Can he really do it? And what will happen to those who look down on him?

Monica Chase, a breakup expert, gets a commission from her husband Yale Green— a scheme by his mistress Wendy Smith to force her divorce. Having uncovered the ugly truth, how will Monica fight back? Can she really do it?

After years away, Luke Tanner comes home to a life hijacked. His marriage is broken, his home violated, and old loyalties exposed. As hidden agendas surface, Luke turns calm into calculation and chaos into control, with one ally quietly at his side. Some reckonings arrive without mercy, just timing.

column1: Morgue Miracle: I Saved Ms. CEO!
column4: Wesley Matt, the Dr. Miracle, from the Sacred Peak, faces disdain from his fiancée Chloe after leaving the Peak. Demoted to the morgue, he senses signs of life in Helen May, pronounced dead, and brings her back to life...

Janice has reincarnated ten times to find the Fated One to break the Eternal Lamp's curse. On a full-moon night, she touches Hector and knows he is the Fated One. To break the curse, he must fall in love with her, yet he distrusts her completely. Left with no choice, what should she do to break the curse?

To save his grandmother, Vincent Kent pulls a stranger—a pregnant woman named Rose Summers—into his family drama, claiming she carries his heir. It works. But that night, she haunts his dreams. Rose thought their meeting was chance, yet Vincent keeps appearing in her life. Is this fate, or a carefully laid trap?

column1: Look At Me, Even Just Once
column4: Ten years after her death, Flora returns to find the boy she raised has grown into a man who keeps his distance and hides his feelings behind someone else. They pretend nothing crossed the line, yet jealousy, protection, and unspoken devotion refuse to stay buried. When disaster and family demands close in, love is no longer about right or wrong… but whether they dare to claim it.

Once the world's best soldier, Benjamin's fate twisted in a single accident, landing him in a prison where every inmate was a master of their craft. Now unleashed upon a glittering world to protect a brilliant beauty, he draws his blade again, climbing the ladder of power, but the legacy he carries may demand a price far deadlier than any battle he has ever faced…

After CEO Ryan's car crashes in the mountains, a village girl saves his life and heals his soul. They promise forever, until he disappears on his way back to claim her. Six years later, he wakes from a coma with one mission: find her. And she's been waiting all along... with their son.

Can love kill? She turns pain into power! 
Emily marries Shane against her family's wishes. She finds out he intends to use their unborn baby's blood to save his love child. Her family saves her during childbirth, and Shane leaves broke. Now, as an AI pioneer, she uncovers Shane's fraud before the Summit. This time, will she crush him for good?

Scandal-plagued star Cecilia Lynn hears her unborn baby's voice the day she's pregnant. Trapped in Nancy Sullivan’s repeated schemes, how will she stage a comeback under the guidance of her baby in the womb?

column1: Wait, You're Marrying a Dead Bride!
column4: At my best friend, Sabrina's grand wedding, I, her maid of honor, publicly slapped her. I knew her choice of a white gown was a lie, and everyone seems afraid to call the police. I know for sure that this woman is an imposter, but the real questions hang in the air: who is this woman before me, and where is my real best friend?

column1: A Child's Mind Stole a Daddy's Heart!
column4: Lucia's mind stayed six years old after a childhood trauma. Bullied and drugged by Maxwell, she accidentally sleeps with his father Sebastian instead. Now pregnant, she's brought home by the powerful CEO as his wife. But can this innocent woman survive family schemes? And what happens when she suddenly recovers her true mind...

column1: Surprise! My Dad Is the Hidden Dragon!
column4:
A low-profile security guard hides a deadly secret.
Once the leader of Dragon Hall, he disguises himself to uncover his mother’s murder. When a powerful CEO returns with a child who calls him “Dad,” a fake marriage turns real and enemies close in.
When his cover cracks, who will survive the truth?

column1: What? My Kidnapper Is the True Heir?
column4: Lucas Shaw, a nobody thief, messed up big time. His target? Evelyn Winters, the "perfect" bride-to-be. But she didn't scream—she smiled. "Kidnap me at my wedding," she whispered. This crazy deal spirals into chaos when a shocking secret explodes: Lucas Shaw is the real heir to a fortune…

column1: That Butcher's an S-Rank Martial Ace!
column4: Blade Master George Miller, having retired from the martial world, became a butcher. One night, he saved Princess Grace from mortal danger. Through the Imperial Jade she wore, he recognized her as the girl who’d saved him. To repay this debt, George concealed his identity and entered the palace to serve as her personal guard. Will Grace see through his true identity?

column1: Sorry, You’ve Got the Wrong Saint
column4: Jacob, a rising medical star, is pushed into darkness when he saves Matthew from a crash, but only to be sued for it. Defamed and ruined, he loses everything when tragedy strikes his own family. But fate offers a cruel second chance: reborn at the crash scene, he hears the same desperate pleas… He wants to turn his life around, but where will the mercy of his scalpel land?

Cecilia, a photographer, accidentally had a flash marriage with Samuel, CEO of Starfall Group, after getting drunk. Little did she know he was Nicole’s elder brother, Henry. As their relationship heats up amid misunderstandings and sweetness, will Samuel’s true identity remain a secret forever?  
This series is adapted from the novel "Guimi shuo dage xiong, ke ta ye li han wo baobao" on Fanqie Novel, written by Liuqi.
Presented by: Chengdu Huahuajia
Co-produced by: Fanqie Novel

Billionaire heiress Laura hid her identity to marry Heather, living as a housewife for 20 years. Her husband, son and daughter betray her over a hit-and-run, believing mistress Frost's lies and jailing her. Released, Laura reclaims her Shelton status and returns as hospital director. Can she expose Frost and clear her name?

Billionaire heir Luke Vance needs a fake girlfriend for his high-stakes family reunion. Trapped by an engagement to a bullying tyrant, Sophia needs an escape. Their deal? Pretend to date. But when Luke's true identity threatens to explode everything, will love become real before the truth comes out?

column1: Into The Novel To Save The Emperor!
column4: Lydia accidentally travels into a novel and becomes Emperor Cole’s concubine. Cole tries many times to kill Lydia because he believes she betrayed him. However, Cole finds out things are not as he thought. Just then, danger appears. How will they deal with it?

After Leo repeatedly believes Ivy’s lies and lashes out at Rose and her daughter, Rose finally lets her years of silent love die. She chooses to marry a comatose heir, hoping to erase Leo from her life. But fate pulls them together again as buried truths stir and old wounds reopen. When Leo reaches for the truth, will Rose even look back…

Serena faked her death to escape her criminal family. Eight years later, her father Theodore forces her back to inherit Apex Group. But her adopted sister Grace stole her identity and face, plotting to destroy her. Every scheme makes Serena stronger. She fights back in a deadly game. Can the real heiress reclaim her life, or will the fake one win?

What if your wife’s vow was a lie? Ford Lynn returns to find Janet pregnant with another man's child. Trapped, he executes a cold escape, selling everything, vanishing after the birth. Left behind: a ring, unsigned divorce papers, and a note... His revenge is complete… or is it just beginning?

Evelyn Foster once believed his husband John Sean would grow old with her, but after John was drugged and slept with a college student, Serena Helen. Evelyn offered him three chances. In the end, she took the Memoril, signed the divorce papers, and erased seven years of love and memory...

column1: After a Long Sleep, I'm the Top Streamer!
column4: Five-thousand-year-old Elias Woods once sacrificed his life to safeguard the nation during the Epic Era and fell into a century-long slumber. Upon awakening, he set out to find his great-granddaughter, Evelyn, a small-time streamer. By chance, he ended up on her livestream, where Evelyn uncovered a secret that could change everything...

At seven months pregnant, Nancy discovered her husband's hidden prior marriage. Heartbroken, she returned to her wealthy family. The stress caused a premature birth, and the infant tragically died. Nancy left for good. Her husband and daughter were left in bitter regret, while the schemer Yuna ultimately got her comeuppance.

Reincarnated from a prodigy into a disgraced wife, Nyla Jocelyn rebuilds her life with brilliance, taking the gaming industry by storm while seeking justice. Her path intertwines with Gregory Shore, a reclusive tycoon whose icy heart begins to thaw only under her exceptional talent and resilience, leading to a love that defies all odds.

column1: From Fireman to CEO: Her Loss
column4: Firefighter Ryan catches his wife Rachel cheating with her brother-in-law. Heartbroken, he divorces and moves to Capital City as a top technician earning millions. His talent makes him CEO of Summit Group and a billionaire. Rachel regrets her betrayal as Ryan becomes unreachable. She lost love and family. Can she fix it... or is it too late?

column1: Who's the Mafia King's Baby Girl? Me!
column4: Xena Colton was killed by her fake family after being used as a heart donor. Reborn, she takes revenge and leaves. Learning her real father is the feared underground king, she risks everything to find him. Cold and ruthless, will he accept her... or destroy her?

Six years ago, Eleanor and the Emperor saved each other and swore eternal love. Now Eleanor struggles to survive and is to be sold into marriage. The Emperor returns in glory to crown his true queen but her sister plans to steal everything. Can a lie stand before the throne and the forgotten children who hold the real key to the past? The truth is coming with a storm.

On the day she is cast aside, Rosalie Lane burns down her grandmother's courtyard and runs straight into Lucas Kent. He takes her in to use her as a weapon. She fights back, flips the board, and ignites every trap he sets. When two wounded souls play the same dangerous game, will they save each other, or destroy everything they've built?
Adapted from the Fanqie Novel "Taiziye Ni Jian De Luopo Xiao Meigui Shouqi You Xianzhuo Le" by Miao Zong Shui Bu Xing.

Marina vanished 12 hours after meeting her birth parents. Their story was simple: a dying father's last wish to know his daughter. The truth was darker: a kidnapping to save their son's life. Now her rich adoptive family must find her before she becomes the ultimate sacrifice.

Elena, blinded by a sudden accident, trusted her husband Jasper completely. But when her sight returns, she finds Jasper standing over her parents’ bodies and her closest friend whispering betrayal. Alone in a world of lies, Elena must fight to uncover the truth. Who can she trust before it’s too late?

Born into wealth, Laura's trust led to her mother's tragic death, shattering her into a reckless heiress who pushes everyone away. When Josh, a man from her past, becomes her butler, she wages war to drive him out. But as her schemes fail, he begins to see the wounded truth behind her vicious mask… But can he protect her from the truth he’s hiding?

column1: My HIV Ex Begs for Help? No!
column4: Vivian Lynn was raped by her college classmate William Green. Her boyfriend, Owen Shaw, a medical research genius, stood up for her, only to be framed and imprisoned. While behind bars, he painstakingly developed the HIV antiserum. Just as Owen was about to start a happy married life with Vivian, what happened to change his mind completely?

column1: Nobody to Heir: Payback to the Ex
column4:
Framed son-in-law, public disgrace, sudden power.
Cast out after a shocking accusation, Marcus Cain loses everything overnight. When a mysterious figure pulls him into a hidden empire and grants him an impossible edge, his climb begins. But every test brings new enemies… Is this rise a blessing, or the start of something far darker?!

She thought he was dead. He thought she forgot him. Their son just exposed the truth. Six years ago, Simon saved a drugged CEO and lost his necklace. Now he's broke, working construction at her company, until her 5-year-old kid runs up wearing the matching necklace yelling "Daddy!" in front of everyone....

column1: A Goddess in a Ragged Dress
column4: Legendary mystic Grace Wilson is reborn as the scorned true heiress. Her family wants her blood, her status, her dignity. But when they push too far, her masks begin to fall: peerless warrior, divine healer, secret trillionaire. As global power brokers bow, a stunned family learns one truth: they never owned her. They merely awoke a goddess.

column1: What? My Bodyguard Is an Immortal?
column4: Miles Vale, an immortal, returns to Earth during a world-ending meteor strike. After accidentally destroying a billionaire’s spaceship, he hides his identity and becomes the bodyguard of Yuki Slater, a wealthy heiress facing a corporate takeover and bullying. Using his powerful immortal abilities, Miles steps in to protect her. When she’s kidnapped, he’ll stop at nothing to save her. As a hidden crisis looms, can Miles keep his secrets safe?

column1: They Want My Wife. I Answer with a Knife
column4: Seabourne ramen shop owner Jason seeks a quiet life with his wife Keira. But her rare Sacred Yin–Yang Body draws dangerous eyes. As hidden forces close in and old identities stir, a quiet life proves fragile. When home becomes a battlefield, how far will a man go to protect what's his?

Susan is taking her sister Ann away from domestic violence. On the road, they meet Max and his older brother Cole. But no one expects Susan and Max to have a one-night stand. A month later, Susan finds out she is pregnant. What will they do? Now what will happen to these four people?

She was the perfect wife, loyal, quiet, erased. Until he chose another… and she disappeared without a trace. Now she’s back in Seaville: colder, sharper, untouchable. He swears he never stopped loving her. She doesn’t care. This time, she doesn’t need his love. She owns his fate.

column1: Cry For Me When I Left
column4: After seven years of marriage, Hermione endures her husband Christopher’s cold indifference, believing she can one day warm his heart. On her birthday, she flies to LA only to find him celebrating with another woman, even letting their daughter call her “Mom.” Heartbroken, Hermione leaves to reclaim her ballet career. As she rises to fame, Christopher realizes he loved her all along—but it’s too late.

column1: My Tofu-Maker Dad Is a Legend?
column4: Walter Tucker, a seemingly retired tycoon running a quiet tofu shop, hides a legendary past. When his son Marcus is humiliated by a reckless heir, enemies underestimate the Tucker family... only to face the wrath of a man who once shook the global financial world. Will anyone survive the comeback?

As the strongest man alive, Connor masquerades as a reckless playboy to avoid a world that bows too easily. But a forbidden serum plunges his family into a deadly power struggle. Enter Amelia, a feared bodyguard sent to protect him. Enemies close in, secrets collide, and love becomes the most dangerous weakness of all. When the mask finally cracks, who will survive the truth?

column1: CEO Wake: Her Fake Family’s Doom
column4: After three years in a coma, tech tycoon Vivian Lynn wakes to find her husband, his gold-digging mistress, and their bratty kid have stolen her life, her company, and her family. But the queen’s back. And this time, she’s not here to play nice. Who’s first on her hit list?

column1: My Bodyguard is a SUPER SOLDIER!
column4:
When a super-soldier becomes the personal bodyguard of Ms. icy CEO, he expects corporate espionage, not bullets flying through boardroom windows. Now, he must protect her from assassins in suits and rivals with sniper rifles, discovering that her biggest threat isn't the competition... it's her own family. 
Adapted from the smash-hit novel Yi Hao Kuang Bing

column1: She Stole My Face, I Steal Her Life Back
column4: A fake god, a hidden cave, stolen women. Police graduate Maya Cole volunteers to become the chosen bride to expose a village's deadly ritual. Trapped underground with criminals watching her every move, she risks everything to save her sister and the women who vanished before her. But once inside, getting out may cost her far more…

column1: The CEO's Takeout Wife Is Pregnant!
column4: To save her grandmother, college student Sophia delivers food and ends up in CEO Alex’s bed by accident. Pregnant and betrayed by her uncle who plans to sell her to a 70-year-old, her world collapses. But when Alex discovers the truth, he races against time: Will he reach her before it’s too late?

column1: Trapped by the CEO… Or Am I?
column4: Crown City's richest heir, Evan Hale, met Nina Reed during a childhood illness in the countryside. She saved him with a few brave words, then disappeared without warning. Eighteen years later, fate brings them back together and into a sudden marriage. Some love stories aren't accidents... they're perfectly timed.

column1: Oops! My Three Bad Kids Are Future Geniuses!
column4: Celia accidentally travels 18 years into the future to find herself married to her old rival, Leonard, and mother to three troubled sons. But the situation between her and Leonard is more complicated than it seems. What is it? And what will become of their three sons?

column1: (Dubbed) The Flirt Genius Went On Strike!
column4: To fund his sister's cancer treatment, Ryan worked for Catherine's family. He also cared for insomniac CEO Raina, whose sleep depended on him. After Ryan brought hit-and-run driver David to justice, David kidnapped Catherine and Raina. They were rescued, but Ryan collapsed and died. Catherine vowed to study medicine, and Raina departed too.

column1: Her Baby's Father Is A She?
column4: Black has always been a girl with a boyish look. One day, her brother Zane calls her to the school office. The reason is Vivian insists she is pregnant and says Black is the father. With no way out, Black simply says she'll marry her! What happens next is anyone's guess.

Billionaire heiress Jade hides her identity to date Sebastian, but his family scorns her as poor. He promises marriage before going abroad, yet returns engaged to another heiress. Betrayed, underestimated, Jade reveals her true power to destroy them. Will she reclaim her dignity... or lose herself seeking revenge?

column1: How to Seduce the Prince as a Singing-Girl
column4: A burned-out modern star dies on set and wakes in a ruthless court as a trained courtesan. Her mission is to tempt a devout Crown Prince who hides claws beneath prayer beads. Failure means death. Desire becomes a deadly game of wit and power. In a court where desire kills, will she win his heart?

column1: OMG! The Martial Ace’s a Woman?
column4: As the only daughter of the Carter Clan, Sophia Carter was never cherished by her parents. Instead, they adopted Michael Carter. Driven by the desire to seize the family fortune, Michael kept sowing discord between Sophia and her parents, as well as her fiancé. Would Sophia simply swallow her humiliation and suffer in silence?

Security guard Calvin just wants to save his sister. But after saving a poisoned CEO, he's dragged into her world of corporate wars, assassins, and a mysterious family hunting him for a secret in his blood. Now he must choose: keep hiding, or unleash the dragon within to protect both his sister and the woman who changed everything.

Debt locks Mia in a fake marriage with an ice-cold tycoon, Hugo. He swears he’ll never cross the line. But a club run-in shatters all rules: he’s jealous, possessive, acting like she’s his prize. She calls him out on his BS. He smirks, taunting her about their “secret marriage.” Kicker? He promised a 30-day divorce. So why can’t he stay away?

column1: Back at Eight: The Football Legend
column4: When legendary football King Thomas wakes up in the body of his 8-year-old great-grandson Theo, he faces a Dracoland football under siege by corrupt owners and match-fixers. Leading Evergreen FC against ruthless rivals and foreign invaders, can the King reclaim glory and expose the shadows lurking behind the beautiful game?

column1: I See Your Little Game, You Slut!
column4: As his company nears IPO, Ryan Cole discovers his wife's affair but chooses to stay silent. Divorce now would cost him everything. While she believes she's winning, he quietly builds a trap around her and the man she trusts. When the lie collapses, who will be left standing?

Chloe gives up her wealthy family love Jonas. On their daughter Laura’s birthday, a rooftop kidnapping forces Jonas to choose which child to save. He turns to another woman… and walks away. Chloe races to save Laura alone, only to face a truth Jonas refuses to believe. Until the birthday party opens its final surprise… what lies waiting for him?

Hugh Night, once known as the Dark Lord, was framed during a mission to quell the rebellion of six nations sixteen years ago and lost his wife. He then retired, living as a worker to raise his two daughters. But a wage dispute dragged him back...

column1: Wait, the Villain Is a Nanny's Daughter?
column4: After a lifetime serving her queen, Lola Hart wakes up as a nanny's daughter in a modern mansion. When she meets a timid true heiress who looks exactly like her old mistress, she refuses to stay quiet. This time, she plays the villain and strikes first… Who said kindness wins?

Five years ago, a legendary surgeon fell from grace and disappeared. Now a hospital repairman, Felix is dragged back into the OR when his sister’s emergency reveals a skill that should not exist. As enemies recognize him and a live medical showdown begins, the truth behind his downfall stirs again. Will he reclaim his name or be destroyed twice?

column1: The Healing Girl and Her Devoted CEO
column4: Eight-year-old Adrian meets a girl at a care center. She has a rare healing gift, and her warmth changes his life forever... Sixteen years later, now a powerful CEO, he vows to find her and make her his bride. But before he can, a young lady who seems to share the same healing touch barges into his world...

column1: Shut Up, Sister! This Life is Mine!
column4: Reborn, Cathleen smiles at the familiar psychic whispers that once destroyed her. Framed by her sister? Betrayed by family? This time, she holds the pen. Every plotted lie becomes a scene she rewrites, every whisper a clue she turns against its sender. The stage is set, the players unaware… but who will survive the final edit?

Willa Slater, once a star of her live-streaming team, is betrayed by jealous teammate Neve Loring, who drains her energy using a system, causing her death. Reborn, she vows to destroy the system and uncover its secrets before her next live-stream. Will she succeed, or will Neve pay the price?

Shirley Ryder plots to marry Ryan Anderson, her brother-in-law Zack's brother, just to stay close to her sister Yvonne. When scandal hits Zack, Yvonne considers divorce and seeks Shirley's stance. Without hesitation, Shirley declares: if Yvonne leaves, so will she!

column1: A Discarded Wife? The Billionaire’s Lucky Charm!
column4: Lucky Sophia gifts a wedding candy to stranded CEO Ethan, and his empty tank magically fills up. He hunts for his charm, but her husband, Jake, dumps her after her fortune makes his family rich. She lands a hotel job, only to find the boss is Ethan. Will the Millers ruin her chance, or will the billionaire claim her?

Ethan Foster sells vegetables at the market, waiting for his wife Chloe. When she returns with her lover Leo and demands divorce, he faces humiliation and violence—until his three powerful sons-in-law intervene. But can they protect him from Chloe’s family’s schemes and a vengeful plot? As tensions rise, his own accomplished daughters return. Whose side will they choose in this battle of betrayal and loyalty?

column1: Ex is Back? My Husband Says No Way!
column4: Florence never planned to fall in love through marriage. Her sudden union with Oliver begins as quiet companionship, yet behind his calm devotion is a love that started long before she was free. When the past resurfaces, Oliver chooses only patience, protection, and unwavering tenderness. But how long can silent love stay unspoken?

Can a Playboy suddenly become a hero overnight? Will Voss, a total prodigal playboy who squandered all his family’s money to chase the village beauty. Finally, his wife can’t stand this anymore and pushed him off the cliff. However, he magically awakens with a superpower system at his funeral. What will he do with the new ability?

column1: (Dubbed) My Top Doctor Stole My Heart
column4: When Dr. Joseph Johnson meets Charles Summers, a fearless racing star secretly battling a humiliating condition, the spark between them is instant—and wild. Through treatment, Joseph draws Charles into a whirlwind of obsession and desire, blurring the line between care and control… But when passion shifts into obsession, who will be the true prey in the end?

column1: Locked Up for a Cheater, Locked Down by the CEO
column4: Stella serves three years in prison for her boyfriend. Upon her release, she catches him cheating. Heartbroken, she quickly marries the powerful Silas. To her surprise, he loves her deeply. And now… the revenge begins. What will be the fate of those who hurt her?

column1: You Just Insulted the Boss's Daughter!
column4: Jenna Sue joins the family gathering her dad arranged, only to be publicly shamed by his girlfriend, Mia, who mistakes her for a mistress. Jenna bounces back, goes undercover at Sue Group. While everyone sucks up to "future Mrs. Sue" Mia, Jenna secretly digs up her corruption dirt. Will she take down Mia and reclaim her family’s legacy?

column1: Wow! Nap Girl Runs the Harem
column4: First day in the palace, and Celia's fortune says, "Doing nothing wins it all." So she stays low-key, coasting through life and avoiding palace drama. But helping the High Consort find the missing cat shatters her peace. Can she finally survive the intrigue and still live the ultimate lazy dream?

column1: Exiled Girl Now Rules Criminal World
column4: Scarlett Jones, leader of the top underground force, returns after her father's death. Exiled as a child, she discovers he was murdered by the Third Branch plotting with Crimson Hall to steal the fortune. She storms boardrooms and crushes conspiracies with power that makes even Raven Group's leader kneel. But can she survive the betrayal...?

column1: (Dubbed) Betrayed? I'm Your Rival's Wife Now!
column4:
After a kidnapping, Eloise and Brian's "innocent" childhood friend Chloe were both pregnant. To protect Chloe, Brian branded Eloise's child as illegitimate. Shattered, Eloise retaliates: she divorced him, exposed his secrets, and even gave her unborn child to him as a gift Then, she vanished. 
Will Brian ever find the wife he betrayed? And what shocking truth awaits him if he does?

At a high profile alliance wedding, two sisters marry the wrong men by accident.
One ends up with a cold, obsessive CEO.
The other with a reckless superstar.
Contracts are swapped, rules are broken, and love turns into a battlefield.
When power, betrayal, and revenge collide… who dares to walk away?

column1: Help! My Reborn Queen Needs My Favor!
column4:
A single mistake on a wedding night swaps two carefully planned marriages. The iron willed CEO gets a spoiled, soft hearted wife who turns his rigid world upside down. The untouchable business queen meets a sunny movie star. Two mismatched couples. Two kinds of love. Was it really a mistake, or a quiet design of fate?

Adapted from the Fanqie Novel Zao Gao! Xin Hun Ye, He Jie Jie Zou Cuo Le Xin Fang by Chi Xi Gua De Tu Zi

column1: The Racing Legend Drives a Taxi Now!
column4: Carson Voss, once a top racer, saves Freya Colton on a fast ride to the airport. After learning his former disciple has turned rogue, he decides to return to the racing world. To reclaim his title, he must retrieve four powerful artifacts. With the first one in hand, can Carson reclaim his legacy?

column1: No More DINK, He Got HIV!
column4: HIV expert Ginny and her husband Ryan had originally agreed to be a DINK couple, devoting herself fully to vaccine research. But under pressure from his mother, Ryan suddenly changed his mind. He even had an affair with HIV patient. When Ryan received his own confirmed HIV diagnosis report, did he turn over a new leaf?

column1: You Picked the Wrong Mother to Cross!
column4: After three years abroad, Victoria Stone returns to a nightmare. Her husband has betrayed her with the family maid, and together with their secret daughter, they have seized her home and driven her own child to the brink of madness. Now, Victoria storms into their celebratory gala. One name. One goal: Vengeance.

Amber Carter, the only daughter of Johnson Ville's richest man, finds her identity stolen upon enrolling in university—framed as an impostor by the fake heiress, Jade Carter. When she turns to her own grandmother for help, her last pillar of support turns against her and coldly asks, "Who are you?"

Fifteen years ago, to protect his people, Logan stood alone with a blade against all, becoming a legend. Fifteen years later, released from prison, he finds his wife and daughter bullied by scums.
This time, he shall return...

column1: OMG! The Math Genius is My Childhood Crush!
column4: Twelve years ago, heiress Sara Jansen saved the life of Caden Lowe, a genius on the run. Now, as CEO, she needs a prodigy to build a world-changing chip, and fate brings Caden back. Together, they're ready to crush their rivals. But as they fight for their future, a shadow from Caden's past emerges. Can their alliance survive the ultimate betrayal?

column1: I'm Not a Plumber, I'm the Hidden Heir.
column4: Leon slaved away as a broke plumber, thinking he was saving his dying father. He endured humiliation, poverty, and moved in with a runaway heiress just to survive. Little did he know, his parents were alive and faking their illness to "test" him! When the bullies finally push him too far, the truth bombshell drops: He isn't a loser. He is the Secret Heir to a trillion-dollar empire! Watch the "poor" plumber transform into the Ultimate Tycoon right before their eyes!

column1: Was an Iceberg CEO, Now a Hot Princess
column4: Dumped overnight, Yara Whitmore wakes up in the body of Alexander Harlan, while he finds himself trapped in hers. Forced into a rushed marriage, enemies clash and sparks fly. But as secrets surface, will switching back be the only thing they want?

column1: That Waste? He’s the Martial Deity!
column4: With a disabled arm, Charles Scott was scorned as a martial waste, toiling in the market. Unknown to all, he was the hidden Martial God. As the clan's brutal Selection Tournament began, he and his mother Wendy returned. Would the despised "loser" step into the arena? And what thunder would his vengeance unleash?

column1: Hero of the Deep: My Family Regrets Letting Me Go
column4: Ethan, the Hales' unwanted adopted son, is recruited for Project Abyss. Framed and cast out like trash, Ethan vanishes. When will the Hales learn they discarded their last shot at survival? Meanwhile, a blue-ringed octopus shapeshifts into his sister to stop him. Walking on a razor's edge, she sways...

Trapped in a freezing vault, a billionaire is saved by a cleaner whose unique scent cures his phobia of women. Desperate to find her, he has no idea she is the new nanny secretly caring for his son! Facing jealous rivals and cruel plots, he finally recognizes his savior. Will he protect the humble maid and claim her as his one true love?

Photographer Bianca Whitmore is forced into a one-year contract marriage with Alexander Sterling while investigating her mother's suspicious death. Alex is secretly a federal agent using the marriage to probe her family's laundering network. Two liars fall in love as they turn the contract into a weapon against the real enemy.

A woman discovers her husband’s affair and a shocking betrayal that destroys her family. After his reckless actions lead to a heartbreaking tragedy, she refuses to stay silent. Uncovering his financial crimes and his lover’s schemes, she fights back, reclaims her empire, and turns her pain into a new purpose.

A purchasing manager cuts ties with a dodgy supplier caught using rotten ingredients. The supplier fights back with lies, smear campaigns, and powerful allies inside the company. She collects the evidence. She reports every single one of them. But how many more will come for her before it's over?

Climate scientist Jace Hardwell is murdered by his fiancée and wakes up thirty-seven days before a superfreeze will destroy the Northern Hemisphere. He builds a private bunker, exposes government lies, punishes his betrayers, and leads survivors toward a new civilization.

A disabled girl discovers her uncle is using her as a test subject for an illegal experiment. Her mother agrees. But the girl has been collecting evidence all along. One call changes everything. The uncle falls. The mother awakens. And the daughter welcomes a bright future.

To inherit a huge fortune, a homophobic swimming captain lives with his obsessive step‑brother under constant surveillance. Amid family plots and deadly threats, the possessive man shields him. Gradually the straight‑laced youth gives in. Can their contractual bond grow into sincere lifelong love?

After a five year secret romance, a loyal assistant is betrayed when her boss promotes his returning ex. Heartbroken, she quits and moves away to start a new life. When a cruel attack puts her in danger, her former boss discovers the truth and is consumed by regret. He risks his life to save her, but is it too late to win back her frozen heart?

Deserting their old camp, the protagonist guides his group to a ghost-fire village ringed by three sheer cliffs and the sea, an unbeatable natural fortress. Holding a pale green lantern on guard duty, he confronts shadowy fiends through the whole night. Come sunrise, monster bodies pile below the cliff, yet the colossal lurking beast has disappeared without a single trace...

column1: My Wife Is a Divine Rabbit!
column4: She is the last divine rabbit in the world. She falls in love with the wolf prince and has six children with him. Because of a misunderstanding about the children's physical traits, she leaves with the three weaker ones. Later, they are reunited. Her bloodline awakens. Can all the misunderstandings be resolved?

A wealthy female tycoon rushes to kindergarten after getting a call about a hit and run. She finds the driver is her ex husband's new partner who tries to bribe and frame others to escape blame. Dark secrets unfold at the child's funeral, including hidden affairs and the boy's true origin...

column1: Extra? I'm the Real Leading Part!
column4: A starving peasant stumbles onto a film set and is mistaken for an extra. He can't read, but his raw honesty outshines every actor there. He turns the script into his real life, learning to write, breaking land, and feeding his family. From refugee to rooted man, he rewrites his own fate. When the cameras stop, can the greatest role he ever played be simply himself?

column1: The Miner's Wife? She's the Big Boss!
column4: I turned the canteen into a goldmine with hundreds of miners fresh from the pit. The boss got rich, then called us coal rats and scraped the meat from our bowls. He had no idea the spotless new mine across the yard was run by my wife. When the man who starved you answers to the woman you married, who really owns the dirt beneath his feet?

column1: (Dubbed) Sweet Trap of the Ghost King
column4: In the tenth year of supernatural revival, a global ghost marriage system is activated. A soft school beauty picks the most inconspicuous evil spirit out of kindness. Little does she know, this weak-looking partner is the supreme ghost emperor who has guarded her across countless lifetimes.

column1: The Golden Crop He Left To Rot
column4: He brought a way for the village to earn real money, but they called his kindness greed. So he stepped back. He told them to sell the golden crop themselves and watched as the truckload of fortune began to rot. When the harvest turns to waste and the promises turn to dust, whose name will they beg for when ruin finally knocks on their door?

The sole heiress of a top pharmaceutical tycoon returns home. Her father’s secretary-lover brings priceless medical reagents to curry favor and win the family’s approval. A sudden car stop shatters the gift. Furious and unaware of the girl’s identity, she commits an unforgivable act—can she ever erase this fatal mistake?

column1: My Husband’s Soul Watched Me Autopsy Him
column4: After Karen is brutally killed by a gang, his lingering soul witnesses everything. His forensic wife Elena feigns coldness and infiltrates the criminal group to gather evidence of organ trafficking. She finally exposes the conspiracy and avenges him. Later pregnant, she chooses to live on with longing and new hope.

A retired gang queen marries a man who doesn't know her past. He moves in his gang-leader "sister" and tries to take over her house, her dignity, and her life. So she walks out, grabs her crown, and returns to burn his world down. He thought she was jealous. She was just waiting to destroy him.

Reborn just before a tech-locking apocalypse, a betrayed billionaire sells everything to study weapon designs. When doomsday hits, he awakens the ultimate power to instantly construct lethal weapons! Watch him summon heavy tanks to crush his traitors, battle ancient evil emperors, and unleash devastating cosmic powers to save humanity!

column1: He Gains Power Simply by Eating
column4: In a world where people grow powerful via incantations, a boy levels‑up by devouring everything. Top‑ranked warriors mistake his weird eating habits for divine power. He devours monster cores and forbidden spells. After defeating mighty fiends, he runs a food stall where top‑tier experts work as his servants.

column1: Wicked Deeds Fall To Bring Justice
column4: A man's father was killed by local gangsters in a flood, the murder disguised as an accident. For a decade, he gathers secret proof while doing charity. Villagers steal his toxic mushroom samples, get poisoned and frame him for extortion. Will he suffer the same fate as his father?

column1: Killed by My Family, Reborn to Rule
column4: Betrayed by his own family and framed for his father's murder, he dies consumed by hatred. But fate gives him a second chance. Reborn before the tragedy unfolds, he returns as the only person who knows every lie, every betrayal, and every deadly scheme. This time, he won't just clear his name. He’ll make them pay.

column1: Framed Into Prison. Came Out a Real Chef!
column4: A ten-time cooking champion, framed by his own partners and thrown in prison. Behind bars, a legendary old chef teaches him what real cooking actually means. Four years of grinding. Now he's out... Can one honest bowl of noodles take down an entire corrupt empire?

column1: Fake Poor Girl? Actually a Billionaire!
column4: A billionaire heiress hid her identity for four years, working a regular job and secretly building a billion-dollar company — all as a gift for the man she loved. He came back and got engaged to someone else. At her own welcome party, he humiliated her in front of everyone. Wrong move. What happens when the mask finally comes off?

column1: She Erased Their Love to Avenge Her Family!
column4:
Her entire family was massacred in a royal power struggle. To infiltrate the court and uncover the truth, she sacrificed her own memories of the prince she loved — and disguised herself as his student. Now feelings are growing again... and her cover is slipping.
Can she expose the conspiracy before it's too late?

An orphan raised in poverty returns to her wealthy family, not for love, but for lab funding. Her brother despises her. Her fake sister tries to destroy her. She outsmarts them, exposes the fraud, and stops her sister from bombing the company. Now the family that ignored her has no choice but to bow.

column1: The Useless Disciple Was Actually a God?
column4: Everyone called him a talentless failure. They had no idea he was once a god, betrayed and drained of his power thousands of years ago. Then the heavens sent killers to finish the job... and someone he loved died in his arms protecting him. What happens when a broken seal finally shatters?

column1: Dead in Seven Days. Reborn in Time to Win?
column4: The true prince returns to claim his throne, his bride, and his crown. All in seven days. His lookalike rival murders him and takes his place. But the prince doesn't stay dead... Can he evolve fast enough to stop an impostor from stealing everything?

column1: The Cleaner Is Actually a Billionaire!
column4: A billionaire CEO goes undercover as a market cleaner to help struggling vendors. A man she once saved from the streets repays her by framing her for theft and destroying her husband's keepsake. Bad move. She's done being kind... Did he really just betray the one person with the power to ruin him?

column1: Fake Well Spirit Hides Dark Crimes
column4: Weird sounds and shadows haunt an old village well, and a medium demands cash offerings to calm the supposed well spirit. A returnee finds her relative trapped and drugged by tomb raiders staging supernatural frights. With police help, the criminal gang is taken down. No one sees the medium faked her death to brew a far more dangerous plot.

column1: That Mechanic Is a Racing Legend!
column4: The undefeated racing god loses his younger brother in a racing accident. He stays away from racing for five years and becomes a car mechanic. But some people want to take the local land and force the villagers to give up the mountain road. At the critical moment, will he still choose to hide his true strength?

A princess hides her identity to live as a common wife. Her husband passes the imperial exams and tries to divorce her for a richer woman. His mother and mistress bully her. Then the guards kneel. The crown appears. And the "servant" they mocked is about to remind them what happens when you cross the emperor's sister.

Storm Rider Leonor Storm, King of Knights, hid as a groom after his wife Icarus died at his coronation. Eighteen years later, his daughter Serene, a Knight Commander, was wounded by Julian. Breaking his seal, Leonor killed a tenth-rank arcane beast in one stroke, revealing his true identity to the daughter who despised him.

Victor, the hidden Warlord, comes to M-City, meeting his wife Daisy and daughter Lily after 18 years. Amid a zombie siege, he faces betrayal and Logan's army to defeat Odin. Exposing the lie, he reunites with his family, creates a cure, and builds an alliance, saving the world and finding happiness.
Tortured for a power she never had. Sentenced to burn alive. What they didn't know: the Zombie Queen is her mom...When she wakes up in the flames, who's really in danger?

After discovering her husband and a royal princess murdered her father, a woman awakens a mind reading power at the funeral. She shockingly hears the cheating couple hooking up inside her father's coffin! Hiding her grief, she masterminds a ruthless revenge, permanently sealing the toxic lovers inside the casket to be burned alive!

Her family called grandma crazy and dumped her like trash. The houses went to her brother. She got nothing but an old woman and a contract cutting her off for good. What they didn't know: grandma was once the most powerful businesswoman in the city...Did they really just hand her the ultimate weapon?

column1: The Worthless One Was Chosen by a God!
column4: Labeled worthless by his entire clan, a young man hides his true power and endures years of humiliation. Then they strip him of everything and throw him out on the streets. That's when a legendary master finds him... What happens when the clan's trash turns out to be the chosen heir of a god?

A new CEO goes undercover in an ordinary neighborhood to investigate corruption — and ends up in a war with the neighbors over a parking charger. They bullied the wrong woman. She's been collecting evidence the whole time... Did they really just pick a fight with the person who controls their future?

column1: They Kicked Me Out of My Own House
column4: A woman buys a home and lets her family move in, sacrificing everything to support them. But after years of paying the bills, her brother claims the house as his and tries to throw her out. Betrayed by her own family, she makes one shocking move that turns his wedding day into a nightmare.

Betrayed by the woman he gave everything to, he rebuilds his life one dish at a time. With his childhood friend’s help, he rises from a broken kitchen to the pinnacle of his craft. Now, the ones who mocked him beg at his door. When the man they buried comes back, can those who only loved his ruin taste the glory they threw away?

A talented nail artist quits her job and risks everything to help her best friend’s salon succeed, only to be betrayed and underpaid. She hides her true plans and builds her own luxury beauty empire. When her former partner tries to humiliate her, she returns as a powerful entrepreneur and turns the tables.

column1: Koi Princess Had a Dragon Baby
column4: A betrayed koi princess, killed for her "lowly" blood, is reborn on her wedding day. She rejects her murderer and marries a mysterious boy from the mud. When she gives birth at the Dragon Gate, her child emerges as a true dragon, and her husband reveals himself as the Dragon Prince. The koi becomes the mother of a new dynasty.

column1: I Saved His Life, He Gave Me a Grave!
column4: To save her sick mother, she is forced to become the stepmother of a younger man. In a big fire, she risks her life to save him. But someone else takes credit for her deed. When the man finally learns the truth, he regrets everything. But she has already gone far away. Will they ever meet again? Can he ever make up for the wrongs he has done?

column1: A Ghost Worker? A Deadly Factory Murder!
column4: To cover her husband's medical costs, an HR staff invents a fake worker to siphon salaries. A man's death ends up tied to this false identity. She attempts to claim massive compensation, only to be blackmailed. She later learns the victim was murdered by the factory head. How will she get through this? Will she share the same tragic fate?

column1: Don't You Dare Boil This Egg!
column4: Reborn after a tragic death, she awakens as an egg, only to realize she’s about to be boiled. In that moment, a strange system activates, turning her rage into power. To save her daughter and take revenge on the cheating husband, she rises step by step from an egg… until she finally transforms into a phoenix and ascends beyond mortal fate.

A famous environmental leader returns to his hometown for rituals. Villagers accuse his local factory of severe pollution. He hides his identity to investigate and finds something's wrong. Partnered with an inspector, he sets a trap for the corrupt group. Can he clear the pollution and bring justice to the suffering town?

Two lovers once vowed to stay together despite huge status gaps and family opposition. Yet a sudden accident changed everything. The woman left, choosing to bear all misunderstandings alone. Five years pass. She leads a quiet life raising two kids and buries her old love deep inside. One day, the man she never forgot suddenly reappears...

column1: I’m Just a Forced Fake Lord, Aren't I?
column4: A modern man transmigrates and unknowingly inherits the Lord’s power. Surrounded by evil attackers, he has to pretend to be the sect ancestor. His casual ramblings shock everyone, and he eventually crushes an immortal demon ruler. Will the cultivation world fear his real power?

A mechanic was sent abroad six years ago after rescuing a rich heiress, forced apart by her father. Taught by a top racing legend, he grows into an elite driver and comes back for his old flame. Can he win her heart again and finally gain happiness?

Elara Grant saved Damon from a fire, Regina Clark stole the credit.After seven years by his side, Damon perjured publicly for Regina, branding Elara a plagiarist.Heartbroken, Elara left L.A. for a medical career. Truth revealed, Damon drowns in regret—her heart long cold.

column1: Destroying My Cheating Ex with My Queen Mother
column4: Ten years ago, Ciriel took forget potion to bring Lena back to royalty. They split a royal crest and her red bracelet.Now，Queen Lena looks for her daughter. Amnesiac Ciriel weaves holly silk and sells pea soup for Eric in Blackstone. Baroned thanks to her silk, Eric chooses Bella and tries to kill her. Lena finds clues and saves Ciriel.

A bullied butcher in the slums, abandoned by her husband, her daughter nearly killed. No one knows she's the true heir of the Sky City. After seven years in hiding, she returns in fury. Cheaters, villains, elites - all beg. The biggest conspiracy in the family is exposed. From mud butcher to supreme Archon - her revenge has just begun.

Zoe, a mafia princess forced into marriage in her stepsister's place, turns to her bodyguard Nick for escape, unaware he's secretly the powerful Godfather of the Voss family. As he witnesses her resilience, they fall for each other. When Zoe is drugged and sent to the altar, Nick reveals his identity and rescues her.

Betrayed and drained of his power by his own royal family, a ruined prince is brutally murdered. But he is reborn! This time, he strikes first, stealing the princess's vital energy and unlocking an ancient, world-devouring artifact. Watch this underestimated prince crush his toxic family and slaughter his way to the ultimate throne!

His ruthless father drains his lifeblood to help his favored younger brother awaken a powerful bloodline. Left for dead, the discarded eldest son shocks everyone by awakening a supreme, god-tier emperor soul! He cuts ties with his toxic family and crushes every academy rival. Now, everyone who betrayed him will bow to the ultimate ruler!

A screenwriter wakes up inside her own murder mystery script — as the fiancée of the mute billionaire she wrote as the killer. She has seven days to stop a series of deaths. But someone else has been rewriting her story… and the new ending has her name on it.

Elle presumed she died in an accident, only to wake up in the morgue. Her fiancé Ryan and best friend Jade plotted to kill her. She crashes her own funeral, exposes the murder, and embarks on revenge. Hunted by both hunters and vampires, Elle uncovers her true heritage. But to wipe out all her enemies, what sacrifice will she make?

Her father drove her mom to suicide, instantly moving his mistress into their mansion! Playing the perfect daughter, this heiress secretly schemes a ruthless revenge. Teaming up with a genius lawyer, she’s ready to destroy her toxic family and reclaim her stolen empire. Can she find true love amidst the bloodshed?

column1: The Fallen Lord's Three Fierce Brides
column4: He lost his memory and spent three years at a street stall, only to be humiliated by his girlfriend. Then his three powerful seniors descended, a governor, a CEO, a superstar. They restored his memory, and he crushed the traitor. But when a god returns to power with three fierce women claiming his heart, can he ever truly choose just one?

Abandoned by coach father Gedd, disabled Rose learns the supreme Foot of God from Diego. Working as a cleaner to look after his sick mom, he hides his power to fight villains Lysander and Vincent in a deadly football game. He takes Haaland as his pupil. Gedd dies for redemption. Rose awakens God’s Domain, defeats enemies and becomes football’s top king.

column1: Return of the Kung Fu Dragon
column4: Ethan, the legendary "Dark Dragon Lord," lives as a humble farmer to suppress a deadly toxin. When the ruthless PCA threatens his wife and daughter, Ethan unleashes his invincible Dragon Style Kung Fu to crush his enemies, protecting his family and restoring peace.

column1: The Delivery Boy Is a Racing God
column4: Dumped by his father as a "worthless" kid at just three, Leo grows up to become the world's top racer. Now his father's team is in trouble, and Leo must choose between the dad who abandoned him and the mom and sister who never gave up on him...

Alicia, a rabbit girl, once saw Prince Caius as her redemption, but found herself only a decoy to shield Vanessa. Three years of love was a scam. Broken-hearted, she swapped brides and married the crippled Duke Edward. A contract for freedom—she healed his legs, he gave her true respect and love. When Caius finally learned Alicia was his real savior, it was all too late...

Peerless martial genius Alaric abandons immortality to guard mankind as a farmer, training three mighty disciples. When the Ancient God Cult unleashes a terrifying deity, his son Vincent fights blindly to shield him. Alaric unleashes his full strength to save the world, but will his long journey away separate him from Vincent forever?

column1: Rich Hubby, You Spoil Me Too Much!
column4: She saves the nephew of a wealthy man, planning to take the reward and leave. But she ends up in a quick marriage with the wealthy man himself. The self-centered nephew keeps bothering her. How will she deal with him? Her parents try to take advantage of her. How will she fight back? Wait... something seems off about the wealthy man.

He leads his team to a mysterious coastal village guarded by phantom fire. Surrounded by steep cliffs, it's the ultimate fortress! On their first night, he grips a glowing green lantern, standing off against a terrifying shadow beast in the dark. By dawn, the beast vanishes, leaving a massive pile of dead monsters at the cliff base. Are they truly safe?

She runs a glamorous club, all silk and secrets. Beneath the charm, she shields the vulnerable and runs a spy network in a lawless city. Caught between gangsters and life, she's framed by her own ally, hunted by enemies. Pregnant and cornered, she tears through traitors. When the world tries to crush her, can she become the light that never dies?

column1: She Turned Dirt Into Gold Fields
column4: A college student returns home to promote eco rice-and-shrimp farming but faces pest outbreaks and resistance from villagers relying on pesticides. Mocked and doubted, she sticks to organic methods. At harvest, polluted fields fail while her eco crops succeed, and she turns farmland into a thriving success.

The sole heiress of a top pharmaceutical tycoon returns home. Her father’s secretary-lover brings priceless medical reagents to curry favor and win the family’s approval. A sudden car stop shatters the gift. Furious and unaware of the girl’s identity, she commits an unforgivable act—can she ever erase this fatal mistake?

The world-famous leader of a secret organization returns to her birth family as the long-lost daughter, hiding her true identity. Expecting betrayal and a scheming impostor, she instead finds a family that behaves in unexpected ways. As she uncovers hidden truths, she slowly rediscovers the warmth of family she never had.

A wealthy mother cuts off her ungrateful son and daughter-in-law after they try to steal her house and abandon her. So she has another child, at sixty. The first son loses the mansion, the company, and his inheritance. The second son gets everything. Some mothers forgive. This one replaced them.

column1: My Street Soup Just Destroyed Michelin!
column4: Humiliated and kicked out of a Michelin kitchen, a young chef hits the streets with nothing but an old family recipe. One bowl of soup later... the whole city is lining up for more. Now a Michelin three-star chef is coming for him. Can street food really beat the best in the world?

Five years ago, Thea had a one-night stand with CEO Zephyr amid a scheme. A clinic fire made her believe only son Felix lived, unaware twin Eli was taken by Zephyr. Years later, she works as his assistant. The secret twin boys swap identities to reconcile their separated parents.

column1: Died Poor, Reborn to Get Rich!
column4: In his past life, he was poor and suffering from cancer. He unexpectedly gets reborn in the year 1991. He decides to change his ways and protect his wife and daughter. Slowly, his family's attitude toward him begins to shift. Having struggled through his entire previous life, how will he turn his fate around in this new beginning?

column1: I Kept the Rain Falling to Keep Her Alive
column4: Grieving architect Liam reunites with his late lover Chloe’s rain spirit on a stormy night — they can only exist together in the rain. Obsessed with keeping her, he abandons his career to create artificial rain. When rival Sarah plots to destroy him, Chloe makes the ultimate sacrifice. Can Liam accept that true love means letting her disappear forever?

Wolf King, the formidable leader of the elite mercenary team Wolf Fang, retires after defeating his archrival Heaven Kill. He returns to Huaxia to live a peaceful life with his adoptive father Arthur and his three sisters. He easily subdues hijackers on his flight home. However, he soon finds Arthur brutally injured and hospitalized by the developer Don. Wolf King confronts the culprit but is wrongfully arrested by policewoman Casey. His second sister Sloane, CEO of Hongyan Group, steps in and h

column1: Cloak of the Reaper: Forbidden Deal
column4: 17-year-old outcast Ivy is targeted by the Grim Reaper, Damien. He’s secretly loved her since she saved him as a child and has been protecting her. Pulled into an angel-demon war as the world’s only neutral soul, can their forbidden bond make death himself choose to fall for her?

Thor's son arrives at a besieged kingdom to claim his promised bride — armed with a war hammer and orders to hide his true power. But a dark army is closing in, and the princess refuses to let him stay... Can one man's hidden strength save a kingdom that doesn't even want his help?

column1: My Real Daughter Was on the Streets!
column4: A self-made businesswoman, ready to retire and hand her empire to her beloved daughter, stumbles upon a wounded stranger on the street... and recognizes a birthmark only her long-lost child would have. The real daughter was suffering out there all along. So who exactly has been living her life in luxury?

When top female racer Quinn dies in a tragic crash, her soul finds a new home in Chloe, a disowned heiress. To save her family’s struggling driving school, Chloe enters a dangerous racing event with a training car, shocking the crowd with her skill. But betrayal strikes—when her brother’s life hangs in the balance, she risks it all with a legendary drift. As enemies close in, her next move could rewrite her legacy… or bury the truth forever.

Lina, a descendant of an exorcist, moves to an isolated house with her blended family. One day, her stepsister Chloe films the sealed basement puppet despite a no-recording warning to chase online clout. Just as the short video goes viral, a curse takes hold. Chloe's body twists unnaturally, slowly turning into a puppet doll...

column1: The True Heiress Buried in Asylum
column4: The true heiress, brilliant and gifted, finally returns to her family... only to be locked away in an asylum the very day she's accepted to college. Three years of torment. She survives — and rules the place. Now she's out. Can she hold herself together... or will they push her too far again?

column1: Fiancé Cheated, So I Married a Dying Man
column4: A woman crashes into a dying man's prized porcelain and discovers her boyfriend's betrayal. With three days to marry, she proposes a contract: she'll be his wife for his final months. He agrees. No strings, no future, just a deal inked in summer's heat. But some promises break the rules.

column1: Forbidden Night The Billionaire Wolf and His Private Doctor
column4:
Gifted surgeon Chloe takes a live-in doctor job for reclusive billionaire Ethan to cover her critically ill mother’s medical bills and clear her wrongfully framed father’s name.
She soon uncovers his deadly secret: a biotoxin that turns him into a feral werewolf on blood moon nights. After their fateful encounter, Ethan recognizes Chloe as his long-lost childhood love by her heart-shaped birthmark.
Together, they topple a powerful corporate dynasty, expose a massive organ trafficking ring, cure

Reborn as the legitimate daughter, she swaps destinies to escape her tragic end. Sabotaged by her treacherous half-sister and suppressed by a powerful minister, she plunges her entire household into a deadly crisis marked by mass execution. Can she break free from this doomed fate?

A poor girl enters an underground auction to save her dying mother but a ruthless crime boss buys her and keeps her under a controlling contract filled with tension and forbidden attraction. When feelings grow, a shocking truth emerges: they were bound by a marriage contract from the start, forcing them to question whether their love is fate or a trap.

column1: His Lover Pinned Rape on My “Brother”
column4: My husband's pure love, Camille Miller, was just a menial nanny. Today, she was walking down the aisle to marry Charles Shaw, the idiot heir to Seaburg's richest family. However, she stumbled into her wedding half-naked and accused my brother of rape. Everyone is blaming me, but I smile - because my brother is not a MAN.

A zombie outbreak hits. Emily learns of biting attacks at Pinnacle Hospital via City B subway. Warned of an imminent lockdown, she stocks supplies, books the last flight to City Q to join her fortified parents. Facing evolved zombies and violent raiders, she sends an SOS drone and gets rescued by troops.

A teacher recruits a veteran chef to open a second school canteen when a greedy owner cheats students on food. The owner tries poisoning the new kitchen, but gets caught red-handed. Now the veteran's canteen goes viral, the students are fed, and justice is served alongside every meal.

Yoo Haru, a dating advice YouTuber, is suddenly trapped in a mysterious game: “See a woman’s panties within 10 minutes or die.” After repeatedly facing absurd deaths, he encounters a beautiful college student, Rei, and is drawn into even more dangerous challenges. Dates, racing heartbeats, kisses, and secret nights… As the missions escalate, his life begins to spiral down a path of no return.

Cathy loved Lucian for years, only to find out his heart belonged to her sister, Claire. Heartbroken, she marries in Claire’s place and becomes the feared warlord Jasper’s wife. Now Lucian comes back full of regret, asking for another chance. Old love or new power… who will she choose?

column1: Never Use Me as a Lucky Charm!
column4: A mythical gift: her suffering makes her family wealthy. So they swapped her for a fraud, kept her as a maid, and watched her bleed. When the real heiress rises from the basement with DNA proof, the billion-dollar empire becomes hers. Now the family who profited from her pain will pay, with everything.

column1: The Painless Weapon & The Guilty Noble
