column4: One is a vengeance weapon stripped of all pain; the other, a fallen noble consumed by endless guilt. Two broken souls cling to each other amid deadly traps. Gentle warmth unlocks her painless seal, while her brute force shields him from fatal danger on his succession rite. They mend each other’s emptiness, finding humanity only in one another. Can mutual salvation heal their lifelong wounds?

Betrayed in a desert war, a female commander loses her memory and is saved by a scholar. She lives under a new identity, supporting him for years, until he frames her after rising to power. Regaining her truth, she uncovers the conspiracy behind her ruined family and rises as a war general to bring down the corrupt force behind it all.

column1: The Devil's Little Prince Is Hiding Again
column4: Thrown into the Shadow Abyss as a baby, Cain was supposed to die. Instead, he became a legendary mage. Now seven years old, he sets out to protect his mother. Facing the Dark Lord's forced marriage and the nobles' insults, he crushes every challenge. A long-lost mother and son must reunite, shatter the curse of the abyss, and reclaim their throne!

Stella was used by billionaire Damian as a decoy to guard his savior. Three years of love was a lie. Crushed, she wed blind leopard Lucian. She cured his blindness and earned his whole heart. When Damian found Stella saved him from the fire, he knelt to beg mercy. She turned away, "Belated affection is worthless. I've picked my true match."

Supreme Sorceress Isabella Vance is struck by lightning, only to wake as the bullied ugly wife of the Sterling family. She still has her magic and a sharp tongue—but she has no idea the entire family can hear her inner thoughts. She crushes villains, wins fortunes, and unwittingly turns her cold CEO husband from disdain to desperate pursuit.

column1: Falling in Love With Three Alphas
column4: A strange dream bonds Freya to three men. When she enrolls in a werewolf academy, she finds them — three powerful Alphas, her destined mates. But her wolf is dying. One bond runs deepest: Alex, who calls himself a monster and keeps pushing her away.To survive, Freya must awaken her power — and reclaim the man who keeps pushing her away.

column1: From Discarded to MVP: My Ex Regrets
column4: Former three-time MVP and All-Star quarterback Luke Anderson gave up his career to support his wife Clara. But when her ‘first love’ Daniel returns, Luke faces her favoritism and contempt, leaves to make a football comeback, and meets the elegant doctor Hannah. Clara later learns Daniel was a fraud—but it’s too late...

column1: I Reborn After They Burned Me Alive
column4: Reborn after being betrayed and burned alive by his wife and her lover, a powerful tycoon returns to take ruthless revenge. But when he meets the woman who once died saving him and is now left scarred and alone, his cold vengeance begins to shift into something far more dangerous than hatred.

column1: A Tiny Share? Watch Me Build My Own!
column4: He is asked by his mother-in-law and brother-in-law to quit his job and help run their factory. He creates millions in profit, but is only given 50,000 as his share. Feeling disappointed, he decides to start his own business with his wife's support. Can he rise again? And can he get back at those who betrayed him?

column1: I Hold the Pen to Settle Old Sins
column4: Ten years after the pawnshop keeper vanished, his grandson walks the land blindfolded, collecting the debts his grandfather left in the ledger. At a feast, he claims ten years of borrowed life. Debtors fall one by one, and behind them, a shadow empire hoards stolen lives in a tower. Can the man who measures the world's sins ever settle his own?

After her father is destroyed by Alexander Helios’ Ponzi scheme, Flora infiltrates Helios Corp to ruin his family. But when Alexander’s son Apollo unexpectedly marries her, revenge turns complicated as she discovers he may be innocent of his father’s crimes.

column1: Loyal To The Crown Addicted To Her
column4: A ruthless princess trusts no one. A loyal general serves her enemy. She captures him, tests him, and falls for him. Together, they expose a treasonous prince, but her secret birth is weaponized. He betrays her to save her and fakes his death to unmask the real villain. When trust is a battlefield, can two warriors ever lay down their armor?

Reborn as a fake heiress, a writer becomes a spy for a ruthless commander to solve a royal murder. While outsmarting her toxic adoptive sister and scum fiancé, she exposes a horrific truth: the "loving" duke is sacrificing his own children to demons for the throne! Trapped in a household of psychos, can this lethal fake daughter survive?

Reborn three days before the apocalypse, he covers his body with underworld gods, knowing tattoos grant power. As cities fall, he rises atop the ruins, every deity on his skin alive with ancient fury. His eyes blaze, locking onto a rift in the dark… a door to the truth. When the gods he fears begin to wake, can the man survive what he's become?

Based on Jessica Hall's best-selling novel. Awaiting death on her 18th birthday, abused rogue Ivy is abruptly claimed by the ruthless Lycan King Kyson. Their undeniable bond blurs the lines of love and vengeance. But as deadly secrets of her true royal bloodline emerge, will his dark past destroy them or reveal his true Luna?

When a tribute runestone reveals his presumed-dead family is being tortured in a frozen dungeon, a grief-hardened Beast King must unleash his long-dormant fury to slaughter their captors and reclaim his bloodline.

The Black Council has infiltrated the Hadrian Empire's magic tournament — hungry to finish what they started a century ago. One student stands in their way: Lucian de Villefort. Notorious wastrel. Hidden avenger. One strike downs the elite knight. One strike ends the tournament. And that's just the beginning...

column1: Mecha War God:  Return from the Slums
column4: In a cyberpunk wasteland, the legendary God of War Aetheren hides as a lowly slum mechanic. When corrupt elites and evolved Star Beasts threaten his home, he shatters his disguise. Reclaiming his jet-black mecha, he unleashes god-tier power to crush the colossal monsters and bring true peace to a fractured world.

Quinn Hall, the Hall family’s true daughter and an IMO gold medalist, was framed by her biased family and fake sister Avery and sent to juvenile detention. Three years of torment spawned her vengeful second personality Raine. After Avery destroys her last calming music box, Quinn returns ready to ruin the whole Hall family.

column1: He Faked His Death, I Made It Real!
column4: She is betrayed by her husband and her maid. They take her property and burn her to death. After rebirth, she returns to a key moment. She changes from weak to brave. How will she expose her husband's scheme and deal with the traitorous maid? She also unexpectedly uncovers the truth about her parents' death...

Regina impersonates her twin, Reigna, at a royal ball to pitch her beauty empire, captivating the King and sharing a passionate night with him. After discovering the twins’ secret, the King offers Reina a dangerous deal - bear his heirs, and he’ll fund her empire.

column1: The Double life of Secret Lovers
column4: The tug-of-war between the mafia and the FBI x the cat-and-mouse game between the opposing couple. A humorous love story of a flash marriage couple who keep their identities hidden from each other, constantly revealing their true colors yet unable to stop falling in love.

For a century, I protected the realm. My family stole my legacy for my brother. I signed the disownment papers and walked away. Now demons have broken through, and the same family who cast me out kneels at my door begging for help. I am the only one who can save them. I'm not sure I want to.

Her sister marries into another country, but is tortured to death. She swears to avenge her. She enters the palace, and she pretends to be slow and foolish. The emperor likes her, but he also stays wary of her. Others also have their own hidden plans. Will her disguise be seen through? And how will she use the people around her to take revenge?

A kidnapped heiress becomes an underworld queen, hiding her power while selling boxed lunches in a small town. When her father finally finds her, she saves his life, exposes her betraying lover, and destroys a corporate conspiracy—then chooses to walk away from it all.

A princess presumed dead becomes a spymaster, marries a scholar who abandons her, and uncovers a treasonous plot by the brother who tried to kill her. When the enemy king she loves reveals his true identity, she must choose between her heart and her kingdom, and save the crown that once betrayed her.

Damian Williams, underground king codenamed Zero, saves Emily Rose from the Shark Gang with his adopted daughter Lili. Emily hires him as her bodyguard. Her parents disapprove and test him, which he handles effortlessly. When the gang threatens to seize Rose Group, the legendary Zero steps out to shield Emily.

After marrying Nick, Ella endured his cold disregard and repeated persecution from his ex-wife. Brokenhearted, she left for Cambridge to pursue her PhD. Nick thought she had died in a plane crash and was filled with remorse only after losing her, yet Ella had already found a warm new companion.

Fallen heiress Seraphina signs a humiliating debt contract. She finds the ruthless loan boss is Elias, her refined literature professor. A dignified scholar by day, he becomes her possessive keeper at night. Gradually, they tangle in an intense forbidden bargaining game. Family feuds twist their power play, blurring control and hidden love...

Anna married Patton, a gentle and decent man, and did everything a perfect wife was supposed to do. But love never grew. She was betrayed. Then she met Edward, Patton's brother. Edward had always been drawn to bold, fearless women, yet Anna unsettled him completely. What began as quiet companionship turned into something far more dangerous...

column1: The Substitute Bride Who Won Everything!
column4: Forced into a "pity marriage," she asks no questions and builds her life from scratch. Her husband? Secretly the richest man around and completely won over by her. But her jealous family won't stop coming for her. Can she win against them all?

column1: (Dubbed) Father! I Rise after You Crushed Me
column4: Raised in seclusion, a martial prodigy returns to his family, only to be framed by his jealous sibling. Abandoned and forced to cripple himself by his cold father, he severs all ties. Taken in by a grand master and reborn with supreme skills, will his brutal revenge bring the arrogant family to its knees?

A gifted teen plays street football in secret, his dad ruined by a false match-fixing charge. After an argument, he decides to form a team to fight hostile suppression and uncover the truth. Guided by his father and a loyal ally, they climb up through leagues, heading for the World Cup to claim justice and everlasting glory!

column1: How I Tame Four Dark Devils
column4: An office worker transmigrates into an otome game as a doomed vicious villainess bound to die by devils’ backlash. Bound to a system, she softens four hostile, blackened devil favorites, exposes the fake false saintess, fights the ultimate villain, and seizes supreme power for herself.

College student Shen Ruoxin watches super-villain "Storm" destroy a warehouse with lightning. Kidnapped to his secret base, she forms a dangerous bond with him amid a gene serum conspiracy targeting super-humans. Poisoned and killed, she is revived by Lu, awakening as the Source Body of ancient energy. Can they uncover certain secrets and stop the real enemy?
I was pregnant... but I didn't know who the father was. It took me months to realize... the man who claimed my body was the most dangerous man in the entire Empire.

column1: Her Revenge Hit Her Own Flesh!
column4: Twin sisters share the same bloodline, but their fates are worlds apart. The older sister is born with a noble destiny, while the younger is just an ordinary noble. Years of jealousy twist her heart completely. She secretly plans to switch sons with her sister. But the older sister sees it all. What awaits is a trap behind a trap...

Returning home after 8 years of mountain training, a supreme master secretly owns a trillion-dollar empire. Dressed like a pauper, he faces endless mockery. But to protect his childhood sweetheart, he stops hiding! Watch him destroy the arrogant elites as the entire martial world bows before his true identity.

column1: Reborn Princess: I Play Men, No Love!
column4: A modern loser girl is taken to the underworld by mistake. As compensation, she is reborn in ancient times as a princess. Tired of being a loser in life, she has a clear goal. Spending money, having fun with men, and never falling in love. Until one man shows up and wants to win her heart...

A legendary man gives up everything to protect his family and lives a quiet life. On his daughter's birthday, she is set up by her classmates. To keep her parents out of trouble, she says nothing and keeps the pain to herself. When the man accidentally finds out what happened, he decides to stop hiding. How will he protect his daughter?

column1: I Butcher Gods with a Skinning Knife
column4: Cast aside for lacking a Divine Spark, Agis awakened a Titan bloodline. He returned disguised as a skinner to find his family, only to face abyssal monsters and a tyrannical theocracy. With no other choice, he drew his knife and shattered everything in his path.

column1: The Boss Wife They Never Saw Coming!
column4: A woman, a wealthy heiress and the leader of a sect, lives a peaceful life with her daughter. But her peace is broken by her husband's favorite dancer from the cabaret. After constant provocation and her husband's unfair favoritism, she is forced to reveal her hidden power. How will she strike back? And what will happen to those who betrayed her?

As the domineering underground ruler of the city, a powerful woman goes overseas to cure her sick daughter. She trusts her family to her husband, only to suffer cruel betrayal. Now she returns, ready to crush the ungrateful traitors and avenge her wronged child.

A man travels to a dynasty where literature is most respected. He is wrongly accused of theft. Then he remembers all the poems he learned in his past life. As soon as he recites one, everyone is shocked. Can he clear his name? And how will people's attitude toward him change when they discover his talent for poetry?

Pregnant after a fling, Elena is forced to marry Prince Kane. In this empire, non-virgins are sacrificed to beasts. Elena is trapped. Kane, a ruthless predator, corners her with terrifying obsession. When her secret is exposed, will the cold Lion King kill her for her lies, or defy the world to grant her his absolute devotion?

column1: Ms. CEO vs. Mr. Trash Husband 2.0
column4: College student Simon wakes up as the husband of a billionaire CEO, only to discover he's a cheating, gambling, stealing monster who just slept with her sister! Now facing divorce papers, he must prove he's not the scumbag she thinks he is... even though technically, he is.

column1: Extreme Heat: Swapped Marriage, Big Win
column4: Betrayed by her fiancé and stepsister, Thalia dies in a deadly heat apocalypse. Reborn 30 days before doomsday, she chooses Arthur, the abandoned heir who was the only one to bury her. Together they build a massive bunker. As the world burns and her enemies slaughter each other, Thalia watches from safety and prepares her revenge.

column1: The Forced Captive of Alpha King
column4: Alpha Elias locks witch Ella, who blames him for her clan’s slaughter. She stabs him with silver shears and flees. He abducts her before she marries Lucien; cruel lookalike Seren tortures pregnant Ella. Her magic necklace revives her, letting her escape. Years later, Elias finds Ella and their son Remy. Theron, Seren’s brother, kidnaps them for the wolf throne. Dying Elias confesses Theron’s kin killed Ella’s tribe. Ella unlocks rare Enigma power, kills Theron and becomes Wolf Queen.

To save her life-saving husband, Dr. Mia agrees to be surrogate for ruthless mafia queen Vera. Though Vera’s devotion stirs Mia’s heart, loyalty to her husband keeps her from surrendering to this risky love.

column1: She Came to Kill the Emperor
column4: Her sister marries into another country, but is tortured to death. She swears to avenge her. She enters the palace, and she pretends to be slow and foolish. The emperor likes her, but he also stays wary of her. Others also have their own hidden plans. Will her disguise be seen through? And how will she use the people around her to take revenge?

column1: My Blind Husband Is A Secret King
column4: A "simple" adopted daughter is forced to marry a "blind" business emperor. She plays the fool. He plays blind. But she's secretly a business mastermind, and he's faking his blindness to take revenge. When their true identities collide with a forgotten love and a decades-old conspiracy, the masks come off. And the empire will burn.

A lowly concubine just wants a peaceful life, but she gives birth to something truly shocking! Fearing a death sentence for treason, she panics. Instead, the ruthless royals shed tears of joy. This unusual child isn't a curse—it is the ultimate miracle that will change the destiny of an ancient and endangered bloodline forever!

column1: Cheers, My Love, I Serve It COLD!
column4: For 23 years, he buried his empire for her, living as a shadow. On their anniversary, he was going to propose, while her first love returned as a tycoon. Sons betrayed, family scorned… That night, the king unmasked, crushed the usurper, then raised his glass. A toast to ruin. But could she ever truly know what she destroyed?

column1: My No-Name Wife Is the Dragon Queen!
column4: He is reborn as a serpent and lives alongside a green snake who is actually a dragon queen secretly ruling aquatic forces. Terrified at first, he gains a system that rewards him a hundredfold for sincere offerings. He helps her cultivate and guard underwater clans, and they grow side by side to rewrite their destinies...

Martin, a teenage boy from Brazil’s favelas, steps onto the football pitch to pay off a debt owed to a gang. With the help of Farma, a retired national team player who walks with a limp, and his best friend Fer, he blends street football with samba dance moves. In the end, he scores a match-winning goal at the World Cup qualifiers, fulfilling his own dream of making the national team—and Farma’s as well.

Exiled for ten years, she survived a ruthless underworld to become the world's top assassin. Returning home to mourn her father, her greedy relatives scheme against her to steal the family empire. But she is no longer a weak girl. Watch as she unleashes a brutal revenge to reclaim her throne!

A top surgeon does 800 operations but gets a pathetic $50 bonus from his corrupt boss. Fed up, he stops working, plunging the hospital into chaos. When the boss fails a VIP surgery, they beg him back, only to trap him! Watch this genius doctor expose the greedy officials and claim his rightful throne!

column1: Ultimate Evolution... I'm A Mosquito Now?
column4: Reborn as a mosquito with an evolution system, I bit a sleeping beauty to level up, only to discover she's a reborn empress mid-ritual, summoning her divine beast. Now her entire fortune bought… me. She's horrified. I'm a mosquito. Together, we're unstoppable. But who truly rules this bond, the empress, or the pest she never chose?

Kelly's weak wolf needs mate energy to survive. After her mate betrays her, she breaks the bond and faces death. Her only hope is Max, the powerful Alpha King who can keep her alive. So she carefully works her way into his world, overcoming his daughter and her ex, and wins his heart...

A skilled healer is forced to marry a mad noble lord. She just wants peace, yet provokers force her to punish them in countless ways. The lord weds her as a pawn against rivals, but she crushes all his enemies single-handedly. What fiery sparks will ignite between them?

Lia had planned to give her first night to her boyfriend, but she accidentally walked into the wrong room. There, she was blindfolded and handcuffed by his father, a fearsome mafia boss. After being betrayed and cheated on by her worthless boyfriend, she eventually became the sole obsession of this underworld king, who fell deeply for her...

She went undercover in her own asylum, but the corrupt deputy locked her in as a patient. No way out. So she became the maddest of them all. She traded herself for antidotes, turned patients into soldiers, and tore his regime apart. But when a queen rises from the depths of her own hell, is she still the woman who walked in?

column1: Mom, Stop Messing Up the Plot!
column4: A mother and daughter wake up inside a cliché romance novel. The daughter is the villainess while the mother becomes the “cold billionaire hero” meant to make the heroine fall in love and leave the country. But the plan breaks when he wears red long johns, dances in parks, and fights thugs with a broom. The heroine starts shipping the wrong couple…

Laughed by her cruel stepmother, the rich heiress wakes to find her one-night lover is her own stepsister. Caught between her scheming fiancé and toxic family plots, the sharp businesswoman stepsister, consumed by obsessive love, pulls her into chaos. Can they break free from all restraints and get their happy ending?

column1: The Billionaire Bride He Lost: A Champion's Regret
column4: Stella is mocked as a clueless rich girl dumped by her racer boyfriend. But she's actually controlling top racing teams, key patents, and capital. Betrayed, she cuts off his resources, sending him from champion favorite to dead-last joke. Then Noah appears: loyal, devoted, and instantly obsessed. Others call her a sponsor. He calls her "My girl."

Orphan Chloe moves into a billionaire mansion and discovers her cold stepbrother Jax is the legendary underground racer "Shadow". Their dangerous secret ignites a forbidden, intense romance. But when his stepfather schemes and rivals attack, can she overcome her fears to race in his place and expose the deadly truth?

Luna is a girl born with an Omega pheromone that drives all Alpha men wild. One day, she unexpectedly releases her aroma and draws the attention of Cyrus Sterling, who claims to take her as his wife. To save her critically-ill father, she has no choice but to accept the forced marriage. Where will this lead? What unknown dangers await them?

Jason hid his billionaire identity to build a company from scratch with his girlfriend Ivy. But Ivy grew tired of his "ordinary" background and rekindled things with her ex. She stripped Jason of his VP title and threw him out. At a billion-dollar industry summit, Jason revealed his true identity. Will Ivy ever recover from the man she threw away?

Moe spent years as a delivery guy supporting his girlfriend through grad school. She repaid him by dumping him for a wealthy man. That same day, a reward system activates: every woman he helps returns wealth beyond imagination. His ex plots, schemes, and strikes back... but can she stop a man the universe seems determined to reward?

column1: OMG! Triplets with the Cold Tycoon?
column4: A girl is forced to supply blood for her brother and sold to pay debts. Cornered with no escape, she meets a cold tycoon who avoids all women. One night together leaves her carrying rare triplets. Their fates intertwine. What tender future lies ahead for them?

column1: (Dubbed) You Loved A Lie, Mr. Idiot!
column4: For eight years, she was his stand-in lover, while he mistook another for his savior and pushed her aside to marry the wrong woman. The day she left, she married his powerful rival and built a new empire. Now the truth claws free: the woman he destroyed was his real salvation. But can a man who threw away a diamond ever reclaim it from the dust?

column1: I Made a Deal with Death for Love
column4: After failing to save classmate Silas, 17-year-old Reese strikes a deal with the Grim Reaper to go back 27 days. As she warms the closed-off boy's heart and they fall in love, a villain threatens everything. Will her sacrifice grant them rebirth and a chance at true love?

column1: OMG! A Clam Farmer’s Legendary Rise
column4: Devoted for years yet cruelly exploited, a gifted breeder leaves in anger. Mocked by all, he makes stunning pearls and discovers a legendary giant clam. Rivals collapse, while he builds a huge empire. Can his glory last forever?

column1: Dragon Mother of the Black Egg
column4: Born a pure-blood dragon heir, Cassandra was betrayed and killed alongside her cursed black egg by greedy lord Leo. Reborn on his concubine pick day, she shuns the tyrant, rouses ancient dragon Kleon with her sacred blood and bears the fated egg. United, they uncover vicious plots to claim their hard-earned happy fate...

column1: All of Me, All of You
column4: After Clint Raines, the West’s deadliest cowboy, is drugged, orphaned Lily is pulled into one reckless night with him. Heartbroken, Clint believes Lily set him up for money and only leaves her his family crest. Eight months later, pregnant and sold off, Lily is pushed to the brink… until Clint learns the truth and rides back for his wife and child...

column1: Baby From A Man Who Was Almost Dead
column4: A desperate orphan is forced into the bed of a CEO in coma as his “luck bride”. When he wakes up, he offers a one-year secret marriage. Cold duty slowly burns into fierce devotion. When a fake heiress is exposed, the truth shatters everything: she is the long-lost daughter of a powerful family. But can a love born from a lie ever feel like home?

In the 5G era, two young entrepreneurs launch a live-stream e-commerce company and recruit two special new hosts. The four partners grow rapidly and gain huge popularity with unique styles. Yet rising fame stirs fierce conflicts. Will their youthful startup team fall apart completely?

New grad Elena needs money for her mother’s surgery. She meets ruthless mafia king Dante, who offers a deadly deal: be his mistress for a million dollars. Trapped in his dark world, she softens toward him. As their 7-day contract ends, she chooses between freedom and a dangerous passionate love.

column1: Tea House Heroes Save the Nation!
column4: In 1937, an ordinary city teahouse transforms into a secret intelligence hub, refugee shelter and recruitment base during the war. Ordinary townsfolk, gang members, women and monks lay down their trivial lives to fight the invasion. Can these common people hold the rear line and defend their fallen homeland?

Where old alleys meet new towers sits a tiny convenience store that welcomes every wandering soul: a crying child, a broke dreamer, a lonely migrant... They don't just stock shelves. They mend broken hearts and warm cold loneliness. Inside these humble doors, you'll find your own story, and a few miracles you never expected.

column1: (Dubbed) Ma'am, Your Bodyguard Is a Heartthrob
column4: A battle-tested retired soldier becomes a cold female tycoon's full-time bodyguard to save his sick sister. Scarred and capable, he defuses constant threats. But he soon gets dragged into business schemes, kidnappings and mysterious revenge plots. Will he complete his guard duty and overcome all hardships?

column1: They Took My Eyes, Now I See Everything
column4: A man is blinded and betrayed by his wife. As he dies, an ancient jade awakens, showing him every secret, every lie, every enemy's next move through spectral text. With fake eyes and real rage, he enters the jade fair to destroy them all. The blind man sees. And the world will pay.

Ordinary 17-year-old Aria is forced to superstar Liam Cross’s concert and goes viral after grabbing the mic. A wrong car ride pulls her into his world. Torn between fame, exploitation, and her music dreams, can she stay authentic and turn their connection into a hit song and true love?

Bestselling mystery novelist Chloe secretly funds her professor husband Julian, only to find that he cheats on her with his student and squanders her money. She then disguises herself as maid Liv to gather evidence and exposes their affair publicly to ruin them all. With elite attorney Harrison on her side, every betrayer gets what they deserve...

After the prince's betrayal left her family bankrupt and her starving to death, Duke's daughter Vivian is reborn five years earlier with full memories. This time she rejects the engagement and love, choosing to save her duchy by rebuilding it into an economic empire through reforms and trade deals.

column1: My Boyfriend's Dad Is My Sponsor
column4: Tina, daughter of a fallen arms dealer, lost her family and her mother's sanity. After being cruelly dumped by Leon, she needed money for her mom's medical bills. Desperate, she gave herself to Mafia Don Vincent at a strip club—only to find he is Leon's biological father.

column1: Reborn to Give Up on My Wife
column4: At his wife Scarlett’s funeral, Noah learns she never loved him. Her heart always belonged to Adrian, her first love who died three years ago. Heartbroken, Noah killed himself at the funeral. Next second, he wakes up on their wedding day. Noah decides to set her free and walks away, only for Scarlett to realize she’s already in love with Noah.

column1: Frozen Heart and the Alpha's Flame
column4: To escape abuse, wolfless fodder Naomi marries the "brutal" Alpha Julian, shocked to find he’s her fated mate. But when Julian faces death for protecting her, Naomi's desperate will to save him awakens the universe's most powerful white wolf inside her. Just as the silver bullet fires to execute him, Naomi storms in.

column1: The Day the Beggar Saved the Country!
column4: A man becomes the best martial artist. But because he has too many enemies, his wife is killed in revenge. Before she dies, she asks him to stop the killing. He gives up his martial arts and becomes a beggar. A woman takes him in. To protect her, he starts training again. Then he finds out the country is in great danger. Will he step forward?

A 21st-century doctor wakes up on death row thousand years ago. With one hour to live, he cures the Empress's newborn, and becomes the most wanted man in the palace. Jealous physicians, deadly concubines, and political traps close in. But in a world of leeches and prayers, his modern medicine is the ultimate weapon.

column1: Buried Alive By Her Own Sister
column4: Betrothed to a powerful commander, she was betrayed by her own sister and left to die in a coffin. Everyone believed she was gone, but when he returned from war, he sensed a chilling truth. He pulls her from the darkness, igniting a brutal war of revenge. Now, the hunters become the hunted as he burns everything down to protect her. The ultimate battle for justice begins.

column1: I Fall in Love with My Contract Wife
column4: A poor college girl gets caught in an unexpected encounter and signs a flash marriage deal with a wealthy heir. Misunderstandings arise yet fade away with sincere care. Eventually, her hidden noble birth is revealed. The fake contract turns into genuine love, leading them to a grand happy wedding...

column1: The Sleeping God Awakens for Revenge!
column4: Two thousand years ago, he was humanity's greatest champion. Now, he's a forgotten myth sleeping in a tomb while his people are hunted to extinction. A saintess bleeds to wake him. He rises, and gods begin to fall. But when the true enemy hides in the heavens, can a mortal fury ever burn high enough to set the sky on fire?

Betrayed and broken, Sophia returns home to hunt for her missing senior, the man who knows the truth about her mentor's death. A blind date with Trevor, a tattoo artist, turns into a fake relationship to fend off her ex, yet he is the one she's been searching for. When buried sins resurface, can a love built on lies ever become her safest place?

column1: She Buried A Dynasty For A Hunter
column4: A hunter marries an orphan to repay a debt, and duty turns to love in the wilderness. When he discovers she's the last survivor of a massacred noble house, he rises as a war hero while she gathers evidence against the powerful. But when every enemy is dead and every debt paid, can two hearts forged in solitude belong anywhere but with each other?

Seven years in the shadows, Marcus built Orion Group with ruthless brilliance, only to be betrayed by the woman he loved. When Fay asks him to take the fall for her chosen protégé, Marcus walks away. Investors flee, secrets rot, and a rival empire rises from his ashes...

Vivian transmigrated into a short drama as a baby after criticizing it. Found by the Shaw family, they could hear her thoughts, so she revealed the plot: their seemingly sweet adopted daughter, Mandy, was secretly draining their luck. With Vivian's help, they foresaw and foiled Mandy's schemes. In the end, Mandy vanished due to backlash, while the Shaw family prospered.

column1: (Dubbed) Reborn Rich by Spending on My Wives!
column4: Betrayed and fallen low, a man accidentally unlocks a rewarding spending system. He gains huge wealth and meets diverse charming women. Mocked by his ex and her lover, he stuns all with his fortune. Amid tangled romances, can he find his destined love?

Grace saved Nate's life abroad. They were drugged, and shared an unforgettable night. Both back home now, neither recognizes the other. Nate wants to cancel his arranged marriage to her. But she needs this engagement to reclaim her legacy. Mistaken identities, power plays, and undeniable chemistry collide. When the truth emerges, what can they do？

column1: Why Are All the Monsters So Cute?
column4: Everyone is terrified of the deadly nightmare world where monsters hunt without mercy. Everyone except her. The bloodthirsty beasts look like adorable pets, and the ultimate horror looks suspiciously handsome. As others fight to survive, she's busy making friends with the monsters. But why do they seem obsessed with her?

Struck by lightning at an ancient tomb, a modern man wakes up in the first empire with a smartphone that can access the future. As he reveals centuries of history to the ruler, they race to rewrite a doomed fate. But can foreknowledge truly change destiny?

column1: What? A Driver Just Saved the Company!
column4: A rich young woman's parents pass away, and the family business falls into deep trouble. A man with a playboy appearance is asked to secretly help solve the crisis. But she mistakes him for a driver. When things get desperate, he finally reveals his true identity. How will the heiress react? Can he help save the business from disaster?

Jonas gave up a fortune for love. His reward? Three years of lies and a fake daughter. But signing the divorce papers unlocks his destiny. Overnight, the ridiculed stray dog becomes a ruthless trillionaire. As his cheating ex begs for mercy, a new System prompt flashes. Will he choose his new true love or unimaginable power?

column1: No Revenge Until a Snake Spirit Came!
column4: A powerful CEO plans everything carefully. But he never expects that his adoptive father is actually the man who wiped out his real family. Now he is seriously ill. Then he meets a woman. To his surprise, she is the reincarnation of a snake spirit. Between a human and a spirit, what kind of story will unfold?

She buys a luxury apartment, but her selfish brother occupies it for years. When his child destroys her design draft, landing her in huge trouble, her family even forces her to hand over the house and her savings. Heartbroken, she sells the property and moves away. Can she finally get out of this mess and make his brother's family pay?

A girl is sent to countryside by her father, who built his wealth via her late mother’s family yet abandoned her mom for another woman. After fifteen years, she fights the vicious stepfamily and gathers proof of their crimes. At the shareholder meeting, will she strip her own father of all corporate power?

A beautiful streamer moves into a creepy apartment. A peeping landlord watches her every move, while a predator hides under her bed. She seems like the perfect prey. But when the attacker ducks into her closet, he makes a terrifying discovery—a bloody corpse wrapped in plastic! Who is the real victim here, and who is the ultimate killer?

Elira, daughter of Zeus, traded her status for love. She gave up the Scepter of Zeus to crown her weak husband, Kaelos, as Divine Speaker. Yet, she was met with betrayal and humiliation. Kaelos thinks he's in control, forgetting that his glory was a gift from her. No more mercy. Elira awakens. The vengeance for dignity and supreme power begins now!

column1: Beg Me Back, Watch Them Cry
column4: Sophia, swapped at birth for a decade, returns to the Grayson family only to face her envious “fake heiress” stepsister, Olivia’s schemes. Betrayed and jailed for three years, she emerges as the renowned artist “S.G.” With Tristan’s protection, she exposes the past, refuses her family’s wealth, survives Olivia’s final attack, and departs for Paris to start anew.

Poor student Bella unexpectedly has a ONS with the celibate CEO William Norman, resulting in a twin pregnancy. The Norman family, desperate for an heir, is thrilled upon learning the news and vows to bring Bella back as Mrs. Norman. However, her mother and sister believe she's carrying a bastard child and personally force her to have an abortion...

column1: Good Luck, My Perfect AI Sister
column4: Once the favorite daughter, she was erased when a perfect AI sister arrived. Three years in a reprogramming institute crushed her soul. Now she's the obedient copy they wanted. Her parents moved on. Her brother still watches. Tonight, birthday candles glow in the next room, but no one remembers it's her day too... So why is she smiling in the dark?

Every time the car hit a bump, my eighteen-year-old stepson's burning hand pushed another inch up under my skirt. I bit down on the blanket because my fifty-year-old husband was sitting in front of us driving like nothing was wrong. If I'd known what the backseat of that road trip was about to become, I would've died before ever saying a word...

After raising her adopted son for over twenty years, a devoted mother is betrayed and targeted in a deadly scheme to harvest her bones. She escapes with the help of a childhood friend who turns out to be her long-lost son. Together they expose the villains and finally reunite.

A shadowy powerhouse with vast influence overseas returns after his grandfather's death. His family crumbles. Mocked by his fiancée's clan, he crushes them ruthlessly. A secret alliance strengthens his hand. But the real killer isn't the loudest, it's the one hiding in plain sight. And he's about to pay.

column1: Watch out! I am the Creator of Universe (Season I)
column4: After slumbering for hundreds of millions of years, the Creator God awakens upon being summoned by followers. To repair three broken planets, she uses her supreme divine power to subdue the greedy rulers effortlessly. Along the way, she also takes in four outstanding male protagonists who vie for her attention...

Young designer Daphne catches her boyfriend cheating, and dumps him on her birthday night. Still feeling devastated, she finds out she's engaged to Richard, her late father's billionaire best friend. They have a flash marriage. Upon joining his company, she gets bullied. While crises and misunderstandings are being resolved, their love deepens...

column1: (Dubbed) She Shifted All Her Pain to Me
column4: A gifted ballet orphan gets adopted yet suffers mysterious injuries. Framed by the family’s adopted daughter, she dies unjustly. Reborn in time, she uncovers the pain-transfer secret. At the dance contest, the schemer’s plot backfires, and her revenge unfolds.

Everyone thought he was a powerless loser. But when his sister faces a deadly trial, he reveals his true identity—the reincarnation of the Supreme Ghost King! As traitors and demons unite to destroy his family, he awakens his terrifying power to crush his enemies and rule the underworld!

column1: Kicked Out? I Coded My Way Back!
column4: He and his friend work together to develop software. They agree to share the profits fifty-fifty. When the software starts making millions a month, the friend kicks him out of the business. But the man has already saved all the proof. He decides to start his own company. Can he turn things around? And how will he get revenge on his friend?

column1: He Killed God With... A Fox?
column4: He watched his parents die for a sacred cauldron. Awakening a divine fate and a powerful system, he forges a nine-tailed goddess and a world-shaking dragon from two seemingly useless beasts. He crushes the traitor who started it all, only to discover the brutal truth and tears heaven down. But when a mortal kills a god, what rises from the ashes?

A divine food deity reincarnates as a young chef, stranded in countryside for a decade. Returning to inherit a famed restaurant, he finds his gifted sister-in-law trapped in a deadly duel plotted by greedy kin. Can a single signature dish turn her deadly fate around?

column1: (Dubbed) Fed the Baby? I Feed Him Ashes!
column4: He cheated 20 times while she bled from childbirth. He laughed at her tears. He never asked her last name. Now she's standing in his boardroom, wearing his company's logo, holding his future in a manila envelope. Some women beg for love, but this one built an empire on his betrayal.

A woman dates her boyfriend for eight years. On a high-speed train, he insults a poor farmer's wife. Later, he kills the woman for his childhood sweetheart. The woman is reborn and helps the farmer's wife instead. Then she finds out that the farmer's wife's son is actually a powerful chairman. What will the woman's kindness bring her?

column1: Weird Rules: I Hear Everything's Voice
column4: A black rain unleashed deadly rule games. A dying patient thrown into a brutal training ground wakes up able to hear objects talk. That gift helps him cheat greed, jealousy, and death itself. Cured, he enters an ancient opera troupe to save his fading parents. To win, he must pass a forbidden test and become the guide between two worlds.
The once nationwide sensation, the Mask Diva, retired for twenty years to return to family life, only to face rejection and betrayal from her husband and children.

Pregnant with Alpha Lucian's triplets, enslaved Elara watches her wicked stepsister mutilate her foot to fit Elara's lost diamond shoe and steal the Luna title. Surviving brutal torture, Elara awakens her supreme "White Wolf" bloodline. Backed by her royal grandfather's army, she crushes her abusers to reign as the True Luna!

column1: Fake Love? I Own Your Empire!
column4: An struggling actress is targeted by a wealthy heir, but he doesn't know she has a secret weapon: his every lie makes her richer! As she accumulates billions, she stops playing the victim. Joining forces with a financial genius, she orchestrated the ultimate revenge. At his gala, the hunter becomes the prey, proving she was the true master of the game all along.

Framed and forced into a werewolf correction academy, Freya unexpectedly finds herself bonded to three powerful Alphas as mates. But her wolf is growing dangerously weak — and if she cannot discover which of the three is her true mate in time, the consequence will be death itself...

Single mother Eva hides her daughter Olivia’s feline royal lineage from one-night stand Prince Lewis. Tracking stolen clan treasure into the human realm, Lewis discovers Olivia is his child. They reconcile amid conflicts, defeat scheming Bella and her father who robbed the treasure and killed Eva’s dad, then retrieve the relic and settle down as a happy trio.

18-year-old Mia Parker lives in a rundown trailer with her aunt Lena. After an accident gives her the power to see hidden value and risk, she flips secondhand finds, wins storage auctions, and builds a brand—fighting class prejudice, Blaire’s schemes, and two rival romances while lifting herself and others out of poverty.

Lyra and her stepsister Mia are both Betas. However, Kael, the Alpha of the Blood Pack, chose to marry Lyra. Lyra thought she had met her destined true love, only to find that Kael had always loved Mia. Shocked by her fiancé's betrayal, Lyra chose to swap marriages with Mia and marry the blind Leo. Eventually, Kael realized he had misidentified the person, and the one he had always loved was Lyra, and he deeply regretted it.

Six years ago, Cecilia spent one night with a stranger, Ethan, who vanished by morning, leaving her pregnant. She dropped out of school and raised their son alone. Now, desperate to pay for Theo’s arm treatment after an accident, she joins the Landreth Group—only to discover that her cold, powerful boss may be her son’s father.

Expert Eva, believing in innate IQ, abused twin Leon as "retarded" due to a faulty test, while praising average Noah. Locked up before exams, Leon escaped, scored full marks, yet was framed and fled. Years later, as mysterious Wall Street "Prof L", he crushed a summit puzzle. Accused by Eva and Noah, he revealed his identity, exposing the diagnostic error. Eva's faith shattered; she begged for forgiveness but was rejected. Leon redefined education, achieving ultimate redemption.

column1: Forbidden Love with a Single Dad
column4: A reserved teacher craves freedom deep inside. She meets an aquarium keeper by chance, and they discover kindred loneliness beneath different appearances. Warm affection quietly grows between them, but social gaps and buried secrets block their bond. Will their love conquer all hardships and heal one another?

A legendary man gives up everything to protect his family and lives a quiet life. On his daughter's birthday, she is set up by her classmates. To keep her parents out of trouble, she says nothing and keeps the pain to herself. When the man accidentally finds out what happened, he decides to stop hiding. How will he protect his daughter?

Raised in a strict clerical family, obedient Emma secretly joins an off-road motorcycle race to redeem her brother. She beats wealthy rebel Jack, sparking an intense attraction. Jealous campus queen Kayla schemes against her. Torn between family rules and newfound freedom, Emma struggles to choose between duty, love and her true self.

To win his mother Susan Carter’s approval, tycoon Hunter Lynn sends fiancée Iris Shaw to greet the humble woman arriving from the countryside. But a chance encounter in his own luxury jewelry store turns cruel when status is judged by appearances. One accusation ignites chaos. When Hunter arrives, what truth will he face?

column1: Wake up Daddy! Mommy is Dying！
column4: Ninety-nine days back, Catherine gave up everything—even her own life—to land that billion-dollar deal and pull her husband Ed back from the brink of bankruptcy. But Ed got it all wrong. He was dead set that it was Catherine’s sister Mia who’d bailed him out, and he treated Catherine like absolute garbage because of it.

column1: I Strip My Husband of His Power!
column4: A scheming private doctor intrudes into their marriage. Her husband defends the woman blindly, even when the doctor destroys her mother’s ashes. Deeply hurt, she plans to take back her power. What will happen next?

column1: Stuck in Class with My Rebel Son
column4: After a fierce clash with her wayward son over a missing fortune, a mother is sent 15 years back—into the body of an abused teen. Saved by a rebellious boy who turns out to be her younger son, she stays close to change his fate. But his rebellion hides a darker truth and a plot already in motion

She was the only true heir. But her mother was branded the other woman, while a stranger took her place as lady of the house. On that woman's birthday, the whole family celebrated the lie. So the real daughter did what had to be done and made every last impostor pay.
A redneck named Daniel Lynn stumbles upon a time-travel watch. Armed with modern gadgets and know-how, he constantly fixes messes for the ancients. Can this nobody really turn things around?

Everyone thought he was a powerless loser. But when his sister faces a deadly trial, he reveals his true identity—the reincarnation of the Supreme Ghost King! As traitors and demons unite to destroy his family, he awakens his terrifying power to crush his enemies and rule the underworld!

Cynthia exposed the God of War’s lies and married the Underworld God’s son. She healed her true love and found happiness. The regretful Aethon could never win his wife back and eventually vanished. The heroine began a new life.

Grace is just a waitress. But when she patches up a wounded stranger on a rainy night, she unknowingly saves Dante Moreau, the most feared mob boss in the city. He wants her. She says no — she's marrying Daniel, the man who once saved her life. But on her wedding day, Daniel betrays her with another woman. Before Grace’s world collapses, Dante crashes the wedding, takes the bride, and refuses to let her go. Will her heart betray her and fall for a man who takes what he wants?

Eleanor burns her dragon essence to save Kieran, shattering the Heart Crystal. Her stepsister Liya steals the credit. Stripped of power, she’s forced to wed the feared Lord Sylvan. As she leaves, Kieran learns the truth: she saved him. His regret arrives too late. Sylvan becomes her divine guardian. Reborn from ashes, Eleanor claims true love and damns her betrayers to the abyss.

She used her legal career to clear her lover of a hit-and-run, believing the victim was a stranger. She mocked the pursuit of justice, desperate to prove her man innocent. But when the truth hits—that the victim she helped bury was actually her own father—her world shatters. The man she betrayed is done with her excuses, and now, the path to redemption is paved with regret.

Betrayed by the mortal bloodline she swore to protect, the First Vampire Seraphina unleashes her millennia-old wrath. But when a ruthless ancient rival surfaces to enslave their kind, she must wage a dark, bloody war for free will—right as a deadly, legendary hunter protocol awakens.

Sherry believes the woman she’s torturing, Emily, is just a gold-digging mistress after her billionaire fiancé, Mason.What she doesn’t know is that Emily is actually the long-lost sister Mason has searched for over twenty years — and the one person who can decide whether Sherry will ever join the billionaire family.The moment Mason arrives, everything turns upside down!Hunter becomes prey，and the judgment begins.

Driven away by misunderstandings, the poor single mother raised her son alone for seven years. When she reunites with the cold CEO, he realizes the boy with the matching birthmark is his secret heir! As a jealous rival plots to destroy them, the CEO must drop everything to protect his family. But will she ever forgive him?

column1: Doomsday Supply Station: All My Staff Are Total Tough Nuts
column4: At the end of the world, a zombie virus outbreak occurs, and civilization collapses. The protagonist Lin Chen awakens the "End-of-the-World Supply Station System" 72 hours before the end of the world arrives.

At 10, Ethan was saved by elf Mia. She stayed with him, gave him luck and became mortal. To climb the career ladder, he hurt Mia for the boss's daughter. Heartbroken, she nearly died but was reborn by the forest god. Years later, regretful Ethan saw her happy life and passed away in sorrow.

column1: Dead Bride: She Faked Her Death
column4: She faked her death to free his future. He became the empire's top scholar to find her. Now he's the stranger who caught her bridal bouquet, and he's moving into her house to hunt the enemies who forced them apart. She thought their love was a sacrifice. He's proving it's the only thing worth fighting for.

A virgin's clinic visit goes wrong, and she's pregnant with her billionaire boss's child! But his scheming executive demands abortion. And his rivals smell blood. When he discovers the truth, he doesn't walk away. He breaks down her door. And that's when some mistakes become miracles...

column1: I Evolve Hard to Save the Shrunken World
column4: All humans shrink to tiny sizes overnight, civilization collapses into a giant wild world. A youth awakens an endless evolution system to grow stronger by devouring creatures. Teaming up with a cold yet kind girl, they fight monsters and evil forces. Can they find alien cores and reverse the terrifying world mutation?

After inheriting a family drug store, a broke girl finds a portal to ancient times. She trades modern meds for gold, saving a young general and a tribal chief along the way. But when another modern traveler starts a war and frames her, she must unite her two warriors to fight back. So, will she be the final winner?

column1: Scheme for My Wealth? No Way!
column4: A wealthy lady is admitted to a hospital after an accident. To seize her wealth, her greedy husband conspires with hospital staff to trap her. They arrange a male caregiver to seduce her and secretly install hidden cameras. Can she uncover the scheme and turn the tables?

column1: Pursued A Scholar, Caught A King!
column4: A duke's daughter boldly pursues a cold scholar. Beneath his icy facade, he hunts his mother's killer through palace secrets. When the truth surfaces, he discovers he's the stolen prince. On their wedding day, a final enemy strikes and she takes him down herself. Can a man who abandoned a throne ever belong to the woman who conquered his heart?

A wife divorces her husband. The next day, his family throws a lavish 360,000 dollar celebration. He tries to pay with her card. For ten years, she multiplied their wealth. They called her a burden. She planned her exit perfectly. Their victory party becomes a public disaster. But when a wife stops playing nice, who really loses everything?

A wife divorces her husband. The next day, his family throws a lavish 360,000 dollar celebration. He tries to pay with her card. For ten years, she multiplied their wealth. They called her a burden. She planned her exit perfectly. Their victory party becomes a public disaster. But when a wife stops playing nice, who really loses everything?

column1: Mom’s Back, Nobody Touches My Daughter!
column4: Five years after her mother mysteriously vanished, a young woman is lured to her family’s rural estate and secretly imprisoned by a cunning man who seizes control with a forged decree. When her mother miraculously returns, she races to uncover the truth just as her daughter’s coffin is about to be burned.

column1: (Dubbed) Scheme for My Wealth? No Way!
column4: A wealthy lady is admitted to a hospital after an accident. To seize her wealth, her greedy husband conspires with hospital staff to trap her. They arrange a male caregiver to seduce her and secretly install hidden cameras. Can she uncover the scheme and turn the tables?

column1: Done Being the Mistress of My Billionaire Crush
column4: Forced by desperation, Clara West surrenders her first night to Ethan Royce, the man she secretly loved for eight years. To him, she’s only a hidden mistress. When their deal ends, she walks away—only then does Ethan realize he’s already in too deep. But can he win her back…?

The moment Sean Chase is knocked flying by the campus belle, he develops the ability to see through things. These pretty women start throwing themselves at him one after another. But what’s truly going on? Who will he end up with?
Adapted from the Fanqie Novel "Zen me ban？ Shi jie shou fu dou xiang gen wo jie qian" by Shouhu Fanjie De Shen.

column1: Down the Mountain, Up to Godhood
column4: A young Taoist is tricked into leaving his mountain home and stumbles into a high-stakes tech world. Hired as a bodyguard after foiling an assassination, he must protect a groundbreaking invention while exposing a dangerous suitor’s deadly schemes.

column1: (Dubbed) A High School Girl Took Down the Mafia?
column4: She was just a girl selling fish to save her mom. Then a crime lord said, "I'm your father, now fight for my empire." She survived stabbings, betrayals, and a bullet meant for her heart. But instead of taking his throne, she called the cops, aced the college exam, and walked away. They thought they had a weapon. They got a witness.

column1: Buried Alive? Now I JUDGE You All.
column4: A noble girl is buried alive by her family on her wedding eve. She rises from the grave as a judge of the underworld, wielding a magic brush to make traitors suffer. A righteous officer hunts her but falls in love, becoming her guard. He takes a fatal blow for her, his soul shattered. Can the queen of death rewrite fate to save her mortal love?

column1: Drift King: Rise of the Phantom Racer
column4: On the remote mountain roads, a young mechanic hides a secret talent. Thrown into a world where raw speed clashes with ruthless ambition, his ordinary life collides with pride, betrayal, and buried legacies. Is he ready to claim the destiny waiting at full throttle?

Eileen took Lucian for her savior, only to know she was Vera's human shield. She then schemes a marriage swap to seize her mother's inheritance. On the wedding day, Vera walks into peril while Eileen weds the "crippled" Edward. When Lucian realizes Eileen was his true savior, he's full of regret. But Eileen's already been the empire's top power.

column1: Blood Revenge on New Year's Eve
column4: On New Year's Eve, she gave birth four times yet lost all infants. Labeled a cursed killer, she endured endless abuse from her cold spouse. She gradually uncovers a terrifying decade-old conspiracy. Who is behind the cruel deadly plot?

column1: Reborn 1995: Die Cold & Rise A QUEEN!
column4: Abandoned and frozen under a bridge, she woke up in 1995. Reborn, she burns old beliefs, protects her daughter with everything she has and open a restaurant. When they both finds happiness, the wicked chokes on their own greed. But when the past she escaped tries to crawl back… will her new peace survive the ghosts she left behind?

A restrained urologist loses control at first sight of a young race car driver. What starts in the exam room soon becomes a dangerous game of desire and devotion, as they test each other, cross every line, and fall into a love neither of them can escape.

column1: Mother's Love Is My Strongest Spell
column4: Eleanor is born gifted—but as a woman, she is denied everything, including magic. Her sister is sacrificed to a brutal marriage, her mother enslaved to save her. Taken by a hidden Archmage, she awakens forbidden power and commands dragons. When she returns, her house lies broken, its heir kneeling—this time, she comes back to conquer.

column1: Mess With Me, Meet the Cure
column4: Betrayed and sent away for eight years, a brilliant young woman discovers the cure for a deadly virus. Returning home to a treacherous family, she must fight for her inheritance and survive their schemes—revealing that the mysterious scientist they seek is the very one they wronged.

column1: Divorce a Ghost, Marry a King
column4:
He faked his death. She faked her grief. He returned with a mistress. She left with the fortune. Now at the empire's grandest feast, the man who hid in shadows steps forward, wearing the regent's crown. And the woman they both underestimated? She's holding the only thing that matters: the truth. 
Adapted from Fujun Jiasi Sannian, Jingcheng Fozi Fengkuang You Ta Pojie, by Qi Huangshu.

Reborn as a love-struck side character whose family was destroyed, she wakes up slapped and rejected by a prince. Bound to a ruthless system that kills her if she doesn't kiss a cold, twisted court official, she boldly flirts, saves his family, and turns from doomed pawn to powerful queen, winning his heart and rewriting her fate.

After making millions for his cousin’s fleet, a young captain is paid with insults and spare change. Furious, he buys a broken boat and heads to sea alone. One massive catch turns his life around overnight. But when his ruined cousin comes back for revenge, a deadly accident leaves everyone wondering who really won…

column1: The Royal Flame: Secrets of the Palace
column4: Jason Ritchie, fleeing assassins, shares a night with Wendy Young, promising to marry her. Fearing for her safety, he leaves, only to return and find she’s gone. Wendy refuses to abort and raises their son, Joe. Years later, when their blood reveals Joe’s royal lineage, Wendy enters the palace to survive. But Helene Johnson, consumed by jealousy, will stop at nothing to destroy them. Can Wendy protect her son—or will the palace crush them both?

column1: (Dubbed)Oh No! The Saintess and Her Mom Fight Over Me!
column4: For a hundred million years, a supreme hides as a weakling in the pleasure sect, preserving his pure body to await the rare innate spirit physique. The saintess hiding as a maid accidentally absorbs his hidden karma, drawing both her and her mother irresistibly to him. His true identity is about to be laid bare. What shocking chaos will break loose next?

Regaining his memory, a billionaire uncovers a horrific truth: his greedy wife tortured their daughter in a dark village for three years to steal his wealth! To hide the crimes, she fakes the girl's death for a hasty cremation. Smashing the coffin just in time, the enraged father vows bloody vengeance. Who will survive his wrath?

column1: Cheat Me With Pork? I'll Ruin You!
column4: He built a business with his best friend, only to be paid off with twenty pounds of pork. Betrayed, he strikes out alone. His former partner seethes, launching a campaign of sabotage. Each attack only sharpens his resolve. As evidence mounts, he rises from the mud to build an empire. But when he wins, what becomes of the one who made him ruthless?

column1: What? His Small Eatery Beat a Giant?
column4: A man works hard for his uncle at a restaurant. But his uncle only gives him pork and cabbage as his salary, while the uncle himself earns a lot of money. Heartbroken, the man quits. Using his excellent cooking skills, he opens his own restaurant. How will his uncle react when he finds out? And which restaurant will win in the end?

column1: Diner King: I Cook Up an Empire
column4: A talented chef works hard but is fired by his cousin. He decides to open a small shop across the street using his own cooking skills. Step by step, he drives his cousin's restaurant out of business. How does he do it? When his cousin finds out and comes for revenge, how will the two of them compete against each other?

column1: The Nirvana Lady: My Vests Are All Over the World
column4: Stella married under alias for love, only to be betrayed and divorced penniless by her husband and stepsister. She regained family power, returned secretly to crush their businesses. Revealed as top financial heir and hidden council leader, she exposed their crimes, brought them to justice, and joined hands with her confidant to reign supreme.

A reborn woman becomes a cannon fodder wife to a cold CEO in a novel. Her fake sister schemes. Her family uses her for dark luck. She fights back, sings like a star, and shines on live TV. The CEO falls for her real self. They expose the family's lies. She goes from pawn to queen. But can a woman rewritten from death truly escape her cursed page?

Descending from the mountain with unmatched medical and martial arts skills, a mysterious young master carries a marriage contract to seek revenge. A stunning billionaire heiress and her fiery best friend are fighting for his attention! Watch as he uses his god-like powers to crush his enemies and slap the faces of all who dare to look down on him!

column1: Reborn Foolish Princess, I Still Rule the World
column4: A top medical expert is reborn as a foolish noble lady. She craves a leisurely life but is constantly stuck in messy relationships and troubles. Forced into a marriage with a powerful lord, she has no choice but to keep growing. Unwittingly, she marches toward the peak of power against her will...

column1: The Billionaire Wife of the Underworld Tyrant
column4: Chloe hides multiple top identities, controlling harbors, mercenaries and finance circles. She takes ruthless financial and force revenge on enemies. Cold underworld tycoon Leo is utterly devoted to her. Facing wealthy rivals’ challenges, she crushes their power effortlessly, and outwits all foes with stunning hidden status.

A martial heir works as a butcher for 10 years before going to find his family. He reunites with his sister and mother, yet is rejected by his father for his humble job and poor innate condition. When a powerful rival clan threaten his family, he drops his disguise. With only a butcher knife, how will he cut down his enemies and rule the scene?

Fifteen years ago, Chloe saved violent mafia chief Kevin with a star necklace. Framed by her stepsister, she reunites with him years later. Her scent soothes his rage, and they marry by contract. Kevin defends her firmly. She leaves her toxic family and thrives in fashion. The necklace reveals their fate, and they end up together.

Left orphaned by her relative's evil plot, a noble young lady is confined and abused by her uncle and his family. Pretending to be docile, she plans revenge. She reveals her talent at her sister's wedding and learns to master elegant skills. She even teams up with a prince for her plan. Let's see if she can succeed in her revenge.

column1: Kiss or Kill? I Married My Target.
column4: A noblewoman's parents are killed by bandits with royal guard tokens. She blames the emperor. She becomes a courtesan and enters the palace for revenge. She falls for a guard who is secretly the emperor. Together they hunt the truth and find the real killer: a treacherous prince. They expose him. Can love born from lies ever be truly free?

Abandoned for her ability to foresee death, Lola uses her gift to save Jared, helps avert a Boa Constrictor catastrophe on a cruise ship, and is ultimately adopted by him—only for both to discover she is his long-lost daughter.

He's a broke rich kid with a thorny mouth and a broken heart. She's the quiet girl who never fights back, until she does. Thrown together as deskmates, they trade insults like weapons. Then he sees her at her worst. She sees him at his weakest. Turns out, the sharpest thorns are the softest wounds. And she's not afraid to bleed a little...
Rejected by her mate, this Omega accidentally claims three Alpha Kings! In a dangerous tug-of-war of obsession and desire, watch her shatter her ex's world and rise as the ultimate Queen of Wolves.

column1: Don't Mess With a Family Man!
column4: A former underworld king trades crime for family life, but when a cruel rival threatens his wife and newborn, he must reclaim his old power to protect them, only to finally renounce it all for a simple life of love and peace.

column1: (Dubbed) Look! My Betrayed Love Turns to Ashes
column4: Bearing a deadly forbidden art, I reincarnated from a brutal murder, trapped as a humiliated son-in-law. Betrayed, framed, and abandoned by my only love, I shall break through heavenly traps. All betrayers will bleed, and my ultimate vengeance shall never end.

column1: They See Terror, I See Beauties!
column4: A man travels into a world full of ghosts. Everyone is scared to run away, but he only sees stunning female ghosts. He dares to get close to all kinds of ghost beauties. Many are won over by him and become his companions. Ghost apocalypse? He doesn't think so..

column1: Bye, Cult! I AVENGED My Parents
column4: A girl's family is slaughtered. She trains for years, returns, defeats rival dojos, and enters a deadly tower. Inside, she learns her father was turned into a living medicine. She fights the demon lord, destroys the cult, and buries her parents. But can a warrior forged by revenge ever find peace after so much blood?

A noblewoman seeks revenge by marrying a feared court eunuch, plotting his death to seize a secret decree. When her schemes are exposed, they form an uneasy alliance, navigating court intrigues together, where danger, cunning, and desire intertwine.

column1: The Billionaire Dad I Never Knew
column4: A decade of devotion later, Aurora learns her wealthy husband Chuck neglects their daughter Molly for his first love Mia and her son. Heartbroken, Aurora seeks divorce; Molly gives Chuck a second chance but is hurt again, leaving with her mother. Aurora’s long-lost godfather offers Chuck a billion dollar order, which Chuck mistakenly attributes to Mia. Overwhelming regret hits when he learns the truth—but by then, Molly has completely given up on him.

column1: Hurt Me? I'll Seal Your Doom
column4: A brilliant young girl is brutally hurt by three men on a rainy night, which ruins her future and leaves her traumatized and disabled. Years later, she finds her kind fiancé is the ringleader back then, and hides her anger to plan revenge. Will she finally make those who hurt her pay and walk away to a better life?

Victor, the hidden War Lord, comes to M City, meeting his wife Daisy and daughter Lily after 18 years—separated by a fake abortion consent. Amid a zombie siege, he faces betrayal and Logan's army to defeat Odin. Exposing the lie, he reunites with his family, is bitten, creates a cure, and builds an alliance, saving the world and finding happiness.

Reborn after being murdered by her jealous sister, Elena rejects the golden medallion of power and chooses a rusted axe instead. Everyone mocks her for marrying Alistair, a lowly woodcutter, until he reveals himself as the hidden Elf King. From cast-off daughter to crowned Elf Queen, Elena rises through fire and betrayal to claim her revenge...

On a luxury airship, David KO’d world champion Santos with a single punch，then rips open his enemy’s chest to avenge his mentor. On the run, he hides as a janitor to protect Anna and her daughter. When her ex injures the child and rigs a savage bet, David tanks a full punch and blasts him out cold. As a cyborg smashes in, David crushes it one-handed—dominating all.

Scorned Vance's daughter Mia Clark, endures years of abuse while hunting her father’s killer. She targets reckless real estate heir Ethan Sterling for revenge. Ethan swaps identities with his twin Liam, to elope with his mistress. Mia infiltrates as his fiancée, plotting from inside. Both hide truths, and long-smitten Liam finally stops pretending.

8 months pregnant, Elaine goes into premature labor. A family elder's fateful choice leaves her newborn daughter, Stella, fighting for life alone. Her husband Lucian is told both wife and baby are dead. Years later, he discovers Stella actually survived, living in hardship with her mom. What can he do to mend this broken family?

column1: She Shifted All Her Pain to Me
column4: A gifted ballet orphan gets adopted yet suffers mysterious injuries. Framed by the family’s adopted daughter, she dies unjustly. Reborn in time, she uncovers the pain-transfer secret. At the dance contest, the schemer’s plot backfires, and her revenge unfolds.

column1: I Tricked All Deities Into Working for Me
column4: A corporate nobody transmigrates to the Westward Journey world, inheriting an omnipotent divine temple and surviving by an iconic bargain trick. All celestial beings and buddhas go crazy joining the bargain campaign, getting tricked into working for him as he rises to supreme sainthood.

column1: The Heiress, The Billionaire, The Baby
column4: He never forgave her for leaving. She spent five years in prison to protect him—raising their daughter behind bars. Now the little girl must find the father who doesn't know she exists. The truth will shatter everything. And love will have to fight like hell to come back.

A 3-month Trial Marriage? Secret heiress Quinn agrees to play the weak wife, but she never tolerates bullying! Using her elite hacker skills and medical genius, she dominates Hayes Corporation and claps back at haters. She even saves her cold husband, York Hayes. Years ago, a girl saved York during The Childhood Kidnapping. As York catches feelings, he notices familiar clues. Is Quinn his long-lost crush?

column1: A High School Girl Took Down the Mafia?
column4: She was just a girl selling fish to save her mom. Then a crime lord said, "I'm your father, now fight for my empire." She survived stabbings, betrayals, and a bullet meant for her heart. But instead of taking his throne, she called the cops, aced the college exam, and walked away. They thought they had a weapon. They got a witness.

column1: WTF! I Leveled Up by Having More Babies?
column4: With a trash-tier spirit root and sold into a powerful family as a useless son-in-law, he awakens a shocking system: having children makes him stronger. Can this most ridiculous cultivator overturn the brutal world of immortal cultivation with his... unique method of practice?

column1: Stole My Century? Enjoy Your CELL
column4: A billionaire's daughter hides her identity to find real love. She funds three poor men, shares her company, and agrees to marry one. They betray her for a young intern. She lets them swap in bad materials. The building falls. Then she reveals her true power and returns as queen to crush them. But can a woman they broke ever make them pay?

Because of an accident, Kelly was forced to hide her pregnancy and leave her seriously injured  fiancé Sabastian. Seven years later, Kelly returns with her daughter and unexpectedly reunites with Seb. He can't forgive Kelly's "betrayal" but couldn't help getting close to her...

A top female entrepreneur suffers brutal betrayal by her husband. Fully awakened, she exposes all evidence and forces him out with nothing. Yet the man is not giving up, and wants to fight back. Let's see how this boss lady takes her ex down for good.

column1: I Bet All I Have on Him
column4: A cold, wealthy heir avoids women, yet his family presses him to take a bride. Meanwhile, a helpless young girl is forced into an arrangement to save her mother, and her special scent catches his eye. He misjudges her humble request and keeps her beside him, letting her suffer endless bullying. Will she just let it end like this?

A man crosses into a beast world as a weak spider. His classmate dumps him to die. He unlocks a devour evolution system. He eats everything, evolves, tames monsters, becomes a god. When alien gods invade, he destroys them all. But can a tiny spider once left for dead really save humanity?

A legendary saintess, killed in battle 70 years ago, is reborn as a noble's bastard daughter. Hiding her identity at a royal academy, she must survive the very selection that once made her a martyr, before a cursed prince's awakening exposes the truth that could shatter the empire.

column1: Betray Me for a Princess? I'm Done Hiding!
column4: The tutor of a dynasty grows tired of court conflicts. She hides her true identity and marries a poor scholar. She helps him succeed in his official career. But after he gains power, his attitude toward her changes completely. She decides to return to the court and take her revenge. Will the scholar get away with it?

A bloodstained bride flees into the storm. Her groom and best friend corner her, forcing pills into her mouth to lock her away and steal her life. Three years of love revealed as a plot for her fortune. Now, she must play their deadly game. But when the prisoner learns the rules, who truly is the prey?

column1: You Loved A Lie, Mr. Idiot!
column4: For eight years, she was his stand-in lover, while he mistook another for his savior and pushed her aside to marry the wrong woman. The day she left, she married his powerful rival and built a new empire. Now the truth claws free: the woman he destroyed was his real salvation. But can a man who threw away a diamond ever reclaim it from the dust?

A wife plans to leave her cheating husband. She aborts their baby after ten years of trying. He swears love on TV but sleeps with his mistress. She leaves the surgery slip as a goodbye. He hunts for her, learns the truth, then ends up crippled. She finds peace with another man. But can a woman who lost everything truly heal?

column1: The Song That Led Me Home
column4: Eight-year-old Sarah busked to save her sick mother, but a brutal robbery tore them apart. Ten years later, Sarah wins a songwriting contest hosted by her now-billionaire mother’s company, only for her boyfriend to steal the credit. Humiliated and under attack, Sarah is saved when her mother recognizes her and opens fire on her assailants.

A young Taoist descends the mountain for one woman, but inherits an empire, four dangerous widows, and a war with an international cartel. With thunder in his fists and a goddess on his horizon, he'll learn: the underworld has no gods. But he's about to become its devil.

column1: Betrayed! From Coward to Fearless Lady
column4: While the CEO is away on business, an intern fakes pregnancy to pose as the madam, bullying staff and humiliating the acting manager endlessly. The wronged woman endures silently then finds the courage to fight back. Will the truth come out and change her fate forever?

She gave up her writing career to be the perfect wife and mother. Decades later, her husband and son betray her for a younger woman. So she walks away. No tears, no begging, just a divorce and a new name. They think she'll crumble. Instead, she writes a masterpiece, reclaims her fame, and watches her ex-husband die of regret. This isn't a revenge story. It's a woman finally choosing herself.

A billionaire hears his unborn baby's voice. And it tells him his wife is cheating. Then she jumps. He dies. Now he's back in the same moment, and the same voice is whispering the same poison. But this time, the voice isn't a miracle, it's a conspiracy. And if he doesn't learn to trust his wife before the baby comes, history will repeat itself... and this time, nobody survives.

Evelyn was the most beloved young princess in Asgard. Her elder brothers once swore to protect her forever. But everything shattered when their birth sister Ella returned. This girl kept hurting Evelyn and got her cast out. Heartbroken, Evelyn sacrificed her soul for the World Tree. Right after she left, her whole family fell into endless regret.

column1: My Sister Wanted Me Dead. I Took Her Crown.
column4: A modern nobody wakes up as a fallen princess with five years left before her sister turns her into a human pickle. She recruits a general, a gambler, and a scholar to flip the script. But her cleverest ally has loved her across two lifetimes. When loyalty turns to betrayal and the dead walk again... will she go soft again?

column1: My Ex-Wife Divorced Me. A CEO Stole Me.
column4: He is a once-in-a-century heavenly master. After three years of a loveless marriage, his wife kicks him out. Hours later, a stunning CEO makes him her husband. He heals the sick. He punishes the wicked. Everyone calls him a useless nobody. But when his ex-wife's empire crumbles... will she ever find out who he really is?

column1: You Broke My Tower? No 911 for you!
column4: A technician builds a legal cell tower. Neighbors destroy his father's photo and force a waiver. They remove the tower. No signal. A neighbor's dad has a heart attack. No ambulance. He's paralyzed. She blames the technician. He leaves. Now she has no signal and no one. But when fear kills sense, who pays the price?

column1: Back from Cultivation, Ready to Crush
