column4: A student spends 10,000 years becoming an immortal, only to return to Earth one day later. His father is dead, his mother trapped in debt, his invention stolen, his love taken. Now he fights back with godlike power. But dark forces from both worlds are closing in. Will even a saint be enough?

Rachel, a housewife who had lost her child, frequently dreamed of her husband Anthony being unfaithful. To ease her doubts, she sought out a "detective" named Bryan to uncover the truth, only to discover...

Chased off a cliff by her ex, Omega Selene meets Alpha Ronan, forming a fated bond. She awakens the White Wolf Queen bloodline. Framed by a witch, Ronan saves her. Rejecting her ex, Selene learns she's the lost Moonwhite daughter & Moon Goddess reincarnation. She stays with Ronan, has sextuplets, and rules as Queen.

column1: The ONLY Girl In A World Of Beasts
column4: A college girl falls into a world of beasts. As a rare female, three alpha kings, a wolf, a tiger, an eagle, all fight to claim her as their mate. She must awaken a divine skill and bind these feral warlords by contract. Yet in a world ruled by raw instinct, can a modern mind tame three savage hearts without losing her own?

Beaten into a fool for loving the wrong woman, he was taken in by a beautiful landlady. She fell for him, and his best friend gambled wedding gold to cure him. Then one crack to the skull awakened an ancient sage within. His eyes now pierce all things; his hands master every art. As the world kneels before his gaze, can he find himself back?

Sent as a spy to seduce a powerful official, she fails 189 times! Desperate for a divorce, she acts out, but he fiercely protects her instead. Discovering his secret room of her portraits unlocks her tragic memories. Can their love survive a devastating war, a faked death, and five years apart?

He's a broke rich kid with a thorny mouth and a broken heart. She's the quiet girl who never fights back, until she does. Thrown together as deskmates, they trade insults like weapons. Then he sees her at her worst. She sees him at his weakest. Turns out, the sharpest thorns are the softest wounds. And she's not afraid to bleed a little...

column1: OMG! My Jade Says I'm RICHEST's Kid?
column4: Murdered by her fellow orphan, she wakes up back at the adoption day. Her killer grabs gold, leaving bread, thinking it seals a life of misery. Years later, the killer humiliates her at a charity gala. But when a torn jade pendant reveals she belongs to the richest family of all, the laughter stops. But who truly raised whom in this twisted game?

column1: The Fiery Love That Saved Me
column4: A top actress gives up her career for her marriage, only to face betrayal. Heartbroken, she chooses to divorce, yet is trapped by financial freeze and public blacklisting from her ex. Then a rising star who's long admired her steps forward to help her make a strong comeback. Can she finally make those who hurt her pay and find her true love?

Once an IT talent laid off and reduced to a food delivery rider, he fell into a scam and drowned in huge debt. Saved by a reclusive trading stocks, he built a quantitative system with his tech skills. He stunned the nation by winning the trading contest, yet bigger secrets and love twists still await.

column1: The Heir Who Had Me Once
column4: A fateful night ties a young woman to a rich heir. She leaves quietly afterward, unaware he's been haunted and longs to find her. She then gives birth to a child in secret. Years later, to save her son, she is forced into a marriage. Unexpectedly, she runs into the man from her past. What will she do? Will she still choose to be his brother's wife?

Abandoned twice by her own flesh and blood, Zoe Lynn found a new life and family with Daisy Grey... In the end, her brother and mother acknowledged their wrongdoings. Will she accept their late-coming apology?

column1: Aborted My Baby? Enjoy Your JAIL!
column4: She hides her power for seven years to raise her husband. Pregnant, she catches him with the nanny. He lets her lose the baby. She exposes him, kicks him out with nothing. He teams with her enemy. She sets a trap. His building falls. He comes with a knife. She destroys him. He goes mad in prison. But can a betrayed woman ever trust again?

column1: Oops! Wrong Game, Demon Fell for Me
column4: She puts on smart glasses for a popular otome game, only to enter a brutal horror mansion by accident. Obsessed with renovating the haunted house, she purifies all vengeful spirits. The cold killing boss unexpectedly turns clingy, yet a cross-dimensional secret still lies hidden.

column1: She Came on My Last Day
column4: The top patriarch of the city’s elite lies on his deathbed, holding on for an unsolved regret. A breathtaking beauty suddenly arrives at the mansion. Can a dusty old stationery uncover the staggering secret buried for decades?

Mocked as a powerless mudblood, an outcast heiress is forced to marry a rumored monster. He recognizes his childhood savior, taking the blame for slaughtering her abusive family. Yet she hides a deadly secret: she wields a lost god-tier magic. As they finally wed, a massive army marches to destroy her bloodline. Can they survive?

column1: This Marshal Is Not One to Mess With
column4: A legendary war hero returns home in glory after defending the border. Hiding his true identity, he is coldly left by his fiancée and looked down upon by others. Dangerous nobles plot against him while foreign enemies dare to provoke his nation. Facing all this, he finally reveals his overwhelming strength, proving no one can belittle him.

Jason hid his billionaire identity to build a company from scratch with his girlfriend Ivy. But Ivy grew tired of his "ordinary" background and rekindled things with her ex. She stripped Jason of his VP title and threw him out. At a billion-dollar industry summit, Jason revealed his true identity. Will Ivy ever recover from the man she threw away?

Once the deadliest heir in the martial world. Now a nameless bumpkin. His wife leaves, taking their daughter. He follows, desperate to get his daughter back. But at the martial tournament, everyone sees only a lowly peasant. Then a demon appears. His daughter is in danger. Mask comes off, who pays?

column1: I Posed as a Man, the Empress Is Obsessed!
column4: A powerless empress plans to seize power while feigning a crush on the mighty regent. She never knows the real regent has long been replaced by a clever fox spirit in disguise. The fox does so only to repay a life debt and then return to the wild in peace. When will the empress find her real identity?

column1: (Dubbed) Careful! My Fiancé Has X-Ray Eyes!
column4: Born with the power of X-Vision, Noah descends into the modern world with one goal: to find Amelia, the fiancée he never met. Only through their union can he unlock his divine power. But Amelia sees not a destined husband, only a total pervert. Provoked by her contempt, Noah decides to prove himself and win her heart… even if it brings chaos to the world.

column1: Drive or Die: Nightmare on the Highway
column4: A father drives his family home during holiday traffic. A road-raging madman stalks them for miles. High beams, brake checks, direct ramming. Helpless on the highway, all he can do is protect his family's screams from becoming their last words...

column1: 3 Years in Prison, My Family Erased Me
column4: He spent three years in prison to save his family. But they repaid him with silence, shame, and stolen property. Now the man they threw away is coming back, not for forgiveness, but for everything they took. This time, revenge will make him a ghost they can't escape.

When monsters invade Earth, a lower-city outcast betrayed. But his hidden SSS power awakens, letting him bond with multiple elite mecha girls. Now he'll build the strongest squad, crush the nobles, and rewrite humanity's fate.

Ten years ago, the young crown prince watched his parents murdered. Hiding his skills, he spent a decade as a drunken playboy, mocked by all... Now, with secret power revealed, he's ready to reclaim the throne. But can he outwit those who plotted against him...?

Bullied at his graduation party, a system activates. Now he earns cash just by breathing! From broke loser to underground king, he crushes enemies and wins hearts. But when the system's tasks get deadly, he learns: becoming a billionaire is easy. But staying alive is the real game.

column1: The Empire AND Him? I Want Both!
column4: Reborn as a bullied heiress, a legendary master vows revenge. She crushes her enemies while tangling with a devoted billionaire. But as HIS mask slips, a shocking truth emerges: he is the supreme lord she used and dumped 5 years ago! Now, she won't just conquer the empire—she's going to claim her man, too!

Reunited at a birthday banquet, Oliver Jones finds his fake girlfriend’s uncle Simon Watson is his youthful love. Torn between passionate suitor Nina Watson and her obsessive, domineering uncle, he falls into dilemma. Defying secular taboos and shackles, the dominant man chases love fiercely, unfolding a thrilling forbidden love triangle.

column1: Hurt My Sister? I'll Crush Your World!
column4: A woman accidentally finds out that her missing sister is still alive. She sets out to find her. Her sister is in a very bad situation, but the two keep missing each other. Finally, they meet at a banquet. But things are not that simple. Unexpected things keep happening along the way. Can she successfully bring her sister back?

Nerdy Alicia hides a crush on her brother's best friend, Julian, the basketball captain everyone adores. She can barely say hi, until a sudden, daring makeover turns her bold. And Julian doesn't step back. Instead, brushing her ear before biting her lips: "Kitten, tell me who you are?" The game of "Catch me if you can" spiral wildly out of control.

column1: Bye, Fake Fam! My Kid is a BOY!
column4: A rich heiress marries a "weak" man. His sister lies about her baby. The family forces a dangerous test, almost killing the child. Her father saves the baby, then lies: it's a girl. The family abandons her. At the one-month party, she brings a boy. They beg. She divorces them forever. But can a mother who was betrayed ever let them back in?

column1: What? The Man I Love Is Gay?
column4: After five years of romance, a newly pregnant woman uncovers a horrific secret. The man she loves is gay, and she's treated only as a tool for bearing children. Crushed by cold betrayal and cruel schemes, she refuses to break down. With the help of a trusted friend, she is ready to make him pay!

column1: My Pen Pal, My Invisible Wife
column4: Lily married CEO Ethan to save a life and spent six years as his invisible wife. He never saw her... but he fell for her alter ego "Maple," his anonymous pen pal. When a rival steals her identity and her father dies, Lily returns with a corporate empire at her back. Can she destroy the ones who wronged her without losing herself?

column1: OMG! The Real Heiress Is Faking Crazy!
column4: She was released from the asylum. But the real madness was waiting at home. How do you fight an enemy everyone loves? How do you expose a lie when you're called the liar? Anna knows the truth. She plays the obedient daughter, smiling as her adopted sister steals her life. They think they've tamed her. They are wrong. And the real Anna is just beginning her game. Adapted from the short story "Jia Qian Jin Shi Xi Jing, Dan Wo Shi Shen Jing A" by Shi Tu Jiu Jiu, from Fanqie Novel.

column1: (Dubbed) She Had No Idea How Rich I Am!
column4: Now recovered from a serious illness, Dorothy Hale is leaving the hospital with her granddaughter Julie Hale. Why would she be humiliated by her son’s former lover Fiona Frost and her daughter Joy Shaw?

column1: Bye, Son! My "Worker" Hubby's a KING
column4: Her life is dark. Her son sells her for cash. At her lowest, a worker saves her. He remembers she saved his life with soup twenty years ago. He marries her as a nobody, then reveals he is a billionaire CEO. She rises. But can a woman betrayed by blood finally find her spring?

column1: They Fight Zombies. I Collect Junk
column4: A college kid pulls an all-nighter at an internet cafe. Wakes up on a highway survival game where the only rule: keep driving. His upgrade system? Only works on trash he picks up himself. So now he's the best-dressed garbage collector on the road. Yes, he got himself a team, but now he's looking for two missing members...

column1: Wait, I'm an Interstellar Guide Now?
column4: I wake up and find myself reborn in an interstellar world, trapped in the body of a notorious rare guide, who's cruel and reckless, taking pleasure in destroying the mental power of powerful sentinels. To survive, I flee the base overnight. Yet a terrifying question lingers: why do they look at me in an odd and intense way?

column1: Crazy! I Was Reborn as a Unseless Clownfish
column4: Shockingly, an ordinary human transmigrates into the ocean and becomes a useless clownfish stuck in its original form for two decades. Publicly rejected by princesses from five powerful sea clans, he is banished to the perilous abyss. Left for dead, what shocking hidden strength will he awaken to turn the tables?

An ordinary migrant worker steps up as a bodyguard for a business leader and her headstrong relative. He thwarts vicious business plots, yet gets dragged into cutthroat corporate battles. A presumed deceased man returns in secret, allying with a greedy consortium. As his mysterious background unfolds, can he defeat the powerful financial foe and protect those he cares for?

column1: CEO of Leeching? No, Music God!
column4: A genius man is reborn and only wants to live off a rich woman. He hides all his talents. But one of his handwritten notes gets out, and his true abilities are exposed. He is then forced into danger. The whole industry turns against him. He decides to stop pretending. How will he fight back? And how will the people around him see his talent now?

column1: Kissed the Ghost Bride, Got a Billion!
column4: A woman is pulled into a game world and accidentally gets a system that helps her get rich. She is forced to kiss the bride, only to find out the bride is a handsome man. She uses her skills to clear the game and win a billion dollars. But when she returns, she finds things are not that simple. What else is waiting for her?

column1: Return of the Abandoned Basketball God
column4: Ethan and Dylan are the sons of the renowned basketball coach Ray. When they were five years old, they were involved in a car accident. Ethan's stepmother drained his blood to save her own son, Dylan, and abandoned him. Fortunately, a paint worker named Hank adopted Ethan. Thirteen years later, Ethan has become a very talented basketball player. Meanwhile, Dylan and Ray have been looking for him all along. They met on the basketball court...

column1: She Built an Empire While They Cried
column4: After eight years of betrayal, she was killed to protect her family's favorite. Given a second life, she cuts ties and rises as a business icon. But when her brothers finally realize their mistake, can any apology undo a lifetime of cruelty?

column1: Don't Tell Him He Can't Fight
column4: He's dying. The cure? Never fight. So his father fights for him, in bloody tournaments, trading bones for medicine. The son sees rejection. The enemy sees weakness. But when betrayal burns the family down, the boy with black blood will finally raise his fist. And the world will learn: the forbidden punch is the deadliest of all.

column1: Why Did My Dead Husband Return?
column4: Left widowed on her wedding night, a young bride is forced to face a fatal burial ritual. To survive, she schemes carefully and stirs the heart of a pious cultivator, tempting him to break his sacred vows. Just as forbidden love begins to brew, her late husband unexpectedly returns. What lies beneath all this? Will she make it out alive?

column1: Just a Toy Plane. Why the Global Panic?
column4: In a fierce global aviation race, a mere model enthusiast takes on a mysterious commission. At a routine airshow, his homemade "toy plane" defies physics, shattering records and stunning the world! Global experts are left dumbfounded, desperate to hunt down this hidden genius. With superpowers scrambling, what will he unveil next?

A man wakes as a stray dog in a beast tamer world. A shunned girl adopts him. He unlocks an evolution system: more love, more power. From mutt to divine beast to human form, he rises. He wins tournaments, crushes evil clans, and saves humanity from destruction. But can a former dog and a discarded girl truly become the world's last hope?

In her past life, Eva died after donating bone marrow to save her father, Wyatt, only for him to think it was Eva's stepsister, Raina, who made the sacrifice. Raina had it all as the golden child star, adored by Wyatt and overshadowing Eva with her mother's secret past. Now reborn, Eva vows to break free and claim the life she deserves!

Poverty-stricken med student Celeste unlocks X-ray vison. She saves a high-profile heir from death, hits big in treasure markets and stocks, turning from a nobody into a wealthy legend. Sought after by countless elite men, she remains unshaken. Witness her forge an unstoppable queen’s life!

A brilliant woman fakes a relationship with the CEO to destroy his family. She plays his brother, fights his mother. He knows her secret. He lets her. Then she discovers: the man she swore to ruin is her adoptive mother's lost son. He hid the truth. She leaves. He follows. But when revenge turns to love, can two enemies ever truly forgive?

A man wakes in a world where only women wield magic. A female general crushed the royal family and seized the throne. He is the last prince of the fallen dynasty, locked in a dungeon. Then a system awakens. His mission: become the first male emperor. But can a powerless prisoner overthrow an empire ruled by magical women?

column1: F Rank? I Got a God-Tier System!
column4: Dumped by his S-rank ex for being an F-rank loser, he faces death in a monster apocalypse. Suddenly, he awakens a god-tier system! By contracting and evolving stunning weapon girls like a succubus and an angel, he builds an unstoppable team. Watch the abandoned underdog rise to crush his betrayers and dominate the wasteland!

A top achieving high school girl lives a plain daily life until a quiet transfer student arrives out of the blue. As they grow close to each other, he notices her hidden independence behind her gentle look while she finds the soft warmth under his cold exterior. Day by day, their hearts draw near and stir up a sincere, healing teenage crush...

A modern pharmacy student wakes up in a broke villager's body, accused of sleeping with a widow. To save her from punishment, he promises to pay off her debts. Then he cures the noble, builds a tea empire, and becomes a local legend. But when corruption reaches the top, this "lazy peasant" must choose: stay quiet or lead a rebellion.

column1: I'm a Fox Now? And I Can Evolve Forever!
column4: A famous idol travels across time and becomes a red fox. He is thrown into a barren mountain by a high priest, but then he activates an evolution system. In the face of danger, he keeps evolving and also makes many friends. How will he escape this wild place? What will he evolve into? And who is the mastermind behind all of this?

column1: On the Run, Tamed the COLD Emperor
column4: A woman travels into a book and becomes a young lady. The moment she opens her eyes, she is forced into a deadly situation. Then, she enters the palace and catches the interest of a powerful man. Before long, neither can hold back their feelings. Who is this powerful man? And how will she survive inside the palace?

They thought I was just a perfect wife. I was an underworld queen in disguise. Seven years I played the part for a worthless husband, until his pregnant mistress tried to push me out. One call later, his elite unit was gone. Backers? Mine. Commander title? Mine. Divorced, I built an empire. All his glory? I lent it.

column1: The Cowherd Can't Be This Overpowered
column4: A rich playboy escapes an arranged marriage by fleeing into an immortal sect, only to get demoted to a cowherd. Then he stumbles upon a heaven-defying power, a secret realm cultivation system. Now he's the laziest cowherd and the deadliest cultivator. Not a bad trade-off, huh?

Jonas gave up a fortune for love. His reward? Three years of lies and a fake daughter. But signing the divorce papers unlocks his destiny. Overnight, the ridiculed stray dog becomes a ruthless trillionaire. As his cheating ex begs for mercy, a new System prompt flashes. Will he choose his new true love or unimaginable power?

column1: The Abyss Game: Awaken A God-Tier Glitch!
column4: Terminal cancer? A dying man's only hope is the deadly Abyss game! Facing instant execution, his left hand awakens a god-tier glitch: seeing the future. While others die screaming, he pre-solves rules, loots items, and clears realms with a smirk. But a dark conspiracy lurks... How deep into the Abyss can he survive?

column1: (Dubbed) From No. 1 Slacker to Dragon Lord!
column4: A lazy office worker is reborn as a worthless koi at the bottom of the monster world. With a Devouring Evolution System and ridiculous luck, he eats his way from trash fish to dragon. He crushes bloodline snobs, rules the banquet, and rewrites the fate of the lake. But when the throne is his… can a former slacker stop pretending he doesn't care?

column1: What? A Zombie King Protects a Human Baby!
column4: Amid the zombie apocalypse, a ruthless undead king gains supreme power over all corpses. He accidentally picks up a fragile human infant in the ruins. The cold blooded overlord turns into a fierce protector, yet this tiny child hides a terrifying, formidable secret no one could foresee.

After three years of marriage, Nora Lane discovers her marriage certificate is FAKE—and she’s still legally single.
Her husband Adrian Stone, the man she trusted since childhood, is actually married to someone else: Clara Hayes, a replacement he found while Nora was abroad.
Now, the real lover has become the other woman.
Betrayed and enraged, she’s ready to crash his perfect lie.
“You replaced me? Let’s see who replaces who now.”

Ethan Blake works tirelessly to support the woman he loves, dreaming of a future together. But on the day he plans to propose, she walks away and chooses someone else. By chance, Nina Grant, a powerful CEO, sees it all and makes an unexpected decision that changes his life overnight...

When his sworn brother Felix dies under mysterious circumstances, elite mercenary Adrian goes undercover to protect Felix's wife Luna. But the deeper he digs, the deadlier it gets. Adrian fights threat after threat... until his true identity as "the Judge" is exposed. Can he still save Luna before the conspiracy swallows them both?

column1: Useless Wife? I'm a Billionaire Heiress!
column4: Aria hid her billionaire status to build her husband's empire, only to catch him cheating! But his greedy mistress mistakes Aria's heirloom for his wealthy mother's; Aria plays along. Smirking, she manipulates the mistress into destroying her actual evil mother-in-law. Time for the ultimate revenge!

Ms. Nightingale was once the leader of the Dragon Squad, but she gave it all up to become an ordinary mom. She thought she could stay away from trouble. Until her daughter, Victoria Hayes, became a victim of school bullying. Blades can be hidden, but a mother’s love never compromises. Now that Nightingale has returned, how will she seek justice?

column1: (Dubbed) You Take Her? Fine, I Quit You!
column4: After marrying Sean, gravely ill since childhood, Sophie resigns as a rising brigadier and vanishes for three years to hunt down a cure. She returns with the antidote in hand, only to find Ethan tangled with a self-proclaimed miracle girl, Lila, and demanding Sophie surrender her place as wife. On his wedding day, Sophie shows up smiling. If he wants a new bride, he can start by signing the divorce papers...

A dimension-jumping enforcer with a celestial eye gets stuck on Earth. His mission? Escort a dangerous kid home before an immortal-worshipping cult steals his power. Teaming up with a fiery spirit tiger and a ragtag crew, he takes on divine conspiracies and digital abysses. Saving the world is hard enough without a retirement plan...

column1: Reborn as a Flea: Suck Blood to Win
column4: A cunning man is reborn as a flea. His only way to evolve? Biting and sucking blood. As strange markings spread across his tiny body, he inches closer to growing wings and godlike power. Then he meets a cold, sharp-minded young woman. What tangled fate awaits them? And what will he transform into as he feeds?

column1: (Dubbed) Reborn Princess: My Four Beloved Consorts
column4: An overworked employee reborn as a hated cruel princess gains a wealth system. She pampers and heals four dangerous S-rank contracted consorts to rewrite her tragic ending, yet hidden murderous plots refuse to fade...

column1: Snake Year Salvation: CEO's Bargain Bride
column4: After her migrant - worker father is severely injured by a dishonest employer, Emma Miller goes to the city to claim compensation. She has a passionate night with the reserved heir Jacob Smith and is misunderstood. Emma finds she's pregnant, but can't pay her father's medical bills and is kicked out of the hospital. With no place to stay, she and her father live on the streets. Just as they face a life - threatening situation, Jacob shows up, clears the misunderstanding and saves them.

Medical student Maria is forced to marry Vincent, her family’s enemy who killed her father. Vincent seeks revenge but protects Maria, revealing her father’s crimes. They fall in love, yet Maria leaves to protect him. Ten years later, she returns with their daughter. Vincent abandons everything for them and proposes.

column1: Dr. One-Night Stand is My Husband!
column4: She wanted a divorce, so she hired a male model for a scandal. He wanted a wife, so he let her believe he was just a stranger. Now she's trapped in a marriage she can't escape, with a man who planned every step of her fall. And the worst part? She's starting to like it.

column1: They Mocked Me. Now I Bill Them.
column4: After three years as a fool, a man awakens with a mysterious legacy. Suddenly, he heals the dying, humbles the powerful, and cuts through enemies like air itself. In a city of power plays and hidden legends, he rises unstoppable. Turns out, rock bottom makes a great launchpad...

column1: My Boss Is a Villain? Watch Me Fix Her!
column4: Claire wakes up as a doomed sidekick in a toxic novel. Her mission? Cure the villainess Stella of her fatal obsession. Out with the scumbags, in with the billions. But as they rewrite their tragic ends, a hidden shadow begins to stir. Can they truly outsmart fate before a new trap closes in?

column1: You Thought She Was Nobody? Think Again!
column4:
To pay her mother’s medical bills, Lydia Quinn hides her beauty and works as a "plain" assistant to top star Ethan Grant—the boy she once saved.
Used as a shield for another woman, she endures five years of hurt before walking away.
Three years later, she returns under her real name-and wins Best Actress.
This time, she chooses herself.

After an alien invasion brings the end of the world, a reborn man returns with a plan to change fate. He sets out to build a futuristic, technologically advanced heavenly court to defend his world. Starting with protecting his home planet, he gradually expands his power across the stars...

Leticia Shelton's return triggers a conflict with her husband over his scheming aide, culminating in the brutal death of her beloved horse by his orders, which finally shatters her heart and drives her to decisively strip him of all his power.

She thought she’d face it alone: a surprise pregnancy, no safety net, no turning back. Then the baby's father appears: rich, relentless, and determined to take over her world. When love arrives this forcefully, is it a rescue... or the start of something she can't escape?

column1: Father! I Rise after You Crushed Me
column4: Raised in seclusion, a martial prodigy returns to his family, only to be framed by his jealous sibling. Abandoned and forced to cripple himself by his cold father, he severs all ties. Taken in by a grand master and reborn with supreme skills, will his brutal revenge bring the arrogant family to its knees?

column1: Reborn Princess: My Four Beloved Consorts
column4: An overworked employee reborn as a hated cruel princess gains a wealth system. She pampers and heals four dangerous S-rank contracted consorts to rewrite her tragic ending, yet hidden murderous plots refuse to fade...

Pressed into marriage, she impulsively weds a man she finds on the street. He seems like a nobody until fragments of a lost past surface. As his memory returns, so does the truth behind a deadly crash. But when his real identity comes back, will their marriage survive?

column1: Brother, Wake Up My Frozen Heart
column4: She froze herself for science, but really to escape his betrayal. For a decade, her adopted brother guarded her frozen heart, until she woke. Now her ex-husband begs forgiveness, but she's finally seeing clearly. One man lied. The other waited. In a world where time stops for no one, can a frozen heart learn to love again?

Reborn at her forced wedding, Shannon Young refuses her tragic end. She chooses to marry Arthur Xavier instead of Silas Shaw.
With her innate gift for healing, she cures Arthur. Together, they face schemes from Lucia Frost and her own past.
But in this new life, will her choice lead to salvation, or a different kind of ruin?

Vitan, a mafia boss, locks his fiancée Emily in the attic. His assistant Ellie, who looks identical to Emily, believes Vitan loves her instead. Visiting the attic, Ellie misinterprets Emily’s intentions as trying to seduce Vitan using their resemblance. She torments Emily and even kills her unborn child. Learning what happened, Vitan rushes home...

column1: A Pet Turtle? The Supreme Beast!
column4: In a monster-ravaged world, beast taming is dead. To save his dying sister, a poor boy awakens the ultimate system and contracts his pet turtle! Surprise—it has a god-tier bloodline that evolves by devouring enemies! Taming other mythical beasts, he crushes a millennial conspiracy. Watch this underdog rise to become the supreme Beastmaster!

column1: My Last Wish: Find My Lost Husband
column4: A female cellist is terminally ill and returns to her home country. Before she dies, she needs to find someone to take care of her child. She has no choice but to look for her husband, a bodyguard she married in a quick ceremony four years ago. Why did she marry a bodyguard? Will the two meet again? The truth is about to be revealed...

Betrayed at nine and left for dead by her own mother, Sienna survived the unthinkable. Now a mystic master, she returns to a family that traded her soul for a fake. They expect a victim, but they found a judge. While her kin rot in their own greed, Sienna holds their fate in her hands. Who survives when the executioner is a daughter?

column1: I Made Up Your Fall, Empress!
column4: After escaping a massacre, make-up prodigy Maria Ziegler enters the palace to revenge on Empress Raina Manne. She allies with princess Rachel Manne and Raina's male consort Shawn Clark, both of whom secretly share the same goal with her. As they plan to seize power, two lustful officials set traps. Can they truly bring down that ruthless ruler?

column1: How the Doctor Crushes Those Nobles
column4: A male nurse with a secret: Nathan carries the legendary Pure Sun Body, a gift so rare that warriors would kill for it. Once awakened, he gains unstoppable strength and supernatural vision. Now the most powerful forces in the world are watching him... Can an ordinary nurse handle becoming extraordinary?

A man is thrust into a world overrun by demons and joins an elite force tasked with eradicating evil. Armed with a mysterious power that devours darkness, he rises from a rookie to a feared warrior. As illusions, cursed puppets, and ancient conspiracies close in, every victory pulls him deeper into a truth that could change everything…

Ethan Cole gave up his legal career to be a loving husband for three years, but Clara Hale never noticed. When her first love returned, she blamed Ethan without a thought. Feeling humiliated, he left and returned to court as the Legal King, but she still has no idea who Ethan really is...

column1: The Love Rewrite: 5 Days to Go
column4: Five days before her wedding, Vanessa learns her fiancé, Charles, plans to drug her to fulfill his former love's dying wish. Heartbroken, she pretends to lose her memory and vanishes on the wedding day. In Northfield she meets Henry, who sees her true self. As Charles returns with regrets, what will she choose between past lies and real love?

column1: 30 Days to Divorce: A Second Chance at Life
column4: On her deathbed in her past life, Melanie Griffin realized that her husband, Arthur Diaz, and Nathaniel Diaz never truly loved her. With this awakening, she is reborn seven years into her marriage with Arthur. This time, Melanie decides to let Arthur be with his true love, Brianna Hayes, while reclaiming the career she gave up in her previous life.

Ryan Landon, a cold billionaire, fires his secretary Sofia after she confesses her love. But when a ruthless power struggle erupts inside his own family, he finds himself drawn to the very woman he rejected... Will he risk his empire for her?

column1: I Got Nothing and Still Won!
column4: When portals tear open the world, dungeons rise and monsters run wild. Power is survival and only the strong make it to the top. On awakening day, one outcast gets no class at all. Mocked by everyone, he opens a hidden system… and breaks every rule. But what happens when the “weakest” rewrites the game?

Yvonne Gogh joins the company and stuns the President Julian Ford with a presentation exposing critical system flaws. After ending a frivolous relationship, she devotes herself to work. Her exceptional project reports and sharp insights earn Ford's profound respect. With her outstanding performance, she becomes nearer to her big boss.

He was a farm boy hidden in the mountains by his father, yet also a blade sharp enough to shake the empire. One duel stuns the world, one past romance stirs the storm. As long-buried secrets rise to the surface, the clash of steel ignites a journey where blood, fate, and vengeance collide.

column1: My Yoga Wife, Your Chose Wrong!
column4: Misled by Benjamin, Yvette cheats on her husband Lucas and neglects their daughter. She had no idea Lucas secretly supports her career, while Benjamin's real intention is to steal Lucas's research outcome and swindle Yvette's assets. When the truth emerges, Yvette is remorseful and begs for forgiveness, but what choice will Lucas make?

column1: Dumped as a Nobody, I Return as a Queen!
column4: For three years, Chloe lived as a girl from the slums, playing the devoted "simp" to Liam.  After a final cruel rejection, she vanished with only a chilling "Game over." No one knew her true identity was a secret that could shatter everything. Now, as she prepares to marry another, a vengeful Liam plot to destroy her big day. When the truth explodes, who will be left standing? Adapted from the short story "Bu Dang Tian Gou Hou, Xiao Cao Ta Hou Hui Le" by Nan Xiao Fei, from Fanqie Novel.

column1: The Ring I Dropped Like a Goodbye
column4: Engaged? Pregnant? For years, he called me wifey. Now I watch his wedding among strangers, labeled a gold digger. I lived with him, wore his ring, yet he hid me. I left one gift and vanished. Beckett will soon lose what he can never replace—and a shocking truth is coming.

column1: Oops, I Saved the Prince With a Gun...
column4: A modern medical PhD wakes up as a disgraced, "foolish" royal consort in a ruthless court. Drugged and cornered, she saves a prince with a gun... then uses him as her cure. By dawn, she's gone, her weapon isn't. Then a case of mistaken identity ignites a dangerous game. Royal drama just met its match...

column1: My Modern Gadgets Rule Ancient Times!
column4: A woman travels back to ancient times. Her father forces her to marry. To avoid marriage, she tries to choose a female demon lord instead. But this pulls her into even more trouble. Then she accidentally finds out she can get modern supplies. In this ancient world, she uses modern tools. What kind of story will unfold?

column1: The Caged Girl & The Fake Guard
column4: Hazel Windsor is held captive by her "dad". After watching her mom die a terrible death, she plans to use her bodyguard Damian to get revenge. What she does not know is that Damian hides a secret identity. What starts as mutual use slowly turns into a deep and dangerous bond. Will they finally get what they want and be together?

A young orphan girl raised by her rescuer mistakes devotion for desire. When his family falls, she begs a powerful man for help. His price? Her body. What starts as a deal grows into intense attraction. He's loved her secretly for years. Torn between gratitude and longing, she must choose between her guardian and the man who risks all for her...

A random encounter on graduation night changed her life forever. Years later, she works beside a powerful CEO while raising three children alone. She hides their secret connection in fear of losing her kids. Yet the cunning little ones sense the truth and unite to tease their unknown father. Will the buried secret finally unravel?

column1: I Signed My Freedom While He Was Holding Her Hand
column4: Pregnant and diagnosed with a terrifying illness, Vivienne’s world collapses when she finds her husband caring for his pregnant mistress. After his cruel betrayal, she walks away with a smile, signing divorce papers and taking what he can never replace. Her sweet revenge is only just beginning.

A 27-year-old housewife discovers her husband’s affair with their 50-year-old nanny. Soon after, they join hands and kill her. She is reborn just before the tragedy. She decides to get revenge. Can she stay calm and face these two disgusting people? And can she use her clever plans to take back everything that belongs to her?

column1: Rule One: Don't Talk To Her!
column4: Ever since I started "looking after" my friend's girlfriend, things haven't been right. My memories blur and people vanish... I can no longer tell if she's a girl to protect or the horror itself. Before my mind shatters, I have to find an escape. But if the rules were never meant to be followed, why is she still whispering from inside the walls?

She was six, collecting trash to keep her mother alive. He was a billionaire who thought she had stolen his pendant. The grandmother saw the truth in a single glance: those eyes, that chin—she's his. Now the coldest man will burn it down to find the daughter he never knew he had, and the mother who paid for his child with seven years of silence.

A modern OB-GYN, Liam, time-travels to be a death prisoner. To survive, he seizes a chance by taking a Royal Edict to stimulate lactation for Consort Stella. Using his modern medical skills to solve palace crises, he rises to the Director of the Nursery Department, and gradually conquers the court. But can he handle all the girls' hearts he's won?

Fresh from prison, Rock Lynch seeks peace at Lynch Market. While Grace Lee treats him like a failure, a clash with the Black Skulls reveals a lethal edge. When the President of Riverton Chamber of Commerce bows to this outcast, the city trembles. Is he a lowly market clerk, or the one man the entire Styx Brotherhood fears?

column1: (Dubbed) The Quiet Bride Is a Killer
column4: Zane Shaw, now a triumphant billionaire, wants revenge on ex-wife Eve for leaving him at his lowest. He demands she remarry him, expecting the same meek, obedient girl who obeyed her family and walked away. But Eve left to join an elite special forces unit. She’s no pushover, she’s a fierce, highly trained warrior ready to shatter his assumptions.

column1: Debts or Brides? He Gets Both!
column4: By order of Master Cade, Cain Cross descends Dreadmount with the Soul Ledger to collect debts. He rights wrongs, punishes the corrupt, saves his cousin-in-law Maya, tames heiress Bonnie, finds his destined Scarlett, and meets ghost Lily. In the end, he enjoys a shameless bliss with all four women!

Warlord Dylan Evans' only daughter Lily returns home early. She finds her father married to Lucy Gray, a lookalike of her late mother. Mistaking Lily for a seductress, Lucy, her maid Sarah, and brother Edwin torture her brutally. Near death, Lily escapes. Can she rise to expose Lucy's mask of virtue and hidden crimes?

When death came knocking, her fiancé saved another woman. That was the final betrayal for Evelyn Carter. Now, the world's most powerful hidden heiress is done playing the poor girlfriend. She's going home to reclaim her throne and unleash hell on everyone who wronged her. Watch them beg when they discover the fortune they foolishly threw away.

column1: From Deal to Disaster: My Groom's a Fraud!
column4: A tycoon bride buys herself a husband to have an heir, picking a quiet country man. He shows up with secrets and a heart already taken, playing along for his own reasons. In a mansion full of chaos and schemers, her "cure" turns contagious...

column1: Reborn to Build a Women’s Era
column4: Lily was a devoted wife and mother, murdered by her own husband and son. Reborn with a system granting access to modern goods, she dismantles her family one by one and takes on the most powerful men in the empire. From village nobody to the realm's greatest merchant, can one woman rewrite the laws of an entire dynasty?

column1: Broken Girls Made Me A God!
column4: After a decade as the sect's laughingstock, he unlocks a system: the more broken his partner, the greater the reward. Then he soars from nothing to immortal. His enemies fall. Now the women he saved won't stop begging for more. But when the broken become the strongest and desire turns to devotion… who's really using whom?

column1: Stole My Home? Billionaire SON Says No!
column4: Fiona and Miles gave all for their daughter. She let her father die, signed them away, stole their savings. But Fiona once fed a starving boy a pancake. He's now a billionaire. He finds her, exposes the daughter's crimes, and gives Fiona a new life. But can a mother's kindness destroy her own child's greed?

A modern man is transported into a war-torn era and becomes engaged to a powerful military family, only to discover they can hear every thought he has. As betrayal, invasion, and power struggles unfold, his inner voice becomes their secret weapon, changing the fate of war and love.

Five years ago, Wynne sold herself to cover her grandma's surgery, only to, by chance, end up with a drugged Jayden, the Galloway heir. He blamed and scorned her. Yet as he fell into a coma, the broke girl saw an opportunity and lied her way into his wealthy family with her unborn baby. Now he's awake. Will she keep up the lies and win his love?

Zoe died betrayed, then woke up reborn, with a system that steals everything. Money, identity, even fate itself. Auction halls became her battlefield. Hotels, her hunting ground. Each takedown sharper than the last. Revenge is sweet, but what happens when the system demands she steal one last thing: her own sincere heart?

To secure her future, Mina takes a risky tutoring job for a powerful man’s unruly heir. She wins the boy over, but sparks fly with his guarded, dangerous protector. As jealous rivals strike and a perfect suitor returns to claim her, she’s forced to choose. But when love turns into possession, will she walk away or fall deeper?

Abandoned for 18 years by his rich family, Leo trains under a reclusive gambling legend, mastering card skills. Returning to uncover the truth, he finds the Wilson family cornered by the ruthless Blackwood clan in a deadly gamble. Scorned, Leo unleashes his techniques, turns the tide with stunning stunts, and rises from outcast to family guardian and North America's God of Gamblers.

column1: (Dubbed) I Maxed HP to Seduce My Seniors
column4: Lin Feng, a cowardly playboy, transmigrates to a cultivation world with a beat-to-upgrade system. He maxes out HP, flirts with seven stunning seniors, and survives deadly battles. But a dark sect secret looms. Will his harem and cheat save him when a monstrous evil descends?

Vincent Grayson, a hidden CEO, secretly supports his wife, Stella Whitmore, as she pursues her dream of becoming a business mogul. But when he senses her growing obsession with her charming male best friend, suspicion turns to fury. At a company party, their playful 'kissing game' goes too far—and Vincent snaps. Now, he's ready to strike back. But how far will he go?

column1: Awaken as the Immortal. Now KNEEL.
column4: The world's sole immortal lives as a frail old man, his memory sealed to protect his great-granddaughter. When her cheating fiancé brutally beats him into a coma, the trauma shatters the seal! Awakening with god-tier power, he crashes the scumbag's engagement party. Watch as countless former disciples flood the hall to bow before him!

column1: This Cultivator Weds a Beauty CEO
column4: A powerful cultivator leaves his sect to overcome mortal trials in the human world. Then a sudden mistake leads him to a fateful encounter with a stunning female tycoon and a hasty marriage. Can this sudden bond help him survive his worldly tribulation?

column1: Cursed to Die? I'll Defy FATE!
column4: Born with a cursed fate and doomed to die young, he refuses to surrender! Armed with forbidden supernatural arts, he solves terrifying paranormal mysteries to rewrite his destiny. But as he plunges deeper into the underworld's secrets, he becomes entangled with nine gorgeous women and deadly factions. Will he conquer fate, or perish?

A girl watches her parents die, framed by her own uncle. She falls off a cliff. A holy master saves her. She begs for revenge skills. He only gives her a health exercise. But that exercise is actually an immortal cultivation method. And she is a once in ten thousand years cultivation prodigy. Can she master the art before her uncle strikes again?

A young man summons a legendary dragon. His stepbrother calls forth a lowly skeleton. Forced to trade by their parents, rage awakens a forbidden power—one that upgrades the skeleton into a king, unleashes an undead dragon and a doom lich. Now, nothing stands in his way.

Anne thought her romance with mafia heir Jimmy was a new beginning—until the night she planned to give him everything, only to find Adrian in her bed instead. Ruthless, powerful. Overnight, her world shattered. At a party the next day, the truth hits hard: she slept with the man who rules the underworld—and her boyfriend's father.

column1: They Framed the Prince, He Bought a Gun!
column4: A man wakes up and finds an ancient beauty lying in his arms. He has traveled back in time and is now a useless crown prince! Faced with false accusations, he chooses to fight back. But everyone around him is a traitor! It's all over. Then he discovers a system that lets him buy modern weapons. The plan to fight back begins...

column1: My Worthless Husband Is a Billionaire
column4: For years, Ingrid believed Ethan was nothing but a useless husband. After teaming up with her lover Daniel to steal his kidney, she heartlessly cast him aside. Shattered and betrayed, Ethan vanished without a word. Years later, he returns. This time, he is not here to love. He is here to destroy everyone who betrayed him.

The general's daughter Jane Hale is kidnapped. Her guard Paul vanishes. She suffers, only to learn Paul planned it all to avenge his half sister Rose. Paul is not an orphan. He is the crown prince. Betrayed, Jane agrees to a distant marriage. Too late, Paul sees Rose's true face. But Jane is already leaving...

Rachel's biggest regret is having a one-night affair with Hunter she's loved for eight years and making him pay for it. From then on, Hunter becomes obsessed with her at night, but a stranger by day. When he decides to marry someone else, she thinks they'll part ways, but he takes her home instead. Is she a toy he can discard at will, or an apple he can't resist taking a bite of?

column1: OMG! My Ride Is a ROOMBA?
column4: Humans trapped in a highway survival game. One road, one random vehicle. Night brings horrors. He gets a cleaning robot with zero combat power. Then he unlocks a Creator System: evolve, upgrade, merge anything. While others struggle, his robot scans, defends, grabs loot, tops leaderboards. But can a trash bot really become the ultimate weapon?

They thought I was just a perfect wife. I was an underworld queen in disguise. Seven years I played the part for a worthless husband, until his pregnant mistress tried to push me out. One call later, his elite unit was gone. Backers? Mine. Commander title? Mine. Divorced, I built an empire. All his glory? I lent it.

column1: My Disciples Made Me a God
column4: After years of being tricked into hard labor in a strange cultivation world, a man finally gains a system that lets him build a sect and recruit gifted disciples. Armed with tricks and borrowed power, he plays the role of a legendary master. But as his disciples grow stronger than him, how long can the illusion last?

column1: One Look. One Word. One Kill.
column4: Every demon, every god, every immortal soul has a true name, and he sees them all. One whisper from his lips and empires fall. The monsters think they rule the world. But they haven't met the lazy security guard who can end them with a word. He doesn't fight monsters. He names them, and they crumble.

column1: Left Me, Now Watch Me Win!
column4: After years of humiliation for love, Sophia is cast aside and betrayed by her husband Adrian. As buried truths surface, she finds herself trapped with no escape. But when she returns, she is no longer the same. She's strong enough to step back into the world that broke her, ready to face those who never expected her to rise again...

Three thousand years of cultivation. One quiet retirement in mortal town. Then a divine list exposes all his secret identities, legendary weapons, god-level students, three powerful lovers. The heavens want him gone. So he gives up everything to save everyone. Typical retirement fail...

column1: Your Beasts Are Cute. Mine Are NOT.
column4: All beasts in this world are cute, gentle and harmless. Everyone adores their lovely spirit pets. But I’m the only one whose beasts are savage, ancient and terrifying. While others train cuties, I awaken extinct monsters. And I alone am unstoppable… but my true power is only just beginning.

Susan is taking her sister Ann away from domestic violence. On the road, they meet Max and his older brother Cole. But no one expects Susan and Max to have a one-night stand. A month later, Susan finds out she is pregnant. What will they do? Now what will happen to these four people?

Jasper was once invincible War God, then he fell from grace overnight, reduced to a blind, despised wreck. But the fire in his heart never dimmed. Now he has clawed his way back, forging new strength from mortal flesh, ready to defy fate itself for his country. Can he pull it off?

Molly was stolen as a gifted girl and raised by a lone master in the mountains. Eight years later she returns as a pill cultivation prodigy searching for her family. They're in crisis and too scared to claim her. But the enemy is already at the gate. Will she find her family in time?

A ten-year-old boy falls into a nightmare realm, and accidentally unlocks a Family Reunion System. Now he doesn't fight horrors alone. His whole creepy family sweeps through every dungeon, crushing monsters and conquering both the living and the dead. But when your relatives are the nightmares… who exactly is using who to rise to power?

column1: Stole My Life? Now I BUY His EMPIRE
column4: A woman is reborn after her husband and mistress killed her. At an auction, she buys a worthless land for billions. A tycoon lends her eight billion. She exposes her ex's deadly project, wins investment, divorces him, and takes back her inheritance. He gives her love. But can a second chance truly erase the scars of betrayal?

Modern engineer Nolan wakes in another world as a forgotten noble heir. He must choose a wife, claim a barren land, and repay debts left by three criminal wives. Bandits roam. Crops won't grow. With gunpowder and modern knowledge, he starts to change everything... Can he rebuild this broken land?

A lone survivor of a massacred special forces unit hunted his enemies for fifteen years. On the night he is ready to end it all, they plan a bank bombing that would kill dozens. He turns their greed into a trap, watching them tear each other apart. But when peace finally comes, can a man built for war leave the battlefield behind?

A once-in-ten-thousand-years prodigy shocks the cultivation world, by playing on his phone while he trains. While others meditate in silence, he scrolls. And somehow, it makes him stronger. Sent down the mountain to wed a holy maiden, he brings his device into the mortal world… Is it the sword that made him a legend, or the scroll of light?

column1: Kiss Up Ms. Money? Hell Nah!
column4: On his wedding day, Darius Lynn was cuckolded by his fiancée Sylvia Jenkins. At the moment of despair, an anti-simping system awakened. Darius called off the wedding on the spot and married Grace Harris, who was actually a wealthy heiress. But is marrying into a wealthy family really that easy? What troubles await Darius Lynn?

column1: Stole My Hate? Now They LOVE Me
column4: A girl is trapped in a beast world as a villainess. She must romance six commanders who hate her or die. She just wants points to escape. But the wolf loses control. The elk goes mad. The eagle's heart melts. The lynx clings. The octopus kneels. The pirate stalks. Now all six block her door, eyes bloodshot: "You played us. What about us?"

column1: They Mocked Mom. Now They Beg!
column4: A renowned retired medical expert Eleanor is cruelly abused by her son’s family. They even forgot her birthday to celebrate their dog’s! Little did they know, this wronged old lady is the godmother of three tycoons. Their botched apology kills the father-in-law, the son gets lung cancer, but will she ever forgive the family that destroyed her?

column1: Feed a Beauty, Save the World!
column4: Meteors fell, and the world collapsed. But one man unlocked a system: any beauty who uses his supplies triggers a hundredfold reward. While others scraped by, he built an empire in the wasteland. Now he leads the last great tribe. But when the fog deepens and something ancient stirs beneath the ruins… will his system save humanity, or just himself?

column1: My Sword's Rusty. Or Is It?
column4: He was the greatest sword in the land. Then betrayal took his family. Eighteen years as a quiet hunter, hiding his blade to protect his only daughter. They took her anyway. Tortured her. Let her die in his arms. Now he's digging up a rusted sword. Villains really should check if the old man has a past.

column1: The Doctor's Obsession With His Pregnant Stepsister
column4: College student Ellie is betrayed by her ex and spends a night with a mystery man. Pregnant and lost, she finds her cold OB-GYN stepbrother, Theodore, waiting. As her ex keeps hunting her, Theodore becomes her only protector. Amidst forbidden desire, Ellie discovers her savior was the father all along. One secret will change everything.

In year four of a marriage built on a deal, her first love storms back, claiming her in headlines and turning love into a battlefield. He's always held the reins, and a secret crush for eleven years. As schemes, rumors, and rivals close in, truth begins to slip out. Turns out, the coldest marriage kept the hottest secret...

She's the most emotionless cultivator in history. The system wants her to wink, giggle, and seduce the villain. He's a paranoid demon lord who now believes she's obsessed with him. Somewhere between death threats and "accidental" hand-holding, she might just break her cultivation, or his heart.

A lazy cultivator spent three centuries doing nothing. When demons attacked, his strange Review System activated. With the system, he upgraded pills and weapons. Soon, enemy masters crumbled into paper dolls. But his review accidentally cracked open an ancient seal and unleashed chaos itself… Can a man save everyone by doing nothing at all?

column1: Movie Magic: My Props Are WMDs
column4: He told the government he was building movie props. They didn't ask why his "props" could launch satellites. Now he's designing the future of warfare, rescuing the woman he loves with a mech suit, and keeping the world's biggest secret: his "special effects" are just the beginning.

For ages, a peerless immortal guarded the border and shielded the realm with his supreme power. Betrayed and banished by the foolish empress, he left without a word. The grand formation crumbled, demons swarmed in, and the empire fell into ruin. Now the exiled supreme returns with a blade. Who can survive his furious vengeance?

Arthur, the long-lost true heir of the Lynn Group, returns and works tirelessly to boost annual sales. But at the annual banquet, the fake heir Sam humiliates him with a 250 bonus as his parents and sister side with Sam. Pushed to the edge, Arthur rebels and vows to make them pay...

At the launch of a global online game, players race for power and resources. A rookie gains a rare ability with tenfold attack speed, cutting through enemies and claiming top rewards at an insane pace. As his rise shocks everyone, rivals grow suspicious and a powerful guild leader takes notice. But how long can he keep his edge hidden?

A dying family heir meets an overlooked TCM genius. To clear her uncle's name, she becomes his personal doctor and joins forces with him against her own family. But as they fight side by side, something unexpected grows between them... Can love become the cure?

column1: My Bestie Watches as My Prince Spoils Me
column4: Lisa White and Margaret Harris have been best friends for years. Lisa marries a billionaire chairman, while Margaret’s husband dies, leaving her broke. Out of jealousy, Margaret kills Lisa at her wedding and takes her own life. Both wake up years earlier. Margaret seduces Lisa’s fiancé, aiming for wealth, leaving Lisa with a “poor” man. Lisa accepts, unaware he’s Mark Thompson, a billionaire heir in disguise. Margaret schemes, but Lisa becomes the true chairman’s wife, and Margaret faces her dow

column1: Oh No! Their Son's a Billionaire!
column4: On their anniversary cruise to Nagasaki, a wealthy couple is mistaken for ordinary tourists and ruthlessly mocked by their guide. But when their true identity is revealed, payback hits harder than anyone imagined...

A world-class virologist lives undercover as a laid-back surfer doctor in Fiji. But when her cheating husband collapses from a mysterious virus, she is forced to reveal her true identity. Now she must stop a global outbreak while facing betrayal and sabotage.

column1: Mommy, Why Did Daddy Let Me Die
column4: When a tornado strikes, William makes a devastating choice— he saves his ex and her child, leaving his own daughter Fiona behind. She doesn't survive. Rachel is crushed by grief, burdened with a truth she can't bring herself to say. As Fiona's funeral nears, will William uncover the secret before it's too late to make amends?

After losing her child, a once powerful woman walks away from everything and lives as a cleaner, quietly raising two abandoned boys as her own. Years later, just as they graduate, her true identity resurfaces. She plans a surprise, but betrayal comes first. When loyalty shatters, she must decide who she really is and what they deserve...

When he was a child, a man watched his family get killed. To get revenge, he learns unmatched thieving skills. After mastering them, he returns to his hometown to find the truth about what happened back then. But danger comes at him from every side. What kind of dark scheme is hidden behind all this?

Secret billionaire heiress Zoe hides her wealth for true friendship, only to be brutally betrayed! Her evil bestie steals her designs, ruins her name, and traps her in a hotel with a scumbag. They even smash her priceless heirloom! But as Zoe fights for her life, her tycoon grandfather kicks the door down. Time for ruthless revenge!

Betrayed by his ex and murdered, he is reborn days before the apocalypse! To save his sister, he abandons humanity to become a terrifying vengeful spirit. Taming nightmare monsters and crushing human factions and alien emperors alike, this ruthless ghost king will rewrite the rules and dominate the apocalyptic wasteland!

column1: Silly Math? It JUDGE You All!
column4: A young man and his girlfriend grew up as orphans. Rich siblings run her down, leave her in a coma. He seeks justice — they frame him, send him to prison for five years. Inside, he uses math to unlock a fate formula. Out now, he stages an "accident" with just a pencil. The first killer falls. But can one man erase an entire corrupt family?

Nancy Lane smiles as she plots to marry into the Vance family and steal Splendor Group. But Eleanor Vance, the chairperson and mother of the groom, has just returned to the city with a secret of her own... Will Nancy's scheme backfire?

When the apocalypse hits, a betrayed outcast is left for dead. But instead of dying, he awakens a system that lets him grow stronger with every kill. As he builds a refuge for survivors, he uncovers a hidden truth behind the world's collapse. To protect what remains, he must rise beyond revenge and become something far greater...

column1: Horror Game? I Thought It Was a Dating Sim!
column4: Trapped in a deadly horror game, I am forced by a system to romance the monsters! While others flee for their lives, I must read poems to ghosts and dance with skeletons. The System warns: Seduce the abyss or be erased. When romantic tropes meet spine-chilling terror... can I fake love to save my life?

column1: The OL Who Became a Tyrant
column4: She was just a tired office worker until she woke as a tyrant empress on the edge of ruin. Enemies closed in, and she ran, fought, and rose. With unlikely allies, she uncovered ancient secrets, crushed empires, and forged a new order. But when the crown is finally hers, is the woman she used to be still in there?

column1: Set Me Up? Get Eaten Instead!
column4: Betrayed by her fiancé and best friend, she is fed to a giant ice worm. Reborn hours before the fatal expedition, she knows the monsters strike at 10 PM. While the traitors mock her warnings and party to their doom, she teams up with a lone rescuer. Using the beast's weakness, she escapes and watches her murderers fall into the abyss!

column1: After Switched Fiancé, I Married a Mafia Boss
column4: After her sister swaps fiancés and forces her to marry a 'bankrupt' man, Sophia accepts her fate—only to learn her new husband is heir to a powerful mafia empire. While her sister spirals in regret, Sophia finds unexpected love and loyalty in her arranged marriage. The one they cast aside becomes the one who rises.

He's a tiger who looks like a kitten, mocked by his own kind. But with every beast he devours, he evolves from house cat to mythical monster, from joke to god. The clan that called him weak will soon be begging for his protection. And the gods? They'll learn to fear the tiger who ate his way to the top.

Claire hides her billionaire CEO identity to live a simple life. But her world shatters when she catches her husband cheating with the nanny! Worse, they are plotting to steal all her money. They think she is just a weak sales rep... What will they do when they realize they just betrayed the most powerful woman in the city?

column1: Stole My Life? Enjoy HELL, Sis
column4: Killed by her sister at an award ceremony, a medical genius is reborn on adoption day. She chooses the kind eldest son. Her sister takes the cruel second son's mansion, a trap. With past-life memory, she helps her new family win, exposes dark schemes, and cures a blind young master. But can she stop her jealous sister from burning it all down?

She was the wife he took for granted. A quiet homemaker who cooked, cleaned, and made him rich. He never knew she was an immortal. He betrayed her. He destroyed their family. And when she finally walked away, he thought he'd won. Now he has nothing. How is he supposed to repay all of this?

column1: I Saved My Crime Lord Ex... Now What?
column4: Six years ago, Chloe Summers and Vincent Cole were torn apart by her father. To set her free, Vincent claimed to have fallen for another, shattering her heart. Now as a brilliant surgeon, Chloe unknowingly saves Vincent, who has become a crime lord. When their fate meets again, what future awaits them? What truths will they uncover, and what sacrifice will be made…?

Stacey is the only one fighting to save May. When 38 relatives mock her with $5 donations for surgery, Stacey stops playing nice. She unearths $870,000 in unpaid notes to bankrupt the leeches. While Jason begs for silence to save his reputation, May Lee vanishes from her bed. Has the family saved her, or did they just sign her death warrant?

column1: The Exes I Burned Are Back
column4: He beat the hardest romance RPG, then got pulled into it as his nation's chosen player. Inside the world, eight exes he burned are out for blood. Armed with insider knowledge and silver-tongue tricks, he must survive a lethal love maze and a national trial. When every choice cuts deep... which heart will he save?

Leah, the long-lost heiress who survived life on the streets, returns home only to be sold into a marriage. On her wedding day, her fiancé and fake sister betray her—and her own family lets her be publicly humiliated. Just as all hope is lost, Zara, the ruthless tycoon and Leo’s icy stepmother, steps in to claim her.

A forced arranged marriage traps a man with a mysterious coma-bound empress. His cuddle power system makes him stronger, while his wild inner thoughts are secretly heard by her. When deadly enemies surround the realm, a shocking awakening will rewrite everything no one sees coming.

A war-forged princess returns to court and finds her mother driven to death. She hides her power, outplays the traitors, and claws her way to the throne. But when a hostage prince becomes her closest ally, can revenge and love survive in the same palace?

She wakes up in a death game where she must trap six killers to survive. They can feel her fear, her anger, her desire, and they're not planning to leave. Now every day is a war between the men who want to save her and the ones who want to keep her forever. Winning the game was the easy part. Surviving their obsession? That's the real trap.

Adapted from Novel by Jessica Hall. After a pack that never wanted her took her in, Ivy expected death. But on her 18th birthday, King Kyson, the last Royal, came not to save her, but to claim her. Now, his obsession awakens a dangerous bond, threatened by secrets that could tear them apart.

A modern weapons expert invents the ultimate bomb, only to wake up as the Empire's most useless prince. Now, caught in a deadly fight for the throne, he must use the deadliest knowledge in history to survive. But can a man of science outplay the masters of ancient intrigue?

Betrayed and murdered, Michael wakes up again, armed with a pendant that summons modern weapons. No more schemes, just revenge. He does everything to make his enemies pay, but when the crown is his and the empire kneels in terror, will they call him their savior… or their nightmare?

On their first wedding anniversary, Charlotte is betrayed and humiliated by her husband Nick. She vows revenge and allies with the powerful Alexander. Their partnership blooms into love despite his intimidating dominance. After divorcing Nick and getting her revenge, she rebuilds her career and starts a new life with Alexander.

column1: Want me Dead? In Your Dreams!
column4: Shirley, who transmigrates into a cannon fodder princess, teams up with her equally transmigrated cousin, the emperor Jasper to change her fate of being killed, yet develops genuine feelings for Kael while countering schemes. Can she really flip this deadly script? And what’s the final score for her and Kael, happy ending or heartbreak?

column1: OMG! I Flips a Female Empire?
column4: Adam transmigrates into a world ruled by women, only to be framed, stripped of his family and handed five criminal women as wives for humiliation. Then he unlocks the Super Shock System: shock enough people, win powerful rewards. XR glasses, helicopters, Gatling guns... Can one man flip an entire empire?

column1: Girl! You Have to Be Mine!
column4: Elowen, a cold wealthy heiress in a saintly mask, manipulates hearts with ease. She shelters Sera, a loyal bodyguard bound to her to escape despair. For years, Sera’s burning secret love hides beneath obedience. Deep status gaps tear them apart, while fierce obsession draws them near. Will their forbidden bond break all chains… or doom them both?

Mia Quinn was saved by Silas Shaw, the Grand Marshal of Port City. He married her, and the world believed him devoted. But Mia overheard the truth: she was only bait. His heart belonged to Zoey Quinn. On his wedding day, Mia swapped the brides. Only then did Silas realize the woman he lost was the one who truly loved him.

Trapped at Lv. 1, he awakens an "Invincible" system, crushing Demon Lords barehanded! The catch? Leaving the starter village strips his god-mode. Bluffing to the capital by gifting god-tier gear, his squad worships him as a supreme master. When a deadly rival strikes, can he finish the mission, claim his god-tier reward, and crush his enemy?

Left for dead by zombies after a cruel betrayal, he’s thrown into a forbidden immortal realm where he’s taken as a rare cultivation vessel, mastering dual cultivation and ancient alchemy. Returning to the apocalyptic wasteland, he dominates survivors with divine pills and takes ruthless revenge. Yet his godlike power ties to a deadly secret that threatens to destroy both worlds.

column1: Died Once? Now I Date Ghosts!
column4: A college girl stays up too late and dies. She wakes up in another world as a trainee spirit hunter. To find her way back home, she is trapped in the school. What is going on? She hides in the music room. Then, the piano starts playing. But the person playing it has no feet... More strange things keep happening.

column1: Kill the Prince? He Rose King
column4: They sent a letter demanding his head. He returned with sixty thousand men and a crown. Now the father who ordered his death watches from exile as the son he tried to kill becomes the ruler he always feared. Now, some lessons are learned in blood.

They took his family, his name, his future. He came back with nothing but rage and a promise: every boss, every killer, every shadow ends with him. Now he's inside the organization, climbing toward the puppet master who pulled the strings. But when he finally reaches the top, the truth might be darker than any revenge he imagined.

Faking madness for 18 years to survive a tyrant, the "foolish" prince is secretly an invincible god and master of the deadliest assassin guild! When the emperor orders his family's execution, he drops the act. With overwhelming power, he slaughters the tyrant, crowns a new empress, and seizes absolute control over the entire realm!

She loved him for twenty years. When fire took him, she gave her skin, all of it. Her face. Her health. Her life… He woke believing another woman saved him, and her illusion shattered. The truth bled through. He finally saw her, scarred, dying, real. But when the woman who saved him is already gone… what is there left to forgive?

column1: Left to Die, Back to Kill
column4: Left for dead and cast into the abyss, a disgraced heir returns with power beyond imagination. Once mocked as useless, he’s now the greatest threat to those who betrayed him. As revenge begins, one question lingers: who will fall first?

Aboard a luxury cruise liner, Lyra fakes amnesia to test her husband Marcus — only to be coldly handed off to his brother Ethan. As she uncovers Marcus’s secret seven-year affair and twisted double life, she’s torn between a fake husband who truly loves her and a real one who never did.

A secret organization that quietly kept the world safe disappears overnight, unleashing forces long held beneath the surface. As panic spreads, a global broadcast forces the world to relive one man’s memories, exposing hidden truths and impossible events. Only then do they realize who had been protecting them all along...

They laughed at his "useless" class. Now his dying alley cat is a lightning goddess, his injured fox is a nine-tailed seductress, and every legendary beast he touches turns into a beauty ready to fight the world for him. His ex called him worthless. His harem of divine pets is about to show her what "worthless" looks like from the top.

Cast out by his family, a boy now runs a supermarket that hires S‑level monsters. He trades with survivors for special coins, upgrading from snacks to weapons. His monstrous employees obey him. When cosmic horrors threaten, he fights back with business contracts. The world calls him savior. But when his past returns, can a shopkeeper outsmart the one who made him?

column1: Seduce the Demon Queen or Die!
column4: On the night the campus hauntings begin, a reborn young man binds to a system with one command. But between vengeful spirits, exorcist clans, and a system with its own agenda, survival demands more than romance. Together, they must shatter a future written in blood. But can love truly rewrite fate, or is it just another move in someone else’s game?

column1: (Dubbed) Beast Tamer: Back to the Origin
column4: Cast out as an illegitimate son, Lin Mo awakens a rare all-attribute beast taming gift but is too poor to bond with even the weakest spirit beast. Laughed at by his school and betrayed by his half brother and girlfriend, he unlocks a powerful system and turns a lowly caterpillar into the mighty Void Azure Dragon.

column1: Wanna Marry My Dad? Hell No!
column4: The richest man’s daughter Chloe showed a foreign invasion video while teaching in a mountain village, which frightened Wendy‘s son. Caught in the act and consumed by rage, Wendy led her family to humiliate Chloe, only to later discover that Chloe was Evan’s own daughter. Will she apologize to Chloe? Will Evan, who dotes on his daughter, still marry Wendy?

On the night the Phoenix Queen gives birth, her husband and her half-sister plot a cruel swap: replace the true heir with their illegitimate daughter and steal the throne. What they don't know is the Queen has seen through it all. In the delivery room, she quietly switches the babies back. Plot all you like... the crown still knows its owner.

column1: Girls Help Girls: Divorce or Die
column4: Caroline, a top Abuse Intervention Specialist at PunishDash with an unmatched record of subduing abusers, fell for Richard—a disguised domestic violator—during a blind date. They married swiftly. When Richard attempted to control her, she overpowered him, delivering brutal retaliation. Ironically, Richard as the abuser ended up a victim of his own abuse.

Mary joins a tour with her memory-impaired husband to relive their past, but a mistaken identity leads to humiliation by the guide. When the truth comes out, the guide falls into regret and ruin—while Mary and her husband rediscover their long-lost sweetness.

Willow mistook drugged CEO Ethan for a "Mr. Surprise" gift, leading to a steamy night. Three years later, she finds Ethan is her fiancé’s brother. While Willow fights her burning desire to stay loyal, her fiancé’s altar betrayal changes everything. Broken and hollow, she finally surrenders to a forbidden obsession with Ethan.

column1: Empty Grave? I Made it Real!
column4: On their 20th wedding anniversary, Pearl receives news of Drake's death. But it's a scam. Drake faked his demise and forged a will to steal her fortune, with his mother and brother as accomplices. Just as they close in, their son arrives as a "devoted son," turning the house upside down. Then at the cremation, the "dead man" suddenly wakes up...

Five years ago, she walked away to protect her family, only to hear he died in a crash. Now he's back, powerful and ruthless, turning love into revenge and forcing her to serve him... never knowing she's been hiding a child, and the truth all along. Turns out, revenge isn't always the smartest investment.

column1: Girl, You Are The Sword God!
column4: Sophia, the heir to a peerless sword lineage, returns from training under the Peach Blossom Sword God only to find her family shattered by treachery, besieged by the Heavenly Sword Manor, and teetering on annihilation. But in a girl the world dismissed as empty-headed, what blade now stirs? And what price will its awakening exact?

column1: My Forced Hubby Is a Prince!
column4: A woman is buying groceries when she suddenly travels to an ancient time of famine. She decides to use the vegetables that came with her to make a fortune. At the same time, the crown prince also comes to this place in disguise. They meet in the mountains, and the crown prince starts to fall for her. Why is that? And what story will unfold between them?

Elite female lawyer Clara Sterling decides to get revenge after catching her fiancé Liam Gale cheating, and takes the initiative to seduce the playboy Ethan Hawk. The two interact with each other for their own purposes. Is he really a playboy as he seems on the surface? What kind of entanglements will the two go through?

column1: The Cold Man & the Warm Snow
column4: Snowbound on a runaway train, Jade's escape spirals into a reckless night with a stranger... and a secret she can't undo. Months later, she signs a fake marriage with the Frost heir, never suspecting the family's untouchable patriarch is that very man. Fate plays cold, but desire plays colder...

When the apocalypse hits, a battle-hardened soldier unlocks a bunker system, starting with a welding torch and a hacked harvester. While the world drowns in zombies and famine, he builds a bulletproof farm, recruits talent, and upgrades it into a mech-guarded fortress. Turns out, farming beats fleeing...

For 6 years, she endured a toxic marriage. But discovering her daughter is used as a secret "blood bag" for her husband's adopted sister's child is the final straw. Filing for divorce, she takes back her child and drops her disguise, revealing her true identity: a billionaire heiress! Now, those who abused them will pay the ultimate price!

Thrown into a novel, she’s forced to marry the ruthless warlord. Armed with knowledge of the story and a clever mind, she survives and wins his heart. But the plot is catching up. She knows what comes next. The question is: can she change it before everything falls apart?

Ean Chevy gave up his divine life for love, only to be his adopted brother's identical copy! The brat committed a crime, framed him, and his cruel family threw him to the wolves!
