An innocent immortal sank into darkness, until his power roared back! What goes around comes around. Who'll regret crossing the immortal they used and crushed?

Ethan, son of Poseidon, lives as a lowly farmer, tricked into thinking he’s worthless. He enters a knight trial with a rusty pitchfork—his father’s hidden trident. Humiliated by nobles, he unleashes godlike power and rises from trash to legend. Awakening his divine heritage, he crushes his enemies and sets off for Olympus.

column1: I Took Her Place, He Took Me
column4: Wendy Parker takes another woman’s place under a two-year deal, planning to leave when it ends. But everything changes when Leon Carter enters her life. As secrets unravel and feelings grow, she’s pulled into a world she was never meant to belong to. Will she walk away, or risk everything for him?

He married her to repay a debt, lifting her family’s company to. But to her, he was only a worthless husband. When he offered to save her parents, she called him a liar. Now the truth has finally surfaced, and the man she betrayed is the only one who never walked away. How will she face the one she broke, when he was the only one who held her up?

On the eve of her father’s 50th birthday, she discovers his affair, and was murdered for it. Reborn, she plays good while secretly orchestrating the family’s shocking discovery of the betrayal. But when vengeance turns deadly, an unlikely sacrifice changes everything. She sought revenge… but can she trust the second chance she never expected?

Vera Frost comes home from war to a marriage already replaced. No tears, no pleading, and just a clean break. But when a powerful prince steps into her path, fate begins to rewrite itself... was this betrayal the end, or her beginning?

He lived as a disposable husband, used, starved, and bled for profit. When desperation forced his secret into the open, he became a living gold mine and paid with his life. Reborn before it all began, now wielding true divine wealth, he sets a trap where greed devours greed. When money obeys him, who survives the bill?

Mia Moore, a hidden racing champion disguised as a delivery rider, was helping her boyfriend Leon become a pro racer. However, he cheated on her with Emma Sterling. While she was racing against Leon's racing club and the Black Panther, everyone found Mia's identity suspicious...

After leaving the army, Jace Stone runs a small produce business with his comrades. When a fallen brother's widow is harassed by a corrupt official, he steps in, only to provoke a powerful family that controls the city's trade. They cut off his supply and set a trap. Jace endures until they cross the line. This time, he won't back down.

Rich girl Mia Vale and broke genius Jason Young once shared a quiet campus romance, until her world collapsed and she cut him off cold. Five years later, he returns a tech star while she's drowning in debt. Everyone expects payback... turns out love doesn't do refunds, only reruns.

column1: To The Groom: He Died for Love
column4: In his past life, he gave everything to his wife. But they took it all, then took him. Now he's back on the day before their wedding with a cold new vow: no love, no mercy, just revenge. While his soon-to-be in-laws still see him as the cash cow, he's building a trap they'll never see coming...

By day, she is a soft and sweet little wife who loves to act cute. By night, she is the deadliest killer the world fears. When enemies take her husband, she walks in alone and takes them all down. Her husband, who knows nothing, tells the whole world his wife is afraid of the dark. So... who is really protecting who?

column1: No! I Pulled CEO's Pants OFF!
column4: Jenny Jinks works two jobs for her father’s surgery. She accidentally pulls down billionaire Liam Hall’s pants. A chaotic night leaves them tangled. She becomes his secretary. Jealous rivals and a surprise pregnancy later, Liam offers marriage. Convenience turns real. Can a deal born from chaos survive the truth beneath?

Born into hardship, Lillian Hunt is forced into a lowly marriage after years of abuse. To change her fate, she disguises herself as a noble lady and enters high society, drawing the attention of Adrian Linwood and Victor Ashford. As schemes unfold, she becomes bound by a deadly parasite. Will she rise or fall?

For five years, Nina Miller danced like her life depended on it. She hoped to earn the one honor that would finally make Madam Stone accept her as a worthy wife to Felix. But when she was almost there, she felt the man she married slipping away. He no longer seemed to want her... and she wasn’t sure she still wanted him.

column1: OMG! My Nemesis Is My Crush?
column4: Reborn, Rita barely has time to celebrate before finding herself bound to a Favorability Strategy System. And her target is Aiden, the one she absolutely despises. Watching her life points tick down, she slaps on a pained smile. How exactly can she win over the nemesis she has pranked countless times?

For five years, Serena Shaw pretended to be deaf and mute. She gave everything to Pearce Payne, pouring her inheritance into his dream. When he finally rose, he told her he never wanted her. So Serena walked away to marry Ethan Yates, the most powerful man in Capital City.

Betrayed by his girlfriend and fired by his boss, Noah was left with nothing but a mother with cancer. Suddenly, he knows that what he thought was a video game becomes a reality and offer him with a great fortune and a business empire to run. He acquired his former company and became the CEO to his former boss. What will he do with the bully?

He spent 20 years building an empire he never wanted. Now he's 18 again. This time, he'll hold onto his youth, and learn the lesson that took him a lifetime to understand: you can't have youth and its wisdom at the same time, unless you live it twice.

An archaeology PhD transmigrates into a weak, disgraced prince on the verge of losing everything. Bound to an infrastructure system, he builds roads, deploys drones and constructs greenhouses where others see only ruin. Step by step, he turns the tide. But can history's most wronged prince really change his fate?

A mysterious prodigy, said to have reached the peak of power at just ten, spends 30 years being a guardian, keeping enemies at bay and securing an era of peace. Over time, that peace is mistaken for goodwill. So the prodigy then gets cast out. Only after his departure does the truth begin to surface, but by then, it is already too late...

column1: Top Star Fell for Her Guard
column4: Top actress Chloe hires a bodyguard with a sharp edge and a wilder past. What she doesn't know is that he's the missing heir of Harbor City's most powerful family, gone for five years. He thinks he's the hunter. She's been dreaming of him all along. But when the truth comes out, can either of them walk away?

The apocalypse comes. Everyone can awaken and transform. But he becomes the weakest one, seen as useless by all. But, wait... What is going on? The class beauty kneels and begs him for power! The whole school is shocked! From then on, the cold beauty goes crazy for him. And even other beautiful women start circling him?

Framed and ruined at her father’s banquet, abandoned by her fiancé, Vivian becomes the city’s biggest joke. Desperate to save her dying mother, she sells herself to a stranger—only to discover her “ordinary” husband is the most powerful man in the city. And his mission? To spoil her rotten. But is this love… or just another trap?

column1: They Freed Hell to Kill Me
column4: He sacrificed ten thousand years to keep hell sealed. When he finally called for help, they shattered his prison and freed the demon. Now heaven's greatest hero has no chains, no mercy, and one question for the world he saved: Why should I protect those who destroyed me?

Can a humble life conceal a mighty soul? Peter Jones, the retired Eagle Order leader, chooses a simple life with his sister. To repay his saviour, he weds Ellen White to save her clan. On their wedding day, enemies gather to mock the lowly groom, demanding the marriage be called off. What will they pay when this quiet man finally rises?

As the wealthiest man in Silverbrook, John Grant hid his identity for years to care for his wife, Monica Lane. When he planned to promote her as the next factory director, he discovered she had been cheating for years. Their children also rejected him as their father. On New Year's Eve, Monica and her lover kicked him out. Heartbroken, John decided to reclaim his fortune and take back everything he gave them.

column1: Wait, His Majesty Can Hear Me?
column4: I traveled back to an ancient dynasty and found myself inhabiting the body of a simple-minded prince. Fortunately, I was granted a system. As long as I kept a low profile and did nothing every day, I could quietly accumulate points. But one day, I suddenly found that His Majesty could hear my inner thoughts…

He is a hidden heir and a miracle doctor who falls in love as an ordinary man. A sudden accident leaves him in a coma for eight years. She refuses to give up on him and spends those years working and waiting for his return. Everyone else moves on, but she stays. Then one day, he wakes up with power, wealth, and everything in his hands. But after eight years, is love still the same?

Framed by her ex Spencer for a fatal crash, Elena endures five years in prison. Upon release, she faces the victim's vengeful fiancé, Roman. Realizing Spencer is the true killer, Elena teams up with her former enemy. From deep hatred to unexpected trust, they set a deadly trap. Will Spencer finally pay for his crimes?

He awakens in a world of horrors, armed with a death-loop system and a female phantom who calls herself his “sister.” Recruited into a shadow organization, he battles nightmare creatures. With every reset, he grows stronger, until he cleanses the world of the horror. But his “sister” returns… If the nightmare is truly over, why is she still here?

column1: Gave You Life, Gave Me Hell
column4: Gifted dancer Serena sacrificed everything to save her lover Harrison through a betrayal. Five years later, they meet again. He seeks revenge; she bears the pain. As the truth emerges, he realizes her sacrifice, fights for her forgiveness, and chooses love over legacy. Reclaiming her pride, she rises. Together, they defy everything for love...

Sedona's famous canary, Erin Hollis, thought she'd never love again until a passionate night leads her to the boy she dumped three years ago. But he's now the wild heir of Sedona's most powerful family. She tries to run. Now he's rich, reckless, and won't let go. What's a woman to do when the one she trained writes the rules?

Betrayed and abandoned by his ex-girlfriend, Eric Grant returned home to search for his missing parents. On the way, he saved a widow named Rebecca Ford, and stumbled upon the Beastmaster's Codex… What would happen next? And what power would he awaken?

A fallen heiress accidentally binds a "useless" spirit—who is secretly the terrifying Ghost King! Bound by her contract, he unleashes his hidden power to help her crush their enemies. When a dark cult summons an evil god, can he defeat the horror, shatter their master-slave bond, and forge a new order of equality?

column1: (Dubbed) Ugh! My Clingy Psycho Needs Cuddles Again
column4: Psychologist Julia wakes inside a ruthless heiress novel… as the girl destined to be abandoned and die. Fascinated by the dark, wounded mind she once studied, she draws close to Christ, a feared man shaped by pain and obsession. But when a man who has never been chosen finally is… what will he become?

Wealthy and happily married, but longing for her roots, Linsey Lind returns to her birth family at 40—only to face indifference, humiliation, and a stolen identity. When a scheme is staged to disgrace her, her husband's dramatic arrival exposes the real power behind the woman they scorned. How far will she go to reclaim what was always hers?

column1: A Magic Water Vat Made Me Rich
column4: Cheated on, framed and thrown out, Ethan Frost has nothing left but an old courtyard and a mysterious water vat. It connects to 1980. Armed with knowledge of the future, he turns forgotten antiques into a fortune. Can one man outwit everyone who destroyed him?

column1: My Broke Husband is a Legend?!
column4: Leo Cross appears to be a humble man living in a quiet village with his wife, Clara. He tells her they are just a normal family, but he is secretly a genius scientist with world-changing inventions and endless wealth. When Clara joins a viral TV show that goes behind the scenes of their home... will his secret life finally be exposed?

Sophia was betrayed and killed by her husband and best friend.
Reborn with all her memories, she refuses to be the victim again. This time, she plays along, earns their trust, and destroys everything they built piece by piece. They ruined her life once. Now she is here to ruin theirs.

Sylvia tumbles into a historical novel only to face a fate worse than death: a forced ghost marriage. Fighting to survive, she sets her sights on the Crown Prince. But she unwittingly captivates the Emperor instead. Did she make a fatal mistake… or the luckiest choice of her life?

column1: That Crazy Woman? She's My Mom
column4: Twenty years ago, Grac lost her daughter and husband in one day. Grief drove her mad. Now billionaire Emma seeks her birth mother. But something's off. There's a homeless "crazy woman" they hide. Emma sees her, feels a strange pull. The woman stares like she knows her. But Emma doesn't know why...

A modern office drone reincarnates as a weak bunny female in a brutal beast world, chained to a twisted Dark System. To stay alive, she must tame her ferocious, vengeful beast mates and crush their rising darkness. Amid savage wars, deadly disasters, and cruel rivals, she claws her way to power. Yet the more she controls them, the deeper she falls into their dangerous, possessive bonds.

column1: Left for Dead, Came Back Rich!
column4: Sophie Sinclair waits six years for her boyfriend Ethan Ford, raising their daughter alone after he vanishes in an accident. He returns a billionaire with his memory restored, but hides his identity as a site worker to shield them from danger. As love and lies collide, their reunion is tested. What secrets will still stand in their way?

A restrained urologist loses control at first sight of a young race car driver. What starts in the exam room soon becomes a dangerous game of desire and devotion, as they test each other, cross every line, and fall into a love neither of them can escape.

column1: OMG! My Wolf Boy Is Back!
column4: Twelve-year-old Sierra Hayes rescued a mysterious wolf boy, she brings him home, names him Xander Hayes and teaches him to be human. As they grow, Xander fiercely protects her, their bond turns to love. But a rival's conspiracy framed Xander for a crime, forcing him to flee. Years later, they reunite. Can their love survive the secrets between them?

Reborn into Year 2 of the apocalypse, he awakens a system that lets him swallow monsters to grow stronger. But the serpent crest on his arm ties him to the dark secrets of the Blood Moon. Transforming into the very horror humanity fears, can he master this dark power and save the world, or will it swallow him whole?

In the 1980s, a girl named Stella Shaw loses her father in an accident. She decides to follow his dream and become a truck driver. But in a world full of prejudice, what problems will she face as a girl? In this male-dominated transport industry, how will she carve out a place for herself?

After 7 years, Stella catches Julian cheating with Blair. Her revenge? Seduce Blair’s husband, Adrian—a cold billionaire heir. Adrian sees right through Stella's deadly game but willingly plays along, hiding secrets of his own. As lines blur between fake seduction and real desire, who is truly falling into whose trap?

A deadly virus collapses civilization, turning the infected into monsters. At a university, survivors fall under a ruthless tyrant. Betrayed and left for dead, a man awakens a mysterious system that binds powerful women to him. As he rises, salvation and domination blur into one.

column1: Bye, Fake Fam! Hi, Real Love!
column4: Born into wealth, Lyra Shaw lost everything when her father's mistress moved in after her mother's death. Betrayed by the very people living under her roof, she died with nothing. Reborn with a second chance, she endures, schemes and fights back against the whole family. But who is the mysterious man from her past life who keeps appearing?

column1: (Dubbed) Bye, Ex! I'm No Longer His Stand-In!
column4: Aidan Wren has secretly loved Rosa Rook for years, only to discover he's been a stand-in for her true love. After betrayal and false accusations, Aidan leaves the country heartbroken. Three years later, now a renowned artist, he returns. Rosa, realizing her mistake, tries to make amends, but Aidan has already moved on. Can she win him back, or is it too late?

column1: (Dubbed) What? Racing Ace Is a TRUCK Guy!
column4: Truck driver Noah rescues a kidnapped boy, only to find he’s his own son with ex-lover Ella. To seize the Speedster Racing Team, their rival Zelda sets a deadly trap that pushes Ella into a corner. In response, Noah reignites his innate racing talent to confront him...

Reunited with his long-lost parents after decades, tycoon Raynold Carter returns not just as a son, but as their shield. When his parents are bullied and humiliated, how far will he go to protect them and can he still find the happiness meant for him?

Elara went undercover at her own foundation. She found staff beating the helpless. Embezzling charitable funds. Mocking her like she was nothing. They didn't know she was everything. Now the mask drops. The powerful fall. The abusers beg. When the boss fights for the broken, who stands a chance?

column1: I Was Chosen to Kill a God
column4: A cursed antiquities dealer is the "living key" to a millennium-old conspiracy. When 18 masters awaken in his mind, they bring godlike power and soul-tearing truth: his mentor is the immortal demon who murdered his parents. Now he must rise from pawn to player, challenging a two-thousand-year-old "god." Only one civilization survives.

Xavier wakes as a useless prodigal in a novel. On his and cousin Michael's wedding day, his fiancée cheated on him with Michael. While the Main Branch forces him to swallow the insult, he activates the Prodigal Redemption System, rebels, and slaps his enemies. But Michael's bride, who's also cheated on, stays calm. What's her secret?

Elena, an obedient girl trapped in an abusive marriage, meets mafia boss Silas as an andrologist. He awakens her hidden dominant desires. After escaping her husband’s imprisonment, she becomes the hunter from prey and dominates Silas. Yet their perilous relationship has just started.

Wealthy and happily married, but longing for her roots, Linsey Lind returns to her birth family at 40—only to face indifference, humiliation, and a stolen identity. When a scheme is staged to disgrace her, her husband's dramatic arrival exposes the real power behind the woman they scorned. How far will she go to reclaim what was always hers?

After five years in Hellhold for Coral, John gains the Kylin Kidney, then learns she and boss Kevin framed him. Hired by Casey, he finds love as she helps with the kidney's backlash. As Hellhold's Underboss, he defeats Daniel and Leo, gains admirers Laura and Erin, and confronts betrayers. His path to happiness?

Abandoned twice by her own flesh and blood, Zoe Lynn found a new life and family with Daisy Grey... In the end, her brother and mother acknowledged their wrongdoings. Will she accept their late-coming apology?

A modern OB-GYN, Liam, time-travels to be a death prisoner. To survive, he seizes a chance by taking a Royal Edict to stimulate lactation for Consort Stella. Using his modern medical skills to solve palace crises, he rises to the Director of the Nursery Department, and gradually conquers the court. But can he handle all the girls' hearts he's won?

Her boyfriend and bestie killed her into a nightmare dimension. Now she's got four demon kings fighting over her, an apocalypse on Earth, and zero regrets. Hell sent its worst; she sent them back in love. The world isn't ready for a queen with a monster harem. And She's bringing her harem home to save the world!

column1: Freeze or Die with Lady Docs
column4: A deadly survival game arrives as the world freezes toward absolute zero. If a player dies, their entire country is doomed. He once followed “expert” advice and paid for it with his life. Now reborn, he makes a choice everyone calls suicide. As the whole nation turns against him, one question remains: what does he know this time?

column1: Surgery for My Dying Dad? No!
column4: Serena Jenkins returns to the Jenkins family, secretly orchestrating her plans under the guise of the miracle doctor 'Satan.' She establishes her authority amid family conflicts and reveals her true identity at the critical moment of her father's critical illness. Faced with her cold-blooded father, will she save him?

column1: End of World? I've Got an Army
column4: The story takes place in a world where monsters are waking up. Human civilization falls apart in the disaster. In this world, humans slowly awaken powers to fight monsters. Why all this happens is still a mystery. People say there is a secret somewhere that can change the world. Many strong fighters go to find it. But a bigger danger is hidden there...

A king is haunted by the same nightmare every night. A mysterious voice declares his dynasty is doomed and heaven will never save him. Then a breathtaking woman appears in the dream and claims she already walks the mortal world. When the king summons her to the palace, desire and dread spread through the court, and fate quietly begins to turn...

Vivian Sterling looks like her half-sister. So she plays a stand-in for two rival tycoons, neither knowing about the other. Living a double life, she plots her escape. But her plan shatters when her sister returns, and a message from Adrian Lane forces her to flee. In Seabrook, the past catches up, and Adrian's true identity begins to unravel...

His roommates died saving him. Now they're zombies—and he's their commander! With a magical janitor system and a dorm full of undead bros, this college student is building a survival empire one crystal at a time. Saving the world? Nah. Saving his boys? That's the mission.

Henry, once tricked by his father and misunderstood by his mom, dies with regret, then is reborn as a kid on his parents' divorce day. This time, he makes his mom divorce, vowing to make her rich. Showing his amazing talent in Antique Street, he even recruits a tycoon as his underling. Reborn as a prodigy, can he rewrite their tragic fate?

column1: prison break: Don't mess with my daughter
column4: Blair took the fall for her husband, Kyle, and was jailed. But his mistress tells her: their daughter Rose is dying. Kyle even bribed officials to turn her into a 10-day execution. Desperate to save her child, Blair teams up with Anna—the prison’s original designer, jailed for avenging her daughter. Will Blair reach Rose before it’s too late?

column1: Help! Trapped with a Spoiled Heiress!
column4: A regular office guy's island getaway turns into a total disaster. Now he's stuck with a spoiled heiress and a group of strangers. To survive, they must build a home, uncover the island's secrets, and battle a hostile tribe. Will their clash of egos doom them, or will an unlikely team become legends?

column1: My Son Let Me Die For A House!
column4: Cast out by her greedy son and daughter-in-law, Grace warns them the house is haunted. They ignore her and wait for her to die to claim the property. Reborn with a second chance, she returns, this time ready to unleash the darkness they refused to believe in.

Armed with the ultimate skills of world-class icons, a 16-year-old prodigy awakens in a new life! He will unleash his true potential and ruthlessly crush everyone who mocked his nation's team. Watch how this young genius rises from the ashes to lead his country to the absolute pinnacle of the sports world!

Exiled and living with strays, a former genius accidentally finds the legendary Imperial Seal! Instantly becoming the Supreme Lord, his ordinary pets transform into mythical guardian beasts. With his destiny rewritten, he must rise to defend the borders, crush his enemies, and protect the fate of the entire empire!

column1: Not Her Mom, But Her Doom!
column4: Betrayed and killed by her own daughter, Yana Cole learns too late the daughter only used her, while the daughter-in-law she mistreated fought to protect her. Reborn, she sees everyone clearly and starts moving pieces. This time, she's not playing mom. She's playing chess...

Underground fight king returns home to repay a debt of gratitude, only to find his last surviving family bullied, framed, and pushed to the edge. With no money, no backing, and only his fists, he takes on every enemy who dares touch them... But can one man really save his whole family?

column1: A Werewolf Song of Fire and Frost
column4: Naomi, an Alpha’s daughter born without a wolf soul, is forced by her wicked half-sister to marry Alpha Julian, a fire-wielding "monster." Instead of death, Naomi finds obsessive protection in her fated mate. After surviving a lethal conspiracy by her own family, she awakens her legendary White Wolf soul to reclaim her throne and destroy betrayers.

column1: Famine? BFF & I Cash In Big!
column4: Transmigrated into a famine year, Ophelia Thorne and her best friend Fiona Scott face hunger, poverty, and cruelty from their own families. Will they bow to fate?

Publicly humiliated and cast aside by his fiancée, this man awakens a supreme artifact, the Golden Cudgel. As he rises to power, he unveils a greater truth: the man she chose is an imposter, and he is the true heir destined to rule. Now, the one who scorned him will kneel before the emperor she betrayed.

Devoured by beasts after a brutal betrayal, he is reborn one month before the apocalypse. With knowledge of the future, he builds a fortress, forms a battle squad, and inscribes ten forbidden tattoos on his body. When the world collapses, his tattoos awaken—but revenge is only the beginning.

Why would a fox guard a dynasty for centuries?
Jessica, a nine-tailed fox, vowed to protect Dysen to repay a life debt.
On her ninth ascension, Jenny betrayed her, causing a deadly flood. She now finds the royals all scheming, dying to plot her death.
In desperation, Jessica reveals her true form.
But in this crisis, will she ever ascend?

Modern girl Chloe Moore transmigrates into a novel as a discarded fake heiress. She leaves her adoptive family and starts a business from selling chic buttons to trading duck down. Founding Crescent Garments and partnering with Ryan Pierce, will she survive what's coming from the real heiress...

A burnt-out office lady dies and reincarnates as a 200lbs demon princess. With a pay-to-win system, she slaps her scheming half-sister who tries to steal her throne. But to save the realm, she must sacrifice herself. Only her loyal consort waits… Will she ever return?

Transmigrated as a F-tier "trash snake" abandoned by his pretty owner, Ryan Cole is one bite away from death, until he unlocks the ultimate cheat: to evolve into anything. From shadow wolves to mythical dragons, every enemy is just lunch. But when a world-ending beast tide arrives, even the gods aren't safe... because he's hungry for divinity.

Reborn as an empty mech. No flesh, just metal—but my battle instincts remain. I've saved this world from monsters. Now I'm scrap, target practice for a reckless girl who rides me hard and never cares. She overheats my barrel daily. I thought retirement was bad. She's just the beginning. What happens when the real enemy returns?

My soul was trapped in the Abyssal Void, then the Monkey King growled from the darkness. Our plan? Find the Golden Cudgel and borrow the Great Sage's power. When I unleashed that strength, the supernatural hunters came knocking. Now I'm their intern, and the Cudgel sits in their vault. But will I free a legend... or unleash hell?

column1: Sorry Ex, I'm A Billionaire Now!
column4: When the apocalypse came, he lost everything. His lover vanished with the money meant to secure their future, only to learn she'd been unfaithful all along. Betrayed and broken, he awakened a power granting unimaginable wealth in a world where currency means survival. Now wielding trillions, he commands fear and respect. Until she returns…

She married the brother who didn't save her. For ten years, the real hero watched—waiting, protecting, loving from a distance. Now she's done begging for scraps from the wrong man. And when she finally walks toward the right one, the family that tried to break her is about to learn what happens when a woman stops asking permission to live.

Transmigrated as a F-tier "trash snake" abandoned by his pretty owner, Ryan Cole is one bite away from death, until he unlocks the ultimate cheat: to evolve into anything. From shadow wolves to mythical dragons, every enemy is just lunch. But when a world-ending beast tide arrives, even the gods aren't safe... because he's hungry for divinity.

column1: (Dubbed) He Chose the Copy. I Got the Real.
column4: A top doctor hides her husband's infertility for years, protecting his pride—until a cunning woman fakes a pregnancy and wins his favor. Betrayed with lies and a sapphire, she chooses divorce, raises her child alone, and finds love again. But when the truth comes out, who truly pays the price?

Sammy, the real daughter, returns home—only to be attacked by adopted sister Jade, who scars her face and burns her mother's last gift. Their father is blind. Sammy endures, collects proof of Jade's crimes. At the family banquet, she exposes everything. Jade falls. Justice served. Now her father begs forgiveness. Will Sammy take control... Or walk away forever?

column1: Look! My CEO Hubby Wags Tail!
column4: The female lead has a superpower: anyone who lies looks like a dog to her. That is, until she meets her cold-faced arranged marriage CEO. Every month, he really turns into a big Doberman! What is going on? After their contract marriage and living together, what kind of story will unfold between them?

column1: OMG! My Male Nurse Stole My Heart!
column4: A male nursing graduate, rejected for his gender, becomes caregiver to a paralyzed fashion designer. In a riverside villa, two souls heal—she teaches him to take control, he helps her chase her dreams again. As feelings deepen, a new challenge awaits. Can their bond survive what comes next?

column1: Royal Baby? No! I Wanna Chill!
column4: Mistakenly killed, office slave Daisy is reborn in the harem with a Fertility System!  Forced to woo the Emperor to survive, can she, who only wants to chill, escape His Majesty’s deep affection and peacefully live the slack life she dreams of?

Kael Voss, a Pallbearer of the Underworld, signs a 3-year marriage pact to shield the Hales. The Hales repay him with brutal betrayal, expelling him when his term ends. Financial collapse, loss of kin, as catastrophe strikes, they beg for his return... Will he come back to help them?

column1: Apocalypse Tycoon: I Sell, I Rule
column4: After waking in an acid rain apocalypse, Ethan gains a Supermart system with endless supplies and absolute defense. While others fight to survive, he turns a small store into the most powerful hub in the wasteland. But when rivals, mutants, and hidden forces close in, one question remains. Is he saving the world or quietly taking it over?

His life changes when he alone can see and open mysterious chests. Ten seconds of uninterrupted touch unlocks anything—skills, tools, rare resources. Every chest is a gamble, every reward a chance to level up. In a world that doesn't believe, he quietly grows, chasing his dreams one chest at a time. What's inside the next one?

column1: My Vendor Father Is a Tycoon?
column4: A young man lives as a poor commoner, unaware his street-vendor father is actually a powerful tycoon. Framed and humiliated by rivals, he loses his job and his lover. When he hits rock bottom, his father reveals his true identity. Will the ones who abandoned him regret it forever?

column1: (Dubbed) Ancient General Becomes CEO's Contract Wife
column4: Ancient General Claudia dies in battle and wakes up as the contract wife of CEO Tristan. She agrees to a marriage deal: play the perfect wife, then divorce for a house and job. She crushes cheaters, ignores gold diggers, and whips his spoiled siblings into shape. Tristan falls hard for her... Can he win her heart before the contract ends?

On the eve of Spring Festival, middle-aged Gloria learns she's the true heiress of a wealthy family! Returning with her husband and son, she faces humiliation from the fake daughter. As she shatters the elite's schemes, one question remains. Who really belongs at this family table?

column1: Contract Wife Unlocks My Dragon Power
column4: Cindy saves Ethan's life through an unexpected night together, but his check payment enrages her. To repay her, he agrees to a fake marriage. Their contractual intimacy cures his cold poison, but the wedding brings a stunning revelation. Will his true identity as Inferno Hall Master destroy everything?

column1: OMG! Rickshaw Boy Is a Spy?
column4: Ashtroy, 1930s. Oscar Howard pulls a rickshaw by day—and runs intelligence by night. Caught between mob boss Vincent Lee and crime queen Tina Ford, he plays both sides and rises fast. But the blood and betrayal open his eyes. He walks away from power and fortune. His real mission? The one no one will ever know.

Stella Shaw, Solar Constitution bearer, was jailed for her adopted sister. Freed, she's forced to marry Lawrence Gray—the union of their constitutions is her only hope after her Phoenix Bone was stolen. She nurtures Lawrence while battling his uncle. After Lawrence awakens, Stella's identity emerges...

On the night the Phoenix Queen gives birth, her husband and her half-sister plot a cruel swap: replace the true heir with their illegitimate daughter and steal the throne. What they don't know is the Queen has seen through it all. In the delivery room, she quietly switches the babies back. Plot all you like... the crown still knows its owner.

On the wedding day, Cole is left heartbroken when his girlfriend Iris abandons him for another man. At this time, Wendy appears. She is pregnant with Cole's child. Later, Iris comes back with regret. Why did she come back? And how will Cole choose between them?

column1: (Dubbed) New Kid? He's a Mafia Heir!
column4: Mafia heir Ethan Rivers enrolls at Lilac High for peace. But when Zack Hart's gang bullies his friend to death, Ethan's hidden power explodes, annihilating them. Now hunted by a corrupt family, he faces escalating attacks toward a final showdown at the library. Can he survive without becoming a monster?

On the eve of divorce, Rena North shares one reckless night with a stranger and walks away pregnant. Soon after, she's pushed into marrying Southport's most feared man, Evan Lane, never realizing he's the one from that night. As lies and hidden agendas pull them apart, one mystery lingers... who's really been pulling the strings all along?

Billionaire adoptee Luna finally finds her real family. Quincy calls himself her father. Daisy welcomes her like a loving sister. Last life, trusting them cost Luna everything, even her life. This time she stays alert. Yet at the moment of payment, her balance is wiped out again. Who is behind it?

column1: From Hell, I Own Your Goddesses
column4: Laws crumble. Earth becomes hell. The brother who shoved me into the abyss will now watch me strip everything from him, while the goddesses become mere points on my scoreboard. Goddesses now tremble as prey in my palm, for in this broken world, I alone dictate the rules. But when I've claimed everything, will I still recognize the man I used to be?

column1: My Plants Rule the Zombie World!
column4: Betrayed by Zhao Zhen and Han Xue, Lin Feng gains the Divine Plant System. While growing Annihilation Mushrooms and upgrading plants, he builds Lin Feng's Base, recruits Catwoman and Shadow Blade, and faces the Four Horsemen. Can his plant army stop the Experiment Conspiracy and save City C?

column1: His Lucky Princess Fixed It All
column4: Chloe Shay, a fairy banished with the mission of saving the Aetherian Empire, is forced into a marriage exchange with Prince Elian Thorne. She discovers that the entire household is cursed to die young, while facing a reborn sister, a biased father, and a cruel matriarch. Can she reverse their tragic fate and save the empire?

She is just a college girl trying to pay her bills. He is a cold billionaire no one dares approach. Their worlds collide one stormy night at a luxury hotel. No names are exchanged. No promises are made. She vanishes before sunrise. He forgets she exists. But months later, when she walks into his world again, nothing will ever be the same...

column1: (Dubbed) Fated to Meet, Doomed to Part
column4: Vivian was betrayed by fiancé Felix for "true heiress" Alisa. On the wedding day, her parents forced her to marry Justin, who is a jinx. She chose Felix anyway, endured three years of coldness, then died heartbroken when he begged her to sacrifice for him and Alisa. Reborn, she chose to be with Justin, becoming Felix's sister-in-law...

When the world's top escort agency is hired to transport a corrupt official to his execution, they face a deadly threat from 'The Shadow'. And the leader decides to rely on a mysterious janitor, who is actually a retired sword god!

column1: Oh No! She Dumped Me... On Doomsday!
column4: The zombie apocalypse is here. Guns are useless. Only those with "Solar Term" powers can survive. Jay draws the weakest one: Qixi. Abandoned and mocked, he faces certain death. Then his system activates—with every breakthrough, a legendary lover descends, bound to him, gifting their power. From ancient seductresses to mythic warriors, his army rises. Can the weakest term forge the strongest path?

column1: (Dubbed) Past Life Cancer, This Life Fortune
column4: Zoe, who died of cancer after being abandoned in her past life, is reborn. She resolves to divorce, exposing her husband Liam's lies and her family's schemes. Unexpectedly, Liam and their son Jay are also reborn, but it's too late...

She was once a queen. Now Elara is a fugitive on the run. She takes refuge with Julian, a former emperor living in secret with his brilliant son. One mistake makes her the boy’s “stepmother.” He sees her as an outsider, unaware of her sacrifice. When enemies close in and power returns, will he accept her… or push her away forever?

Chloe worked tirelessly to support her childhood sweetheart Kyle through graduate school, only to be betrayed by him and the wealthy heiress Cindy. Drugged, she unexpectedly spent a night with poisoned Ken and later conceived twins. Will Chloe and Ken develop a romantic relationship? Can she finally find happiness?

column1: My Lycan Marked Me for Death
column4: Selene, a mixed-blood rogue, infiltrates the Night Wish Pack to save her captured father. Disguised as a servant, she is claimed by Lycan King Draven in a drugged mistake. Cast out as a lowly omega, Selene endures humiliation-only to discover she's pregnant. When a jealous princess orders her execution, will this child survive？

Isak had lost his mother at sixteen, and gained Wendy, his stepsister, as his new "guardian." Until the night he turned eighteen, she cast him out without a word. Four years later, the top idol Isak pins her against the wall, tilting her chin until her trembling lips part. "Wendy...How are you gonna drive me away this time?"

column1: Oops! I Kissed The Wrong Twin!
column4: A poor man is told by his father to marry a rich girl in a coma. Her twin sister comes to the company to test him. The man thinks they are the same person. When he learns they are twins, it's too late. The sister starts to love him. Then, the rich girl wakes up... What should they do?

column1: I Maxed HP to Seduce My Seniors
column4: Lin Feng, a cowardly playboy, transmigrates to a cultivation world with a beat-to-upgrade system. He maxes out HP, flirts with seven stunning seniors, and survives deadly battles. But a dark sect secret looms. Will his harem and cheat save him when a monstrous evil descends?

Five years ago, Lily shared one passionate night with Julian, then vanished, pregnant with his son. Desperate, she pawned their jade pendant. However, Tina used it to claim Julian as her child’s father...

Mom's dead. One old photo throws 28-year-old Sophia into 1990s Belmor as her mom's best friend. Layoffs, abuse, and poverty close in. She flips scrap steel for cash, helps revive a dying mine, then realizes the "accident" was staged... Can she rewrite her mom's fate?

column1: (Dubbed) I Time-Traveled for Power! Not 108 Children!
column4: Elara Voss accidentally time-traveled into a novel as a character who dies right after appearing. She wants to rewrite her destiny, not to have 108 Serpent Clan children. Will she be able to pull those twists and turns?

Cast out as an illegitimate son, Lin Mo awakens a rare all-attribute beast taming gift but is too poor to bond with even the weakest spirit beast. Laughed at by his school and betrayed by his half brother and girlfriend, he unlocks a powerful system and turns a lowly caterpillar into the mighty Void Azure Dragon.

Ethan Sullivan gets dumped by his girlfriend for a rich heir. Humiliated and heartbroken, he's hit by a car. But the accident awakens the Ultra Love System: spend money on women, get hundredfold cashback! Suddenly wealthy, Ethan attracts four stunning beauties... Can Ethan handle four jealous women fighting for his love?

To save her dying grandma, Tiffany marries a stranger known only as her comatose husband, Arthur Bryant. Eight months later, pregnant with twins and scraping by, she crosses paths with him again. He doesn’t recognize his own wife, yet can’t resist falling for her. When truth and desire collide, who will he choose?

column1: Bye Ice Queen, Hello Easy Millions!
column4: Abandoned after eight years of simping, J Julian hits rock bottom—until the Scam-to-Reality System crashes into his life. Every scam backfires into real cash, cars, and mansions. Now his ex is begging for round two. His response? Not a chance.

A century ago, Nora Night, the Soul Mistress, saved Harrison Sterling and made a pact: his family must guard the Everflame Shrine. Now Harrison lies comatose; his wife Fiona demolishes the shrine, ignoring Nora's warnings...

Forced to marry into the Griffin Family for her sister, Nora Moor meets Jason Griffin on her wedding night, unaware he is actually Nixon Griffin, her rumored impaired husband in disguise. As they play along with mistaken identities, feelings grow. With family schemes and danger closing in, can the couple get over them with a happy ending?
N/A

Stellan becomes a deliveryman to save his daughter. While working, a luxury car hits him. The driver is his classmate James, who is also the husband of a rich girl named Rain. When Rain arrives, James is shocked to learn that the deliveryman is actually the long-lost heir of his wife's wealthy family...

Ethan Kent, a gifted healer without a license, treats his village on credit. But a rival, Greg Grant, turns them against Ethan, leading to his arrest for illegal practice. Sentenced to 20 years, Ethan saves a dying man in court, earning his freedom—yet another scheme is expecting him again. This time, can he get away with it for a second time?

Polly, the Saintess, swears she would rather be tortured than bow to the Demon King’s threats or temptations. Weird potions, body mods, mind games, bring them on. Lucius, the Demon King, is desperate to dodge his scripted villain doom. So, will Polly's odd fantasies come true or will Lucien's doom be avoided?

column1: Stole My Wedding? Then I'll Steal Yours!
column4: Orphaned at a young age, Sanda Smith grows up under the same roof as the Watson brothers, secretly in love with Harry. But when circumstances push her into a marriage with his brother Jonathan, he vanishes on their wedding day. Betrayed and humiliated, will Sanda break or rise?
column5: ['Rich Family Feud', 'Enemies to Lovers', 'Love After Marriage']

column4: A modern food god becomes a discarded escort. Armed with a stick, she fights back, shocking nobles with scientific braising, winning over the Empress Dowager, and foreign envoys. She builds an empire, uncovers the truth, and rises to glory. When Prince Bob begs forgiveness, the emperor has already paved her way. Armed with food, she conquers all.

column1: My Ex Fell For Her Foster Mom
column4: To marry the penniless Timothy Lester, Cecilia Scott gave up her family inheritance. But now that he has achieved success and insists on keeping his ill-intentioned foster mother, Nancy Ford, in their home, can their five years of devoted love survive this crisis of trust?

When the zombie apocalypse hits, Lin Lie gets a Love System that forces him to date a hot zombie CEO! Now he's dodging zombie hordes, evil conspiracies, and his jealous childhood friend, all while trying to keep his undead girlfriend from eating him on date night. Saving the world? Easy. Surviving romance? That's the real problem.

column1: The Almighty and His Women Troubles
column4: Adam possesses the sacred bloodline, but a deadly curse will kill him in three days unless he finds his senior sister. His master sends him to locate both his senior sister and his fiancée. After rescuing them from their own crises, Adam was caught in hilarious and romantic entanglements with multiple beauties. Can he break the curse and survive?

Betrayed and abandoned, Elena finds hope in Damian, only to discover he loves her sister. After losing everything, she vanishes into the future with Julian. When the truth shatters Damian, he'll chase her across centuries. But some betrayals can never be undone.

column1: (Dubbed) Oh Nice! I Married the Mad Devil!
column4: Nina Reed watched her mother die in a fire, orchestrated by her father and stepmother. Years later, her stepsister tricks Nina into marrying the feared Ethan Tate. But Nina chose this. Inside his world, two broken souls form a dangerous alliance. When her stepfamily realizes who she truly married, will they survive what's coming?

column1: Kill Me On New Year's Eve
column4: On New Year's Eve, Daisy is home alone when intruder Shawn breaks in. Her husband Wesley returns just in time, accidentally killing Shawn during the struggle. To thank those who aided her, Daisy hosts a dinner party. But when her dog dies from poisoned cake, the guests become suspects. A deadly conspiracy unfolds before midnight strikes...

Raised by the ultra-wealthy Hale Family, Sloane Hale returns to her bio-parents with a billion-dollar surprise. Instead of love, she faces abuse. Sloane hides her identity to teach them a lesson. When the truth explodes, her bullies beg for mercy! Will she forgive them when her father and brother wear maid outfits to apologize?

Ryan Lynn, heir to Dragonia Group, is forced by his father Quentin into poverty to build character.  His wife Jenny Chandler grows resentful and betrays Ryan as her career flourishes while Ryan struggles.  At the Dragonia Banquet, Ryan undergoes transformative lessons from his father, and became a qualified heir.

column1: (Dubbed) Stay Away! She’s a Violent Psycho!
column4: In her previous life, Jessie Bennett was framed by the impostor heiress and sent to a mental asylum, where she suffered daily torment until her tragic death. Now reborn, Jessie is poised for a decisive counterattack in this life! How will she take them down one by one?

column1: Tame the Devils or Die: The Villainess’s Revenge
column4: A stressed office lady wakes up inside an otome game as the cruel villainess who tortured four devil butlers. She’s now facing their extreme hatred and sky-high dark values. A system forces her to please them to survive. But one devil’s dark value has hit 97, and he’s been waiting to take his cruel revenge…

column1: Chose Your Mom? Now Regret It!
column4: Queenie took over a dying company and her stepdaughter Gina. Ten years later, she returned in triumph with Reign Group, while Gina brought back her mother Wendy, who's after her fortune. Under Wendy's instigation, Gina repeatedly let Queenie down. After Queenie leaves with everything, Gina finally regrets. What'll she do then?

column1: I Raised You, Now You Ruin Me?
column4: For years, Selena gave everything to her son. Now he wants her last penny—and he's willing to destroy her to get it. A fake leukemia. A viral witch hunt. But this mother has a secret he never saw coming... When the truth finally breaks, who will be left standing?

column1: Why a Chicken Ended My Wedding?
column4: Landon Walsh, a village boy, spends three years charming his way into the heart of a billionaire heiress. With the wedding approaching and families set to meet, his perfect plan seems unstoppable... until a wandering chicken runs into the wrong car. Behind the wheel? His fiancée's parents. What will happen next? Will things go as he hopes?

column1: The Revenge of the Scrapped Genius
column4: Felix Chase was the chief engineer who kept the factory running until his own apprentice and the plant director framed him and cast him aside. Then everything stopped. They begged him to come back. His reply was simple. Sorry, I'm off the clock. She was furious. But the real shock was yet to come.

In Riverton, miracle healer Cherry saves lives no one else can, but kindness makes enemies fast. A rival "Chosen One" appears to take her place, while loyal followers and an obsessively protective billionaire father refuse to let her fall. As secrets tighten their grip, one question remains. Who is Cherry, really? To be continued.

column1: Easy, Mr. CEO, I Got You!
column4: Top Interpol agent Lu Wanqing is thrown into a glossy corporate romance as a disposable extra, forced to survive by harvesting emotions. She soothes explosive CEO Li Nancheng and becomes his assistant, only to learn his turbulent feelings extend her life the most. As his rare disorder eases around her and the original heroine turns hostile, is she playing him, or rewriting fate?

column1: (Dubbed) True Love From A Fake Death!
column4: Selene Pierce, a famed healer, finds herself just a stand-in for her stepsister, Diana, the one Crown Prince Vincent Lowe is obsessed with. After a faked death, she flees to marry Prince Kael Grant in Northwild. Kael is the first to entrust her with his life. Yet her vengeful past won't let her off. Can she protect the one she loved this time?

What becomes of us when fate ends?
Chloe Lynn, a betrayed housewife, but hidden beneath is a top scientist. Jensen Shaw, CEO of Apex Group, self-absorbed to the core.
Fifteen years of marriage shattered the moment. Betray and mistress. She will no longer hide who she is. Will they reconcile? Or will she rise from the ashes and start her new life?

column1: Foolish Young Master? I'm Fiend Lord!
column4: James Walker, the Fiend Lord and the world's first great villain, was sealed by various sects sixty years ago. When he reopens his eyes, he awakens in the body of a foolish young master of Azure Sect. Now the great villain has returned. He will take revenge and let none escape judgment. Will he clear his name and become a legendary figure?

Graham Chambers, a rising manager at the Price Group, attends the CEO's mother's 60th birthday party, hoping to impress. But his spoiled son Brandon ignites a storm that turns the banquet into a night no one will forget...

column1: The Mob Boss's Lost Family Found!
column4: 15 years ago, Liam was left for halfdead after his pregnant wife Raina was murdered. Rescued and renamed Samuel, he rose to unite the four families and avenge his family. But Raina and their son Shawn survived, enslaved by Charles. Drawn by a Hibiscus Cake, Samuel unknowingly meets Shawn and misses his wife. Can he finally reunite with his family?

column1: Greedy Wish? Pay With Your Youth!
column4: Is your roommate a freak or a god? Susie Good is a deity hiding in a dorm at Riverford. Her roommate Sharon is jealous and uses a Blood Pact to steal Susie’s beauty. Sharon thinks she is the hunter, but she just woke a monster. What happens when the goddess reveals her true face?

Given a second shot at senior year, Julian Hart vows to fix the mistakes that ruined his life. As he helps the campus belle Clara White break free from her troubles and chase her music dream, they grow closer while facing the schemes of the people who once destroyed him. Can he finally right past wrongs and win Clara's heart?

column1: Say you remember, say you love
column4: After her family went bankrupt, Elizabeth reconnected with her first love, Jason, who had become a world-renowned football star. Despite never forgetting the pain he once caused her, she couldn't resist being drawn to his brilliance.

Mason Holt's perfect marriage shatters when a leaked video shows his wife Taryn with another man. As he digs deeper, he discovers her past, including her work as a “Scam Buster,” has been erased. With blackmail closing in and her best friend drawing him closer to the truth, is Taryn a victim or a master liar?

When Lin Lu wakes up in a hellscape overrun by horrors, he realizes his eyes see the apocalypse differently. While everyone else flees bloody ghosts, he sees stunning beauties! Sweet lolitas, icy queens, and charismatic princesses all desperate for his attention. Now, as murderous twin ghost sisters knock on his door, he opens it with a grin. Scared? He’s too busy falling in love!

Betrayed and wrongly put into jail by his fiancée, Zane Lynch masters deception from three gamble experts in prison. After passing their trials upon release, he finds his brother set up by his fiancée and the family empire at risk. Now as the Gamble King, he seeks vengeance with unparalleled skills. Can he end gambling for good?

column1: They Mocked the Village Girl. Big Mistake!
column4: She walked into the mansion where her blood family lived. They called her wild, unrefined, a girl from nowhere. She said nothing. She waited. When danger came, they froze in fear. She stepped forward and ended it with her hands. Now every room falls silent when she enters. Not out of love. Out of respect. Out of fear.

My proud friend just slapped away a billionaire's money. I, being even poorer, picked it up. Now he's made me a shocking offer: convince her to accept his help, and he’ll sponsor us both. To survive, what should I do?

Raised far from court, Eleanor returns to a noble house only to be betrayed by the man she loved. Framed in a ruthless exam, she is forced into the palace as bride to a feared emperor. Love turns to ambition, enemies to allies. As power shifts and secrets surface, who will fall when the throne tests her resolve?

column1: Hey, Sickly Prince, You're Mine to Fix
column4: A brilliant but audacious healer, Stella Moore enters the Crown Prince’s life under the guise of curing a deadly poison. Prince Jonas appears frail and gentle, yet hides cunning schemes. As they navigate palace intrigues, secret poisons, and shifting loyalties, will their alliance survive the lethal games of power?

NBA legend Jordan's true heir, Scotty, swapped by a plumber. Return to the court 13 years later. Despite being bullied by an imposter and mistreated by the parents who don't recognize him, Scotty’s genius talent eventually unmasks the truth of his royal blood.

column1: As A Fake Eunuch, Win It All
column4: A modern guy Aaron Clark transmigrated into a eunuch in the Crown Prince's Palace. By helping the Prince ascend to the throne, he wins over girls around him and became the biggest name in the Palace.

After dying a nobody, Jason Cole wakes up with a second chance and one rule: never back down. Once a bullied waiter in Rivergate, he rises through the criminal underworld, crushing enemies and outplaying powerful families. When will he rule the game and make everyone bow? Let's wait and see.

column1: (Dubbed) Horror Game? I Thought It Was a Dating Sim!
column4: Trapped in a deadly horror game, I am forced by a system to romance the monsters! While others flee for their lives, I must read poems to ghosts and dance with skeletons. The System warns: Seduce the abyss or be erased. When romantic tropes meet spine-chilling terror... can I fake love to save my life?

She is just a college girl trying to pay her bills. He is a cold billionaire no one dares approach. Their worlds collide one stormy night at a luxury hotel. No names are exchanged. No promises are made. She vanishes before sunrise. He forgets she exists. But months later, when she walks into his world again, nothing will ever be the same...

column1: Back from Death? Time to Burn You All, Auntie!
column4: Reborn into her worst nightmare, Nora Fort now knows every trap. Betrayed and sold once, she turns her pain into a weapon. She learns to fight, sets cunning traps, and infiltrates the criminal ring that destroyed her. This time, she is the hunter. Can she dismantle the evil from within and claim her new life?

column1: How to Catch Fakes? Just Play Prey
column4: Kidnapped as a child, Violet survives a rain-soaked escape and returns to her birth family. Faced with a scheming adopted daughter and biased affection, she chooses weakness as armor. Scores fall, traps close, and love is used as bait. Until one exam, one deal, one truth flips the board. When masks crack, who truly owns the Holt legacy?

column1: Jinx No More, Love at the Door
column4: Leah, long seen as a “jinx,” was abandoned and shamed by her family after her cancer diagnosis. To pay for treatment, she worked as a bar “drink shield,” only to be framed by the adored adopted daughter and beaten by her brother. In despair, she attempted suicide whilst her neighbor Noah...
Reborn into a tragic timeline, Claire faces a broken family and endless public mockery. She reforms her troubled loved ones and crushes her enemies. Will her second chance at happiness last forever?

Gina's world shatters at her husband's new bar when his mistress, Camille, publicly assaults her and her mother-in-law, even flaunting Gina's own heirloom watch. Betrayed by Brandi's indifference, Gina finds rescue in Ryan Steed. Forging her own path, she rises as a celebrated designer, while Brandi's crimes lead to prison, leaving Camille with nothing.

In a warlord era ruled by fists and reputations, a legendary fighter lays down his power for a marriage of convenience and a dying promise. Three years later, the contract nears its end, an overseas rival returns, and forbidden strength awakens. This time, will love or vows be broken first?

Burntout corporate slave dropped dead and transmigrated to a princess in a female dominating Empiree. With evil sister and other dark forces ambushed around, how can she win back her four bonded mates and take back what's rightfully hers, and find her way to lead the entire Empiree to full glory...

Max Lynn awakens in a martial arts world with the Divine Chef System. Every dish he sells earns him reviews that boost his combat power! As warriors seek his restaurant for magical meals that enhance their abilities, Max discovers his culinary skills are making him the strongest fighter alive. Can a chef who never trained become invincible...?

column1: Forget the Apocalypse, I Farm Now!
column4: Apocalyptic survivor Ryan Lynch time-travels into an ancient village fool. Using future tech, he saves his family, reunites with his brother, ends famine with super rice seeds, and fights corruption with a princess. When a scientist unleashes a zombie plague by accident, can Ryan stop the outbreak and secure his family's future?

column1: Fated to Misunderstand, Destined to Love
column4: Seven years after their wedding was destroyed by family betrayal, Chloe must turn to the only surgeon who can save a child: her ex-fiancé Calvin, now a brilliant but resentful doctor. With a life in his hands and a broken past between them, will he choose revenge… or redemption?

Once a supreme immortal, Lucas is cast down to the mortal world as the disgraced head of the Millers. Mocked as a coward, he survives only under the protection of his wife, Selina. Now, the legend awakens. Will he rise again and reclaim the family's lost glory?

A betrayed princess, once sent as a hostage and killed after returning home.
Reborn in the enemy camp, she chooses survival over sacrifice.
This time, she dances, seduces, and schemes her way up.
But when revenge turns into desire… who's really in control?

column1: Oops! My Rehab Therapist is My First Love!
column4: The heir of the Wright family, whose sexual function was impaired in a car accident, was giving up. Then he ran into Lily, his teenage crush, and a rehab therapist. Through her kindness and expertise, he regained both inner strength and physical health and reclaimed his lost love.

column1: Sorry, Fiancé! The Real Hero Wants His Girl Back
column4: Three years ago, a lie stole her life. On the eve of her wedding, billionaire heiress Stella learns her fiancé is a fraud who stole another man’s heroism. She plots revenge by swapping the groom. But the stranger she hires hides a dangerous truth. When secrets erupt at the altar, who will fall and who will win her heart?

column1: That Poor Guy Is the Death Lord?!
column4:
Born with a deadly condition, Ethan Hale, descends the mountain to marry for survival. When his cold fiancée tears up the engagement, he marries her sister instead. Meanwhile, the world is searching for the Death Lord who comes down seeking destiny, never suspecting the broke man in front of them is the one they are hunting...
Adapted from the Qimao Novel "Yan Wang Xia Shan" by Cang Yue Ye.

Leticia Shelton's return triggers a conflict with her husband over his scheming aide, culminating in the brutal death of her beloved horse by his orders, which finally shatters her heart and drives her to decisively strip him of all his power.

column1: (Dubbed) Back at Eight: The Football Legend
column4: When legendary football King Thomas wakes up in the body of his 8-year-old great-grandson Theo, he faces a Dracoland football under siege by corrupt owners and match-fixers. Leading Evergreen FC against ruthless rivals and foreign invaders, can the King reclaim glory and expose the shadows lurking behind the beautiful game?

On her wedding night, Lila is framed and killed. Reborn, still buried alive. Reborn again, then framed for husband Earl Carter Jr.’s murder. She’s trapped in a deadly loop. Can she break the cycle before the villain strikes again?

column1: Help! He Wants to Burn Me Alive!
column4: Louisa Thomas, a wealthy heiress, severed ties with her father, Samuel Thomas, to marry her beloved, Edward Young. However, Edward betrayed her by having an affair with his sister-in-law, Eva Ward. They conspired to abuse Louisa. Samuel, longing for his daughter, sought reconciliation. Edward lied, claiming Louisa had died in childbirth. Did Samuel truly fall for this deception?
She wore a uniform. Punched the same clock as everyone else. But her hands had never known real work, only the weight of decisions that broke cities. And today, someone finally pushed too far.

From protein-powder legend to a starving man in ancient times, Marcus's time travel goes very wrong. Claimed by a princess, burdened with children, and thrown into a ruthless world, he's forced to fight back using modern fitness science and a secret formula. But can muscles really change destiny?

Yvonne Gogh joins the company and stuns the President Julian Ford with a presentation exposing critical system flaws. After ending a frivolous relationship, she devotes herself to work. Her exceptional project reports and sharp insights earn Ford's profound respect. With her outstanding performance, she becomes nearer to her big boss.

Transmigrated into a novel, best friends Jenny and Judy are stuck playing perilous roles, a scheming man's wife and a yandere's stand-in lover. While pretending to be devoted, they secretly enjoy their luxurious lives. However, when the original heroine Mia returns, heralding a tragic turn, they plot a daring escape...

column1: Got X-Ray Vision and a Suitor Club
column4: Poor college student Stella gets sent flying by campus heartthrob Gordon and wakes up with a mind-blowing power: X-ray vision. With that, she flips from broke nobody to gorgeous tycoon. A campus boss, a rich heir, and the most feared power player all fall into her orbit. Is she gonna win it all?

column1: My Top Doctor Stole My Heart
column4: When Dr. Joseph Johnson meets Charles Summers, a fearless racing star secretly battling a humiliating condition, the spark between them is instant—and wild. Through treatment, Joseph draws Charles into a whirlwind of obsession and desire, blurring the line between care and control… But when passion shifts into obsession, who will be the true prey in the end?

column1: Flash Marriage to My Lady Boss
column4: Aidan is dumped by his girlfriend on their wedding day and quickly marries Flora, the CEO of the Vale Group. What seemed like a peaceful life turns chaotic when Flora suspects Aidan might be the lost heir, Wyatt. As their fates intertwine, Aidan gets caught in family power struggles... What secrets lie beneath this sudden marriage?

Cate thought her romance with mafia heir Nick was a new beginning—until the night she planned to give him everything, only to find James in her bed instead. Ruthless, powerful. Overnight, her world shattered. At a party the next day, the truth hits hard: she slept with the man who rules the underworld—and her boyfriend's father.

Sophia, a famous lawyer known as Queen of the Bar, is preparing a case commissioned by Senator Harrison, while her own daughter and mother are being bullied by Percy Harrison, her current client. Sophia reveals her identity, but Percy refuses to believe her. Instead, she subjects both Sophia and her family to even more humiliating treatment... EP 1:Sophia Morgan, the undefeated 'Queen of the Bar', takes on the controversial case of Senator Locke Harrison's daughter, who is charged with assault, while facing the senator's volatile temper and his daughter's unrepentant attitude, setting the stage for a high-stakes legal battle.Will Sophia's legal prowess be enough to navigate the treacherous waters of the Harrison case, or will the senator's threats and his daughter's recklessness lead to an unexpected twist?

column1: He Wanted Her... But Lost Me Forever!
column4: Vivian Sullivan is ready to marry billionaire Damian Ford, certain it's her fairytale beginning. But when she learns he only loves her half-sister, her world shatters. Betrayed, she walks away and marries the mysterious heir Adrian Cooper instead. Only after losing her does Damian realize she was his true love—but by then, it's far too late... EP 1:Vivian agrees to marry a blind stranger to escape her father's manipulation, while her sister Ivy is set to marry billionaire Damian Ford, revealing a deep family betrayal and a shocking setup.Will Vivian's sacrifice lead to her true happiness, or will Damian's past actions come back to haunt them all?

The driver's daughter, Nina, spent seven years quietly loving Jason, the heir who never saw her. One reckless night bound their fates, but secrets and betrayal tore them apart. Years later, she returns as a woman the world now admires, and the man who once broke her can only watch. Turns out, revenge isn't the sweetest payback—success is. EP 1:Nina, the driver's daughter, confronts the harsh reality that Jason, the heir she secretly loved for seven years and was in a relationship with for two, never truly loved her. Faced with his mother's disdain and her own heartbreak, Nina decides to leave for good, refusing any monetary offer to walk away, revealing the depth of her unrequited love and the pain of being unseen.Will Nina's departure finally make Jason realize what he's lost, or is this the end of their story forever?

Returning from a business trip, Tia Sherry finds her office invaded and her husband standing against her. Refusing to tolerate betrayal, she takes retaliation. When her husband sides with the wrong people and undermines her again, Tia strikes even harder... EP 1:Tia Sherry returns from her business trip to find her office invaded and her husband, Matt Chip, betraying her by siding with the wrong people. Determined to retaliate, she calls a board meeting to remove him from his position as chairman of Skyrock Tech and force him to repay the massive losses he caused, even if it means bankrupting him.Will Tia succeed in her plan to destroy Matt, or will he find a way to turn the tables on her?

Ethan Stone, a hardworking tech employee making half million a year, quietly buys a cheap game to relive his youth. When his daughter finds out, she launches a brutal online attack that leads to his heart attack. Now, with a shocking new power to multiply his spending, Ethan plans to take back what’s rightfully his. But will his family regret pushing him too far? EP 1:Ethan Stone, a hardworking tech employee, suffers a heart attack after his daughter publicly shames him for spending money on a game, leading to a brutal online attack. His family, revealing their true colors, decides to abandon him for financial gain, but Ethan awakens with a mysterious new power that could change everything.What will Ethan do with his newfound power to turn the tables on his ungrateful family?

Cameron Bell, the god of billiards, died in a car accident. When he opened his eyes, he was reborn in the body of a child on the verge of death, named Sadie Morris. In this lifetime, let's see how he manages to become the god of billiards again...

Renowned dancer Charlotte wakes up in 1980—pregnant, despised, and abandoned. She fights back with food, stories, and dance, even joining a cultural troupe to reclaim her life. Pregnancy turns stormy when she vents on Andrew, unaware he's already fallen for her. She plans to leave, but he won't let go. Can she escape… or will love trap her? EP 1:Charlotte wakes up in 1980, pregnant and confused, realizing her vivid dream of being a celebrated dancer was just an illusion. Facing harsh reality, she grapples with unexpected pregnancy and a strained marriage, while enduring severe physical pain.Will Charlotte uncover the truth behind her sudden time leap and pregnancy?

column1: Alpha King, Your Pregnant Luna Escaped!
column4: Coral, an Omega maid, has a one-night stand with the Alpha King Victor and getspregnant, ascending herself to the throne as Queen Luna.

Ezra, the bastard son of House Shaw's patriarch, Zanthos and his maid Lotus, has long been scorned by his family. Despite this, he possesses extraordinary talent and has been trained by three reclusive masters. Believing himself weak due to a lack of praise, Ezra kept a low profile. However, during a sect evaluation, his incredible strength was revealed. His power attracted enemies who uncovered his lineage, endangering his loved ones. How will Ezra overcome this crisis? EP 1:Ezra, despite being constantly called weak by his masters, shows his incredible strength by wearing 800 jin Starmetal weights and injuring a rival. His mother forces him to apologize for an incident, revealing the ongoing tension within House Shaw.Will Ezra's hidden talents bring more danger to him and his loved ones?

Adopted by the wealthy Liews, orphaned Selene lives a dream—until the real daughter returns, turning love into neglect. Desperate, she joins the mysterious Sleep Project to escape for 30 years. When she wakes up, what awaits her in this new world? EP 1:Selene, the adopted daughter of the wealthy Liew family, faces neglect and mistreatment after the return of the biological daughter, Stella. Desperate to escape her painful reality, she volunteers for the mysterious Serene Sleep Project, agreeing to sleep for 30 years, effectively vanishing from her current life.What will Selene find when she wakes up in 30 years?

Lynn Crawford has spent her life behind a mask. To the world, she is just another woman determined to carve her own destiny. She falls for Ryan Shaw, but when his powerful family intervenes, she has to disappear into the shadows, not to mourn—but to build. When he returns betrothed to another, society welcomes him with open arms. Yet they fail to notice the woman they once cast aside. Behold, she rises above their gilded betrayal. EP 1:Lynn, the Crawford heiress working incognito, struggles to balance her hidden identity with her feelings for Ryan, leading to a tense confrontation with her family and an unexpected encounter at Ryan's birthday celebration.Will Lynn's true identity be revealed at Ryan's birthday party?

During her university years, Sunny had an unexpected encounter with a stranger, Jason, and gave birth to an adorable son, Shawn. Six years later, a chance meeting in a hospital reveals Jason's shocking identity: the heir to the powerful and wealthy Laws family. Determined to find them, the Laws launch an extensive search. But as Sunny and Shawn are drawn into the opulent world of the Laws, they discover that life among the elite is anything but simple...

Left heartbroken at the altar, Liana impulsively marries Jacob, a mysterious billionaire hiding his own pain. What begins as a cold agreement transforms into a journey of passion and healing. As they navigate meddling exes, family drama, and corporate battles, will their whirlwind romance blossom into true love, or will their pasts tear them apart? EP 1:Jacob, a mysterious billionaire, flees his own arranged wedding orchestrated by his mother, while Liana, left heartbroken at the altar, impulsively proposes to him, setting the stage for an unexpected union.Will Jacob and Liana's impulsive marriage lead to love or disaster?

In a world ruled by power and bloodlines, those born without abilities—Muggles—are deemed worthless, destined for execution or cruel experiments. Frost, eldest daughter of the prestigious White family, hides a dangerous secret: she has no powers. Once cherished, her mother's death left her to endure a life of scorn and suffering. When fate binds her to Flame, a feared yet enigmatic man, she sets forth on a path of vengeance, where love and betrayal intertwine beneath the veil of destiny... EP 1:Frost, a powerless Muggle hidden within the prestigious White family, faces daily abuse and scorn. When her sister Lingus refuses to marry the feared Flame Grook, the family proposes Frost as a substitute, setting her on a dangerous path.Will Frost survive the brutal marriage to Flame Grook?

In her previous life, Susan Don won the lottery of one million, but then was killed by her stepsister Belle Don for this fortune. Having died in deep resentment, Susan was luckily given a second chance of life and woke up on the day she won the lottery. This time, the prize was ten billion! To avoid the tragedy in her last life, Susan kept it a secret. Coincidentally, she married the CEO of Haw's Enterprises, who also concealed his identity from her. This marked the beginning of her revenge... EP 1:Susan Don, who was murdered by her stepsister Belle Don after winning a million-dollar lottery in her previous life, is reborn on the day of the lottery draw. This time, she wins an astonishing 10 billion yuan instead of the original million. Determined to avoid her past tragedy, Susan lies to Belle about winning only 3,000 yuan, while internally plotting her revenge against Belle, who had betrayed and killed her in the previous life.Will Susan's secret and her revenge plan unfold as she intends, or will Belle discover the truth?

Rising star model Nancy Thompson faces an industry ban, but her devoted boyfriend stays by her side. To repay his support, she helps him rise to success—only to catch him cheating with her best friend right before their wedding. Heartbroken but determined, she turns around and marries entertainment mogul Thomas Manson, ready to take back what’s hers. EP 1:Nancy discovers her boyfriend Joe and best friend Yuna's betrayal the day before their supposed wedding, leading her to make an unexpected marriage proposal to entertainment mogul Thomas Manson.Will Thomas accept Nancy's impulsive marriage proposal?

column1: Rise of the Gold Dragon Empress
column4: Kimberly Martinez died by Paul Garcia's betrayal. Reborn, she sought revenge via superior bloodline. Kenneth Clark, sealed Dragon King, waited for her. Paul, black dragon in golden disguise, plotted transformation. Donna Robinson targeted Kimberly after marrying Paul. Her father Joshua and stepmother were cruel. During lightning trial, Paul attacked but was cursed to dissolve. Reborn to bride selection when Paul chose Donna, Kimberly vowed change. EP 1:Ted Lang, the noble Prince Loong, discovers his consort Mary White has laid a black egg, which he views as a disgrace to his bloodline. In a rage, he vows to destroy the egg, leading Mary to curse him with her bones, blood, and life, condemning him to eternal suffering. The scene ends with Mary seemingly reviving after her death, hinting at a mysterious resurrection.Will Mary's curse truly trap Ted in eternal torment, and what does her unexpected revival mean for the future?

A childhood sweetheart returning after years apart, or a longtime lover who suddenly walks away – which one will win a man's heart?  After three years with her boyfriend, Quiana faces the return of his first love, Nora. Using subtle manipulation, Nora gradually causes Quiana to feel neglected and overlooked by her boyfriend. Now, Quiana decides to break up with him on their third anniversary, exactly 30 days away... EP 1:Simon's first love, Nora, returns from abroad, causing Quiana to realize she has been a substitute for Nora in Simon's heart, leading her to decide to break up with him on their upcoming third anniversary.Will Quiana truly leave Simon, or will she fight for their relationship?

In this thrilling culinary adventure, the world's greatest chef mysteriously goes missing after reaching the peak of his career. During a grassroots cooking competition, Skylar, a humble prep cook, reveals his true identity as the missing master chef. Betrayed and injured, he loses the use of his hands and becomes a beggar. Now, with only the ability to make one homemade dish, can Skylar defeat his treacherous foes, reclaim his title, and rediscover the true meaning of cookery? EP 1:Skylar Fong, the world-renowned Master Chef and three-time winner of the World Culinary Competition, mysteriously vanishes after reaching the pinnacle of his career. Amidst the chaos of greedy relatives and desperate restaurant executives vying for his attention, Skylar disappears without a trace, leaving everyone bewildered and questioning his fate. A year later, a humble prep cook in a small restaurant is ridiculed for his infatuation with Miss Chang, a kind-hearted woman who took him in, as the shadow of the missing Master Chef looms large over the culinary world.Will the prep cook's hidden connection to the missing Master Chef be revealed?
