For years, Mira endured the suffocating grip of her family’s emotional torment. Desperate to escape, she saw Samuel Dalton as nothing more than a tool for her freedom. But fate had other plans. What started as a fleeting moment of passion turned into a deep connection, where love, healing, and redemption intertwined. Together, they must face their pasts and fight for a future they never expected.  EP 1:At a wedding, Mira's brother causes a scene in a bathrobe, drawing unwanted attention, while Mira is pressured into drawing the event, revealing her controlled life. Meanwhile, a mysterious woman propositions Samuel, hinting at future complications.Will Samuel's unexpected encounter at the wedding disrupt his growing connection with Mira?
column5: ['Secret Crush Turned Real', 'Rich Family Feud', 'Karma Payback']

column4: Julia catches her fiancé cheating at her wedding. Then she hires Grayson-who unexpectedly storms in-as her "fake fiancé", unaware he's actually a billionaire searching for his long-lost love—her. EP 1:Julia's wedding turns into a nightmare when she catches her fiancé Blake cheating with another woman named Vanny. In front of everyone, she calls off the wedding and faces humiliation from her ex-fiancé and his family. Just when it seems she has no one, a mysterious man, later revealed as Grayson, storms in and declares he will marry her, shocking everyone.Will Julia accept Grayson's unexpected proposal, and what secrets does he hide about their past?

Saintess Frigga fell for mortal Harrison Lucas. To protect their daughter Yara, she took her to the heavenly realm. Seven years later, Yara returned, saved a woman, and was adopted as Harrison's daughter. Together, they fought villains like Ryan Blinken and Xander Lucas, reclaimed the Lucas Group, and reunited with Frigga for a happy ending. Discover their epic journey! EP 1:Madam Lilian, known for her kindness in providing breakfasts, is suddenly in danger, prompting an urgent rescue attempt.Will Madam Lilian be saved in time?

Charlotte Chapman unknowingly welcomed a devious maid, Helen Zora, into her home who secretly swapped her daughter Sophia Julian with her child, Yolanda Zora. While Yolanda lived in luxury, the real Sophia, now Quinn Frank, grew up in poverty. Fate leads Quinn to the same middle school as Yolanda. When jealousy resurfaces and secrets begin to crack, Charlotte finds the truth. But will Quinn reclaim her rightful identity and place, or will deception win again? EP 1:Helen Zora cruelly swaps babies, forcing the real Sophia (now Quinn) into poverty while her daughter Yolanda lives in luxury. Years later, Charlotte senses something amiss when she sees a baby resembling Sophia.Will Charlotte uncover the truth about the baby swap?

During a bridal ball toss, two sisters cast their destinies into the air.
The elder’s ball lands with a nobleman; the younger’s, in the hands of a beggar.
One rises to glory. The other dies in regret—until time turns back.
Given a second chance, the younger sister rewrites the moment.
But what if the beggar holds a secret, and fate has its own design? EP 1:Lady Evelyn Sterling is honored with a prestigious title, but her sister Josephine's jealousy leads to a tragic confrontation. Evelyn is given a second chance to rewrite her destiny during the bridal ball toss, but Josephine, also reborn, schemes to secure a noble match for herself, unaware of the dark future that awaits in the Montague family.Will Josephine's desperate bid for nobility lead her into a trap she cannot escape?

On the eve of her engagement, Vicky Harris escapes from her cheating ex-fiancé and a family that seeks to trade her for personal gain. Unexpectedly, she becomes pregnant with the child of Grayson Ford, the heir to a powerful Shanghai family. Grayson acquires the hotel where Vicky works, and while she strives to build her career, she finds herself drawn deeper into his world. Will Vicky manage to carve out her own path, or will she be swept away by the powerful forces around her? EP 1:Vicky discovers she is pregnant with twins after breaking off her engagement with Zane, who cheated on her and falsely accused her of infertility. Her family pressures her to stay in the relationship for financial gain, leading her to flee and seek solace with a stranger.Will Vicky's impulsive decision with the mysterious stranger change her fate forever?

At ten, Annie Shaw learns her brain cancer has returned. With just seven days left, all she wants is time with her father, Lucas. But he's too caught up in another family to see her fading light. As love is misplaced and silence grows, will anyone notice the little girl who's quietly slipping away? EP 1:In her final seven days, Annie, suffering from a recurring brain tumor, faces the heartbreak of being abandoned by her father, Lucas, who is now more focused on his new family with Auntie Wren and Rosalie, even celebrating Rosalie's birthday while neglecting Annie's.Will Annie ever get the love and attention from her father before it's too late?

She waited. She forgave. She hoped. But after three chances and one heartbreaking loss, Sophie Wells is done playing the good wife. Now, as she walks away to reclaim her life, her husband wants her back. In her journey of self-seeking, can she really free herself from the shackles of love in the end? EP 1:Sophie tries to organize a family photo session for their wedding anniversary, but Leo keeps making excuses and fails to show up, highlighting his neglect and the growing rift in their relationship.Will Sophie finally confront Leo about his neglect and stand up for herself?

When Chloe faces relentless bullying at school, her mother, Eleanor, rises up to protect her. Unmasking lies, crushing false claims, and shattering deceit, Eleanor activates Bear Mode, and justice will be served — and no one escapes the consequences. She fights. She protects. She conquers — all for her child. EP 1:Chloe is relentlessly bullied by her classmates for not being picked up by her mother at the school gate, leading to a confrontation where her mother, Eleanor, steps in to defend her honor.Will Eleanor confront the bullies and their parents to protect Chloe?

An unexpected encounter led her to fall for a wandering stranger, not knowing he was the emperor. A cruel scheme cast her into prison. She buried her feelings and chose to walk away, only to protect a destined bond. Years later, a child's voice cries “Father” in the crowd, and fate quietly begins to turn again. EP 1:The Emperor, who has kept his harem empty for ten years, is pressured by his family to find a concubine to produce an heir, leading to a chaotic scene where women compete for his attention.Will the Emperor finally choose a concubine, or will he resist the pressure from his family?

Cassie Yates thought a road trip to a forest villa would be the perfect escape from hectic city life—until she dreamed of a monstrous python lurking nearby. She woke with a start, relieved it was just a nightmare. But soon, the giant snake appeared for real, and every horrifying detail of her dream began creeping into reality... EP 1:Cassie's terrifying dream of a monstrous python begins to manifest in reality as the group gets stuck in the forest due to car trouble and a broken bridge, with eerie similarities to her nightmare.Will Cassie's nightmare continue to unfold, putting everyone in grave danger?

column1: When I Was Gone, the Regret Began
column4: This article discusses the story of Sophia being retrieved by Grayson's family, but being instigated by her adopted daughter Olivia. After being imprisoned for three years, she was framed many times. Finally, with the help of her senior Tristan, she decided to leave, but she went through twists and turns and ushered in a new life five years later. EP 1:Sophia is falsely accused by her adopted sister Olivia of starting a fire that ruined her life, leading to her losing her family and the man she loved. Years later, Sophia returns and discovers Olivia's manipulation continues, as she risks her own health to donate part of her liver to Ethan, the man Sophia once loved, showing the depth of her sacrifice and the ongoing conflict between the sisters.Will Sophia's sacrifice for Ethan reveal the truth about Olivia's deceit?

Ryan Carter possessed an exceptional talent for martial arts, but his low status in the family led to constant ostracism. By chance, Ryan encountered a girl who looked exactly like his "late" mother but she was about to marry his stupid cousin. To rescue her, Ryan decided to run for the position of Patriarch. During the election, Ryan was framed and had his meridians severed, rendering him crippled. Fortunately, he was rescued by Taosaint, a master living in seclusion... EP 1:Ryan and his father return to the Zhang Clan, where they face humiliation and are reminded of their low status. Despite their suffering, they are advised to endure silently. Meanwhile, an unknown expert demonstrates extraordinary strength by knocking back the Qualification Assessment Stone eight meters, causing a stir among the clan members. This event hints at the presence of a powerful ally or foe within the clan, just as they prepare to elect their next patriarch.Who is the mysterious expert that surpassed the Grand Elder's strength, and how will their presence affect Ryan's struggle within the Zhang Clan?

column1: He Betrayed Me, I Married My Savior
column4: Her world shatters when her man abandons her. Deaf and mute, she enters a new marriage with a doctor, only to find he’s the one who saved her from a fire years ago. Just as her ex realizes she was his secret benefactor and comes crawling back, she resolves to be her own light. But will the past let her go?

Ignoring warnings, a greedy mine manager hunts snakes for gold and triggers vengeful snake spirits. After deaths and explosions, he abandons workers and gets killed by a giant python. Only a few men escape through fire. Will hidden serpents strike again deep in sealed‑off mountains?

She receives a recall order from her brother, the chairman of the werewolf council, and goes to his engagement banquet. But she is humiliated by two people there. At the critical moment, her brother arrives. The bullies have their wolf souls taken away. She lets go of her hatred and vows to become a fair and just leader of their kind.

column1: What? My Daughter’s Lover Insulted Me?
column4: After years abroad, a wealthy man meets his daughter’s secret lover at an auto shop. He learns the man tricks his naive daughter into misappropriating project money. At his welcome‑home party, the young man insults him. Will his daughter finally see through this selfish man?

column1: American Sniper: The Kid of Guns
column4: After Carl Oliver, The American Sniper and King of Guns, heroically dies saving a little boy named Spencer from a car explosion, his spirit is magically transferred into Spencer's 9 year old body. Now Carl, while inside the body of a 9 year old boy, must save his new family's gun range from unscrupulous relatives, evil rivals, and even deranged killers.

Against her father’s objection, a woman wed and nearly died in childbirth, then was forced apart from her husband. After her father passed, their daughter nursed her half-brother and planned to donate her heart to save him, yet the clan elder distrusted her and issued harsh threats.

A single mother devotes sixteen years to raising her kid. Right after enrollment, the branch school along with her child vanishes. Everyone denies the school’s existence and locks her up as mentally ill. Having died accidentally, she gets reborn, determined to uncover what really happened.

column1: Son, You Saved the Wrong Father!
column4: A doctor saves his father-in-law from a crash, letting his own father die. He misses the funeral to celebrate the man who caused it. At the grave, his mother reveals the truth: the father-in-law was drunk driving, and his wife covered it up. He divorces, quits his job, and returns home. Can a lifetime of devotion undo a single fatal choice?

column1: Died Broke, Woke Up A Healing God!
column4: Dying of cancer, a college student stumbles into a foot spa and finds his cousin's wife being sold. Beaten to death trying to save her, he awakens the Divine Farmer's Codex. He heals himself overnight and pulls a tycoon from the grave. But when a dying man becomes a god, can he ever mend his own broken past?

Once the world's best basketball player, he threw it all away with one mistake — and his mentor died because of it. Ten years later, he's a laughingstock assistant coach who just got fired. Now he's been handed a nobody team and one last shot... Can a broken legend actually bring them all the way to the top?

After his arrogance costs his best friend's life, legendary archer Harvey swears off killing and hides as a laborer in his fallen comrade's archery range. But when his friend's family is threatened, one arrow changes everything... and the Eagle Eye returns.

column1: Undercover in the Palace and Now She's Pregnant?
column4: To save her wrongly imprisoned father, a nobleman's daughter sneaks into the palace disguised as a maid. The Emperor hasn't touched a woman in ten years — but the first one to carry his heir becomes Empress. Six months later, she's pregnant... And someone at court just found out. Can she survive what comes next?

The Mermaid's mysterious one-night stand is revealed to be the ruthless deep-sea tyrant, a powerful sea ruler shrouded in cold secrecy. To her utter horror, this intimidating man also happens to be her fiancé's father! She is dragged into a dangerous web of forbidden desire and absolute possession.

column1: Above the Galaxy: The Wasteland Miner Is a War God
column4: In a blood-obsessed galaxy, lowly miner Raine enters deadly Vanguard trials to save his mother. Deemed fodder, he crushes noble elites barehanded, awakens his War-God frame, and one-punches a warship! When the Church condemns his alien blood, Raine shatters their sacred laws, rising as the supreme commander who rewrites the rules!

A broken village god, forgotten and cracked, gets one last prayer from a dying believer, and awakens a system of faith and power. He defeats demons, gathers worshipers, and grows from a forgotten statue to a true divine protector. Sometimes gods aren't born. They're rebuilt.

Freshman Avery becomes Laurent’s hockey manager for a full scholarship and lands in a chaotic, hormone-charged team. She clashes with moody Declan, gentle Finn, playful Wyatt and obsessive Brody. As three teammates ask her to Christmas dinner, who will she choose?

Naturals and modifieds live worlds apart. Orion Solari, a natural deemed unable to pilot a mech, was abandoned by humanity, despised by modifieds, and shamed by his own blood. Yet when humanity faces extinction, the one the world cast aside rises in a mech, strikes down the Hive Mother, and becomes its only savior.

A young woman farms corn on shared land with her fiancé's family. But she gets betrayed and kicked out. Left with only barren wasteland, she gains mysterious guidance from a land spirit. With its help she grows premium sweet corn and builds a thriving business, while her ex's family ruins their farm by trusting false advice and reaps bitter karma.

Seven years after little Leon, heir of the Capet family, was lost, he returns as Hal—a prodigy child mage from the Holy Mountain. Bound by a pact that keeps him from revealing he is Genevieve’s son, Hal plays cute and helpless, searching for a chance to reunite with her, while secretly crushing every enemy threatening his family.

column1: Wrong Man in One Life, the Godfather in the Next
column4: Murdered and reborn, the Irish Mafia heiress shreds her past obsessions, leaving her toxic ex to her two-faced stepsister. She steps into New York as the sacrificial bride to marry the ruthless Godfather, Vincenzo. Bracing for a deadly deal with the devil, she instead awakens an absolute, all-consuming devotion.

column1: My Online Crush Is My Stepbrother
column4: Max’s perfect online boyfriend “Babe” is sweet, caring, and always understands her. What she doesn’t know is that he’s actually Damon, her annoying stepbrother she can’t stand. When Damon discovers her secret identity, he starts showering her with affection. As Max searches for the truth, their long-awaited meetup reveals a shocking surprise.

This is the story of a modern woman who travels back in time and becomes an ancient empress dowager. She struggles to survive in the middle of court power games. After her time travel, she meets the current emperor. But she finds that this emperor is a bit unusual. What kind of story will unfold between her and the emperor?

A virus turns the world into a zombie wasteland, and a man with a plant-evolution system is betrayed and exiled by his wife and her lover. He builds a green oasis, rescues a city lord’s daughter, and survives attacks as enemies weaponize the undead. When a food scam threatens survivors, he exposes it and rises as the savior of the dead world.

Twelve years ago, she watched her sister die with a gold hairpin through her throat. Now she sleeps beside the general who ordered it. She’s his favorite mistress, her beauty a blade waiting for the perfect kill. Trapped between revenge and a forbidden desire, she must decide: finish the kill or fall into the same love that destroyed her bloodline?

In his past life, he ignored all advice and spent everything he had to buy his girlfriend a new car. But she broke up with him. In despair, he chose to end it all. But he is reborn just before buying the car. This time, he sees his girlfriend for who she really is. How will he get his revenge?

A betrayed scientist's daughter legally erases herself and enters cryosleep with murder evidence encoded in her neurons. Fifty years later, she wakes young, faces the husband who waited a lifetime, and takes down the biotech empire that killed her mother.

column1: Professor by Day, Master by Night
column4: Lucy is trapped in an abusive home. She finds solace only with a mysterious "Daddy." Her double life starts to fall apart when her professor, Ethan Walton, walks into the classroom. His voice sounds exactly like Daddy's! Lucy is torn between her feelings for the professor and her loyalty to Daddy. What will happen between the two of them?

A new employee is bullied by her coworkers and forced to pay for their expenses just to secure her position. But when she finally fights back and exposes their dirty secrets in front of a powerful client, they realize they’ve messed with the wrong person. As they plot to bring her down, she turns every attack into her rise to the top.

Desperate for love, she gave her entire fortune to her husband. But because she seems like a poor orphan, her toxic mother-in-law mercilessly abuses the pregnant wife! Little do they know, she is actually the lost heiress of a ruthless mafia billionaire! What happens when her real family finally finds her via a jade pendant?

column1: Barren Land Makes Her Rich Queen
column4: A young woman farms corn on shared land with her fiancé's family. But she gets betrayed and kicked out. Left with only barren wasteland, she gains mysterious guidance from a land spirit. With its help she grows premium sweet corn and builds a thriving business, while her ex's family ruins their farm by trusting false advice and reaps bitter karma.

column1: My Son Got Bullied? Now Mom Fights!
column4: She is a CEO, but she hides her identity and sends her son to her own kindergarten. To her shock, her son has been bullied for a long time. She fiercely protects her son and investigates in secret. Then she discovers a bigger hidden secret. Can she clean everything up and fix the kindergarten?

column1: He Broke My Pills, I Broke His World
column4: Thrown to the zombies after his tormentor crushes his life-saving medicine, the seemingly weak man finally snaps. He unleashes a terrifying power from his symbiosis with the zombie virus. But after escaping the chaos, his journey leads him to a secret Genesis lab, hinting at a much larger conspiracy...

column1: A Weak Girl Saved the Martial Hall?
column4: During an accident, a martial arts master saves a young girl and has his soul transferred into her body. Facing greedy relatives who want to take over her family's martial arts school, she uses her top-level skills to shock everyone. To protect her family's legacy, what other challenges are waiting for her?

column1: Steal My Beast? I'll Crush You All!
column4: The ungrateful sect leader encourages a disciple in training to steal the ancient divine beast. Will the Grand Elder find out? And how will she deal with the sect and punish those responsible?

column1: No place for his late love
column4: Cynthia exposed the God of War's lies and married the Underworld God's son. She healed her true love and found happiness. The regretful Aethon could never win his wife back and eventually vanished. The heroine began a new life.

He's the world's most feared warlord. Fresh from a brutal ambush, still in his bloodstained, mud-caked shirt, he rushes to his daughter's wedding. The groom sneers at his peasant look. The in-laws demand he leave. A fake heiress steals his daughter's place and forces him to kneel. But they are all wrong. This "peasant" is not to be messed with.

Arthur, a butcher trained by Uther, seeks family, saves Vivian, and learns he is Duke Richard's discarded son. Low-profile, exposed when a top knight kneels. When fallen knight Zalrok kidnaps his mother for an abyss rite, Duke Richard dies saving her. Enraged, Arthur masters God-Slayer Arts, rises to God of War, restoring Lionheart.

War God Sebastian repeatedly drains his wife Stella's divine essence, manipulated by the deceitful nymph Mia. After abandoning her, he loses Stella forever. Reborn through the Abyss, Stella becomes its Queen with Julian's power. When Sebastian discovers she once sacrificed herself to save him, he regrets. But it's too late.

column1: They Buried Me, I Forged a Kingdom
column4: After a humiliating broken engagement, he harnesses his secret: advanced industrial tech. He defies the monopolies that control the market, turning barren land into an industrial empire. He's crushing the old guard, but they won't go down without a fight. His revenge is just beginning.

column1: (Dubbed) I Dumped My Obsessed Ex for a Mafia Lord
column4: Tortured for five years by a man who only loved her adopted sister, the young lady is reborn. She cuts all ties with him and marries a ruthless mafia leader to fulfill her destined fate. Too late, her former lover awakens to his true feelings and drowns in remorse—can he ever redeem his irreversible mistakes?

column1: (Dubbed) My Gambler Husband Is A God
column4: Hunted by enemies, a powerful immortal possesses a mortal gambler. Using awakened magic, he cures his mute wife, builds a massive fortune, and crushes the corrupt elites who bullied them. But just as they find happiness, an army of gods descends from the heavens to claim his life! Can he protect her?

column1: A Millionaire's Revenge Tastes Like Grapes
column4: A tech millionaire returns with a rare grape, only to be betrayed by his uncle and the villagers. He tears up the contract, pulls the equipment, and leaves their harvest to rot. He invests in a failing farm run by veterans and builds a billion-dollar empire. When he arrives at the city's top, can the villagers finally understand the price of greed?

column1: Reborn, I Reject the Crown Prince!
column4: In her past life, she loved the crown prince and died with regret. After rebirth, she gives up the position of crown princess and asks the queen to arrange her marriage to her childhood sweetheart. But there is a bigger secret behind it all. Then the crown prince tries to frame them. How will they handle it?

column1: The Godmother’s Wrath: Don't Touch My Daughter
column4: After her daughter is bullied into a coma, a retired underworld Godmother returns to crush the corrupt those who destroyed her family, bankrupt an empire, and deliver justice, so her daughter can wake up and finish the fight herself.

The emperor learns that the people in his hometown are being oppressed by corrupt officials. He decides to travel in disguise. Along the way, people look down on him again and again, but he keeps surprising everyone. He even meets his long-lost daughter. Will they recognize each other? And can he ease the suffering of the people?

A racing champion lost his wife due to a rival's sabotage. He retired from racing. His daughter secretly starts a racing team to find out the truth about her mother's death. This deepens the conflict between her and her father. Then the daughter gets hurt during a race. He finally wakes up. Will the misunderstandings between them be resolved?

column1: Framed, Then Found a Darker Truth!
column4: As a princess, she has been clever and wise since childhood, always caring about the world. One day, a dead body is found on her boat. The boatman says the murder is connected to her. To find out the truth, she sneaks out of the palace. But in the end, she uncovers a huge crime hidden beneath the surface of prosperity.

column1: I Renovated It, Now She Won't Rent?
column4: A young designer rents her aunt's unfinished house for 500. She spends half a year renovating it herself. Her videos go viral, and someone offers 3,000 to rent it. When her aunt finds out, she wants to take the benefits of the renovation. The designer decides to tear down all the work she has done. What kind of conflict will break out?

Cole, a humiliated yacht deckhand, is shipwrecked on a deserted island. Abandoned, he unlocks a conquest system, rising from weakling to hardened survivor. He wins over Grace, Charlotte, Olivia, and Zoe, battles pirates, and endures Blackstone's brutal human experiments. In the end, he turns on the mastermind, escapes with his allies, and exposes the engineered catastrophe.

Amelia, the last Blaze heir, concealed her identity to settle a debt yet got betrayed by husband Oliver and fake saint Catherine. Regaining her magic, she unveiled her bloodline and sacred beast, uncovered Catherine slaughtered her kin, judged the pair with holy fire on her wedding, and let them perish infighting in frozen wastelands, thawing frost to bless endless spring.

Elara and her weak daughter Nia are traded to Ronan, the feared exiled Alpha, after Damon dies. Silent and harsh, Ronan seems cold, yet every order gives them warmth. Elara and Nia cannot read him—until he gives Nia a rare wolf elixir. As her hidden White Wolf blood stirs, will Ronan protect them or give them away?

column1: Love Gamble with His Secret Babies
column4: Mia infiltrates a crime lord’s casino to take him down—only to fall for his adopted son, Sean, and end up carrying his child. While she poses as the crime lord’s mistress, Sean protects her from the shadows, risking everything to keep her—and their unborn baby—alive.
